We first curate DIYHealth-900K, a large-scale multimodal dataset capturing diverse real-world home care scenarios. Building on this, we propose DIYHealthGPT, an adaptive foundation model for home-based health management, powered by the novel Hybrid Hyper Low-Rank Adaptation technique. Finally, we establish DIYHealthBench, the first benchmark to evaluate foundation models on home care tasks. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DIYHealthGPT delivers state-of-the-art performance over both general-purpose and medical-specific baselines on 11 home care tasks in both open-QA and closed-QA settings, laying the groundwork for the next generation of personalized health management at home.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 DIYHealth Suite，一个面向家庭健康管理的综合框架，包含 DIYHealth-900K 多模态数据集、DIYHealthGPT 自适应基础模型（采用新型混合超低秩适配技术）和 DIYHealthBench 基准。实验表明，DIYHealthGPT 在 11 项家庭护理任务上达到最先进水平。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI在医疗中依赖医院级设备，限制了可及性。随着便携设备和远程医疗普及，医疗正向家庭自主诊断（DIY）护理转变，但面临数据异质、任务需求动态变化、缺乏统一基准三大挑战。
AI.method: 1) 构建大规模多模态数据集 DIYHealth-900K，覆盖真实家庭护理场景；2) 提出 DIYHealthGPT 自适应基础模型，核心是 Hybrid Hyper Low-Rank Adaptation (H2LoRA) 技术；3) 建立 DIYHealthBench 基准用于系统评估。
AI.result: DIYHealthGPT 在 11 项家庭护理任务上，在开放问答和封闭问答两种设置下均优于通用基础和医疗专用基线，达到最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: DIYHealth Suite 为下一代个性化家庭健康管理奠定了基础，推动了生成式AI从临床向家庭场景的拓展。

title: Axiomatic Market Making
summary: This paper axiomatizes the bid-ask market maker's quoting rule. A quoting rule maps the maker's state, namely inventory, belief, variance, trade intensity, and informed-trader fraction, to a bid-ask pair. Eight natural axioms, together with six environmental assumptions on the maker's inventory cost, force a unique three-parameter family: the mid-quote is linear in inventory, and the spread decomposes additively into inventory and adverse-selection components. Each of the three parameters is identified from a distinct moment of the observable quoting rule, with the three identifications mutually decoupled. The eight axioms partition into a four-axiom indispensable core, one structural choice, and three modularity extensions. Two structural corollaries follow: the latent inventory cost function is recoverable from the limit order book, and a sharp phase transition separates a functioning regime from a frozen one. A closing meta-theorem identifies four features invariant across all admissible structural primitives within the axiom system. To our knowledge, this is the first forced-uniqueness axiomatization of the quoting rule.

AI.tldr: 本文对做市商的报价规则进行了公理化，通过八条公理和六个环境假设，唯一确定了包含三个参数的双边报价函数族，并揭示了库存成本、逆向选择等因素对买卖报价的决定机制。
AI.motivation: 做市商报价规则在金融市场中至关重要，但缺乏一个从基本原理出发的、唯一性刻画。现有模型往往依赖特定假设，无法统一解释报价规则的内在结构。
AI.method: 作者提出八条自然公理（分为核心四公理、一个结构选择、三个模块化扩展），结合六项关于库存成本的环境假设，通过公理化方法推导出唯一的报价函数族。
AI.result: 得到唯一的三参数报价规则族：中间报价关于库存线性，价差可分解为库存成分和逆向选择成分。三个参数可由可观测报价规则的不同矩独立识别。同时发现库存成本函数可从限价订单簿恢复，以及存在正常运作与冻结两个阶段的相变。
AI.conclusion: 这是首个对报价规则进行强制唯一性公理化的研究，并揭示了跨所有可允许结构原语下不变的四个特征。

title: Syll: Open-Source Personal Automation with Cross-Surface Execution
summary: Personal AI agents must increasingly operate across APIs, shells, web surfaces, and desktop GUIs, yet many systems remain tuned to a single interface and offer limited support for user teaching and auditability. We present Syll, an open-source, self-hosted multimodal agent harness that unifies MCP/API tools, CLI execution, and visual GUI control in a modular runtime, enabling agents to coordinate computer use across heterogeneous interfaces while streamlining how users and agents exchange information. At the core of Syll is a bidirectional user-agent interaction layer: users teach procedures through direct demonstration, which Syll compiles into reusable skills; agent execution is translated back into multimodal evidence -- logs, keyframes, and approval checkpoints -- for inspection and control. Syll further externalizes memory, skills, routines, and governance as editable local artifacts, supporting straightforward inspection, extension, and downstream development. Our implementation has been validated on production desktop applications including Adobe Photoshop, Adobe Audition, Stardew Valley, macOS Finder and others. We report mechanism-oriented studies that validate multimodal routing, teachable GUI replay, and persistent local artifacts. We hope Syll can serve as a practical open-source foundation for personal automation that users can teach, inspect, and continuously extend.

AI.tldr: Syll 是一个开源、自托管的 multimodal agent 框架，统一了 MCP/API、CLI 和 GUI 三种界面，支持用户通过演示教学、代理行为可审计，并将记忆/技能/规则以本地可编辑文件形式外化，已在 Photoshop、Audition 等桌面应用中验证。
AI.motivation: 现有个人 AI agent 多局限于单一界面（API、CLI 或 GUI），缺乏跨界面的统一协调能力，且对用户教学和可审计性支持不足。
AI.method: 提出 Syll 框架：(1) 模块化运行时统一 MCP/API、CLI 和 GUI 控制；(2) 双向用户-代理交互层，用户演示教学→编译为可重用技能，代理执行→转为多模态证据（日志、关键帧、审批点）；(3) 将记忆、技能、规则、治理外化为本地可编辑工件。
AI.result: 在 Adobe Photoshop、Audition、Stardew Valley、macOS Finder 等生产级桌面应用中验证；通过机制导向实验验证了多模态路由、可教学 GUI 回放和持久化本地工件。
AI.conclusion: Syll 可作为个人自动化的实用开源基础，支持用户教学、审计和持续扩展。

title: Implicit Causal Graph Construction in Text via Chain Discovery
summary: Causal graphs in text are typically populated by observable, predefined events. In contrast, we study implicit causal graph construction from text by treating each described cause-effect pair as the begin- and endpoint of an underlying latent causal graph and using large language models (LLMs) to infer intermediate causal events. We compare end-to-end graph construction with methods that frame the task as causal chain discovery. In the latter, graphs are built either by aggregating inferred chains or by progressively expanding partial chains through an iterative search process. We further explore Wisdom of the Crowd extensions that access causal knowledge from multiple LLMs in post-hoc aggregation and collaborative inference settings. We analyze trade-offs among these approaches and evaluate the validity of inferred causal relations using a manually curated database of 1,560 scientifically validated causal pairs. This database-based evaluation is proposed as reliable, resource-efficient, and transferable to settings where ground-truth graphs are unavailable.

AI.tldr: 本文研究从文本中构建隐式因果图，利用大语言模型推断观察到的因果对之间的中间因果事件，比较了端到端构建与因果链发现方法，并探索了多LLM协作的群体智慧策略，通过一个包含1560个科学验证因果对的数据集进行评估。
AI.motivation: 传统因果图构建依赖文本中可观测的预定义事件，但实际文本中的因果关系往往是隐式的，直接呈现因果对而缺少中间环节。本文旨在挖掘因果对背后的潜在因果路径，填补中间因果事件，从而更完整地理解文本中的因果关系。
AI.method: 采用两种主要范式：(1)端到端因果图构建；(2)因果链发现（包括聚合推断链和迭代搜索扩展部分链）。此外，引入群体智慧扩展，通过事后聚合和协作推理的方式融合多个LLM的因果知识。评估基于一个包含1560个科学验证因果对的手工整理数据库。
AI.result: 通过大规模科学验证的因果对数据库进行可靠性评估，揭示了不同方法在因果推断有效性上的权衡，验证了基于数据库的评估方法在资源效率和可迁移性方面的优势。
AI.conclusion: 基于数据库的评估方法可靠、资源高效且可迁移到无真实标注图的场景；多LLM协作的群体智慧策略有助于提升因果推断质量；因果链发现方法比端到端构建在隐式因果图构建上更具优势。

title: CellSense: A Sub-6 GHz Cellular ISAC System for Clutter-Robust Passive Sensing
comment: 6 pages, 13 images and submitted to MILCOM 2026
summary: Future wireless networks demand capabilities beyond traditional communication, driving the development of Integrated Sensing and Communication (ISAC) for environmental awareness, localization, and tracking. Ubiquitous cellular deployment allows ISAC to maximize spectral efficiency, lower costs, and expand sensing coverage. However, sub-6 GHz research has heavily favored communication, leaving sensing capabilities largely underexplored. To bridge this gap, we introduce CellSense, a novel sub-6 GHz ISAC architecture natively integrated into the 5G cellular protocol stack for real-world target tracking. We validate the system via Sionna-based orthogonal frequency-division multiplexing (OFDM) link-level simulations and an experimental USRP hardware prototype using the OpenAirInterface (OAI) stack. Furthermore, we analyze the communication-sensing tradeoff by quantifying how pilot symbol density impacts throughput versus sensing accuracy. Simulations show that CellSense achieves a 74 percent detection probability with a 1.43 m localization error in indoor warehouse environment, which improves to 94 percent detection and a sub-meter error of 0.33 m in the outdoor environment of Oval area at the NCSU Centennial campus. Hardware experiments in a highly cluttered indoor laboratory confirm a 1.28 m localization accuracy and 76 percent detection probability, proving its efficacy for practical ISAC deployments.

AI.tldr: CellSense是一种原生集成在5G蜂窝协议栈中的sub-6 GHz ISAC架构，通过Sionna仿真和USRP硬件原型验证，在室内外环境中实现了高精度目标跟踪（定位误差低至0.33米，检测概率高达94%）。
AI.motivation: 现有sub-6 GHz研究主要偏向通信，感知能力未被充分探索。为了弥补这一差距，作者提出了一种原生集成在5G协议栈中的ISAC架构，以实现真实场景下的目标跟踪。
AI.method: 提出CellSense架构，原生集成于5G蜂窝协议栈；通过Sionna OFDM链路级仿真和基于OpenAirInterface（OAI）的USRP硬件原型进行验证；并分析了导频符号密度对吞吐量与感知精度之间的折中关系。
AI.result: 仿真：室内仓库环境检测概率74%，定位误差1.43m；室外NCSU校园环境检测概率94%，定位误差0.33m。硬件实验：室内杂乱实验室定位精度1.28m，检测概率76%。
AI.conclusion: CellSense在sub-6 GHz频段实现了有效的ISAC目标跟踪，证明了其在实际部署中的可行性和有效性，为未来无线网络的通感一体化提供了解决方案。

title: Boundary Variance Inflation Causes Acquisition Bias in Gaussian Processes
summary: Gaussian processes with stationary kernels on bounded domains exhibit inflated posterior variance near the boundary. Despite being a long-recognized artifact in geostatistics and a source of over-exploration in Bayesian optimization, the causes and effects of boundary-induced acquisition bias are underexplored. We trace the root cause to a simple geometric mechanism: the truncation of the kernel correlation neighborhood at the domain boundary creates an observation-independent distortion that worsens with dimensionality. We show how this distortion manifests across three acquisition classes: variance maximization concentrates selections at the corners, whereas negative integrated posterior variance and expected predictive information gain move selections inward to axis-aligned interior shells. These patterns arise without reference to any objective function, meaning that acquisition behavior can be dominated by kernel geometry rather than the desired task-specific uncertainty. To quantify this, we introduce a function-free selection-profile diagnostic for arbitrary acquisitions, kernels, and bounded-domain geometries.

AI.tldr: 高斯过程在边界域上因核邻域截断导致后验方差膨胀，引发采集函数偏差（如边界过度探索），并提出了无函数依赖的诊断方法。
AI.motivation: 边界效应导致后验方差失真和采集函数偏差（如贝叶斯优化中的过度探索），但其成因和影响尚未被系统研究。
AI.method: 从几何机制出发，将边界偏差归因于核相关邻域在边界处的截断；通过三类采集函数（方差最大化、负积分后验方差、期望信息增益）展示偏差模式；并提出与目标函数无关的采集轮廓诊断工具。
AI.result: 方差最大化将采集点推向角落，而负积分后验方差和期望信息增益将采集点推向轴向内部壳层；偏差随维度增加而加剧。
AI.conclusion: 采集行为可能被核几何主导而非任务相关的不确定性，所提诊断方法可推广至任意采集函数、核函数和边界几何。

title: Lagrange multipliers in Maximum likelihood estimations and Least squares problems with Constraints
summary:
This study investigates a statistical property of Lagrange multipliers in constrained Maximum Likelihood Estimation (MLE) and Least Squares (LS) problems from the perspective of numerical optimization. Building on large-sample theory, we show that the associated Lagrange multipliers converge to zero as the sample size increases, provided the distribution is correctly specified in MLE or the residuals are normally distributed in LS. Although this asymptotic behavior has long been recognized in statistics, it has received little explicit attention in numerical optimization and has rarely been exploited in algorithmic design. Importantly, the insight extends beyond classical low-dimensional settings: even in modern high-dimensional applications, such as deep learning, where the number of parameters may exceed the sample size, the same reasoning applies provided the generalization performance is good.
  This observation has two main implications. First, many constrained optimization algorithms, including the Augmented Lagrangian Method, Sequential Quadratic Programming, and Interior Point methods, require initial values for the multipliers, and choosing zero is statistically justified. Numerical experiments for constrained regressions and dynamic discrete choice model estimations support this implication by showing that initializing multipliers at zero usually lead to stable and efficient performance. Second, penalty-based approaches that convert constrained problems into unconstrained ones can perform well when the true multipliers are small. This helps explain why penalty-based methods often perform well in practice.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了约束最大似然估计和最小二乘问题中拉格朗日乘子的统计性质，证明其随样本量增大收敛于零，并探讨了这一性质对优化算法初始化和惩罚方法的启示。
AI.motivation: 拉格朗日乘子在约束优化中渐近收敛于零的性质虽在统计学中已知，但在数值优化领域很少被明确关注，也鲜少用于算法设计。
AI.method: 基于大样本理论分析MLE和LS中拉格朗日乘子的渐近行为，并通过数值实验（约束回归、动态离散选择模型）验证乘子初始化为零的效果。
AI.result: 拉格朗日乘子在正确设定模型下随样本量增加趋于零；在高维深度学习场景中同样适用；将乘子初始化为零可带来稳定高效的优化表现；小乘子解释了惩罚方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 拉格朗日乘子的渐近零性质在算法设计中有重要实践价值，可指导乘子初始化策略并解释惩罚方法的成功。

title: Evaluating AI Investment Strategies
summary:
We study the problem of auditing a black-box algorithmic decision-maker from observable inputs and outputs alone. Our main result is an exact decomposition: under precisely characterized conditions, the cumulative \emph{regret} of a dynamic policy equals the sum of per-period covariances between the cost vector and the policy's decision. This extends the single-period identity of Aldridge~(2026) to the full multi-period setting of stochastic dynamic programming.
  We prove the identity holds exactly under i.i.d. costs and mean-unbiased Markov policies, derive closed-form bias corrections for non-stationary and time-varying cases, and establish the discounted-horizon analog. A Bellman recursion for the covariance regret functional connects the result to standard reinforcement learning algorithms; for rolling-window policies, the estimation-error bias is $O(d/w)$.
  The decomposition has direct implications for algorithmic auditing in strategic environments: in platform mechanism design, it provides a welfare-based audit metric without access to the agent's private type; in repeated games, covariance reduction is a sufficient condition for policy improvement; in procurement and ad auctions, the bias correction quantifies welfare loss from strategic misreporting. The associated trajectory estimator is consistent, asymptotically normal with HAC variance, and computable in $O(T \cdot nd)$ time. This makes the proposed approach a tractable, model-free audit tool for platform mechanisms, algorithmic portfolio strategies, and any sequential decision system subject to external performance review.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从可观测输入输出中审计黑箱算法决策者的方法，核心贡献是将动态策略的累积遗憾精确分解为每期协方差之和，扩展了Aldridge（2026）的单期恒等式到多期随机动态规划情境，并提供了闭合形式的偏差修正、折扣水平类比及轨迹估计量，适用于平台机制设计、重复博弈等战略环境中的无模型审计。
AI.motivation: 在缺乏内部模型或代理人私有类型信息的情况下，如何仅从可观测的输入输出数据对黑箱算法决策者进行有效审计，是本文要解决的核心问题。
AI.method: 通过推导多期遗憾-协方差恒等式，在i.i.d.成本和均值无偏Markov策略下证明其精确成立，给出非平稳及时变情形的偏差修正，建立折扣水平类比，并利用Bellman递归将其与标准强化学习算法联系；同时提出计算复杂度为O(T·nd)的轨迹估计量。
AI.result: 恒等式在定价条件下精确成立；滚动窗口策略的估计误差偏差为O(d/w)；轨迹估计量具有一致性和渐近正态性（HAC方差）。
AI.conclusion: 该分解为平台机制设计提供了一种无需代理人私有类型的福利审计指标，在重复博弈中协方差降低是策略改进的充分条件，在采购和广告拍卖中偏差修正量化了策略性误报造成的福利损失，整体上提供了一个可计算、无模型的审计工具。

title: TT-DAC-PS: Twin-Target Deterministic Actor-Critic with Policy Smoothing for Optimal Trade Execution
summary: This study addresses the optimal execution of large stock sell programs by introducing TT-DAC-PS (Twin-Target Deterministic Actor-Critic with Policy Smoothing), a deterministic actor-critic architecture that combines twin exponential-moving-average critic targets with pessimistic min backup, TD3-style target policy smoothing noise, delayed actor updates, and conservative Q regularisation to curb overestimation. Exploration uses Ornstein-Uhlenbeck (OU) noise with a hybrid schedule: deterministic episode-wise decay, variance-guided adjustment based on recent reward dispersion, and a Soft Actor-Critic (SAC)-style temperature that is learned and mapped to the noise scale. The environment integrates Almgren-Chriss (AC) trade impact with Limit Order Book (LOB) prices and volumes, normalised state features, per-step volume participation caps, and a utility-based reward. The trade execution algorithm is applied to LOB data for ten U.S. stocks. Performance is assessed against reinforcement-learning baseline algorithms, including Proximal Policy Optimisation (PPO), Soft Actor-Critic (SAC), and Advantage Actor-Critic (A2C), as well as alternative trade execution algorithms, including Time-Weighted Average Price (TWAP), Volume-Weighted Average Price (VWAP), and AC. The proposed model consistently reduces mean implementation shortfall percentage with competitive variance, outperforming classical baselines and standard reinforcement-learning benchmark models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TT-DAC-PS算法，一种组合多种策略优化的确定性Actor-Critic架构，用于股票大单卖出的最优执行，在10只美国股票的限价订单簿数据上相比传统算法和RL基线方法（PPO、SAC、A2C、TWAP、VWAP、AC）显著降低了执行缺口。
AI.motivation: 解决大规模股票卖单执行中的最优执行问题，克服现有RL算法在金融交易中存在的过高估计偏差，实现更低的执行成本。
AI.method: 提出TT-DAC-PS架构：双指数移动平均Critic目标与悲观最小备份、TD3风格目标策略平滑噪声、延迟Actor更新、保守Q正则化；采用OU噪声混合探索调度；环境整合Almgren-Chriss市场冲击模型和LOB数据，含归一化状态特征和效用奖励函数。
AI.result: 在10只美国股票的LOB数据上，TT-DAC-PS相比PPO、SAC、A2C、TWAP、VWAP、AC等基线，持续降低平均执行缺口百分比，且方差具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: TT-DAC-PS有效抑制了过高估计偏差，在最优执行任务上优于经典算法和标准RL基准模型，为金融交易中的大单执行提供了更优方案。

title: Verification Framework for the Union of Control Barrier Functions
summary: Control Barrier Functions (CBFs) have been proposed to ensure safety of autonomous systems. This paper considers control policies that switch between CBF constraints. Under this approach, we represent a complex non-convex safe region as a union of sets that are computationally tractable to verify. We denote this framework as union-CBFs and make the following contributions. First, considering switching CBF-QP controllers, we propose a sufficient condition that ensures (i) the system undergoes a finite number of switches in any finite time interval and ensures (ii) the forward invariance of the closed-loop system in between switches. Second, we consider two types of switching strategies and propose union-CBFs conditions for each strategy to satisfy (i) and (ii). Third, we formulate Sum-of-Squares (SOS) algorithms to verify the conditions. The experiments show that our union-CBFs framework results in a larger safe region compared to high-degree polynomial CBFs. We also show the efficiency of the verification algorithms using a polynomial system model.

AI.tldr: 本文提出union-CBFs框架，将非凸安全区域表示为多个凸集的并集，通过切换CBF-QP控制器保证安全，并利用SOS算法进行验证。实验表明该方法比高次多项式CBF能获得更大的安全区域。
AI.motivation: 传统CBF方法在处理复杂非凸安全区域时存在局限，高次多项式CBF虽然可以表达非凸区域但计算代价高且区域受限。作者希望通过将非凸安全区域表示为多个计算上易处理的集合的并集，并设计合适的切换策略，在保证安全性的同时扩大可行安全区域。
AI.method: 1) 将非凸安全区域建模为多个凸集的并集（union-CBFs）；2) 提出基于切换CBF-QP控制器的充分条件，保证有限时间内切换次数有限且切换间前向不变性；3) 设计两种切换策略并分别给出对应的union-CBFs条件；4) 利用Sum-of-Squares (SOS)算法对条件进行形式化验证。
AI.result: 1) 实验表明union-CBFs框架相比高次多项式CBF能获得更大的安全区域；2) 验证了SOS算法在多项式系统中的高效性。
AI.conclusion: union-CBFs通过并集表示和切换控制策略，有效解决了非凸安全区域下的安全控制问题，在扩大安全区域的同时保证了系统的前向不变性和切换有限性，且SOS验证算法具有计算效率优势。

title: Barycentric Projections of Optimal Transport Plans on Riemannian Manifolds
summary: Optimal transport couplings are probabilistic objects, while many learning pipelines require deterministic maps. In Euclidean space, barycentric projection converts a coupling into a map by taking conditional expectations, but on a Riemannian manifold curvature and cut loci make this operation nontrivial. We develop a framework for barycentric projections of transport couplings on Riemannian manifolds. The intrinsic projection maps each source point to the conditional Fréchet mean of its destination law and is shown to be the best deterministic representative under squared geodesic loss. The corresponding minimum value is an integrated conditional Fréchet variance, which vanishes exactly for map-induced couplings and therefore defines a conditional-variance Monge defect. We also study a tangential log-exp projection, prove its Euclidean exactness, its compatibility with Brenier-McCann maps in the Monge case, and its interpretation as the first unit Riemannian gradient update for the intrinsic objective. For discrete couplings, both constructions decompose row-wise into weighted Fréchet mean and log-exp problems. Experiments on spherical data, synthetic SPD data, and real EEG covariance matrices support the proposed division of roles: the intrinsic projection is the variational representative, while the tangential projection is a useful local displacement surrogate.

AI.tldr: 本文提出在黎曼流形上对最优传输耦合进行重心投影的框架，包括内在投影（条件弗雷歇均值）和切向对数-指数投影两种方法，并在球面、SPD数据和EEG协方差矩阵上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 欧氏空间中的重心投影可以轻松将概率性的最优传输耦合转化为确定性映射，但在黎曼流形上，曲率和切割轨迹使得该操作变得困难。需要为流形上的传输耦合开发合适的确定性映射框架。
AI.method: 提出了两种投影方法：(1) 内在投影——将每个源点映射到其目的地分布的条件弗雷歇均值，是最优的确定性代表；(2) 切向对数-指数投影——在切空间上进行投影，证明了其在欧氏情况下的精确性、与Brenier-McCann映射的兼容性，以及作为内在目标的第一单位黎曼梯度更新的解释。
AI.result: 定义了一个条件方差Monge缺陷，当耦合由映射诱导时该缺陷为零。实验表明内在投影是变分代表，切向投影是局部位移替代。
AI.conclusion: 两种投影方法有着不同的角色分工：内在投影适用于全局变分表示，切向投影适用于局部位移近似，为流形上的最优传输提供了实用工具。

title: Concerns and Strategic Responses of Older Workers Navigating Generative AI in Bridge Employment
summary: Generative AI (GenAI) is transforming workplaces at a rapid pace. This disproportionately affects vulnerable communities, including older workers (OWs) who re-enter the workforce through bridge employment prior to final retirement. Through in-depth semi-structured interviews with 21 professionals, we examine how OWs navigate GenAI-driven disruptions while pursuing bridge roles, focusing on their concerns about GenAI integration and their responses to these changes. Our findings show that OWs experienced both temporal and structural disruptions across all stages of the bridge employment decision-making process due to GenAI. In response, they reconfigured their tasks through different forms of boundary work aimed at restoring stability and continuity. We conceptualize these responses as AI resilience, which reshaped OWs' bridge employment decision-making into an ongoing process of negotiation and adaptation. We conclude by offering recommendations to reduce burnout among OWs by balancing individual-level AI resilience strategies with meso-level AI resilience collectives and macro-level adversarial and contestable AI-mediated organizational structures.

AI.tldr: 研究通过21位专业人士的访谈，探讨了生成式AI如何影响老年工作者（OWs）的过渡性就业决策，发现他们通过边界工作重建稳定性和连续性，形成"AI韧性"概念，并建议从个体、中观和宏观层面平衡AI韧性策略以减少职业倦怠。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI快速改变职场环境，但弱势群体（如重新进入劳动力市场的老年工作者）所受影响未被充分关注，本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 对21位专业人士进行半结构化深度访谈，分析老年工作者在过渡性就业中如何应对GenAI带来的颠覆。
AI.result: 老年工作者在过渡性就业决策的所有阶段都经历了时间性和结构性颠覆，通过不同形式的边界工作重新配置任务，表现出"AI韧性"。
AI.conclusion: 提出通过平衡个体层面的AI韧性策略、中观层面的AI韧性集体和宏观层面的对抗性/可争议性AI中介组织结构，来减少老年工作者的职业倦怠。

title: A case study of evaluating AI agents on a neuroscience data-to-discovery pipeline
summary: Agentic AI tools offer a promising path to automating software development bottlenecks in scientific research pipelines, particularly for stages that take domain experts days to months to build, where scientists care about correctness and robustness, not implementation details. We present an empirical study of general-purpose coding agents on a fly optogenetics data-to-discovery pipeline. We assess agents on tasks substantially larger than existing benchmarks, datasets orders of magnitude bigger, and evaluation criteria grounded in domain expert standards. We show that agents can solve several individual pipeline stages, suggesting stage-level automation is tractable. By analyzing agents' code iterations, we show that they struggle most when there is not a pre-defined criterion to iterate on, and they must instead use their scientific judgment to assess their current solution, a key open challenge. Mirroring scientific practice, they sometimes attempt visual inspection of intermediate outputs for self-evaluation, but largely fail to interpret what they see or act on it appropriately. Solving the end-to-end pipeline correctly requires stringing together successes across all pipeline stages, and this is beyond agents' current abilities. We identify challenges largely absent from existing benchmarks, including computational resource management and generalization to large held-out data collections. Finally, we distill principles for constructing scientific tasks and rigorous evaluation criteria for open-ended problems.

AI.tldr: 本文针对通用编码智能体在果蝇光遗传学数据到发现流水线上的表现进行了实证研究，发现智能体可以解决部分流水线阶段，但无法完成端到端任务，尤其在需要科学判断和自我评估时表现不佳。
AI.motivation: 科学研究流水线中的软件开发环节耗费领域专家大量时间（数天到数月），而科学家更关心结果的正确性和鲁棒性而非实现细节。Agentic AI工具为解决这一瓶颈提供了有前景的方案，因此需要系统评估当前通用编码智能体在实际科研任务中的能力与局限。
AI.method: 在果蝇光遗传学数据到发现流水线上进行实证研究，设置的任务规模远超现有基准测试（数据集大数个数量级），评估标准基于领域专家标准，分析智能体的代码迭代过程，并对比其在不同流水线阶段的表现。
AI.result: 智能体能够解决部分独立的流水线阶段，表明阶段级自动化是可行的；但在缺乏预定义迭代标准、需要科学判断来自我评估当前解决方案时表现最差；尝试对中间输出进行可视化检查但无法正确解读或采取适当行动；端到端流水线完全超出当前智能体能力；还存在计算资源管理和大规模数据泛化等现有基准测试中缺乏的挑战。
AI.conclusion: 当前通用编码智能体无法完成端到端的科学发现流水线，核心瓶颈在于缺乏科学判断力和自我评估能力。研究提炼了构建科学任务和开放性问题严格评估标准的原则，为未来研究指明了方向。

title: GraphLoRA: Structure-Aware Low-Rank Adaptation for Large Language Model Recommendation
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown strong potential for recommendation (LLMRec) due to their powerful reasoning and generalization abilities. However, effectively aligning the textual semantics modeled by LLMs with the collaborative signals remains a key challenge. Existing methods either translate collaborative information into textual prompts or inject pre-trained embeddings into the LLM, both of which treat structural information as static input and fail to capture high-order relational dependencies. To bridge this gap, we propose GraphLoRA, a novel framework that generalizes low-rank adaptation from independent to structure-aware propagation. GraphLoRA embeds a trainable graph message-passing network within the low-rank adaptation pathway, enabling structural signals to propagate through the parameter space. This design allows collaborative topology to explicitly guide parameter updates, fostering deep integration between graph-structured and textual semantic information. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate that GraphLoRA not only outperforms state-of-the-art LLM-based recommendation methods but also achieves superior generalization, effectively balancing structural reasoning capability with computational efficiency. Code is available at \href{https://github.com/wgj15965/GraphLoRA}{https://github.com/wgj15965/GraphLoRA}.

AI.tldr: GraphLoRA通过在低秩适应路径中嵌入可训练的图消息传递网络，实现图结构与文本语义的深度融合，提升大模型推荐性能。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM推荐方法将协同信号作为静态输入处理，未能捕获高阶关系依赖，导致文本语义与协同信号对齐不足。
AI.method: 提出GraphLoRA框架，将低秩适应从独立扩展到结构感知传播，在参数空间中通过图消息传递网络传播结构信号，显式引导参数更新。
AI.result: 在多个基准上超越现有最先进的LLM推荐方法，且具备更优的泛化能力，有效平衡结构推理与计算效率。
AI.conclusion: GraphLoRA通过结构感知的低秩适应实现了图结构信息与文本语义的深度融合，为LLM推荐提供了高效且可泛化的新范式。

title: Extremum Seeking Control Based Adaptive Compensation of Position Sensor Harmonics in PMSM Drives
summary: Permanent Magnet Synchronous Machines (PMSMs) have become one of the preferred forms of electromechanical energy converters, attributing to their high efficiency, torque density, and other unique advantages. However, given the need for proper rotor position measurement for commutation and field orientation, accurate rotor position sensing is of paramount importance. In sensing motor rotor position with a sensor, harmonic errors that arise in the sensing subsystem lead to undesirable torque ripple. Thus, this paper presents an adaptive, extremum seeking control based approach capable of mitigating position signal harmonics in PMSMs. The proposed approach is experimentally validated under varying torque, speed, and harmonic conditions. Its harmonic compensation performance is comparatively evaluated against the look-up table based method. Furthermore, the accuracy of the proposed approach is analyzed, highlighting its effectiveness.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自适应极值搜索控制的方法，用于抑制永磁同步电机（PMSM）中由位置传感器谐波误差引起的转矩脉动，并通过实验验证了其在不同工况下的有效性。
AI.motivation: PMSM依赖精确的转子位置测量进行换相和磁场定向，但位置传感器会产生谐波误差，导致有害的转矩脉动，因此需要有效的谐波抑制方法。
AI.method: 采用自适应极值搜索控制（Extremum Seeking Control）方法，用于抑制PMSM位置信号中的谐波成分。
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法在不同转矩、转速和谐波条件下的谐波补偿性能，并与基于查表（LUT）的方法进行了对比评估，同时分析了该方法的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的自适应极值搜索控制方法能有效抑制PMSM位置传感器谐波误差，降低转矩脉动，准确性和有效性得到实验验证。

title: Emergence via Phase Transitions: Mechanism Landscapes and Universal Convergence Across Complex Systems
comment: 27 pages, 3 figures, 2 tables; 15-page Supplementary Information with complete proofs included
summary: Across machine learning, biology, and physics, independently evolving systems often converge toward strikingly similar high-level structures despite radically different microscopic details. Grokking circuits converge across random seeds, evolutionary lineages rediscover similar metabolic solutions, and renormalization flows approach common fixed points. We propose the Hierarchical Emergence Framework (HEF) as a candidate universality framework for such convergence phenomena. HEF models emergence as a phase transition in a mechanism landscape constrained by thermodynamic and information-theoretic laws. The framework introduces a critical energy threshold Ec separating an exploration regime with competing mechanisms from a convergence regime governed by a unique minimum-cost mechanism. Under structural assumptions, we prove physical feasibility, derive strict metric contraction, and establish convergence toward a unique fixed-point representation independent of initial conditions. We further connect this convergence structure to causal emergence through Effective Information and mechanism competition entropy. To test the framework, we study delayed generalization ("grokking") in modular arithmetic transformers across 111 experiments. We identify a reproducible empirical fingerprint of the Ec transition: the weight norm peaks systematically before grokking in 92% of runs. Normalized accuracy curves collapse onto a tanh kink (R^2=0.93) consistent with a Landau-Ginzburg universality class, and all grokked models converge to 0.9745+/-0.014 regardless of initialization, weight decay, or training fraction (ANOVA p>0.13). HEF is not presented as a universal theory of emergence, but as a falsifiable mathematical scaffold for studying convergence phenomena across complex systems.

AI.tldr: 论文提出层次涌现框架(HEF)，将涌现建模为机制景观中的相变过程，受热力学和信息论约束。通过111次模算术变换器实验验证，发现权重范数在"顿悟"前系统性达到峰值（92%运行），归一化准确率塌缩到tanh拐点（R²=0.93），所有顿悟模型收敛到0.9745±0.014，表明存在类似朗道-金茨堡的普适类行为。
AI.motivation: 在机器学习、生物学和物理学中，独立演化的系统往往在宏观结构上趋同，尽管微观细节迥异（如不同随机种子的grokking电路趋同、进化谱系重新发现类似代谢方案、重整化流趋近共同固定点）。现有理论缺乏统一的数学框架来解释这种跨学科涌现现象的普适性。
AI.method: 提出HEF框架，将涌现视为受热力学和信息论定律约束的机制景观中的相变过程。引入临界能量阈值Ec将系统分为探索（多种机制竞争）和收敛（唯一最小代价机制主导）两个阶段。在结构性假设下证明物理可行性、严格度量收缩和唯一固定点收敛。通过有效信息和机制竞争熵连接因果涌现。实验上在111次模算术变换器训练中验证Ec相变指纹。
AI.result: 111次实验中有92%的运行的权重范数在grokking前系统性达到峰值；归一化准确率曲线塌缩到tanh拐点（R²=0.93），符合朗道-金茨堡普适类；所有grokked模型收敛到0.9745±0.014，独立于初始化、权重衰减或训练分数（ANOVA p>0.13）。
AI.conclusion: HEF并非提供涌现的普适理论，而是一个可证伪的数学框架，用于研究复杂系统中的趋同现象。实验证据支持grokking中存在可重复的Ec相变指纹，HEF成功描述了该过程中的普适性特征。

title: A Structural Matrix Autoregressive Model for the Joint Dynamics of Volume, Volatility, and Returns
summary: This paper proposes a Structural Matrix Autoregressive (SMAR) model for the joint analysis of asset returns, realized volatility, and trading volume in a large-dimensional setting. This framework simultaneously captures dynamic spillovers across financial variables and cross-sectional dependence across assets while preserving a parsimonious parameterization relative to conventional vector autoregressive models. The model is estimated on daily data for the constituents of the Dow Jones Industrial Average over the period 2021-2025 and is structurally identified through restrictions consistent with the Mixture of Distributions Hypothesis and efficient market theory. The empirical findings indicate that volatility is the primary driver of trading activity, suggesting that informational shocks are predominantly incorporated into markets through price variability. Forecast error variance decompositions further reveal that, although internal shocks dominate short-term volume dynamics, cross-asset spillovers account for more than 50% of trading volume variation at longer horizons. Finally, an event-study analysis around FOMC announcements supports the proposed decomposition by identifying significant increases in the informative component of trading activity on announcement days followed by rapid mean reversion.

AI.tldr: 本文提出结构矩阵自回归（SMAR）模型，用于大规模资产组合中收益率、已实现波动率和交易量的联合分析。该模型在保持参数简约性的同时，捕捉金融变量间的动态溢出效应和资产间的截面依赖性。基于道琼斯工业平均指数成分股2021-2025年日度数据估计，并通过混合分布假说和有效市场理论进行结构识别。实证发现波动率是交易活动的主要驱动力，且跨资产溢出效应对长期交易量变化贡献超过50%。FOMC事件分析验证了分解的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在处理大规模资产组合的多个金融变量（收益率、波动率、交易量）联合动态时面临维度灾难和参数过度化问题，且缺乏合理的结构识别机制来揭示变量间的因果关系。
AI.method: 提出SMAR模型，通过矩阵自回归结构同时建模资产间截面依赖性和变量间动态溢出效应，并用混合分布假说和有效市场理论施加结构识别约束。
AI.result: 波动率是交易活动的主要驱动因素；短期交易量变动由自身冲击主导，但在长期（>50%）跨资产溢出效应占主导；FOMC事件期间交易量的信息成分显著增加后快速均值回归。
AI.conclusion: SMAR模型有效揭示了大维金融系统中收益率-波动率-交易量三者的动态交互机制，验证了信息冲击主要通过价格波动性融入市场的理论，并为宏观事件（如FOMC）对交易行为的影响提供了结构化的实证证据。

title: Addressing Market Regime Changes and Heavy-Tailed Returns in Portfolio Optimization via Bayesian VAR and Elliptical Black-Litterman
comment: 9 pages, 3 figures, 4 tables. Extends our prior work [Mikriukov et al., ICIC 2025] on Black-Litterman under Elliptical Distributions (BLED). Manuscript under review
summary: Deep reinforcement learning (DRL) frameworks for portfolio optimization have shown promise for their ability to learn allocation rules dynamically from market data. However, these models fail to account for fat-tailed returns, which characterize actual market behavior with more frequent extreme events. Furthermore, historical data is treated homogeneously, without accounting for temporal importance, leading models to fail during regime changes. We propose a new BAVAR-BLED algorithm that combines methods derived from Bayesian-Averaging Vector Autoregressive (BAVAR) and the Black-Litterman model using Elliptical Distributions (BLED) within a TD3 architecture. BAVAR captures a set of vector autoregressive representations that consider multi-scale temporal features, enabling adaptive allocation decisions based on regime-aware estimates of return expectations and dispersion matrices. These estimates serve as prior inputs to BLED, a model that uses Student's t-distributions, allowing for more realistic fat tail return estimates. The BAVAR-BLED algorithm uses transformer networks for view construction and CNNs for risk-aversion estimates, which modify dynamic allocation decisions based on market conditions. An evaluation of 29 Dow Jones Industrial Average constituents over a decade-long market period shows that BAVAR-BLED significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods, achieving Sharpe and Sortino ratios of 1.72 and 2.70, respectively, and total returns of 57.26%.

AI.tldr: 提出BAVAR-BLED算法，结合贝叶斯平均向量自回归和Black-Litterman模型（使用椭圆分布），在TD3架构下通过Transformer和CNN网络实现自适应投资组合优化，在道琼斯30只股票十年数据上取得显著优于现有方法的收益表现（夏普比率1.72，索提诺比率2.70，总收益57.26%）。
AI.motivation: 现有深度强化学习投资组合优化框架未能考虑实际市场中常见的肥尾收益分布特征，且对历史数据同质化处理，忽略了时间重要性，导致模型在市场制度切换时表现不佳。
AI.method: 在TD3架构内，BAVAR模块捕获多尺度时间特征的自回归表示，提供制度感知的收益预期和分散矩阵估计；BLED模块使用Student's t分布进行肥尾收益估计；Transformer网络构建观点，CNN网络估计风险厌恶系数，从而根据市场条件动态调整分配决策。
AI.result: 在29只道琼斯工业平均指数成分股超过十年的市场数据上，BAVAR-BLED的夏普比率为1.72，索提诺比率为2.70，总收益率达57.26%，显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合贝叶斯平均向量自回归与基于椭圆分布的Black-Litterman模型，并引入Transformer和CNN进行动态观点构建与风险厌恶估计，能有效提升深度强化学习在投资组合优化中对肥尾收益和制度变化的适应能力。

title: Data-Driven Robust Model Reference Adaptive Control with Parameter Convergence
summary: This paper provides a data-driven design guaranteeing parameter convergence in model reference adaptive control (MRAC) when the to-be-controlled system is subject to process noise. In the context of MRAC, parameter convergence refers to ensuring convergence of the adaptive gains to a solution of the matching equations, or to an approximate solution when noise is present. In classical MRAC, even small noise may induce parameter drift, thus lacking robustness to noise. Meanwhile, existing robust MRAC methods cannot ensure parameter convergence without imposing excitation conditions on data. A key feature of the proposed framework is to ensure convergence of the adaptive gains to an approximate solution of the matching equations without relying on persistently exciting signals. Furthermore, the matching error can be explicitly characterized as a function of the noise. This explicit characterization allows to establish a necessary and sufficient condition on the noise characteristics under which the limit closed-loop system matrix is Hurwitz. In the noise-free case, the proposed framework results in exact parameter convergence. Notably, as compared to existing methods achieving exact parameter convergence in the noise-free case, the condition on data in the proposed framework is weaker.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种数据驱动的MRAC框架，在存在过程噪声时仍能保证自适应增益收敛到匹配方程的近似解，无需持续激励信号，且能显式刻画匹配误差与噪声的关系。
AI.motivation: 经典MRAC对噪声缺乏鲁棒性，微小噪声即可能导致参数漂移；现有鲁棒MRAC方法无法在不施加激励条件的情况下保证参数收敛。
AI.method: 提出数据驱动的MRAC框架，不依赖持续激励信号即可实现自适应增益向匹配方程近似解的收敛，并显式刻画匹配误差作为噪声的函数。
AI.result: 建立了噪声特征下闭环系统矩阵为Hurwitz的充要条件；无噪声时实现精确参数收敛；与现有方法相比，对数据条件的要求更弱。
AI.conclusion: 该框架在噪声环境下显著提升了MRAC的鲁棒性，同时放宽了对数据激励条件的要求，具有更强的适用性。

title: Variational Proximal Policy Optimization
summary: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback via Proximal Policy Optimization often suffers from policy mode collapse, brittle exploration loops, and distribution drift. This paper introduces Variational Proximal Policy Optimization (\(\textsc{VP}_2\textsc{O}\)), a particle-based variational inference framework that maps policy optimization to Stein Variational Gradient Descent within a Mixture-of-Experts architecture. By leveraging functional kernels over localized expert prototypes alongside an expert orthogonalization loss, \(\textsc{VP}_2\textsc{O}\) introduces a geometry-based proximal-control mechanism that can reduce reliance on fixed clipping or KL schedules. Our results on a 33B/4B sparse Mixture-of-Experts model show several improvements across complex reasoning benchmarks, establishing a \(+\mathbf{179}\) ELO gain on Codeforces and a \(\mathbf{32\%}\) reduction in token count on AIME mathematical reasoning tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 Variational Proximal Policy Optimization (VP₂O)，一种将策略优化映射到 Stein 变分梯度下降的粒子变分推断框架，在混合专家架构中通过几何近端控制机制缓解 RLHF 中的策略模式崩溃和分布漂移问题，在 33B/4B 稀疏 MoE 模型上实现 Codeforces ELO +179 提升和 AIME 推理任务 32% 的 token 减少。
AI.motivation: RLHF 结合 PPO 常出现策略模式崩溃、脆弱的探索循环和分布漂移等问题，现有方法依赖固定裁剪或 KL 调度来限制策略更新，缺乏对策略几何结构的显式建模。
AI.method: 将策略优化形式化为粒子变分推断，采用 Stein 变分梯度下降在混合专家架构中优化策略。引入功能核（functional kernels）作用于局部专家原型，并设计专家正交化损失（expert orthogonalization loss），形成基于几何的近端控制机制，替代传统固定裁剪或 KL 调度。
AI.result: 在 33B/4B 稀疏 MoE 模型上，Codeforces 编程竞赛基准获得 +179 ELO 提升，AIME 数学推理任务实现 32% 的 token 数量减少。
AI.conclusion: VP₂O 通过几何引导的近端控制有效缓解了策略坍塌与分布漂移，在复杂推理任务上展示了显著而高效的优势。

title: AI-Integrated Learning Management System for Middle School: A Longitudinal Study of Learning Outcomes Through High School and Beyond
summary: Middle school is a key window for building core academic skills and the learning routines students carry into later grades, yet many students still fall behind because help is often limited and comes too late, after they have already been stuck for a while. Learning Management Systems (LMSs) are now standard infrastructure for distributing materials, collecting work, assessing students' tasks, and recording grades, but in most deployments they still behave more like workflow tools than instructional supports. The result is the usual bottleneck: students keep practicing through confusion, teachers triage questions, and feedback that could have corrected the misunderstanding arrives after the misconception has already hardened. To address this gap, we propose an AI-integrated LMS for middle school instruction, paired with a longitudinal study design to test whether sustained, bounded AI support changes outcomes through high school and into post-high school pathways. The proposed platform adds policy-gated AI assistance to everyday coursework, delivering formative feedback and hinting, recommending spaced review and adaptive practice based on mastery, and providing teacher-facing dashboards that summarize misconception patterns and flag sustained struggle. Because the platform is intended for minors, the design is privacy-first, using data minimization, role-based access control, age-appropriate response constraints, and auditable logs of AI interactions. Beyond short-term performance, the evaluation plan links fine-grained learning traces (attempts, revisions, help-seeking, and pacing) to institutional outcomes where feasible, so we can separate tool adoption effects from longer-run changes in learning trajectories.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个集成AI的中学学习管理系统（LMS），通过策略性AI辅助（形成性反馈、自适应练习、教师仪表盘）在日常作业中提供及时支持，并设计纵向研究评估其对学习轨迹的长期影响，强调隐私优先原则。
AI.motivation: 中学阶段是培养核心学业技能和学习习惯的关键期，但现有LMS更像工作流工具而非教学支持工具，导致反馈滞后、误解固化。亟需一种能及时、持续提供AI教学支持的平台。
AI.method: 构建AI集成LMS平台，包含：1）策略门控的AI辅助（形成性反馈与提示）；2）基于掌握度的间隔复习与自适应练习推荐；3）教师仪表盘（汇总误解模式、标记持续困难）。采用隐私优先设计（数据最小化、角色权限控制、适龄响应约束、交互日志审计）。配套纵向研究设计，将细粒度学习轨迹与长期制度性结果关联。
AI.result: 目前为提案阶段，尚未给出实证结果。但研究设计可分离工具采纳效应与学习轨迹的长期变化，超越短期绩效评估。
AI.conclusion: AI集成LMS有望在中学阶段实现及时、持续的教学支持，避免反馈延迟导致的误解固化。纵向研究设计为评估长期教育影响提供了方法论框架。

title: Why Limit the Residual Stream to Layers and Not Tokens? Persistent Memory for Continuous Latent Reasoning
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable reasoning abilities on mathematical and multi-hop planning tasks. The CoCoNuT (Chain of Continuous Thought) paradigm~\cite{hao2024coconut} extends this by enabling models to reason in latent space, exploring multiple reasoning paths simultaneously rather than committing to a single chain early on. However, we identify a limitation we term the \textbf{concept bottleneck}. At each reasoning pass, intermediate hidden states are overwritten, causing the model to lose critical facts computed in earlier steps as reasoning depth increases. We observe this empirically. On HotpotQA, vanilla CoCoNuT (10.4\% EM) fails to improve over the CoT baseline (11.0\% EM), and performance degrades with curriculum depth on GSM8K. To address this, we propose \textbf{AGCLR} (Adaptive Gated Continuous Latent Reasoning), which augments CoCoNuT with a \textit{Gated Concept Stream}. A persistent residual memory maintained across all reasoning passes, controlled by three learned gates: a \textit{write} gate that commits intermediate facts to memory, a \textit{read} gate that retrieves relevant prior states, and a \textit{forget} gate that prunes irrelevant context. Evaluated on GSM8K, HotpotQA, and ProsQA using GPT-2 as our base model, AGCLR achieves consistent improvements across all types of datasets. With the performance gap compounding as curriculum depth increases, directly resolving the concept bottleneck. Code available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/JJJJ/README.md

AI.tldr: 本文提出了AGCLR模型，通过在CoCoNuT范式基础上增加门控概念流（写、读、忘记三个门）来解决连续潜空间推理中的概念瓶颈问题，在多个数据集上取得了一致提升。
AI.motivation: CoCoNuT在潜空间进行多路径推理时存在概念瓶颈：中间隐藏状态被覆盖，导致早期计算的关键事实随推理深度增加而丢失。实验证实了这个问题（HotpotQA上CoCoNuT仅10.4% EM，低于CoT的11.0% EM）。
AI.method: 提出AGCLR (Adaptive Gated Continuous Latent Reasoning)，在CoCoNuT上增加门控概念流（Gated Concept Stream）：一个持久残差记忆，通过写门（提交事实）、读门（检索先前状态）和忘记门（剪枝无关上下文）三个可学习门控来控制。
AI.result: 在GSM8K、HotpotQA和ProsQA上使用GPT-2作为基础模型，AGCLR在所有类型数据集上均取得一致提升，且随着课程深度增加，性能差距持续扩大，直接解决了概念瓶颈问题。
AI.conclusion: AGCLR通过门控机制有效缓解了连续潜空间推理中的概念瓶颈，为LLM在潜空间进行更深入推理提供了可行的改进方向。

title: Post-training is (Massive) Supervised Learning
summary: The prevailing paradigm for training LLMs has evolved to rely on a massive post-training phase consisting of SFT and RL. In this position paper, we argue that this methodology effectively marks a reversion to the ``pre-train then fine-tune'' approach of the BERT era, explicitly tailoring models to the desired behaviors and specific benchmarks on which they are evaluated. We begin with a historical overview of LLMs, describing the different phases of the LLM evolution. We argue that the current landscape is remarkably similar to the early days of LLMs, where task performance heavily relied on fitting the models to in-distribution datasets. To empirically demonstrate this, we compare pre-trained models to randomly initialized ones, by fine-tuning both variants on modern reasoning datasets and evaluating them on competitive math and code benchmarks. We show that models post-trained from scratch yield highly non-trivial performance. Our findings suggest that current post-training methodologies function primarily as a distribution-fitting mechanism. We finish by positing that developing generally capable models and systems requires moving beyond extensive post-training for predefined behaviors, shifting instead toward training procedures where models ``learn how to learn''.

AI.tldr: 本文指出当前LLM的SFT+RL后训练范式实质上是回归了BERT时代的"预训练-微调"模式，通过实验证明后训练主要起分布拟合作用，并提出应转向"学会如何学习"的训练方式。
AI.motivation: 作者认为当前LLM训练过度依赖大规模后训练（SFT+RL）来针对特定基准优化模型，这种做法实际上是回到了BERT时代的微调范式，限制了模型通用能力的发展。
AI.method: 通过对比预训练模型与随机初始化模型在推理数据集上微调，并在数学和代码基准上进行评估，来验证后训练是否主要起分布拟合作用。
AI.result: 从随机初始化出发进行后训练也能取得相当不错的性能，表明当前后训练方法本质上是一种分布拟合机制，而非真正提升模型的内在推理能力。
AI.conclusion: 发展真正通用能力的模型应超越针对预设行为的大规模后训练，转向能够让模型"学会如何学习"的训练范式。

title: On Improved Statistical Accuracy of Low-Order Polynomial Chaos Approximations
summary: Polynomial chaos expansions provide surrogate models for stochastic systems, with coefficients typically derived using Galerkin projection, stochastic collocation, or least squares approximation. These traditional approaches often fail to accurately capture statistical moments without resorting to high-order approximations. We propose a constrained optimization framework that modifies standard techniques to determine polynomial chaos coefficients that precisely recover the first two statistical moments. The effectiveness of our approach is demonstrated on several candidate algebraic functions of random variables, showing significant improvements in statistical accuracy even with low-order approximations.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种约束优化框架，用于改进多项式混沌展开（PCE）方法，使其在低阶近似下也能精确恢复随机系统的前两个统计矩（均值和方差）。
AI.motivation: 传统的PCE方法（如Galerkin投影、随机配点法、最小二乘逼近）在低阶近似时无法准确捕捉统计矩，往往需要高阶近似才能获得可接受的精度，计算成本高。
AI.method: 构建一个约束优化框架，在传统PCE系数求解过程中加入约束条件，使得展开式的前两个统计矩（均值和方差）能够被精确恢复。
AI.result: 在多个代数随机函数上的实验表明，该方法即便使用低阶近似，也能显著提升统计矩的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该约束优化方法有效弥补了传统PCE在低阶近似下统计矩不准确的缺陷，为高效且准确的随机不确定性量化提供了一种新的解决思路。

title: STARIXNet: Multivariate and Multi-attribute Deep Learning Approach to Real-Time Resource Allocation in Cloud Platforms
summary: Intelligent scaling of microservices in cloud platforms is crucial for mitigating escalating compute costs while avoiding service disruptions. Current solutions are limited to the univariate space, typically focusing on CPU usage alone to drive scaling decisions. Moreover, they address the problem as a purely forecasting task, focusing on prediction precision while neglecting the greater risks of underestimation and delays in system responsiveness. Alternative solutions are computationally complex, making them impractical for large-scale, real-time deployments. To address these challenges, we present STARIXNet, a lightweight neural network that guides resource allocation decisions in the multivariate space by capturing spatio-temporal relationships among multiple system metrics. STARIXNet models multiple quasi-dependent attributes, in particular the (S)easonal, (T)emporal, (A)uto-(R)egressive (I)ntegrated, and e(X)ogenous patterns, then implements an aggregation policy to finalize scaling decisions, prioritizing service stability, followed by cost-efficiency, over raw forecast accuracy. We empirically demonstrate the performance of STARIXNet by benchmarking against existing solutions in real-world settings. STARIXNet is deployed for critical production microservices at Walmart achieving tangible savings ranging from 10\% to 50\%, in addition to intangible benefits through improved service stability and customer experience.

AI.tldr: STARIXNet是一个轻量级神经网络，通过多变量时空关系建模（季节性、时序、自回归整合和外生模式）来智能缩放微服务，在保证服务稳定性的前提下降低成本，在Walmart生产环境中实现10%-50%的节省。
AI.motivation: 现有微服务缩放方案局限于单变量（如仅CPU）且视为纯预测任务，忽视低估风险与系统延迟，而复杂方案又不适用于大规模实时部署。
AI.method: 提出STARIXNet轻量级神经网络，捕获多系统指标间的时空关系，建模季节性、时序、自回归整合与外生模式，并通过聚合策略优先保障服务稳定性，其次为成本效率，最后才是预测精度。
AI.result: 在Walmart关键生产微服务中部署，实现10%-50%的可量化成本节省，以及服务稳定性与用户体验等无形收益。
AI.conclusion: 多变量时空建模结合合理的优先级策略（稳定性>成本>预测精度）能有效提升微服务缩放系统的实用性与经济性。

title: Adaptive Estimation of Aggregated Values of Conditional Linear Programs
summary: We develop a covariate-assisted approach to partially identified parameters that are solutions to an under-identified system of linear equations with known coefficients. Examples include bounds on treatment effects, models of unemployment with state dependence, choice-theoretic models of IV, and random utility models. The boundary (i.e., support function) of the proposed identified set is represented as an average of intersections of regression functions, aggregated over the covariate distribution. We show that the boundary is a regular parameter, propose asymptotic theory, and demonstrate using an empirical application to Jobs First.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种协变量辅助方法，用于处理部分可识别参数（即欠定线性方程组解），并证明其边界是正则参数，给出了渐近理论，并通过Jobs First数据集展示了应用。
AI.motivation: 解决部分可识别参数问题，尤其是欠定线性方程组情形，如处理效应边界、失业状态依赖、工具变量选择模型等，需要一种协变量辅助的识别方法。
AI.method: 将识别集的边界（支撑函数）表示为回归函数交集的协变量分布加权平均，利用协变量信息辅助识别。
AI.result: 证明了所提识别集的边界是正则参数（regular parameter），并建立了相应的渐近理论。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过协变量辅助有效改善了部分可识别参数的推断，并在Jobs First实证中展示了应用价值。

title: Benchmarking Deep Time Series Models for Equity Portfolios
summary: Benchmarking forecasting architectures for daily equity portfolios is not just a prediction exercise. It also asks which model remains usable after preferences, costs, and portfolio constraints are imposed. We build a CRSP daily-stock benchmark for 15 deep and statistical time-series architectures over 2018--2024. The protocol combines common-window decile portfolios, stochastic multi-criteria acceptability analysis, a deployment-adjusted acceptability index, and a constrained quadratic portfolio layer with capacity, beta, industry, risk, leverage, and turnover controls. The index starts from the SMAA rank-acceptability distribution and downweights models whose criteria-level wins produce high portfolio regret; its Gibbs form is characterized as an entropic update from the SMAA prior. Empirically, no architecture dominates the raw benchmark: TransEnc-8 has the largest rank-1 acceptability, 0.352, and no model exceeds about 0.36. Rankings vary with preferences, market state, feature universe, and transaction costs. In the promoted five-model constrained-portfolio comparison, TransEnc-8 is selected throughout, while return-oriented raw rankings can favor TS-RIDGE. Broad-universe decile signals can survive costs, but the baseline constrained-QP net Sharpe at 20 bps is negative for every promoted model. The benchmark supports model selection and diagnosis rather than a standalone trading-strategy claim.

AI.tldr: 本文对15种深度学习和统计时间序列架构进行了股票投资组合基准测试，提出了一种结合SMAA排序可接受性分布与组合后悔度的部署调整可接受性指数（Gibbs形式）。实证发现，TransEnc-8在排序-1可接受性上最高（0.352），但所有模型均低于0.36；在考虑偏好、成本与约束后，仅TransEnc-8被持续选中，且基线约束QPS净夏普比率在20bps时为负。
AI.motivation: 每日股票投资组合的预测架构基准测试不仅仅是预测准确性的比拼，还需要考虑在实际部署中，当引入投资者偏好、交易成本及组合约束后，哪些模型仍然可用。现有研究缺乏一个同时评估预测能力与部署后表现的统一基准框架。
AI.method: 构建2018-2024年CRSP日度股票基准，包含15种深度学习和统计时间序列架构。协议包括：（1）共同窗口十分位组合；（2）随机多准则可接受性分析（SMAA）；（3）部署调整可接受性指数（DAI），其Gibbs形式被表征为从SMAA先验的熵更新；（4）带有容量、Beta、行业、风险、杠杆和换手率约束的二次规划（QP）组合层。DAI通过对SMAA排序可接受性分布向下调整那些准则层面胜出但产生高组合后悔度的模型。
AI.result: 无单一架构在原始基准中占优：TransEnc-8的排序-1可接受性最高（0.352），所有模型均不超过0.36。排名随偏好、市场状态、特征宇宙和交易成本变化。在五模型约束组合比较中，TransEnc-8被持续选中，而回报导向的原始排名可能偏好TS-RIDGE。宽宇宙十分位信号可承受成本，但基线约束QP净夏普比率在20bps时对所有被选模型均为负。
AI.conclusion: 该基准支持模型选择与诊断，而非作为独立的交易策略主张。强调实际部署中需要考虑偏好、成本和约束对模型绩效的影响，为金融时间序列架构提供更全面的评估框架。

title: Combining Reinforcement Learning with Arc-search Interior-Point Method for Path Planning
summary: Path planning in environments containing obstacles has numerous practical applications. The problem is challenging because it is inherently nonlinear and nonconvex. Consequently, a variety of techniques have been developed to address this problem, among which machine learning and optimal control (or optimization) have emerged as two prominent approaches. In general, machine learning methods do not require a high-fidelity model, and a trained agent can often generate a feasible path in real time. However, the resulting path is not necessarily optimal with respect to performance objectives such as minimizing path length or travel time. In contrast, optimal control and optimization methods typically rely on high-fidelity models and often require computational effort that may not satisfy real-time constraints. Nevertheless, these methods are more likely to produce optimal or near-optimal solutions. To overcome the limitations of each approach while exploiting their respective strengths, this paper proposes a framework that combines reinforcement learning with an arc-search interior-point method for path planning. Numerical simulations demonstrate that the proposed approach effectively integrates the real-time decision-making capability of reinforcement learning with the optimization performance of the arc-search interior-point method, resulting in improved path-planning performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合强化学习与弧搜索内点法的路径规划框架，融合了机器学习实时决策与最优控制优化性能的优势，通过数值仿真验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 机器学习生成的路径实时但非最优；最优控制方法能求出最优解但计算量大、难以满足实时性。为克服各自局限并发挥各自优势，提出结合两种方法的框架。
AI.method: 将强化学习（RL）与弧搜索内点法（arc-search interior-point method）相结合，利用RL提供实时决策能力，利用弧搜索内点法保证路径的优化性能。
AI.result: 数值仿真结果表明，该框架有效整合了RL的实时决策能力与弧搜索内点法的优化性能，提升了路径规划的整体表现。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的RL与弧搜索内点法混合框架在路径规划任务中优于单独使用任一方法，兼具实时性与最优性。

title: Beyond Additivity: Causal Discovery in Location-Scale Noise Models with Hidden Variables
summary: We study causal discovery from observational data when some variables are hidden and the data-generating process follows a location-scale noise model (LSNM). Existing methods that handle hidden confounders typically assume additive noise, but in practice, causes often modulate not just the mean but also the variance of their effects. We prove that acyclic directed mixed graphs (ADMGs) satisfying a bow-free condition are identifiable under LSNM with hidden variables, establishing the first identifiability result for causally insufficient models beyond noise additivity. We further provide sufficient conditions for identifying causal direction even when the bow-free assumption is violated. Our two-stage algorithm, LSNM-UV, is sound and complete, and experiments demonstrate improved performance over additive baselines on heteroscedastic data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出在位置-尺度噪声模型下，即使存在隐藏变量，有向混合图（满足弓形自由条件）也是可识别的，并设计了LSNM-UV算法，在异方差数据上优于加性噪声基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有处理隐藏混淆变量的因果发现方法通常假设加性噪声，但实际中原因不仅影响结果的均值，还影响方差（异方差性）。因此需要更通用的模型来处理隐藏变量下的因果识别问题。
AI.method: 证明了在位置-尺度噪声模型下，满足弓形自由条件的无环有向混合图是可识别的；并在违反弓形自由假设时给出识别因果方向的充分条件。提出两阶段算法LSNM-UV。
AI.result: LSNM-UV算法是完备且正确的，在异方差数据上显著优于基于加性噪声的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 这是首个超越加性噪声假设、处理因果不足模型的可识别性结果，为存在隐藏变量和异方差效应的因果发现提供了理论基础和实用算法。

title: Reshaping Undergraduate Computer Science Education in the Generative AI Era
summary:
Generative AI represents a turning point for Computer Science (CS) education. In recent decades, post-secondary CS education has largely focused on what has been seen as practical software engineering skills: implementation-level programming, debugging, testing, and software design, analysis, and documentation. However, this framing is becoming less tenable as generative AI automates many of these tasks, challenging their centrality in CS education.
  To keep pace with advances in AI technology, CS curricula should consider a shift toward understanding and verifying AI-generated artifacts. This white paper outlines the findings of two international NUS-Google Workshops in Singapore, where we convened faculty members, industry practitioners, and students, and proposes a strategic response to reshape how CS should be taught at the undergraduate level. Based on the findings, we identify critical skills that must be preserved and those that are becoming less important. By incorporating these skills as "breadcrumbs," we can provide helpful nudges and engaging exercises within the current curriculum, enhancing learning experiences for everyone.
  We believe that to effectively prepare future computer science graduates, capable of creating, solving problems, and managing, as well as co-creating, artifacts with AI. It is important to consider a shift in curricula. Emphasizing system design, abstraction, and critical evaluation could greatly enhance their education and readiness for the challenges ahead. We propose prerequisites for solutions to reform CS education by fostering AI-native competencies, re-centering fundamental education, enhancing advanced pathways, embracing new pedagogies, and shifting institutional support.

AI.tldr: 本文基于两次国际NUS-Google研讨会，提出生成式AI正挑战传统CS教育的核心（编程、调试、测试等），建议CS课程转向理解与验证AI生成产物，强调系统设计、抽象思维和批判性评估，并提出五大改革方向。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI自动化了大量传统软件工程任务，使得当前CS课程核心内容变得不再必要，教育需与时俱进。
AI.method: 通过举办两次国际NUS-Google研讨会，汇聚教师、行业从业者和学生，识别关键技能并设计"面包屑"式渐进式练习嵌入现有课程。
AI.result: 识别出哪些技能需要保留、哪些重要性下降；提出培养AI原生能力、重归基础、强化高阶路径、采用新教学法、调整机构支持等解决方案。
AI.conclusion: CS教育需从实现层面转向设计、抽象和批判评估，才能培养能创造、解决问题并与AI协同的未来毕业生。

title: Automatic Extraction of Structured Information from Brain MRI Reports Using an Open-Weight Large Language Model
summary: Objectives: Automatic data extraction from free-text radiology reports enables large-scale research, but few studies assessed the performance of large language models (LLMs) on Dutch neuroradiology reports. Methods: We analyzed 947 brain MRI reports from a tertiary memory clinic (2016-2021), authored by consultant neuroradiologists. Trained medical students annotated thirty variables; 100 reports were double-annotated to assess inter-rater reliability. We evaluated the performance of the open-weight LLM LLaMA 3.1 using different languages (Dutch vs. English translation) and few-shot prompting with different example selection strategies. Performance was evaluated using balanced accuracy for categorical variables, accuracy and mean absolute error for counts, and text similarity for free-text. Metrics were computed across 10 random splits of the 947 reports. Results: LLaMA 3.1 demonstrated high zero-shot performance for visual rating scores (mean [95%-CI]): Medial Temporal Atrophy: 90% [77-100%] on the left and 96% [94-99%] on the right, Global Cortical Atrophy: 87% [83-91%], and Fazekas: 94% [93-96%]. Microbleed mentions were detected with 93% accuracy [92-95%] and infarct mentions with 82% [80-84%]. Text similarity for lesion location reached 0.95 [0.95-0.96]. Performance was lower for numerical variables: 80% [78-82%] for the number of microbleeds and 66% [63-68%] for infarcts. English translation yielded comparable results. Few-shot prompting improved performance for numerical variables, achieving 92% [90-93%] for microbleeds and 81% [77-85%] for infarcts using structural similarity-based selection. Conclusion: LLaMA 3.1 shows strong potential for extracting data from Dutch neuroradiology reports. Few-shot prompting enhances performance for numerical variables, whereas challenges remain for location-specific variables.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了开源大语言模型LLaMA 3.1从荷兰语神经放射学报告中自动提取数据的能力，发现其在视觉评分（如内侧颞叶萎缩90-96%）、微出血检测（93%）等任务上表现优异，少样本提示可提升数值变量提取性能（微出血计数从80%提升至92%），但位置相关变量的提取仍面临挑战。
AI.motivation: 从自由文本放射学报告中自动提取数据可支持大规模研究，但针对荷兰语神经放射学报告的大语言模型性能评估研究较少。
AI.method: 分析947份脑部MRI报告，由医学生标注30个变量，评估LLaMA 3.1在不同语言（荷兰语vs英语翻译）和少样本提示策略下的性能，使用平衡准确率、准确率、平均绝对误差和文本相似度等指标。
AI.result: LLaMA 3.1在零样本下对视觉评分表现优异（MTA左90%、右96%、GCA 87%、Fazekas 94%），微出血检测准确率93%，病灶位置文本相似度0.95；数值变量性能较低（微出血计数80%、梗死66%），少样本提示后提升至92%和81%。
AI.conclusion: LLaMA 3.1在荷兰语神经放射学报告数据提取中展现出强大潜力，少样本提示可增强数值变量性能，但位置相关变量仍存在挑战。

title: BEACON: Behavioral Entropy Aggregation for Cross-Model Hallucination Detection in Large Language Models
comment: 12 pages, 6 tables, 1 figure. Code and data available upon request
summary: Hallucination in large language models (LLMs), defined as the generation of factually incorrect or unsupported content, remains a critical barrier to reliable deployment. We present BEACON (Behavioral Entropy Aggregation for Cross-model hallucination detectiON), a black-box hallucination detection framework that operates purely on model outputs without requiring access to internal representations or external knowledge bases. BEACON extracts a 31-dimensional feature vector from structured multi-pass generation, integrating NLI-based semantic entropy, embedding geometry, chain-of-thought consistency, and paraphrase stability signals. A gradient-boosted classifier trained on 7,617 labeled examples across seven benchmarks achieves 0.8123 +/- 0.0102 AUROC (95% CI: 0.7632-0.8251), outperforming standalone semantic entropy (+0.2298) and SelfCheckGPT-style consistency baselines (+0.2457). Feature importance analysis shows that hallucination is inherently multi-dimensional, requiring combined uncertainty signals. An efficient 5-call variant achieves 0.7795 AUROC, enabling practical deployment across black-box LLM APIs.

AI.tldr: 提出BEACON框架，通过提取31维特征向量（包含NLI语义熵、嵌入几何、思维链一致性和释义稳定性信号），使用梯度提升分类器在黑盒LLM上实现0.8123 AURO的幻觉检测，无需访问模型内部表示或外部知识库。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型中的幻觉问题严重阻碍了其可靠部署，现有检测方法要么需要访问模型内部表示（白盒方法），要么依赖外部知识库，缺乏高效的黑盒检测方案。
AI.method: 从结构化多轮生成中提取31维特征向量，整合NLI语义熵、嵌入几何特征、思维链一致性和释义稳定性信号，使用梯度提升分类器在7,617个标注样本上进行训练。
AI.result: 在7个基准上AUROC达0.8123±0.0102，比独立语义熵高0.2298，比SelfCheckGPT风格一致性基线高0.2457；5次调用的高效变体达0.7795 AUROC。
AI.conclusion: 幻觉检测本质上需要多维不确定性信号的综合利用，BEACON作为纯黑盒方案在性能和实用性上达到良好平衡，适合部署于各类黑盒LLM API服务。

title: Feedback Linearization and Control of a Grid-Forming Power Converter in an Islanded Microgrid
summary: In an islanded setting, grid-forming inverters must regulate their terminal voltage without support from an external grid, even though the load current depends directly on that voltage. The usual approach is a cascaded proportional--integral (PI) controller, built on a fast inner current loop and a slower outer voltage loop, with feedforward terms used to compensate dq rotational coupling. However, this compensation is only exact at the operating point where the controller is tuned. This tutorial presents an alternative based on full-state feedback linearization. It is shown that the islanded inverter model has full relative degree, which allows exact state-space linearization with no internal or zero dynamics. A single feedback law cancels the main nonlinear effects; rotational coupling, resistive drops, and load conductance, so that the closed-loop system behaves like two independent double integrators. A standard pole-placement design is then used to shape the response. The controller is tested in MATLAB against a cascaded PI baseline under identical conditions at a 20 MW operating point, including reference tracking, load step disturbances, and parameter mismatch. The feedback-linearizing controller settles a reference step in 0.76 ms, while the PI controller does not reach the 2 % band within 50 ms. The cascaded PI controller shows better robustness to filter parameter mismatch due to its inner-loop integral action, which reduces steady-state errors under modeling uncertainty. Overall, the performance improvement and the robustness trade-off both come directly from the controller structures, rather than from tuning choices.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于全状态反馈线性化的孤岛逆变器电压控制方法，相比传统级联PI控制器，在参考跟踪速度上提升显著（0.76 ms vs. >50 ms），但PI控制器对参数失配具有更好的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统级联PI控制器中的前馈补偿仅在调谐工作点精确，当负载变化或参数失配时补偿失效。本文旨在通过反馈线性化实现全局精确解耦，消除旋转耦合、电阻压降和负载电导的非线性影响。
AI.method: 利用孤岛逆变器模型具有全相对度的特性，通过单一反馈律实现精确的状态空间线性化，使闭环系统等效为两个独立的双积分器，随后用标准极点配置设计响应特性。
AI.result: 在20 MW工作点对比测试：反馈线性化控制器参考阶跃响应稳定时间0.76 ms，而PI控制器50 ms内未进入2%误差带。但PI控制器由于内环积分作用，在滤波器参数失配时稳态误差更小。
AI.conclusion: 反馈线性化在理想条件下性能远超PI控制，但鲁棒性较弱；性能差异源于控制器结构本身而非参数调优，为实际应用中的结构选择提供了清晰的权衡依据。

title: TriHead-GAN: A Generative Adversarial Network with Triple-Head Discriminator for Carbon Emission Time Series Generation
summary: Accurate carbon emission monitoring is critical for climate policy and emerging regulatory mechanisms such as the EU Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism, yet city-level high-frequency monitoring data remain extremely scarce, severely limiting data-hungry deep learning models. Time series generation is a natural remedy, but existing GAN and diffusion-based generators often provide limited explicit supervision for the domain structure of carbon emission data: they may match marginal distributional statistics while insufficiently preserving cross-variable correlations between CO$_2$ and co-emitted pollutants and meteorological factors, and tend to collapse the first-difference statistics of atmospheric measurements, producing sequences that are smooth on average but lack the realistic step-wise variability of the underlying signals. We propose TriHead-GAN, a Transformer-based adversarial framework whose triple-head discriminator jointly supervises three complementary aspects of the joint distribution: distributional authenticity via a Wasserstein critic, cross-variable dependency via leakage-free regression of the target variable, and step-wise temporal smoothness via adjacent-difference prediction. The generator combines global self-attention with local temporal convolution, per-step noise injection, and an anti-smoothing loss that matches first-difference statistics. Experiments on the self-collected Changsha Carbon dataset, two public carbon datasets (China, US), and the ETTh1 benchmark show that TriHead-GAN achieves favorable performance over mainstream baselines on the vast majority of settings, and that the resulting synthetic windows improve downstream forecasting accuracy in low-resource carbon monitoring scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出TriHead-GAN，一种三重判别器的对抗生成框架，用于生成高质量的城市级碳排放时间序列数据，解决现有方法在保持跨变量相关性和逐阶波动统计特性方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 城市级高频率碳排放监测数据极度稀缺，严重限制了深度学习模型的应用；现有GAN和扩散模型在生成碳排放数据时，未能充分保持CO₂与共排污染物及气象因子之间的跨变量相关性，且生成的序列过于平滑，缺乏真实信号的逐阶波动特性。
AI.method: 提出TriHead-GAN，采用Transformer生成器（结合全局自注意力、局部时间卷积、逐步噪声注入）和三分支判别器：1) Wasserstein critic判别分布真实性；2) 无泄漏回归分支监督跨变量依赖；3) 相邻差分预测分支监督逐阶时间平滑性。并引入抗平滑损失来匹配一阶差分统计量。
AI.result: 在自采集的长沙碳排放数据集、两个公开碳排放数据集（中国、美国）以及ETTh1基准上，TriHead-GAN在绝大多数设置下优于主流基线方法，且生成的合成数据能提升低资源碳排放监测场景中的下游预测精度。
AI.conclusion: TriHead-GAN通过三重判别器联合监督分布的真实性、跨变量依赖性和逐阶波动特性，有效解决了碳排放时序生成中的结构保持问题，为数据稀缺的城市级碳排放监测提供了一种可行的数据增强方案。

title: Regime-Switching Models for Disaggregated Data
summary: We show analytically and via simulation that cross-sectional aggregation can substantially attenuate regime-switching signals in time-series data, making regime switches harder to detect. Building on this, we develop regime-switching models and an estimation algorithm which allow for autoregressive dynamics and grouped heterogeneity. We apply the approach to a U.S. macroeconomic dataset of 94 series, covering components of real gross domestic product, industrial production, capacity utilization, employment, and hours worked. The estimates give sharper business cycle classifications than those typically found in the literature. Monte Carlo simulations show that the computation is practical for datasets with a few hundred time series.

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析和模拟证明，时间序列数据的横截面聚合会显著削弱区制转换信号，使区制转换更难检测。基于此，作者开发了允许自回归动态和分组异质性的区制转换模型及估计算法，并将其应用于包含94个美国宏观经济序列的数据集。估计结果比文献中通常发现的更清晰地划分了商业周期。蒙特卡洛模拟表明，该算法对包含数百个时间序列的数据集是可行的。
AI.motivation: 现有研究在使用区制转换模型分析宏观经济数据时，通常直接对聚合数据建模，但作者指出横截面聚合会削弱区制转换信号，使得商业周期阶段的识别变得困难。因此，需要一种能够利用面板数据中大量时间序列信息的模型来更准确地检测区制转换。
AI.method: 首先通过理论分析和模拟验证横截面聚合对区制转换信号的衰减效应；然后开发了允许自回归动态和分组异质性的区制转换模型；提出了相应的估计算法；最后将该方法应用于包含94个美国宏观经济序列的面板数据，并通过蒙特卡洛模拟验证计算可行性。
AI.result: 估计结果比文献中通常发现的结果给出了更清晰的商业周期分类；蒙特卡洛模拟表明该计算方法对包含数百个时间序列的数据集是实用的。
AI.conclusion: 利用大量时间序列的面板数据，并考虑分组异质性和自回归动态，可以更准确地识别商业周期的区制转换，克服聚合数据带来的信号衰减问题。该方法在计算上也是可行的。

title: A null controllability data assimilation for the bulk-surface heat equation with dynamic boundary conditions
summary: We address the inverse problem of reconstructing the state at a final time $T_0$ of a parabolic equation with dynamic boundary conditions of Wentzell type, from a distributed interior observation on a subdomain $ω\subset Ω$. Our approach combines (i) a Carleman-type observability inequality for the bulk-surface system, with (ii) a Tikhonov-regularized optimal-control reformulation of the data assimilation problem, and (iii) a fully implementable spatio-temporal discretization based on a Lie splitting that decouples the bulk and surface dynamics. We prove an exact reconstruction theorem for the continuous problem, derive a stability inequality, and analyze a penalized discrete scheme. We then propose an adaptive post-processing step that optimally combines the regularized reconstruction with the observation itself; under noisy data, the resulting estimator automatically selects between full post-processing and the raw reconstruction without prior knowledge of the noise level. Extensive numerical experiments on a two-dimensional Wentzell heat equation validate the method. A semilinear extension to the Allen-Cahn nonlinearity is treated via a Picard outer loop with Schauder fixed-point convergence; two complementary experiments reveal an intrinsic observability-nonlinearity trade-off in the bulk-surface setting.

AI.tldr: 本文针对带Wentzell型动态边界条件的抛物方程，提出了一种结合Carleman型可观测性不等式、Tikhonov正则化最优控制重构和Lie分裂时空离散化的数据同化方法，并验证了其在二维Wentzell热方程及半线性Allen-Cahn扩展中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 解决带Wentzell型动态边界条件的抛物系统逆问题——从子域内部观测数据中重构终态，这类问题在热扩散、材料科学等体-表耦合系统中具有重要应用。
AI.method: (i) 建立体-表系统的Carleman型可观测性不等式；(ii) 将数据同化转化为Tikhonov正则化最优控制问题；(iii) 采用Lie分裂解耦体-表动力学的时空离散格式；辅以自适应后处理步骤，无需先验噪声水平即可在完全后处理与原始重构间自动选择。
AI.result: 证明了连续问题的精确重构定理、稳定性不等式，分析了惩罚离散格式；二维Wentzell热方程数值实验验证了方法有效性；半线性Allen-Cahn扩展通过Picard外循环与Schauder不动点收敛实现，揭示体-表系统中可观测性与非线性的内在权衡。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法为带Wentzell边界条件的抛物系统终态重构提供了完整的理论保证与实用数值框架，且自适应后处理增强了噪声鲁棒性。

title: Vector Space of Cycles
summary: Most statistical and machine learning methods for directed interactions focus on pairwise effects among variables. Even existing cyclic models represent feedback primarily through node-level dependencies, making large-scale recurrent organization difficult to estimate and compare. This limitation is particularly acute in biological and neural systems, where interactions are highly recurrent and involve many overlapping cycles. We introduce a variational framework for statistical inference on cyclic interactions. Directed interactions are represented as edge flows on a simplicial complex and evolved under an energy-minimizing dynamical system. The resulting dynamics separate transient interaction components from persistent harmonic flows, yielding a low-dimensional cycle space that captures stable recurrent organization. Rather than enumerating individual cycles, the proposed framework represents cyclic interactions as elements of a Hilbert space, enabling projection, averaging, comparison, and population-level statistical inference. We establish theoretical properties of the harmonic projection, including characterization of the cycle space, variance reduction, and population inference. Simulations demonstrate substantially improved recovery of cyclic structure in dense recurrent systems compared with existing directed-interaction methods. Applied to resting-state fMRI from 400 human subjects, the framework reveals reproducible large-scale cyclic organization that is not detectable through edgewise averaging. These results provide a scalable statistical framework for studying recurrent interactions in high-dimensional dynamical systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个变分推断框架，将循环交互表示为单纯复形上的边流，通过能量最小化动力学分离出持久谐波流，实现高维递归系统中循环结构的低维表示与统计推断。在fMRI数据上验证了可复现的大尺度循环组织。
AI.motivation: 现有统计和机器学习方法主要关注变量间的成对效应，即使是循环模型也大多通过节点级依赖来表示反馈，导致大规模递归结构难以估计和比较。这一问题在生物和神经系统中尤为突出，因为这些系统中的交互高度递归且涉及大量重叠循环。
AI.method: 将定向交互表示为单纯复形上的边流，在能量最小化动力系统下演化；通过变分框架将暂态交互成分与持久谐波流分离，得到低维循环空间；将循环交互表示为希尔伯特空间中的元素，支持投影、平均、比较和群体统计推断。
AI.result: 在密集递归系统中，与现有定向交互方法相比，该方法显著改善了对循环结构的恢复。在400名人类受试者的静息态fMRI数据上，发现了通过边平均无法检测的可复现大规模循环组织。
AI.conclusion: 该框架提供了一个可扩展的统计方法，用于研究高维动力系统中的递归交互，具有扎实的理论性质和良好的实证表现。

title: Astro, I'm Home! Investigating Factors that Influence the Acceptance of Home Robots Using Supervised Machine Learning
comment: Preprint submitted to the 18th International Conference on Social Robotics (ICSR 2026)
summary: The use of social robots in home environments is on the rise. This exploratory study applies regularization techniques (e.g., Lasso and Ridge regression) to investigate variables and identify new models of technology acceptance in the context of social robots. Within the original UTAUT2 framework, performance expectancy, social influence, and hedonic motivation emerged as the strongest and most consistent predictors of intention to use the technology. In addition, usability, trust, and competence were identified as promising variables in a model predicting intention to use.

AI.tldr: 本研究使用Lasso和Ridge回归等正则化技术，在UTAUT2框架基础上探索社会机器人技术接受的新模型。发现绩效预期、社会影响和享乐动机是最强且一致的预测变量，同时识别出可用性、信任和胜任力作为有前景的新变量。
AI.motivation: 随着社交机器人在家庭环境中的普及，传统的技术接受模型（如UTAUT2）可能不完全适用于社交机器人这一特殊技术形态。因此，本研究旨在通过正则化技术探索更适合社交机器人的技术接受模型，识别关键预测变量。
AI.method: 采用探索性研究方法，运用正则化技术（Lasso回归和Ridge回归）分析变量，在UTAUT2框架基础上识别新的技术接受模型。
AI.result: 绩效预期、社会影响和享乐动机是预测使用意图最强且最一致的变量。此外，可用性、信任和胜任力也被识别为有前景的新预测变量。
AI.conclusion: UTAUT2的核心构念在社交机器人情境下仍然有效，但可用性、信任和胜任力等新变量的加入可能更能解释社交机器人的技术接受过程。

title: Some hypotheses on how chatbots work in problem-solving-driven conversations. Large Language Models as confirmation of the Innovation Illusion
summary:
This article offers a perspective on the nature of chatbots as genuine conversation partners when discussing problems in relation to their solutions. What can chatbots do and what can't they do, and how can this be explained? Our argument draws on Aggregation Dynamics, Cognitive Linguistics, Neuropsychology and Psychology.
  Our argument focuses on basic chatbots in the hope of thereby making statements about the core functionality of more advanced chatbots. Basic chatbots are assumed to consist of a Large Language Model (LLM) with a simple interface.
  The main results are: a description of human understanding and thinking based on so-called metaphorical problem propagations; the hypothesis that text dataset used for training LLMs have specific characteristics and that these text datasets only partially imitate human thinking and understanding; the hypothesis that the LLM training process encodes artificial metaphorical problem propagations into an LLM from these datasets; our conclusion that a basic chatbot cannot be a thinking partner capable of matching humans; our conclusion that further development of the Large Language Model will not lead to this either.
  Yann LeCun states: "Animals and humans exhibit learning abilities and understandings of the world that are far beyond the capabilities of current AI and machine learning (ML) systems." Our conclusions are in line with this. LeCun's vision and ours are at odds with the optimism of Big Tech. That does not alter the fact that chatbots exist, that they are being used on a massive scale, by both individuals and organisations, and that it is therefore socially and politically important to understand them. Our article aims to contribute to the discussion on the functioning, benefits and drawbacks of chatbots.
  We have not yet encountered the approach we used to arrive at our conclusions in our research into how chatbots work.

AI.tldr: 本文从聚合动力学、认知语言学、神经心理学和心理学等多学科视角，论证了基础聊天机器人（基于LLM+简单界面）无法成为与人类匹敌的思考伙伴，并认为大语言模型的进一步发展也无法改变这一现状。
AI.motivation: 作者旨在澄清聊天机器人作为真正对话伙伴的本质能力边界，解释它们能做什么、不能做什么及其原因，并促进对聊天机器人功能、优势和缺陷的社会性讨论。
AI.method: 采用跨学科论证方法，整合聚合动力学、认知语言学、神经心理学和心理学；聚焦基础聊天机器人（LLM+简单界面）以推断更高级聊天机器人的核心功能；提出"隐喻问题传播"概念来描述人类理解与思维，并分析训练文本数据集的特征及其对LLM编码的影响。
AI.result: （1）基于"隐喻问题传播"的人类理解与思维描述；（2）训练LLM的文本数据集具有特定特征，仅部分模仿人类思维与理解；（3）LLM训练过程从数据集中编码了人工的"隐喻问题传播"；（4）基础聊天机器人无法成为与人类匹敌的思考伙伴；（5）进一步开发LLM也无法实现这一点。
AI.conclusion: 作者的观点与Yann LeCun一致，认为当前AI远不及人类的学习与理解能力，与科技巨头的乐观态度相悖。尽管聊天机器人被大规模使用，但它们本质上无法成为人类的真正思考伙伴。

title: CAPruner: Conceptual-Adjacent Scene Graph Pruner for Enhancing 3D Spatial Reasoning of Large Language Models
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have recently been applied to 3D vision-language (3D-VL) tasks, which require spatial reasoning to identify target objects relative to anchors. Scene graphs are commonly employed to represent such relations, but reasoning over complete graphs incurs high token costs and computational inefficiencies, motivating the need for pruning. Existing pruning methods primarily rely on spatial proximity and often remove task-relevant relations, thereby undermining reliable spatial reasoning. To address these limitations, we derive a key requirement for scene graph pruning: preserving spatial relations that are most pertinent to the specific 3D-VL task. Guided by this insight, we propose the Conceptual-Adjacent Scene Graph Pruner (CAPruner). CAPruner integrates fuzzy semantic relevance with spatial proximity to estimate the importance of relations, enabling the selection of critical relations in a task-specific context. Moreover, to avoid costly relation-level annotations, CAPruner is trained by supervising the aggregated scores of each node's incident edges. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CAPruner effectively preserves relations essential for spatial reasoning, leading to substantial performance improvements of LLMs on 3D-VL tasks. Code is available at https://github.com/fz-zsl/CAPruner.

AI.tldr: 针对3D视觉语言任务中场景图剪枝问题，提出CAPruner方法，融合模糊语义相关性与空间邻近性来选择关键关系，避免高昂标注成本，有效提升LLM在3D-VL任务上的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有场景图剪枝方法主要依赖空间邻近性，常移除任务相关关系，损害空间推理的可靠性。需要一种能保留与特定3D-VL任务最相关空间关系的剪枝方法。
AI.method: 提出CAPruner，整合模糊语义相关性与空间邻近性来估计关系重要性，在任务特定上下文中选择关键关系。为避免昂贵的关系级标注，通过监督每个节点入射边的聚合得分来训练。
AI.result: CAPruner有效保留了空间推理所需的关键关系，显著提升了LLM在3D-VL任务上的性能。
AI.conclusion: 融合语义与空间信息的场景图剪枝策略优于纯空间邻近性方法，且无需关系级标注的训练方式可行有效。

title: Multidimensional Resilience for Electrical Power Systems: Systematic Review, Integrated Index, and Validation under Real-World Cyber-Physical Attack Scenarios
comment: 35 pages, Elsevier Renewable and Sustainable Energy Reviews
summary:
The accelerating decarbonization of energy systems has transformed electrical power systems into complex infrastructures exposed to threats whose interactions generate systemic vulnerabilities that conventional resilience approaches fail to capture. Although resilience assessment has expanded across multiple dimensions, existing studies largely examine them in isolation or adjacent pairs, leaving cross-dimensional couplings insufficiently explored. This study demonstrates i) that single-dimension assessments fail to capture the degradation produced by simultaneous cross-dimensional failures, ii) the nonlinear amplification emerging when physical, operational, and digital-cyber dimensions are jointly compromised, and iii) the intensification imposed by climatic and economic-regulatory stressors.
  To this end, we leverage a hybrid quantitative methodology. A PRISMA 2020 review with backward and forward snowballing identifies methodological gaps and unresolved dependencies across five resilience dimensions: physical, operational, digital-cyber, climatic-external, and economic-regulatory. Following this analysis, a Multidimensional Resilience Index (MDRI) is developed to capture endogenous couplings and exogenous amplification effects and is validated under escalating cyber-physical attack scenarios inspired by the December 2025 attack on Polish energy infrastructure. Results show that degradation under cascading and simultaneous failures is nearly eight times greater than under isolated stress, while exogenous conditions amplify degradation by an additional factor approaching six, with 72% of this amplification driven by exogenous stressors. Combined, these mechanisms produce a 46-fold increase in resilience loss compared to a single-vector reference.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示能源系统脱碳背景下电力基础设施面临的多维耦合脆弱性，通过PRISMA 2020综述和MDRI指数发现：跨维度联合失效产生的退化效应是单维度评估的8倍，外源性压力（气候/经济监管）进一步放大约6倍，综合导致韧性损失高达单维度基准的46倍。
AI.motivation: 现有韧性评估多局限于单一维度或相邻维度分析，未能捕捉物理、运营、数字网络、气候、经济监管等多维度之间的交叉耦合效应及其非线性放大机制，亟待系统性研究跨维度相互作用对能源基础设施韧性的真实影响。
AI.method: 采用混合定量方法：①PRISMA 2020系统综述结合前后向回溯检索，识别五个韧性维度（物理、运营、数字网络、气候外部、经济监管）的方法论缺口；②构建多维韧性指数（MDRI）量化内生耦合与外源放大效应；③以2025年12月波兰能源设施网络攻击为情景进行验证。
AI.result: 级联/同步失效下退化程度是单一应力场景的8倍；外源条件额外放大约6倍退化，其中72%归因于外源压力；综合机制导致韧性损失相比单维度基准增加46倍。
AI.conclusion: 单一维度评估严重低估现实世界多维耦合风险，跨维度交互及外源压力必须纳入韧性评估框架；MDRI可作为量化多维耦合韧性的有效工具，为复杂能源系统风险管理提供新视角。

title: Enabling KV Caching of Shared Prefix for Diffusion Language Models
summary:
Key-value (KV) caching for shared prefixes is essential for high-throughput large language model (LLM) serving, but it faces critical challenges in emerging diffusion language models (DLMs).
