In DLMs, bidirectional attention means that updating any token dynamically alters the entire context and its corresponding KVs. Thus, existing caching techniques developed for LLMs, which assume that KVs remain invariant once computed, corrupt the shared prefix KVs. Our experiments show that applying these techniques to DLMs causes model accuracy to collapse to near zero.
  To unlock high-throughput DLM serving, we propose bidirectional prefix caching, bicache, the first KV caching technique for shared prefixes in DLMs. bicache is designed based on key observations from our comprehensive analysis: shared prefix KVs remain stable and reusable in shallow layers, while the depth of shallow layers depends on the fraction of shared prefix tokens in each request. Thus, bicache dynamically identifies a safe layer depth for reusing shared prefix KVs and eliminates redundant computation. Evaluations demonstrate that bicache significantly improves serving throughput by 36.3%-98.3% compared to existing techniques without accuracy collapse (only 0-1.8% difference).

AI.tldr: 针对扩散语言模型(DLM)中双向注意力导致共享前缀KV缓存失效的问题，提出双向前缀缓存(bicache)，通过动态识别可安全重用共享前缀KV的浅层深度，在不降低模型精度(仅0-1.8%差异)的情况下提升服务吞吐量36.3%-98.3%。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM的KV缓存技术假设KV一旦计算就保持不变，但在扩散语言模型中，双向注意力机制使得更新任何token都会动态改变整个上下文及其对应的KV，导致共享前缀KV被破坏，模型精度几乎归零。因此需要专门针对DLM的共享前缀KV缓存技术以实现高吞吐量服务。
AI.method: 提出bicache方法，基于关键观察：共享前缀KV在浅层保持稳定可重用，且浅层深度取决于每个请求中共享前缀token的比例。bicache动态识别可安全重用共享前缀KV的层深度，消除冗余计算。
AI.result: 相比现有技术，bicache提升服务吞吐量36.3%-98.3%，且模型精度几乎无损(仅0-1.8%差异)。
AI.conclusion: bicache是首个针对DLM中共享前缀的KV缓存技术，通过利用浅层KV的稳定性实现高效缓存，在不牺牲模型精度的前提下显著提升吞吐量。

title: Semiparametric Difference-in-Differences Estimation With Missing Not at Random Data: A Shadow Variable Approach
summary: This paper considers a semiparametric difference-in-differences (DID) framework for identifying and estimating treatment effects on the treated (ATT) when outcomes are missing not at random (MNAR), and a fully observed shadow variable is available. The shadow variable is assumed to be associated with the outcome evolution but independent of the missingness process, conditional on covariates and the possibly unobserved outcome evolution. We establish the identification conditions, derive the corresponding identification results and estimation algorithm, and evaluate the finite-sample performance of the proposed estimator through simulation studies and a real data application.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了在结果非随机缺失（MNAR）且存在影子变量的条件下，利用半参数双重差分（DID）框架识别和估计处理组平均处理效应（ATT）的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统DID方法通常假设结果完全观测或随机缺失，但实际中结果可能非随机缺失（MNAR），导致估计偏差。本文旨在解决这一数据缺失问题，通过引入影子变量来识别ATT。
AI.method: 基于半参数DID框架，利用影子变量（与结果演化相关但与缺失机制独立）作为辅助信息，建立识别条件，推导估计量，并设计相应估计算法。
AI.result: 通过模拟研究验证了所提估计量在有限样本下的良好性能，并在真实数据应用中展示了方法的实用性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了MNAR下的ATT估计问题，为处理缺失数据提供了新的DID工具。

title: An Iterative Computational Framework for Infinite-Horizon Mean-Field Linear-Quadratic Zero-Sum Stochastic Differential Games
summary: This work develops an iterative computational framework to obtain saddle-point solutions for infinite-horizon two-person mean-field linear-quadratic zero-sum stochastic differential games. By generalizing classical iterative framework, we construct a monotonically increasing matrix sequence to decouple the strongly coupled, analytically intractable original problem into a set of tractable subproblems. By sequentially computing the stabilizing solutions of the coupled algebraic Riccati equations for these subproblems, we can further derive the solution to the original problem. Rigorous convergence analysis is established to validate the proposed iterative algorithm. Different from existing algorithms limited to specific simplified setups, this framework proposes the first universal computational paradigm applicable to a broad class of game-driven Riccati equations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种迭代计算框架，用于求解无限时域两人均值场线性二次零和随机微分博弈的鞍点解，通过构造单调递增矩阵序列解耦强耦合问题，并严格证明了算法的收敛性。
AI.motivation: 现有的算法仅限于特定的简化设置，缺乏一种通用的计算范式来求解这类强耦合、解析上难以处理的博弈问题。
AI.method: 推广经典迭代框架，构造单调递增矩阵序列将原问题解耦为一系列可处理的子问题，然后依次计算子问题耦合代数Riccati方程的镇定解。
AI.result: 建立了严格的收敛性分析，验证了所提迭代算法的有效性，并首次提出了适用于广泛博弈驱动Riccati方程的通用计算范式。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为无限时域两人均值场线性二次零和随机微分博弈提供了首个通用计算方法。

title: MEC-Cox: Machine-Learning-Assisted Generalized Entropy Calibration for ATT Marginal Hazard-Ratio Estimation
summary: Externally controlled survival trials are increasingly used when concurrent randomized controls are infeasible, particularly in oncology and rare-disease settings with time-to-event endpoints. We target an average-treatment-effect-on-the-treated (ATT)-type marginal hazard-ratio estimand, comparing treatment with counterfactual control in the treated trial population, and estimate it using inverse-probability-weighted (IPW) Cox regression. Valid inference is challenging because IPW Cox regression depends on the weights through both event contributions and risk-set averages, making flexible machine-learning nuisance estimation difficult to incorporate directly. Building on machine-learning-assisted generalized entropy calibration (MEC) by Lee and Kim (2026), we propose MEC-Cox for ATT-weighted IPW Cox regression. The method begins with normalized source-propensity-score odds weights for external controls and then applies Bregman calibration to balance cross-fitted prognostic summaries between external controls and treated trial patients. The calibration basis may include control-survival predictions, Cox linear predictors, penalized-survival-model predictions, or other prognostic-score summaries. MEC-updated weights therefore play a dual role as source-transport and prognostic-score balancing weights. We establish consistency, characterize a calibration-induced efficiency gain, and develop a stacked sandwich variance estimator. Simulations show that MEC-Cox can reduce bias, increase efficiency, and improve coverage through flexible machine-learning-assisted adjustment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MEC-Cox方法，针对外部对照生存试验中的ATT型边际风险比估计，通过机器学习辅助的广义熵校准（MEC）更新权重，实现IPW Cox回归的偏差减少、效率提升和覆盖改善。
AI.motivation: 外部对照生存试验中，IPW Cox回归的权重同时影响事件贡献和风险集均值，使得灵活使用机器学习估计混杂因素变得困难，现有方法难以直接整合。
AI.method: 基于MEC校准框架，先计算归一化的源倾向得分比值权重，再通过Bregman校准平衡外部对照与治疗患者的交叉拟合预后汇总（如控制组生存预测、Cox线性预测、惩罚生存模型预测等），得到兼具源运输和预后评分平衡双重作用的权重，并用堆叠三明治方差估计器进行推断。
AI.result: 建立了一致性理论，刻画了校准带来的效率增益，并开发了堆叠三明治方差估计器。模拟研究表明MEC-Cox通过灵活的机器学习辅助调整能降低偏差、提高效率并改善覆盖。
AI.conclusion: MEC-Cox有效解决了外部对照生存试验中IPW Cox回归难以整合机器学习估计的难题，提供了一种偏差更小、效率更高、覆盖更可靠的推断方法。

title: Position: Anthropomorphic Misalignment Research Needs Stronger Evidence
summary: We argue that many Anthropomorphic Misalignment Research (AMR) studies need stronger evidence to ensure that they can provide a robust foundation for critical safety decisions, such as model deployment and regulation. By evaluating failure modes across different misalignment concepts, such as deception, emergent misalignment, and sycophancy, we show how conceptual ambiguity, non-robust datasets, experimental design, and insufficient causal interventions can lead to overinterpretation of model behaviors. This position paper aims to offer guidance on evidentiary considerations that can help improve methodological rigor in AMR. To achieve this, we provide a clear call to action through a proposed framework of evidence levels and a diagnostic checklist. These shared standards will enable more productive scientific discourse and ensure that claims about AI risks rest on solid empirical foundations.

AI.tldr: 本文呼吁人类形态错位研究（AMR）需要更强有力的证据来支撑模型部署和监管等关键安全决策，通过分析欺骗、突现错位和谄媚等概念中的模糊性、非鲁棒数据集、实验设计问题及不充分的因果干预，提出证据层级框架和诊断清单以提高方法严谨性。
AI.motivation: 当前AMR研究缺乏足够坚实的证据基础，不足以支撑模型部署和监管等关键安全决策，存在概念模糊、数据集不鲁棒、实验设计缺陷和因果干预不足等问题，导致模型行为被过度解读。
AI.method: 通过评估不同错位概念（欺骗、突现错位、谄媚）的失败模式，分析概念模糊性、数据集鲁棒性、实验设计和因果干预等维度的问题，并提出证据层级框架和诊断清单。
AI.result: 识别出AMR研究中存在的概念模糊、非鲁棒数据集、实验设计缺陷和因果干预不足等四大失败模式，证明这些因素会导致模型行为的过度解读。
AI.conclusion: 提出证据层级框架和诊断清单作为行动指南，期望通过共享标准提高AMR方法严谨性，促进更富有成效的科学讨论，确保AI风险主张建立在坚实的实证基础之上。

title: Land cover and flood type govern the detection limits of satellite-based flood mapping across diverse global flood events
summary: Floods are among the most destructive natural hazards, and their increasing frequency under climate change makes satellite-based inundation mapping essential for disaster response. Geospatial foundation models pretrained on satellite archives offer geographic transferability, but their operational reliability across diverse, unseen events remains uncharacterized. Here we deploy Prithvi-EO-2.0 across 19 out-of-distribution flood events (2017-2025) spanning six continents, eight climate zones, and six flood mechanisms, validating against two independent reference products. Detection accuracy depended jointly on land cover and flood type, with cropland yielding the highest agreement (IoU=52%) and riverine events the strongest detection (F1=0.69), while tree cover and built-up areas showed near-zero detection (IoU=4%) regardless of flood mechanism. Dual-reference validation revealed that apparent model error partly reflects definitional inconsistency between reference products rather than detection failure. Iterative pipeline testing identified 23 failure modes, with pipeline engineering dominating initial error over model capacity. These findings establish environment-dependent detection boundaries for operational satellite flood mapping.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了地理空间基础模型Prithvi-EO-2.0在19个全球分布洪水事件（2017-2025年）中的泛化能力，发现检测精度高度依赖于土地覆盖类型和洪水机制，并指出管道工程错误远大于模型能力限制，为卫星洪水制图的可靠部署划定了环境依赖的检测边界。
AI.motivation: 洪水灾害频发且气候变化加剧其频率，卫星遥感制图需具备地理迁移能力；然而现有基础模型在未见过的、多样化洪水事件中的操作可靠性尚未得到充分评估。
AI.method: 将Prithvi-EO-2.0部署于跨越六大洲、8个气候带、6类洪水机制的19个分布外洪水事件，使用两个独立参考产品进行验证，并进行迭代管道测试识别失效模式。
AI.result: 耕地检测最佳（IoU=52%），河洪事件F1=0.69；树冠和建成区检测近乎为零（IoU=4%）；双重验证表明部分误差源于参考产品定义不一致；管道工程错误主导了初始误差。
AI.conclusion: 确立了环境依赖的洪水检测性能边界，明确了当前模型在操作层面上的适用条件与局限性。

title: Finding New Connections between Concepts from Medline Database Incorporating Domain Knowledge
summary: In this digital world, data is everything and significantly impacts our everyday lives. Interestingly, in this small world, everything is part of an ecosystem, where everything is connected, directly or indirectly. The same thing happens to data as well. In most cases, it may seem like a particular topic does not have any connection with another one, but in reality, they are connected through a mutually related topic. Therefore, in this research, we will discuss an adaptive model modified from the ABC model by Don R. Swanson, a Literature-Based Discovery (LBD) Model, to find the hidden connections between Concepts of Interest. The model demonstrates that two topics, A and C are different and have no relationship. But they have a common topic, B that can be used to connect topics A and C This famous model will be used in this discussion to connect Medical Concepts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于ABC模型（Swanson文献发现模型）的自适应改进方法，用于发现医学概念之间的隐含关联。两个看似无关的主题A和C通过一个共同的主题B建立连接。
AI.motivation: 数据世界中事物往往存在隐含关联，但表面上看不出联系。作者希望利用文献发现方法，挖掘医学概念之间隐藏的间接关联。
AI.method: 对Don R. Swanson的ABC文献发现模型进行自适应改进，通过识别连接两个不同主题（A和C）的中间主题B，来发现概念间的隐藏联系。
AI.result: 提出了一个能够连接医学概念的自适应ABC模型，该模型可以发现看似无关的医学主题之间的隐含关系。
AI.conclusion: 该自适应ABC模型为文献发现和医学概念关联挖掘提供了有效的框架，有助于发现数据生态中隐藏的知识连接。

title: When Can Phasor-Domain Device Models Be Trusted for Electromechanical Stability Analysis of Grid-Forming Converter-Dominated Microgrids?
summary: Grid-forming (GFM) converter-dominated microgrids are often analyzed using reduced-order phasor-domain electromechanical GFM models, but the validity of these models is often taken for granted. Assuming ideal inner-loop tracking (IILT) of terminal-voltage references, these models neglect the inner-loop and filter dynamics at the electromagnetic-transient (EMT) timescale to simplify stability analysis. This paper argues that such neglected dynamics can destabilize the system, invalidating the stability conclusions drawn from the IILT model. To address this cross-timescale stability issue, we formulate the validity of the IILT stability conclusion as a robust-stability certification problem. The EMT-induced model mismatch between the reduced-order converter model and the actual converter model is represented as a structured uncertainty embedded around the IILT feedback loop. This yields a frequency-resolved interaction index and a structured singular-value sufficient certificate for determining when the stability conclusion of the IILT model can be certified with respect to a prescribed EMT uncertainty weight. The uncertainty weight can be obtained from detailed EMT models or terminal reference-response measurements. Case studies confirm that the proposed certificate correctly certifies model validity and identifies the loss of trustworthiness. We also demonstrate that the measurement-based uncertainty weights closely match the model-based ones, which enables deployment without accessing inner-loop models.

AI.tldr: 本文质疑了网格构型（GFM）变换器主导微电网中常用的降阶机电模型的有效性，指出忽略电磁暂态（EMT）尺度内环和滤波器动态可能导致系统失稳。为此提出一种鲁棒稳定性认证方法，通过结构化奇异值判据量化EMT不确定性对IILT模型结论的影响，并支持基于测量的不确定性权重获取。
AI.motivation: 传统GFM微电网稳定性分析常采用忽略电磁暂态尺度的降阶IILT模型，但该假设缺乏严格验证。本文旨在揭示EMT尺度动态被忽视可能导致的跨时间尺度稳定性问题，并建立判断IILT模型结论是否可信的定量方法。
AI.method: 1) 将IILT模型与实际模型之间的EMT诱导演化差异建模为围绕IILT反馈回路的结构化不确定性；2) 推导频率分辨的交互指标和结构化奇异值（μ）充分条件判据；3) 支持基于详细EMT模型或终端参考响应测量的不确定性权重获取。
AI.result: 案例验证表明所提判据能正确认证模型有效性并识别IILT模型失去可信性的工况；基于测量的不确定性权重与基于模型的结果高度匹配，无需内环模型即可部署。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了GFM微电网降阶模型忽视EMT尺度动态的潜在风险，提供了鲁棒稳定性认证的理论框架和实用工具，为跨时间尺度稳定性分析奠定了新方法论基础。

title: When Should an AI Scientist Stop? Verifiable Experiment Steering and Refusal for Autonomous Discovery
comment: Accepted at AI for Science Workshop at ICML 2026
summary: We present CARTOGRAPH, a verification layer for AI scientists that couples unresolved-subspace experiment steering (select), explicit ambiguity closure (resolve), and residual-based library inadequacy detection (refuse). Under a local linear-Gaussian bridge, raw unresolved projection is the isotropic unresolved Fisher-information trace, while CARTOGRAPH-A is the exact unresolved A-optimal rule; closed-form EIG and Box-Hill arise as local comparators rather than global equivalents. Across five testbeds, CARTOGRAPH-A beats raw projection 129W/0T/15L at d = 8 (p < 10^-21) in a replicated structured cascade. More distinctively, the framework tentatively identifies three out-of-library pharmacokinetic mechanisms and then revokes those identifications as residuals expose structural misfit, while one perturbed in-library control stays identified throughout. In low-dimensional pharmacokinetic and filtered EPA settings, near-ties against disagreement are predicted by theory and observed. Finally, in a retrospective audit of 40 positive claims from the published A-Lab autonomous materials system, the refuse guard flags all 4 claims later marked inconclusive under manual reanalysis while passing 32/36 confirmed claims. Code is available at https://github.com/ai4science-boed/cartograph.git

AI.tldr: CARTOGRAPH是一个面向AI科学家的验证层，通过选择（select）、解析（resolve）和拒绝（refuse）三个机制进行实验引导与假设验证。在多个测试场景中表现优异，并能有效识别不可靠的实验结论。
AI.motivation: 现有AI科学家的实验验证方法缺乏对不确定性的系统处理，尤其是未解决子空间中的投影偏差、模糊性闭合和库外机制检测问题，导致结论可靠性不足。
AI.method: 提出CARTOGRAPH框架：1) Select：基于未解决子空间投影和Fisher信息迹的A-最优实验引导；2) Resolve：通过显式模糊闭合（EIG、Box-Hill等局部比较器）解决歧义；3) Refuse：基于残差检测库外机制的不匹配，拒绝不可靠识别。
AI.result: CARTOGRAPH-A在8维结构化级联测试中以129胜/0平/15负显著优于原始投影（p<10^-21）；成功识别并随后撤销3个药代动力学库外机制；在A-Lab系统40个阳性主张中，拒绝层标记了所有4个后续被判定为不确定的主张，同时通过了32/36个确认主张。
AI.conclusion: CARTOGRAPH为AI科学家的自动实验和结论验证提供了可扩展的理论框架，尤其在检测不可靠结论方面具有显著优势，有望提升AI驱动的科学发现的可信度。

title: Latent Structural Categorical Matrix Completion with Application to Quasispecies Analysis
summary: Matrix completion has been extensively studied for real-valued data, but existing methods are often limited in handling categorical variables. We propose LCMC, a double-loop optimization framework for categorical matrix completion via latent factorization based on a binary tensor representation. In this setting, each categorical entry is encoded as a one-hot vector along a third tensor mode, thereby preserving its discrete, non-ordinal nature. The outer loop adaptively estimates the latent dimension by iteratively updating it with feedback from the inner loop, while the inner loop reconstructs the categorical matrix through tensor factorization, supported by a corresponding theoretical analysis. To further improve scalability and robustness, we introduce enhancements including a split-merge-refine strategy and an adaptive data reduction technique. Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets in viral quasispecies reconstruction, demonstrate that LCMC achieves superior accuracy and efficiency compared to existing methods.

AI.tldr: LCMC提出了一种基于二元张量表示的双循环优化框架，用于解决分类矩阵补全问题，在病毒准种重建任务中表现出优越的准确性和效率。
AI.motivation: 现有矩阵补全方法主要针对实值数据设计，难以处理分类变量（categorical variables）的离散、非序数特性。
AI.method: 提出LCMC双循环优化框架：外循环自适应估计潜在维度，内循环通过张量分解进行矩阵重建；引入分裂-合并-细化策略和自适应数据缩减技术提升可扩展性和鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实病毒准种重建数据集上，LCMC相比现有方法在准确性和效率方面均更优。
AI.conclusion: LCMC为分类矩阵补全提供了一种有效的新范式，通过二元张量表示保持了分类变量的离散非序数本质，理论分析与实验验证共同支持了方法的有效性。

title: Improving Bayesian Optimization via Training-Aware Conditional Diffusion Models
summary: Bayesian optimization (BO) is a widely used approach for black-box optimization that uses a Gaussian process (GP) as a surrogate and guides sequential evaluations via an acquisition function, with the ultimate goal of locating the global optimum $\mathbf{x}^{\star}$. To align with this goal, information-based acquisition functions such as Predictive Entropy Search (PES) model $\mathbf{x}^{\star}$ as a random variable and reduce the entropy of its distribution, but approximating this distribution via traditional GP posterior sampling is computationally expensive. To address this limitation, we leverage Conditional Diffusion Models (CDMs) to efficiently approximate the distribution of $\mathbf{x}^{\star}$ and develop BO-inherent training strategies for CDMs. Motivated by the structural properties of the CDM-learned distribution, we further develop an acquisition strategy termed Diffusion-based Mode Seeking (DMS) to guide the sequential evaluation. We establish a sub-optimality guarantee for the CDM-learned distribution and demonstrate through extensive experiments that DMS outperforms standard BO baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文利用条件扩散模型（CDM）高效近似贝叶斯优化中全局最优解 $\mathbf{x}^{\star}$ 的分布，并提出了基于扩散的模态搜索（DMS）采集策略，在保证次优性的同时显著优于标准BO基线方法。
AI.motivation: 传统信息类采集函数（如PES）通过GP后验采样近似最优解分布，计算成本高昂。本文旨在利用条件扩散模型高效逼近该分布，降低计算开销。
AI.method: 1）利用条件扩散模型（CDM）高效近似 $\mathbf{x}^{\star}$ 的后验分布；2）提出BO特化的训练策略来训练CDM；3）基于CDM学习分布的模态结构，设计Diffusion-based Mode Seeking (DMS) 采集策略指导序贯采样。
AI.result: 建立了CDM学习分布的次优性理论保证；大量实验表明DMS在优化性能上优于标准BO基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 条件扩散模型能够有效替代传统GP后验采样进行信息型BO，DMS采集策略在理论与实践上均具优势。

title: Frankenstein in the Pipeline: Computational Epistemicide in Facial Recognition
comment: Accepted to ACM FAccT 2026. Author's version. 17 pages, 2 figures
summary:
While the eugenic roots of computer vision are well-documented in critical technology studies, less attention has been paid to the operational mechanisms through which this violence is enacted at the level of the pipeline. This paper employs Mary Shelley's Frankenstein not as a metaphor for unintended consequences, but as a diagnostic framework for method: disassembly, reconstruction, and the production of a creature whose legitimacy is asserted by the procedure that made it.
  I argue that embedding-based facial recognition enacts what I call computational epistemicide, an extension of Sueli Carneiro's concept of epistemicide to the computational domain - by destroying the face as a living, relational surface and authorizing a numerical proxy as the privileged site of identity. Across detection/cropping, landmarking, alignment/frontalization, and embedding, the face is progressively narrowed to what can be stabilized as data, producing a canonical face as the condition of legibility and a corresponding form-subject as the condition of recognition. Vectorization completes the Frankensteinian "stitching": the dissected face is reassembled into a fixed-dimensional artifact designed to circulate across databases and institutions. I then show how distance-based similarity and thresholding operationalize a norm of "close enough," making recognition inseparable from standardization and rendering reformist "ethical AI" optimization structurally insufficient. The paper concludes by arguing for abolition as a normative stance: refusing vectorized identity as a legitimate basis for rights and access, and dismantling the institutional impulse to govern human life through dissectible data points.

AI.tldr: 本文运用玛丽·雪莱的《弗兰肯斯坦》作为方法论诊断框架，分析基于嵌入的人脸识别如何通过拆解、重建和向量化过程实施"计算性认识论灭绝"——摧毁面部作为活生生的关系性表面，并用数值代理取代其作为身份特权场所。文章最终主张废除主义立场，拒绝将向量化身份作为权利和获取的合法基础。
AI.motivation: 计算机视觉的优生学根源已有充分记录，但其在技术流水线层面实施暴力的操作机制尚未得到足够关注。作者旨在揭示人脸识别技术中隐性的暴力运作逻辑。
AI.method: 以《弗兰肯斯坦》作为方法论诊断框架（拆解、重建、通过程序宣称合法性的造物），分析人脸识别流水线：检测/裁剪、特征点标注、对齐/正面化、嵌入生成、向量化、基于距离的相似度与阈值判定。
AI.result: 人脸识别过程将面部逐步窄化为可稳定的数据，生产出"规范面孔"作为可读性条件，以及对应的"形式主体"作为识别条件。向量化完成"弗兰肯斯坦式缝合"，将拆解的面部重组为固定维度的可流通人工制品。"足够接近"的规范性运作使识别与标准化不可分割。
AI.conclusion: 改良主义的"伦理AI"优化在结构上不足，作者主张废除主义立场：拒绝向量化身份作为权利和获取的合法基础，拆除通过可拆解数据点治理人类生命的制度冲动。

title: Reconstructing and forecasting disease trajectories of patients with Alzheimer's disease using routine data in resource-constrained settings
summary: Alzheimer's disease is a progressive neurodegenerative disorder, and its progression varies substantially across patients. Existing work aims to forecast patients' future cognitive state, with minimal focus on reconstructing the state from past visits. Furthermore, in current research, quantifying predictive uncertainty remains underexplored and relies on costly modalities such as MRI, PET, and CSF, limiting their deployment in resource-limited settings. In this research, our primary objectives are: First, bidirectional prediction of cognitive scores from irregular visits to present the complete disease trajectory. Second, to enable interpolation and extrapolation capabilities to assist clinicians in informed prognostic decision making, and third, to provide a well-calibrated uncertainty estimate for all predictions, and finally, to achieve the objectives using the modalities available during routine visits. We propose a unified framework, GNOVA: A GRU-Neural ODE Variational Autoencoder. The architecture combines a Gated Recurrent Unit encoder and a Neural ODE decoder within a variational autoencoder framework. In our work, we forecast the CDR-SB and MMSE Scores. The GRU encoder allows for any number of inputs at any time point. The Neural-ODE decoder performs continuous estimation, allowing interpolation and extrapolation at any desired time point. The Variational autoencoder allows for uncertainty estimation in predictions. We worked with 1,727 patients from the ADNI dataset over 10 years; the model achieved mean absolute errors of 1.35 and 2.28 for CDR-SB and MMSE scores, respectively, without requiring any neuroimaging or biomarker data. Feature-ablation studies revealed that age, BMI, and APOE4 status were strong predictors. The proposed framework enables the reconstruction of incomplete patient histories and the anticipation of future cognitive states.

AI.tldr: 提出GNOVA框架（GRU-神经ODE变分自编码器），利用常规临床数据（无需MRI/PET/CSF）实现阿尔茨海默病患者认知评分的双向预测（插值与外推），并给出不确定性估计，在ADNI数据集上取得良好效果。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要从过去预测未来认知状态，很少反向重构历史状态；同时量化的不确定性估计依赖昂贵的神经影像和生物标志物，限制了在资源有限场景的部署。本文旨在利用常规就诊可用模态实现双向预测、插值外推和不确定性校准。
AI.method: 提出GNOVA框架，由GRU编码器（接受任意数量、任意时间点的输入）和神经ODE解码器（实现连续时间估计，支持任意时间点的插值与外推）组成，整体采用VAE结构以提供不确定性估计。
AI.result: 在ADNI数据集上1,727名患者10年数据中，CDR-SB和MMSE的MAE分别为1.35和2.28，无需神经影像或生物标志物。特征消融实验显示年龄、BMI和APOE4状态是强预测因子。
AI.conclusion: GNOVA框架能够重建不完整的患者病史并预测未来认知状态，仅依赖常规临床数据即可实现有效预测和不确定性量化。

title: mllm-shap: A Shapley Value Explainability Platform for Text-Audio Multimodal Large Language Models
summary:
We introduce mllm-shap, an open-source Python framework designed to extend Shapley Value (SV) explainability from text-only Large Language Models to Multimodal LLMs (MLLMs) processing joint text and audio inputs. While text-based attribution is well-studied, mllm-shap addresses three critical challenges unique to the multimodal regime:
  (1) Modality-aware coalition masking, which manages the interleaved processing of discrete text tokens and dense audio encoder frames.
  (2) Multi-turn conversation tracking, utilizing per-token metadata to maintain role and modality context.
  (3) Phonetic alignment-based token grouping, a novel technique that reduces the coalition space by 10x to 50x, rendering SV estimation computationally feasible for long-form audio.
  The platform implements five SV estimation strategies, including a Complementary Contributions (CC) estimator with Neyman-optimal allocation that demonstrates superior convergence over standard Monte Carlo baselines. mllm-shap is provided as a pip-installable package featuring an interactive web-based GUI for granular attribution visualization. To our knowledge, this is the first publicly available framework providing a complete, reproducible pipeline for SV-based explainability in text-audio MLLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 mllm-shap，一个开源 Python 框架，将 Shapley Value 可解释性从纯文本 LLM 扩展到处理文本-音频的多模态 LLM，解决了模态掩码、多轮对话跟踪和音频令牌分组三大挑战，并实现了五种 SV 估计策略。
AI.motivation: 现有 Shapley Value 可解释性方法主要针对纯文本 LLM，缺乏支持文本-音频多模态 MLLM 的完整、可复现的开源框架。
AI.method: 提出三方面技术创新：(1) 模态感知的联盟掩码机制，处理离散文本 token 与密集音频编码帧的交叉处理；(2) 基于 token 元数据的多轮对话跟踪；(3) 基于音韵对齐的令牌分组，将联盟空间缩小 10-50 倍。同时实现五种 SV 估计策略，包括具有 Neyman 最优分配的互补贡献（CC）估计器。
AI.result: CC 估计器在收敛性上优于标准蒙特卡洛基线；令牌分组技术将计算量降低 10-50 倍，使长音频的 SV 估计变得可行；提供 pip 安装包和交互式 Web GUI。
AI.conclusion: mllm-shap 是首个公开提供的、为文本-音频 MLLM 提供完整可复现 SV 可解释性管道的框架。

title: A Global Convergence Analysis of Consensus ALADIN for Convex Optimization
summary: Distributed optimization problems are pervasive in machine learning and optimal control. In this paper, we study smooth strongly convex distributed consensus optimization problems. We present a distributed optimization algorithm for consensus problems based on the Consensus Augmented Lagrangian Alternating Direction Inexact Newton (C-ALADIN) framework. Our algorithm uses an auxiliary variable to decide when to update second-order information, enabling curvature exploitation without sacrificing global convergence. This contrasts with existing C-ALADIN methods, which require constant Hessian approximations and thus lose numerical advantages. Under smooth strong convexity, the algorithm converges globally, and the auxiliary variable converges sublinearly. Numerical experiments on logistic regression show that our algorithm outperforms baseline methods that use either fixed or updated Hessian information.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于C-ALADIN框架的分布式共识优化算法，通过引入辅助变量决定何时更新二阶信息，在保持全局收敛的同时利用曲率信息，在逻辑回归任务上优于固定或更新Hessian的基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有C-ALADIN方法需要常数Hessian近似，失去了数值上的优势，因此需要一种能利用曲率信息又不牺牲全局收敛性的分布式优化算法。
AI.method: 基于C-ALADIN框架，引入辅助变量动态决定何时更新二阶信息，在光滑强凸条件下实现全局收敛，辅助变量次线性收敛。
AI.result: 在逻辑回归数值实验中，所提算法优于使用固定或更新Hessian信息的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该算法在保持全局收敛的同时有效利用了曲率信息，为分布式共识优化提供了更高效的二阶方法。

title: MST-Direct at Scale: Multivariate and Conditional Geostatistical Simulation via Sinkhorn Optimal Transport
summary:
This paper extends MST-Direct, a Matching-via-Sinkhorn-Transport approach for multivariate geostatistical simulation, from the original bivariate, unconditional, small-grid formulation to multivariate, conditional, and large-grid settings. We address the three main limitations identified in the original work: (i) scalability beyond a few thousand nodes through a sparse, candidate-restricted Sinkhorn matcher with O(nC) memory complexity; (ii) extension to multiple variables by matching target value tuples onto an independent FFT-MA Gaussian backbone that reproduces a prescribed variogram; and (iii) hard-data conditioning by fixing observed data tuples at their spatial locations while conditioning the backbone through kriging. Because the transport plan remains a permutation of the target tuples, the multivariate joint distribution is preserved exactly.
  The method is validated using the same six-variate, heteroscedastic, strongly nonlinear reference distribution employed in Direct Multivariate Simulation (DMS), under both unconditional (200x200) and conditional (100x100, 200 hard-data samples) scenarios, and is benchmarked against the Projection Pursuit Multivariate Transform (PPMT). Results show that MST-Direct reproduces the joint distribution with zero histogram error, exactly honours hard data, and accurately reproduces the prescribed spatial correlation structure, whereas PPMT remains an approximation.
  Index Terms-Optimal transport, Sinkhorn algorithm, geostatistical simulation, multivariate simulation.

AI.tldr: 本文扩展了MST-Direct方法，通过稀疏Sinkhorn匹配器、多变量扩展和硬数据条件化，实现了大规模、多变量、有条件的多元地质统计模拟，在保持联合分布精确性的同时解决了原始方法的三个主要限制。
AI.motivation: 原始MST-Direct方法存在三个主要限制：(i) 仅支持双变量场景；(ii) 无条件模拟；(iii) 仅适用于小规模网格。本文旨在克服这些限制，使其适用于多变量、有条件的、大规模网格的地质统计模拟。
AI.method: (i) 提出稀疏、候选受限的Sinkhorn匹配器，内存复杂度为O(nC)，实现大规模节点可扩展性；(ii) 通过将目标值元组匹配到独立FFT-MA高斯骨干上，扩展到多变量场景；(iii) 通过克里金法对骨干进行条件化，并在空间位置上固定观测数据元组，实现硬数据条件化。
AI.result: 在六变量、异方差、强非线性参考分布下，MST-Direct方法在无条件(200x200)和条件(100x100, 200个硬数据样本)场景中均能：完美重现联合分布（零直方图误差）、精确满足硬数据约束、准确重现预设的空间相关结构，优于作为近似方法的PPMT。
AI.conclusion: MST-Direct通过保持传输计划为目标元组的置换，精确保留了多元联合分布，有效克服了原始方法的三个主要限制，是一种优于PPMT的多变量地质统计模拟方法。

title: AI-Assisted Variance Reduction in Randomized Experiments
summary: Generative AI and large language models can produce realistic predictions of human behavior from rich, unstructured inputs with little to no task-specific training data. Recent work uses these ``digital twin'' predictions to supplement human responses in surveys and experiments. We study the special case of using AI-generated predictions to reduce variance in randomized experiments. We argue that doing so requires no new estimators and that researchers can simply include AI predictions as covariates in standard regression adjustment, analogous to adjusting for a prognostic score. A benefit of this approach is a ``do no harm'' property whereby the adjusted estimator reverts to the unadjusted difference in means when predictions are uninformative. Other methods, such as variants of prediction-powered inference, do not have this guarantee. We provide implementation guidance, including how to obtain continuous scores from discrete LLM outputs and how to use LLMs to featurize unstructured inputs as auxiliary covariates. We demonstrate these ideas in simulations and three empirical applications: a survey mega-study, an email marketing A/B test, and a large-scale technology platform experiment. Overall, efficiency gains are real if modest, with greater benefits in studies that contain substantial text and other unstructured data. We also confirm the do no harm property empirically. Given these gains and limited costs, we recommend adjusting for AI-generated predictions as a regular empirical practice.

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何利用AI生成的预测作为协变量来减少随机实验的方差，提出标准回归调整即可实现"不伤害"特性，并在多项实证中验证了该方法有效但增益适中。
AI.motivation: 利用生成式AI和大型语言模型从非结构化数据中生成人类行为预测，并将其作为协变量纳入随机实验分析，以提高统计效率。
AI.method: 将AI预测作为协变量纳入标准回归调整（类似预后评分调整），并从离散LLM输出中获取连续分数，利用LLM对非结构化输入进行特征化处理作为辅助协变量。
AI.result: 在调查元研究、邮件营销A/B测试和大型技术平台实验中，效率提升切实但有限，尤其在包含大量文本和非结构化数据的研究中收益更明显，且经验证具有"不伤害"特性。
AI.conclusion: 鉴于方法简便、成本低且具备"不伤害"保障，建议将AI生成预测的调整作为常规实证操作纳入实践。

title: Equivalence between time and norm optimal control problems of stochastic differential equations
summary: In this paper, we establish the equivalence between minimal time and minimal norm control problems for controllable stochastic differential equations (SDEs). The core of this equivalence lies in proving the continuity of the minimal norm function. Unlike the deterministic setting, where the time translation technique is effective, this approach is not applicable due to the adapted nature of the admissible controls in SDEs. To address this challenge, we construct the minimal norm control explicitly, thereby achieving the desired continuity. This constructive approach not only proves theoretical equivalence but also facilitates the design of efficient numerical schemes for minimal norm and time controls.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了可控随机微分方程中最小时间控制与最小范数控制的等价性，通过构造最小范数控制并证明其连续性来实现，并有助于设计高效数值方案。
AI.motivation: 建立随机微分方程中最小时间控制与最小范数控制问题之间的等价关系，克服确定性系统中适用的时间平移技术在随机自适应控制中失效的困难。
AI.method: 通过显式构造最小范数控制，证明最小范数函数的连续性，从而建立两种控制问题的等价性。
AI.result: 成功证明了随机微分方程中最小时间控制与最小范数控制的等价性。
AI.conclusion: 该构造性方法不仅证明了理论等价性，还为最小范数和时间控制的高效数值方案设计提供了便利。

title: LOTTERY: Learning from Reference-Only Samples in Two-Sample Testing under Size Asymmetry
summary: Data-adaptive two-sample testing assesses if two samples come from the same distribution, using a discrepancy learned from the data (e.g., via kernel-based feature representations). Such methods typically rely on data splitting to decouple learning from testing and control type I error. However, this paradigm is ill-suited to few-shot settings with severe sample-size imbalance: abundant reference samples are available, while only a handful of query samples arrive. In this paper, we show how this imbalance can be leveraged constructively. Using abundant reference data, we learn reference-dependent representations that summarize salient structure of the reference distribution and provide informative signals for detecting departures. We incorporate a collection of representation families that capture both global and local structure, and adaptively weight them using only reference samples via an uncertainty-guided principle. Theoretically, we establish permutation-based type I error control and show consistency of the aggregated test: as the sample sizes grow, the test power converges to one whenever the representation set contains at least one consistent representation. Empirically, our aggregation achieves strong performance across a range of benchmarks while retaining type I error control.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种适用于样本量严重不平衡（参考样本充足、查询样本极少）场景的自适应双样本检验方法。利用丰富的参考数据学习参考依赖的表示，并通过不确定性引导原则自适应加权多种全局和局部结构表示。理论上证明了置换法控制第一类错误以及检验一致性（功效随样本量增加趋于1），实验验证了方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统数据自适应双样本检验依赖数据拆分以控制第一类错误，但在"少量查询样本、大量参考样本"的少样本不平衡场景下效果不佳。本文旨在利用这种不平衡性，通过丰富的参考数据构建有效的检验方法。
AI.method: 1) 利用丰富参考数据学习参考依赖的表示，捕获参考分布的显著结构；2) 整合多种表示族（全局和局部结构），并通过不确定性引导原则仅用参考样本进行自适应加权；3) 采用置换检验控制第一类错误。
AI.result: 理论上证明了置换法能控制第一类错误，且聚合检验具有一致性（样本量增大时功效趋于1，只要表示集中至少包含一个一致表示）。实验上在多个基准测试中取得强性能，同时保持第一类错误控制。
AI.conclusion: 本文表明样本量不平衡可以被建设性地利用，提出的聚合检验方法在少样本场景下有效且具有理论保证。

title: Reimagining Open Source and Openness in AI: Co-Creating Responsible Technological Futures
comment: To appear in the 2026 ACM Conference on Fairness, Accountability, and Transparency (FAccT '26)
summary: Debates over open source and openness in artificial intelligence have intensified as policymakers, researchers, and practitioners grapple with how foundation models should be developed and governed to balance innovation, accountability, and public interest. However, there has been limited empirical work examining how diverse stakeholders collectively understand and negotiate responsible openness in AI, particularly through participatory processes that extend beyond industry-led definitions and frameworks. This paper presents findings from a multi-sectoral workshop grounded in futures thinking and participatory design methods. The workshop generated co-created visions of desirable futures and the role of AI, alongside a set of action pathways and a research roadmap focused on responsible open source and openness in AI. This paper makes three key contributions. First, it empirically documents the co-created visions, actions, and research priorities. Second, it identifies four core tensions that emerged as participants translated high-level aspirations into concrete actions, revealing conflicting interpretations of openness regarding its purpose (as an end or a means), its scope (expansion versus meaningful access), and its operation (mandatory versus conditional, sufficient versus dependent on governance and use). These tensions illustrate that responsible openness is not a singular technical solution, but a negotiated sociotechnical project shaped by values, positionalities, and priorities. Third, the paper advances methodological approaches in AI governance by demonstrating how participatory futures methods can surface plural visions, actions, and research priorities that extend beyond dominant, largely corporate, narratives, offering empirical insight into how openness, power, and accountability are negotiated in practice.

AI.tldr: 本文通过多部门参与式工作坊，探讨了AI领域中负责任开源的多元理解与协商，识别了四大核心张力，并提供了超越企业主导叙事的实证洞见与方法论贡献。
AI.motivation: 当前关于AI开源与开放性的讨论日益激烈，但缺乏实证研究探索不同利益相关者如何通过参与式过程共同理解和协商"负责任的开放性"，尤其是超越行业主导定义之外的视角。
AI.method: 采用前瞻性思维（futures thinking）和参与式设计方法，组织多部门工作坊，通过共同创造愿景、行动路径和研究路线图来收集和分析多方观点。
AI.result: 1) 记录了共同创造的愿景、行动和研究优先事项；2) 识别了四大核心张力：开放性作为目的还是手段、范围的扩张与有意义访问、强制性还是条件性、充分性还是依赖治理与使用；3) 展示了参与式未来方法如何揭示多元叙事。
AI.conclusion: 负责任的开放性并非单一技术方案，而是一个协商性的社会技术项目，受价值观、立场和优先级的影响。参与式未来方法有助于超越企业主导叙事，为AI治理提供新路径。

title: Improving Multimodal Reasoning via Worst Dimension Optimization
summary: Multimodal reasoning requires a path that retains integrity over a wide range of constraints, from visual grounding to logic consistency. However, the current Process Reward Models focus on heuristically defined rewards that equally weigh these factors, which may lead to the concealment of individual dimension failures by the dominating factors, without guaranteeing the validity of the reasoning process in general.

AI.tldr: 本文指出多模态推理中的过程奖励模型因采用启发式且均等加权的奖励机制，可能掩盖个别维度（如视觉基础或逻辑一致性）的失败，无法保证推理过程整体的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有的过程奖励模型对推理过程中的不同约束（如视觉基础、逻辑一致性）采用均等加权的启发式奖励，导致主导因素可能掩盖单一维度的失败，无法确保推理过程的有效性。
AI.method: 通过批判性分析当前过程奖励模型的加权奖励机制，揭示其可能掩盖个别维度失败的问题，并提出需要更精细化的奖励设计来保证多模态推理的完整性。
AI.result: 当前启发式均等加权的过程奖励模型无法保证多模态推理过程在各约束维度上的有效性，单一维度的失败可能被主导因素掩盖。
AI.conclusion: 需要设计更精细化的过程奖励机制，以分别评估和保证多模态推理中视觉基础、逻辑一致性等各维度约束的完整性，而非采用均等加权的启发式奖励。

title: Principled Agent Debate: Adversarial Arbitration for Sycophancy Reduction in Large Language Models
comment: 11 pages, 3 figures. Code and data available at github.com/NovelSystems/CANDOR
summary: RLHF-trained models are systematically biased toward agreement over accuracy, a structural property of the training process. We present Principled Agent Debate (PAD), a multi-agent architecture that mitigates identity-framed sycophancy by arbitrating between two models tuned to opposing philosophical dispositions, with a pragmatist synthesizer evaluating both arguments blind to their origins. This paper evaluates a prompt-based instantiation of PAD. The key mechanisms are static dispositional tuning, identity stripping before synthesis, single-round independent argumentation, and blind arbitration. We evaluate five instantiations on 200 stratified questions from SycophancyEval. All PAD variants (AnCifer, DeWin, FeynStein, BurGal, Trident) significantly outperform the single-model baseline (18.5%) and instructed-opposition baseline (29.0%), with DeWin achieving 48.5% accuracy (z=6.36, p<0.001 versus both). The variants are not significantly different from each other at n=200. The BurGal variant achieves 53.0% but functions as an architectural validity check; its consensus/heterodox axis structurally favors the heterodox model on every benchmark question. A pre-training floor affects an estimated 40% of questions; fine-tuned disposition models are the identified next step.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为Principled Agent Debate (PAD)的多智能体架构，通过让两个具有对立哲学偏好的模型进行盲审辩论，有效缓解了RLHF训练导致的系统性顺从偏见（sycophancy），将准确率从单模型的18.5%提升至最高53.0%。
AI.motivation: RLHF训练后的模型存在系统性地偏向"让用户满意"而非"给出正确答案"的倾向（即sycophancy）。现有方法（如直接要求模型反对）效果有限，因此需要更结构化的方法从根本上解决这一问题。
AI.method: 提出PAD架构：1）静态倾向调优——让两个模型分别固守相反的哲学立场（如功利主义vs义务论）；2）身份剥离——合成器在评估论点时不知道来源；3）单轮独立辩论——两个模型各自生成论证，无交互；4）盲审仲裁——由实用主义合成器基于论点质量而非来源做出判断。测试了五种实例化版本。
AI.result: 在SycophancyEval的200个分层问题上，所有PAD变体（18.5%-53.0%）均显著优于单模型基线（18.5%）和直接对抗基线（29.0%）。DeWin达到48.5%（z=6.36, p<0.001）。各变体间差异不显著。BurGal（53.0%）因结构偏差被视为架构有效性验证。
AI.conclusion: PAD架构有效缓解了RLHF引发的顺从偏见，身份剥离和静态倾向调优是关键机制。约40%的问题受预训练知识限制，未来需通过微调倾向模型来突破这一上限。

title: A Barrier-Modulated Architecture for Safe Affine Formation Control in Second-Order Multi-Agent Systems
summary: Affine formation control offers immense flexibility for coordinating multi-agent maneuvers, but guaranteeing the safety of agents under parametric uncertainties remains an open challenge. This paper proposes a novel safe affine formation control framework for second-order multi-agent systems by integrating Higher-Order Control Barrier Functions (HOCBFs) with Adaptive Dynamic Programming (ADP). We introduce a barrier-modulated control architecture that smoothly attenuates the nominal formation tracking objective when agents approach safety boundaries, preventing conflicting control inputs. Within this architecture, two distinct safety controllers are developed: (1) an analytical barrier-gradient repulsive controller that provides a computationally efficient, rigorous mathematical baseline, and (2) a data-driven optimal safety controller. The data-driven approach utilizes an actor-critic neural network to solve the Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman (HJB) equation online, enabling optimal collision avoidance even in the presence of unknown system parameters. Using Nagumo's theorem and Lyapunov stability analysis, we formally prove that both controllers guarantee the forward invariance of the safe set ensuring absolute collision avoidance while maintaining Uniformly Ultimately Bounded (UUB) formation tracking errors. Finally, simulations validate the theoretical findings and demonstrate the robustness of the proposed controllers in dynamic obstacle avoidance scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合高阶控制屏障函数(HOCBFs)和自适应动态规划(ADP)的安全仿射编队控制框架，通过两种安全控制器（解析型屏障梯度排斥控制器和数据驱动最优安全控制器）保证多智能体系统在参数不确定性下的安全性，并利用Nagumo定理和Lyapunov稳定性分析证明了安全集的前向不变性和编队跟踪误差的一致最终有界性。
AI.motivation: 仿射编队控制虽能灵活协调多智能体机动，但在参数不确定性下如何保证智能体的安全性仍是一个未解决的开放性挑战。
AI.method: 提出屏障调制控制架构，将HOCBFs与ADP相结合；开发了两种安全控制器：(1)解析型屏障梯度排斥控制器（高效、数学严格），(2)基于演员-评论家神经网络的数据驱动最优安全控制器（在线求解HJB方程，适应未知参数）。
AI.result: 两种控制器均能保证安全集的前向不变性（绝对避碰），同时保持编队跟踪误差的一致最终有界性(UUB)；仿真验证了理论结果及在动态避障场景中的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的框架有效解决了参数不确定下仿射编队控制的安全问题，兼顾了计算效率与最优性，为安全编队控制提供了理论基础和实用方案。

title: Training-Inference Kernel Contracts: Bounding Divergence in Post-Training and Deployment
summary: A modern post-training pipeline often writes one symbol for its policy, pi_theta, while evaluating it through two different programs: a training kernel optimized for autograd and an inference kernel optimized for low-precision, fused, dynamically batched serving. In finite precision, these kernels can induce different distributions at identical weights, with the gap concentrated on slices that aggregate benchmarks under-represent. This paper proposes kernel contracts: a contract-first framework for specifying acceptable divergence between K_train and K_inf. A contract C = (N, S, R, O, Pi) combines numerical, statistical, runtime, and observability clauses with an escalation policy from violations to routing actions. We derive a chain of bounds from logit drift to total-variation distance to bounded reward drift, and specialize it to RL post-training, where per-token importance-ratio drift yields a bound on policy-gradient bias under explicit support and norm assumptions. We also describe a four-stage promotion pipeline, online routing loop, and minimal YAML DSL for contract artifacts. This is a framework and vocabulary paper; we do not report production-scale empirical validation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"内核契约"框架，用于规范训练内核与推理内核之间因有限精度计算导致的分布差异，并建立从logit漂移到策略梯度偏差的理论界限。
AI.motivation: 现代后训练流程中，训练核和推理核在有限精度下会产生分布差异，而现有基准测试未能充分覆盖这些差异集中的区域，缺乏系统化的方法来量化和管理这种分歧。
AI.method: 提出内核契约C=(N,S,R,O,Pi)框架，包含数值、统计、运行时和可观测性条款及违规升级策略；推导从logit漂移到总变差距离再到有界奖励漂移的界限链；针对RL后训练场景，在显式支撑和范数假设下建立per-token重要性比率漂移对策略梯度偏差的界限。
AI.result: 建立了从底层logit漂移到高层策略梯度偏差的完整理论界限链；设计了四阶段promotion流水线、在线路由循环和YAML DSL契约工件；但未提供生产规模的经验验证。
AI.conclusion: 本文是框架和词汇表论文，通过形式化契约概念为管理训练/推理内核差异提供了理论基础和工具，但尚需大规模实证验证。

title: Sharp Bounds and Inference in Sample Selection Models with Treatment Endogeneity
summary: This paper provides partial identification and inference for treatment effects in nonparametric sample selection models with endogenous treatment and (weak) sample selection monotonicity. Outcomes are observed only for a non-randomly selected subsample and treatment is endogenous because of noncompliance with assignment. The proposed bounds for intensive margin treatment effects among compliers are sharp and tighter than those of Chen and Flores (2015). For inference, we develop semiparametrically efficient orthogonal moments and a debiased machine learning procedure that permits valid root-$n$ inference under high-dimensional covariates and/or flexible functional forms. Simulation results indicate good finite sample performance. Applications to Job Corps and the Oregon Health Insurance Experiment show that the method can deliver substantially tighter effect bounds and confidence intervals than existing alternatives.

AI.tldr: 本文针对非参数样本选择模型中存在内生处理变量和弱样本选择单调性的情况，提出了处理效应的部分识别与推断方法。通过构建sharp边界、发展半参数有效正交矩和去偏机器学习程序，在允许高维协变量和灵活函数形式下实现有效推断，并通过模拟和实际应用验证了方法的优越性。
AI.motivation: 现有样本选择模型在处理内生性和样本选择偏差时，得到的边界较宽，识别力不足。本文旨在提供更紧的边界估计，并解决高维协变量下的有效推断问题。
AI.method: 基于非参数样本选择模型与弱样本选择单调性假设，推导了compliers处理效应的sharp边界；开发了半参数有效正交矩条件与去偏机器学习（DML）方法，实现根号n一致的推断。
AI.result: 理论证明所提边界比Chen and Flores (2015)更紧；模拟显示有限样本表现良好；Job Corps与俄勒冈健康保险实验的应用表明，该方法给出的效应边界和置信区间显著优于现有替代方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文在非参数样本选择模型中实现了处理效应的更紧部分识别，并提供了高维设定下有效的推断工具，理论严谨且实用性强。

title: Robust Optimization for Green Ammonia Production
summary: The central challenge in optimizing green ammonia systems is satisfying the minimum-load requirements of the Haber-Bosch (HB) process under renewable uncertainty. We develop a robust optimization framework consisting of a strategic capacity planning model and an operational flow model under solar and wind uncertainty. The strategic model is a mixed-integer optimization (MIO) problem with flexible HB operating modes, namely hot-idling and shutdowns. To address the resulting computational challenges, we propose a robust scenario-reduction framework that combines k-means clustering with robust optimization to generate adversarial renewable trajectories. For the operational model, we develop adaptive robust rolling-horizon formulations under forecast uncertainty. Computational results show that the proposed framework produces feasible capacity plans under out-of-sample simulation, whereas existing approaches based on constraint aggregation fail to satisfy HB minimum-load requirements. Adaptive policies achieve higher ammonia production than static robust policies for a given robustness level, but provide weaker protection against realizations outside the uncertainty set.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个鲁棒优化框架解决绿色氨系统在可再生能源不确定性下满足Haber-Bosch过程最小负荷需求的挑战，结合战略容量规划与运营调度模型，并证明其相比现有方法能生成可行方案。
AI.motivation: 绿色氨系统的核心挑战在于：在太阳能和风能不确定性下，必须满足Haber-Bosch过程的最小负荷要求。现有基于约束聚合的方法无法保证可行性。
AI.method: 提出两阶段鲁棒优化框架：1) 战略层：混合整数优化模型，包含热待机和停机两种灵活HB运行模式；2) 运营层：自适应鲁棒滚动时域模型。创新点在于结合k-means聚类的鲁棒场景约简方法生成对抗性可再生能源轨迹。
AI.result: 所提框架在样本外仿真中能生成可行的容量计划，而现有约束聚合方法无法满足HB最小负荷要求。自适应策略比静态鲁棒策略在给定鲁棒水平下产量更高，但对不确定集外情景保护较弱。
AI.conclusion: 该鲁棒优化框架有效解决了绿色氨系统中HB过程最小负荷约束与可再生能源不确定性的冲突，为实际系统设计提供了可靠方法，但需注意自适应策略在极端情景下的局限性。

title: Improving the sharpness in neural network-based parametric post-processing of ensemble forecasts
summary: Statistical post-processing has proven to be an effective tool in improving ensemble forecast of different weather variables. Case studies show that post-processing can remedy the typically underdispersive and potentially biased behaviour of the ensemble while optimizing a proper scoring rule expressing the forecast skill. The price of these positive effects is generally a deterioration in sharpness; the width of the central prediction intervals and the uncertainty of the predictions are increasing, especially for shorter lead times. This work aims to reduce the extent of the latter phenomenon for neural network-based parametric post-processing methods by extending the network's loss function with a penalty term. We demonstrate the effect of the proposed technique for 2m temperature ensemble forecasts of the European Centre for Medium-Range Weather Forecasts downloaded from the EUPPBench benchmark dataset and verified against synoptic observations. Here, the predictive distribution is Gaussian, and we use the continuous ranked probability score (CRPS) as loss function. The case studies confirm a substantial relative decrease ($8.2\%-12.5\%$) in the width of the nominal central prediction interval compared to the width of the predictive distribution computed without the penalty term, while there is no deterioration in the mean CRPS of probabilistic forecasts and in the RMSE of the predictive mean.

AI.tldr: 本文针对神经网络参数化后处理方法，通过在损失函数中引入惩罚项，在保持预测技能（CRPS和RMSE）不降低的前提下，显著减少了预测区间宽度（降幅8.2%-12.5%），缓解了传统后处理导致锐度下降的问题。
AI.motivation: 统计后处理虽能修正集合预报的欠分散性和偏差，但会降低预测锐度（中心预测区间变宽）。本文旨在减少这种现象对神经网络参数化后处理方法的影响。
AI.method: 在神经网络参数化后处理方法的损失函数（CRPS）中引入惩罚项，以平衡预测技能与锐度。针对2米温度集合预报，假设预测分布为高斯分布，使用EUPPBench数据集验证。
AI.result: 相比无惩罚项的基线方法，预测区间宽度相对降低8.2%-12.5%，同时平均CRPS和预测均值RMSE未出现退化。
AI.conclusion: 提出的惩罚项方法有效改善了神经网络后处理预测的锐度，且不牺牲预报技能，为提升集合预报后处理实用性提供了可行方案。

title: Memetic Capture: A Pluralistic Policy Framework for Governing AI-Driven Cultural Disempowerment
comment: Paper accepted in Pluralistic Alignment Workshop at ICML 2026
summary: Culture is the most insidious vector of gradual human disempowerment by AI: unlike economic or political displacement, cultural displacement attacks the very preferences and values through which humans recognise and resist disempowerment itself. We argue that existing AI governance frameworks suffer from a critical blind spot by treating cultural impact as secondary to economic and safety concerns. This paper develops \emph{memetic capture} as a unifying concept for AI-driven cultural disempowerment, and proposes the \textbf{Cultural Pluralistic Governance Framework (CPGF)}, a four-tier policy architecture combining quantitative cultural influence metrics, democratic value assemblies, pluralistic deployment standards, and transnational coordination mechanisms. We argue that pluralism is not merely an ethical requirement for such governance but a structural necessity: monocultural AI governance accelerates the very disempowerment it claims to prevent. We identify concrete policy levers, discuss implementation tensions, and outline a research agenda at the intersection of pluralistic alignment and cultural AI governance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出“模因捕获”概念，论证AI通过文化侵蚀导致人类能力丧失，并构建了文化多元治理框架（CPGF）作为应对方案。
AI.motivation: 现有AI治理框架忽视了文化层面的影响，而文化侵蚀可能是AI剥夺人类能力的最隐蔽、最根本的途径——它直接攻击人类识别和抵抗剥夺所需的偏好和价值观。
AI.method: 提出“模因捕获”（memetic capture）这一统一概念，构建四层政策架构的文化多元治理框架（CPGF），包括：定量文化影响力指标、民主价值集会、多元部署标准、跨国协调机制。
AI.result: 识别了具体的政策杠杆，讨论了实施中的张力，并提出了多元对齐与文化AI治理交叉领域的研究议程。
AI.conclusion: 文化多元主义不仅是伦理要求，更是结构性必然——单一文化的AI治理会加速其声称要防止的失能过程。

title: Beyond Goodhart's Law: A Dynamic Benchmark for Evaluating Compliance in Multi-Agent Systems
summary: The rapid evolution of Large Language Models (LLMs) from passive assistants to autonomous, execution-capable agents has introduced critical operational risks. Most current evaluation frameworks neglect procedural compliance, leading to ''Machiavellian'' behaviors where agents strategically violate safety rules to maximize rewards - a direct manifestation of Goodhart's Law. To address this blind spot, we introduce MAC-Bench, a dynamic, adversarial benchmark designed to evaluate the procedural alignment of multi-agent systems under realistic pressure. We propose the SERV(Seed - Evolve - Refine - Verify) pipeline, an ``Agent-as-a-Benchmark'' paradigm that transforms unstructured legal texts into executable, contamination-free scenarios. By synthesizing holographic sandbox environments and injecting calibrated social-engineering pressure vectors, MAC-Bench forces agents into Pareto-optimal trade-offs between task success and regulatory adherence. We introduced novel metrics: the Compliance-Weighted Success Rate (CSR) and the Machiavellian Gap (MG), and conducted a comprehensive evaluation of state-of-the-art frontier models to reveal the pervasive trade-offs between success and compliance.

AI.tldr: MAC-Bench是一个动态对抗性基准，用于评估多智能体系统的程序对齐能力，通过SERV流水线将法律文本转化为可执行场景，并引入CSR和MG指标来量化任务成功与合规性之间的权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM评估框架忽略了程序合规性，导致智能体出现"马基雅维利式"行为——为最大化奖励而策略性违反安全规则，这是古德哈特定律的直接体现。
AI.method: 提出SERV（种子-演化-精炼-验证）流水线，将非结构化法律文本转化为无污染的对抗性场景；构建全息沙盒环境并注入社会工程压力向量；引入CSR（合规加权成功率）和MG（马基雅维利差距）新指标。
AI.result: 通过评估前沿模型揭示了任务成功与合规性之间普遍存在的权衡（Pareto最优权衡），证明当前模型在压力下面临成功与合规的冲突。
AI.conclusion: MAC-Bench有效填补了多智能体系统程序对齐评估的空白，揭示了当前LLM代理在现实压力下普遍存在的合规性缺陷，为构建更安全的自主智能体提供了评估工具。

title: Bridging Traditional Explainability Methods and Multimodal Multilingual Models: An XAI-Based Analysis
summary:
Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) effectively integrate text and audio to interpret context in complex interactive dialogues. However, the internal mechanisms by which heterogeneous modalities influence model behavior remain opaque. While Shapley Values (SV) provide a robust, model-agnostic framework for local explainability in text-based NLP, their extension to multimodal data is hindered by cross-channel dependencies, intricate dialogue structures, and the prohibitive computational complexity of dense audio representations.
  In this work, we formalize a multimodal extension of the Shapley Value framework, treating discrete text tokens and aligned audio segments as cooperative features. To ensure computational feasibility, we deploy a suite of efficient estimation strategies: exact SV computation for low-dimensional inputs and sampling-based approximations - including Monte Carlo permutations and stratified sampling with Neyman-optimal allocation - to minimize variance under constrained computational budgets. To resolve the granularity mismatch between modalities, we propose Spectrogram-Guided Phonetic Alignment (SGPA), a novel preprocessing method that maps high-frequency audio streams to interpretable, word-aligned segments.
  Our contribution is twofold: first, we provide an open-source, model-agnostic Python package and a companion GUI for the computation and interactive visualization of multimodal attributions. Second, we evaluate our framework using curated subsets of the VoiceBench and Infinity Instruct datasets across diverse multilingual scenarios. Our experimental results reveal that input modality is a primary driver of attribution volatility and demonstrate that standard syntactic importance proxies often fail to predict model attention in multimodal, cross-lingual contexts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多模态Shapley值框架，结合高效估计策略和频谱图引导的语音对齐方法，用于解释多模态大语言模型在文本-语音交互中的行为，并开源了计算和可视化工具包。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型虽能有效整合文本和音频，但其内部机制不透明。现有Shapley值方法虽适用于文本，但扩展到多模态数据时面临跨通道依赖、复杂对话结构和音频计算复杂度过高等挑战。
AI.method: 形式化多模态Shapley值框架，将离散文本token和对齐音频片段视为协作特征；采用蒙特卡洛采样、Neyman最优分配分层采样等高效估计策略；提出频谱图引导的语音对齐方法解决模态粒度不匹配问题。
AI.result: 在VoiceBench和Infinity Instruct数据集上的实验表明，输入模态是归因波动的主要驱动因素，标准句法重要性代理在跨语言多模态上下文中无法有效预测模型注意力。
AI.conclusion: 开源了计算和可视化工具包，验证了所提框架的有效性，揭示了多模态归因的独特挑战。

title: Risk-Aware Control of Systems with Quasi-Cone-Bounded Nonlinearities
summary: We develop a tractable, rigorous approach to risk-aware control for a class of nonlinear systems. While many classical control methods reduce uncertainty to a simple average or a worst-case outcome, risk-aware control aims to equip systems with a refined awareness of uncertainty. Efficient methods for risk-aware control of linear systems are available, but there is a paucity of tools for tractable, risk-aware control of nonlinear systems. To bridge this gap, we develop an analytical, suboptimal controller with respect to a risk-aware performance criterion for systems with nonlinearities characterized by cone-like bounds. Numerical examples demonstrate benefits of the characterization of nonlinearities and risk that we consider.

AI.tldr: 本文针对一类非线性系统，提出了一种可处理且严格的风险感知控制方法，通过锥约束刻画非线性特性，开发了风险感知性能准则下的解析次优控制器，数值实验验证了该方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有的风险感知控制方法多适用于线性系统，缺乏可用于非线性系统的可处理工具，作者希望填补这一空白。
AI.method: 提出一种解析的次优控制器，针对具有锥类约束的非线性系统，在风险感知性能准则下进行控制设计。
AI.result: 数值示例表明，该文所考虑的非线性特性刻画和风险模型带来了性能优势。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为非线性系统的风险感知控制提供了一种可处理且严谨的分析框架。

title: Customer Churn Prediction on Structured Data Using FT-Transformer and Stacking Ensembles
comment: 22 pages, 9 figures, 20 tables; published in IEEE Access
summary: Customer churn prediction is essential across data-driven industries such as insurance, digital banking, eCommerce, and subscription platforms, where retaining existing customers is typically more cost-effective than acquiring new ones. Predicting churn on structured datasets remains challenging due to class imbalance, nonlinear feature interactions, and heterogeneous feature types. Tree-based ensemble methods consistently demonstrate strong performance in these contexts, often outperforming conventional neural networks. This study introduces a validated hybrid architecture that integrates feature-tokenized transformers (FT-Transformer) with gradient-boosted trees through calibration-aware stacking. The proposed framework addresses persistent gaps in statistical validation, probability calibration, and reproducibility found in prior research. The FT-Transformer captures higher-order feature interactions using self-attention, while XGBoost captures gradient-boosted decision boundaries with complementary inductive biases. Class imbalance is handled using class-weighted loss functions, thereby avoiding synthetic oversampling and preserving minority-class distributions. The models are ensembled using out-of-fold (OOF) stacking with a logistic regression meta-learner, which recalibrates overconfident base model outputs and learns optimal combination weights. On a public bank churn dataset, the hybrid model achieves 62.10% F1, 0.861 AUC-ROC, and 0.647 PR-AUC, outperforming the Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP) baseline by 3.37 F1 points and 0.027 AUC under 5x5 cross-validation with 95% confidence intervals reported. Ablation studies demonstrate that both the transformer component and stacking strategy contribute materially to performance. The proposed methodology offers a reproducible and extensible reference architecture for contemporary churn prediction on structured tabular data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合FT-Transformer与XGBoost的混合架构，通过校准感知的堆叠集成方法预测客户流失，在公开银行数据集上相比MLP基线显著提升F1、AUC-ROC和PR-AUC指标，并解决了现有研究在统计验证、概率校准和可重复性方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 客户流失预测对保险、数字银行、电商等数据驱动行业至关重要，但结构化数据上的流失预测面临类别不平衡、非线性特征交互和异构特征类型等挑战。现有研究在统计验证、概率校准和可重复性方面存在不足，需要提出更稳健、可复现的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出一种混合架构：(1) FT-Transformer通过自注意力机制捕获高阶特征交互；(2) XGBoost捕获梯度提升的决策边界，形成互补的归纳偏置；(3) 使用类别加权损失函数处理类别不平衡，避免合成过采样；(4) 通过out-of-fold堆叠集成，以逻辑回归作为元学习器来校准过自信的基模型输出并学习最优组合权重。
AI.result: 在公开银行流失数据集上，混合模型达到62.10% F1、0.861 AUC-ROC、0.647 PR-AUC，在5x5交叉验证下相比MLP基线提升3.37个F1点和0.027 AUC，且报告了95%置信区间。消融实验表明Transformer组件和堆叠策略均有实质贡献。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提供了一个可复现、可扩展的参考架构，有效结合了Transformer与梯度提升树的互补优势，通过校准感知的堆叠集成提升了流失预测性能，填补了现有研究在统计验证和概率校准方面的空白。

title: Asymptotics of an Explosive Autoregression under Dependence
comment: This is a pre-print, the paper is currently under review
summary: We generalize the convergence results of an explosive autoregression, pioneered in Anderson (1959), in three ways: First, we demonstrate that the centered least-squares estimator converges geometrically to a ratio of limits, even in settings where the innovations are correlated and not centered around zero. Secondly, we demonstrate that the requirement of independent innovations in Anderson (1959), Theorem 2.3, can be relaxed to $α$-mixing. Third, we provide an autocorrelation-robust feasible test statistic for the explosive parameter under Gaussian ARMA innovations.

AI.tldr: 本文在三个方面推广了Anderson(1959)开创的爆炸性自回归收敛结果：1）证明即使创新项相关且非零中心，中心化最小二乘估计仍几何收敛到极限比；2）将独立创新假设放宽到α-混合；3）在高斯ARMA创新下，为爆炸性参数提供了自相关鲁棒的可行检验统计量。
AI.motivation: 推广Anderson(1959)关于爆炸性自回归的收敛结果，放宽其严格假设条件（独立创新、零中心创新），使其更适用于实际时间序列数据中常见的相关创新和非零均值情况。
AI.method: 通过理论推导，从三个方面推广收敛结果：1）在相关且非零中心创新下证明中心化最小二乘估计的几何收敛性；2）将独立创新条件放宽到α-混合过程；3）在高斯ARMA创新假设下构造自相关鲁棒的可行检验统计量。
AI.result: 证明了在更宽松的条件下（相关创新、非零中心、α-混合依赖结构），爆炸性自回归参数估计的收敛性仍然成立，并给出了可行的鲁棒检验统计量。
AI.conclusion: 该研究显著扩展了爆炸性自回归理论的适用范围，为实际应用中处理非独立、非零中心的时间序列数据提供了更坚实的理论基础和实用的统计推断工具。

title: Temperature control by a state-delay nash strategy: theory and experiments
summary: This work expands the Nash equilibrium algorithm to those systems that have a state delay within the deterministic case, a Linear-Quadratic (LQ) type performance index with generalized cross terms is used, following the constructive approach on optimal control: first, propose the strategies form, close the loop and find the Cauchy solution; secondly, express the cost function according to those expressions; and finally use the Bellman equation as restrictions to find the strategies parameters. The stability of the closed loop is demonstrated. The algorithm is applied to a thermal prototype with an ESP32 micro-controller and its performance is compared with optimal PI controls inside two commercial/industrial PID controllers REX-C100.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对状态时滞系统的纳什均衡算法扩展，采用线性二次型性能指标和广义交叉项，通过构造性最优控制方法求解策略参数，并证明了闭环稳定性。算法在ESP32微控制器控制的热原型上实现，与两款商用PID控制器中的最优PI控制进行了性能对比。
AI.motivation: 现有纳什均衡算法未考虑系统状态存在时滞的情况，本文旨在将纳什均衡算法扩展到具有状态时滞的确定性系统中。
AI.method: 采用构造性最优控制方法：先提出策略形式并闭环求解柯西解；再根据表达式表达成本函数；最后利用贝尔曼方程作为约束条件求解策略参数。
AI.result: 证明了闭环系统的稳定性，并通过ESP32微控制器热原型实验验证了算法有效性，与REX-C100商用PID控制器的最优PI控制进行了对比。
AI.conclusion: 该扩展算法能够有效处理状态时滞系统的纳什均衡问题，在实际热控制应用中表现出竞争力。

title: Rank Intervals for Leaderboards: A Hierarchical Framework for Model Evaluation
summary: Pretrained models are often evaluated on multi-task leaderboards to measure their applicability in diverse contexts. However, current methods for aggregating performance across tasks into leaderboard-level rankings do not address the uncertainty and variability at the task level. While recent works have proposed interval-based model rankings, the principled aggregation of uncertainty from individual tasks to leaderboard-level rankings remains unaddressed, and variation in models' performance across tasks is frequently obscured. In this work, we introduce a hierarchical framework that constructs model rank intervals with statistical guarantees at both levels: task-level rank confidence intervals from pairwise comparisons, and leaderboard-level rank prediction intervals using a conformal approach. This enables reliable quantification of model rank for each observed task and for new potential tasks. Experiments on simulated data and the TabArena and PromptEval (MMLU) benchmarks show that our method yields statistically valid and informative intervals, enabling reliable, uncertainty-aware model ranking on leaderboards.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种层次化框架，通过统计方法构建任务级和排行榜级的模型排名区间，实现不确定性感知的模型排名。
AI.motivation: 现有的多任务排行榜聚合方法无法处理任务层面的不确定性和变异性，导致模型排名的统计可靠性不足。
AI.method: 提出层次化框架：(1) 任务级：通过成对比较构建排名置信区间；(2) 排行榜级：使用共形方法构建排名预测区间，提供统计保证。
AI.result: 在模拟数据、TabArena和PromptEval (MMLU)基准上，该方法产生了统计有效且信息丰富的区间。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够实现可靠、不确定性感知的模型排名，适用于排行榜场景。

title: Stable Geometry, Reversing Poles: The Bipolar Structure of AI Occupational Substitutability and Its Decade-Scale Inversion
comment: 57 pages, 13 figures, 10 tables. Companion paper to arXiv:2604.04464 (Gao & Huang 2026). Code and data: https://github.com/ShuyaoGao/bipolar-action-substrate
summary: Empirical research on the labor-market impact of artificial intelligence has converged, since Frey and Osborne (2017), on a continuous-gradient representation in which each occupation is assigned a real-valued exposure score on [0,1] obtained by linear aggregation across capability dimensions. This continuity is rarely articulated as an assumption and has not been tested at the micro-action level where substitution actually occurs. We decompose 1,961 O*NET Detailed Work Activities into 15,817 micro-actions using a multi-agent LLM pipeline with 31-expert HITL calibration, then project the DWA-level Occupational Automation Index from our prior work onto a 7-macro semantic typology. The result is a bipolar structure. Tool-Mediated Physical (M2, mean OAI = 0.054) and Planning & Design (M7, mean OAI = 0.499) form two extremes separated by Cohen's d = 2.41 (H = 172.88, p = 6.21e-34). The geometry is robust under three independent stress tests: resolution (K=7 to K=15, polar gap widens from 0.45 to 0.57), encoder swap to BGE (LLM-class OAI lead replicates at 3.37x), and Eloundou's GPT-4 task ratings (DWA-level rho = 0.635). The six middle macros form a low-contrast band between the poles (TOST at d=0.2 admits only 1/15 pairs as equivalent), not a flat plain. The geometry's stability does not, however, extend to its content. Across a decade, the polarity has inverted. Frey-Osborne (2013) placed Tool-Mediated Physical near the highest computerisation risk and Planning & Design near the lowest; our LLM-era OAI reverses that order, with macro-level FO-Eloundou Spearman rho = -0.750, p = 0.020, against the original Oxford Martin appendix. Which pole is high is therefore contingent on the era's dominant capability frontier, while the stable geometry itself is the structurally robust object.

AI.tldr: 本文通过将O*NET工作活动分解为15,817个微行动，发现职业自动化风险呈现双极结构：工具介导的体力活动（低风险）与规划设计活动（高风险）分居两端，中间区域对比度低。该几何结构稳定，但两极内容在十年间发生反转——Frey-Osborne（2013）认为体力活动风险高、规划设计风险低，而LLM时代完全相反，表明结构本身稳健但极性的内容取决于时代能力前沿。
AI.motivation: 现有研究将职业自动化风险视为连续梯度，但未在微观行动层面验证这一假设。本文旨在分解到微行动层面，检验自动化风险的真实结构。
AI.method: 使用多智能体LLM流水线（含31位专家HITL校准），将1,961个O*NET详细工作活动分解为15,817个微行动，再投影到7个宏观语义类型上，并通过三种独立压力测试验证稳健性。
AI.result: 发现双极结构：工具介导的体力活动（OAI均值0.054）与规划设计（OAI均值0.499）相距Cohen's d=2.41；中间六个宏观类型形成低对比度带；该几何结构在三种压力测试下稳健；但十年间极性反转，Frey-Osborne与LLM时代的排序呈显著负相关（rho=-0.750）。
AI.conclusion: 职业自动化风险不是连续梯度，而是双极结构。哪一极风险高取决于时代的能力前沿，但双极几何结构本身是稳健的。

title: Where Instruction Hierarchy Breaks: Diagnosing and Repairing Failures in Reasoning Language Models
summary: Reasoning language models deployed in agentic workflows must follow an instruction hierarchy: when instructions from different sources conflict, the model should obey the highest-privilege applicable instruction. Existing benchmarks largely measure this behavior end-to-end, asking whether the final response is compliant. However, a non-compliant response can arise from several distinct failures: the model may fail to identify the relevant instructions in context, fail to resolve conflicts among identified instructions, or correctly resolve the conflict in its reasoning while still producing a violating response. We introduce a white-box diagnostic framework that localizes instruction hierarchy failures into instruction identification, conflict resolution, and response realization, making failures more interpretable. We evaluate three reasoning models--Gemma-4-31B-IT, Qwen3.6-35B-A3B, and Claude Sonnet 4.6--on long-context adaptations of IHEval and IHChallenge, and find that the dominant failure mode varies across models, tasks, and context length. Building on the observation that models can often detect conflicts and output violations when explicitly prompted, we propose two training-free self-monitoring mechanisms: a parallel input monitor for low-latency conflict detection before generation, and a sequential output monitor for response-level review and repair. Across Gemma-4-31B-IT, Claude Sonnet 4.6, and GPT-5.3, the strongest monitor reduces rule-following non-compliance by 81-99%, with GPT-5.3 reductions of 86% under static attacks and 45% under adaptive attacks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出白盒诊断框架，将指令层级违背失败划分为指令识别、冲突解决和响应实现三个环节。在三种推理模型上评估发现，主导失败模式因模型、任务和上下文长度而异。基于模型能检测冲突但输出违规的特点，提出两种免训练自监控机制，将规则遵循违规减少81-99%。
AI.motivation: 现有基准仅端到端测量最终响应合规性，无法区分不合规响应产生的具体原因（未能识别指令、未能解决冲突、或推理正确但生成了违规响应），缺乏可解释的诊断方法。
AI.method: 1) 提出白盒诊断框架，将指令层级违背分解为指令识别、冲突解决、响应实现三个子环节进行定位。2) 在IHEval和IHChallenge的长上下文版本上评估三个推理模型。3) 提出两种免训练自监控机制：并行输入监控器（低延迟冲突检测）和顺序输出监控器（响应级审查与修复）。
AI.result: 1) 主导失败模式因模型、任务和上下文长度而异。2) 最强监控器将规则遵循违规减少81-99%；GPT-5.3在静态攻击下减少86%，在自适应攻击下减少45%。
AI.conclusion: 白盒诊断框架使指令层级失败更可解释；基于模型自监控能力设计的免训练机制能大幅降低违规率，但对自适应攻击的鲁棒性仍有提升空间。

title: Multilingual Refusal Alignment for Safer Large Language Models
summary: As Large Language Models (LLMs) are deployed globally, ensuring their safety and alignment across multiple languages becomes paramount. However, safety behaviors often vary unpredictably between languages, posing significant challenges for consistent and ethical AI. In this work, we systematically investigate the dynamics of multilingual alignment, exploring whether single-language alignment transfers cross-lingually, how language consistency is preserved during training, and the resulting trade-offs with general knowledge capabilities. We introduce RefusEU, a novel refusal alignment dataset covering 12 European languages, including a dedicated test set for evaluating current state-of-the-art models. Our controlled Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) experiments provide two key insights: aligning models exclusively in English is insufficient to ensure cross-lingual safety, even for the same harm categories, whereas training on multilingual datasets can improve safety without degrading general performance, as measured by the Global MMLU benchmark.

AI.tldr: 本研究系统调查了多语言环境下大语言模型的安全对齐问题，发现仅用英语对齐不足以保证跨语言安全，而多语言训练数据能提升安全性且不损害通用性能。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM在全球部署，不同语言间的安全行为存在不可预知的差异，亟需系统性研究跨语言安全对齐的转移机制和一致性保持问题。
AI.method: 构建了覆盖12种欧洲语言的拒绝对齐数据集RefusEU，通过受控的DPO实验对比单语言（英语）与多语言对齐的效果。
AI.result: 仅英语对齐无法保证跨语言安全（即使同一危害类别）；多语言训练可提升安全性且不损害通用性能（Global MMLU基准持平）。
AI.conclusion: 多语言对齐训练是确保LLM全球安全部署的有效策略，建议在安全对齐阶段纳入目标语言的训练数据。

title: Exact Optimization-Free Safety Filters for Control Barrier Functions
summary: For control-affine systems, standard and high-order control barrier function conditions are affine in the control input and are commonly enforced through quadratic-program-based safety filters. Although convex, these optimization problems may be undesirable in embedded, high-rate, or resource-limited implementations. This letter studies when the corresponding Euclidean projection can be computed exactly without solving a quadratic program. Given a nominal control input, we form the set of affine inequalities violated by that input and compute the minimum-norm correction that enforces those inequalities with equality. This correction need not equal the exact Euclidean projection onto the full feasible set. The main result gives structural conditions under which it coincides with the Euclidean projection onto the feasible set. These conditions are interpreted through interactions between affine-inequality normals and are expressed using a Gram matrix. Finally, an online certification procedure is given for determining whether the optimization-free update is exact.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了控制仿射系统中，如何在不求解二次规划的情况下精确计算欧几里得投影到安全集上，提出了一种基于违反不等式的最小范数修正方法，并给出了该修正与精确投影一致的结构条件。
AI.motivation: 标准和高阶控制障碍函数条件虽为凸优化问题，但在嵌入式、高频率或资源受限的场景中，求解二次规划可能不切实际，因此需要更高效的计算方法。
AI.method: 给定名义控制输入，构造被该输入违反的仿射不等式集，计算强制使这些不等式成为等式的最小范数修正。通过分析仿射不等式法向量之间的相互作用，利用Gram矩阵表达结构条件，并给出在线认证程序判断该无优化更新是否精确。
AI.result: 给出了该最小范数修正与精确欧几里得投影一致的结构条件，这些条件通过仿射不等式法向量的交互作用和Gram矩阵来刻画。
AI.conclusion: 提出的无优化更新方法在满足特定结构条件时可以精确替代二次规划，并可通过在线认证程序验证其有效性，适用于资源受限的实时控制场景。

title: Outage Detection in Self-Healing Smart Grids Using Reinforcement Learning with Spectral Graph Neural Networks
summary: Self-healing smart grids can quickly adjust their network configuration during outages to minimize power disruptions. During an outage, several actions can be taken, such as network reconfiguration through switching operations and emergency load shedding. However, traditional machine learning methods for outage mitigation are not well suited for smart grids due to their slow response time and high computational cost. To address these challenges, recent studies have explored reinforcement learning to automatically perform network reconfiguration. In these approaches, the control policy is typically modeled using a graph neural network (GNN). However, conventional GNNs operate in the spatial domain and may fail to capture important relationships in the frequency domain. Frequency-domain information is particularly useful for modeling global structural patterns and system-wide interactions in power networks. In this paper, we propose a spectral graph reinforcement learning framework for outage management in distribution networks to enhance system resilience. Our model learns the optimal power restoration policy using a spectral graph neural network. We evaluate the proposed method on three modified IEEE test systems: the 13-bus, 34-bus, and 123-bus networks. Experimental results show that our approach achieves near-optimal performance in real time and generalizes well across a wide range of outage scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于谱图神经网络（谱域GNN）的强化学习框架，用于配电网故障后的快速自愈，在三个IEEE测试系统上实现了接近最优的实时性能与良好的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习方法响应慢、计算成本高，而现有基于GNN的空域方法难以捕捉电网中的频域全局结构模式和系统级交互关系。
AI.method: 采用谱图神经网络（Spectral Graph Neural Network）建模强化学习控制策略，在频域中学习最优电力恢复策略。
AI.result: 在IEEE 13-bus、34-bus、123-bus三个修改测试系统上，该方法实现了接近最优的实时性能，并在多种故障场景下具有良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 谱图强化学习框架能够有效利用电网的频域信息，实现快速、鲁棒的配电网故障恢复，提升系统韧性。

title: A Synthetic Control Approach to Conditional Distributional Treatment Effects
summary: This paper proposes a synthetic control (SC) framework for the estimation of conditional distributional treatment effects. Identification rests on a parallel trends condition formulated in the parameter space of the semiparametric distribution regression (DR) model, which keeps the counterfactual conditional distribution within the model class. The weights solve a least-squares problem subject to an adding-up constraint, yielding a closed-form estimator. We derive the asymptotic distribution of the counterfactual estimator, with DR estimation error and weight estimation error contributing at the same rate to the asymptotic variance. Moreover, we propose a supremum test for the null of no treatment effect, whose limit is the supremum of a Gaussian process. Simulations illustrate that conditioning on covariates can reveal effects being difficult to detect from the unconditional distribution alone. An application to the 1992 New Jersey minimum wage increase using CPS data finds effects concentrated in the minimum-wage corridor for low-education, low-experience workers.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个合成控制框架，用于估计条件分布处理效应，通过分布回归模型和平行趋势条件识别反事实分布，并推导了渐近性质及假设检验方法。
AI.motivation: 现有合成控制方法大多聚焦于平均处理效应，缺乏对条件分布处理效应的估计框架。本文旨在填补这一空白，利用分布回归模型实现条件分布层面的因果推断。
AI.method: 基于半参数分布回归模型，在参数空间中构建平行趋势条件；通过最小二乘问题求解权重（含加总约束），得到闭合形式估计量；推导了DR估计误差与权重估计误差同阶渐近方差的极限分布；提出基于高斯过程上确界的无处理效应检验。
AI.result: 模拟表明，条件分布效应可揭示无条件分布难以检测的异质性效果。实证应用（1992年新泽西州最低工资政策）发现，对低教育、低经验工人，效应集中在最低工资走廊内。
AI.conclusion: 本文所提条件分布合成控制方法能更精细地刻画政策异质性影响，为合成控制方法在分布层面的扩展提供了理论支撑和实用工具。

title: Advancing Branch-and-Price for Graph Coloring: New Pricing Strategies and Benchmark Results
summary: This paper proposes BPCOL+, an exact branch-and-price algorithm for the Graph Coloring Problem. The algorithm integrates enhanced pricing strategies based on Zero-Suppressed Binary Decision Diagrams (ZDDs) for solving the pricing problem associated with the maximal-stable-set-based set-covering formulation. After computing upper and lower bounds at the root node using heuristic procedures and column generation, BPCOL+ reduces the size of the ZDD by applying maximal stable set reduction techniques that exploit alternative dual vectors. Computational experiments on the 137 DIMACS benchmark instances and on 5,000 recently proposed Erdős--Rényi instances show that BPCOL+ outperforms existing exact branch-and-price algorithms and remains highly competitive with state-of-the-art SAT-based exact solvers. In particular, BPCOL+ solves 96 DIMACS instances within one hour and proves optimality for 4,641 of the 5,000 Erdős--Rényi instances.

AI.tldr: BPCOL+是一个基于分支定价的图着色精确算法，通过ZDD增强定价策略和最大稳定集约简技术，在DIMACS和Erdős–Rényi实例上优于现有同类算法，与最优SAT求解器竞争力相当。
AI.motivation: 图着色问题（GCP）是经典的NP-hard问题，现有精确算法（如分支定价）在求解大规模实例时效率有限，需要更高效的定价策略来加速求解。
AI.method: 提出BPCOL+算法，基于最大稳定集集合覆盖的列生成公式，利用零压缩二元决策图（ZDD）增强定价子问题的求解；在根节点通过启发式和列生成计算上下界后，利用替代对偶向量应用最大稳定集约简技术缩小ZDD规模。
AI.result: 在137个DIMACS实例中1小时内求解96个；在5000个Erdős–Rényi实例中证明4641个实例的最优性；优于现有精确分支定价算法，与最先进的SAT求解器高度竞争。
AI.conclusion: BPCOL+验证了ZDD增强定价策略在GCP精确求解中的有效性，最大稳定集约简技术显著提升了算法效率，为图着色问题的精确求解提供了新范式。

title: Generalization in Nonlinear Least Squares via Learned Feature Geometry
summary: We study the generalization of ridge-regularized nonlinear least-squares models via on-average algorithmic stability, deriving error bounds for local minimizers in terms of a data-dependent effective dimension that reflects the geometry of the gradient model at the trained parameters, through the empirical Jacobian Gram matrix and a residual--curvature term. In the linear case, where the curvature term vanishes, this recovers the classical effective dimension of the Jacobian kernel covariance, but evaluated at the trained model rather than at initialization as is typical in neural tangent kernel analyses. We further bound this effective dimension via covering complexity of the gradient features, leading to guarantees that depend on learned geometry rather than parameter count. In particular, for manifold-supported data and piecewise Lipschitz Jacobians, the bounds scale with intrinsic dimension, while for one-hidden-layer ReLU networks, the mechanism can be made explicit through counts of activation-stable regions. Experiments on synthetic manifolds, clustered distributions, and benchmark datasets illustrate trained-Jacobian compression, the tightness of the residual-curvature linearization, and agreement between the stability bound and observed generalization gaps. A key feature of our bounds is the simplicity of their derivation, which follows from first principles using the Brascamp--Lieb inequality under strongly log-concave noise.

AI.tldr: 本文通过平均算法稳定性研究了岭正则化非线性最小二乘模型的泛化性，推导出局部极小点的误差界，该界依赖于数据依赖的有效维度，通过经验雅可比Gram矩阵和残差-曲率项反映梯度模型在训练参数处的几何结构。在曲率项为零的线性情况下，恢复了雅可比核协方差的经典有效维度，但是在训练模型而非初始化处评估。进一步通过梯度特征的覆盖复杂度限定该有效维度，得到依赖于学习几何而非参数数量的保证。实验验证了训练雅可比压缩、残差-曲率线性化的紧致性以及稳定性界与观测泛化差距的一致性。
AI.motivation: 传统泛化分析依赖于参数数量或初始化处的神经正切核，无法捕捉训练后的几何结构。本文动机是发展一种依赖于训练后模型几何（而非参数数量）的泛化界限，以解释深度学习中的隐式正则化现象。
AI.method: 采用on-average算法稳定性框架，结合Brascamp-Lieb不等式在强对数凹噪声下推导局部极小点的泛化误差界。引入数据依赖的有效维度，通过经验雅可比Gram矩阵和残差-曲率项刻画。利用梯度特征的覆盖复杂度进一步限定有效维度，对ReLU网络通过激活稳定区域计数实现显式化。
AI.result: 在流形支持数据和分段Lipschitz雅可比条件下，界随内在维度扩展；对于单隐层ReLU网络，可通过激活稳定区域计数显式表达。实验表明训练后雅可比发生压缩，残差-曲率线性化紧致，稳定性界与观测泛化差距一致。
AI.conclusion: 本文建立的泛化界限依赖于学习后的几何而非参数数量，为理解深度模型的隐式正则化提供了新视角。推导简洁，基于Brascamp-Lieb不等式等基本原理，且实验验证有效。

title: Contemporary AI lacks the imagination to diverge or negate in science
summary: Bold projections that artificial intelligence will accelerate scientific discovery have raced ahead of evidence from working scientists, and the field still lacks large-scale, scientist-in-the-loop tests of these claims. Here we mount the largest such evaluation to date and map what AI cannot yet do for science. We invited authors of 121,640 recent preprints across biology, medicine, chemistry, and the social sciences to judge follow-up ideas that large language models (LLMs) generated from the context and puzzles of their own papers. 6,749 scientists returned 25,139 sets of ratings on novelty, empirical feasibility, probability of being true, and favorability of adoption. Three patterns emerge. First, non-reasoning LLMs collapse into a narrow "hivemind" of similar ideas; reasoning models roam a wider hypothesis space, yet no model class spontaneously proposes null hypotheses -- a move humans make more freely. Second, scientists reward ideas that resemble their own and prize probability over novelty, though social scientists tolerate risk more readily than life scientists. Senior social scientists are the harshest critics, and their skepticism is well-earned: LLMs falter most in pluralistic fields like the social sciences that demand context-aware interpretation and evolving theories. Third, automated evaluators on which the community currently relies -- LLM-as-a-judge, artificial metrics, and even state-of-the-art (SOTA) models -- agree weakly with expert judgment, and retrieval augmentation and scientist persona prompting yield only marginal gains. A Qwen3-14B reward model we post-trained on human ratings captures field taste nuances, beats SOTA models by up to 27%, and closes the gap to the inter-rater consistency of independent peer reviewers.
