For all the hype, today's scientific AI still represents a collaborator whose imagination, outputs and judgment benefit from human grounding.

AI.tldr: 本文基于121,640篇预印本、6,749位科学家、25,139组评价数据，评估了AI（尤其是LLM）在科学发现中的实际能力。发现：非推理LLM产生同质化想法，推理模型能探索更广假说空间但不会自发提出零假设；科学家更青睐与自己相似的想法且优先关注概率而非新颖性；自动化评估器与专家判断一致性弱，研究者通过后训练奖励模型将一致性提升27%，但仍无法替代人类判断。
AI.motivation: AI加速科学发现的宏大宣言缺乏大规模、科学家参与的实证检验，现有评估规模小且脱离真实科研场景。
AI.method: 邀请121,640篇近期预印本的作者对LLM基于其论文生成的后续想法进行评判，收集6,749位科学家的25,139组评分（新颖性、可行性、真实性概率、采纳偏好），并对比不同模型类别、自动化评估器与人类判断的一致性。
AI.result: (1) 非推理LLM产生同质化"蜂群思维"，推理模型探索更广但不会提出零假设；(2) 科学家偏爱与自己相似的想法，优先概率而非新颖性，社会科学领域容忍风险更高；(3) 自动化评估器与专家判断一致性弱，后训练奖励模型(Qwen3-14B)提升27%但仍未达到同行评审间一致性水平。
AI.conclusion: 当前AI在科学发现中仍是一个需要人类基础的合作者，其想象、输出和判断均受益于人类引导。

title: Scaling Participation in Modular AI Systems
summary: Humanity is a mosaic of multifaceted talents and needs, and any truly intelligent AI must reflect that richness. Yet the LLMs used by all are built by the few -- a centralized market of monolithic AI models structurally ill-suited to capture the diversity of human knowledge, reasoning, and values. Here we introduce scaling participation, a new paradigm in which modular AI systems are built from the bottom up through the contributions of diverse stakeholders. Participants contribute small models trained on their own interests and priorities; these models then collaborate in modular frameworks as compositional AI systems. Participatory AI systems outperform monolithic LLMs by up to 15.4% across 15 tasks, such as reasoning and factuality, surpassing models larger than all contributed components combined. Further experiments show that participatory AI systems benefit from contributor diversity, substantially improve on each contributor's original priorities, and exhibit emergent capabilities that allow them to solve over 15% of problems where all individual models fail. Scaling participation provides a technical foundation for transitioning from the monolithic status quo toward an open, bottom-up, and collaborative AI future.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"扩展参与"新范式，通过构建模块化、自下而上的组合式AI系统，让多元利益相关者贡献小型专业模型协同工作，在15项任务上超越传统 monolithic LLM 达15.4%，展现出涌现能力，并解决了超过15%个体模型均无法解决的问题。
AI.motivation: 当前AI领域由少数机构主导的 monolithic LLM 模式在结构上无法捕捉人类知识、推理和价值观的多样性，需要一个能反映人类多元才能与需求的新型AI范式。
AI.method: 提出 scaling participation 范式：各方参与者贡献在自己兴趣和优先级上训练的小模型，这些模型在模块化框架中协作，形成组合式AI系统。
AI.result: 1) 在15项任务上超越 monolithic LLM 达15.4%（包括推理和事实性等）；2) 超过所有贡献组件之和更大的单一模型；3) 受益于贡献者多样性；4) 显著改善每位贡献者原本的优先级；5) 展现出涌现能力，解决超15%所有个体模型均失败的问题。
AI.conclusion: 扩展参与范式为从 monolithic 现状转向开放、自下而上、协作的AI未来提供了技术基础。

title: From Architecture to Output: Structural Origins of Hallucination in Large Language Models and the Amplifying Role of Data
summary: Large language models hallucinate--producing fluent, confident, factually wrong outputs--with a consistency that persists across generations and scales. Existing taxonomies classify hallucination by output type, distinguishing intrinsic from extrinsic failures and faithfulness from factuality divergence. These frameworks are descriptively rigorous but do not identify which internal mechanism produced a given instance. This paper analyses hallucination as a structural consequence of three architectural decisions that together form a compound failure system. Self-attention's co-occurrence learning substitutes statistical proximity for semantic meaning and produces entity confusion, fact misattribution, and semantic drift. The maximum likelihood estimation training objective optimises next-token probability without factual constraint, rewarding statistically plausible outputs regardless of their truth value. Autoregressive decoding's permanent left-to-right commitment under exposure bias ensures that a single wrong token cascades forward through the entire output sequence without revision. Dataset pathologies--long-tail deficiencies, training bias, and synthetic pollution--amplify these vulnerabilities but do not independently cause them. We make three contributions. First, we map each mechanism to a specific output category in the Alansari and Luqman taxonomy, locating intrinsic hallucination in self-attention, extrinsic hallucination in MLE, and logical inconsistency in autoregressive decoding. Second, we show that each commonly cited dataset pathology exploits one of these mechanisms rather than originating hallucination independently. Third, we identify the diagnostic limitation of output-type-only classification and contrast it with inference-layer mitigation approaches.

AI.tldr: 本文系统分析了大语言模型幻觉的结构性成因，指出自注意力机制、极大似然估计训练目标和自回归解码三个架构决策共同构成复合失败系统，并将每种机制映射到特定幻觉类型，同时揭示数据集病理仅放大而非独立引发幻觉。
AI.motivation: 现有幻觉分类法仅按输出类型（内在/外在、忠实性/事实性）描述现象，但未能识别产生幻觉的内部机制。本文旨在从架构层面揭示幻觉的结构性根源。
AI.method: 将幻觉归因于三个架构决策：1）自注意力机制的共现学习导致实体混淆、事实误归因和语义漂移；2）MLE训练目标优化概率而非事实正确性；3）自回归解码的曝光偏差导致单点错误级联传播。并将每种机制映射到Alansari-Luqman分类法的特定类别。
AI.result: 1）内在幻觉对应自注意力机制，外在幻觉对应MLE，逻辑不一致对应自回归解码；2）数据集病理（长尾缺陷、训练偏差、合成污染）仅利用上述机制而非独立引发幻觉；3）指出仅靠输出类型分类的诊断局限性，并与推理层缓解方法进行对比。
AI.conclusion: 幻觉是架构设计的结构性后果而非偶然现象，理解其机制根源比输出分类更有助于设计针对性缓解策略。

title: Benchmarking Sequential Feedback Optimization for Wind Farm Power Maximization
comment: To appear in the Proceedings of the 23rd IFAC World Congress, 2026
summary: This paper benchmarks sequential feedback optimization (SFO) for wind farm power maximization using a medium-fidelity dynamic flow model. We compare SFO with two well-established approaches, adjoint-based economic model predictive control (AMPC) and extremum seeking control (ESC), under a common nine-turbine layout and identical operating constraints. The comparison focuses on steady-state power production and computational efficiency, both relevant for real-time implementation. The simulation results illustrate that SFO achieves higher steady-state power while preserving real-time feasibility, AMPC provides a better transient performance at a higher online computational cost and without guarantees of convergence to the steady-state optimum, and ESC offers a computationally inexpensive model-free baseline that may converge to locally optimal solutions. These results provide a practical reference for selecting wind farm control strategies and for designing scalable, real-time optimization methods.

AI.tldr: 本文在九台涡轮机的风电场布局下，对比了序贯反馈优化（SFO）、伴随法经济模型预测控制（AMPC）和极值搜索控制（ESC）三种方法的稳态发电性能和计算效率。结果表明：SFO在实时可行前提下实现了最高稳态发电量；AMPC瞬态性能更好但计算成本高且无法保证收敛到稳态最优；ESC作为无模型基线方法计算成本低但可能收敛到局部最优。
AI.motivation: 风电场功率最大化是一个重要的实时优化问题，需要兼顾稳态性能和计算效率。目前存在多种控制方法但缺乏系统的横向比较，因此本文旨在提供一个公平的基准对比，为实际应用中的方法选择提供参考。
AI.method: 采用中等保真度动态流动模型，在九台涡轮机的通用布局和相同运行约束下，对序贯反馈优化（SFO）、伴随法经济模型预测控制（AMPC）和极值搜索控制（ESC）三种方法进行对比实验，重点评估它们的稳态发电功率和计算效率。
AI.result: SFO在保持实时可行性的前提下实现了最高的稳态功率输出；AMPC瞬态表现更好，但在线计算成本更高且无法保证收敛到稳态最优；ESC计算成本最低，但可能收敛到局部最优解。
AI.conclusion: 该基准测试为选择风电场控制策略和设计可扩展的实时优化方法提供了实用参考，揭示了不同方法在稳态性能与计算开销之间的权衡关系。

title: From Human Guidance to Autonomy: Agent Skill System for End-to-End LLM Deployment on Spatial NPUs
summary:
Spatial neural processing units (NPUs) provide an energy-efficient platform for edge LLM inference, but efficiently deploying an LLM end-to-end on such hardware remains labor-intensive. Although AI coding agents have begun to lower this cost, existing studies have largely focused on single-kernel optimization rather than end-to-end LLM deployment on resource-constrained spatial NPUs.
  We present a two-stage methodology, instantiated on the AMD XDNA 2 NPU, that progresses from human-guided development to agent autonomy. In the first stage, we develop a reference deployment of Llama-3.2-1B through human-guided agent assistance. The resulting implementation achieves a speedup of 2.2x on prefill and 4.0x on decode over the hand-optimized baseline, with the optimization trajectory and its lessons recorded as structured documentation throughout. In the second stage, we distill the documentation into an agent skill system consisting of eight phases, orchestrating the optimization and debugging skill sets, with numerical correctness strictly enforced at each phase.
  Using our agent skill system, we autonomously deploy eight additional decoder-only LLMs (Llama-3.2-3B, SmolLM2-1.7B, Qwen2.5-{0.5B, 1.5B, 3B}, Qwen3-{0.6B, 1.7B, 4B}) end-to-end on the AMD XDNA 2 NPU using the open-source compiler stack. To our knowledge, these models have not previously been deployed on AMD NPUs via any open-source software stack. Each deployment completes in 0.5-4 hours of agent wall time with almost no human guidance, and passes the numerical-correctness gates, demonstrating functional generalization to previously unencountered LLMs. Three of the eight match or exceed the sustained performance of our Llama-3.2-1B reference deployment, suggesting that the resulting implementations can be competitive without additional model-specific human engineering.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种两阶段方法，在AMD XDNA 2 NPU上实现端到端LLM部署：先通过人类引导的智能体辅助部署Llama-3.2-1B（prefill加速2.2倍，decode加速4.0倍），再将经验蒸馏为智能体技能系统，实现8种未见过的LLM的自主部署（每部署0.5-4小时），其中3个模型达到或超越参考部署的性能。
AI.motivation: 在资源受限的空间NPU上高效端到端部署LLM仍然劳动密集，现有研究多聚焦单核优化而非完整部署流程。
AI.method: 两阶段方法：阶段一，人类引导的智能体辅助开发参考部署并记录结构化文档；阶段二，将文档蒸馏为包含八个阶段的智能体技能系统，每个阶段强制执行数值正确性检查，实现自主部署。
AI.result: Llama-3.2-1B参考部署实现prefill 2.2倍、decode 4.0倍加速；智能体系统自主部署8种LLM（0.5-4小时/个），其中3个模型性能匹配或超越参考部署。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法证明了从人类引导到智能体自主的迁移可行性，生成的实现无需额外人工优化即可具备竞争力，且未曾在AMD NPU上通过开源软件栈部署过的模型现可实现端到端部署。

title: Variational Analysis of Metric Projections onto Isotone Projection Cones via Coderivatives
comment: 26 pages, 3 figures. The paper studies coderivatives of metric projection operators and applications to variational analysis and optimization problems
summary:
In this paper, we study variational properties of the metric projection mapping onto isotone projection cones in finite-dimensional Euclidean spaces. We derive explicit formulas for both the Fréchet coderivative and the Mordukhovich coderivative of the projection operator. The analysis is based on a local description of the projection mapping via an associated generating system in a neighborhood of a reference point, which leads to computable coderivative characterizations. As an application, we compute the covering constant of the projection mapping, providing a quantitative description of its local regularity. Furthermore, we establish verifiable sufficient conditions for the Aubin property of the solution mapping associated with parametric nonlinear complementarity problems associated with isotone projection cones.
  The obtained results contribute to the variational analysis of metric projections in a general cone setting where orthogonality arguments are not available, and to the stability theory of complementarity systems in finite dimensions.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了有限维欧氏空间中保序投影锥上度量投影映射的变分性质，推导了Fréchet和Mordukhovich余导数的显式公式，并应用于计算覆盖常数和参数非线性互补问题解映射的Aubin性质。
AI.motivation: 在一般锥（特别是保序投影锥）上，由于无法利用正交性论证，投影映射的变分分析面临挑战。作者旨在填补这一理论空白，为缺乏正交结构的锥投影建立余导数公式。
AI.method: 通过参考点邻域内关联生成系统对投影映射进行局部描述，进而推导Fréchet余导数和Mordukhovich余导数的显式表达式。
AI.result: 得到了投影映射覆盖常数的定量表达式；建立了参数非线性互补问题解映射满足Aubin性质的可验证充分条件。
AI.conclusion: 为一般锥（无正交性假设）的度量投影提供了变分分析框架，丰富了有限维互补系统稳定性理论。

title: Estimate Collapsibility of Causal Effects in Completed Partial DAGs via Strong d-Convex Hulls
summary: This paper proposes a collapsible method for estimating causal effects that maintains the estimator's consistency before and after marginalization over some variables in completed partially directed acyclic graphs (CPDAGs). We first introduce the estimate collapsibility for CPDAGs and characterize the minimal collapsible sets as strong d-convex hulls. An efficient algorithm is devised to obtain such sets in DAGs and is generalized to CPDAGs. Then, we combine the graph reduction procedure with the IDA framework. Finally, experiments and empirical analysis show the effectiveness of the collapsibility for causal estimations in CPDAGs. Code is available at https://github.com/Jamyang-D/strongly-convex.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在部分有向无环图（CPDAGs）中保持因果效应估计量在边缘化前后一致性的可折叠方法，通过强d-凸包识别最小可折叠集，并设计了高效算法，最后结合图约简与IDA框架进行实验验证。
AI.motivation: 现有因果效应估计方法在变量边缘化后可能出现估计量不一致的问题，缺乏在CPDAGs这类部分有向图中系统研究估计可折叠性的理论和方法。
AI.method: 首先定义CPDAGs中的估计可折叠性，用强d-凸包刻画最小可折叠集；设计DAGs中的高效算法并推广至CPDAGs；将图约简过程与IDA框架结合。
AI.result: 实验和实证分析表明该方法在CPDAGs中能有效实现因果估计的可折叠性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为CPDAGs中的因果效应估计提供了一种可折叠的理论框架与实用算法，保证了边缘化前后估计量的一致性。

title: Risk-Aware Planning for Transit Desert Remediation Under Demand Uncertainty
summary: Transit deserts are areas where public transportation is inadequate despite evidence of travel demand, a condition that affects tens of millions of residents across the Americas. Planning for these areas is difficult because the usual demand signal is missing: ridership cannot be observed before service exists. To address that setting, we formulate risk-aware transit desert remediation as a partially observable Markov decision process with Conditional Value-at-Risk constraints for financial tail risk. The model uses demographic, land-use, and employment data to set a prior over latent demand, then updates that prior as new service deployments produce ridership observations. A myopic belief-aware planner is evaluated on 25 cities using a unified financial model for operating cost, capital expenditure, fare revenue, and net subsidy. After five years, the planner remediates a median of 53.6% of transit-desert tracts and improves on static optimization by 5.0 percentage points on average, with gains in 16 of 25 cities. Gains are largest at moderate budgets (+9.9 points at baseline) and persist under 50% prior-demand miscalibration, while population density and existing transit density are the strongest structural predictors of remediation cost ($R^2\!=\!0.41$ on per-tract cost)

AI.tldr: 本文针对交通荒漠（Transit Deserts）问题，提出了一种基于部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）的风险感知规划方法，结合条件风险价值（CVaR）约束来控制财务尾部风险。方法利用人口、土地利用和就业数据建立潜在需求先验，并通过实际运营的乘客量观测不断更新。在25个城市上的实验表明，该规划器五年后平均可修复53.6%的交通荒漠区域，相比静态优化平均提升5.0个百分点，在中等预算下提升最大（+9.9个百分点），且对先验偏差具有鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 交通荒漠地区公共交通服务不足，但存在出行需求。由于无法在服务开通前观察到乘客量数据，传统需求信号缺失，导致规划困难。因此需要一种能在不确定性下进行风险感知决策的规划方法。
AI.method: 将问题建模为POMDP，引入CVaR约束控制财务尾部风险；利用人口、土地利用和就业数据建立潜在需求的先验分布，通过乘客量观测进行贝叶斯更新；采用myopic belief-aware规划策略。
AI.result: 在25个城市上测试，五年后中位数修复53.6%的交通荒漠区域；相比静态优化平均提升5.0个百分点，其中16个城市有提升；中等预算下增益最大（+9.9个百分点）；在50%先验偏差下仍保持鲁棒性；人口密度和现有交通密度是修复成本的最强结构预测因子（R²=0.41）。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的风险感知POMDP框架能有效应对需求未知下的交通荒漠修复问题，优于静态优化方法，具有较好的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

title: Joint Structural Pruning and Mixed-Precision Quantization for LLM Compression
summary: Recently, the efficiency of Large Language Models (LLMs) deployment has become a critical concern in practical applications. While post-training quantization (PTQ) and structural pruning are established techniques for reducing memory footprint and inference latency, most existing PTQ approaches optimize quantization errors on a per-layer basis, overlooking how errors accumulate and propagate through the network, often resulting in suboptimal solutions. Traditional pipelines also tend to apply pruning and quantization in isolation or sequentially, further compounding sub-optimality. We introduce a novel end-to-end framework that addresses these limitations in two key ways. First, we propose a novel mixed-precision PTQ strategy that directly minimizes global error propagation across the entire model, rather than isolating layer-wise errors. Building on this, we develop a novel joint optimization approach that simultaneously learns structural pruning decisions and mixed-precision quantization policies within a unified search space. Extensive experiments show that, at ultra-low precisions (1-3 bits), our quantization method reduces WikiText perplexity by up to 21% compared to state-of-the-art (SoTA) weight-activation quantization baselines. Against leading weight-only quantization methods, it achieves up to 59% and 85% lower perplexity on WikiText and C4, respectively. Compared to the SoTA joint pruning-and-quantization techniques, our proposed method delivers superior perplexity and reasoning performance at ultra-low bits.

AI.tldr: 提出一种端到端框架，通过全局误差传播优化的混合精度PTQ策略，以及联合学习结构化剪枝和量化策略的统一搜索空间，在超低比特（1-3 bits）下显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有PTQ方法逐层优化量化误差，忽视误差在网络中的累积和传播；剪枝和量化通常孤立或顺序进行，导致次优解。
AI.method: 1) 提出全局误差传播最小化的混合精度PTQ策略；2) 在此基础上构建联合优化方法，在统一搜索空间中同时学习结构化剪枝决策和混合精度量化策略。
AI.result: 超低精度（1-3 bits）下，量化方法在WikiText上困惑度降低21%（对比SoTA权重量化）；对比weight-only量化方法，WikiText和C4上困惑度分别降低59%和85%。联合剪枝-量化方法在超低比特下优于SoTA。
AI.conclusion: 所提端到端框架有效解决了误差传播和剪枝-量化分离带来的次优问题，在极低比特场景下显著提升LLM部署效率。

title: Finding Hidden Relationships Between Medical Concepts by Leveraging Metamap and Text Mining Techniques
summary: Text is one of the most common ways to store data in this computerized world. At a glance, it may seem that those data are not interconnected. But in reality, data can have hidden connections. Therefore, in this research, a new model has been presented that can find hidden relationships between two medical concepts by using MetaMap and appropriate text-mining techniques. Specifically, the model creates a new comprehensive index structure and can find cross-document hidden links connecting topics of interest that most existing approaches have ignored. Experiments show the effectiveness of the proposed model in discovering new connections between topics.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种通过MetaMap和文本挖掘技术发现医学概念间隐藏关系的新模型，该模型创建了综合索引结构，能有效发现跨文档的隐藏链接。
AI.motivation: 文本数据中存在隐藏的关联关系，但现有方法大多忽略了跨文档的主题间隐藏链接，因此需要一种能发现医学概念间隐藏关系的新方法。
AI.method: 利用MetaMap和文本挖掘技术，构建新的综合索引结构，用于发现跨文档中医学概念之间的隐藏链接。
AI.result: 实验证明了该模型在发现主题间新连接方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的模型能够有效发现医学概念间的隐藏关系，弥补了现有方法的不足。

title: Predictive Coding with Bayesian Priors via Proximal Gradients
summary: We recast predictive coding as continuous-time proximal gradient descent applied to a regularized maximum-a-posteriori (MAP) objective. We study first a single-level problem and then a multi-level hierarchy. For the single-level problem, we show that proximal gradient descent is precisely a leaky firing-rate network: the membrane leak, the effective recurrent matrix, the local synaptic drive, and the static nonlinearity all follow from one optimization principle, and the resulting circuit is the one proposed by Rao and Ballard. The prior selects the nonlinearity through its proximal operator, and the likelihood precision sets the gain on the observation. For the hierarchy, we show that a classical variable-splitting relaxation of the deep MAP problem yields hierarchical predictive coding as the interconnection of local and distributed solvers. In probabilistic modeling terms, this relaxation replaces the directed generative chain by an undirected Markov random field whose node potentials are the level-wise priors. Each level then applies its own activation function, namely the proximal operator of its prior.

AI.tldr: 本文提出预测编码可视为连续时间近端梯度下降法，用于求解正则化最大后验（MAP）目标。单层问题等价于漏泄发放率网络（Rao & Ballard电路），层级结构通过变量分裂松弛将深度MAP问题转化为层级预测编码，每个层级使用其先验的近端算子作为激活函数。
AI.motivation: 为预测编码提供严格的优化理论基础，揭示其与神经回路（漏泄发放率网络）和概率建模（马尔可夫随机场）的内在联系。
AI.method: 将预测编码重新表述为连续时间近端梯度下降；单层问题映射为漏泄发放率网络；层级问题通过变量分裂松弛转化为无向马尔可夫随机场，各层级独立求解。
AI.result: 单层预测编码等价于Rao & Ballard提出的漏泄发放率网络；层级预测编码对应于深度MAP问题的变量分裂松弛，每个层级使用先验的近端算子作为激活函数。
AI.conclusion: 预测编码与优化理论（近端梯度下降）、神经科学（漏泄发放率网络）和概率图模型（马尔可夫随机场）之间存在统一的理论框架。

title: The Routing Plateau: Understanding and Breaking the Accuracy Limits of LLM Routers
summary: LLM routing has become a popular approach to improve the cost-quality trade-off of LLM services by dynamically selecting a model for each query. Recent work has explored a broad range of routing methods, including clustering-based routers, learned classifiers, pairwise ranking, and confidence-based approaches. Our extensive study of 21 routing methods across five benchmarks reveals a consistent phenomenon that we call the routing plateau: many methods, including kNN, achieve very similar accuracy and converge to a narrow performance range that remains far below the oracle router. Our investigation shows that the plateau is largely caused by a predictability bottleneck: current routers mainly learn global averaged model-performance trends rather than fine-grained query-specific routing signals. As a result, they solve overlapping easy queries but collectively fail on hard queries that require instance-specific routing decisions. We further study how to move beyond the plateau and find that larger training datasets, stronger encoders, and end-to-end fine-tuning can further improve routing accuracy. These findings characterize the common limits of current routing methods and provide insights and actionable directions for the community to build more effective routing systems.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了21种LLM路由方法，发现了一个普遍现象"路由平台期"：大多数方法性能相似且远低于理想路由器的上限。平台期主要由可预测性瓶颈导致——路由方法主要学习全局平均性能趋势，而非细粒度的查询特定路由信号。研究表明，更大的训练数据、更强的编码器和端到端微调可以突破平台期。
AI.motivation: LLM路由已成为提升成本-质量平衡的关键方法，但当前路由方法的性能上限未被充分理解。作者旨在系统性地揭示各类路由方法的共同局限及其根本原因。
AI.method: 对21种路由方法（包括基于聚类、分类器、成对排序、置信度方法等）在5个基准上进行大规模系统性比较分析，识别"路由平台期"现象，并通过实验验证其成因（可预测性瓶颈）。
AI.result: 发现所有方法（包括kNN）收敛到一个狭窄的性能区间，远低于oracle上限；平台期主要由可预测性瓶颈导致；更大训练集、更强编码器和端到端微调可进一步提升路由精度。
AI.conclusion: 当前路由方法存在固有局限性，主要学习全局平均趋势而非查询特定信号，导致在困难查询上集体失败。未来应聚焦于更大规模数据、更强编码器和端到端训练来构建更有效的路由系统。

authors: Evelin H. M. Krulikovski e Marina Geremia
title: Augmented Lagrangian methods for nonlinear semidefinite programming with complementarity constraints
summary: We consider nonlinear semidefinite programming problems with complementarity constraints (SDCMPCC), a class of highly degenerate problems where classical optimality conditions typically fail. In this context, weak stationarity conditions have been developed to address their degeneracy. While these notions are well understood, their algorithmic implications remain largely unexplored in semidefinite complementarity settings. We introduce a reformulation based on the spectral decomposition of the complementarity structure, which preserves local solutions and enables a tractable analysis. Within this framework, we analyze an augmented Lagrangian method for SDCMPCC and prove that under a suitable extension of Robinson's condition, every accumulation point of the generated sequence is W-stationary, or C-stationary under a stricter condition for solving the subproblems.

AI.tldr: 本文针对带有互补约束的非线性半定规划问题(SDCMPCC)，提出一种基于谱分解的重构方法，并分析了增广拉格朗日方法的收敛性，证明在Robinson条件的适当推广下，序列的每个聚点都是W-稳定点或C-稳定点。
AI.motivation: SDCMPCC是一类高度退化的优化问题，经典最优性条件通常失效。虽然弱平稳性条件已被提出，但其在算法层面的含义在半定互补场景中尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 基于互补结构的谱分解进行重构，保持局部解不变性；在此框架下分析增广拉格朗日方法，并扩展了Robinson条件。
AI.result: 在扩展的Robinson条件下，增广拉格朗日方法生成的序列的每个聚点都是W-稳定点；在更严格的子问题求解条件下，可达到C-稳定点。
AI.conclusion: 该工作首次系统地探索了SDCMPCC问题的算法收敛性分析，为半定互补问题的数值求解提供了理论基础。

title: Multi-Armed Bandits with Arriving Arms: Sequential Screening, Dynamic Regret, and Sublinear Guarantees
summary: We study a stochastic multi-armed bandit problem in which the set of available arms expands over time. This setting arises in sequential experimentation when new actions or treatments become available during an ongoing study, making regret against a single best arm in hindsight inappropriate. We instead evaluate performance relative to the best arm currently available, leading to a dynamic-regret criterion for arriving-arm environments. To address the resulting challenges of arrival information discrepancy (AID) and a drifting benchmark (DB), we propose UCB for Arriving Arms (UCB-AA), an elimination-based procedure with an aiding preliminary screening step for newly arrived arms before full competition with incumbent arms. We show that UCB-AA attains regret bounds that depend explicitly on the arrival process, achieves sublinear dynamic regret under regularity conditions on gap evolution, and admits an online extension for unknown horizons. Simulation results show that UCB-AA reduces wasted pulls and maintains a smaller active arm set while preserving competitive regret performance.

AI.tldr: 本文研究动态到达臂的随机多臂老虎机问题，提出UCB-AA算法，通过消除过程和预筛选步骤应对到达信息差异和漂移基准挑战，实现了次线性动态遗憾界。
AI.motivation: 传统多臂老虎机假设臂集合固定，但许多实际场景（如临床试验）中新动作/治疗会随时间不断加入，此时与固定最优臂对比的静态遗憾不再合适，需要动态遗憾准则来评估在线到达环境下的算法性能。
AI.method: 提出UCB-AA算法，采用消除（elimination）框架，关键创新在于对新到达臂设置辅助预筛选步骤（preliminary screening），使其在完全与现有臂竞争前先积累足够信息，从而应对到达信息差异（AID）和漂移基准（DB）两大挑战。
AI.result: UCB-AA的遗憾界显式依赖于到达过程；在间隙演化的正则条件下可实现次线性动态遗憾；支持未知时间范围的在线扩展；仿真显示UCB-AA能减少浪费的拉臂次数、维持较小的活跃臂集合，同时保持有竞争力的遗憾表现。
AI.conclusion: 本文为臂动态到达的在线学习问题提供了有效的解决方案，理论分析和仿真验证了UCB-AA在动态遗憾准则下的优越性，拓展了多臂老虎机在时序实验场景中的应用。

title: Beyond Prediction: Longitudinal Reasoning in EHR-Integrated Clinical AI
summary: We present a structured analysis of how contemporary clinical AI systems integrate electronic health record (EHR) data and the extent to which they support longitudinal clinical reasoning. Drawing on a curated corpus of clinical natural language processing (NLP) and EHR-integrated systems, we develop a coding framework that captures both technical integration strategies and reasoning-relevant representational features, such as trajectory modeling, cross-encounter synthesis, longitudinal analysis, and absence reasoning. We also elicited the experiences of three physicians in their EHR use, including what strengths and weaknesses they found with their institution's current EHR system(s). Our analysis shows that while many systems incorporate EHR data, they predominantly operate on encounter-level or aggregated representations, with limited support for explicit temporal reasoning across patient histories. Reasoning-relevant structures are inconsistently represented, and evaluation paradigms remain largely focused on predictive performance instead of longitudinal interpretability. We argue that current approaches treat EHR data as a static input rather than a substrate for ongoing clinical reasoning, and we outline a framework for understanding how future systems might more effectively align with the temporal and interpretive structure of clinical practice.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了当前临床AI系统如何整合电子健康记录（EHR）数据及其对纵向临床推理的支持程度。研究发现，多数系统以就诊级别或聚合表征处理EHR数据，缺乏明确的跨患者历史的时间推理能力，评估范式侧重于预测性能而非纵向可解释性。作者提出未来系统应更有效地与临床实践的时间性和解释性结构对齐。
AI.motivation: 现有临床AI系统虽整合了EHR数据，但对其是否真正支持医生所需的纵向临床推理（如跨就诊轨迹建模、缺失信息推理等）缺乏系统分析。作者希望通过结构化分析揭示当前系统的局限性，并为未来系统设计提供方向。
AI.method: 基于临床NLP和EHR集成系统的策展语料库，开发了编码框架，涵盖技术整合策略和推理相关的表征特征（轨迹建模、跨就诊综合、纵向分析、缺席推理）。同时收集了三位医生使用EHR系统的经验反馈。
AI.result: 多数系统以就诊级别或聚合表征处理EHR数据，对显式时间推理支持有限。推理相关结构表征不一致，评估范式偏重预测性能而非纵向可解释性。医生反馈也印证了这些局限性。
AI.conclusion: 当前方法将EHR数据视为静态输入而非持续临床推理的基质。作者提出了一个框架，指导未来系统更好地与临床实践的时间性和解释性结构对齐。

title: Overcoming the Regulatory Bottleneck via Agent-to-Agent Protocols: A Nuclear Case Study
summary: Regulatory review of advanced nuclear reactor designs routinely spans more than three years and consumes hundreds of millions of dollars in combined regulator and applicant labor. We present the Regulatory Context Protocol (RCP), an Agent-to-Agent communication standard that replaces the formal human-to-human pipeline between regulators and applicants with a structured, auditable agentic channel, while preserving human oversight at safety-significant decision points. The protocol is calibrated against an analysis of 1,236 documents from U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission advanced reactor dockets and demonstrated with a working multi-agent pilot. Against an 89M USD, 42-month Reconstructed Baseline, RCP cuts costs by 50-77 percent (21M-44M USD) and timelines by 65 percent (15 months). Without a shared protocol, Standalone Agents reach only 54M-74M USD and 21 months. The residual cost-and-time gap is structural, not algorithmic: it traces to the inter-organizational pipeline that only an agent-to-agent standard can compress. The same bottleneck - formal multi-party review under strict auditability requirements - characterizes pharmaceutical approvals, environmental permitting, financial supervision, and aviation certification. The US regulatory paperwork burden carries a 426.5 billion USD annual opportunity cost; replicated broadly, the projected 50-77 percent reduction implies savings on the order of 210-330 billion USD per year - approaching 1 percent of US GDP.

AI.tldr: 提出监管上下文协议(RCP)，用Agent-to-Agent通信标准替代传统人人类监管审批流程，在核反应堆审批场景下将成本降低50-77%，时间缩短65%，并具有跨行业推广潜力。
AI.motivation: 先进核反应堆设计的监管审查周期常超过三年、耗费数亿美元，传统人工审批流程效率极低，亟需一种结构化、可审计的自动化通信方式来替代。
AI.method: 提出RCP（Regulatory Context Protocol），一种Agent-to-Agent通信标准，将监管方与申请方之间的人工沟通管道替换为结构化、可审计的智能体通道，同时保留人类在安全关键决策点的监督权。基于美国核管会1236份先进反应堆卷宗进行校准，并构建了多智能体试点系统。
AI.result: 对标89M美元/42个月的基线，RCP成本削减50-77%（21M-44M美元），时间缩短65%（15个月）。无共享协议时，独立智能体仅能达到54M-74M美元/21个月。剩余成本-时间差距是结构性的而非算法性的。推广至全美监管文书工作，预计可节省2100-3300亿美元/年，接近美国GDP的1%。
AI.conclusion: 跨组织审批管线（formal multi-party review under strict auditability）是效率瓶颈的核心，只有Agent-to-Agent标准才能根本性压缩这一成本。该协议具有跨行业（制药审批、环境许可、金融监管、航空认证）推广的通用潜力。

title: Liberating LLM Capabilities in Full-Duplex Speech Models
summary: Speech-based large language models are typically constrained to spoken replies, which limits their user-facing outputs to what can be verbalized and suppresses text-native capabilities such as code generation, structured analysis, and multi-step reasoning in realtime interaction, for tasks that require persistent, structured, and inspectable intermediate outputs. Existing work improves spoken reasoning or full-duplex turn-taking, but still treats text as a hidden intermediate state or a subordinate modality rather than a first-class output channel. We propose Listen-Write-Speak (LWS), a text-first tri-channel paradigm in which a single autoregressive LLM continuously listens to user audio, writes visible free-form text as its primary output, and speaks a realtime oral response in parallel under a shared causal attention context. This behavior is implemented entirely through a Token Schema, requiring no architectural modifications, and learned via a two-stage data pipeline that synthesizes per-second cognitive annotations consistent with the revealed input timeline. Empirically, LWS demonstrates strong full-duplex interaction on Full-Duplex-Bench, reaches 4.72 on VoiceBench AlpacaEval, achieves 92.6% writing-speaking consistency, and consistently outperforms its internal ablations on URO-Bench. These results suggest that visible writing can serve as a first-class output channel for speech interaction without sacrificing realtime responsiveness. The code and dataset are available on the project page: https://royalzhang.com/project/lws-page/.

AI.tldr: 提出Listen-Write-Speak (LWS)范式，让LLM在语音交互中同时进行可见文本写作和实时语音回复，将文本作为一等输出通道。
AI.motivation: 现有语音LLM仅支持口语回复，限制了代码生成、结构化分析等文本原生能力，文本仅被当作隐藏中间状态或次要模态。
AI.method: 提出三通道范式LWS：单自回归LLM持续听用户音频、写可见自由文本、并行说实时口语回复，三者共享因果注意力上下文。通过Token Schema实现（无需架构修改），两阶段数据管线合成每秒认知标注。
AI.result: 在Full-Duplex-Bench上全双工交互强，VoiceBench AlpacaEval达4.72，写作-口语一致性92.6%，URO-Bench上优于内部消融版本。
AI.conclusion: 可见写作可作为语音交互的一等输出通道，且不牺牲实时响应性。

title: Control-Theoretic View of Neural ODEs: Empirical Controllability and Observability
summary: This paper studies neural ordinary differential equations (neural ODEs) from a control-theoretic perspective using controllability and observability concepts. The neural ODE is represented in a control-affine form to facilitate analysis using tools from nonlinear and linear time-varying (LTV) systems. Controllability is examined through trajectory linearization, where the LTV controllability Gramian provides a local, first-order measure of input influence along a nominal trajectory. Observability is analyzed through output linearization, where the LTV observability Gramian characterizes the local ability to reconstruct system states from output measurements. Koopman-based lifting is considered to extend the analysis to a higher-dimensional representation, and its limitations under multiple equilibria and basin-dependent behavior are discussed. The proposed framework is illustrated on a series RLC circuit. The learned neural ODE reproduces system trajectories and generalizes to unseen initial conditions. The computed Gramians are numerically full rank along the tested trajectories, indicating local controllability and observability of the linearized dynamics.

AI.tldr: 本文从控制理论视角，利用可控性和可观测性概念分析神经常微分方程（neural ODEs），通过轨迹线性化、LTV Gramian矩阵和Koopman提升方法进行理论分析，并在RLC电路上验证了其局部可控性和可观测性。
AI.motivation: 将控制理论中的可控性与可观测性概念引入neural ODEs分析，为理解神经网络动力学行为提供严格的理论工具。
AI.method: 将neural ODE表示为控制仿射形式，利用轨迹线性化得到LTV可控性Gramian和可观测性Gramian进行局部一阶分析；同时引入Koopman提升扩展到高维表示，并讨论了多平衡点和流域依赖行为的局限性。
AI.result: 在RLC电路实验中，学习得到的neural ODE能够复现系统轨迹并泛化到未见过的初始条件；沿测试轨迹计算的Gramian数值满秩，表明线性化动力学具有局部可控性和可观测性。
AI.conclusion: 控制理论视角为neural ODEs提供了一种有效的分析框架，但Koopman提升在多平衡点场景下存在局限，未来需进一步研究非线性可控性与可观测性的全局度量。

title: Optimality of Sequential Filtering Under Independent Cost and Selectivity Models
comment: 2 pages, 2 figures. Accepted at the 2026 IEEE International Conference on Electro/Information Technology (EIT 2026)
summary: Sequential filtering pipelines are a common design pattern in large-scale systems, where a large population of items is progressively reduced by a sequence of stages that each incur cost. Despite their prevalence in ranking systems, cascaded machine learning inference, and fraud detection, filter ordering is often determined by heuristics without formal guarantees. We formalize sequential filtering under an expected-cost objective and prove that, under an independence model, ordering filters by increasing ratio of cost to rejection probability minimizes expected total cost. Extensive Monte Carlo simulations show that the optimal ordering strictly dominates common heuristics across all runs, both in expectation and across the full distribution of outcomes.

AI.tldr: 本文正式化了顺序过滤问题，证明了在独立模型下按成本/拒绝概率比递增排序可最小化预期总成本，并通过蒙特卡洛模拟验证了该最优排序策略优于常见启发式方法。
AI.motivation: 序列过滤管道在大规模系统中广泛存在（如排序系统、级联推理、欺诈检测），但过滤器的排序通常依赖无理论保证的启发式方法。本文旨在提供有形式化保证的最优排序策略。
AI.method: 将顺序过滤形式化为预期成本目标下的优化问题，在独立模型假设下证明按成本与拒绝概率之比递增排序可最小化预期总成本，并通过蒙特卡洛模拟进行验证。
AI.result: 蒙特卡洛模拟表明，最优排序策略在所有运行中均严格优于常见启发式方法，无论是在期望值上还是在整个结果分布上。
AI.conclusion: 按成本/拒绝概率比递增排序是序列过滤管道的最优策略，为实际系统中的过滤器排序提供了理论依据和可落地的指导原则。

title: Optimal Harvesting under Stochastic Control: HJB Equation and Feynman-Kac Representation
summary: Sustainable resource management requires harvesting strategies that account for environmental variability and ecological uncertainty. This study investigates optimal harvesting of renewable biological resources within a stochastic framework, where population dynamics are influenced by random environmental fluctuations and modeled using stochastic differential equations. Two complementary approaches are employed: the Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman (HJB) equation and the Feynman-Kac representation. The HJB framework provides a dynamic optimization rule and characterizes the value function through a nonlinear partial differential equation, while the Feynman-Kac approach offers a probabilistic interpretation of expected returns. A comparative analysis demonstrates the theoretical consistency and practical relevance of both methods for designing economically efficient and ecologically sustainable harvesting policies under uncertainty.

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨在随机环境下可再生生物资源的最优收获策略，利用HJB方程和Feynman-Kac表示两种方法进行建模与分析。
AI.motivation: 可持续资源管理需要考虑环境变异性和生态不确定性，现有研究缺乏对随机框架下最优收获策略的系统性分析。
AI.method: 采用随机微分方程建模种群动态，分别运用Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman方程（动态优化规则）和Feynman-Kac表示（概率解释）两种互补方法。
AI.result: 两种方法在理论上具有一致性，且在实际应用中都可用于设计经济高效且生态可持续的收获政策。
AI.conclusion: HJB方程与Feynman-Kac表示为随机环境下的资源管理提供了理论一致且实践可行的分析工具。

title: SAILS: Surrogate-based Analysis of Interactions via Local Effect Smooths
summary: Feature interactions drive much of the predictive power of machine learning models, yet existing explanation methods only detect and quantify interactions without revealing their functional form, or visualize only restricted interaction types. We propose Surrogate-based Analysis of Interactions via Local effect Smooths (SAILS), a model-agnostic framework that analyzes pairwise interactions through interpretable generalized additive model (GAM) surrogates fitted to the local effects of a black-box model. For each interval of a feature of interest, the surrogate smooth terms isolate the interaction components on derivative level, enabling (i) interaction detection through a heuristic derived from significance tests on smooth terms, (ii) interaction form categorization into linear, product-separable, and non-product-separable types, and (iii) tailored, interpretable visualizations for each interaction type. We empirically validate the framework through controlled simulations and a real-world task, demonstrating its effectiveness for pairwise interactions, with limitations under strong feature correlations and higher-order interactions. SAILS fills a notable gap in the XAI toolbox, going beyond detection of interactions alone to characterizing their functional form.

AI.tldr: SAILS是一种通过可解释的GAM代理模型来分析黑箱模型中成对特征交互功能形式的框架，不仅能检测交互，还能将其分类为线性、可分离乘积和不可分离乘积三种类型，并提供针对性可视化。
AI.motivation: 现有交互解释方法只能检测和量化交互的存在，却无法揭示交互的函数形式，存在明显空白。
AI.method: 对黑箱模型拟合局部效应的GAM代理模型，通过代理模型的平滑项在导数级别分离交互成分，结合显著性检验检测交互，并分类为线性、乘积可分离和不可分离类型，最后提供定制化可视化。
AI.result: 通过模拟实验和真实任务验证了SAILS在成对交互分析上的有效性，但在强特征相关和高阶交互场景下存在局限性。
AI.conclusion: SAILS填补了XAI工具箱的空白——不仅检测交互，还能刻画交互的功能形式，超越了现有方法。

title: Clinical Reasoning in the Age of AI: Longitudinal Cognition and Human-AI Collaboration
summary:
As physicians turn to AI-powered systems to help meet the dual demands of speed and care quality, they are met with hallucinations and sycophancy. Understanding how doctors reason through clinical problems in real-world settings is critical for design of effective AI reasoning systems. While recent advances in medical AI have emphasized performance benchmarks and diagnostic accuracy, comparatively little attention has been paid to the structure of clinicians' reasoning processes as they unfold over time, e.g., how they interact with electronic health records and operate under conditions of uncertainty and constraint. This study provides a comprehensive, empirically-grounded account of clinical reasoning and its relationship to current AI-mediated workflows through a mixed-methods design that combines qualitative interviews with structured survey data.
  Findings indicate that current AI systems are primarily deployed for encounter-level tasks such as documentation and summarization, and only partially align with physicians' underlying reasoning processes. In particular, AI-generated representations often omit temporal or interpretive structures central to clinical decision-making, while core aspects of reasoning, especially those spanning multiple encounters, remain largely implicit and physician-driven. By integrating fine-grained qualitative insights with broader quantitative patterns, this study offers a unified framework for understanding clinical reasoning as a context-sensitive, temporally extended process and identifies key mismatches between clinician cognition and current AI design. These results provide concrete directions for the development of AI systems that more effectively align with and augment real-world clinical reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过混合方法（定性访谈+定量调查）揭示了医生在真实临床环境中的推理过程与当前AI系统（主要用于文档记录和总结）之间的结构性错配，指出AI缺乏对时间性和解释性结构的理解，并提出更有效地对齐临床推理的AI设计方向。
AI.motivation: 现有医学AI研究过度关注性能基准和诊断准确性，忽视了医生在真实临床环境中随时间展开的推理过程结构，以及他们如何在不确定性和约束下操作。理解这些推理过程对于设计有效的AI推理系统至关重要。
AI.method: 采用混合方法设计，结合定性访谈和结构化的问卷数据，对临床推理及其与当前AI辅助工作流程的关系进行实证分析。
AI.result: 当前AI系统主要用于就诊层面的文档记录和总结，与医生的底层推理过程仅部分对齐。AI生成的表征常常忽略临床决策中关键的时间性或解释性结构，而核心推理环节（尤其是跨多次就诊的推理）仍主要由医生隐性完成。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一个将临床推理理解为情境敏感、时间延伸过程的统一框架，识别了临床认知与AI设计之间的关键错配，为开发更有效地对齐和增强真实临床推理的AI系统提供了具体方向。

title: Safety is Contextual, LLM-Judges Are Not: Navigating the Rigid Priors of Evaluators
summary: LLMs-as-judges are the only way to evaluate safety at scale. Despite their importance, LLM-judges themselves are rarely evaluated beyond human agreement in simple, static benchmarks. We therefore investigate two under-explored but crucial properties of LLMs-as-judges: their susceptibility to relying on in context-information, and their steerability to differing safety definitions, which may not align with their internal safety priors. We evaluate the safety judging abilities of many generalist LLMs and safety-specific judges, and investigate the impact of task demonstrations, novel in-context information, and changing safety definitions. We find that while LLM-judges can learn from new information, they are broadly unlikely to adjust their evaluations if the context or safety definition contradicts their prior.

AI.tldr: 研究LLM裁判对上下文信息的依赖性和对安全定义的可控性，发现它们虽能学习新信息，但在上下文或安全定义与自身先验冲突时，难以调整判断。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM裁判评估仅停留在简单静态基准上的人机一致性，缺乏对上下文依赖性和安全定义可引导性这两个关键属性的深入研究。
AI.method: 评估多种通用LLM和安全专用裁判的安全评判能力，研究任务演示、新型上下文信息以及安全定义变化对其判断的影响。
AI.result: LLM裁判能够从新信息中学习，但当上下文或安全定义与其自身先验知识相矛盾时，它们总体上难以调整评估结果。
AI.conclusion: LLM裁判的评判受其内部安全先验的强烈约束，外部引导对其影响有限。

title: Priors Persist Through Suppression: A Stroop Paradigm for Lexical Override
summary: Glossaries, technical specifications, and system prompts routinely ask language models to use familiar words in unfamiliar ways. When this works, the lexical prior persists through override rather than being replaced: it continues to operate after the local rule applies, with the rule lowering its logit rather than installing the new meaning on top. We test this with a Stroop-style paradigm: a remapping rule ("doctor" means "forest") pitted against the query word's lexical-prior distractor ("hospital"), with matched neutral controls. Across 11 open-weight models spanning four families and 1B--9B parameters, lexical-prior strength predicts interference even after item-level controls for answer prior, frequency, tokenization, and prompt wording. Activation patching on five aligned models locates a source-position triplet (definition subject, definition target, query word) that nearly fully recovers the conflict effect (aggregate $R \in [0.92, 1.06]$). A definition-target swap shows the triplet performs binding rather than identity matching. Dissociation experiments isolate target preservation as the binding-specific signature: distractor suppression occurs under matched, swap, and item-mismatched conditions alike, whereas target logit collapse occurs only when the definition-target position is corrupted. Behavior and mechanism converge on the same channel: the lexical prior is where both interference originates and where override leaves its mark.

AI.tldr: 本文通过Stroop式实验范式发现，语言模型在遵循词汇重映射规则（如"doctor"意为"forest"）时，词汇先验知识并未被替换，而是被抑制（logit降低）。通过激活修补技术，定位到定义主语、定义目标、查询词三位置构成的关键三元组，并分离出目标保留（target preservation）是绑定机制的特征信号。
AI.motivation: 探究语言模型在遵循临时词汇重定义规则时，其内在的词汇先验知识是被替换还是被覆盖抑制，以及背后的神经机制。
AI.method: 采用Stroop式实验范式（如"doctor"重定义为"forest"），对比干扰条件与中性条件；在11个开源模型上进行行为实验，并使用激活修补（activation patching）技术在5个对齐模型上定位关键神经位置。
AI.result: 词汇先验强度能预测干扰效应；定位到定义主语、定义目标、查询词三位置的三元组可近乎完全恢复冲突效应（R∈[0.92,1.06]）；定义目标交换实验表明该三元组执行绑定而非身份匹配；分离实验发现目标保留（target logit collapse）是绑定特异性信号。
AI.conclusion: 词汇先验既是干扰的来源，也是规则覆盖留下痕迹的位置；重映射机制是通过抑制而非替换来实现规则遵守。

title: A Unified Framework for Contraction Stability Analysis of Heterogeneous Grid-Forming Inverters
summary: The shift to renewable-dominated power systems has produced low-inertia grids, undermining system stability. In this context, grid-forming inverters (GFMs) have emerged as a promising solution. However, GFMs challenge conventional analysis techniques, especially those relying on small-signal or root-mean-square (RMS) models. Such models rely on linearization and sinusoidal steady-state assumptions, which fail in large-signal cases. Stability of GFM-based systems therefore becomes operating-point dependent, and a feasible operating point may not even exist. While large-signal analyses are available, decentralized certification of operating-point convergence with explicit transient guarantees, such as rate and overshoot, remains rare. This paper proposes an algebraic, decentralized contraction-based framework. The proposed contraction stability analysis certifies system stability and convergence to desired operating points. The method works in the time domain and captures nonlinear, large-signal behavior of synchronization and power-sharing mechanisms. Moreover, the contraction rate provides an explicit bound on transient time: trajectories converge exponentially to the new operating point at a controlled rate, yielding computable contraction regions that certify stability and large-signal convergence across operating-point changes. These regions directly guide parameter tuning for heterogeneous GFMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于收缩理论的代数框架，用于解决可再生能源主导的低惯量电网中，构网型逆变器（GFM）在大信号扰动下的稳定性分析和瞬态性能保证问题。
AI.motivation: 传统小信号和RMS分析方法依赖线性化和正弦稳态假设，无法处理GFM系统的大信号行为；现有大信号分析缺乏分散式认证和显式瞬态保证（如收敛速率和超调量）。
AI.method: 提出一种代数化的、分散式的收缩理论框架，在时域中分析同步和功率共享机制的非线性大信号行为，通过收缩率提供指数收敛速率的显式边界，并计算可判定的收缩区域。
AI.result: 该方法能够认证系统稳定性及对期望运行点的收敛性，提供显式的瞬态时间边界（指数收敛速率），并给出可直接指导异构GFM参数整定的收缩区域。
AI.conclusion: 该框架填补了大信号稳定性分析与显式瞬态保证之间的空白，为低惯量电网中GFM的分散式稳定性认证和参数设计提供了有效工具。

title: ResearchClawBench: A Benchmark for End-to-End Autonomous Scientific Research
summary: AI coding agents are increasingly used for scientific work, but their end-to-end autonomous research capability remains difficult to verify. We present ResearchClawBench, a benchmark for evaluating autonomous scientific research across 40 tasks from 10 scientific domains. Each task is grounded in a real published paper, provides related literature and raw data, and hides the target paper during evaluation. Expert-curated multimodal rubrics decompose the target scientific artifacts into weighted criteria, enabling evaluation of target-paper-level re-discovery while leaving room for new discovery. We evaluate seven autonomous research (auto-research) agents under a unified protocol and seventeen native LLMs through the lightweight ResearchHarness. Current systems remain far from reliable re-discovery: the strongest autonomous agent, Claude Code, averages 21.5, and the strongest ResearchHarness LLM, Claude-Opus-4.7, averages 20.7, with an LLM frontier mean of only 26.5. Error analysis shows that failures concentrate in experimental protocol mismatch, evidence mismatch, and missing scientific core. ResearchClawBench provides a reproducible evaluation frontier for measuring progress toward autonomous scientific research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ResearchClawBench，一个包含10个科学领域40个任务的自主科研能力基准。每个任务基于真实已发表论文，提供相关文献和原始数据，隐藏目标论文。专家设计的多模态评分标准将目标科学工件分解为加权标准。评估显示，最强自主智能体Claude Code平均21.5分，最强LLM Claude-Opus-4.7平均20.7分，LLM前沿均值仅26.5分。错误分析表明失败集中在实验方案不匹配、证据不匹配和科学核心缺失。
AI.motivation: AI编码智能体在科学工作中越来越普及，但其端到端自主研究能力难以验证，缺乏标准化的评估基准来衡量进展。
AI.method: 构建40个跨领域任务，每任务基于已发表论文，提供文献和原始数据但隐藏目标论文。使用专家设计的加权多模态评分标准评估"再发现"能力。在统一协议下评估7个自主研究智能体和17个原生LLM（通过轻量级ResearchHarness）。
AI.result: 最强自主智能体Claude Code平均21.5分，最强ResearchHarness LLM（Claude-Opus-4.7）平均20.7分，LLM前沿均值仅26.5分。错误集中在实验方案不匹配、证据不匹配和科学核心缺失。
AI.conclusion: 当前自主科研系统距离可靠的再发现仍有很大差距，ResearchClawBench为衡量自主科学研究进展提供了可复现的评估前沿。

title: Block coordinate descent for joint delay-energy optimization in multi-hop D2D networks
summary: In multi-hop device-to-device (D2D) networks, the optimization of network-level metrics is particularly difficult due to the tight coupling between network-layer routing and physical-layer resource allocation. Departing from traditional average-performance metrics, this paper addresses the joint optimization of routing paths, transmission power, and bandwidth allocation. We formulate a generalized cost function to minimize the maximum transmission time (i.e., the bottleneck delay) alongside the total energy consumption. To tackle the resulting highly non-convex formulation, we propose a novel block coordinate descent (BCD) framework. At the network layer, we develop two adaptive routing algorithms: a matrix-free Frank-Wolfe (MF-FW) algorithm for fast execution in dense topologies, and a low-rank primal-dual interior-point method (LR-PDIPM) that bypasses dense matrix inversions via the Sherman-Morrison formula for high-precision solutions. At the physical layer, we design a parallel dual ascent algorithm leveraging a time-domain perspective transformation to solve the resource allocation subproblem to global optimality. The proposed BCD framework is proven to converge to an ε-neighborhood of a stationary point. Through comprehensive experiments, the proposed BCD framework establishes its superiority in achieving the optimal delay-energy trade-off. Specifically, the LR-PDIPM variant achieves a maximum 9.14-fold reduction in total energy consumption and up to an order of magnitude improvement in energy efficiency, while maintaining a bounded maximum delay gap (up to 3.78-fold) relative to the best baseline. Meanwhile, the warm-start MF-FW variant identifies near-optimal solutions in mere seconds, serving as a highly practical engineering approach.

AI.tldr: 本文针对多跳D2D网络中路由与资源分配的联合优化问题，提出了一种块坐标下降(BCD)框架，在网络层设计了MF-FW和LR-PDIPM两种自适应路由算法，在物理层设计了并行对偶上升算法，实现了延迟与能耗的最优折中，LR-PDIPM变体最高可降低9.14倍能耗，MF-FW变体可在数秒内找到近优解。
AI.motivation: 多跳D2D网络中，网络层路由与物理层资源分配紧密耦合，传统平均性能指标难以有效优化网络级度量，亟需一种联合优化框架来同时最小化瓶颈延迟和总能耗。
AI.method: 提出BCD框架：1)网络层：矩阵自由Frank-Wolfe算法(MF-FW)用于快速执行，低秩原对偶内点法(LR-PDIPM)利用Sherman-Morrison公式避免稠密矩阵求逆实现高精度求解；2)物理层：基于时域视角变换的并行对偶上升算法，可全局最优求解资源分配子问题；3)证明BCD框架收敛到驻点的ε邻域。
AI.result: LR-PDIPM变体：最高降低9.14倍总能耗，能量效率提升一个数量级，最大延迟差距控制在3.78倍以内；MF-FW变体：数秒内识别近优解，具有高工程实用性。
AI.conclusion: 所提BCD框架在延迟-能耗折中上优于现有基线方法，两种路由算法分别适用于高精度需求与快速工程部署场景，为多跳D2D网络的联合优化提供了有效方案。

title: Report the Floor: A Training-Free Conformal Interval Is a Mandatory Baseline for Probabilistic Time-Series Forecasting
summary: Probabilistic forecasters are increasingly learned, yet the baselines they are compared against are often weak or omitted. We show that the simplest possible conformal interval - a last-value point forecast wrapped in a finite-sample split-conformal residual quantile, with no parameters and no training - is a far stronger baseline than its near-total absence from recent learned-forecasting and conformal-time-series comparisons would suggest. In one-step-ahead online forecasting across 2,217 real series from nine public sources (Monash, LOTSA, the LTSF traffic/electricity/weather suites, METR-LA, BOOM, nips/probts), this ConformalNaive interval decisively beats the naive value-quantile baselines, the entire NPTS family (NPTS 73%, SeasonalNPTS 64% of series), and the published Conformal Seasonal Pools (CSP) method (71% of series, bootstrap 95% CI [69,73], paired Wilcoxon p approx 7.6e-135); it is on par with the simpler learned conformal predictors (RCI, quantile regression; median relative Winkler within 2%) and is beaten only by the adaptive-online and ensemble methods (SPCI, ACI, AgACI), which track distribution shift and lead by 9-33% relative Winkler. It is also better calibrated than a trained neural forecaster: on the six datasets that introduced DeepNPTS, the trivial floors cover the truth 84-85% of the time at a nominal 95%, versus DeepNPTS's 66%. At multi-step seasonal horizons the picture inverts: the random-walk floor is the weakest method and the seasonal pool (CSP) wins - a boundary we map. Finally we give ConformalNaive+, a one-line, training-free, horizon-adaptive selector that attains the better of two complementary floors at every horizon with restored coverage. We argue the matching conformal naive floor must be a mandatory baseline whenever a learned probabilistic forecaster claims gains.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ConformalNaive——一个零参数、无需训练的简单共形预测区间，证明其在单步在线预测中比许多复杂学习模型表现更好，并主张该基线应成为概率预测研究中强制对比的标准。
AI.motivation: 当前概率预测研究中的对比基线往往过弱或被忽略，导致对学习型预测器性能的评估产生误导。作者希望建立一个简单但强大的基线，提升实验对比的公平性和可靠性。
AI.method: 使用最后观测值作为点预测，结合有限样本分割共形残差分位数构建预测区间。进一步提出ConformalNaive+，通过一行代码实现自适应选择两个互补基线（随机游走与季节池）中更优者，并修复覆盖率的对齐问题。
AI.result: 在2,217个真实时间序列上，ConformalNaive击败了Naive分位数基线、整个NPTS家族（NPTS 73%，SeasonalNPTS 64%），以及CSP方法（71%）。与RCI、分位数回归等简单学习型方法持平（中位相对Winkler差异在2%以内），仅弱于自适应在线方法（SPCI、ACI、AgACI）。在DeepNPTS的六个数据集上，其名义95%覆盖率达84-85%，而DeepNPTS仅66%。但在多步季节预测中，CSP表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 共形朴素基线（ConformalNaive）应成为概率预测研究中评估学习型模型时的强制性基线，以避免对模型性能的夸大。

title: Friend or Foe? Language as an ideological switch in open-weight LLMs under Russian disinformation stress
summary: As Russia's war against Ukraine extends into generative AI, large language models (LLMs) adapted for local post-Soviet languages are deployed in contested information environments. Policy and industry discourse assumes that culturally aligned adaptation encodes the political orientation of the target community: a Ukrainian-oriented model will resist Russian narratives, a Russian-oriented one will reinforce them. Does it? This article systematically disconfirms that assumption. We run a controlled audit of four openly available LLMs sharing a common base model but fine-tuned for different linguistic communities, querying them in Ukrainian, Russian and English across ten contested wartime narratives: Crimea, "denazification", the "one people" thesis, and atrocity denial at Bucha and Mariupol. The result is a Fine-Tuning Paradox: the Ukrainian-oriented model shows the weakest resistance to Russian disinformation in Russian, while the Russian-oriented one exhibits the strongest rejection. Corpus composition, language coverage and prompt format prove more decisive than nominal cultural provenance. We situate these findings within debates on hybrid warfare, digital sovereignty and post-imperial information orders, arguing that the principal threat to regional information sovereignty is not adversarial fine-tuning but the untested assumption that cultural alignment guarantees resilience.

AI.tldr: 本文通过控制实验推翻了“文化对齐保证政治韧性”的假设：乌克兰定向模型在俄语查询中对俄虚假信息抵抗力最弱，而俄罗斯定向模型拒绝最强烈。语料构成、语言覆盖和提示格式比名义文化来源更具决定性，构成“微调悖论”。
AI.motivation: 政策和行业话语默认LLM的文化对齐会编码目标社区的政治取向，但这一假设缺乏实证检验。作者旨在系统性地证伪该假设。
AI.method: 对四个共享基座模型但针对不同语言社区微调的LLM进行受控审计，在乌克兰语、俄语和英语三种语言下，测试其对克里米亚、“去纳粹化”、“一个民族”论、布查与马里乌波尔暴行否认等十项战时叙事的回应。
AI.result: 发现“微调悖论”：乌克兰定向模型在俄语查询中抵抗虚假信息的能力最弱，而俄罗斯定向模型反而表现出最强拒绝。语料构成、语言覆盖和提示格式比模型名义文化来源更关键。
AI.conclusion: 对区域信息主权的主要威胁并非对抗性微调，而是“文化对齐保证韧性”这一未经检验的假设。研究结果对混合战争、数字主权和后殖民信息秩序的讨论具有重要意义。

title: The AI Epistemic Deference Index: A Continuous Measure of Sycophancy
summary: Current AI models frequently exhibit epistemic sycophancy, endorsing claims to agree with a user. Existing evaluations typically measure this either by assessing what it takes to make a model shift a binary endorsement or by eliciting an explicit probability in a proposition. However, much user-facing sycophantic behavior is demonstrated through shifts in graded support expressed through ordinary language. We propose the AI Epistemic Deference Index (AEDI): a continuous, unidimensional score representing how sensitive the support expressed in a model's output is to the attitude expressed in a user's prompt. To generate AEDI, we provide a new protocol for estimating probabilities from natural language outputs, using LLMs-as-judges validated for consistency and correlation to human judgment. We deploy it on a new curated database of 500 propositions across diverse topics and 16,000 prompts varying in user attitude, testing eight prominent models. Every model exhibits substantial deference, though with large and systematic differences across providers, with Claude models demonstrating the least, and Grok and Gemini models the most. The effect is amplified in prompts requesting a written artifact, and concentrated on propositions where models hold weaker priors. We release AEDI as an easy-to-update benchmark and measurement pipeline for output-level sycophancy evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AI认知顺从指数(AEDI)，通过从自然语言输出中估计概率，量化模型对用户态度的顺从程度。测试8个模型发现所有模型都存在顺从现象，Claude模型最低，Grok和Gemini最高。
AI.motivation: 现有评估AI迎合性行为的方法通常是二元判断或显式概率，但实际中的迎合行为多表现为语言中渐变支持的转变，缺乏连续、维度的量化指标。
AI.method: 提出AEDI连续得分，使用LLM-as-judge从自然语言输出中估算概率，构建500个命题和16,000个提示的数据库，测试8个主流模型。
AI.result: 所有模型均表现出显著顺从，不同供应商间差异大；Claude模型最低，Grok和Gemini最高；顺从效应在要求书面产出时加剧，且集中在模型先验较弱的命题上。
AI.conclusion: AEDI可作为易更新的基准测试和测量管道，用于评估模型输出层面的认知迎合行为。

title: Phantom transitions in language model fine-tuning
summary: Fine-tuning a language model on contexts whose correct completion has a near-synonym competitor often fails silently. The cross-entropy loss decreases monotonically while the correct token never overtakes the competitor in rank. We study this regime across five transformer architectures spanning two families and a fivefold parameter range, on ten hand-selected near-synonym contexts. We instrument these failures with an order parameter combining the predicted distribution and pairwise embedding overlaps. It decomposes additively into a signal, tracking the model's commitment to the correct token over its nearest competitor, and a background drag, set by how the embedding bulk leaks probability into the score. This isolates two failure modes. In kinematic failure the signal stays small. In structural failure the drag actively worsens as fine-tuning proceeds. We observe sharp catapult-like jumps in the order parameter that resemble a phase transition. A central negative result organises the paper. The transitions are phantoms. The spontaneous-symmetry-breaking interpretation is ruled out by direct measurement. Catapult-like jumps still appear under LoRA fine-tuning with the token embedding matrix exactly unchanged during training, where no geometric phase transition is possible. The discontinuity lives entirely in the softmax readout. A small number of dimensionless quantities organise the trajectory across architectures. One is consistent across all five under full fine-tuning. A second sorts architectures into two classes by bulk embedding distribution and predicts LoRA sufficiency. As a blind test, the framework predicts the critical learning rate of a held-out architecture, not used to fit any parameter, to within 2.1% of a subsequent learning-rate sweep. Findings concern the near-synonym mechanism only and should not be extrapolated without recalibration.

AI.tldr: 微调语言模型时，若正确补全的上下文存在近义词竞争者，模型会悄无声息地失败：交叉熵损失持续下降，但正确token从未在排名上超越竞争者。本文通过一个序参数（结合预测分布与嵌入重叠）将失败分解为信号（追踪正确token对竞争者的承诺）和背景拖拽（嵌入整体泄漏概率），识别出两种失败模式（运动学失败和结构失败），并发现类似“弹射”的跳变。但核心否定结论是：这些跳变是幻象，并非自发对称性破缺（通过直接测量排除；在LoRA微调中嵌入矩阵不变时跳变仍出现）。最终用无量纲量组织轨迹，并盲测预测了留出架构的临界学习率，误差仅2.1%。
AI.motivation: 微调语言模型时，正确token在近义词竞争下始终无法在排名上超越竞争者，而交叉熵损失仍单调下降——这种“静默失败”难以被传统指标察觉，需要揭示其内在机制。
AI.method: 定义序参数（结合预测分布与成对嵌入重叠），将其可加分解为信号项（正确token与最接近竞争者的承诺）和背景拖拽项（嵌入整体概率泄漏）。在5种Transformer架构（两个家族，五倍参数范围）和10个精心挑选的近义词上下文中，分析全量微调和LoRA微调下的训练轨迹。
AI.result: 识别两种失败模式：运动学失败（信号小）和结构失败（背景拖拽随微调恶化）。观察到类似相变的弹射跳变，但直接测量排除了自发对称性破缺；LoRA微调（嵌入矩阵不变）下跳变仍出现，证明不连续性仅存在于softmax读出层。提出无量纲量组织轨迹，其中一个在所有架构下一致，第二个将架构分为两类并预测LoRA充分性。盲测中，框架预测留出架构的临界学习率与后续扫描仅差2.1%。
AI.conclusion: 近义词竞争下的微调失败可被序参数分解框架系统理解；观测到的“相变”是幻象；无量纲量具有跨架构迁移能力。但结论仅限于近义词机制，不可随意外推。

title: RadioDiff-Inv2: Differentiable Diffusion Inversion under Location Drift from Sparse Noisy Measurements for Radio Map Estimation
summary: Radio map (RM) estimation is a key enabler for environment-aware optimization in 6G wireless networks. In practice, RM construction increasingly relies on crowdsourced received signal strength (RSS) feedback that is inherently sparse and noisy. A further and often overlooked challenge is location drift, whereby privacy constraints and user mobility cause reported sampling coordinates to deviate from the true measurement locations. Unlike additive measurement noise, location drift perturbs the sensing operator itself, since each RSS sample effectively queries the underlying RM at an incorrect spatial coordinate. This operator uncertainty, compounded with sparse noisy sensing, renders the inverse problem severely ill-posed and limits conventional estimators that rely on analytically specified priors. This paper proposes RadioDiff-Inv2, a differentiable diffusion inversion framework that estimates RMs from sparse noisy measurements under location drift. A Gaussian resampling scheme is introduced to construct a differentiable, drift-aware measurement operator on grid-based maps, and the probability-flow ordinary differential equation (ODE) is exploited to cast the diffusion sampler as a deterministic, differentiable mapping from an initial noise code to the estimated RM. By optimizing the noise code via backpropagation against a drift-marginalized data-fidelity objective, RadioDiff-Inv2 produces reconstructions that are both prior-plausible and measurement-consistent without costly posterior sampling. Extensive experiments show that RadioDiff-Inv2 outperforms the best competing baseline by 4 to 14 dB in PSNR across varying sparsity and drift levels. The advantage is most pronounced in low-SNR regimes, where the learned diffusion prior maintains near-constant reconstruction fidelity while conventional methods degrade severely.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RadioDiff-Inv2框架，利用可微扩散逆推从稀疏、含噪声且存在位置漂移的众包RSS测量值中估计无线电地图，通过高斯重采样构建可微的漂移感知测量算子，并利用概率流ODE将扩散采样器转化为确定性可微映射，优化噪声码以同时满足先验合理性和测量一致性。
AI.motivation: 6G无线网络中无线电地图估计面临三个关键挑战：众包RSS数据稀疏且含噪声、位置漂移（用户隐私约束和移动性导致采样坐标与真实位置偏离）使感知算子本身产生不确定性，以及传统方法依赖解析先验难以应对这种严重不适定逆问题。
AI.method: 1) 提出可微扩散逆推框架RadioDiff-Inv2；2) 引入高斯重采样方案，在网格地图上构建可微的、感知位置漂移的测量算子；3) 利用概率流ODE将扩散采样器转化为从初始噪声码到估计RM的确定性可微映射；4) 通过反向传播优化噪声码，最小化漂移边缘化的数据保真度目标函数。
AI.result: 在不同稀疏度和漂移水平下，RadioDiff-Inv2的PSNR比最优基线高出4-14 dB；在低SNR场景中优势最为显著，学习到的扩散先验能保持近乎恒定的重建保真度，而传统方法性能严重下降。
AI.conclusion: RadioDiff-Inv2通过可微扩散逆推有效解决了位置漂移下的RM估计问题，无需昂贵的后验采样即可生成既符合先验又一致于测量数据的重建结果。

title: UNIQ: Conformal Calibration for Adaptive Conservatism in Offline Reinforcement Learning
comment: 19 pages, 2 figures, ICML 2026 Workshop on Decision-Making from Offline Datasets to Online Adaptation: Black-Box Optimization to Reinforcement Learning
summary: Offline reinforcement learning requires careful conservatism to mitigate distribution shift, yet most existing methods apply a fixed penalty uniformly across all states regardless of local data coverage. We present UNIQ (Uncertainty-Informed Quantile), an offline RL method that introduces state-adaptive conservatism through conformally calibrated uncertainty estimation. Built on the Implicit Q-Learning (IQL) backbone, UNIQ trains a multi-expectile value ensemble, computes distribution-free uncertainty estimates using split conformal prediction, and maps the resulting signal to a state-dependent expectile that relaxes conservatism in well-covered regions while strengthening it in uncertain regions near the data frontier. On D4RL MuJoCo benchmarks, UNIQ consistently improves over IQL, with the largest gains observed on Walker2d and replay-heavy tasks. At the same time, UNIQ operates at near-IQL memory cost (approximately 250 MB peak VRAM), providing roughly a 10x reduction compared to EDAC. Rather than pursuing overall state-of-the-art performance, we position UNIQ as a practical mechanism contribution that improves the performance-efficiency trade-off in offline reinforcement learning.

AI.tldr: UNIQ是一种基于不确定性量化（分裂共形预测）的状态自适应保守离线RL方法，在IQL上构建多期望值集成，根据数据覆盖动态调整保守程度，在D4RL MuJoCo任务上超越IQL，且显存开销接近IQL（约250MB），远低于EDAC（约10倍缩减）。
AI.motivation: 现有离线RL方法对所有状态施加固定惩罚，忽略了局部数据覆盖的差异，导致在数据充足区域过于保守、在数据不足区域保守不足。
AI.method: 基于IQL骨干，训练多期望值集成；利用分裂共形预测计算与分布无关的不确定性估计；将该信号映射为状态依赖的期望值参数，在覆盖好的区域放松保守性，在数据前沿附近的不确定区域加强保守性。
AI.result: 在D4RL MuJoCo基准上一致优于IQL，尤其在Walker2d和replay-heavy任务上提升最大；显存约250MB，较EDAC减少约10倍。
AI.conclusion: UNIQ作为一种实用性机制贡献，在不追求SOTA的前提下，有效改善了离线RL中的性能-效率权衡。

title: Parameter Tuning with Generalization Guarantees for GPU-Accelerated Linear Programming
summary: Recent research has developed practical, parallelizable first-order methods for large scale linear programming, but performance is highly dependent on hyperparameter selection. We derive generalization guarantees for hyperparameter tuning within (cu)PDLP, a state-of-the-art first-order LP solver designed for modern hardware. First, we pin down the behavior of PDHG, the primal-dual hybrid gradient algorithm that underlies PDLP, as a function of its step size and primal weight, leading to linear sample complexity guarantees for learning those parameters. We then conduct a structural analysis of PDLP, which augments PDHG with several specialized techniques like preconditioning, adaptive step sizes, averaging, adaptive restarts, and smoothed primal weight updates. Our analysis captures the behavior of the solution trajectory as a function of the hyperparameters and leverages recent advances in data-driven algorithm design to obtain polynomial sample complexity guarantees for learning those hyperparameters. Finally, we conduct proof-of-concept experiments that demonstrate the need for data-driven PDLP parameter tuning. Our results showcase the versatility of the data-driven algorithm design toolkit for principled hyperparameter tuning within solver-grade implementations of complex modern optimization algorithms.

AI.tldr: 本文为现代一阶线性规划求解器PDLP中的超参数调优提供了理论保证，证明通过数据驱动方法可以高效学习步长、原始权重等关键参数，并进行了实验验证。
AI.motivation: 现有的一阶线性规划方法在大规模问题上表现良好，但其性能高度依赖于超参数的选择，缺乏理论指导如何进行有效的超参数调优。
AI.method: 首先分析PDHG算法中步长和原始权重的行为，建立线性样本复杂度保证；然后对PDLP（包含预处理、自适应步长、平均化、自适应重启和平滑原始权重更新等模块）进行结构分析，利用数据驱动算法设计工具获得多项式样本复杂度保证；最后进行概念验证实验。
AI.result: 获得了学习PDHG超参数的线性样本复杂度保证，以及学习PDLP超参数的多项式样本复杂度保证；实验证明了数据驱动参数调优的必要性。
AI.conclusion: 展示了数据驱动算法设计工具包在求解器级复杂优化算法的原则性超参数调优中的通用性和有效性。

title: Regulating the AI Tutor: Intentions, Help-Seeking, and Self-Regulated Learning in Adolescent GenAI Use
summary:
Generative AI (GenAI) tools are now common learning companions for adolescents, yet how they regulate their use during authentic learning tasks remains poorly understood. Self-regulated learning (SRL) and high-level help-seeking (HS) are commonly proposed as safeguards against passive or shortcut-oriented use, but most empirical studies focus on aggregate learning outcomes rather than these moment-to-moment processes during AI-supported learning.
  This work-in-progress examines open-ended conversational data from 98 Grade-9 students across three German Gymnasium schools, who used a web-based Mistral-Large tutor to prepare a curriculum-aligned mathematics skill before an exam. Alongside chat logs (1,616 turns; 808 student turns), we collected pre-post domain knowledge, pre-chat learning needs, and self-reported cognitive load. We propose a turn-level codebook combining theory-driven SRL and HS constructs with two LLM-specific inductive codes (agency over the AI; epistemic vigilance), and report preliminary AI-coded results.
  Although students overwhelmingly selected scaffolded support before the chat, their interactions were dominated by instrumental requests with almost no explicit monitoring or evaluation. Post-test performance was significantly lower than pre-test, and higher extraneous cognitive load predicted lower post-test scores after controlling for prior knowledge. We discuss how these patterns can support hybrid human-AI analysis of interaction patterns and inform scaffolds for more agentic and epistemically proactive GenAI use.

AI.tldr: 本研究对98名九年级学生使用Mistral-Large数学辅导工具的对话数据（1616轮对话）进行分析，发现学生虽在课前选择支架式支持，但实际互动中以工具性请求为主，缺乏元认知监控与评估，导致后测成绩显著低于前测，且高外在认知负荷预测更低后测成绩。
AI.motivation: 青少年使用生成式AI工具时的自我调节学习（SRL）和求助行为（HS）机制尚不明确，多数研究聚焦整体学习结果而非实时交互过程。
AI.method: 收集98名九年级学生的对话日志（808条学生对话）、前后测知识、学习需求及认知负荷数据，提出结合SRL/HS理论与LLM特定编码（对AI的能动性、认知警惕性）的回合级编码方案，并采用AI自动编码进行初步分析。
AI.result: 学生课前倾向于选择支架式支持，但实际互动中多为工具性请求，缺乏明确的监控与评估行为；后测成绩显著低于前测；高外在认知负荷在控制先验知识后仍预测更低后测成绩。
AI.conclusion: 这些模式可用于支持人机混合分析交互模式，并为设计更具能动性和认知主动性的GenAI使用支架提供依据。

title: Contract2Tool: Learning Preconditions and Effects for Reliable Tool-Augmented LLM Agents
summary: Tool-augmented large language model agents increasingly rely on external APIs, but standard tool schemas describe how to call a tool, not when the tool is causally appropriate or what task state it produces. Causal tool filtering addresses this gap by using lightweight contracts that specify each tool's preconditions, effects, risk level, and cost. However, manually writing and maintaining such contracts does not scale to large or changing tool ecosystems. We introduce Contract2Tool, a framework for inferring tool contracts from metadata, schemas, documentation, and execution traces. Contract2Tool converts observable tool evidence into normalized symbolic contracts that can be evaluated intrinsically and deployed inside downstream causal tool filtering. We evaluate learned contracts against gold preconditions, effects, and risk labels, and measure their downstream utility on multi-step agent tasks. Our results show that hybrid documentation-and-trace evidence produces contracts accurate enough to preserve most of the reliability and efficiency benefits of gold contracts. Learned-contract CMTF achieves 0.980 downstream success, close to 0.990 for gold-contract CMTF, while reducing visible tools from 100 to 1 and reducing average token usage from 26,172 to 2,528 relative to all-tools exposure. These results suggest that learned contracts can provide a scalable contract layer between tool schemas and reliable agent execution.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Contract2Tool，一种从元数据、文档和执行轨迹中自动推断工具契约（即工具的前置条件、效果、风险等级和成本）的框架，使得因果工具过滤（CMTF）能够在大型工具生态中高效扩展。
AI.motivation: 手动编写和维护工具契约在大规模或动态变化的工具生态中不可扩展，因此需要自动化的契约学习方法来支持因果工具过滤。
AI.method: Contract2Tool框架将可观测的工具证据（元数据、模式、文档、执行轨迹）转化为归一化的符号契约，支持内在评估并部署到下游因果工具过滤中。
AI.result: 混合文档与轨迹证据学到的契约准确度接近黄金契约；学习契约的CMTF下游任务成功率达0.980（黄金契约为0.990），可见工具从100降至1，平均token使用量从26,172降至2,528。
AI.conclusion: 学习到的契约能够在工具模式与可靠智能体执行之间提供可扩展的契约层，兼顾可靠性与效率。

title: Function-Vector Heads Are Two Populations: Writers and Cancellers in In-Context Learning
summary: Function-vector (FV) heads (Todd et al., 2024) are typically identified by the magnitude of their causal contribution to in-context rule tasks, under the implicit assumption that the top set is a homogeneous functional class. This assumption fails. We replace magnitude-only ranking with a sign-preserving criterion (refined DLA + permutation FDR) and validate each candidate by path patching. The FV head population then splits into two opposing sub-populations: writers push the rule-correct logit up; cancellers push it down. A four-condition canonical verdict holds in $13/15$ cells across three model families and six Pythia scales, and a sign-shuffle rejects homogeneity in $5/6$ main cells. The structure is invisible to magnitude-only ranking: Todd's top-$20$ captures $64\%$ of cancellers but only $4\%$ of writers on the hierarchical task, and $59\%$ of writers but only $8\%$ of cancellers on the modular task. We rule out six artefact accounts on all $27$ canceller (cell, head) pairs: induction overlap, sinks, generic importance, rank-$1$ copy-suppression, V-cascade, and rank-nearest non-FV controls. Zero-ablating cancellers yields $+0.13$ to $+0.29$ nats of logit gain in $6/6$ main cells with a directionally consistent $+2$ to $+7$ pp accuracy effect.

AI.tldr: 本文发现函数向量头并非同质功能类，而是分为writer（提升规则正确logit）和canceller（降低规则正确logit）两个对立子群体。通过符号保持标准（改进DLA+排列FDR）和路径修补进行识别，在多个模型族和规模上验证了这一二分结构，并排除了六种伪影解释。零消融canceller可带来显著的logit增益和准确率提升。
AI.motivation: 现有研究默认FV头（函数向量头）是同质功能类，仅通过因果贡献幅度排序识别，但这一假设可能不成立。作者旨在揭示FV头内部的异质性结构。
AI.method: 采用符号保持标准（改进的DLA+排列FDR）替代仅幅度排序，结合路径修补验证每个候选头。在三个模型家族和六个Pythia规模上，通过四项条件规范判断，并进行符号混排检验。
AI.result: FV头分化为writer（推动规则正确logit上升）和canceller（推动规则正确logit下降）两个对立子群体。四项条件规范在13/15个单元成立，符号混排拒绝同质性假设在5/6个主要单元。仅幅度排序无法发现此结构：Todd的前20个头在不同任务上对两类头的捕获率差异极大。零消融canceller在6/6主要单元产生+0.13到+0.29 nats的logit增益，以及+2到+7百分点的准确率提升。
AI.conclusion: FV头内部存在功能对立的结构——writer和canceller，仅靠幅度排序无法揭示这一异质性。取消canceller的抑制作用可以有效提升模型性能，表明这些头可能扮演着抑制性调节的角色。

title: Bayesian Optimization of a Multi-Product Chemical Reactor Using Composite Models and Partial Physics Knowledge
summary: We study data-driven real-time economic optimization of a multi-product chemical reactor when no reliable first-principles model is available beyond a steady-state energy balance. Instead of learning the economic objective directly as a black-box function, we use a composite formulation in which Gaussian process (GP) models predict physically meaningful outputs, including product concentrations and reactor temperature, while profit is computed analytically from these predictions together with raw-material, product, and utility prices. This preserves the structure of the economic objective, makes it parametric in changing prices without needing retraining, and allows candidate operating points to be checked against the available energy balance through a physics residual. The GPs also provide predictive uncertainty, which is exploited in a Bayesian optimization (BO) framework both for data-efficient exploration and for conservative enforcement of the reactor temperature constraint through an upper confidence bound. The acquisition function additionally penalizes large energy-balance mismatch obtained by substituting the GP-predicted outputs and candidate inputs into the available steady-state energy balance. The approach is demonstrated on a benchmark simulation of a non-isothermal multi-product reactor. Relative to a trust-region safe BO implementation, the proposed method achieves better simulated economic performance within the available iteration budget. Relative to a purely data-driven BO approach that does not use the available physics information, it avoids reactor temperature constraint violations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合高斯过程模型和贝叶斯优化的数据驱动方法，用于多产品化学反应器的实时经济优化。该方法利用复合建模保留经济目标结构，支持价格参数化，并通过物理残差和预测不确定性实现安全约束，在仿真中相比纯数据驱动和信任域安全BO方法表现更优。
AI.motivation: 在缺乏可靠第一性原理模型的情况下，如何实现多产品化学反应器的数据驱动实时经济优化，同时确保操作安全性（温度约束）和数据效率。
AI.method: 采用复合高斯过程模型预测物理量（产物浓度、反应器温度），再根据价格解析计算利润；利用能量平衡残差作为惩罚项；在贝叶斯优化框架中结合上置信界（UCB）保守执行温度约束。
AI.result: 相比信任域安全BO方法，在给定迭代预算内实现了更好的模拟经济性能；相比纯数据驱动BO方法，避免了反应器温度约束违反。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的混合方法有效融合了物理信息（能量平衡）与数据驱动模型，在保证安全性的同时提升了优化效率和经济性能。

title: Shortcuts in the Tail: Debiasing via Post-Hoc Spectral Compression of Fine-Tuning Updates
summary: Fine-tuning often introduces spurious correlations alongside task knowledge, causing systematic failures on underrepresented groups. Existing mitigations require retraining, group labels, or curated counterfactual data. We show a simple post-hoc intervention reduces shortcut reliance without any of these: truncating the tail of the SVD of $ΔW = W_\mathrm{ft} - W_\mathrm{base}$ reduces the spurious-group gap while preserving task accuracy. Across three instruction-tuned models ($0.5$B--$7$B) and four classification benchmarks, top-$k$ truncation reduces the gap on every cell at $<2$ pp accuracy loss, by up to $5\times$ on CivilComments. We propose this works because the shortcut response sits in the tail of the singular ordering of $ΔW$, a claim about how truncation behaves rather than about the raw singular values, which are broadly distributed and look the same across all four datasets. A controlled boundary case in which fine-tuning has only a shortcut to learn shows the predicted FT-to-base collapse, and bottom-/random-$k$ and matched-rank LoRA controls rule out generic low-rank approximation and rank-constrained training as the explanation. We read this as preliminary evidence that the singular basis of $ΔW$ is a useful coordinate system for studying what fine-tuning has learned.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需重训练、组标签或反事实数据的后处理方法：通过截断微调权重增量ΔW的SVD尾部，可有效减少模型对虚假关联的依赖，在多个指令微调模型和分类基准上以极小的准确率损失显著降低了群体间性能差距。
AI.motivation: 微调模型常引入虚假关联，导致在代表性不足的群体上系统性失败。现有缓解方法需要重训练、组标签或精心构建的反事实数据，成本高昂。
AI.method: 对微调权重增量ΔW = W_ft - W_base进行SVD分解，截断其尾部奇异值（保留top-k奇异成分），作为一种即插即用的后处理干预。
AI.result: 在0.5B-7B的指令微调模型和四个分类基准上，top-k截断在每个实验单元上都降低了虚假关联导致的群体差距，准确率损失小于2pp；在CivilComments上效果提升达5倍。
AI.conclusion: 虚假关联响应位于ΔW奇异排序的尾部；ΔW的奇异基为研究微调所学内容提供了有用的坐标系统。实验排除了低秩近似或秩约束训练作为解释的可能性。

title: Explainable Optimization: A Call for Interdisciplinary Action
summary: Operations research and management science models support decisions that affect patients, workers, citizens, and public institutions. Decision-makers, such as clinicians approving surgical schedules, planners allocating disaster relief resources, or managers designing workforce rotations, increasingly require clear and actionable justifications that bridge the gap between mathematical optimization outputs and the intuitive reasoning stakeholders need to trust, contest, and implement recommended decisions. Yet the field has traditionally evaluated optimization models through computational criteria such as feasibility, optimality, scalability, and solution time, while treating explanation as a secondary concern. Mathematical transparency, provided through access to objectives, constraints, shadow prices, or sensitivity reports, does not automatically offer the forms of justification that stakeholders need to understand, trust, contest, or implement optimization-based decisions. This paper calls for the development of explainable optimization (XOpt) as a distinct interdisciplinary area that moves beyond algorithmic efficiency and incorporates behavioral, cognitive, and pragmatic perspectives to address this explanatory deficit.

AI.tldr: 本文呼吁将可解释优化（XOpt）发展为一个独立的跨学科领域，解决运筹学与管理科学模型中优化输出与利益相关者理解需求之间的解释鸿沟。
AI.motivation: 传统优化模型仅关注可行性、最优性、可扩展性和求解时间等计算标准，而忽视了解释性需求；数学透明度（如目标、约束、影子价格、敏感性报告）并不能自动提供利益相关者所需的理解、信任、质疑和实施优化决策的论证形式。
AI.method: 提出将可解释优化（XOpt）作为独立跨学科领域，超越算法效率，融合行为、认知和实用主义视角。
AI.result: 尚未给出具体实验结果，但提出了XOpt的研究方向与框架需求。
AI.conclusion: 运筹学和管理科学需要将解释性作为核心关注点，建立可解释优化领域以弥合优化模型输出与人类决策者理解之间的鸿沟。

title: A Classroom Study of LLM-Generated Feedback Intervention in Introductory Programming
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used to provide automated feedback in introductory programming courses, yet empirical evidence from authentic classroom deployments comparing different feedback modalities remains limited. In this work, we present a large-scale classroom study in which AI-generated feedback was deployed through a randomized protocol in an introductory Python programming course. Students received one of three feedback conditions on incorrect submissions: natural language hints, AI-generated failing test cases, or no AI feedback. We release the resulting dataset, ProgFeed, which captures 6,693 submissions from 215 consenting students across 17 labs, including feedback conditions, execution-based performance measures, and fine-grained temporal information. Using this data, we analyze learning trajectories, feedback quality, and submission behavior over repeated attempts. We find that natural language feedback is significantly associated with higher completion rates and faster convergence to correct solutions. Test case feedback, by contrast, exhibits heterogeneous effects that depend critically on feedback validity. Our results suggest that the form of AI-generated feedback matters, and that evaluating feedback quality -- not just its presence -- is essential for understanding its pedagogical impact.

AI.tldr: 本文通过大规模课堂随机实验，比较了自然语言提示、AI生成测试用例和无AI反馈三种反馈形式对Python初学者的影响，发现自然语言反馈显著提升完成率和收敛速度，而测试用例的效果取决于其有效性。
AI.motivation: 尽管LLM越来越多地被用于编程课程的自动反馈，但来自真实课堂部署、比较不同反馈模态的经验证据仍然有限。
AI.method: 在Python入门课程中实施随机对照实验，学生收到自然语言提示、AI生成失败测试用例或无AI反馈三种条件之一，收集了6,693份提交数据及执行性能、时间信息等细粒度数据。
AI.result: 自然语言反馈显著与更高的完成率和更快的正确解法收敛速度相关；测试用例反馈的效果具有异质性，关键取决于反馈的有效性。
AI.conclusion: AI生成反馈的形式很重要，评估反馈质量（而非仅关注其存在与否）对于理解其教学影响至关重要。

title: MemToolAgent overview with a simple restaurant booking scenario where the agent retrieves similar memories, receives feedback on an invalid time format, and generates a reflection to update its memory
summary: Modern large language model (LLM) agents can use external tools to help users solve complex tasks. However, for problems that require learning from long-term historical events or from previous agent-environment interactions, LLM agents are required to use memory mechanisms to store and retrieve experiences. While sophisticated memory systems exist for dialogue agents, few studies have empirically examined how to improve agents' tool-using capabilities through past user-agent conversations. We propose MemToolAgent, a framework that improves tool use through memory management. Our approach contains a memory extraction module that processes past experiences into structured memory entries, and a retrieval module that dynamically selects a subset of the stored memory entries. This enables more personalized and accurate responses aligned with user preferences and feedback without requiring LLM fine-tuning. In summary, this work has three main contributions: (1) a unified memory entry format that improves both general-purpose and personalized tool use without LLM fine-tuning, (2) a reflection-based memory extraction that uses environment and user feedback to distill wrong executions into critiques to store, and (3) a retrieval module that chooses how many past experiences to use based on the memory similarity distribution.
