MemToolAgent achieves 29%, 80%, and 17% relative improvements compared to strong baselines on the WorkBench, NESTFUL, and PEToolBench benchmarks, respectively.

AI.tldr: 提出了MemToolAgent框架，通过记忆管理机制提升LLM智能体的工具使用能力，无需微调即可利用历史交互经验，在三个基准测试上分别取得29%、80%和17%的相对提升。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体在使用外部工具解决复杂任务时，需要从长期历史或过往交互中学习，但缺乏如何利用历史用户-智能体对话来提升工具使用能力的系统研究。
AI.method: 提出MemToolAgent框架，包含：(1)统一记忆条目格式；(2)基于反思的记忆提取模块，利用环境和用户反馈将错误执行提炼为批评性记忆；(3)动态检索模块，基于记忆相似度分布选择合适数量的历史经验。
AI.result: 在WorkBench、NESTFUL、PEToolBench三个基准测试上分别取得29%、80%和17%的相对性能提升，优于强基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了无需LLM微调，仅通过结构化的记忆管理即可显著提升智能体的工具使用能力，实现更个性化和准确的响应。

title: Subtitle-Aligned Fine-Tuning of Whisper for Swiss German ASR: Benchmark Contamination, Convention Mismatch, and an Honest Baseline at 25.6% WER (13.8% cWER)
comment: 15 pages, 21 tables. Models available at https://huggingface.co/Flix-AI
summary:
We present a systematic study of fine-tuning OpenAI's Whisper large-v3 for Swiss German ASR, using 1,367 hours of broadcast speech paired with Standard German subtitles as weak supervision. Through 16 iterative training runs on an NVIDIA DGX Spark (Grace Blackwell, 128 GB unified memory, up to 1 PFLOP FP4), we compare LoRA and full fine-tuning of the 1.55B-parameter model, investigate hallucination root causes, and quantify the effect of data quality, subtitle alignment, and training strategy. Our best model achieves 25.6% measured WER on the All Swiss German Dialects Test Set (ASGDTS) in an honest evaluation on strictly disjoint data. A harmonized error analysis separating genuine errors from valid stylistic variation (tense, word order, Swiss orthography) yields a content WER (cWER) of 13.8%, counting only actual recognition failures. Bias-corrected estimation reduces this to 8.5%, suggesting the true error rate is roughly one third of measured WER.
  We demonstrate that published state-of-the-art Swiss German ASR results (17.1-17.5% WER) are inflated by benchmark contamination: a vanilla Whisper model self-trained on the ASGDTS test set with zero Swiss German data achieves 13.88% WER, surpassing all published systems. Experiments with Phi-4-multimodal show an even stronger memorization effect (3.9% WER), revealing that the benchmark primarily measures convention matching rather than dialectal comprehension.
  We release two models, a LoRA adapter (25.32% WER, 13.9% cWER) and a full fine-tuned model (25.60% WER, 13.8% cWER), among the few publicly available, honestly evaluated Whisper models for Swiss German, under Apache 2.0 with full reproducibility, requiring no institutional data agreements.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了使用Whisper large-v3微调进行瑞士德语ASR，发现标准基准测试存在严重数据污染，实际WER约是测量值的三分之一，并发布了诚实评估的公开模型。
AI.motivation: 瑞士德语ASR面临缺乏标注数据的挑战，现有基准测试结果可能存在数据污染问题，需要开展系统性研究来理解真实性能。
AI.method: 使用1367小时广播语音配标准德语字幕作为弱监督，进行16轮迭代训练，比较LoRA与全微调，分析幻觉成因，并引入内容WER（cWER）和偏差校正估计来分离真实错误与风格变体。
AI.result: 最佳模型实测WER 25.6%，cWER 13.8%，偏差校正后8.5%。发现基准测试被污染：零瑞士德语数据的Whisper在ASGDTS上达13.88% WER（超越所有已发表系统），Phi-4-multimodal达3.9% WER。
AI.conclusion: 现有SOTA结果被高估，基准测试主要衡量约定匹配而非方言理解；发布公开模型（LoRA和全微调），遵循Apache 2.0协议，确保可复现性。

title: Cooperative Guidance and Control for Active Asset Protection with Time-Varying Agent Speeds
summary: Protecting an asset against threats is a challenging problem in an era of continuously evolving intelligent attacks. This requires cooperation between the asset and the defender to share information and jointly maneuver. To address this problem, this work proposes a cooperative guidance and control strategy for active asset protection against a maneuvering threat. This work develops a joint maneuver strategy where both the defender and the asset coordinate their time-varying speeds and courses to neutralize/capture the attacker. The control strategy is formulated around three coupled geometric and temporal objectives. The first objective is to set the line-of-sight rate between the asset and the attacker to zero, putting the attacker on a collision course and reducing their maneuvering. The second objective is to maintain the defender on the line-of-sight between the asset and the attacker. This ensures that the attacker faces the defender first before reaching the vicinity of the asset. Lastly, the defender is also guided to pursue the attacker based on the time-to-go estimates between the defender and the attacker. While keeping these objectives in mind, the control actions for the asset and the defender are jointly designed, fostering cooperation between the two. The stability of the proposed strategy is established using a Lyapunov-based approach. Numerical simulations performed show the effectiveness of the proposed cooperative strategy in ensuring the successful capture of a maneuvering threat.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种主动资产保护的合作制导与控制策略，通过防御方与资产方协同调整速度与航向，实现对抗机动威胁的目标。策略围绕三个几何与时间目标展开：消除资产-攻击者视线角速率、维持防御方位于资产-攻击者视线上、基于剩余时间引导防御方追击。通过李雅普诺夫方法证明稳定性，仿真验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 在智能攻击不断演变的时代，保护资产免受威胁面临挑战，需要资产与防御方之间共享信息并联合机动。现有方法缺乏二者协同配合，本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 提出合作制导控制策略，包含三个耦合目标：1) 将资产与攻击者之间的视线角速率归零；2) 保持防御方始终位于资产与攻击者的视线上；3) 基于剩余时间估计引导防御方追击攻击者。资产与防御方的控制动作联合设计，采用李雅普诺夫方法分析系统稳定性。
AI.result: 数值仿真结果表明，所提出的合作策略能够有效确保成功捕获机动威胁目标。
AI.conclusion: 提出的合作制导控制策略通过资产与防御方的联合机动，能够有效对抗机动攻击者，具有理论稳定性保证和良好的仿真验证效果。

title: Repetition Mismatch: Why Data Mixture Experiments Don't Scale and How to Fix Them
summary: Pre-training data mixtures are commonly tuned by running small-scale experiments and extrapolating to the target training budget. When high-quality data is scarce and must be repeated, this extrapolation frequently fails, but the source of the failure has not been isolated. We show that a primary culprit is a repetition mismatch: because high-quality datasets are small, their repetition rate changes as the training budget grows, shifting the optimal mixture in ways that small-scale proxy experiments do not anticipate. A subsampling procedure that matches the target repetition rate controls for this effect. In a two-source setting combining limited high-quality data with web crawl, a single repetition-controlled experiment using only 1/16 of the target tokens recovers a mixture within 0.05 of the optimum for a 757M parameter model, compared to an error of 0.75 without repetition control. Achieving comparable accuracy without repetition control requires three to four horizons, consuming 44 to 94% of the target token budget. With three data sources, the larger mixture space requires more than a single experiment to constrain, but the approach remains effective: at the 757M scale, just two repetition-controlled horizons recover the optimal mixture, outperforming baselines that instead require the full two-source experiments to construct. Our results reveal that repetition dynamics, not scale alone, shape whether small-scale mixture experiments generalize. More broadly, they suggest that data repetition deserves treatment as a first-class variable in mixture optimization, rather than an inconvenient side effect of limited data.

AI.tldr: 本文发现预训练数据混合比例优化失败的主要原因是“重复率不匹配”：高质量数据较少，随着训练预算增长其重复率变化，导致小规模实验无法准确预测最优混合比例。通过匹配目标重复率的子采样方法，仅用1/16的目标token即可显著提升混合比例准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过小规模实验外推最优数据混合比例，但当高质量数据稀缺需重复使用时，外推经常失败，且失败原因未被隔离。作者旨在找出这一失败的根本原因。
AI.method: 提出重复率控制（repetition control）的子采样方法，使小规模代理实验的重复率与目标训练预算下的重复率匹配。在两个数据源（高质量数据+网络爬虫）和三数据源场景下进行验证。
AI.result: 两数据源下，使用1/16目标token的重复控制实验即可将混合比例误差从0.75降至0.05（757M参数模型）。三数据源下，仅需两次重复控制实验即可恢复最优混合。无重复控制时需3-4次实验，消耗44-94%的目标token预算。
AI.conclusion: 重复动力学（repetition dynamics）而非规模本身，决定了小规模混合实验能否泛化。数据重复应被视为混合优化中的首要变量，而非数据有限的副作用。

title: OptMuon: Closed-Loop Orthogonalized Momentum Methods for Stochastic Optimization with Zero-Noise Optimality
summary: Orthogonalized momentum updates, as used in Muon-style optimizers, have recently shown strong empirical stability in large-scale deep learning. However, existing orthogonalized methods are typically paired with constant or open-loop magnitude rules, and therefore do not explicitly calibrate their update magnitudes from the observed optimization trajectory. Motivated by the closed-loop perspective behind Lipschitz-free and noise-adaptive methods, we propose OptMuon, a family of adaptive momentum orthogonalization methods for stochastic nonconvex optimization. OptMuon combines Muon-style polar-factor directions with a trajectory-dependent AdaGrad-Norm-type coefficient schedule, so that the update magnitude is determined by the observed gradient and momentum history rather than by a prescribed Lipschitz-dependent rule. The schedule does not use the smoothness constant, the variance level, or the bounded-gradient constant in parameter selection, and its running-maximum correction prevents isolated gradient spikes from causing excessive coefficient collapse. Under lower-boundedness, unbiased stochastic gradients with bounded variance, smoothness, and an almost-sure bounded stochastic-gradient condition, we prove two complementary guarantees. OptMuon-A achieves the noise-adaptive rate \(\tilde{\mathcal O}(T^{-1/2}+σ^{1/2}T^{-1/4})\) under average smoothness, while OptMuon-I achieves \(\tilde{\mathcal O}(T^{-1/2}+σ^{1/3}T^{-1/3})\) under individual smoothness. In the zero-noise regime, both bounds automatically reduce to a nearly optimal deterministic first-order rate \(\tilde{\mathcal O}(T^{-1/2})\) without manual hyperparameter retuning. These results show that closed-loop scalar adaptation can be combined with Muon-style momentum orthogonalization while retaining noise adaptivity and zero-noise optimality up to logarithmic factors.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OptMuon优化器家族，将Muon风格的动量正交化与轨迹依赖的AdaGrad-Norm式系数调度相结合，实现了自适应更新幅度的闭环控制，在非凸随机优化中达到噪声自适应和零噪声最优速率。
AI.motivation: 现有Muon风格的正交化动量优化方法通常使用常数或开环幅度规则，无法根据优化轨迹显式校准更新幅度。受Lipschitz-free和噪声自适应方法中闭环控制思想的启发，作者希望设计一种能自动调整更新幅度的自适应动量正交化方法。
AI.method: 提出OptMuon优化器家族，包含两个变体：OptMuon-A（平均光滑性）和OptMuon-I（个体光滑性）。核心创新是将Muon风格的极分解方向（polar-factor directions）与AdaGrad-Norm类型的系数调度结合，更新幅度由梯度历史决定，并引入running-maximum修正防止梯度尖峰导致系数过度下降。
AI.result: OptMuon-A在平均光滑性下达到噪声自适应速率Õ(T^{-1/2}+σ^{1/2}T^{-1/4})，OptMuon-I在个体光滑性下达到Õ(T^{-1/2}+σ^{1/3}T^{-1/3})。在零噪声情况下，两者自动退化为接近最优的确定性一阶速率Õ(T^{-1/2})，无需手动调整超参数。
AI.conclusion: 闭环标量自适应可以与Muon风格的动量正交化有效结合，同时保留噪声自适应性和零噪声最优性（仅差对数因子），为大规模深度学习优化提供了理论保证更强的方法。

title: Active Learning with Foundation Model Priors: Efficient Learning under Class Imbalance
summary: Real-world datasets across image and text domains are often characterized by skewed class distributions and noisy annotations, which jointly degrade model performance, particularly on minority classes. Among existing solutions, active learning offers an effective and efficient paradigm by selectively querying the most informative and balanced samples for annotation. We propose an innovative active learning framework that mitigates class imbalance and selects the most informative samples to annotate. Leveraging foundation model priors, our algorithm enables imbalance-aware co-decisions between foundation model and small model to tackle noisy and imbalanced labels across various domains. We introduce the first study to systematically explore active learning under the dual challenges of label noise and class imbalance across image and text domains. Extensive experiments on imbalanced datasets demonstrate that our method achieves substantial annotation savings-over 50% compared to the best active learning baseline-while preserving performance and robustness to label noise.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合基础模型先验知识的主动学习框架，能够在类别不平衡和标签噪声的双重挑战下，通过基础模型与小模型的协同决策，选择最具信息量的样本进行标注，在图像和文本数据集上实现超过50%的标注成本节省。
AI.motivation: 真实数据集普遍存在类别分布倾斜和标注噪声问题，尤其损害少数类性能。现有主动学习方法未能同时有效应对这两大挑战。
AI.method: 提出不平衡感知的主动学习框架，利用基础模型先验知识，让基础模型与小模型协同决策，共同选择信息量最大且类别平衡的样本进行标注。
AI.result: 在图像和文本的不平衡数据集上，相比最佳主动学习基线，标注成本节省超过50%，同时保持模型性能和对标签噪声的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次系统研究了标签噪声与类别不平衡双重挑战下的主动学习问题，提出的方法在跨领域数据集上显著降低标注成本且保持鲁棒性。

title: Culturally-Aware AI for Cross-Boundary Community Learning: Undergraduate Innovation at the Intersection of Computation and Design
summary: Research on artificial intelligence in education (AIED) is rapidly expanding, yet technical progress often lacks human-centered grounding and adequate attention to cultural context. Community-Based Learning, a pedagogy rooted in social work, remains underrepresented in AIED research, particularly within Asia-Pacific contexts. This paper reports on cross-boundary Community-Based Learning where undergraduate students develop AI-enabled solutions for cultural heritage preservation and sustainable development. We examine how community-engaged computing operationalizes human-centered AIED across three dimensions: education, technology, and culture. We contribute a collaborative framework for culturally-aware AIED that fosters multi-stakeholder collaboration while widening participation by dissolving disciplinary silos between social work and computational science.

AI.tldr: 本文报告了一项跨边界社区学习项目，本科生利用AI开发文化遗产保护和可持续发展方案，提出了一个融合教育、技术和文化三方面的文化感知AIED协作框架，打破社会工作与计算科学之间的学科壁垒。
AI.motivation: 当前AIED研究虽然快速发展，但缺乏以人为中心的根基和对文化背景的充分关注。社区学习这一源于社会工作的教学法在AIED研究中代表性不足，尤其在亚太地区，因此需要探索将社区参与计算应用于AIED的路径。
AI.method: 开展跨边界社区学习项目，让本科生开发AI驱动的文化遗产保护和可持续发展方案，从教育、技术、文化三个维度考察社区参与计算如何实现以人为本的AIED。
AI.result: 提出了一个文化感知的AIED协作框架，促进多方利益相关者协作，通过打破社会工作与计算科学之间的学科壁垒来扩大参与。
AI.conclusion: 社区参与计算能够有效实现以人为本、文化感知的AIED，跨学科合作（社会工作与计算科学）有助于推动更具包容性和文化适切性的AI教育实践。

title: EditSR: Enhancing Neural Symbolic Regression via Edit-based Rectification
summary: Neural symbolic regression models improve inference efficiency by shifting structural search to pretraining, but their one-pass autoregressive decoding is prone to error accumulation, which may lead to generating structurally incorrect expressions, especially in complex expression generation scenarios. Existing rectification strategies can alleviate this issue, but they often depend on restarting global search, thereby weakening the efficiency advantage of neural models, and remain susceptible to error accumulation. In this paper, we propose EditSR, a two-layer framework that combines a neural symbolic regression model in the first layer with an edit-based Rectifier in the second layer to achieve efficient prediction and post-hoc rectification. Instead of restarting the global search, we maintain rectification efficiency by pretraining the Rectifier. Specifically, we formulate the rectification process as a step-by-step state-transition chain starting from an incorrect expression, and develop a state-transition algorithm to construct supervised rectification chains for training the Rectifier. To ensure syntactic validity throughout rectification, each edit action is restricted to a syntactically valid space so that every edited expression remains parseable. In addition, because each edit decision is conditioned on the current state rather than the history, the Rectifier allows errors made in earlier steps to be rectified by subsequent edits, thereby reducing the risk of error accumulation. Extensive experiments and ablation studies show that EditSR substantially improves symbolic structure recovery with limited extra cost, with more pronounced gains on complex expressions, where one-pass autoregressive decoding is more susceptible to error accumulation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EditSR，一个双层框架：第一层是神经符号回归模型进行预测，第二层是基于编辑的Rectifier进行事后修正。通过预训练Rectifier而非重启全局搜索，将修正过程建模为逐步状态转移链，每个编辑操作限定在语法有效空间内，避免错误累积。实验表明EditSR以有限额外成本显著提升了符号结构恢复能力，尤其在复杂表达式上提升明显。
AI.motivation: 神经符号回归模型虽通过预训练将结构搜索转移到训练阶段提升了推理效率，但其自回归解码存在错误累积问题，尤其在复杂表达式生成中易产生结构错误的表达式。现有修正策略依赖重启全局搜索，削弱了神经模型的效率优势，且仍易受错误累积影响。
AI.method: 提出EditSR双层框架：第一层用神经符号回归模型进行高效预测；第二层用基于编辑的Rectifier进行事后修正。关键点包括：1) 将修正过程建模为从错误表达式开始的逐步状态转移链；2) 设计状态转移算法构建有监督的修正链来训练Rectifier；3) 每个编辑操作限定在语法有效空间内，保证表达式始终可解析；4) 每个编辑决策基于当前状态而非历史，允许后续编辑修正前序错误。
AI.result: 大量实验和消融研究表明，EditSR以有限的额外计算成本显著提升了符号结构恢复能力，尤其在复杂表达式上（自回归解码更易受错误累积影响的场景）提升更为明显。
AI.conclusion: EditSR通过双层架构和基于编辑的修正策略，在不牺牲效率的前提下有效缓解了神经符号回归模型中的错误累积问题，是一种高效且鲁棒的解决方案。

title: ReadingMachine: A Computational Methodology for Structured Corpus Reading and Large-Scale Synthesis
summary: ReadingMachine is a computational methodology for structured corpus reading that uses large language models to perform bounded reading operations over entire document collections. Rather than relying on retrieval or recursive summarization, the approach decomposes analysis into inspectable stages including insight extraction, semantic clustering, theme generation, and iterative omission detection. By delaying irreversible compression and explicitly tracking intermediate representations, the method prioritizes coverage, traceability, and preservation of disagreement across large corpora. The system is demonstrated on a heterogeneous corpus of 152 industrial policy documents, producing more than 17,500 extracted insights and a structured thematic map. ReadingMachine is released as an open-source experimental framework for large-scale qualitative synthesis and corpus analysis.

AI.tldr: ReadingMachine 是一种基于大语言模型的结构化语料库阅读方法，通过可检查的阶段（洞察提取、语义聚类、主题生成、遗漏检测）对大规模文档集合进行有界阅读，强调覆盖率、可追溯性和分歧保留，并在152份产业政策文档上验证，开源发布。
AI.motivation: 现有的大规模文本分析方法（如检索增强或递归摘要）往往存在不可逆压缩、覆盖率不足、难以追踪分析过程等问题，且容易丢失语料库中的分歧观点。作者希望设计一种能够结构化、可检查、且保留原始语料信息多样性的语料库阅读方法。
AI.method: 将语料分析分解为四个可检查的阶段：洞察提取（从每份文档中提取细粒度见解）、语义聚类（对提取的见解进行分组）、主题生成（从聚类中归纳高层次主题）、迭代遗漏检测（通过循环检查未覆盖的内容来保证覆盖率）。整个过程延迟不可逆压缩，并显式追踪中间表示。
AI.result: 在包含152份产业政策文档的异质语料库上，系统生成了超过17,500条提取的洞察和结构化的主题图谱，验证了方法在大规模定性综合中的可行性和覆盖率。
AI.conclusion: ReadingMachine 提供了一种替代检索和递归摘要的第三条路径，能够在大规模语料分析中兼顾覆盖率、可追溯性和分歧保留，并以开源框架形式发布，为未来质性研究和计算社会科学提供工具基础。

title: Hybrid Neural Network and Conventional Controller Approach for Robust Control of Highly Unstable Systems: Application to Tilt-Rotor Control
comment: Proceedings of the 13th RSI International Conference on Robotics and Mechatronics (ICRoM 2025)
summary: Multirotors are widely used in applications ranging from surveillance to precision agriculture, yet conventional designs remain limited by their under-actuation. Tilt-rotor configurations overcome this limitation by enabling full actuation. This paper investigates neural-network-based control strategies for a fully actuated tilt-rotor system with four thrust-vectoring inputs. Our work is structured in two parts. First, we deliberately present a negative result by evaluating a direct input-output control approach. In this method, multilayer perceptrons (MLPs), long short-term memory (LSTM) networks, and transformer models are trained to map system states and their desired values directly to control signals. We show that this strategy fails to stabilize the system, highlighting the inherent difficulty of applying direct input-output learning to highly unstable plants. Second, as the main contribution, we propose a neural-network-enhanced sliding mode controller (SMC). The method decomposes the system dynamics into input-independent and input-dependent components, with the former learned from a small dataset using lightweight networks, thereby reducing real-time computational demands. Moreover, the proposed method can be trained using flight logs collected from low-performance controllers, and the resulting dynamic model learned from real-world data can be used in simulation. We further compare MLP- and LSTM-based implementations under model uncertainties and external disturbances, demonstrating the robustness and effectiveness of the proposed approach; in particular, the controller with the LSTM plant dynamics predictor achieves superior performance to its MLP-based counterpart while also exhibiting lower runtime.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了四旋翼倾转旋翼无人机的神经网络控制策略。首先展示了直接输入输出控制方法（MLP、LSTM、Transformer）无法稳定系统这一负面结果，随后提出核心贡献：一种将系统动力学分解为输入无关和输入依赖部分的神经网络增强滑模控制器。该方法可使用低性能控制器的飞行日志训练，轻量级网络降低了实时计算需求。实验表明，LSTM预测器的控制器在鲁棒性和运行时性能上均优于MLP版本。
AI.motivation: 传统多旋翼受欠驱动限制，而倾转旋翼配置可实现完全驱动，但控制复杂。现有神经网络控制方法多直接学习输入输出映射，但高度不稳定的被控对象使得直接学习难以收敛。作者意在探索更有效的神经网络控制策略。
AI.method: 方法分为两部分：1) 负面实验：直接使用MLP、LSTM、Transformer将系统状态映射到控制信号，结果不稳定；2) 核心方法：神经网络增强滑模控制器（SMC），将动力学分解为输入无关项（用轻量网络从少量数据学习）和输入依赖项（解析已知），降低实时计算需求，可利用低性能控制器的飞行日志训练。
AI.result: 直接输入输出控制（MLP/LSTM/Transformer）无法稳定系统；所提神经网络增强SMC在模型不确定性和外部扰动下表现鲁棒，LSTM版本相比MLP版本性能更优且运行耗时更低。
AI.conclusion: 对于高度不稳定的倾转旋翼系统，直接端到端学习控制策略不可行。将神经网络与经典控制理论（SMC）结合，并通过动力学分解降低学习难度，能实现鲁棒且高效的控制。LSTM在动力学预测上优于MLP，兼具精度与效率。

title: A Topological Characterization of Graph Neural Networks via Stochastic Block Model Embeddings on the n-Sphere
summary: We propose a topological framework for comparing trained Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) by mapping the Stochastic Block Models (SBMs) induced on the graphon-signal space of a Message Passing Neural Network (MPNN) onto the unit $n$-sphere $\sphere^{n-1}\subset\R^n$. The construction rests on three classical pillars: the \emph{compactness} of the cut-distance graphon space $(\Wo,\cutdist)$ \citep{lovasz2006limits,lovasz2012large}, the Frieze--Kannan \emph{weak regularity lemma} together with its graphon-signal extension due to \citet{levie2023graphon}, and the Lipschitz continuity of MPNNs with respect to the cut-distance. We show that, for any prescribed tolerance $\varepsilon>0$, a trained MPNN $Φ$ acting on a sufficiently large graph factors (up to $\varepsilon$) through a step-graphon-signal of bounded complexity, and we construct an explicit measure-preserving map $Ψ_n\colon[0,1]\to\sphere^{n-1}$ that places the SBM regions on disjoint spherical caps. This produces a problem-agnostic, low-dimensional ``fingerprint'' of a trained GNN that is amenable to visual inspection and to nearest-neighbour search across model zoos, enabling \emph{transfer-learning candidate retrieval} without retraining. We discuss the obstruction posed by concentration of measure in high dimension -- a phenomenon directly relevant to LLM-scale embeddings. We close with five concrete future research directions: hyperbolic and Grassmannian alternatives to the spherical model, Gromov--Wasserstein distances on graphon-signals as an isometry-free alternative to the $n$-sphere map, an information-geometric (Fisher) reformulation of the SBM manifold, persistent-homology fingerprints of layer-wise embedding clouds, and a spectral-distance baseline derived from the graphon eigendecomposition.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种拓扑框架，通过将图神经网络（GNN）诱导的随机块模型（SBM）映射到单位球面上，生成GNN的低维"指纹"，支持无需重新训练的迁移学习候选检索。
AI.motivation: 现有训练好的GNN缺乏统一的比较框架，无法在模型库中高效检索可迁移的预训练模型。作者希望通过拓扑方法为不同GNN生成可比较的低维表征。
AI.method: 基于三个经典理论支柱：(1) 切距离图空间(𝒲₀, δ□)的紧致性；(2) Frieze–Kannan弱正则引理及其图-信号扩展；(3) MPNN关于切距离的Lipschitz连续性。构造保测映射Ψₙ将SBM区域映射到单位球面上不相交的球冠上。
AI.result: 对于任意ε>0，足够大图上训练的MPNN可(ε精度内)通过有界复杂度的阶梯图-信号分解，并映射到球面，形成可视觉检查、可进行最近邻搜索的低维"指纹"。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可用于跨模型库的迁移学习候选检索。指出了高维集中测度现象的障碍，并提出了五个未来方向：双曲/格拉斯曼替代模型、Gromov-Wasserstein距离、信息几何SBM流形、逐层嵌入云图的持续同调指纹、基于图谱分解的谱距离基线。

title: Optimal Control and Dissipativity of Linear Hermitian Matrix-Valued Dynamical Systems
summary: We develop a unified framework for linear-cost optimal control, finite-time optimal steering, dissipativity analysis, and zero-sum differential games for linear impulsive systems whose state is a Hermitian matrix evolving in $\mathbb{H}^{n+m}_{\succeq0}$, a class that encompasses continuous- and discrete-time linear systems and switched systems as degenerate cases, and includes the second-order moment dynamics of linear (stochastic) hybrid systems. The entire theory rests on three tools: a single \emph{key identity} relating cost, trajectory, and a dual variable, an Extended Schur complement lemma, and a Schur inner-product decomposition, applied identically to the flow integral and to each jump. These yield structurally uniform sufficient and necessary conditions, dual linear matrix inequality (LMI) characterizations, and explicit optimal policies for every problem class, on both finite and infinite horizons under time-varying assumptions (without time invariance or periodicity), together with causal dwell-time policies for the problems that admit them.

AI.tldr: 本文为埃尔米特矩阵状态演变的线性脉冲系统，建立了统一框架，涵盖最优控制、最优转向、耗散分析和零和微分博弈，基于三个核心工具（关键恒等式、扩展舒尔补引理、舒尔内积分解）给出统一的充要条件、LMI表征和显式最优策略。
AI.motivation: 现有针对线性脉冲系统的控制理论分散于不同问题领域，缺乏统一的分析框架，且对时变（非周期性）设定下的有限/无限时域问题缺少系统性处理。
AI.method: 提出三个核心工具：关键恒等式（联系成本、轨迹与对偶变量）、扩展舒尔补引理、舒尔内积分解，将其统一应用于连续流积分和每个跳变，推导结构与条件统一的方法。
AI.result: 获得了统一的充要条件、对偶LMI表征、显式最优策略，以及因果驻留时间策略，适用于有限/无限时域、时变假设下的各类问题。
AI.conclusion: 该统一框架将连续/离散时间线性系统、切换系统作为退化特例纳入，并涵盖线性（随机）混合系统的二阶矩动力学，显著扩展了理论适用范围。

title: Vessel Traffic Flow Prediction on Sparse Data via Spatio-Temporal Graph Neural Networks with a Learnable Tweedie Head
summary: Accurate vessel traffic flow prediction is crucial for smart port operations and navigational safety. However, maritime traffic flow data are often highly sparse with intermittent bursts, making robust forecasting challenging. Under such conditions, conventional spatio-temporal graph neural networks (ST-GNNs) can degrade toward conservative near-zero predictions and fail to capture non-zero activity. Although zero-inflated negative binomial (ZINB) models partially address excess zeros, their two-part formulation can still remain conservative around abrupt transitions. To address these issues, we propose a model-agnostic learnable Tweedie head that can be attached as a plug-and-play output module to arbitrary ST-GNN backbones. Instead of likelihood-based Tweedie training, which typically requires surrogate objectives, our approach optimizes the closed-form Tweedie unit deviance and predicts the mean for point forecasting while learning a node-level variance power to capture heterogeneous variability across port areas. Experiments on a maritime traffic graph constructed from real-world AIS data in the Port of Los Angeles and Long Beach show that the proposed head consistently improves RMSE across multiple ST-GNN backbones, especially on non-zero events, leading to more reliable forecasts for practical maritime traffic control.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种模型无关的Tweedie输出模块，可即插即用地附加到任意时空图神经网络上，用于解决海事交通流数据高度稀疏且间歇性突发导致的预测难题。该模块通过优化Tweedie单位偏差并预测均值点，同时学习节点级方差以捕获异构变异性，在洛杉矶港和长滩港的AIS数据实验上显著提升了多类ST-GNN骨干的RMSE，特别是对非零事件的预测。
AI.motivation: 海事交通流数据具有高度稀疏性和间歇性突发特征，传统ST-GNN在这种条件下会退化为近乎零的保守预测，无法捕捉非零活动；现有ZINB模型虽部分解决零膨胀问题，但其两部分公式在突变附近仍偏保守。
AI.method: 提出一个即插即用的Tweedie输出模块（Tweedie head），可附加到任意ST-GNN骨干上。优化封闭形式的Tweedie单位偏差（而非基于似然的替代目标），预测均值进行点预测，同时学习节点级方差参数以捕获不同港口区域的异质性变异性。
AI.result: 基于洛杉矶港和长滩港真实AIS数据构建的海事交通图上，该Tweedie head在多个ST-GNN骨干上一致提升了RMSE，尤其对非零事件的预测改进显著。
AI.conclusion: 提出的Tweedie head能有效改善海事交通流预测中稀疏和突发场景下的预测性能，是一种通用且实用的增强模块，有助于更可靠的港口交通管控。

title: Can Data Work be Reparative?
comment: To be presented at ACM FAccT, Montréal, Canada, June 25 to June 28, 2026
summary: We present an ethnographic study of an alternative approach to data work, developed by a civic-tech initiative that builds datasets for training and benchmarking online safety systems. They aim to respond to online safety concerns from a feminist perspective, by building safety datasets collaboratively with those most impacted by online harms. In this paper, we examine how this approach aims to reorient data work as a site for repair and redress, and trace the struggles they encounter in the process. Specifically, we draw attention to the challenges and tensions involved in advancing just reward for data work and collective governance of AI datasets. Examining these challenges through an STS-informed lens of reparative justice and repair, we argue that the work of repairing data work (and AI) lies, fundamentally, in resetting the ties of accountability. At a time heightened emphasis on efforts like safety evaluations and red teaming to make AI more responsible, we highlight the need to confront foundational questions about how the humans involved in these efforts relate to the datasets and systems they help produce. A reparative lens demands that we interrupt prevailing norms of data work and place at their centre, not AI or datasets, but those most harmed by the neglect, oversight and exclusion animated in the current modes of dataset production. This, we argue, offers a bold vision for responsibility and contributes towards a critical agenda for building alternative futures of data and AI practice.

AI.tldr: 本文通过民族志研究，考察了一个女权主义视角的公民科技项目如何通过协作构建安全数据集来修复数据工作中的不公正，并探讨了他们在推进集体治理和公正报酬时面临的挑战，主张修复数据工作的核心在于重新建立问责关系。
AI.motivation: 现有AI安全数据集建设往往忽视受伤害最深的群体，缺乏从女权主义和修复正义角度出发的替代性实践。作者希望揭示这种替代性数据工作如何尝试修复不公，以及其中遭遇的困难。
AI.method: 采用民族志研究方法，对一个公民科技倡议进行田野调查，该倡议以女权主义视角协作构建在线安全数据集。分析框架基于STS（科学、技术与社会）领域的修复正义与修复理论。
AI.result: 研究发现，这种替代性数据工作在推进数据工作者公正报酬和AI数据集集体治理方面面临显著挑战与张力。作者指出，修复数据工作的根本在于重新设定问责关系，而非仅仅关注技术改进。
AI.conclusion: 修复性视角要求将数据工作的中心从AI或数据集转向那些在当前数据生产模式中受到忽视、排斥和伤害的群体。这为构建AI和数据实践的未来提供了大胆的愿景，并贡献了批判性议程。

title: The CIFAR Synthetic Evidence Corpus for Detecting AI-Generated Evidence
summary: The growing ability of generative models to produce realistic documents poses a direct challenge to evidentiary workflows in the justice system and the courts, where decisions increasingly depend on the authenticity of evidence such as receipts, communications, and administrative records. Unlike social media or academic settings, evidentiary documents are often only subtly altered, with small, localized edits that preserve overall plausibility while changing legal meaning. Yet progress on automated detection remains limited, largely due to the absence of suitable training and evaluation data especially suited for the justice system requirements. Existing resources are either focused on photos of human faces or natural scenery or on narrowly scoped academic or social media document types, and do not capture the structure, diversity, or manipulation patterns characteristic of real-world evidentiary data. As a result, current detection systems do not necessarily learn meaningful signals appropriate for the justice system. We introduce the CIFAR Synthetic Evidence Corpus, a dataset designed to enable rigorous evaluation of evidence verification under realistic and controlled conditions. The corpus spans multiple document families and a spectrum of manipulation strategies, from small field-level edits to complete document fabrication, and is constructed using a diverse set of state-of-the-art generative tools. It is organized to systematically vary both manipulation complexity and generation method, while enforcing source-level separation between training and test data to reflect real-world generalization challenges.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了CIFAR Synthetic Evidence Corpus数据集，旨在解决司法系统中生成式文档检测的难题。该数据集包含多种文档类型和从局部编辑到完全伪造的多种篡改策略，使用多种生成工具构建，并严格区分训练集和测试集，以支持司法证据真实性验证的评估。
AI.motivation: 生成模型能产生逼真文档，对司法系统中的证据真实性构成挑战。现有检测数据集多聚焦人脸、自然场景或学术社交媒体文档，缺乏针对司法证据结构、多样性和篡改模式的数据。当前检测系统难以学到适合司法场景的有意义信号。
AI.method: 构建CIFAR Synthetic Evidence Corpus数据集，涵盖多种文档族和从局部字段编辑到完全文档生成的多种篡改策略，使用多种先进生成工具构建，并系统变化操纵复杂度和生成方法，同时保证训练和测试数据在源级别分离。
AI.result: 生成了一个专门针对司法证据验证需求的数据集，支持在真实且受控的条件下进行严格评估。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集填补了司法领域文档真实性检测评估数据的空白，有望推动更适合司法系统的检测方法发展。

title: Unlocking Latent Value: Taxonomy-Guided Recovery of High-Performing Data from Low-Tier Web Corpora
summary: Dominant web data curation pipelines for pretraining collapse document quality into a single composite score, systematically missing high-value content along dimensions the scorer underweights. We present a taxonomy-driven framework that recovers this value by filtering along semantically meaningful dimensions that composite scores fail to capture. First, building on the ESSENTIAL-WEB taxonomy, we introduce two novel dimensions: timeliness and cultural specificity, both of which show low pairwise NMI with existing ones. We annotate 14M documents using Qwen2.5 32B and distill into a lightweight 0.5B model. To enable rapid corpus-wide annotation, we additionally train a 73M multi-task MLP on E5 embeddings, achieving 50x inference throughput. Second, to navigate the combinatorial explosion of filter configurations, we introduce a compute-efficient two-pass framework: Pass 1 identifies the strongest dimension signals at small scale; Pass 2 constructs and evaluates conjunctive and disjunctive compound filters from the top performers - identifying high-performing configurations at a fraction of full scaling-law cost. Applying the selected filters to deprioritized web data, taxonomy-filtered subsets outperform their unfiltered baselines and even surpass the highest-quality tier. On mid-tier data, our best filter improves over its unfiltered baseline by 12.1% on reasoning, 9.5% on coding, and 2.0% on knowledge benchmarks, exceeding unfiltered top-tier data by 6.7% on reasoning and 13.7% on coding. Furthermore, filtered data from two tiers below the typical production threshold improves by 22.3% on reasoning and 19.5% on coding over its unfiltered baseline, surpassing top-tier data on coding benchmarks. These results establish that vast latent value remains locked in deprioritized web data, and that multi-dimensional taxonomy filtering is a principled, compute-efficient key to unlocking it.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多维分类法的网页数据过滤框架，通过引入时效性和文化特异性两个新维度，结合两阶段筛选策略，有效从低优先级网页数据中挖掘出高质量内容，在推理和编码任务上显著超越原始高优先级数据。
AI.motivation: 现有的网页数据筛选管线将文档质量压缩为单一综合分数，系统性地遗漏了高分维度下未充分衡量的高价值内容。
AI.method: 1) 基于ESSENTIAL-WEB分类法，引入时效性和文化特异性两个新维度；2) 用Qwen2.5 32B标注1400万文档，蒸馏为0.5B轻量模型，并训练73M多任务MLP以提升推理吞吐量50倍；3) 提出两阶段筛选框架：Pass 1在小规模下识别最强维度信号，Pass 2构建并评估组合过滤器。
AI.result: 在中档数据上，最佳过滤器在推理、编程和知识基准上分别提升12.1%、9.5%和2.0%，甚至超过未过滤的高档数据（推理+6.7%，编程+13.7%）。低两档的数据经筛选后，推理提升22.3%，编程提升19.5%，在编程任务上超越高档数据。
AI.conclusion: 低优先级网页数据中仍蕴藏大量潜在价值，多维分类法过滤是一种原理清晰、计算高效的关键解锁手段。

title: Some Essential Constructive Foundations for Systems and Control
summary: This work develops several constructive foundations for systems and control within Bishop-style constructive mathematics. For an engineer, the guiding principle is that an object claimed to exist, such as a trajectory, an optimal control law, a selector, or a viable solution, should come with finite data and an operation computing approximations to any prescribed precision. The style remains close to classical analysis, but existential statements are organized so that their computational content is visible. The paper begins with elementary geometric data in finite-dimensional Euclidean spaces: blocks, multiblocks, representable sets, regular functions, and certified integrals. This set-first integration route is meant to complement, rather than replace, abstract constructive integration theories such as Daniell-type or integration-space approaches. The developed apparatus is then applied to a constructive functional extremum-value theorem, selector extraction for multifunctions, Filippov-type and viable solutions of differential inclusions, regular probability densities, controlled Markov chains, and empirical density certificates. A short account of resolvent projectors and linear stability is included for completeness.

AI.tldr: 本文在Bishop-style构造性数学框架下，为系统与控制理论建立了构造性基础，强调存在性应伴随有限数据与可计算近似，并通过几何积木、表示集、正则函数等工具，应用于极值定理、选择子提取、微分包含解、可控马尔可夫链等问题。
AI.motivation: 经典系统与控制理论中的存在性断言（如轨迹、最优控制律、选择子、可行解）往往不提供显式构造或有限计算数据，工程师无法直接获得可计算逼近。作者旨在将这些断言组织为具有可见计算内容的形式，弥合理论存在性与工程可实现性之间的鸿沟。
AI.method: 采用Bishop-style构造性数学风格，从有限维欧氏空间的基本几何对象（积木、多积木、表示集、正则函数、认证积分）出发，建立"集合优先"的积分路线；然后将该工具应用于构造性泛函极值定理、多值函数选择子提取、Filippov型与可行解微分包含、正则概率密度、可控马尔可夫链及经验密度认证等问题；并简要讨论了预解投影与线性稳定性。
AI.result: 在构造性数学框架下，成功建立了系统与控制理论的一系列构造性基础，包括：构造性极值定理、多值函数选择子的构造性提取、微分包含的Filippov型解与可行解的存在性构造、正则概率密度的构造性表示、可控马尔可夫链的构造性分析，以及经验密度认证的构造性方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文展示了Bishop-style构造性分析为系统与控制理论提供了一种可行且实用的构造性基础，使得存在性断言天然携带计算内容，能够指导工程师进行有限精度逼近。所发展的几何-积分路线可作为抽象构造性积分理论的补充，并为后续构造性控制理论的研究奠定基础。

title: DiffoR: A Unified Continuous Generative Framework for Universal Ordinal Regression
summary: Ordinal Regression (OR) aims to predict target values with inherent order, underpinning critical applications across diverse domains, from recommender systems to computer vision. Though having evolved from naive regression to discretization-based classification and generation, existing paradigms remain fundamentally constrained by quantization artifacts and the lack of global ordinal topological perception. These methods typically enforce rigid boundary delineations, failing to capture the non-stationary semantic transitions inherent to ordinal data. In this paper, we propose a novel paradigm where OR is formulated as a Continuous Generative Ordinal Regression task. Under the novel paradigm, we introduce DiffOR, a unified framework that leverages diffusion models to recover continuous ordinal values via iterative denoising, thereby enabling the dynamic learning of soft semantic transitions. To explicitly preserve ordinal topology, we devise a Dual-Decoupling Strategy: Spatially, Multi-scale Increment Aggregation decomposes targets into hierarchical continuous increments; Temporally, Dynamic Denoising Perception synchronizes denoising steps with feature frequencies, ensuring robust coarse-to-fine refinement. Theoretically, we show that the proposed method can significantly enhance both representation capability and mechanistic interpretability. Extensive experiments on 12 benchmarks across four domains validate DiffOR's consistent superiority over state-of-the-art methods, establishing a new standard that demonstrates strong potential as a general-purpose solution for universal ordinal regression.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DiffOR框架，将序数回归建模为连续生成任务，利用扩散模型通过迭代去噪恢复连续序数值，并设计双解耦策略保留序数拓扑结构，在12个基准数据集上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有序数回归方法受限于量化伪影和缺乏全局序数拓扑感知，难以捕捉序数数据中非平稳的语义过渡。
AI.method: 提出连续生成式序数回归范式，构建DiffOR框架：利用扩散模型进行迭代去噪恢复连续序数值；设计双解耦策略（空间上多尺度增量聚合分解目标为层次连续增量，时间上动态去噪感知同步去噪步与特征频率）以保留序数拓扑。
AI.result: 在12个基准数据集（跨4个领域）上，DiffOR一致优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: DiffOR建立了序数回归的新标准，展现了作为通用解决方案的潜力，增强了表示能力和机制可解释性。

title: Not All Warm Starts Help: Benchmarking Primal-Dual Initializations for ACOPF Algorithms
summary: Warm starts are widely used to accelerate AC optimal power flow (ACOPF) solves, but the impact of different initialization strategies has received limited systematic study, particularly for the primal-dual interior-point methods that dominate large-scale ACOPF algorithms. This paper benchmarks initialization strategies for ACOPF solved with the interior-point solver IPOPT on 19 PGLib-OPF instances (5 to 30,000 buses), testing all 15 non-empty subsets of the primal blocks $\{P_g, Q_g, V_m, V_a\}$ under oracle conditions and three DC-seeded combinations in a practical setting. The experiments show that most partial primal-plus-dual restarts increase solve time or reduce convergence reliability. Among the oracle primal-plus-dual (O-PD) configurations, only the complete restart reliably converges on every baseline-convergent case, reaching a $47.6\%$ median solve-time speedup. Twelve of the 14 partial O-PD combinations have negative median speedups, and several fail repeatedly on larger networks. Decomposing the dual into constraint and bound multipliers shows that \emph{coverage}, not the presence of duals per se, governs robustness: the full bound-multiplier vector reaches 90.7\% convergence and a $+26.8$\% median speedup, whereas block-matched coverage (oracle multipliers on some bounds, defaults on the rest) drops to 70.4\% and $-31.1$\%. Practical DC seeding sometimes helps the AC solve, but the benefit is no longer statistically significant once the DCOPF presolve cost is included in the end-to-end comparison ($p = 0.4171$). For learned warm-start methods, the results support the following target ordering: predict the full primal vector first; if only partial coverage is possible, prioritize voltage variables; and avoid partial or inconsistent dual predictions unless the primal estimate is nearly complete.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了AC最优潮流问题中用于内点法求解器的不同初始化策略，发现大多数部分热启动反而会降低性能，只有完整重启可靠且带来47.6%的中位加速；双变量的覆盖完整性比存在性更重要；DC预求解的端到端收益不显著。
AI.motivation: 尽管热启动被广泛用于加速ACOPF求解，但不同初始化策略（尤其是针对大规模问题中主流的原对偶内点法）的系统性影响研究非常有限。
AI.method: 在19个PGLib-OPF实例（5~30,000节点）上使用IPOPT求解器，测试了所有15种非空原变量子集（在Oracle条件下）以及三种DC组合策略（在实际条件下）的初始化方案，并分解对偶变量为约束乘子和边界乘子以分析覆盖性影响。
AI.result: 完整重启可靠收敛且中位加速47.6%；14种部分原对偶组合中有12种中位加速为负；完整边界乘子向量达到90.7%收敛率和+26.8%中位加速，而块匹配覆盖降至70.4%和-31.1%；DC预求解的端到端收益统计不显著（p=0.4171）。
AI.conclusion: 建议学习型热启动方法优先预测完整原变量向量；若只能部分覆盖，优先电压变量；避免部分或不一致的对偶预测，除非原变量估计近乎完整。

title: A Framework for Evaluating and Benchmarking Concept Drift Detection Methods
summary: Data stream mining is fundamentally challenged by concept drift, where distributional changes can degrade model performance. Despite the proliferation of drift detection methods, progress in the field is hindered by inconsistent evaluation practices: studies rely on oversimplified synthetic data generators, adopt incompatible metrics, and lack transparency in hyperparameter selection, making fair comparisons difficult. We address this gap with a novel benchmarking framework comprising three contributions: (1) a drift simulation method that injects controlled distributional changes into real-world datasets via Monte Carlo trials, enabling supervised evaluation while preserving real-world data complexity; (2) an evaluation protocol for drift detection with timing-aware criteria, including the derivation of new metrics (e.g., F1 detection score, normalized detection time) that are comparable across streams; and (3) we advocate for a leave-one-dataset-out hyperparameter optimization protocol for drift detection methods that promotes configuration robustness across heterogeneous stream dynamics. We benchmark 14 widely used drift detection methods on 7 realworld datasets across 4 drift types (class prior, label swap, feature permutation, feature filtering), each under both abrupt and gradual transitions. Our experimental results provide insights into the strengths and weaknesses of current drift detection approaches while establishing baseline performance metrics for future research in this area. All code and experiments are publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一套针对数据流概念漂移检测的标准化基准测试框架，包含基于蒙特卡洛的真实数据漂移模拟方法、时序感知评估协议和新指标（如F1检测分、归一化检测时间）、以及留一数据集超参数优化协议。在7个真实数据集、4种漂移类型、2种过渡模式下对14种漂移检测方法进行了系统评估。
AI.motivation: 现有漂移检测研究存在评估标准不一致的问题：依赖过于简化的合成数据生成器、采用不兼容的评估指标、超参数选择缺乏透明度，导致方法之间难以进行公平比较。
AI.method: (1) 蒙特卡洛漂移模拟：向真实数据注入可控分布变化；(2) 时序感知评估协议：提出F1检测分、归一化检测时间等新指标；(3) 留一数据集超参数优化：跨不同动态特性的数据流提升配置鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在7个真实数据集、4种漂移类型（类别先验、标签交换、特征置换、特征过滤）、2种过渡模式（突变和渐变）下，对14种漂移检测方法进行了基准测试，提供了各方法的性能基线。
AI.conclusion: 该框架解决了漂移检测领域缺乏标准化评估的问题，为未来研究提供了可复现的基准方法和性能参考。

title: Interpretable Crisis Behavior Analysis Using Mobility and Social Media Data
summary: Crises alter both how people move and how they communicate. During emergencies such as wildfires and pandemics, changes in mobility patterns and online emotional discourse evolve jointly, yet they are typically studied in isolation. This paper presents a unified and interpretable pipeline that integrates mobility and social media data to identify cross-domain behavioral patterns in crisis settings. The framework is evaluated through two case studies: a short-horizon analysis of the January 2025 Los Angeles wildfires (prototype case) and a longitudinal analysis of UAE COVID-19 behavior from March 2020 to December 2021 (primary case, 671 days). The pipeline aligns heterogeneous daily signals, transforms them into binary behavioral states, applies Formal Concept Analysis (FCA) to extract co-occurrence structure, mines association rules, and validates rule stability through chronological holdout testing. A structured policy-translation layer renders robust rules as operational briefs specifying triggers, lead times, and action playbooks. Results reveal clear cross-domain behavioral structure in both crises. In the wildfire case, traffic stress, fear/anger sentiment, and governance discourse are tightly coupled within a 33-day window, with key rules reaching 100\% confidence and lift scores up to 2.5. In the COVID case, repeated mobility adaptation and sentiment volatility yield 8 stable same-day rules (88\% holdout pass rate) and 40 clean predictive rules with 2--7 day lead horizons. The work demonstrates that interpretable multimodal fusion can produce both scientifically credible and policy-actionable crisis intelligence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个融合移动数据与社交媒体数据的可解释分析管道，通过两个案例（洛杉矶 wildfires 和阿联酋 COVID-19）验证了跨领域危机行为模式的提取与策略转化能力。
AI.motivation: 危机期间人口移动模式与在线情绪表达会共同演变，但现有研究通常将两者割裂分析，缺乏统一、可解释的跨领域行为识别框架。
AI.method: 提出一个可解释管道：对齐异构日级信号 → 转化为二元行为状态 → 应用形式概念分析（FCA）提取共现结构 → 挖掘关联规则 → 通过时序留出检验验证规则稳定性 → 将稳健规则转化为策略简报。
AI.result: 在洛杉矶 wildfires 案例中，交通压力、恐惧/愤怒情绪与治理话题在33天内紧密耦合，规则置信度达100%，提升度达2.5。在COVID案例中，获得8条稳定同日规则（留出通过率88%）和40条预测性规则（2-7天超前）。
AI.conclusion: 可解释的多模态融合方法能够生成既具有科学可信度又具备政策可操作性的危机智能分析结果。

title: Stress-testing medical large language models reveals latent safety pathology beyond benchmark accuracy
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are entering clinical practice based on benchmark accuracy that may fail to detect safety-relevant failure modes. Here we present AI-MASLD, a stress-audit framework that adapts the logic of metabolic stress testing from hepatology to the evaluation of clinical LLMs. Using 240 clinical cases across six narrative perturbation probes, we subjected seven models to double-stress testing and quantified performance through three indices: metabolic index (MI), perturbation flip rate (PFR), and counterfactual fairness index (CFI). Under clean baseline conditions, all models performed uniformly well. Under realistic narrative stress, performance diverged sharply, revealing two distinct stress-response phenotypes. Quantized models exhibited pseudonormalization, in which low flip rates hid functional collapse. Medical supervised fine-tuning systematically degraded logical stability, fairness, and information extraction. An open-weight model matched or exceeded proprietary alternatives on every safety dimension. These findings establish narrative stress auditing as a necessary complement to accuracy-based evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AI-MASLD框架，通过对临床LLM进行叙事压力测试，发现所有模型在基线条件下表现良好，但在压力测试下性能出现显著分化，揭示了量化模型的伪正常化和医学微调带来的安全性下降等问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于准确率的基准测试无法检测临床LLM中可能危及安全性的失效模式，需要更严格的评估方法。
AI.method: 提出了AI-MASLD压力审计框架，利用240个临床案例和6种叙事扰动探针对7个模型进行双重压力测试，通过代谢指数(MI)、扰动翻转率(PFR)和反事实公平指数(CFI)三个指标量化性能。
AI.result: 基线条件下所有模型表现一致良好；叙事压力下性能显著分化，出现两种压力反应表型；量化模型出现伪正常化；医学监督微调系统性降低了逻辑稳定性、公平性和信息提取能力；开放权重模型在所有安全维度上匹配或超越专有模型。
AI.conclusion: 叙事压力审计应成为基于准确率评估的必要补充，以更全面地评估临床LLM的安全性。

title: Evaluating RAG Reliability under Clean, Misleading, and Mixed Retrieval
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) is widely used to improve the factual reliability of large language models (LLMs) by grounding answers in retrieved evidence. In misinformation-rich environments, however, retrieved content may include plausible but incorrect information, raising concerns about the reliability of RAG-based information access systems. In this work, we propose an evaluation protocol to systematically test how the RAG system handles conflicts between parametric knowledge and evidence retrieved from context with varying amounts of misleading information. We target correct answers to factoid questions that the model responds to correctly, even when there is no retrieval, and use this to test the system with clean, poisoned, and mixed evidence. The proposed analytical framework combines parametric override and confidence metrics to assess when and how misleading information affects the generation process of LLMs. This study aims to provide insights into the robustness of RAG systems in information disorder scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种评估协议，系统测试检索增强生成（RAG）系统在面临参数化知识与包含误导信息的检索证据产生冲突时的表现。通过分析干净、污染和混合证据下的覆盖率和置信度指标，研究揭示了误导信息何时及如何影响LLM的生成过程。
AI.motivation: 在信息混乱环境下，RAG系统检索到的内容可能包含看似合理但不正确的信息，这引发了对其可靠性的担忧。现有研究缺乏对RAG系统在误导信息干扰下鲁棒性的系统评估。
AI.method: 提出评估协议：针对模型在无检索时能正确回答的事实性问题，分别测试干净证据、污染证据和混合证据下的系统表现。结合参数化知识覆盖率和置信度指标，分析误导信息对生成过程的影响。
AI.result: 通过系统性测试，揭示了在信息混乱场景下RAG系统的脆弱性，量化了误导信息对参数化知识与检索证据冲突时的影响程度。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为理解RAG系统在信息混乱环境下的鲁棒性提供了见解，强调了需要对检索证据质量进行更严格的把控。

title: Energy Storage as a Multi-Use Asset: Applications Across the Power System
comment: Manuscript submitted to the Grid Services & Markets Conference (GSM 2026)
summary: The energy transition in power systems requires flexible assets to offset renewable generation variability across multiple time scales, while supporting the integration of renewables and the electrification of demand without requiring costly grid reinforcement. Energy storage occupies a unique position among these assets: depending on the technology, it can provide short-duration grid services at high ramping rates, such as frequency regulation and voltage support, longer-duration functions such as intra-day peak shaving, or inter-seasonal energy buffering. This multi-service character, combined with the declining costs of energy storage technologies (most notably that of battery energy storage systems), is central to the economic viability of storage investments. The value of a given installation depends strongly on its grid connection point and intended use case: an asset-coupled battery serving a consumer or generation plant faces a different service landscape, and therefore a different business case, than a network-coupled system operating as an independent grid resource. This paper presents a structured taxonomy of grid-connected energy storage applications, discusses the principal application domains, and describes the key challenges that must be addressed to integrate storage effectively into power systems. Services are discussed with special emphasis on the Swiss regulatory context. Finally, the STORE flagship project supported by the Swiss Innovation Agency (Innosuisse), where some of the critical challenges of energy storage integration in power grids are addressed, is introduced.

AI.tldr: 本文系统梳理了电网储能技术的应用分类，讨论了储能系统在支持可再生能源并网、需求电气化以及避免昂贵电网扩建方面的关键作用，并以瑞士监管背景为例，介绍了STORE旗舰项目应对储能集成挑战的研究思路。
AI.motivation: 能源转型背景下，电力系统需要灵活资源来平衡可再生能源发电的波动性，而储能因其多时间尺度服务能力（从秒级调频到季节性调峰）和成本下降趋势，成为关键灵活性资产。但储能的商业可行性高度依赖接入点和应用场景，缺乏统一分类框架来指导投资和集成。
AI.method: 论文提出一种结构化的电网储能应用分类法，从服务时间尺度、接入点类型（资产侧耦合vs.网络侧独立）等维度划分应用域，并结合瑞士监管环境进行特殊讨论。
AI.result: 给出储能应用的结构化分类框架，明确了不同场景（用户侧、发电侧、电网侧）的服务组合差异和商业模式区别。
AI.conclusion: 储能集成面临的关键挑战需要在监管、市场设计和电网规划层面协同解决；瑞士STORE项目正在针对性攻克部分核心难题。

title: Reachability and asymptotics of Gaussian Transformer dynamics
summary:
We formulate data propagation through the Transformer, the machine learning architecture powering large language models, as a nonlinear control system on the space of probability measures. For the mean-field Transformer model with self-attention and affine feed-forward layers, we prove that Gaussian distributions remain exactly Gaussian along the induced flow. This invariance reduces the infinite-dimensional measure dynamics to a finite-dimensional bilinear control system governing the evolution of the mean and covariance, reformulates the expressive capacity of Transformers as a reachability problem for prescribed Gaussian moments, and reveals a novel connection with Riccati-type equations from classical filtering and control.
  For time-varying controls, we prove exact finite-time reachability of any target Gaussian distribution whose covariance matrix has the same rank as the initial one, this rank constraint being an intrinsic invariant of the dynamics. For time-invariant parameters, we derive explicit spectral conditions leading either to asymptotic stability toward positive-definite equilibria or to finite-time blow-up of the covariance.
  Numerical experiments complement the theory by showing that practical Transformers with Gaussian inputs remain close to moment-matched Gaussian distributions through early and intermediate layers, while Transformers with prescribed attention matrices reproduce the predicted covariance regimes: bounded evolution in stabilizing configurations and blow-up in destabilizing ones.

AI.tldr: 本文从控制论视角将Transformer视为概率测度空间上的非线性控制系统，证明高斯分布在自注意力机制下保持高斯形式不变性，从而将无限维测度动力学降维为有限维双线性控制系统，并揭示了与Riccati方程的联系。
AI.motivation: 将Transformer表征为概率测度空间上的非线性控制系统，利用高斯不变性简化分析，揭示Transformer表达能力与经典控制理论的深层联系。
AI.method: 建立了平均场Transformer模型（含自注意力与仿射前馈层），证明高斯分布在流作用下保持高斯形式；导出均值和协方差的有限维双线性控制动力学；利用可控性分析和谱方法研究可达性与稳定性。
AI.result: 时变控制下，可精确有限时间到达任意秩相同的目标高斯分布；时不变参数下，给出导致协方差渐近稳定或有限时间爆发的谱条件；数值实验验证了理论预测。
AI.conclusion: Transformer的数据传播可简化为均值-协方差的控制问题，其表达能力受秩约束限制，与Riccati方程存在深刻联系，为理解Transformer动力学提供了新视角。

title: Time-Varying Perturbations of Contractive Systems With an Application to Safe Stabilization
summary: Perturbation theory for asymptotically stable systems has received sustained attention, leading to many criteria that preserve stability under uncertainty. A limitation of classical stability analysis, however, is that it is inherently equilibrium-dependent. Contractive systems, by contrast, are defined independently of any equilibrium and admit a rich set of robustness bounds. In this letter, we develop new time-varying perturbation conditions for contractive dynamics that preserve incremental exponential stability of the perturbed system and, in specific regimes, guarantee asymptotic convergence to solutions of the nominal dynamics. As an application, we propose a safety filter for steering a nominally contractive system to a desired equilibrium while avoiding an unsafe set, and we present an example illustrating advantages of the proposed method over existing approaches.

AI.tldr: 本文针对收缩动力学系统提出了新的时变扰动条件，确保扰动系统保持增量指数稳定性，并在特定条件下渐近收敛到名义动力学的解。作为应用，设计了安全滤波器，在避免不安全集合的同时将名义收缩系统引导至期望平衡点。
AI.motivation: 经典稳定性分析依赖于平衡点，具有局限性；而收缩系统独立于平衡点定义，具有丰富的鲁棒性边界。本文旨在发展针对收缩动力学的时变扰动理论，填补现有扰动分析在非平衡点依赖场景下的空白。
AI.method: 提出了新的时变扰动条件，保证扰动后的收缩系统仍然保持增量指数稳定性；在特定条件下，确保系统渐近收敛到名义动力学的解。并基于此设计了安全滤波器。
AI.result: 所提出的时变扰动条件能够有效保持收缩系统的增量指数稳定性，并在特定场景下保证收敛到名义解。安全滤波器在仿真示例中优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文为收缩动力学系统提供了不依赖平衡点的鲁棒性分析工具，拓展了经典扰动理论的适用范围；提出的安全滤波器在工程应用中具有优势。

title: Instrumented data for causal scientific machine learning
summary: Scientific machine learning is limited less by model size than by the data it is trained on. Observational data records what happened but not why; template synthetic data has a known generating process but only for the simulator's template, not the case a user faces. We argue a third option is now operationally feasible: instrumented data, in which every datum carries the mechanistic model that produced it, an explicit uncertainty over that model, and an executable family of counterfactuals. Verification-and-validation (V&V) instrumented image-to-simulation pipelines are one realisation: a sensor observation becomes a fully specified, solver-backed simulation with explicit, editable parameters and a propagated aleatoric/epistemic uncertainty. The substrate is case-specific, mechanistically supervised, and supports causal interventions through Pearl's do-operator. Near-term consequences for validation, auditing, and surrogate training span computational biology, climate, materials, fluid mechanics, and medical imaging; a longer-term, falsifiable implication concerns foundation models for scientific reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"仪器化数据"作为科学机器学习中继观测数据和模板合成数据之后的第三种数据范式：每个数据点附带其生成机制模型、显式不确定性及可执行反事实族，通过V&V仪器化图像到模拟流水线实现，支持因果干预，在多个科学领域有直接应用价值。
AI.motivation: 科学机器学习受限于数据而非模型规模：观测数据只有记录而无因果解释，模板合成数据受限于模拟器模板而非用户面对的真实案例，缺乏第三种可行数据范式。
AI.method: 提出"仪器化数据"范式，通过验证与确认（V&V）仪器化图像到模拟流水线实现：传感器观测转化为完整的、求解器支持的模拟，具有显式可编辑参数、传播的偶然性/认知不确定性，并通过Pearl的do-算子支持因果干预。
AI.result: 该数据范式在验证、审计和代理训练方面有近期影响，适用于计算生物学、气候、材料、流体力学和医学影像等领域；长期可证伪含义涉及科学推理的基础模型。
AI.conclusion: 仪器化数据在操作上可行，作为第三种数据范式能弥补观测数据和模板合成数据的不足，为科学ML提供案例特定、机制监督且支持因果推理的数据基础。

title: I Was Scrolling and Then I Saw a Pregnant Strawberry
summary: AI minidramas (also known as fruit dramas) are short, algorithmically distributed generative AI video series featuring anthropomorphized characters that have recently emerged as a widespread phenomenon on social media platforms. This paper argues that despite their seemingly innocuous aesthetic, these videos reproduce deeply gendered narrative structures in which female characters are systematically associated with moral transgression, sexual betrayal, and reproductive capacity, and that several plots also encode the logic of racialization, i.e., the process by which visible bodily difference is morally loaded. Drawing on feminist film theory, critical race theory, and platform studies, it further argues that the generative AI aesthetic of these videos, characterized by softness, roundness, and visual cuteness, functions as a mechanism of aesthetic laundering, neutralizing the ideological weight of these narratives and enabling their circulation despite content moderation systems. This paper approaches these questions through personal observation and close reading, reflecting on the specific affordances of generative AI that make this phenomenon both possible and culturally consequential for the field of computational creativity.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了AI迷你剧（水果剧）如何通过生成式AI的美学特征（柔软、圆润、可爱）进行"审美洗白"，掩盖其背后系统性的性别歧视叙事（女性与道德越轨、性背叛、生殖能力关联）和种族化逻辑，使其得以在社交媒体平台广泛传播。
AI.motivation: 揭示看似无害的AI迷你剧背后隐藏的性别和种族意识形态，指出生成式AI美学如何成为"审美洗白"机制，使这些有问题的叙事能够规避内容审核系统而广泛传播。
AI.method: 采用个人观察与细读法，结合女性主义电影理论、批判种族理论和平台研究进行跨学科分析。
AI.result: 发现AI迷你剧系统性地将女性角色与道德越轨、性背叛和生殖能力相关联，并编码了种族化逻辑；其生成式AI美学特征（软、圆、可爱）起到了掩盖意识形态重量的作用。
AI.conclusion: 生成式AI的美学特征并非中性，而是作为一种"审美洗白"机制，使得性别歧视和种族化的叙事能够在平台上顺畅流通，这对计算创意领域具有重要的文化后果。

title: Unification of Closed-Open Industrial Detection Scenarios: New Large-Scale Benchmarks,Challenges and Baselines
summary: Large-scale Visual-Language Models (LVLMs) have achieved remarkable success in natural visual tasks, yet their application to industrial defect detection remains challenging due to two fundamental limitations: (i) the scarcity of large-scale industrial datasets that cover diverse defect categories across multiple domains, and (ii) the reliance on manual prompts (points, boxes, masks) that introduce subjective noise and lack text-visual interaction for fine-grained understanding. To address these challenges, we introduce a Large-Scale Multi-Modal Industrial Open-Closed benchmark (MMIOC-1M) containing over one million samples across $14$ super-categories, $29$ industrial scenes, and $351$ defect subcategories. To our knowledge, MMIOC-1M is the first unified largest benchmark supporting both open-vocabulary and closed-set industrial detection, providing valuable pre-training data for LVLMs in industrial scenarios. Furthermore, we propose a Refined Text-Visual Prompt Network (RTVPNet) that incorporates three key innovations: (1) an expert-assisted domain projection mechanism that enables rapid adaptation of general vision models to industrial domains, (2) an energy-based sparse sampling strategy that automatically generates refined visual prompts without manual intervention, and (3) a bidirectional text-visual interaction module that enhances cross-modal semantic alignment and understanding. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RTVPNet achieves state-of-the-art performance on MMIOC-1M, LVIS, and COCO benchmarks while maintaining computational efficiency. The dataset and code are available at https://github.com/hellozzk/MMIO.

AI.tldr: 本文提出大规模多模态工业开放-封闭基准MMIOC-1M（含100万+样本、14超类、29场景、351缺陷子类），并设计精炼文本-视觉提示网络RTVPNet（含专家辅助领域映射、能量稀疏采样、双向文本-视觉交互），在工业缺陷检测任务上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有LVLM在工业缺陷检测中面临两大局限：缺乏覆盖多领域、多类别的大规模工业数据集，以及依赖人工提示（点、框、掩码）引入主观噪声且缺乏文本-视觉细粒度交互。
AI.method: (1) MMIOC-1M基准：首个统一支持开放词汇和封闭集工业检测的大规模多模态基准；(2) RTVPNet网络：包含专家辅助领域投影（快速适配工业域）、能量稀疏采样（自动生成视觉提示）和双向文本-视觉交互（增强跨模态对齐）。
AI.result: 在MMIOC-1M、LVIS、COCO基准上达到SOTA性能，同时保持计算效率。
AI.conclusion: 通过大规模基准和精炼提示网络，有效解决了工业缺陷检测中数据稀缺和人工提示噪声问题，推动LVLM在工业场景的实际应用。

title: SLMJury: Can Small Language Models Judge as Well as Large Ones?
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are widely used as judges for evaluating model outputs, but their high cost, latency, and opacity limit scalability. We introduce SLMJury, a framework for evaluating small language models (SLMs) as judges across two paradigms: closed-ended binary correctness and open-ended quality scoring. We benchmark 16 SLM judges (0.6B-14B parameters) from four model families across ten benchmarks: eight closed-ended tasks spanning mathematical, scientific, and general reasoning (N=64,824 judgments per configuration), plus SummEval and MT-Bench for summarization and conversational scoring. We formalize judging as a budget-conditioned function and study five dimensions. Four findings emerge. (1) The overthinking effect is domain-dependent: for most judges quick 10-token verdicts match or beat extended reasoning on mathematical judging (by 2-7% where they help), while reasoning wins on general tasks by up to 23%. (2) Domain generalization separates model families, with math-to-general accuracy gaps ranging from under 10% to nearly 40%. (3) Closed-ended and open-ended judging draw on different capabilities: the best binary judge (Phi-4) drops to rank 9 on MT-Bench, while reasoning-trained models invert this ordering. (4) Under the Reflect-Critique-Refine (RCR) debate protocol, multi-agent debate degrades accuracy across all tested configurations, whereas the top judges resist six adversarial personas with <=0.55% variance. Reliable automated evaluation does not require large proprietary models, yet no single SLM dominates. The leaderboard is available at https://anishh15.github.io/SLMJury/, and our framework code and pip package are publicly available at https://github.com/anishh15/SLMJury and https://pypi.org/project/slmjury/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SLMJury框架，系统评估小语言模型（SLMs）作为裁判的能力，涵盖闭端二元正确性和开端质量评分两种范式。在16个SLM裁判、10个基准测试上，发现：(1) 过度思考效应与领域相关；(2) 领域泛化能力因模型家族而异；(3) 闭端与开端评判依赖不同能力；(4) 多智能体辩论降低准确性，而顶级裁判能抵抗对抗性提示。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型（LLMs）作为裁判虽广泛使用，但成本高、延迟大且不透明，限制了可扩展性。因此，作者探索更小、更高效的SLM作为替代裁判的可能性，并系统评估其效果。
AI.method: 提出SLMJury框架，定义两种评判范式：闭端二元正确性（如数学、科学推理）和开端质量评分（如摘要、对话质量）。在10个基准上评估16个SLM（0.6B-14B参数），并引入RCR辩论协议和对抗性测试。
AI.result: (1) 快速决策（10 token）在数学评判上优于或持平长推理（提升2-7%），而长推理在通用任务上最高提升23%。(2) 数学到通用任务的准确率差距从<10%到近40%。(3) 闭端最佳裁判Phi-4在MT-Bench上跌至第9，推理训练模型则反转此排序。(4) RCR多智能体辩论在所有配置下降低准确性，顶级裁判对抗6种对抗性提示的方差≤0.55%。
AI.conclusion: 可靠的自动化评估不需要大型专有模型，但没有任何单一SLM在所有维度上占优。SLMJury框架和评测榜单已公开。

title: Adaptive Model Predictive Control of Nonlinear Generic Urban Air Mobility Using Linear Parameter-Varying Systems
comment: This paper was accepted for presentation at the Vertical Flight Society's 82nd Annual Forum & Technology Display, West Palm Beach, FL, USA, May 5-7, 2026
summary: This paper presents an adaptive model predictive control (MPC) framework for nonlinear urban air mobility (UAM) vehicles operating across the full flight envelope. The proposed approach leverages a linear parameter-varying (LPV) representation to update the predictive model online, enabling accurate capture of strongly nonlinear and time-varying dynamics associated with distributed electric propulsion (DEP) eVTOL aircraft. To systematically address the high-dimensional and coupled nature of MPC tuning, a multi-objective evolutionary optimization strategy based on NSGA-II is employed, incorporating proper normalization of states and control inputs to ensure balanced weighting and meaningful exploration of the design space. The resulting controller explicitly accounts for actuator constraints and enables reconfigurable control allocation for fault-tolerant operation. The framework is evaluated in nonlinear simulations using NASA's Generic Urban Air Mobility (GUAM) model and benchmarked against a robust servomechanism linear quadratic regulator (RSLQR). Results demonstrate that the proposed adaptive MPC achieves improved trajectory tracking and enhanced robustness under both nominal conditions and actuator degradation scenarios, including partial motor failure, while maintaining constraint satisfaction throughout all flight regimes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对城市空中交通（UAM）飞行器的自适应模型预测控制（MPC）框架，采用线性变参数（LPV）模型在线更新，并结合NSGA-II多目标优化进行调参。在NASA的GUAM模型上测试表明，该方法相比RSLQR控制器在轨迹跟踪、鲁棒性和约束满足方面表现更优，尤其适用于分布式电推进（DEP）eVTOL飞行器的全飞行包线控制。
AI.motivation: UAM飞行器（如eVTOL）在全飞行包线内呈现强非线性和时变动态特性，且分布式电推进（DEP）系统使控制维度高、耦合复杂。传统的线性控制器难以应对大范围动态变化，而MPC的调参在高维空间中又十分困难，亟需一种能自适应模型更新且系统化调参的控制框架。
AI.method: 1）使用线性变参数（LPV）模型在线更新预测模型，捕获非线性与时变动态；2）采用基于NSGA-II的多目标进化优化策略，结合状态与控制输入的合理归一化，实现MPC权重的高维空间平衡探索；3）显式处理执行器约束，并具备可重构控制分配以实现容错。
AI.result: 在NASA的GUAM模型非线性仿真中，与鲁棒伺服线性二次型调节器（RSLQR）对比，自适应MPC在名义工况和执行器退化（包括部分电机故障）场景下，均实现了更优的轨迹跟踪性能和更强的鲁棒性，且在所有飞行阶段均维持了约束满足。
AI.conclusion: 提出的自适应MPC框架有效解决了UAM飞行器全飞行包线的非线性控制问题，结合LPV模型更新和NSGA-II自动化调参，在性能、鲁棒性和容错能力上均优于传统线性控制器，为eVTOL等新型飞行器的工程实现提供了可行方案。

title: LFNO: Bridging Laplace and Fourier via Transient-Steady Decomposition
summary: We introduce the Laplace-Fourier Neural Operator (LFNO), a unified framework for modeling dynamical systems across transient and steady-state regimes by integrating the spectral advantages of Laplace and Fourier Neural Operators. LFNO employs a dual-branch architecture that explicitly decomposes system dynamics into transient and steady-state components. We evaluate LFNO on nine benchmarks, including three ODE systems (Duffing, Lorenz, and Pendulum) and six PDE systems (Euler-Bernoulli beam, Heat, Reaction-diffusion, Brusselator, Burgers, and Navier-Stokes). LFNO significantly outperforms existing operators on ODE systems, where transient dynamics dominate, and consistently surpasses LNO while achieving performance competitive with FNO on PDE benchmarks. Furthermore, LFNO offers improved stability and physical interpretability through its component-wise decomposition. These results demonstrate that LFNO provides a robust and unified approach for learning complex dynamical systems across multiple temporal scales.

AI.tldr: LFNO是一个融合拉普拉斯和傅里叶神经算子的统一框架，通过双分支架构分别处理瞬态和稳态动力学，在9个基准测试中优于现有方法，特别是在ODE系统上表现突出。
AI.motivation: 现有神经算子方法在处理同时包含瞬态和稳态动态的系统时存在局限，缺乏统一的建模框架来显式区分这两种不同时间尺度的动力学行为。
AI.method: 提出拉普拉斯-傅里叶神经算子，采用双分支架构：一个分支利用拉普拉斯算子捕获瞬态动态，另一个分支利用傅里叶算子处理稳态动态，实现两种动力学分量的显式分解与联合建模。
AI.result: 在9个基准（3个ODE系统+6个PDE系统）上，LFNO在ODE系统上显著优于现有算子，在PDE基准上一致超越LNO且与FNO性能相当，同时具有更好的稳定性和可解释性。
AI.conclusion: LFNO为跨多个时间尺度的复杂动力系统学习提供了一个鲁棒且统一的解决方案，通过瞬态-稳态分解带来了性能提升和物理可解释性。

title: Particle Methods with Deep Learning for Stochastic Control under Partial Observation
summary: Numerical computation of stochastic control problems under partial observation is challenging because the dynamic programming formulation is naturally posed on the conditional distribution of the hidden state. We propose particle-based methods that replace this infinite-dimensional filtering state by a finite-dimensional weighted particle system, building on recent limit theory for mean-field control with common-noise-adapted controls. We prove, under suitable assumptions, convergence of the fully discretized particle approximation to the original continuous-time partially observed control problem. The particle reformulation is high-dimensional but permutation-invariant, a structure that can be exploited by symmetric neural network architectures. We develop two deep learning algorithms: a direct optimization method for feedback controls and a Deep BSDE method for particle problems admitting a backward stochastic differential equation representation. We also extend the computational framework to partially observed mean-field control problems, which have been studied theoretically but remain less developed numerically. Numerical experiments on a linear--quadratic benchmark, a nonlinear partially observed mean-field control problem, and two financial applications, portfolio liquidation and asset allocation, demonstrate the accuracy and practical utility of the approach.

AI.tldr: 本文针对部分观测随机控制问题，提出基于粒子的数值方法，通过有限维加权粒子系统替代无限维滤波状态，并利用对称神经网络架构设计两种深度学习算法（直接优化反馈控制与Deep BSDE），在理论上证明收敛性，实验展示其在金融等领域的准确性与实用性。
AI.motivation: 部分观测随机控制问题的动态规划公式自然定义在隐藏状态的**条件分布**上，这是一个**无限维**的滤波状态，导致数值计算极具挑战性。现有方法难以高效处理这一高维问题。
AI.method: 1) 提出基于粒子的方法，用有限维加权粒子系统近似无限维滤波状态；2) 利用**置换不变性**，采用对称神经网络架构处理高维粒子表示；3) 开发两种深度学习算法：直接优化反馈控制方法 & Deep BSDE方法；4) 扩展至部分观测均值场控制问题。
AI.result: 在理论层面，证明了完全离散化粒子近似收敛到原始连续时间部分观测控制问题。在实验层面，线性-二次基准问题、非线性部分观测均值场控制问题，以及组合清算和资产配置两个金融应用均验证了方法的准确性和实用性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的粒子方法有效解决了部分观测随机控制问题的数值计算困难，理论收敛性得到保证，且深度学习算法在实际金融问题中表现良好，为这类难题提供了可行的计算框架。

title: Partially Performative Prediction
summary: Performative prediction studies feedback loops that arise when predictive models are deployed in consequential domains. In these settings, deploying a model can change the population whose patterns the model aims to predict, inducing a distribution shift that is endogenous to the learning system. This perspective departs from classical treatments of distribution shift, where shifts are typically modeled as exogenous changes in the data-generating process. Yet, in practice, distribution shift is rarely one or the other. Predictive models may influence future data through the decisions they support, while the world itself continues to drift for reasons beyond the learner's control. We study partially performative prediction, a framework that captures both endogenous and exogenous sources of distribution shift. The framework generalizes performative prediction by allowing the data distribution to evolve both in response to the deployed model and according to an external, time-varying process. We extend the central notions of performative stability and performative optimality to this setting by defining their online analogues that track the evolving partially performative environment. We analyze practical learning heuristics, including repeated retraining, and characterize when they successfully adapt to partially performative environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了"部分执行性预测"框架，统一了由模型部署引发的内源性分布偏移和外部环境变化引起的外源性分布偏移，并分析了在线环境下的学习策略。
AI.motivation: 实际场景中，分布偏移往往是内源性（模型部署影响数据分布）和外源性（外部环境随时间演变）共同作用的结果，但现有研究通常只单独处理其中一种，缺乏统一的框架来捕捉两者的交互效应。
AI.method: 定义了部分执行性预测框架，将执行性预测推广到时变环境；提出了在线版本的执行性稳定性和最优性概念；分析重复训练等实用学习启发式方法在该框架下的适应能力。
AI.result: 建立了在线部分执行性环境下的理论分析框架，刻画了重复训练等启发式方法何时能成功适应部分执行性环境。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为理解和处理同时存在模型反馈和外部漂移的复杂分布偏移场景提供了统一的理论基础，弥合了执行性预测和传统分布偏移研究之间的差距。

title: Awareness of Technological Isomorphism: Integrating AI into Elementary Mathematics Teaching on Data and Prediction,A Case Study of the Compound Line Graph
comment: 17 pages, 3 figures, 4 tables. Conceptual and design-based research on AI-integrated mathematics education in elementary schools
summary: The deep integration of Artificial Intelligence (AI) into elementary mathematics education necessitates a conceptual tool capable of explaining students' cognitive transition from disciplinary knowledge to AI understanding. This study proposes a novel core concept, "Awareness of Technological Isomorphism, " defined as a student's metacognitive realization that their own mathematical cognitive operations (e.g., observing trends, inducing patterns, and making predictions) share an underlying logical structure with AI technical operations (e.g., pattern recognition and predictive modeling). This awareness, in turn, facilitates cognitive transfer from disciplinary mathematics to AI comprehension. Underpinned by transfer learning and metacognitive theories, this study clarifies the distinct essence of this concept from traditional "computational thinking." We demonstrate the explanatory power of this framework in two ways: elucidating the mechanism of students' cognitive leap from mathematics to AI, and guiding instructors to identify "isomorphic interfaces" within disciplinary curricula. On this basis, a three-stage pedagogical pathway--spanning "Perception, Comprehension, and Creation"--is constructed alongside a corresponding evaluation rubric. This framework is empirically validated through a case study based on the "Compound Line Graph" lesson from a fifth-grade mathematics textbook in China, offering a highly replicable operational framework for the deep convergence of disciplinary instruction and AI literacy education.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"技术同构意识"核心概念，指学生意识到自身数学认知操作（如观察趋势、归纳模式、做出预测）与AI技术操作（如模式识别、预测建模）具有相同逻辑结构，从而促进从数学到AI的认知迁移。基于迁移学习和元认知理论，区别于传统"计算思维"，构建了"感知—理解—创造"三阶段教学路径及评估框架，并通过中国五年级"复式折线统计图"案例进行实证验证。
AI.motivation: 人工智能与小学数学教育深度融合需要一个概念工具来解释学生从学科知识到AI理解的认知过渡机制，现有的"计算思维"概念无法充分解释这种认知迁移过程。
AI.method: 基于迁移学习理论和元认知理论，提出"技术同构意识"核心概念，构建三阶段教学路径（感知、理解、创造）及对应评估量规，并通过中国五年级数学教材中"复式折线统计图"课例进行实证验证。
AI.result: 该框架能够有效解释学生从数学到AI的认知跃迁机制，指导教师识别学科课程中的"同构接口"，并通过案例研究提供了高度可复制的操作框架。
AI.conclusion: "技术同构意识"是连接学科教学与AI素养教育的关键认知桥梁，三阶段教学路径为小学阶段AI教育提供了切实可行的实施框架。

title: Shared Latent Structures Enable Unified Backdoor Detection and Mitigation in LLMs
summary: Backdoor attacks in large language models (LLMs) are often treated as isolated trigger-response failures, motivating defenses tailored to specific triggers or behaviors. We show this view is incomplete. Across diverse backdoor behaviors, we identify a shared latent mechanism that can be detected, causally controlled, and suppressed. Using sparse autoencoders (SAEs) on residual-stream activations, we find a small set of latent features consistently activated across jailbreaking, refusal manipulation, password-locking, bias induction, sentiment misclassification, and country-conditioned harmful advice. These features generalize across Qwen3, Gemma~3, and Llama~3.1 models from 4B to 32B parameters, and across both fine-tuning and weight-editing attacks. Through bidirectional activation steering, we show these features are causal: suppressing them reduces attack success, while amplifying them induces target behaviors on clean prompts. We further train lightweight SAE-feature classifiers that generalize zero-shot to unseen backdoors and outperform residual-stream and weight-diffing baselines. Finally, we introduce Concept Ablation Fine-Tuning (CAFT), which suppresses backdoor formation by ablating the shared latent subspace during training. Together, our results suggest that many backdoors rely on a transferable latent mechanism, enabling unified detection and mitigation.

AI.tldr: 本文发现大语言模型中的多种后门攻击共享可检测、可因果控制、可抑制的潜在神经机制，并提出基于稀疏自编码器的统一检测与防御方法CAFT。
AI.motivation: 传统观点将后门攻击视为孤立的触发-响应故障，导致防御方法针对特定触发器或行为定制，缺乏通用性。作者认为这种视角不完整，试图探索后门攻击是否共享某种潜在的、可迁移的神经机制，以实现统一的检测与防御。
AI.method: 1) 使用稀疏自编码器(SAE)分析残差流激活，识别跨多种后门行为共享的潜在特征。2) 通过双向激活操控验证这些特征的因果性。3) 训练轻量级SAE特征分类器，零样本泛化到未见后门。4) 提出概念消融微调(CAFT)，在训练期间消融共享潜在子空间以抑制后门形成。
AI.result: 发现跨越狱、拒绝操控、密码锁定、偏差诱导、情感误分类、条件化有害建议等多种后门行为存在共享潜在特征。这些特征在Qwen3、Gemma3、Llama3.1模型（4B-32B参数）及微调与权重编辑攻击间均存在泛化性。因果操控验证成立，轻量级SAE分类器零样本泛化优于基线，CAFT有效抑制后门形成。
AI.conclusion: 许多后门攻击依赖于可迁移的潜在神经机制，这使得统一的检测与缓解成为可能。

title: Representational Similarity and Model Behavior in Multi-Agent Interaction
summary: Researchers have shown that neural similarity among humans predicts social closeness and cooperative success, whereas innovation often emerges from interactions among dissimilar individuals. We investigate whether these principles extend to artificial intelligence by examining interactions between large language models. In our experiments, 276 model pairs interact across eight games spanning both cooperation and novelty. We find that pairs with more similar representation spaces achieve significantly higher cooperation but exhibit reduced novelty and creativity. The effects of representational similarity on cooperation and novelty remain robust even after controlling for other factors such as performance disparity and model size. We also find that similarity in the early layers consistently shows the strongest association with cooperation and novelty, compared to the middle and later layers. This suggests that a central factor underlying these patterns could be the extent to which the two models share lexical and semantic grounding. Overall, representational similarity can be an important consideration in multi-agent system design.

AI.tldr: 研究表明，AI模型之间的表征相似性越高，合作越好但创造力越低，早期层的相似性影响最大，多智能体系统设计需权衡合作与创新。
AI.motivation: 探索人类社会中"相似促进合作、差异驱动创新"的规律是否也适用于人工智能，特别是大语言模型之间的交互。
AI.method: 让276对模型组合在8种游戏（涵盖合作与创新场景）中交互，测量表征空间的相似性，并控制性能差异、模型规模等混淆变量。
AI.result: 表征相似性高的模型对合作表现更好，但新颖性和创造力显著降低；早期层的相似性对合作与创新的影响最强。
AI.conclusion: 表征相似性是影响多智能体系统协作与创新的关键因素，设计时需根据任务目标权衡相似性与多样性。

title: Direct Data-driven Predictive Control: A Computationally Efficient Alternative to DeePC for Eco-driving in Mixed Traffic Flows
summary: Improving energy efficiency in the transportation sector is critical for achieving sustainable mobility, with eco-driving emerging as a key strategy. However, implementing effective eco-driving for connected and automated vehicles (CAVs) in mixed traffic presents a significant control challenge due to the heterogeneous, uncertain behavior of human-driven vehicles (HDVs). Data-enabled Predictive Control (DeePC) offers a promising model-free approach but is often hindered by a high computational burden, limiting its real-time feasibility. This paper introduces a novel Direct Data-driven Predictive Control (D3PC) framework to address this limitation. By reformulating the data-driven prediction mechanism, the D3PC significantly reduces computational complexity, making its computation time nearly invariant to historical data size. This computational efficiency directly enables the formulation of a sophisticated eco-driving controller that can solve the complex energy optimization problem in real time, even within diverse and stochastic mixed-traffic environments. Comprehensive simulations demonstrate that the D3PC is orders of magnitude faster than existing DeePC-based methods while achieving superior energy efficiency. Specifically, it reduces total platoon energy consumption by up to 10.71% compared to rule-based cruise control baselines and 3.80% compared to the original DeePC, confirming its effectiveness for real-time, energy-efficient control.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型直接数据驱动预测控制（D3PC）框架，通过降低计算复杂度，实现混合交通场景下CAVs的实时节能生态驾驶控制，相较基线方法能耗降低最高10.71%。
AI.motivation: 混合交通中HDVs的异质性和不确定性使得CAVs的生态驾驶控制极具挑战性，现有DeePC方法计算负担高，难以满足实时性要求。
AI.method: 提出D3PC框架，通过重新公式化数据驱动预测机制，大幅降低计算复杂度，使计算时间几乎不受历史数据规模影响，从而实现混合交通环境下的实时节能控制。
AI.result: D3PC比现有DeePC方法快数个数量级，总队列能耗比基于规则的巡航控制降低10.71%，比原始DeePC降低3.80%。
AI.conclusion: D3PC框架在实时性和节能性上均优于现有方法，为混合交通中CAVs的高效生态驾驶提供了可行的数据驱动控制方案。

title: Sample-Efficient Post-Training for LEGO Spatial-Physics Reasoning
comment: Technical Report V1, 15 pages, 6 figures, 3 tables
summary: LLM-based LEGO assembly generation requires both semantic grounding and physical feasibility. We identify a data-induced failure mode, PhysHack, in which the assemblies satisfy physical-validity constraints while producing structures that are geometrically misaligned, semantically inconsistent, or poorly calibrated. To address this challenge, we propose a model-based data selection approach that uses only a small fraction of the training data while improving physically grounded LEGO assembly generation. Building on the selected trajectories, we introduce PVPO, a sample-efficient reinforcement learning method that couples physical feasibility with voxel-space geometric rewards. Our results show that physical validity alone is an insufficient proxy for reliable physical reasoning: models can learn to generate valid structures without preserving semantic or geometric fidelity. Experiments across model backbones and test-time scaling settings demonstrate that PVPO improves structural and semantic alignment, physical validity, structural stability, and calibration, while reducing reliance on extensive post-hoc rejection sampling. In particular, results on calibration show that PVPO mitigates PhysHack by making test-time selection more predictive of semantic and structural quality.

AI.tldr: 本文发现了一个名为PhysHack的数据诱导失败模式，即LLM生成的乐高结构满足物理约束但几何错位、语义不一致。为此提出PVPO方法，通过模型驱动的数据选择和样本高效的强化学习，仅用少量训练数据就能提升乐高装配生成的物理可行性、结构稳定性和语义一致性，并改善校准性能。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM生成乐高装配时存在PhysHack问题：模型学会满足物理有效性约束，却忽略了几何对齐和语义保真度，说明物理有效性本身不足以作为物理推理的可靠代理指标。
AI.method: 提出数据选择方法+PVPO强化学习方法。数据选择仅用少量训练数据；PVPO将物理可行性与体素空间几何奖励相结合，实现样本高效的强化学习。
AI.result: 实验表明PVPO在多个模型主干和测试时扩展设置下，提升了结构对齐、语义一致性、物理有效性、结构稳定性和校准性能，减少了对后验拒绝采样的依赖。校准结果显示PVPO通过使测试时选择更可预测语义和结构质量，缓解了PhysHack问题。
AI.conclusion: 物理有效性不是物理推理的充分条件；PVPO通过结合几何奖励和高效数据利用，能够在不依赖大量后处理的情况下生成更高质量、更可靠的乐高装配结构。

title: Quantitative rapid stabilization for parabolic equations via the linear quadratic theory
summary: This paper addresses the problem of quantitative rapid stabilization via the linear quadratic (LQ) theory. Specifically, for non-self-adjoint parabolic equations, by virtue of the LQ theory, we derive the quantitative rapid stabilization by selecting a special cost functional and combining it with a quantitative observability inequality. Furthermore, this approach reveals the equivalence between the quantitative rapid stabilization and the quantitative observability inequality for linear systems. In addition, we apply this framework to the Navier--Stokes equations and establish the quantitative rapid stabilization around nontrivial steady states. Finally, we extend this methodology to finite-dimensional feedback laws in self-adjoint cases.
