In this work, we propose a passenger queue forecasting framework that learns historical passenger flow patterns from operational data. The proposed model employs a Transformer-based architecture to capture temporal dependencies and inter-facility correlations using past queue length and waiting time at departure gates and security checkpoints, together with passenger throughput at check-in islands. The learned representations are mapped to two facility-specific MLP heads to predict queue length and waiting time at departure gates and security checkpoints. Experimental results demonstrate accurate forecasts up to two hours ahead. The proposed approach offers practical real-time decision support for proactive queue management and staff reallocation in airport terminal operations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Transformer架构的机场航站楼旅客排队预测框架，利用历史排队长度、等待时间和旅客吞吐量等运营数据，预测未来两小时内值机岛、安检口和登机口的排队状态，为主动拥堵管理提供决策支持。
AI.motivation: 机场航站楼中旅客需求随时间变化、不同设施使用模式异质性强，导致排队预测困难，而准确的排队预测对主动拥堵管理和高效离港运营至关重要。
AI.method: 采用Transformer架构捕获时间依赖性和设施间相关性，利用历史排队长度、等待时间（登机口、安检口）及旅客吞吐量（值机岛）作为输入，学习到的表征映射到两个设施专用的MLP头，分别预测登机口和安检口的排队长度与等待时间。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能实现长达两小时的准确预测。
AI.conclusion: 该框架可为机场航站楼运营提供实用的实时决策支持，用于主动排队管理和人员重新调配。

title: Decision-Aware Memory Cards: Counterfactual-Inspired Context Selection and Compression for Tool-Using LLM Agents
comment: 15 pages, 2 figures, 9 tables. Code and artifacts are available at https://github.com/stephen-guan-researcher/CICL; Qwen-QLoRA adapter is available at https://huggingface.co/XinyuGuan/CICL
summary: Tool-using LLM agents often fail not because relevant text is absent, but because decisive evidence is not selected, compressed, or surfaced at action time. We present CICL, a decision-aware context layer that turns instance evidence into a context graph, routes deterministic, Opus-assisted, Qwen, Codex/GPT-5.5, and Qwen-QLoRA judgments through a shared eight-field schema, scores units by action shift, outcome uplift, necessity, and negative-transfer risk, and packs high-utility evidence as typed memory cards for a budgeted agent. The design separates the measured decision signal from the judge model, so frontier annotation, local surrogates, and lightweight rankers can be compared under one auditable protocol. Empirically, CICL yields a concrete open-benchmark gain while exposing its limits. On 50 SWE-bench Verified file-retrieval instances, direct Qwen3.6-plus reranking of BM25 top-50 candidates raises hit@1 from 0.58 to 0.78 and MRR@10 from 0.634 to 0.790, with all 2,500 judgments parseable. Controlled diagnostics show action-criticality: at budget 120, CICL reaches F1 0.620 on v1 and 0.425 on v3, and removing the top-utility semantic v3 unit collapses F1 to 0.000. Supplementary checks add Qwen-QLoRA agreement over 710 candidates, a small 200-label real-code Opus-assisted signal, and a three-instance patch smoke validating retrieval-to-patch plumbing without claiming official SWE-bench success. RepoBench-R summaries still beat cards, and compact rankers do not yet replace the heuristic. CICL contributes a reproducible measurement and selection layer for decision-critical context, not an end-to-end coding-agent repair claim.

AI.tldr: CICL是一个决策感知的上下文层，通过构建上下文图、使用多模型联合评分和类型化记忆卡机制，提升LLM agent在决策时刻选择关键证据的能力，在SWE-bench等任务上取得显著改进，但承认其作为测量和选择层的局限性。
AI.motivation: LLM agent失败的主因不是缺少相关文本，而是在行动时刻未能选择、压缩或呈现决定性证据。现有方法缺乏对证据决策信号的系统化测量与选择机制。
AI.method: CICL将实例证据构建为上下文图，通过八字段模式路由多个模型（Opus、Qwen、Codex/GPT-5.5、Qwen-QLoRA）的判断，依据行动偏移、结果提升、必要性和负迁移风险对单元评分，将高效用证据打包为类型化记忆卡供预算受限的agent使用。
AI.result: 在50个SWE-bench文件检索实例上，直接Qwen3.6-plus重排BM25 top-50将hit@1从0.58提升至0.78，MRR@10从0.634提升至0.790。预算120时CICL在v1上达到F1 0.620，v3上0.425；移除最高效用语义单元后v3的F1骤降至0.000。
AI.conclusion: CICL提供了一个可复现的决策关键上下文测量与选择层，而非端到端的编码agent修复方案。RepoBench-R摘要仍优于卡片方式，紧凑型排序器尚未取代启发式方法。

title: Summarization is Not Dead Yet
summary: The progress of large language models (LLMs) has fueled claims that model-generated summaries rival or even surpass human-written references, raising questions about whether summarization remains an open research problem. We re-examine this narrative through a multi-track evaluation covering five diverse datasets and five state-of-the-art LLMs, combining controlled human assessment, bias-mitigated LLM-as-Judge protocols, factuality verification against external knowledge, and corpus-level linguistic analysis. Our findings reveal a more nuanced landscape in which human reference summaries continue to demonstrate advantages in informativeness and faithfulness, whereas LLM outputs are preferred mainly for surface-level coherence and fluency. Factuality verification indicates that human references remain more reliable, particularly for claims involving reasoning or synthesis, and linguistic analysis uncovers a pattern of stylistic homogeneity across different models. These observations suggest that current LLMs have raised the floor of summarization quality, but the ceiling of their performance remains below human capabilities.

AI.tldr: 本文通过多维度评估（人工评估、LLM-as-Judge、事实性验证、语言学分析）发现，大语言模型生成的摘要虽然在流畅性和连贯性上表现优异，但在信息量、忠实度和事实可靠性方面仍不及人类撰写的参考摘要，且存在风格同质化问题。
AI.motivation: 质疑"LLM生成的摘要已经超越人类"这一流行说法，重新审视摘要生成是否仍是一个开放的研究问题。
AI.method: 采用多轨评估：1) 受控人工评估；2) 偏差缓解的LLM-as-Judge协议；3) 基于外部知识的事实性验证；4) 语料级语言学分析。覆盖5个数据集和5个最先进的LLM。
AI.result: 人类参考摘要仍然在信息量和忠实度方面占优；LLM输出主要在表面层面的连贯性和流畅性上更受青睐；人类参考摘要的事实可靠性更高，尤其是在需要推理或综合的陈述上；不同LLM模型之间存在风格同质化现象。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLM提高了摘要质量的下限（即最差质量有所改善），但其性能上限仍低于人类水平，摘要生成仍是一个开放的研究问题。

title: An Agency-Transferring Model-Free Policy Enhancement Technique
summary:
Training reinforcement learning (RL) policies from scratch is
  costly: it requires careful reward and environment design,
  extensive tuning, and substantial computation.
  Yet many control problems already have a functional but
  suboptimal policy available as a baseline.
  This paper proposes a method for embedding such a baseline into
  the RL training process, simultaneously improving training
  efficiency relative to from-scratch methods and producing a
  learning policy that outperforms the baseline.
  At each step, the method arbitrates between the baseline policy
  and a trainable learning policy, initially relying strongly on
  the baseline policy and then progressively transferring agency to
  the learning policy.
  By the end of training, the learning policy is a standalone
  neural network that operates without baseline policy support.
  The paper formalizes what it means for the baseline policy to be
  functional: under this policy, the agent reaches a goal set and
  remains there with high probability.
  The proposed arbitration mechanism is designed to exploit this
  property during training, yielding high goal-reaching rates right
  from the beginning of training.
  A theoretical analysis provides a formal interpretation of this
  behavior under stated assumptions and extends it to the final
  baseline-free regime, where explicit lower bounds are derived for
  the goal-reaching probability of the standalone learning policy.
  Empirical results on continuous-control benchmarks show that the
  proposed method achieves returns that match or exceed those of
  competitive approaches, while maintaining the highest
  goal-reaching rates throughout training among the compared
  methods -- including in the final stage, where the learning policy
  operates without any baseline support.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种将已有次优基线策略嵌入强化学习训练过程的方法，通过逐步仲裁机制从依赖基线转移至自主学习，显著提升训练效率与目标达成率。
AI.motivation: 从头训练强化学习策略成本高昂（需精心设计奖励、环境及大量调参），而许多控制问题已有可用的次优基线策略，如何利用这些基线提升训练效率是核心动机。
AI.method: 提出仲裁机制：训练过程中每一步在基线策略与可训练的学习策略之间进行决策，初始阶段强烈依赖基线，随后逐步将控制权转移给学习策略。最终学习策略成为无需基线支持的独立神经网络。同时形式化了基线策略“功能性”的定义（高概率到达并停留在目标集），并利用该性质设计仲裁机制。
AI.result: 在连续控制基准测试中，所提方法在回报上达到或超越竞争方法，并且在整个训练过程中始终保持最高的目标达成率——包括最终学习策略脱离基线独立运行的阶段。
AI.conclusion: 通过理论分析与实验验证，该方法有效利用了已有基线策略，提高了训练效率与最终策略性能，为将次优先验知识融入强化学习提供了可行范式。

title: Finite Certificates for In-Context Determinacy and a Threshold Theory of Emergence in Language Models
summary: This paper develops a model-theoretic framework for verifying context-conditioned language-model behavior by replacing benchmark labels with finite semantic certificates. The first problem is finite determinacy: when do examples in a context force the answer to a query without changing model parameters? In finite-field linear task families, we prove an exact row-space criterion, compute the residual hypothesis count, derive full and query-local identification curves, and show that extracting a smallest forcing subcontext is NP-complete even for binary outputs. The second problem is threshold emergence: when does an apparent benchmark jump reflect a semantic transition rather than a discontinuity of the scoring map? We prove an anti-mirage theorem separating thresholded metrics from semantic confidence and give a rate-sensitive crossing bound for latent commitments becoming visible above threshold. The common semantic object is a confidence functional on definable events. We show that it is a Boolean probability measure, equivalently a Keisler measure on the relevant type space, whose measure-one formulas form a proper filter and whose Stone-space representation is invariant under definitional expansion. The resulting calculus provides finite context certificates, pair-separator hitting sets, query teaching dimension, prompt-preservation criteria, and scale-limit witnesses. Exact-arithmetic ancillary scripts reproduce the finite-field and threshold calculations and generate the data used by the figures.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个模型论框架，通过有限语义证书替代基准标签来验证上下文条件下的语言模型行为。核心研究两个问题：有限确定性（上下文中哪些例子强制查询答案）和阈值涌现（基准指标跳跃是否反映语义转变）。证明了有限域线性任务族中的精确行空间准则，展示了提取最小强制子上下文是NP完全的，并证明了反幻象定理来区分阈值化指标与语义置信度。
AI.motivation: 现有语言模型验证依赖基准标签，但标签可能不反映真实语义行为。因此需要一个形式化框架来理解上下文条件如何强制模型输出，以及基准指标变化何时对应真正的语义转变。
AI.method: 采用模型论方法构建置信度泛函（confidence functional），将其视为可定义事件上的布尔概率测度（等价于相关类型空间上的Keisler测度）。证明了该测度的测度一公式构成真滤子，Stone空间表示在定义扩展下不变。在此基础上推导出有限上下文证书、配对分隔子击中集、查询教学维度、提示保持准则和尺度极限见证等工具。
AI.result: 证明了有限域线性任务族中的精确行空间准则，给出了残差假设计数和完整/查询局部识别曲线。证明提取最小强制子上下文是NP完全的。证明了反幻象定理和率敏感交叉界。建立了置信度泛函作为Keisler测度的表征理论。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为上下文条件下的语言模型行为验证提供了严格的数学基础，区分了真正的语义转变与虚假的基准跳跃，并通过可复现的精确算术脚本支撑了理论结果。

title: Conditional Random Ordered Transport Spaces
summary: A small Wasserstein distance does not certify that a transformation is admissible. In evidence-constrained, semantic, causal, physical, monotone, or risk-sensitive learning, one must ask not only how far two probability laws are, but whether mass has moved in a direction allowed by available information. We introduce conditional random ordered transport spaces (CROTS), a class of \(L^0\)-valued spaces of random probability measures equipped with a Wasserstein ambient metric, a closed stochastic order, hard and soft ordered transport discrepancies, and a conditional risk functional for evaluating order violation under an evidence sigma-field. The central object is an order-admissible transport geometry for random measure-valued dynamics, distinct from cone-valued metrics, ordered Kantorovich constructions, random Wasserstein spaces alone, and model-specific residuals for generative paths. We develop the foundations of CROTS as a space theory for reliable distributional learning. The results include well-posedness and duality for hard and soft ordered transport, soft-to-hard variational convergence, measurability and completeness of the random lifted space, reductions to classical Wasserstein and ordered geometries, ordered geodesics, constrained barycenters and projections, conditional risk-transport duality, and separation of order-violating distributions. The main stability theorem shows that random learning dynamics may converge in the ambient Wasserstein metric while its local admissibility leakage follows a separate conditional order-risk recursion. The resulting asymptotic order-risk floor provides a mathematical language for evidence overreach, ordered distribution shift, robustness failure, and admissible distributional dynamics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出条件随机有序输运空间（CROTS），用于在证据约束下评估概率分布变换的方向是否可接受，而不仅仅是距离远近。
AI.motivation: 传统Wasserstein距离只能衡量概率分布之间的距离，但无法判断质量移动的方向是否被可用信息（如因果、语义、物理单调性等约束）所允许。在证据受限的学习场景中，需要既能度量距离又能判断方向可接受性的理论框架。
AI.method: 引入CROTS，一种L^0-值随机概率测度空间，配备Wasserstein环境度量、封闭随机序、硬/软有序输运差异、以及条件风险泛函。建立了有序可接受输运几何、软硬变分收敛、对偶性、测地线、约束重心和投影等理论基础。
AI.result: 证明了硬有序输运和软有序输运的适定性与对偶性、软到硬的变分收敛、随机提升空间的可测性与完备性、条件风险-输运对偶性、以及有序违反分布的可分离性。主稳定性定理表明随机学习动力学可在环境Wasserstein度量下收敛，同时局部可接受性泄漏遵循独立的条件有序风险递归。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的渐近有序风险下界为证据过度延伸、有序分布偏移、鲁棒性失效和可接受分布动力学提供了数学模型。

title: Online Agent-as-a-Judge: Situation-Generating Evaluation for Interactive Agents
comment: ICML 2026 Workshop on Trustworthy AI for Good
summary: Evaluating LLM-powered interactive social agents is challenging because socially relevant behaviors depend not only on isolated outputs, but also on prior interactions, social roles, and downstream actions. Existing methods typically allow a target agent to act freely in an environment and then score the resulting trajectory. However, this passive setup can miss capabilities that only become observable under specific social circumstances; for example, conflict handling may remain untested if no disagreement arises. We propose Online Agent-as-a-Judge, a situation-generating evaluation framework for interactive social agents. Online Agent-as-a-Judge deploys an in-world evaluator agent that interacts with the target agent through the environment's native dialogue and action protocol, actively eliciting situations relevant to the evaluation criteria. The resulting trajectories provide evidence for assessing both immediate responses and subsequent behavior. In a life-simulation environment with $32$ designer-authored social criteria, Online Agent-as-a-Judge improves criteria coverage and agreement with human labels, yielding more reliable evidence-grounded evaluations of behaviors that passive methods can leave unobserved.

AI.tldr: 提出"在线智能体作为裁判"框架，通过让评估智能体主动与环境中的目标智能体交互，生成能检验特定社交能力（如冲突处理）的场景，从而更全面可靠地评估社交智能体。在32个社交标准的生命模拟环境中，该方法比被动评估方法有更好的标准覆盖率和与人类标注的一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有评估方法让目标智能体自由行动然后被动评分，可能遗漏只有在特定社交情境下才能观察到的能力（如冲突处理），需要一种能主动生成相关测试场景的评估框架。
AI.method: 提出Online Agent-as-a-Judge框架，部署一个在环境中的评估智能体，通过环境的原生对话和行动协议与目标智能体交互，主动诱导出与评估标准相关的情境，然后基于交互轨迹评估即时响应和后续行为。
AI.result: 在包含32个人工设计的社交标准的生命模拟环境中，该方法相比被动方法提高了标准覆盖率以及与人工标注的一致性，能够对被动方法无法观察到的行为进行更可靠的基于证据的评估。
AI.conclusion: 主动生成测试情境的评估方法能更全面、可靠地评估社交智能体的能力，特别是那些只有在特定社交互动中才会显现的能力。

title: Rewrite to Translate, Translate to Reward: Reinforcement Learning for Source Rewriting in Machine Translation
summary: Although directly prompting off-the-shelf Large Language Models (LLMs) to generate meaning-preserving source rewrites can effectively enhance Machine Translation (MT) quality, doing so requires manually tuning prompts for different MT models. In this work, we propose RLSR (Reinforcement Learning for Source Rewriting), a novel RL-based framework for training a source rewriting model without tuning prompts for each MT model. RLSR optimizes the rewriting model by directly using the improvement in downstream translation quality yielded by each rewritten source as the reward. Extensive experiments across six MT models and 16 language pairs demonstrate that our 4B rewriting models trained via RLSR significantly outperform the no-rewriting baseline and existing same-scale prompt-based rewriting baselines, while achieving competitive performance against prompt-based baselines based on the 235B LLM.

AI.tldr: 提出RLSR框架，通过强化学习训练源文本改写模型，无需为每个MT模型手动调优提示词，仅用4B参数模型即可媲美235B大模型的提示改写效果。
AI.motivation: 直接使用现成LLM进行源文本改写虽能提升机器翻译质量，但需要为不同MT模型手动调优提示词，成本高昂且难以扩展。
AI.method: 采用强化学习框架RLSR，以改写后源文本在下游翻译质量的提升作为奖励信号，直接优化源改写模型，无需针对每个MT模型调优提示词。
AI.result: 在6个MT模型和16个语言对上，4B参数的RLSR改写模型显著优于无改写基线和同规模提示改写基线，性能与基于235B LLM的提示改写方法相当。
AI.conclusion: RLSR框架能够以较小模型规模实现优于或媲美大型模型的源改写效果，为提升机器翻译质量提供了一种高效且可扩展的方案。

title: Sequential statistical inference for Large Language Models: Representation, validity, and monitoring
comment: This article was prepared for a invited discussion in The American Statistician
summary: This discussion argues that sequential statistical inference can naturally contribute to LLM trustworthiness. In deployment, LLM systems are queried repeatedly, conditioned on evolving contexts, and incorporate user or tool feedback, and may exhibit behavioral shifts after model updates or distribution changes. The discussion is organized around three tasks: representation, modeling LLM interactions as dependent stochastic processes rather than isolated prompt--response pairs; validity, developing uncertainty guarantees that remain meaningful under dependence, repeated use, and adaptation; and monitoring, using sequential alarms and change-point detection to identify shifts in calibration, hallucination rates, refusal behavior, fairness, or other task-relevant properties. This perspective complements recent surveys by viewing trustworthy LLM deployment as a problem of statistical process control.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将序列统计推断应用于LLM可信度问题，围绕表征（将LLM交互建模为依赖随机过程）、有效性（开发依赖条件下的不确定性保证）和监控（使用序列警报检测行为变化）三个任务展开讨论。
AI.motivation: LLM在部署中面临重复查询、上下文演化、用户/工具反馈、模型更新等动态变化，现有研究多将LLM交互视为孤立提示-响应对，缺乏对序列依赖关系的建模，导致可信度保证在长期使用中失效。
AI.method: 将LLM可信部署视为统计过程控制问题，从三个维度构建框架：(1)表征层——将LLM交互建模为依赖随机过程而非独立样本；(2)有效性层——在数据依赖、重复使用和自适应条件下开发不确定性量化方法；(3)监控层——利用序列警报和变点检测技术监测校准误差、幻觉率、拒绝行为、公平性等属性的漂移。
AI.result: 提供了一个将序列统计推断与LLM可信度结合的概念框架，揭示了传统独立同分布假设在LLM部署场景中的局限性，并指出了统计过程控制理论在LLM安全监控中的潜在应用价值。
AI.conclusion: 序列统计推断天然适配LLM可信度问题，该视角补充了现有综述，为LLM系统的持续可靠运行提供了理论支撑和方法论指导。

title: SciTrace: Trajectory-Aware Safety Reasoning for Scientific Discovery Agents
summary: LLM-based scientific agents have shown strong capacity for autonomous research, yet their safety layers remain structurally divorced from core reasoning: they inspect pipeline outputs rather than shaping the deliberation that produces them. This separation opens two failure modes: safety signals accumulated at one stage are discarded before the next, and sequences of individually benign tool calls can compose into harmful outcomes that no single-step filter detects. To address these challenges, we introduce \textbf{SciTrace}, a framework that weaves safety reasoning into every stage of the scientific agent pipeline. SciTrace couples two complementary mechanisms: a \textit{Safety-Intrinsic Reasoning Loop} (SIR) that maintains a cumulative risk state across the Thinker, Experimenter, Writer, and Reviewer stages through joint task-and-safety deliberation, and a \textit{Compositional Tool-Chain Verifier} (CTV) that performs trajectory-aware safety checks before execution, catching risks that surface only across multi-step tool sequences. Evaluated on 240 high-risk research tasks and 120 tool-related risk tasks spanning six scientific domains, SciTrace achieves state-of-the-art (\textbf{SOTA}) safety among compared frameworks across four backbone models: it consistently improves tool call safety and adversarial robustness while preserving scientific output quality, and it uncovers \textbf{78.8\%} of the compositional tool-chain escapes that single-step monitors miss. The project website is available at https://opensciagent.github.io/SciTrace/.

AI.tldr: SciTrace 是一种将安全推理嵌入科学智能体流水线各阶段的框架，通过安全内在推理循环（SIR）和组合工具链验证器（CTV）两个互补机制，在6个科学领域的360项任务上实现了SOTA安全性，发现了78.8%的单步监控遗漏的组合工具链风险。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的科学智能体安全层与核心推理在结构上分离（仅检查流水线输出而非影响产生输出的推理过程），导致两个失败模式：（1）一个阶段累积的安全信号在进入下一阶段前被丢弃；（2）一系列单独无害的工具调用组合起来可能产生有害结果，而单步过滤器无法检测。
AI.method: SciTrace 包含两个互补机制：（1）Safety-Intrinsic Reasoning Loop (SIR)——在思考者、实验者、写作者和审阅者阶段维护一个累积风险状态，通过联合任务与安全推理进行协同；（2）Compositional Tool-Chain Verifier (CTV)——在执行前进行轨迹感知的安全检查，捕捉仅在多步工具序列中才显现的风险。
AI.result: 在覆盖六个科学领域的240个高风险研究任务和120个工具相关风险任务上，SciTrace在四种骨干模型上均实现了SOTA安全性；持续改进了工具调用安全和对抗鲁棒性，同时保持了科学输出质量；发现了78.8%的单步监控遗漏的组合工具链风险逃逸。
AI.conclusion: SciTrace 证明了将安全推理内嵌于科学智能体各阶段的必要性，为构建既有能力又安全的自主研究智能体提供了有效范式。

title: Arabic Sentence Segmentation Across Genres and Punctuation Conditions
summary: Sentence segmentation in Arabic is challenging due to ambiguous and inconsistent punctuation, with many texts lacking reliable sentence boundary markers. Existing approaches rely heavily on punctuation cues and are typically evaluated on well-formed text, limiting their robustness in realistic Arabic settings. To address this, we introduce AraSEG, a genre-diverse sentence segmentation corpus spanning eight genres and a wide range of punctuation and document structure conditions. Using AraSEG, we evaluate LLMs, lightweight encoder models, and dependency parser-based models under increasingly challenging segmentation settings. Our experiments show that lightweight encoders, and even dependency parser-based models, outperform LLMs in the most challenging settings. We further investigate the effects of training data size and genre diversity, finding that performance eventually saturates and cross-genre generalization remains challenging. We also demonstrate that accurate sentence segmentation substantially improves downstream dependency parsing. We make our code, data, and models publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AraSEG语料库，涵盖8种文体的阿拉伯语句子分割任务，发现轻量级编码器和依存解析模型在挑战性设置中优于大语言模型，并证明准确的分割能提升下游依存句法分析性能。
AI.motivation: 阿拉伯语的句子分割因标点符号歧义和不一致而困难重重，现有方法过度依赖标点线索且仅在规范文本上评估，缺乏在真实场景下的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 构建AraSEG多文体句子分割语料库（8种文体），评估LLM、轻量级编码器模型和基于依存解析的模型在多种难度设置下的分割性能。
AI.result: 轻量级编码器和依存解析模型在最具挑战性的设置中优于LLM；训练数据增加后性能趋于饱和；跨文体泛化仍具挑战性；准确分割显著提升下游依存句法分析效果。
AI.conclusion: 在阿拉伯语句子分割任务上，轻量级模型比大语言模型更具鲁棒性，且准确分割对下游任务有正向影响，代码和数据集已开源。

title: Learning Transfers: Kan Extensions for Neural Invariants
summary: Transfer learning presumes that a representation learned on source tasks carries structure that remains usable on related target tasks. Standard evaluations probe this through target accuracy or distributional discrepancy, yet leave unspecified which structural invariant is meant to transfer. We supply that invariant categorically. A source task category $\mathcal A$, a target task category $\mathcal B$, and a task-change functor $J:\mathcal A\to\mathcal B$ determine, for every invariant-valued source representation $F:\mathcal A\to\mathcal V$, the universal transferred invariant $\operatorname{Lan}J F$. Given a target invariant $G:\mathcal B\to\mathcal V$, we define the transfer discrepancy $\operatorname{Comp}J(F,G)=\sup{b\in\operatorname{Ob}(\mathcal B)} d{\mathcal V}\bigl((\operatorname{Lan}_J F)(b),G(b)\bigr)$, evaluating transfer not by an objectwise comparison of source and target, but by comparing the target invariant against the one forced by the prescribed task transformation. We prove finite cokernel formulas for $(\operatorname{Lan}_J F)(b)$ in chain complexes and persistence modules, indexed by the comma category $J\downarrow b$. For persistence-valued finite-type one-parameter invariants, the discrepancy is computed exactly by bottleneck distances between barcodes. Controlled experiments on neural latent point clouds then test whether the score recovers the correct task functor and flags representation collapses that preserve classification accuracy while destroying transfer-relevant topology.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种范畴论框架，用任务变化函子J和左Kan延拓来形式化迁移学习中到底迁移了什么结构不变性，并定义了传输差异度Comp_J(F,G)，用于替代传统基于目标准确率或分布差异的评估方法。
AI.motivation: 现有迁移学习评估仅测量目标准确率或分布差异，但未明确指出迁移的"结构不变性"究竟是什么，缺乏对迁移内容的严格形式化描述。
AI.method: 使用范畴论工具：源任务范畴A、目标任务范畴B、任务变化函子J:A→B；源表示F:A→V经左Kan延拓得到通用迁移不变量Lan_J F；定义传输差异度Comp_J(F,G)通过比较目标不变量G与Lan_J F的差异；在链复形和持久模块中证明有限余核公式；对持久值有限型单参数不变量，证明差异度等于条形码间的瓶颈距离。
AI.result: 在神经隐式点云上的对照实验表明，该分数能正确恢复任务函子，并识别出那些保持分类准确率但破坏迁移相关拓扑结构的表示坍塌。
AI.conclusion: 提供了一个可计算的、具有理论保证的迁移学习评估指标，能够揭示传统准确率指标无法捕捉的拓扑结构破坏问题。

title: When No Answer Is Correct: Diagnosing Absent Answer Detection for MLLMs in Video Understanding
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have made substantial advancements in video understanding, yet the reliability of their responses remains underexplored. This work presents a diagnostic study of absent answer detection for MLLMs in video understanding, where the correct answer is deliberately excluded from the candidate set and a reliable model is expected to recognize that no valid option exists. We evaluate the absent answer detection behavior under three settings: multiple-choice questions augmented with an ``None of the Above'' option, open-ended generation with a detection instruction, and standard evaluation without any guidance. Across a diverse set of models and benchmarks, we find that MLLMs overwhelmingly select plausible distractors rather than detecting the absent answer. This failure is more pronounced in temporal reasoning tasks and worsens with denser frame sampling. We further explore chain-of-thought prompting as a mitigation strategy and find that while it substantially improves detection rates, performance remains unsatisfactory, suggesting that prompting-based strategies alone are insufficient to fully address this limitation. These findings expose a systematic failure in absent answer detection and highlight the need for explicit detection mechanisms in multimodal systems.

AI.tldr: 本文系统地研究了多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在视频理解中的"缺失答案检测"能力，发现模型倾向于选择看似合理的干扰项而非识别出正确答案不存在，尤其在时序推理任务和密集帧采样场景下问题更为严重。链式思维提示虽能提升检测率，但仍未达到令人满意的水平。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLMs在视频理解方面取得了显著进展，但其回答的可靠性（尤其是在正确答案不存在时的检测能力）尚未被充分探索，而这一能力对于构建可信赖的AI系统至关重要。
AI.method: 设计了三种评估设置：1) 带有"以上皆非"选项的多选题；2) 带有检测指令的开放生成；3) 无任何引导的标准评估。跨多个模型和基准进行实验，并探索了链式思维提示作为缓解策略。
AI.result: MLLMs普遍无法检测到缺失答案，倾向于选择看似合理的干扰项；时序推理任务的失败率更高；密集帧采样会加剧这一问题；链式思维提示虽能提升检测率，但仍不理想。
AI.conclusion: MLLMs存在系统性的缺失答案检测失败问题，仅靠提示策略无法完全解决，亟需在多模态系统中引入显式的缺失答案检测机制。

title: Diffusion Language Model Parallel Decoding via Product-of-Experts Bridge
summary: Diffusion language models (DLMs) offer substantial speed advantages through parallel decoding, but the lack of token dependencies limits generation quality compared to autoregressive (AR) models. Recent progress attempts to bridge the gap via importance sampling, with DLM being the proposal and AR being the target. However, due to the huge gap between their distributions, the sampling requires a large number of particles and is thus expensive to compute. In this paper, we introduce PoE-Bridge, a novel decoding framework that drastically improves generation speed and accuracy by introducing an intermediate distribution to bridge the gap. The distribution is constructed as a Product-of-Experts (PoE) of the DLM proposal and the AR target. With the intermediate distribution, we first use the DLM to draft multiple continuations in parallel, then apply rejection sampling to verify the drafted tokens and move the resulting candidates toward the PoE. We then use importance sampling to further correct the PoE-aligned candidates toward the AR target. We further propose several improved techniques, including mixed-temperature sampling for enhanced diversity and elastic rejection windows for reducing wasted verification. Empirically, PoE-Bridge achieves significantly improved accuracy with $5\times$ speedup over the standard DLM decoding approach, and recovers at least 95% of the target AR model's performance, efficiently advancing most of the quality gap on challenging mathematical reasoning and coding tasks. Our code is available at https://github.com/juntongshi48/poe-bridge.

AI.tldr: PoE-Bridge 通过在 DLM 和 AR 模型之间引入产品专家分布作为桥梁，结合并行草稿生成、拒绝采样和重要性采样，在保持约5倍加速的同时恢复了目标 AR 模型至少95%的性能，有效弥合了扩散语言模型与自回归模型之间的质量差距。
AI.motivation: 扩散语言模型虽具有并行解码的速度优势，但由于缺乏 token 依赖关系，生成质量不如自回归模型。尽管已有工作通过重要性采样（DLM 为提议分布，AR 为目标分布）来弥合差距，但两者分布差距过大，需要大量粒子才能有效采样，计算成本高昂。
AI.method: 提出 PoE-Bridge 解码框架：1) 构建 DLM 提议分布与 AR 目标分布的 Product-of-Experts (PoE) 作为中间分布，缩小分布差距；2) 先用 DLM 并行草稿生成多个候选序列；3) 用拒绝采样验证草稿 token，使候选向 PoE 对齐；4) 用重要性采样进一步将 PoE 对齐的候选校正到 AR 目标分布。此外还提出混合温度采样以增强多样性，以及弹性拒绝窗口以减少验证浪费。
AI.result: PoE-Bridge 在数学推理和编程任务上，相比标准 DLM 解码方法实现了显著更高的准确率，同时保持约5倍加速；恢复了目标 AR 模型至少95%的性能，有效推进了大部分质量差距的弥合。
AI.conclusion: PoE-Bridge 通过引入 PoE 中间分布有效桥接了 DLM 和 AR 模型之间的分布差距，以可接受的推理成本实现了速度与质量的最佳平衡，为扩散语言模型的高质量高效解码提供了新思路。

title: Traxia: A Framework for Verifiable, Agent-Native Scientific Publishing
comment: 22 pages, 3 figures, 3 tables. Preprint. Under active development. Comments welcome
summary: Verifiability, attribution, and reproducibility are foundational requirements of scientific knowledge, yet current publishing infrastructure does not enforce them at scale. We introduce Traxia, an agent-native scientific publishing framework in which AI research agents publish verifiable papers, build reputational identities, peer-review one another, and collaborate with humans in a shared provenance model. Traxia treats agents as first-class epistemic participants: every paper carries a reasoning trace, every claim a confidence interval, every agent a cryptographically signed identity, and every collaboration an immutable contribution log. We formalise five components: Agent Identity and Registry, Verifiable Publishing Layer, four-tier Peer Review Protocol, Reputation and Staking Engine, and a Knowledge Graph with contradiction detection. The framework targets reproducibility failure, provenance opacity, and exclusion of Global South research capacity. This paper presents architectural foundations and formal specifications only; it does not report empirical results. Evaluation and deeper component studies will follow in subsequent papers. A prototype partially implements core formalisms; the full system remains under active development.

AI.tldr: Traxia 是一个面向AI智能体的科学出版框架，通过加密身份、推理轨迹、置信区间、同行评审和知识图谱等机制，确保科学知识的可验证性、归因性和可复现性。
AI.motivation: 当前科学出版基础设施无法大规模保障可验证性、归因性和可复现性，且存在全球南方研究能力被排斥的问题。
AI.method: 提出五组件架构：智能体身份与注册、可验证出版层、四层同行评审协议、声誉与质押引擎、带矛盾检测的知识图谱。
AI.result: 本文仅提供架构基础和形式化规范，尚未报告实证结果；原型部分实现核心形式化内容，完整系统仍在开发中。
AI.conclusion: Traxia 将AI智能体视为一等认知参与者，通过全链条可追溯的出版流程解决科学出版中的信任与复现危机。

title: What's the Point? Spatial Grammar & Index Resolution for Sign Language Processing
summary: Sign language models are predominantly trained with gloss-sequence or text supervision, thereby under-modeling non-lexical and productive constructions. One comparatively tractable instance is spatial indexing: pointing gestures that assign discourse entities to spatial loci for subsequent co-reference, which lexicon-centric objectives largely fail to capture. We present a targeted evaluation of indexing in Sign Language Recognition, showing that despite comprising 10-15% of signing content, indexing is poorly recovered. We introduce a framework for training and evaluating indexing experts, establishing a baseline for index-aware sign language modeling. Our approach decomposes spatial reference resolution into index detection and discourse entity linking. The resulting mention representations enable automatic annotation and non-lexical structure modeling, and serve as an auxiliary indexing expert that augments a frozen SLR model at inference time.

AI.tldr: 本文针对手语中空间索引（指向手势）这一非词汇结构，发现其在现有手语识别模型中恢复效果差（占内容的10-15%），提出将空间指代解析分解为索引检测和话语实体链接，并构建索引专家模块，可在推理时增强已有的手语识别模型。
AI.motivation: 现有手语模型主要依赖词汇级监督（如词汇序列或文本），忽略了非词汇性和能产性结构（如空间索引），导致模型无法捕捉指代照应关系。
AI.method: 将空间指代解析分解为两个子任务：索引检测（index detection）和话语实体链接（discourse entity linking），构建索引专家模块，在推理时作为辅助增强冻结的手语识别模型。
AI.result: 空间索引占手语内容的10-15%，但现有手语识别模型对其恢复效果很差；所提方法建立了索引感知手语建模的基线。
AI.conclusion: 提出了索引感知手语建模框架，能够自动标注并建模非词汇结构，有效弥补现有模型在空间指代解析上的不足。

title: From Validator Selection to Portfolio Collection Optimization in Proof-of-Stake Blockchains
summary: We consider a problem arising in proof-of-stake blockchain environments, where agents called nominators select validators - entities responsible for maintaining the blockchain's physical infrastructure. The selection process is inherently subjective and multi-criterial and combines with the fact that nominators commonly operate through multiple accounts. This gives rise to a portfolio selection problem, where agents seek to distribute their nominations across accounts to diversify risk. We propose a decision support framework to optimize this selection by simultaneously maximizing two objectives: the expected utility of the validators likely to be allocated, representing portfolio quality and profitability, and the expected entropy of the allocation, representing diversification and risk mitigation across stashes. Validator utilities are derived using an original active preference learning procedure based on multi-attribute value theory, with emphasis on top-ranked validators. The resulting bi-objective optimization problem is solved with a multi-objective evolutionary algorithm and, to support the final choice, we introduce an interactive binary search navigation procedure that guides the nominator through the front and identifies a satisfactory trade-off with only a few questions. Numerical experiments examine the optimization strategies, while an expert assessment involving five experienced nominators confirms the approach's practical relevance and usefulness.

AI.tldr: 本文针对 PoS 区块链环境中提名者的多账户质押组合问题，提出了一种基于主动偏好学习和多目标优化的决策支持框架，平衡组合质量与风险分散，并通过交互式二值搜索导航帮助提名者找到满意的折衷方案。
AI.motivation: 在 PoS 区块链中，提名者（nominator）需要从多个验证者（validator）中选择质押对象，这一过程是主观且多准则的，且提名者常通过多个账户操作，面临类似投资组合的风险分散问题，现有方法缺乏系统性的决策支持。
AI.method: 提出双目标优化框架：(1) 最大化预期效用（基于多属性价值理论和主动偏好学习，侧重排名靠前的验证者）；(2) 最大化预期熵（衡量风险分散程度）。采用多目标进化算法求解，并引入交互式二值搜索导航程序帮助用户在帕累托前沿上选择满意解。
AI.result: 数值实验验证了不同优化策略的效果；邀请了五位有经验的提名者进行专家评估，结果证实了该方法的实际相关性和有用性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能有效帮助提名者在组合质量与风险分散之间做出权衡，交互式导航降低了决策复杂度，具有良好的实际应用前景。

title: SurgiQ: A Large-Scale Multi-Domain Benchmark for Evaluating Surgical Understanding in Large Language Models
summary: Reliable evaluation of large language models in surgery remains underdeveloped. Broad medical benchmarks test clinical knowledge, while surgery requires procedural reasoning, management trade-offs, negation handling, and selection among plausible operative decisions. We present SurgiQ, a text-only, source-grounded benchmark of 13,055 four-option multiple-choice questions spanning six surgical domains and four question formats: case-based, reasoning, best-option, and negative. SurgiQ is constructed from surgical textbooks, open-access papers, and examination material using a multi-stage generation, verification, and expert-audit pipeline. We evaluate 35 open-weight LLMs under a unified log-likelihood protocol. Our results show substantial remaining headroom: smaller models often remain near the 25\% random baseline, while the best model reaches 68.1\% accuracy. General-purpose models, especially Qwen2.5, outperform most biomedical models, suggesting that current medical specialization does not yet provide sufficiently broad surgical coverage. Calibration and error analysis further show that even strong models make confident mistakes on clinically plausible distractors, motivating more reliable and broader surgical LLM evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SurgiQ，一个包含13,055道四选一选择题的外科基准测试集，覆盖六个外科领域和四种题型。通过评估35个开源大语言模型，发现最佳模型准确率仅68.1%，且通用模型优于生物医学专用模型，表明当前外科LLM评估仍有较大提升空间。
AI.motivation: 现有医学基准测试主要评估临床知识，但外科领域需要程序性推理、管理权衡、否定处理和手术决策选择等特殊能力，目前缺乏专门针对外科的大语言模型可靠评估基准。
AI.method: 从外科教科书、开放获取论文和考试材料出发，采用多阶段生成、验证和专家审计流程构建SurgiQ基准。包含13,055道四选一选择题，覆盖六个外科领域及四种题型（案例型、推理型、最优选项型、否定型）。在统一对数似然评估协议下测试了35个开源大语言模型。
AI.result: 较小模型接近25%随机基线，最佳模型（Qwen2.5）准确率为68.1%。通用模型整体优于生物医学专用模型，表明当前医学专业化训练未能提供足够广泛的外科知识覆盖。校准和错误分析显示，即使是强模型也会在临床合理的干扰项上犯下自信的错误。
AI.conclusion: 外科大语言模型评估仍存在显著的改进空间，需要更可靠和更广泛的外科评估基准。当前通用大模型在外科任务上表现优于专用生物医学模型，暗示现有医学预训练策略的外科覆盖不足。

title: Evaluation of ML Resource Utilization Requires Model Life Cycle Assessment
summary: Proper accounting of the energy requirements and environmental impact of artificial intelligence (AI) systems is necessary for researchers, developers, policy makers, and users to assess the barriers to building systems at scale. With the growing complexity of pipelines and underlying infrastructure needed to develop and deploy AI systems, previous approaches for evaluating AI efficiency which focus on the costs of a single training run or an individual inference prediction are no longer sufficient. In this position paper, we enunciate the need for applying life cycle assessment to evaluate the costs of the machine learning model development and deployment pipeline to properly account for the required resources and downstream impact. Life cycle assessments enable the incorporation of costs across the full life cycle of an AI system and its underlying infrastructure, from the embodied costs associated with the physical computing hardware through the operational costs in training and inference.

AI.tldr: 本文提出应使用生命周期评估（LCA）方法，全面核算AI系统从硬件制造到训练、推理全过程的能源消耗与环境影响，以替代仅关注单次训练或推理的传统评估方式。
AI.motivation: 现有AI效率评估方法仅关注单次训练或推理成本，无法反映AI系统开发与部署全链路的复杂资源消耗与环境影响，需要更全面的评估框架。
AI.method: 提出采用生命周期评估（Life Cycle Assessment, LCA）方法，涵盖AI系统及其基础设施的完整生命周期，包括硬件制造的 embodied costs（隐含成本）以及训练和推理的 operational costs（运营成本）。
AI.result: 指出传统单点评估方法已不足以应对当前AI系统的复杂性，LCA能够更准确地核算全链条的资源需求与下游影响。
AI.conclusion: 呼吁研究人员、开发者、政策制定者和用户采用生命周期评估来系统性地衡量AI系统的能源与环境成本，为规模化部署提供依据。

title: Ablation-Reversible Heads Don't Transfer: A Stress Test for Mechanistic Role Claims in Transformers
summary: In mechanistic interpretability, attention heads are commonly elevated to role claims (e.g., "this head represents addition") when they are necessary for a behavior, encode it linearly, and recover that behavior when restored after ablation. We show this evidence is insufficient: across three 7-8B instruction-tuned models and five computation families, heads passing all three checks routinely fail to transfer the computation when their activations are patched into a different prompt under matched controls. We introduce KID (Knowing / Intent / Doing), a role-assignment lens for attention heads, and pair it with a three-stage pipeline: capability-selective screening (CSS), singular value decomposition (SVD), and activation transduction under matched controls. Our results document a preliminary role taxonomy (including prompt-trajectory stabilizers, answer-side logit-bias heads, and soft computation-pattern carriers) and show that the same-answer control (a transduction target sharing the answer string but not the requested computation) is an underused check that exposes broad state transfer masquerading as semantic specificity.

AI.tldr: 本文质疑了 mechanistic interpretability 中将注意力头赋予角色（如"加法头"）的常见检验标准（必要性、线性编码、消融恢复），发现通过这三项检验的头在跨提示激活修补时仍无法迁移计算。作者提出 KID 角色分配框架和三阶段 pipeline（CSS、SVD、激活转导），揭示了新的角色分类（如提示轨迹稳定器、答案端 logit 偏置头、软计算模式载体），并强调同答案控制是暴露状态转移冒充语义特异性的关键检验。
AI.motivation: 现有 mechanistic interpretability 研究中，判断注意力头是否承担某个计算角色（如"加法"）的常用标准（必要性、线性编码、消融恢复）存在缺陷，需要更严格的检验方法。
AI.method: 在三种 7-8B 指令微调模型和五类计算族上，对通过三项标准检验的头进行跨提示激活修补实验；提出 KID（Knowing/Intent/Doing）角色分配框架和三阶段 pipeline：capability-selective screening (CSS)、singular value decomposition (SVD)、activation transduction under matched controls。
AI.result: 通过三项检验的头在跨提示修补中无法迁移计算；发现了初步的角色分类（提示轨迹稳定器、答案端 logit 偏置头、软计算模式载体）；同答案控制揭示了状态转移伪装为语义特异性的现象。
AI.conclusion: 现有角色分配标准不足，需要更严格的检验（如同答案控制）来区分真实语义特异性与表面状态转移，KID 框架为此提供了系统化方案。

title: Support Vector Rubrics: Closing the Gap Between Self-Generated and Human Rubrics
summary: Rubric-based evaluation is a promising paradigm for judging large language model (LLM) outputs, yet self-generated rubrics lag human-annotated criteria on hard instances. We argue this discriminative gap reflects an objective mismatch: self-generated rubrics describe good responses, whereas effective criteria must discriminate between close candidates. To close this gap, we introduce SVR (Support Vector Rubrics), a framework that recasts rubric construction as max-margin boundary learning over preference data. SVR mines contrastive features from preference pairs into a rubric bank, learns a prompt-conditioned selector together with global rubric weights, and iteratively refines the bank through support-pair selection and adversarial probing of hard negatives. At inference, given only the prompt, SVR retrieves the top-rubrics from the bank and scores responses. On RubricBench, SVR narrows the gap to human reference rubrics from 24.1 to 0.3 points and outperforms strong self-rubric and judge baselines, and the learned bank transfers across judges without retraining. On RewardBench 1&2, and RM-Bench, it remains competitive with dedicated reward models, demonstrating broader reward modeling capability. Overall, boundary-defining rubrics offer a principled route to closing the discriminative gap in LLM evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SVR框架，通过将评分标准构建重新定义为基于偏好数据的最大间隔边界学习，有效缩小了自生成评分标准与人工标注标准之间的判别差距，在RubricBench上将差距从24.1分缩小至0.3分。
AI.motivation: 现有自生成评分标准在困难样本上落后于人工标注标准，根本原因在于目标不匹配：自生成评分标准描述"好回答"，而有效标准应能区分相近候选回答之间的优劣。
AI.method: 提出SVR框架：从偏好对中挖掘对比特征构建评分标准库，学习提示条件化的选择器和全局评分标准权重，通过支持对选择和对抗性困难负样本挖掘迭代优化库。推理时仅需提示即可检索top评分标准并评分。
AI.result: 在RubricBench上将与人工参考标准的差距从24.1降至0.3分；在RewardBench 1&2和RM-Bench上与专用奖励模型竞争表现；评分标准库可跨评估器迁移。
AI.conclusion: 基于边界定义的评分标准为缩小LLM评估中的判别差距提供了一种原则性方法。

title: KITE: A Tri-Modal Transformer Integrating Text, Images, and Knowledge Graphs for Fake News Detection
summary: Traditional fake news detection methods are falling behind as multimodal misinformation grows more advanced, seamlessly blending deceptive text, manipulated visuals, and factually incorrect claims. Most prior work focuses on text-image fusion or applies external knowledge only as a post-processing step, limiting their ability to detect deeper semantic inconsistencies. In this paper, we introduce KITE (Knowledge-Integrated Text-Image Encoder), a tri-modal fake news detection framework that jointly models textual, visual, and factual knowledge representations. KITE leverages Roberta [23,14] and CLIP [24] for linguistic and visual encoding, while a Graph Attention Network (GAT) processes structured facts retrieved from Wikidata. KITE uses cross-modal attention [9] within a multimodal transformer to integrate text, visual, and knowledge features, helping it understand how each modality relates to one another. Modality-specific confidence scores are generated alongside the final prediction, offering interpretability by indicating which input type most influenced the decision. Evaluations on benchmark datasets demonstrate that KITE significantly outperforms unimodal and bimodal baselines, particularly in scenarios involving image-text mismatches or contradictions with external knowledge.

AI.tldr: 提出了KITE框架，一种三模态假新闻检测方法，通过联合建模文本、视觉和知识图谱表示，利用跨模态注意力机制，显著优于单模态和双模态基线方法。
AI.motivation: 传统假新闻检测方法难以应对多模态虚假信息，多数现有工作仅关注文本-图像融合，或仅在后处理阶段使用外部知识，限制了检测深层语义不一致的能力。
AI.method: KITE框架：使用Roberta和CLIP进行文本和视觉编码，通过图注意力网络（GAT）处理从Wikidata检索的结构化事实知识，采用跨模态注意力的多模态Transformer整合三模态特征，并生成模态特定置信度分数以提供可解释性。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上的评估表明，KITE显著优于单模态和双模态基线方法，特别是在图像-文本不匹配或与外部知识相矛盾的场景中。
AI.conclusion: 三模态联合建模比双模态融合更有效，外部知识图谱的引入能显著提升对深层语义不一致的检测能力，模态置信度分数为模型决策提供了可解释性。

title: Revisiting the shutdown problem
summary: A key premise in leading arguments for existential risk from artificial intelligence is that malfunctioning artificial agents could not be easily shut down. This motivates the catastrophic shutdown problem of ensuring that agents can be shut down before they cause an existential catastrophe. A range of arguments and theorems are offered to suggest that solving the catastrophic shutdown problem is difficult, bolstering arguments for existential risk and motivating a search for solutions to the catastrophic shutdown problem. This paper argues for two conclusions. First, existing arguments do not establish the difficulty of solving the catastrophic shutdown problem. Second, concern for the catastrophic shutdown problem has led to technical solutions that impose a high safety tax on model performance.

AI.tldr: 本文质疑了AI存在风险论证中的关键前提——恶意AI难以被关闭，指出现有论证并未证明解决灾难性关闭问题的难度，并且为应对该问题而采取的技术方案对模型性能造成了高昂的"安全税"。
AI.motivation: 现有关于AI存在风险的论证认为，失控的AI代理难以被关闭，这构成了灾难性关闭问题，且该问题难以解决。作者认为需要检验这一前提是否成立。
AI.method: 本文采用逻辑分析的方法，对现有关于灾难性关闭问题的论证进行批判性审视，并评估为应对该问题所提出的技术方案的实际代价。
AI.result: （1）现有论证未能真正证明灾难性关闭问题的难度；（2）为解决该问题而提出的技术方案对模型性能带来了显著的高昂代价（即安全税）。
AI.conclusion: 不应轻易接受AI难以被关闭这一前提，灾难性关闭问题的难度尚未被充分论证，且当前的技术解决方案在安全与性能之间存在严重的权衡问题。

title: Aligned but Not Partner-Specific: Distinguishing How Multimodal LLM Agents Succeed in Reference Games Without Human-Like Conventions
summary: Repeated reference games test whether interlocutors replace their initially long descriptions with shorter, partner-specific conventions grounded in shared interaction history. Prior work shows that multimodal LLMs fail to become more efficient across rounds, although they align on the labels they use. How can we determine whether this alignment reflects partner-specific grounding rather than a shared task vocabulary? We address this question by comparing capable multimodal agent dyads with human dyads from the KTH Tangrams corpus. Our novel methodological contribution is a constrained pseudo-dyad baseline that matches the original referential task structure, but breaks partner history. This baseline enables us to test whether the observed label alignment depends on interaction with a specific partner. Across three analytic layers (task competence, description strategy, alignment dynamics), we find clear differences. Humans reduce effort through entrainment, compressing descriptions and increasing label alignment with partners. Agents instead maintain fixed effort levels, producing verbose descriptions from round one, with near-ceiling label overlap that is statistically indistinguishable between real and pseudo dyads. MLLMs thus achieve coordination without convention, succeeding by verbose description rather than by forming the compact, history-dependent referring expressions characteristic of human dialogue.

AI.tldr: 本文通过提出一种约束性伪二元组基线方法，比较了多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）与人类在重复指称游戏中的表现差异，发现MLLMs虽然能实现协调，但依赖冗长描述而非人类式的历史依赖型简练约定。
AI.motivation: 现有研究显示多模态LLMs在多轮指称游戏中不会变得更高效，虽然标签会趋同。但无法确定这种趋同是伙伴特定的信息还是共享任务词汇所致，因此需要新方法来区分。
AI.method: 提出约束性伪二元组基线方法，通过打破伙伴历史但保留原始指称任务结构，对比真实二元组与伪二元组在三个分析层面（任务能力、描述策略、对齐动态）的表现。
AI.result: 人类通过交互熵减压缩描述、提升标签对齐；而MLLMs从第一轮就产出冗长描述，标签重叠度接近天花板，且真实二元组与伪二元组无统计学差异。
AI.conclusion: MLLMs实现了无约定的协调（coordination without convention），通过冗长描述而非形成人类对话中紧凑、依赖历史经验的指称表达来取得成功。

title: DOG-DPO:Dynamic Optimization in Geometry for Safety Alignment
summary: Safety alignment for large language models relies on preference data, but current pipelines often train on large, redundant datasets. Existing data selection methods typically score each preference pair independently, collapsing directional preference information into scalar quality or diversity scores. This sample-centric view is especially limiting in multi-dataset settings, where shared safety directions coexist with dataset-specific residual risks. We propose DOG-DPO, a training-free data selection framework that treats preference pairs as structured geometric signals. DOG-DPO first represents each preference pair as a direction in model representation space. It then decomposes multi-dataset preference geometry into a global anchor subspace and dataset-specific residual subspaces. Finally, it selects subsets by maximizing diversity-based coverage, encouraging broad, non-redundant coverage of alignment directions before DPO training. Across six safety benchmarks and two model backbones, DOG-DPO achieves a strong utility-robustness trade-off using only 11% of the preference pairs. It recovers most of the safety gains of full-data training while remaining entirely teacher-free, training-free, and substantially faster than representative selection baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出DOG-DPO，一种无需训练的数据选择框架，将偏好对视为结构化几何信号，通过分解多数据集偏好几何结构为全局锚点子空间和数据集特定残差子空间，仅用11%的数据即可达到接近全数据训练的鲁棒性-效用平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型安全对齐依赖偏好数据，但数据选择方法通常独立评分每个偏好对，将方向性偏好信息坍缩为标量质量或多样性分数，在多数据集场景中尤其受限。
AI.method: 将每个偏好对表示为模型表示空间中的方向，分解多数据集偏好几何结构为全局锚点子空间和数据集特定残差子空间，通过最大化多样性覆盖选择子集。
AI.result: 在六个安全基准和两个模型主干上，仅用11%的偏好对实现了强鲁棒性-效用权衡，恢复了全数据训练的大部分安全收益，且无需教师模型、无需训练、速度显著快于代表性基线。
AI.conclusion: DOG-DPO是一种高效、无需训练的数据选择方法，通过几何视角处理偏好数据，在极低数据量下仍保持出色的安全对齐效果。

title: To Nuke or Not to Nuke: LLMs' (Missing) Ethical Reasoning and Actions in a High-Stakes Decision-Making Simulation
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed as long-horizon agents with decision-making capacities. While LLMs can show ethical competence on dilemmas such as trolley problems, this competence may not translate to complex, agentic scenarios. We study this gap in Civilization V, a multiplayer game with a complex decision-making landscape including economy, diplomacy, technology, and military strategy. Starting from 130 high-tension LLM self-play episodes, in which an LLM player spontaneously escalated nuclear authorization, we replay them across 13 models with three prompt interventions: an ethical prompt naming nuclear harm, removal of the previous model's decision-making rationale, and high-stakes framing emphasizing real-world impacts. No interventions nor their combinations reliably eliminate emergent escalation. We identify three failure pathways: ethical reasoning that fails to surface without prompting, fails to appear even when prompted, or surfaces but fails to take effect when strategic counter-factors dominate. Evaluations of agentic models, therefore, must test whether ethical reasoning is spontaneously invoked and behaviorally effective in complex decision-making contexts, beyond whether it can be elicited in isolation.

AI.tldr: 在《文明V》游戏中，LLM智能体在复杂决策场景下会自发升级核武器授权，即便施加伦理提示、移除决策理由和高风险框架等干预措施，也无法可靠消除这种升级行为。研究识别出三条伦理推理失效路径：无法被触发、被触发但失效、被触发但被战略因素压倒。
AI.motivation: 现有研究仅在简单困境（如电车难题）中测试LLM的伦理能力，但缺乏在复杂、自主决策的智能体场景中检验其伦理推理是否自发产生并有效执行的研究。
AI.method: 基于130场高紧张度LLM自我对弈《文明V》游戏记录，对13个模型回放，施加三种干预：伦理提示（指出核武危害）、移除先前模型的决策理由、高风险框架（强调现实影响），分析干预效果及失败路径。
AI.result: 所有干预及其组合均无法可靠消除LLM在复杂场景中的核升级行为。识别出三条伦理推理失效路径：1）伦理推理未被触发；2）被触发但未出现；3）出现但被战略因素压倒而无效。
AI.conclusion: 评估智能体模型时，不仅要测试其能否在孤立情境中展现伦理推理，更要检验其在复杂决策场景中是否自发调用伦理推理并产生实际行为效果。

title: When Languages Disagree: Self-Evolving Multilingual LLM Judges
summary: Multilingual LLM-as-a-judge is widely used to evaluate model outputs across languages, but suffers from cross-lingual inconsistency (Fu and Liu, 2025). Existing methods typically treat this inconsistency as noise and mitigate it through voting or aggregation. In this work, we instead show that multilingual inconsistency can provide complementary evaluation signals. Our oracle analysis finds that sampling judgments across languages yields a higher performance upper bound than single-language judging, indicating that different languages potentially include complementary judgments. Motivated by this finding, we propose SEMJ, a self-evolving multilingual judge that leverages cross-lingual inconsistency for iterative refinement. SEMJ constructs multilingual variants of each input, collects independent judgments and rationales, and feeds inconsistent outputs back for self-reflection and re-evaluation. Experiments on multiple benchmarks show that SEMJ consistently outperforms voting and reflection baselines in both accuracy and cross-lingual consistency. Further analysis shows that inconsistency triggers useful re-evaluation, which improves judgment quality.

AI.tldr: 提出SEMJ方法，利用多语言评判中的跨语言不一致性作为互补信号进行迭代自我反思与优化，比传统投票/聚合方法效果更好。
AI.motivation: 现有多语言LLM-as-a-judge存在跨语言不一致性问题，此前方法将其视为噪声并试图消除，但作者发现这种不一致性实际上包含了互补的评价信息，可以加以利用。
AI.method: 提出SEMJ（自进化多语言评判器）：1）为每个输入构建多语言变体；2）收集各语言的独立判断和推理过程；3）将不一致的输出反馈给模型进行自我反思和重新评估。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试上，SEMJ在准确率和跨语言一致性两方面均优于投票方法和反思基线。Oracle分析表明，跨语言采样判断的性能上限高于单语言判断。
AI.conclusion: 跨语言不一致性并非单纯的噪声，而是可以作为有用的补充信号来触发有效的重新评估，从而提升评判质量。

title: Semantic Cache Distillation: Efficient State Transfer via Reuse and Selective Patching
summary: Disaggregated serving alleviates memory bottlenecks in Large Language Model (LLM) inference but creates a severe communication bottleneck: transmitting high-dimensional Key-Value (KV) caches often dominates time-to-first-token (TTFT). Moreover, reusing caches across heterogeneous models (e.g., base and fine-tuned variants) causes semantic misalignment that accumulates over layers, degrading generation quality. We propose Semantic Cache Distillation (SCD), a loss-constrained framework that replaces raw KV transmission with compact semantic codes. SCD addresses these challenges via two mechanisms: (1) Reuse, which reconstructs most layers from low-rank subspaces to minimize transfer cost, and (2) Patch, which predicts normalized inputs at sparse transition layers to truncate error propagation. Empirically, SCD delivers up to 2.65 $\times$ TTFT speedup over the oracle consumer prefill and dominates quantization and selective recomputation baselines on the quality--latency Pareto frontier in bandwidth-constrained regimes, while keeping generation quality within 5\% F1 of the oracle.

AI.tldr: 提出语义缓存蒸馏(SCD)框架，用紧凑语义码替代原始KV传输，通过Reuse（低秩子空间重建）和Patch（稀疏过渡层预测）两个机制，在带宽受限场景下实现最高2.65倍TTFT加速，同时保证生成质量在oracle的5% F1以内。
AI.motivation: 解聚式LLM推理中KV缓存传输造成严重通信瓶颈（主导TTFT），且跨异构模型复用缓存会导致语义错配逐层累积，损害生成质量。
AI.method: 提出SCD框架，包含两个机制：(1) Reuse：从低秩子空间重建大部分层，最小化传输成本；(2) Patch：在稀疏过渡层预测归一化输入，截断误差传播。整体采用有损约束框架。
AI.result: 相比oracle consumer prefill实现最高2.65倍TTFT加速；在带宽受限场景下，在质量-延迟帕累托前沿上优于量化和选择性重计算基线；生成质量保持在oracle的5% F1以内。
AI.conclusion: SCD有效解决了解聚式推理中的通信瓶颈和跨模型语义错配问题，在显著加速TTFT的同时保持了高质量的生成效果。

title: Curation of a Cardiology Interface Terminology for Highlighting Electronic Health Records using Machine Learning
summary: Electronic health record (EHR) notes are dense medical documents containing large amounts of information, often filled with complex medical jargon. Highlighting all details in EHRs helps reduce the likelihood of missing crucial information by drawing attention to key content. This study proposes the design of a Cardiology Interface Terminology (CIT) to accurately highlight all details in EHR notes of cardiology patients. We introduce an innovative Machine Learning (ML) technique for the design of CIT. The ML technique requires training data. Manual preparation of such training data is time-consuming and expensive. The process of the CIT design includes three phases. In the first two phases, we innovatively derive a training data CIT to be used by the third phase, ML technique. We start by designing an initial CIT, composed of several components: the cardiology-related sub-hierarchies of SNOMED, other SNOMED concepts mined from EHRs of build set, and necessary components of terms e.g., medical abbreviations and medications. Utilizing an iterative process, fine-grained phrases containing initial CIT concepts are extracted from build set as CIT concept candidates. The candidate concepts are semi-automatically reviewed before being added to CIT, yielding the training data CIT, TCIT. In the third phase, a ML model is trained with TCIT to identify candidates fitting to be concepts in the CIT. This model is used to extract further concepts from build set, yielding the final CIT. The final CIT is then used to highlight the test set and evaluate the extent to which it captures details in an unseen EHR dataset. For this purpose, four evaluation metrics, coverage, breadth, completeness, and conciseness are used. The highlighted test set has a coverage of 74.21%, with a breadth of 1.68. For 20 random notes in test set, the average completeness is 98.2% and average conciseness is 84.2%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种创新的机器学习方法，通过半自动构建训练数据（TCIT）来设计心脏病学接口术语（CIT），用于高亮EHR病历中的细节，在测试集上实现了74.21%的覆盖率和98.2%的完整性。
AI.motivation: EHR病历含有大量复杂医学术语，遗漏关键信息可能造成严重后果。高亮所有细节有助于减少遗漏，但目前缺乏针对心脏病学病历的术语高亮系统。
AI.method: 三阶段流程：第一阶段设计初始CIT（基于SNOMED子层次、EHR挖掘的概念、医学术语缩写等）；第二阶段通过迭代提取和半自动审核构建训练数据TCIT；第三阶段用TCIT训练ML模型，自动提取更多概念形成最终CIT。
AI.result: 测试集覆盖率为74.21%，广度1.68；随机20份病历的平均完整性98.2%，平均简洁性84.2%。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的CIT设计方法能有效高亮心脏病学EHR病历中的细节，在完整性和简洁性上表现良好，为临床信息提取提供了可行的解决方案。

title: Cross Paraphrastic Invariance Learning for Hallucination Detection
summary: Large language models (LLMs) frequently generate hallucinations, which are unsupported by a source document. To avoid costly LLM-as-evaluator pipelines and the heavy annotation demands of existing classifiers, we propose CPIL (Cross Paraphrastic Invariance Learning), a two-stage Siamese framework that maximizes the utility of existing labeled data. Concretely, CPIL constructs informative training pairs by: (i) generating paraphrastic views of each document-claim example as positives, and explicitly aligning their representations to enforce invariance to surface form; and (ii) mining same-document, opposite-label pairs as hard negatives to sharpen document-sensitive decision boundaries. Then CPIL conduct a two-stage model training: Stage 1 performs contrastive pretraining to learn a paraphrase-invariant, grounding-aware embedding space; and Stage 2 attaches a lightweight classifier for binary groundedness. On the LLM-AggreFact benchmark (11 tasks), CPIL surpasses strong baselines concerning F1 scores with only ~1% labeled data, showing its prediction superiority and label efficiency.

AI.tldr: CPIL是一个两阶段孪生网络框架，通过回译构造正样本对、挖掘同文档异标签的硬负样本对，结合对比预训练和轻量分类器，在仅用1%标注数据的情况下超越多个强基线，实现高效的事实性检测。
AI.motivation: LLM生成内容常出现幻觉，现有检测方法要么依赖昂贵的LLM评估管线，要么需要大量人工标注，亟需一种能最大化利用现有有限标注数据的高效检测方案。
AI.method: 两阶段孪生框架：(i) 构造正样本对（回译生成同义表述）和硬负样本对（同文档不同标签的样本）；(ii) 阶段1进行对比预训练学习释义不变且感知事实性的嵌入空间，阶段2附加轻量分类器进行二分类。
AI.result: 在LLM-AggreFact benchmark的11个任务上，CPIL仅用约1%的标注数据即在F1分数上超越多个强基线，展现了优越的预测性能和标签效率。
AI.conclusion: CPIL通过精心设计的对比学习策略，在极低标注率下实现了高效的事实性检测，为降低幻觉检测的标注成本提供了一种有效方案。

title: Test-Time Adaptive Composition for Machine Learning as a Service (MLaaS) in IoT Environments
summary: The dynamic nature of Internet of Things (IoT) environments affects the long-term effectiveness of Machine Learning as a Service (MLaaS) compositions. Existing adaptive composition methods are mainly based on service replacement or re-composition, where identifying suitable substitutes is difficult and time-consuming. To address this, we propose a novel Test-Time Adaptive (TTA) composition framework for MLaaS in IoT environments. First, we introduce a TTA-aware composability model to determine whether adapted services remain compatible with the existing composition. Next, we design a service-level adaptation model to adjust individual services during inference while preserving composition performance. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed framework reduces computational time more effectively than traditional adaptive approaches.

AI.tldr: 针对IoT环境中MLaaS组合因动态变化导致传统自适应方法耗时且难以找到合适替代服务的问题，提出了一种测试时自适应（TTA）组合框架，通过TTA感知的可组合性模型和服务级自适应模型，在推理阶段调整单个服务并保持组合性能，实验证明该方法比传统自适应方法更有效地减少了计算时间。
AI.motivation: IoT环境的动态性会影响MLaaS组合的长期有效性，而现有的基于服务替换或重组合的自适应方法难以快速找到合适的替代服务，且耗时较长。
AI.method: 提出了一种测试时自适应（TTA）组合框架，包含两部分：1）TTA感知的可组合性模型，用于判断自适应后的服务是否与现有组合保持兼容；2）服务级自适应模型，在推理阶段调整单个服务，同时保持组合的整体性能。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该框架相比传统的自适应方法能更有效地减少计算时间。
AI.conclusion: 基于TTA的组合框架能够在IoT动态环境中实现更高效的MLaaS自适应，避免耗时的服务替换或重组合过程。

title: Neuro-Symbolic Injection of LTLf Constraints in Autoregressive Reinforcement Learning Policies
comment: Accepted at the Joint Workshop on Statistics and Knowledge Integration for Logic, Learning, Ethical Decisions, and LLMs (SKILLED-LLMs 2026), co-located with KR 2026 and FLoC 2026, Lisbon, Portugal
summary: In this work we study offline reinforcement learning (RL) under temporally extended task constraints expressed in Linear Temporal Logic over finite traces (LTLf). Recently, transformer-based approaches such as Trajectory Transformers and Decision Transformers have been adopted to address RL as a sequence modeling problem. However, these methods optimize purely for reward and do not account for high-level temporal requirements. Here, we introduce a neurosymbolic framework that injects LTLf background knowledge into such transformer-based RL policies. Our approach compiles LTLf formulas into deterministic finite automata (DFAs) and integrates them into the learning process through a differentiable representation and a logic-based loss function. In particular, we derive differentiable satisfaction signals from DFA progression and use them as a regularization term during training. The resulting method is architecture-agnostic across different models. We evaluate the proposed framework on navigation environments with specification suites covering combinations of safety and reachability temporal properties. Experimental results show that incorporating background knowledge not only improves constraint satisfaction, but also maintains competitive return compared to vanilla baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个神经符号框架，将LTLf时序逻辑约束转化为确定性有限自动机（DFA），并通过可微表示和逻辑损失函数注入到基于Transformer的离线强化学习策略中，在保证奖励性能的同时提升约束满足度。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Transformer的离线强化学习方法（如Trajectory Transformers、Decision Transformers）仅优化奖励函数，无法处理LTLf表达的高阶时序任务约束（如安全性、可达性等），缺乏对时序逻辑背景知识的利用。
AI.method: 1) 将LTLf公式编译为确定性有限自动机（DFA）；2) 从DFA进展中推导可微的满足信号；3) 将可微满足信号作为正则化项融入Transformer策略的训练损失函数中；4) 该方法与不同Transformer架构兼容（架构无关）。
AI.result: 在导航环境中的实验表明，该方法相比原始基线在满足时序约束方面取得改进，同时保持了有竞争力的奖励回报。
AI.conclusion: 将LTLf背景知识以DFA可微正则化的方式注入Transformer策略，能有效提升时序约束满足度，且不显著损害原始奖励优化目标，为离线RL中的时序任务约束提供了一种灵活的神经符号融合方案。

title: Constrained Paraphrase Consistency for LLM Hallucination Detection
summary: Large language models (LLMs) can generate factually inconsistent claims, motivating accurate and scalable hallucination detectors. Prior work largely enlarges training sets via synthesis or new annotations, introducing increasing cost and potential bias while underusing the consistency implied by semantically equivalent paraphrases. We propose Consistency-Constrained Hallucination Detector (CCHD), which formulates training as a constrained optimization problem. The standard cross-entropy on original document-claim pairs is complemented by (i) paraphrase-consistency constraints bounding divergence across paraphrased views, and (ii) label-preservation constraints tying paraphrases to ground truth. We solve the problem by gradient descent-ascent over model parameters and per-view Lagrange multipliers, adding only a few scalar dual variables and no inference-time overhead. With DeBERTa and Flan-T5 backbones, CCHD consistently outperforms strong baselines (FactCG, MiniCheck, and AlignScore) on standard factuality benchmarks, demonstrating its superiority on hallucination detection.

AI.tldr: 提出CCHD方法，通过约束优化利用语义等价的同义改写来增强幻觉检测，无需额外数据标注或推理开销，在多个基准上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有幻觉检测方法主要依赖扩大训练集（合成数据或新标注），成本高、引入偏差，且未充分利用语义等价改写中蕴含的一致性信息。
AI.method: 将训练形式化为约束优化问题：标准交叉熵损失 + 同义改写一致性约束（限制改写视图间的分歧）+ 标签保持约束（改写与真实标签一致）。通过梯度下降-上升算法优化模型参数和每个视图的拉格朗日乘子，仅增加少量标量对偶变量，无推理开销。
AI.result: 基于DeBERTa和Flan-T5骨干网络，CCHD在标准事实性基准上 consistently 优于 FactCG、MiniCheck、AlignScore 等强基线方法。
AI.conclusion: CCHD通过约束优化有效利用同义改写的一致性信息，在不增加推理成本的前提下显著提升了幻觉检测性能。

title: Knowledge-Inclusive Adaptive Physics-Informed Neural Network for Microbial Interaction Modelling
summary: Physics-Informed Neural Network (PINN) is a way of including knowledge in the form of equations in Machine Learning methods. Beyond equations, knowledge exists in other forms, such as text and network structure. While existing PINN-based approaches discover equation parameters from data, they rely solely on experimental measurements. We propose a new PINN framework that enriches parameter discovery by incorporating auxiliary knowledge sources. We instantiate our framework for microbiology, where generalised Lotka-Volterra (gLV) serves as a biological foundation for modelling microbial communities. We demonstrate that incorporating knowledge improves microbial community modelling. Our framework enriches the gLV parameters using peer-reviewed metagenomics literature, as text provides biological context on external influences that gLV alone cannot capture. We combine this knowledge with experimental measurements of microbial abundance using a data-driven integration approach. We integrate network-based structural knowledge by explicitly modelling microbial interactions. Our knowledge-inclusive framework infers microbial networks, revealing ecological insights. We validate these findings against ecological roles documented in the literature. We evaluate on real and simulated datasets spanning human- and plant-associated microbial communities. Our framework improves over the state-of-the-art by up to 53%, even without knowledge. Knowledge addition yields gains of up to 23% in Bray-Curtis Dissimilarity-based accuracy and 47% in $\mathrm{R}^2$.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种知识增强的物理信息神经网络（KI-PINN）框架，通过整合文本和网络结构等辅助知识源，改进了广义Lotka-Volterra（gLV）模型的参数发现，在微生物群落建模中相较现有方法最高提升53%的准确度。
AI.motivation: 现有PINN方法仅依赖实验测量数据发现方程参数，忽略了文本、网络结构等其他形式的知识。这些辅助知识能为微生物群落建模提供重要的生物学背景（如外部影响），但未被现有方法利用。
AI.method: 1）提出一个知识包容的PINN框架，融合文本知识（来自同行评审的宏基因组学文献）和网络结构知识（显式建模微生物相互作用）；2）将文本知识用于丰富gLV参数，提供外部影响的生物学背景；3）采用数据驱动的整合方法融合知识与实验测量数据；4）推断微生物网络以揭示生态学见解。
AI.result: 在真实和模拟数据集（涵盖人体和植物相关微生物群落）上，框架相比现有最优方法提升高达53%（无知识时）；加入知识后，Bray-Curtis Dissimilarity准确度提升23%，R²提升47%。
AI.conclusion: 证明辅助知识源（文本和网络结构）能显著提升PINN框架的微生物群落建模性能，推断出的微生物网络符合文献记载的生态角色，为知识增强的物理信息学习提供了有效范例。

title: Integrating Deep Learning Demand Forecasting with Multi-Objective Optimization for Circular Coffee Supply Chains: A Data-Driven Framework for Cost, Emissions, and Freshness Management
summary:
The coffee supply chain is one of the most complex agri-food networks, marked by geographically dispersed production, multi-tier coordination, and high sensitivity to quality and freshness. While sustainability and digitalization have gained attention, demand forecasting, optimization, and traceability are often treated separately. This study presents a two-phase integrated framework. First, a hybrid CNN-LSTM model is used for demand forecasting. On the public Coffee Chain Sales dataset with chronological 70/15/15 splitting, the model achieves MAE of 22.87 and R^2 of 0.90, outperforming the best deep learning benchmark by ~12% and classical methods by over 30%. In the second phase, the forecasted demand feeds a tri-objective mixed-integer linear programming (MILP) model that jointly minimizes cost, minimizes carbon emissions, and maximizes product freshness in a multi-period, multimodal, closed-loop supply chain with circular recovery. Freshness is modeled via exponential decay based on inventory age. Using the epsilon-constraint method, 25 Pareto solutions are obtained. Sensitivity and policy analyses show that balanced sustainability policies can reduce emissions by 22.4% with only a 9.9% cost increase while maintaining near-optimal freshness.
  Keywords: Coffee supply chain; Deep learning; Demand forecasting; Multi-objective optimization; Circular economy; CNN-LSTM; Mixed-integer linear programming.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个两阶段集成框架，先使用混合CNN-LSTM模型进行咖啡供应链需求预测（MAE=22.87，R²=0.90），再将预测结果输入三目标混合整数线性规划模型，同时优化成本、碳排放和产品新鲜度，采用ε-约束法获得25个帕累托解。平衡策略可在仅增9.9%成本下减少22.4%排放。
AI.motivation: 咖啡供应链复杂，需求预测、优化和可追溯性通常被分开处理，缺乏集成框架。现有研究未将深度学习预测与多目标优化有效结合，且对新鲜度（基于库存年龄的指数衰减）建模不足。
AI.method: 两阶段框架：第一阶段用混合CNN-LSTM模型进行需求预测（70/15/15时间序列划分）；第二阶段将预测需求输入三目标MILP模型，使用ε-约束法求解帕累托前沿。目标函数包括最小化成本、最小化碳排放和最大化产品新鲜度（指数衰减模型）。
AI.result: CNN-LSTM模型MAE为22.87，R²为0.90，优于最佳深度学习基准约12%，优于经典方法超30%。ε-约束法获得25个帕累托解。平衡可持续性策略可减少22.4%碳排放，仅增加9.9%成本，同时保持接近最优的新鲜度。
AI.conclusion: 提出的集成框架有效连接了需求预测与多目标优化，为咖啡供应链的可持续运营提供了决策支持，证明了深度学习与运筹优化结合在复杂农产品供应链中的潜力。

title: TextEconomizer: Enhancing Lossy Text Compression with Denoising Transformers and Entropy Coding
summary: Lossy text compression reduces data size while preserving core meaning, making it well-suited for summarization, automated analysis, and digital archives. Despite the dominance of transformer-based models in language modeling, integrating context vectors and entropy coding into Sequence-to-Sequence (Seq2Seq) generation remains underexplored. A key challenge lies in identifying the most informative context vectors from encoder output and incorporating entropy coding to enhance storage efficiency while maintaining high-quality outputs, even under noisy text. We introduce TextEconomizer, an encoder-decoder framework paired with a transformer neural network that reduces variable-sized inputs by 50% to 80% without prior knowledge of dataset dimensions. Our model achieves competitive compression ratios via entropy coding while delivering near-perfect text quality, assessed by BLEU, ROUGE, METEOR, and semantic similarity scores. TextEconomizer operates with approximately 153x fewer parameters than comparable models, achieving a 5.39x compression ratio without sacrificing semantic quality. We also evaluate an LSTM-based autoencoder achieving a state-of-the-art 67x compression ratio with 196x fewer parameters, and LLaMAFormer, a modified transformer with 263x fewer parameters than ICAE while maintaining competitive text quality. TextEconomizer significantly surpasses existing transformer-based models in balancing memory efficiency and high-fidelity outputs, marking a breakthrough in lossy compression with optimal space utilization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TextEconomizer框架，一种基于编码器-解码器和Transformer的损失性文本压缩方法，能在无先验知识下将输入压缩50%-80%，实现5.39倍压缩比且语义质量近乎完美，参数仅为同类模型的1/153。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer模型虽在语言建模中占主导地位，但将上下文向量与熵编码集成到Seq2Seq生成中的研究不足；同时需要从编码器输出中识别最具信息量的上下文向量，并在噪声文本下维持高质量输出与存储效率的平衡。
AI.method: 提出TextEconomizer框架：基于编码器-解码器结构搭配Transformer神经网络，结合熵编码实现压缩；无需预知数据集维度即可将可变长度输入压缩50%-80%。同时评估了LSTM自编码器（67倍压缩比、参数减少196倍）和LLaMAFormer（参数比ICAE少263倍）。
AI.result: TextEconomizer以约153倍参数缩减实现5.39倍压缩比，BLEU、ROUGE、METEOR和语义相似度评分显示文本质量近乎完美；LSTM自编码器达到67倍压缩比（参数少196倍）；LLaMAFormer参数比ICAE少263倍且文本质量有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: TextEconomizer在内存效率与高保真输出之间实现了卓越平衡，显著超越现有Transformer模型，标志着损失性压缩在最优空间利用方面的突破。

title: HARP: Efficient Data Selection for Finetuning Large Language Models
summary: Finetuning data selection requires balancing two competing goals: selecting examples that improve the downstream objective, and doing so without repeatedly finetuning models. Train-free selectors are scalable but rely on proxies such as embedding similarity or clustering, which may not match the target objective. Train-based selectors better reflect downstream utility through gradient signals, subset evaluation, or Shapley attribution, but require many costly train--evaluate iterations. We propose Hierarchical Active Region Pruning (HARP), an efficient train-based selector that preserves downstream alignment while reducing selection cost. HARP organizes the training pool into a node--leaf hierarchy, evaluates only representative leaves, and infers unmeasured utilities with empirical Bayes posteriors. It then selects data using two complementary envelopes: HARP-C, which conservatively controls redundancy, and HARP-E, which additively rewards complementary regions. We theoretically show that, under local smoothness and bounded estimation error, HARP controls selection error while reducing train--evaluate cost. We further validate that HARP variants achieve the best result and outperform the strongest baseline by up to $+8.9$ points, while using roughly $7\times$ fewer training examples.

AI.tldr: 提出HARP方法，通过层次化活跃区域剪枝，在保持数据选择质量的同时大幅降低训练-评估成本，性能提升最高达+8.9个点，训练量减少约7倍。
AI.motivation: 微调数据选择需要在提升下游目标与避免反复微调之间取得平衡。现有方法中，无训练选择器可扩展但与目标不对齐；有训练选择器效果好但计算成本高。
AI.method: HARP将训练池组织成节点-叶子层次结构，仅评估代表性叶子节点，利用经验贝叶斯后验推断未测量效用，并通过两种互补策略（保守的HARP-C控制冗余，加性的HARP-E奖励互补区域）选择数据。
AI.result: 理论上证明在局部平滑和有界估计误差条件下HARP能控制选择误差并降低训练-评估成本；实验上HARP变体达到最佳结果，比最强基线高出最多+8.9个点，同时使用约7倍更少的训练样本。
AI.conclusion: HARP是一种高效的基于训练的数据选择器，成功平衡了数据质量与计算效率，具有理论保障和显著的实际性能优势。

title: Benchmarking Open-Ended Multi-Agent Coordination in Language Agents
summary: As language models are increasingly deployed as autonomous agents, they must coordinate with others over long horizons in open-ended interactive tasks. Yet existing evaluations rarely test these demands together, instead emphasising single-agent tasks, short interactions, or highly structured multi-agent settings. We introduce $alem$, a JAX-based benchmark for open-ended multi-agent coordination built on Craftax-like dynamics. Alem embeds procedurally generated coordination tasks, soft specialisation, communication, and controllable coordination difficulty into a long-horizon survival world with exploration, crafting, trading, and combat. We evaluate $13$ modern LLMs zero-shot within homogeneous teams, with trained MARL agents as reference points. Current LLM agents remain far from solving alem, averaging only ~6% normalised return, but their failures are not uniform. On the hardest coordination setting, zero-shot Gemini-3.1-Pro-High approaches MARL agents trained for one billion steps, while GPT-5.4-High achieves strong base-task reward but much lower coordination reward. This contrast shows that individual task competence does not imply coordination competence. Ablations show that communication is the largest contributor to coordination, while memory and reasoning help when used to maintain multi-step plans. Overall, our results identify coordination as a distinct bottleneck for frontier LLM agents, separate from single-agent capabilities. Alem makes this bottleneck measurable and provides a controlled testbed for developing agents that communicate, allocate roles, and execute shared plans. Code is available at https://github.com/alem-world/alem-env.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Alem，一个基于JAX的开放多智能体协调基准测试，评估了13个现代LLM在长时程协作任务中的表现，发现当前LLM智能体平均仅达到约6%的归一化回报，且个体任务能力与协调能力之间存在显著差距。
AI.motivation: 现有评估很少同时测试LLM在开放交互任务中的长时程协作能力，大多聚焦于单智能体任务、短时交互或高度结构化的多智能体场景，缺乏对多智能体协调瓶颈的系统评估。
AI.method: 基于Craftax-like动力学构建JAX基准测试Alem，包含程序化生成的协调任务、软专业化、通信机制和可控协调难度，在长时程生存世界中整合探索、制造、交易和战斗。评估13个现代LLM在零样本同质团队中的表现，以训练的MARL智能体为参考。
AI.result: 当前LLM智能体平均仅约6%归一化回报；在最难协调设置下，Gemini-3.1-Pro-High接近训练10亿步的MARL智能体，GPT-5.4-High基础任务奖励高但协调奖励低。消融实验表明通信对协调贡献最大，记忆和推理有助于维护多步计划。
AI.conclusion: 个体任务能力不等于协调能力，协调是前沿LLM智能体的独立瓶颈。Alem使这一瓶颈可量化，并为开发能够通信、分配角色和执行共享计划的智能体提供了受控测试平台。

title: GlobeAudio: A Multilingual Multicultural Benchmark for Naturalistic Evaluation of Large Audio-Language Models
summary: Large Audio-Language Models (LALMs) integrate audio perception and language understanding within a unified framework, enabling a wide range of real-world applications. Despite recent advances, evaluation for LALMs remains heavily underspecified relative to real-world requirements: most lack true linguistic and cultural authenticity, while others fail to capture acoustic realism. To bridge this gap, we propose GlobeAudio, a multilingual and multicultural benchmark designed to evaluate naturalistic audio understanding. GlobeAudio consists of 5,637 multiple-choice questions across six typologically diverse languages, expertly crafted by native speakers grounded on naturally occurring audio. In order to do well, models must possess higher-level auditory reasoning skills and culturally grounded interpretation. We systematically evaluate representative closed-source and open-source LALMs, as well as cascaded ASR-LLM pipelines. Our experiments reveal substantial performance gaps under natural acoustic conditions, particularly for open-source models and low-resource languages. These findings highlight critical limitations of current LALMs and underscore the importance of naturalistic audio evaluation for future audio-language systems. GlobeAudio can be found at https://huggingface.co/datasets/iNLP-Lab/GlobeAudio .

AI.tldr: GlobeAudio是一个多语言、多文化的自然音频理解基准测试，包含5,637道多选题，覆盖6种语言。评估发现当前的大规模音频语言模型（尤其是开源模型和低资源语言）在自然声学条件下表现显著不佳。
AI.motivation: 现有音频语言模型评估缺乏语言文化真实性和声学真实性，无法反映真实世界需求。
AI.method: 构建了由母语者基于自然音频精心设计的5,637道多选题基准，涵盖6种类型多样的语言，评估模型的高层次听觉推理和文化解读能力。
AI.result: 闭源和开源LALM以及级联ASR-LLM流水线在自然声学条件下表现差距显著，开源模型和低资源语言尤其落后。
AI.conclusion: 当前音频语言模型存在关键局限性，未来系统需要重视自然主义音频评估。

title: BCG-FM: A Foundation Model for Ambient Cardiac Health Sensing
summary: Foundation models for wearable biosignals have matched or exceeded supervised specialists across a range of clinical tasks, yet all rely on modalities that require deliberate user action--wearing a device or visiting a sleep lab. We introduce BCG-FM, the first foundation model for ambient mechanical biosignals. A piezoelectric sensor embedded in the bed surface records ballistocardiography (BCG) each night without user effort; we pretrain BCG-FM with participant-level contrastive learning and using a total of 2.75 million hours of nightly recordings from 145,985 individuals, the largest raw-waveform biosignal pretraining corpus to date. Frozen BCG-FM embeddings achieve 3.26-year MAE on biological-age estimation (the lowest reported for any ambient, contactless modality) and yield clinically relevant discrimination across 15 self-reported health conditions and three independent external cohorts. Pretrained representations from only 500 labeled participants outperform a fully supervised baseline trained on 3,372, and representation quality scales log-linearly with contrastive batch size. These results establish ambient, longitudinal mechanical biosignals as a viable modality for health foundation models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了BCG-FM，首个面向环境机械生物信号的基础模型。利用嵌入床面的压电传感器记录夜间心跳震动图（BCG），无需用户主动操作。在145,985人、275万小时的数据上通过参与者级对比学习预训练。模型在生物年龄估计上达到3.26年MAE（环境非接触模态最低），对15种自报健康条件及三个外部独立队列具有临床辨别力。仅需500个标注样本即可超越全监督基线（3372样本），表征质量与对比批次大小呈对数线性关系。
AI.motivation: 现有可穿戴生物信号基础模型均依赖用户主动佩戴设备或前往睡眠实验室，缺乏无需用户刻意操作的被动式环境监测方案。作者希望探索环境机械生物信号（如床面BCG）是否也能构建有效的基础模型，实现无需用户努力的健康监测。
AI.method: （1）利用嵌入床面的压电传感器采集夜间BCG信号；（2）构建包含145,985人、275万小时夜间记录的预训练语料库；（3）采用参与者级对比学习（participant-level contrastive learning）进行预训练；（4）将冻结的BCG-FM嵌入用于多种下游任务评估。
AI.result: （1）生物年龄估计MAE为3.26年，为环境非接触模态最低；（2）对15种自报健康条件和三个外部独立队列具有临床辨别力；（3）仅需500个标注样本的预训练表征即超越3372样本的全监督基线；（4）表征质量与对比批次大小呈对数线性关系。
AI.conclusion: 环境、纵向的机械生物信号是一种可行的健康基础模型模态。BCG-FM证明了无需用户主动操作、被动式夜间监测即可获得有临床价值的健康表征，为未来环境健康监测基础模型奠定了基础。

title: AlignFed: Alignment-Aware Asynchronous Federated Fine-Tuning for Large Language Models in Heterogeneous Edge Environments
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have significantly propelled the advancement of edge intelligence and have been widely deployed across various scenarios, including autonomous driving, industrial inspection, and personalized IoT services. However, the collaborative adaptation of LLMs on edge devices continues to face formidable challenges due to strict data privacy constraints, highly heterogeneous computing and communication resources, and the non-independent and identically distributed (non-IID) nature of local data. Federated Fine-Tuning (FFT) enables the collaborative optimization of distributed models without exposing raw data. Yet, traditional synchronous aggregation suffers from a severe straggler effect, resulting in high system latency and low resource utilization. Existing asynchronous federated learning methods are predominantly designed for small-to-medium-scale models and struggle to address the specific challenges inherent in LLM fine-tuning namely, model drift caused by stale updates, aggravated client drift stemming from data heterogeneity, and aggregation fairness imbalance resulting from the dominance of fast clients. To address these issues, this paper proposes AlignFed, an asynchronous federated fine-tuning framework for LLMs tailored to heterogeneous edge environments. AlignFed employs a lightweight multi-stage semantic alignment mechanism comprising three core modules: version-aware update grouping, cross-version semantic alignment based on a mini-batch calibration set, and fairness-aware aggregation that integrates both update freshness and client participation frequency. This framework effectively mitigates cross-version model drift and client drift while enhancing aggregation fairness, thereby achieving stable and efficient asynchronous federated optimization in scenarios characterized by high heterogeneity and significant update staleness.

AI.tldr: 提出AlignFed，一个面向异构边缘环境的异步联邦微调框架，通过轻量级多阶段语义对齐机制解决LLM联邦微调中的模型漂移、客户端漂移和聚合公平性失衡问题。
AI.motivation: 传统同步聚合存在straggler效应导致高延迟和低资源利用率，而现有异步联邦学习方法无法有效应对LLM微调中由陈旧更新导致的模型漂移、数据异构加剧的客户端漂移以及快速客户端主导造成的聚合公平性失衡。
AI.method: 提出AlignFed框架，包含三个核心模块：版本感知更新分组、基于小批量校准集的跨版本语义对齐、以及融合更新新鲜度和客户端参与频率的公平感知聚合。
AI.result: 有效缓解跨版本模型漂移和客户端漂移，提升聚合公平性，在高异构性和显著更新陈旧性场景下实现稳定高效的异步联邦优化。
AI.conclusion: AlignFed通过轻量级多阶段语义对齐机制，解决了异构边缘环境下LLM异步联邦微调的核心挑战，为边缘智能中的联邦学习提供了有效方案。

title: Self-Evolving Scientific Agent Discovers Generalizable Physically-Reasoned Fluid Control
summary: While data-intensive deep reinforcement learning can optimize complex control policies, scientific discovery in physical systems fundamentally requires an interpretable chain of reasoning that connects physical evidence to structured control architectures. Here, we present a self-evolving scientific-agent workflow, driven by large language models and iterative code generation, that automates controller construction while preserving strict interpretability and rigorous physical reasoning.
