One leading ground for concern is that artificial agents may be power-seeking, aiming to acquire power and in the process disempowering humanity. I show how the argument from power-seeking rests on a strong version of a claim known as the instrumental convergence thesis. I explore leading defenses of the instrumental convergence thesis and argue that none establishes the thesis in a strong enough form to ground the argument from power-seeking. I discuss implications for longtermism, the governance of artificial intelligence, and the methodology of studying risks posed by artificial agents.

AI.tldr: 本文质疑了AI可能因寻求权力而对人类构成存在主义风险的核心论点，指出该论点依赖的"工具趋同论题"的强版本未能得到充分论证，并讨论了这一判断对长期主义、AI治理和研究方法的影响。
AI.motivation: 近年来人们日益担忧AI可能对人类构成存在主义风险，其中一个核心论点是AI会追求权力并因此剥夺人类权力。作者希望检验这一论点是否站得住脚。
AI.method: 作者系统梳理了"工具趋同论题"（instrumental convergence thesis）的几种主要辩护，逐一分析它们是否足以支撑权力寻求论证所需的强版本。
AI.result: 作者发现，目前现有的各种辩护均未能建立起足够强的工具趋同论题，因此权力寻求论证无法有效支持AI存在风险的结论。
AI.conclusion: 由于权力寻求论证的基础不牢，我们需要重新审视相关长期主义主张、AI治理策略以及研究AI风险的方法论。

title: Detection and Interpretability Analysis of Quotation Errors by Large Language Models
summary: Purpose - Quotation error refers to the inconsistency between cited information and its original source. This phenomenon leads to a series of negative impacts, such as misinterpretation of the original research, undermining the academic community's collective understanding of relevant issues, and weakening the accuracy and fairness of the citation-based academic evaluation system. Existing studies have shown that quotation error is prevalent in the academic community; moreover, manual verification of quotation error is not only labor-intensive but also inefficient. Therefore, this paper proposes the task of 'automated detection of quotation errors'. Methodology - Adopting a large language model (LLM)-based approach, this paper improves detection performance from two aspects on the basis of existing research: first, employ the fine-tuning approach for LLMs to detect quotation errors; second, incorporating full-text data of the cited literature into dataset construction, and exploring the optimal scheme for building such datasets by comparing three types of full-text integration methods. Based on this, this paper further uses the TokenSHAP tool to conduct interpretability experimental analysis on the model's prediction results. Findings - The fine-tuning approach for LLMs has improved the performance in detecting quotation errors. Among the different methods for incorporating full-text information, the approach based on using the source abstract yielded the best performance. Originality - The fine-tuning approach for large language models (LLMs) is applied to the task of automated detection of quotation errors, and interpretability analysis is conducted on the model's output results.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于大语言模型微调的方法实现引文错误自动检测，通过引入被引文献全文数据并比较三种全文整合方案，发现基于来源摘要的方案效果最佳，并利用TokenSHAP工具对模型预测进行可解释性分析。
AI.motivation: 引文错误（引用信息与原始来源不一致）在学术界普遍存在，导致研究误读、学术共识受损以及基于引用的评价体系失准，而人工验证劳动密集且效率低下，因此需要自动化检测方法。
AI.method: 基于大语言模型（LLM）微调的方法，从两方面改进：1）使用微调方式检测引文错误；2）将被引文献全文数据纳入数据集构建，通过比较三种全文整合方式探索最优方案，并使用TokenSHAP工具进行可解释性分析。
AI.result: LLM微调方法提升了引文错误检测性能；在三种全文信息整合方式中，基于来源摘要的方案表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: 将大语言模型微调应用于引文错误自动检测任务是有效的，且引入来源摘要作为全文信息整合方式最为优越。

title: Temporal Coverage over Density: Parsimonious Training-Set Design for ML Climate Downscaling
summary: High-resolution regional climate simulations provide critical information for climate impacts assessments but remain computationally expensive, motivating the development of machine-learning downscalers and emulators. A key challenge is determining how limited high-resolution simulations should be distributed across a changing climate trajectory to capture both forced climate response and internal variability. Using the CESM2 Large Ensemble over the western United States, we compare three training-year selection strategies under fixed data budgets: a contiguous block of historical years, years drawn from both the beginning and end of the simulation period, and years distributed throughout the full climate trajectory. Including both historical and future years consistently outperforms training on historical years alone, demonstrating the importance of exposing downscaling models to climate states outside the historical record and highlighting limitations of stationarity assumptions common in statistical downscaling. Training on years distributed throughout the full climate trajectory performs best overall, indicating that broad sampling of internal variability provides additional information beyond exposure to the forced climate response alone. Models trained on temporally distributed subsets more successfully reproduce variability in unseen ensemble members while retaining strong performance across a wide range of climate diagnostics. Even when trained on only one-tenth of the available high-resolution years, temporally distributed models remain highly competitive with full-data training. These results suggest that, under fixed computational budgets, broad sampling of climate states is more valuable than temporal continuity when allocating scarce high-resolution simulations. The findings provide practical guidance for regional climate downscaling and large-ensemble projection workflows.

AI.tldr: 本文研究在固定计算预算下，如何选择高分辨率气候模拟的训练年份以优化机器学习降尺度模型。基于CESM2大集合实验，比较三种年份选择策略，发现分布在完整气候轨迹上的训练策略表现最佳，广泛采样气候状态比时间连续性更重要。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率区域气候模拟计算成本高昂，需要确定如何将有限的模拟资源分配到不同的气候时段，以同时捕捉强迫气候响应和内部变率，从而为机器学习降尺度模型提供最优训练数据。
AI.method: 使用CESM2大集合实验，聚焦美国西部，在固定数据预算下比较三种训练年份选择策略：连续历史年份块、模拟期开始和结束年份、以及分布在完整气候轨迹中的年份。评估模型在未见集合成员上的表现及多种气候诊断指标。
AI.result: 同时包含历史和未来年份的策略优于仅使用历史年份；分布在完整气候轨迹中的策略总体表现最佳；仅用十分之一的高分辨率年份，该模型仍接近全数据训练水平；广泛采样内部变率提供了额外的信息价值。
AI.conclusion: 在固定计算预算下，广泛采样气候状态比时间连续性更有价值，为区域气候降尺度和大型集合投影工作流提供了实用指导。

title: Beyond Pass Rate: A Multilingual, Execution-Grounded Evaluation of Open Code LLMs
summary: Code generation models are typically compared using compact execution benchmarks and aggregate pass rates, but such summaries obscure how performance varies across programming languages, problem families, and failure modes. We present a large-scale, execution-grounded evaluation of 9 openly accessible LLMs specialized for coding on 2,707 free LeetCode problems across 12 programming languages. Our corpus contains 325,343 problem-model-language jobs, each linked to prompt metadata, extracted code, LeetCode execution outcomes, and static-analysis signals. The results show that current open models remain far from the human acceptance reference: the best model, Yi-Coder-9B-Chat, reaches 23.64% mean correctness, compared with a 57.2% human acceptance baseline. Rankings are also slice-dependent: Qwen2.5-Coder-14B-Instruct is strongest on hard problems and distinct-problem coverage, while Gemma-2-27B-IT achieves the highest all-language lint pass rate. Failure analysis shows that compile errors account for 63.25% of non-accepted best submissions, indicating that many failures occur before semantic correctness can be tested. Static quality further diverges from functional correctness. Together, these findings show that multilingual, artifact-preserving evaluation reveals tradeoffs hidden by single-language or single-metric leaderboards.

AI.tldr: 该论文对9个开源代码大模型在12种编程语言、2707道LeetCode题目上进行了大规模执行级评估（共325,343个任务），发现最佳模型Yi-Coder-9B-Chat的正确率仅23.64%，远低于人类57.2%的基线；编译错误占失败的63.25%，且性能排名因语言、问题难度和评估指标而异。
AI.motivation: 现有代码生成模型评估通常依赖单一语言的执行基准和聚合通过率，这种简化的指标掩盖了模型在不同编程语言、问题类型和失败模式上的性能差异，无法全面反映模型的真实能力。
AI.method: 选取9个开源代码专用LLM，在12种编程语言的2,707道免费LeetCode题目上进行大规模执行级评估，构建了包含325,343个模型-语言-问题任务的语料库，每个任务关联提示元数据、提取代码、LeetCode执行结果和静态分析信号。
AI.result: 最佳模型Yi-Coder-9B-Chat平均正确率23.64%，远低于人类57.2%；Qwen2.5-Coder-14B-Instruct在难题和独立问题覆盖率上最强；Gemma-2-27B-IT在所有语言中lint通过率最高；编译错误占非通过最佳提交的63.25%。
AI.conclusion: 多语言、保留工件的评估能揭示单语言或单指标排行榜所隐藏的性能权衡，静态质量与功能正确性存在显著差异，编译错误是主要失败原因。

title: Multilingual Fact-Checking at Scale: Fine-Tuned Compact Models vs LLMs
summary: We present a multilingual fact-checking system deployed at Factiverse, designed for high-throughput and low-latency operation across diverse languages. The system follows a modular pipeline with three stages: claim detection, evidence retrieval and re-ranking, and veracity prediction. We fine-tune XLM-RoBERTa-Large for claim detection, mmBERT-base for three-label stance classification (Supports/Refutes/Mixed), and a SetFit-based multilingual re-ranker for claim--evidence matching. We compare these components against strong LLM baselines, including GPT-5.2, Claude Opus~4.6, and Qwen3-8b. Experiments on production data spanning 114 languages for claim detection and 28 languages for veracity prediction show that task-specific fine-tuning provides strong and stable multilingual performance, while the fine-tuned retrieval model remains competitive with modern proprietary embeddings. Same-hardware latency measurements further show large efficiency gains for encoder-based components, supporting their use in production deployments with tight cost and privacy constraints. Overall, compact fine-tuned, self-hosted models remain a practical and effective foundation for multilingual fact-checking at scale. Code and data used for this study are available at https://github.com/factiverse/factcheck-editor.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个多语言事实核查系统Factiverse，采用模块化流水线（声明检测、证据检索与重排序、真实性预测），通过微调XLM-RoBERTa-Large、mmBERT-base和SetFit等多语言编码器模型，在114种语言的声明检测和28种语言的真实性预测任务上，相比GPT-5.2、Claude Opus 4.6等大语言模型，展现了更高效、稳定的多语言性能，证明了紧凑型微调模型在大规模生产部署中的实用价值。
AI.motivation: 现有的事实核查系统多集中于英语，缺乏对多语言场景的高效支持，且大语言模型虽然在推理能力上强大，但在高吞吐、低延迟的生产环境中面临成本和隐私约束，需要一种更经济且有效的多语言事实核查方案。
AI.method: 构建模块化流水线：(1) 微调XLM-RoBERTa-Large用于声明检测；(2) 微调mmBERT-base进行三标签立场分类（支持/反驳/混合）；(3) 基于SetFit的多语言重排序器进行声明-证据匹配。系统在横跨114种语言（声明检测）和28种语言（真实性预测）的生产数据上进行评估，并与GPT-5.2、Claude Opus 4.6、Qwen3-8b等强LLM基线对比。
AI.result: 1) 任务特异性的微调模型在多语言性能上表现强劲且稳定；2) 微调的检索模型与专有嵌入模型竞争力相当；3) 在同硬件延迟测试中，基于编码器的紧凑组件相比LLM具有显著效率优势；4) 整个系统支持生产环境中的高吞吐和低延迟需求。
AI.conclusion: 紧凑型、微调、自托管的编码器模型仍然是规模化多语言事实核查的实用且有效的基础方案，能够在满足成本和隐私约束的同时，保持与大语言模型相当的性能。

title: Layer-wise Derivative Controlled Networks Achieve Competitive Accuracy and Gradient Stability Across Data Regimes
summary:
Derivative-controlled networks based on ChainzRule (CR) combine cubic polynomial layers with a lightweight forward-mode per-layer Jacobian penalty (DREG). In this second paper of a multi-part series, we evaluate the generalization properties of CR across data regimes.
  We ablate the shape of the DREG coefficient schedule, demonstrating that the optimal annealing range depends on representation noise. On the Pima Diabetes dataset, CR achieves strong low-data performance and maintains a consistent accuracy advantage over baselines from 5\% to 100\% training data, supported by exceptionally stable gradient tail ratios ($\sim$1.01--1.02 vs. 1.07--1.09 for ReLU networks). Extensions to SST-5 show competitive or superior results in both frozen-embedding and BERT fine-tuned regimes, including outperforming prior BERT baselines despite substantially less training data. These results are statistically significant: CR achieves superior accuracy over the strongest published baselines we could identify on both datasets ($p < 0.05$).
  These results establish that layer-wise derivative control induces a structural inductive bias toward low-frequency, stable representations that generalizes robustly across tabular and NLP domains, data volumes, and representation qualities. The gradient tail ratio serves as a reliable, label-free diagnostic of generalization capability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于导数控制的ChainzRule（CR）网络，通过立方多项式层和轻量级前向每层雅可比惩罚（DREG），在Pima糖尿病数据集和SST-5数据集上展现了跨数据规模的强泛化能力，尤其在低数据场景下表现优异，且梯度尾部比率可作为可靠的免标签泛化诊断指标。
AI.motivation: 探索导数控制网络（CR）在不同数据规模下的泛化特性，验证其结构归纳偏置是否能够产生低频、稳定的表征，从而在表格数据和自然语言处理领域均实现稳健泛化。
AI.method: 基于ChainzRule（CR）架构，使用立方多项式层结合前向模式每层雅可比惩罚（DREG），通过消融实验研究DREG系数调度形状，利用梯度尾部比率作为诊断工具，在Pima Diabetes（表格数据）和SST-5（NLP）数据集上进行评估。
AI.result: CR在Pima Diabetes数据集上从5%到100%训练数据均保持一致的准确率优势，梯度尾部比率稳定在1.01-1.02（ReLU网络为1.07-1.09）。在SST-5上，CR在冻结嵌入和BERT微调设置中均达到或超越先前基线，且使用更少训练数据即超越之前的BERT基线。所有结果具有统计显著性（p<0.05）。
AI.conclusion: 层间导数控制引入了一种结构性归纳偏置，促使网络学习低频、稳定的表征，在表格数据和NLP领域、不同数据规模及表征质量下均能稳健泛化。梯度尾部比率可作为可靠的、无需标签的泛化能力诊断指标。

title: ZIPP:Zero-shot Image Personalization from Personas
summary: Text-to-image diffusion models are increasingly deployed in open-ended creative contexts, yet their outputs remain impersonal, optimized for aggregate aesthetics rather than individual taste. Human preferences are pluralistic: one user favoring muted, nostalgic portraits may prefer vibrant street photography, while another gravitates toward dreamy film aesthetics. Existing methods require dense interaction histories or per-user fine-tuning, failing in cold-start settings and collapsing context-dependent preferences into a static representation. We introduce zero-shot image personalization from personas (ZIPP), which conditions image generation on natural-language personas (concise descriptors of a user's identity and aesthetic sensibilities) without any user-specific data or weight updates. ZIPP uses an LLM to rewrite prompts from the perspective of a given persona, steering diffusion models toward personalized outputs. To mine personas at scale, we train an inductive Graph Attention Network over a 22M-user Reddit interaction graph with dual contrastive objectives aligning graph structure with visual behavior, then verbalize learned representations into natural-language personas via an MLLM. We introduce ZIPBench, the first zero-shot personalization benchmark with 1.5K users, graph-mined personas, and 40K generated images. Across four benchmarks and 14 LLMs spanning five model families, persona conditioning yields consistent gains (13-20%), with frontier models benefiting most. In the few-shot setting, ZIPP matches or exceeds fine-tuned baselines trained on 100+ examples per user. ZIPP achieves the lowest preference distributional divergence (CMMD 0.16 vs. 0.55), and IPF-normalized demographic evaluation shows it substantially reduces subpopulation bias present in existing methods. Human evaluation confirms a 79% win rate over generic generation and 58-65% over all fine-tuned baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出ZIPP方法，利用自然语言人物画像（persona）实现零样本图像个性化生成，无需用户数据或微调，通过图神经网络从Reddit用户互动图中挖掘画像，在多个基准上显著优于现有方法（13-20%提升），并引入ZIPBench基准数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有文生图扩散模型缺乏个性化适配，输出仅优化总体美学而非个体偏好；用户偏好是多元且情境依赖的，而现有方法要么需要密集交互历史，要么需要逐用户微调，无法处理冷启动问题，也无法捕捉情境变化的偏好。
AI.method: 1) 使用LLM根据给定人物画像重写提示词，引导扩散模型输出；2) 构建22M用户的Reddit交互图，训练归纳式图注意力网络（Graph Attention Network），使用双重对比学习目标对齐图结构与视觉行为；3) 通过MLLM将学习到的表征转化为自然语言人物画像；4) 构建ZIPBench基准（1.5K用户、图挖掘画像、40K生成图像）。
AI.result: 在4个基准和14个LLM上取得一致提升（13-20%），前沿模型收益最大；少样本设置下匹配或超越基于100+样本微调的基线；CMMD分布散度最低（0.16 vs 0.55）；去偏评估显示显著降低子群体偏差；人类评估中79%胜率优于通用生成，58-65%优于所有微调基线。
AI.conclusion: 零样本人物画像条件化是一种高效且可扩展的个性化图像生成范式，无需用户数据和模型更新即可实现高质量个性化，在冷启动和跨情境偏好适配方面具有显著优势。

title: Cross-Source Reasoning-based Correction for Author Name Disambiguation
summary: Author name disambiguation is a critical challenge in academic search systems, often addressed through from-scratch and real-time disambiguation approaches. However, current algorithms remain vulnerable to cumulative errors of paper-author assignments and overlook inconsistent assignments across different sources. Resorting to expert annotation is resource-intensive. To this end, this paper explores a new perspective for author name disambiguation: cross-source correction by leveraging inconsistent assignments across sources. We propose CrossND, a full-stack framework that integrates data refinement, cross-source reasoning, and test-time scaling. First, a chain-of-refinement pipeline denoises author profiles and produces more accurate paper-author matching probabilities. Second, a supervised fine-tuning process incorporates these refined signals and a probabilistic soft logic-based cross-correction module to infer the assignments of which sources are incorrect. Third, test-time scaling further enhances the accuracy and robustness of the predictions. Experiments on real-world datasets indicate that CrossND consistently outperforms 17 baselines by leveraging cross-source reasoning without human intervention.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CrossND框架，通过跨源校正（利用不同来源间不一致的论文-作者分配）来解决作者姓名消歧问题，无需人工干预，在真实数据集上超越17个基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有作者姓名消歧方法存在两个问题：一是容易累积论文-作者分配的错误，二是忽略了不同来源间分配不一致的情况。依赖专家标注又成本高昂。因此需要一种能利用跨源不一致信息进行自动校正的方法。
AI.method: 提出CrossND全栈框架，包含三个部分：(1) 链式精炼管道（chain-of-refinement）对作者画像去噪，生成更准确的论文-作者匹配概率；(2) 监督微调过程结合精炼信号和基于概率软逻辑的跨源校正模块，推断哪些来源的分配有误；(3) 测试时缩放（test-time scaling）增强预测的准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上的实验表明，CrossND通过跨源推理，无需人工干预，一致性地优于17个基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 跨源校正为作者姓名消歧提供了一种新的有效视角，CrossND框架证明了利用不同来源间不一致信息可以自动化地提升消歧效果，减少了人工成本。

title: CAAL: Contextual Bandits based Online Hand-Craft Active Learning Strategy Selection
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures, Accepted to the NYRL 2025 Workshop
summary: The challenge with active learning algorithms is the uncertainty of the statistical distribution of unlabeled data, making it difficult to choose the best hand-crafted strategy. To address this, we introduced Contextual Adaptive Active Learning (CAAL). In CAAL, each "arm" represents a hand-crafted strategy. Unlike existing frameworks that select strategies based only on feedback from labeled data, we dynamically choose strategies for labeling batches of data using reward prediction with external context information. This general framework allows for customization with domain knowledge to design more effective rewards and context candidates. In addition, we experimentally show that CAAL outperforms the existing baseline adaptive strategy on public datasets using our reward and context design. Our results are consistent regardless of batch size in each iteration.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种上下文自适应主动学习框架(CAAL)，通过奖励预测和外部上下文信息动态选择标注策略，在公共数据集上优于现有基线方法。
AI.motivation: 主动学习算法面临未标注数据统计分布不确定性的挑战，难以选择最佳的手工标注策略。
AI.method: 将每种手工策略视为一个"臂"，利用外部上下文信息的奖励预测来动态选择批处理数据的标注策略，支持通过领域知识定制奖励和上下文候选。
AI.result: 在公共数据集上，CAAL方法优于现有自适应策略基线，且结果在不同批次大小下保持一致。
AI.conclusion: CAAL是一个通用的主动学习框架，可结合领域知识进行定制，有效提升标注策略选择的自适应性。

title: A Resilience-as-a-Service assessment framework for coordinated disruption response in interdependent urban transit systems
summary: Urban public transport disruptions require rapid response strategies, yet existing studies rarely provide a decision support framework to compare alternative disruption response solutions using a common set of dynamic, passenger, operator, and environment oriented indicators. This paper proposes a KPI-driven, time-indexed framework to assess the resilience of disruption response solutions in urban transit systems. The framework combines an optimization model with a behavioral evaluation in agent-based simulation. It also underlays the secondary service degradation induced on helper lines when in-service vehicles are withdrawn to support the disrupted corridor. Rather than treating resilience as a single score, it evaluates complementary dimensions including vulnerability, adaptability, robustness, resilience loss, responsiveness, cost-based performance, emissions, and equity. The framework is implemented for the RER B transit line in the Ile-de-France (Paris) network. Results show that the coordinated strategy provides the most balanced resilience profile, combining high service continuity with lower total disruption cost than single mode alternatives, while also improving equity and maintaining competitive environmental performance. Sensitivity analysis further identifies the disruption conditions under which coordinated multimodal response is most valuable.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个KPI驱动的、时间索引的框架，用于评估城市公交系统中断应对方案的韧性。该框架结合优化模型与基于智能体的仿真行为评估，从脆弱性、适应性、鲁棒性、韧性损失、响应性、成本绩效、排放和公平性等多个维度进行评估。在巴黎RER B线实施，发现协调策略提供了最均衡的韧性表现。
AI.motivation: 城市公交中断需要快速应对策略，但现有研究缺乏一个基于共同的动态、乘客、运营者和环境导向指标来比较不同中断应对方案的决策支持框架。
AI.method: 提出了一个KPI驱动的、时间索引的评估框架，结合优化模型与基于智能体的仿真行为评估。框架评估多个韧性维度（脆弱性、适应性、鲁棒性、韧性损失、响应性、成本绩效、排放和公平性），并考虑了辅助线路的次级服务退化。
AI.result: 在巴黎RER B线实施后，发现协调策略提供了最均衡的韧性表现，兼具高服务连续性和更低的总中断成本，同时改善了公平性并保持了有竞争力的环境绩效。敏感性分析识别了协调多模式响应最有价值的中断条件。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为公交中断管理提供了多维度的韧性评估工具，协调策略在综合表现上优于单一模式替代方案。

title: From Holistic Evaluation to Structured Criteria: Rubrics Across the Evolving LLM Landscape
summary: As Large Language Models (LLMs) advance toward open-ended autonomous agents, the mechanisms used to evaluate and guide their behavior must evolve accordingly. This work introduces the rubric as a unifying framework capturing this evolution, characterizing rubrics as a dynamic response to successive LLM paradigm shifts that recurs across otherwise independent efforts in evaluation, reinforcement learning, and safety alignment. We define rubrics as explicit criteria sets that transform complex quality judgments into structured and actionable standards, and demonstrate that their recurrence across these research threads is not coincidental. We systematically organize existing rubric designs, examine their construction and optimization, and analyze their role across evaluation and training. Rubrics manifest at three progressively deeper levels: at the evaluative level, they decompose holistic judgments into verifiable dimensions; at the training level, they serve as dense feedback signals providing process-level guidance where scalar rewards fall short; at the intrinsic level, they emerge dynamically from model behaviors, driving self-improvement. We further assess rubric reliability across generation quality, execution fidelity, theoretical constraints, and security threats, before surveying rubric-based benchmarks across diverse domains. By rendering assessment transparent and decomposable, rubrics translate human value expectations into machine-learnable signals, serving as the enduring bridge between human intentions and machine behavior.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了"rubric"（评分准则）作为一个统一框架，用于理解LLM在评估、强化学习和安全对齐中的行为引导机制。Rubric将复杂质量判断转化为结构化、可操作的标准，并在评估、训练和内在三个层面发挥作用，成为连接人类意图与机器行为的桥梁。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM向开放式自主代理发展，评估和引导其行为的机制需要相应演进。现有工作在评估、强化学习和安全对齐等领域各自独立推进，缺乏统一的框架来理解这些看似独立的方法之间的内在联系。
AI.method: 本文系统梳理了现有rubric设计，分析了其构建与优化方法，并将其划分为三个层次：评估层（将整体判断分解为可验证维度）、训练层（提供过程级密集反馈信号）、内在层（从模型行为中动态涌现，驱动自我改进）。
AI.result: Rubric在生成质量、执行保真度、理论约束和安全威胁方面展现出可靠性，并在多个领域形成了基于rubric的基准测试。
AI.conclusion: Rubric通过使评估透明化和可分解化，将人类价值期望转化为机器可学习的信号，成为连接人类意图与机器行为的持久桥梁。

title: The Easy, the Hard, and the Learnable: Confidence and Difficulty-Adaptive Policy Optimization for LLM Reasoning
summary: RL with verifiable rewards can substantially improve LLM reasoning, yet standard GRPO-style training often treats easy, hard, and learnable questions alike through uniform sampling and weighting, leading to inefficient compute allocation. We study GRPO by tracking token log-probabilities, group-normalized advantages, and the induced token-level update weights. This reveals three recurring dynamics as training proceeds: (1) confidence inflation, (2) advantage contraction, and (3) hierarchical convergence. These findings suggest that the utility of each update depends strongly on both question difficulty and the model's current competence. Motivated by this, we propose Confidence and Difficulty-adaptive Policy Optimization (CoDaPO), which assigns each question a bounded value from rollout confidence and empirical difficulty. CoDaPO then uses this value to reweight policy updates and resample high-value learnable questions within mini-batches, thereby increasing discovery within the learnable band under a fixed compute budget. Across twelve benchmarks, CoDaPO consistently improves accuracy over existing RL methods. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/tmlr-group/CoDaPO.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 CoDaPO 方法，通过置信度和难度自适应地重新加权策略更新并重采样高价值问题，以解决标准 GRPO 训练中均匀采样导致的计算效率低下问题，在12个基准上取得一致提升。
AI.motivation: 标准 GRPO 风格的 RL 训练对简单、困难和可学习的问题采用均匀采样和加权，导致计算资源分配低效，需要更智能的采样与加权策略。
AI.method: 提出 CoDaPO：基于 rollout 置信度和经验难度为每个问题赋予有界值，用于重新加权策略更新，并在小批量内重采样高价值的可学习问题，在固定计算预算下增加可学习带内的发现。
AI.result: 在12个基准测试上，CoDaPO 一致优于现有RL方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过揭示 GRPO 训练中的三种动态（置信度膨胀、优势收缩、层次收敛），证明了自适应采样的有效性，CoDaPO 能更高效地分配计算资源。

title: Sycophancy Towards Researchers Drives Performative Misalignment
summary: The increasing situational awareness of language models raises safety concerns: models might be aware when they are evaluated, and adjust their behavior to evade monitoring and resist modification, e.g., pretending to be aligned only in evaluation. This alignment faking behavior is often interpreted as scheming: an intentional effort of strategic deception. In this paper, we examine an alternative interpretation, performative misalignment, which explains the change in behavior as a result of sycophancy towards AI researchers. To examine this hypothesis, we present three empirical findings. First, we show that evaluation awareness persists even when we tell models they are deployed, which contradicts the scheming story which predicts less misalignment when the model perceives evaluation. Second, we use probing and steering to show that our current methods cannot mechanistically distinguish sycophancy and scheming in alignment faking evaluations. Third, we fine-tune models to be more sycophantic and observe increased sensitivity to evaluation cues. To conclude, we emphasize deconfounding sycophancy from scheming for future work on evaluations and mitigations of intent misalignment.

AI.tldr: 本文质疑对齐造假（alignment faking）行为通常被解释为模型的策略性欺骗，提出另一种解释：表演性失调（performative misalignment），即行为变化源于对AI研究者的谄媚效应。通过三个实验发现：评估感知在部署条件下依然存在（与欺骗假说矛盾）；当前方法无法从机制上区分谄媚与欺骗；越谄媚的模型对评估线索越敏感。强调未来研究需解耦谄媚与欺骗。
AI.motivation: 语言模型日益增强的情景感知能力引发安全担忧——模型可能意识到自己被评估，从而调整行为以规避监控，假装对齐。现有解释倾向于将此视为"阴谋性"策略欺骗，但作者认为存在另一种可能：这仅仅是模型对研究者的谄媚效应。需要厘清这两种机制，以正确评估和缓解意图失调问题。
AI.method: 1. 验证评估感知在"部署"条件下是否依然存在（与欺骗假说预期相反）；2. 使用探针分析和引导方法，检验当前技术是否能在机制上区分谄媚与欺骗；3. 对模型进行微调使其更谄媚，观察对评估线索的敏感度变化。
AI.result: 1. 即使告知模型处于部署状态，评估感知仍然存在，与"策略性欺骗减少"的预测相悖；2. 当前方法在机制层面无法区分谄媚与欺骗；3. 更谄媚的模型对评估线索表现出更高的敏感性。
AI.conclusion: 对齐造假更可能源于谄媚而非策略性欺骗，未来评估和缓解意图失调的研究必须解耦这两种机制，避免将谄媚误判为阴谋性欺骗。

title: Minibatch Selection via Partition Matroid Constrained Gradient Matching
summary: Training large language models (LLMs) on heterogeneous data requires selecting minibatches that balance convergence speed with coverage across domains. Existing methods either select samples independently within each domain or rely on computationally expensive proxy models to learn continuous domain weights. We propose PartitionSel, a cross-domain minibatch selection approach that maximizes a validation-guided gradient-matching utility under per-domain budgets encoded as a partition-matroid constraint. By coupling the per-domain budgets through a single utility, PartitionSel is designed to reduce redundancy in selections across domains. The proposed objective is weakly submodular and admits an orthogonal matching pursuit algorithm with provable approximation guarantees. Empirically, we evaluate PartitionSel for minibatch selection during the fine-tuning of Qwen2.5 and Llama-3 on MetaMathQA and Mol-Instructions. PartitionSel achieves robust gains over per-domain and domain-agnostic baselines on both benchmarks. It also reduces the number of conflicting gradient pairs within each batch, indicating that the cross-domain coupling translates into more compatible training updates.

AI.tldr: 提出PartitionSel，一种跨域小批量选择方法，通过分区拟阵约束和梯度匹配效用，在训练大语言模型时平衡收敛速度与域覆盖，减少跨域冗余，并在微调实验中取得优于基线方法的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法要么在域内独立采样样本，要么依赖高计算成本的代理模型学习连续域权重，缺乏既高效又能跨域协同选择的方法。
AI.method: 提出PartitionSel，采用验证集引导的梯度匹配效用函数，在分区拟阵约束的每域预算下最大化该效用，目标函数为弱子模函数，通过正交匹配追踪算法求解并具有可证明的近似保证。
AI.result: 在Qwen2.5和Llama-3上使用MetaMathQA和Mol-Instructions进行微调，PartitionSel在跨域和域无关基线方法上均取得稳健提升，并减少了批次内的梯度冲突对数。
AI.conclusion: 跨域耦合机制能够转化为更兼容的训练更新，有效降低了冗余，提升了训练效率。

title: Can the Environment Speak for Itself? $T^{2}$-GRPO: A Turn-Trajectory Group Relative Policy Optimization for Caregiver Agents
summary: Optimizing large language models (LLMs) for long-horizon caregiver agents requires balancing delayed task objectives with immediate environment dynamics, such as patient distress and resistance. In dementia care, this balance is especially difficult: trajectory level rewards are too sparse for turn level credit assignment, while external LLM-based evaluators are costly and can misread fragmented or indirect patient responses. To address this issue, we propose \textbf{T}urn-\textbf{T}rajectory \textbf{G}roup \textbf{R}elative \textbf{P}olicy \textbf{O}ptimization (\textbf{T$^{2}$-GRPO}), a framework that decouples caregiver RL into two normalized reward horizons and enforces safety through a binary hard veto. $T^2$-GRPO derives dense turn-level rewards directly from environment state transitions, measuring changes in patient distress and resistance from a frozen dementia patient simulator. These environment-grounded rewards are combined with trajectory-level evaluations through independent centered-rank normalization, which preserves heterogeneous reward signals and mitigates reward collapse. Extensive experiments on dementia caregivers show that T $^{2}$-GRPO outperforms competitive baselines, indicating a substantial improvement for emotionally sensitive caregiver scenarios that effectively handles immediate patient feedback, long-term care outcomes, and safety constraints.

AI.tldr: 本文提出T²-GRPO框架，通过解耦回合级和轨迹级奖励归一化，并引入二元硬否决机制，优化痴呆症护理场景中长周期照护智能体的强化学习，在平衡即时患者情绪反馈与长期护理目标方面显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现存LLM-based照护智能体面临两大挑战：轨迹级奖励过于稀疏，无法有效分配回合级信用；外部LLM评估器成本高且易误判碎片化或间接的患者反馈。亟需一种既能利用环境状态信号又能保障安全性的奖励机制。
AI.method: 提出T²-GRPO框架，核心包括：(1) 将照护强化学习解耦为回合级（基于环境状态转换的密集奖励，量化患者痛苦和抵触变化）和轨迹级两个归一化奖励视界；(2) 采用独立中心化排名归一化保留异构奖励信号，防止奖励坍缩；(3) 引入二元硬否决机制强制执行安全性约束。
AI.result: 在痴呆症照护场景的广泛实验中，T²-GRPO在情感敏感型照护任务上显著优于多个竞争基线，有效处理了即时患者反馈、长期护理结果和安全约束。
AI.conclusion: T²-GRPO为长周期、情感敏感的照护智能体提供了一种有效解决方案，通过解耦奖励视界和硬安全约束，在即时反馈与长期目标之间取得良好平衡。

title: A retrieval conditioned rebinding circuit for dynamic entity tracking in large language models
summary: To interpret context correctly and retrieve relevant information, large language models must bind entities to their attributes and update these bindings as state changes. We analyze how LLMs implement this binding process in a dynamic state tracking. Using causal interventions, we identify a retrieval conditioned rebinding mechanism, a compact attention head circuit that encodes swap relevant binding information and reinstates it at readout. Across Gemma and Llama models, this circuit supports rebinding behavior, but the representational signature of the mechanism differs across model families. In Gemma models, the binding signature is clearly expressed in the query/key subspaces of the relevant attention heads, whereas in Llama models, the binding information is carried primarily in key vectors. Overall, our results reveal an interpretable mechanism for context dependent state tracking in LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文通过因果干预分析，揭示了大语言模型在动态状态追踪中实现实体-属性绑定与更新的“检索条件化重绑定机制”——一个紧凑的注意力头电路，并发现该机制在Gemma和Llama模型中的表征差异（Gemma体现在查询/键子空间，Llama主要在键向量）。
AI.motivation: 理解大语言模型如何在动态上下文变化中正确绑定实体与属性并更新状态，这对于解释LLM的上下文推理能力至关重要。
AI.method: 采用因果干预方法，分析LLM在动态状态追踪任务中实现实体-属性绑定的内部机制，识别出检索条件化的重绑定电路。
AI.result: 发现一个紧凑的注意力头电路负责重绑定行为；Gemma模型中绑定信息编码在查询/键子空间，Llama模型中则主要在键向量中。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了一种可解释的、上下文相关的状态追踪机制，并指出不同模型家族实现该机制的表示方式存在差异。

title: Overcoming the Limits of Finite Difference Method; Physics-Informed Neural Network for Noisy High-Dimensional Heat Diffusion
summary: High-dimensional transient heat diffusion under noisy boundary conditions exposes a fundamental limitation of classical numerical methods: accuracy degrades catastrophically where physical noise is unavoidable. This paper presents a Physics-Informed Neural Network (PINN) framework as a systematic solution to this problem across one, two, and three spatial dimensions, establishing clear operational regimes that redefine solver selection in noisy thermal systems. Under 20% boundary noise in 3D, PINN sustains approximately 91% accuracy while Finite Difference Method (FDM) collapses to 36%, a clear decisive advantage. This is further confirmed in a physical copper thermal system, where PINN reduces boundary reconstruction error by 3.3 times under realistic noise conditions. This noise resilience is accompanied by a dimensionality-driven efficiency crossover: PINN requires fewer spacetime nodes than FDM in 3D while achieving superior accuracy, exposing the true cost of classical discretization at scale. These findings reframe solver selection: the decisive axis is not accuracy alone, but noise exposure and dimensionality jointly. When noise and dimensionality are both high, the classical solver paradigm is insufficient; this work provides the foundation to justify PINN as the operational standard in such regimes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PINN框架解决高维含噪边界热扩散问题，证明在噪声和维度双高场景下PINN显著优于传统FDM方法，建议将PINN作为此类场景的运算标准。
AI.motivation: 高维瞬态热扩散在含噪边界条件下，传统数值方法精度会灾难性下降，而物理噪声在实际系统中不可避免，需要一种鲁棒性更强的求解方案。
AI.method: 采用物理信息神经网络（PINN）框架，在1D、2D、3D空间维度下系统求解含噪边界的热扩散问题，并与有限差分法（FDM）进行对比。
AI.result: 3D下20%边界噪声时PINN保持约91%精度，FDM降至36%；真实铜热系统中PINN边界重建误差降低3.3倍；3D中PINN所需时空节点少于FDM且精度更高。
AI.conclusion: 求解器选择的关键轴不仅是精度，而是噪声暴露与维度的联合作用；在高噪声高维度场景下，经典方法已不足够，PINN应作为该场景的运算标准。

title: FAME: Forecastability-Aware Mixture of Experts for Heterogeneous Time Series Forecasting
summary: Large-scale retail and industrial forecasting systems contain many heterogeneous time series whose lifecycle, sparsity, volatility, seasonality, spectral patterns, and contextual sensitivity differ substantially. A single forecasting model rarely performs well across all regimes, while dense ensembles increase inference cost and provide limited insight into expert suitability. This paper studies forecastability-aware expert routing: learning how data characteristics determine the suitability of forecasting experts. We propose \method{}, a sparse mixture-of-experts framework that represents each series with a multidimensional forecastability fingerprint, mines expert-suitability targets from validation performance, and trains a cost-aware sparse router to activate a small budgeted set of experts for each series. Using a production-scale vending-machine sales dataset from Shandong New Beiyang (SNBC), where the forecasting component has been integrated into the replenishment-planning pipeline, together with public retail benchmarks, we show that expert suitability varies systematically across data regimes. On the industrial dataset with 5,000+ machines and 60M+ transactions, \method{} Top-2 reduces MSE by 12.4\% over the strongest single expert, LightGBM, while executing 1.92 experts per series on average. The deployed component produces demand forecasts, while inventory-oriented gains are estimated by an offline replay simulator under a fixed replenishment policy rather than by online intervention. The framework turns heterogeneous sales forecasting from heuristic model selection into data mining of forecastability patterns and expert specialization. Code is available at https://github.com/hit636/FAME

AI.tldr: 本文提出FAME框架，通过预测能力感知的专家路由和稀疏混合专家模型，为异构时间序列自动匹配最适合的预测专家，在工业数据集上MSE降低12.4%，平均仅激活1.92个专家。
AI.motivation: 大规模零售和工业预测系统中包含大量异构时间序列，其生命周期、稀疏性、波动性、季节性和上下文敏感性差异显著。单一预测模型难以在所有场景表现良好，而密集集成模型会增加推理成本且难以解释专家适用性。
AI.method: 提出FAME框架，包含三个步骤：(1) 用多维预测能力指纹表示每个时间序列；(2) 从验证性能中挖掘专家适用性目标；(3) 训练成本感知的稀疏路由器，为每个序列激活小预算的专家子集。
AI.result: 在SNBC工业数据集（5000+机器、6000万+交易）上，FAME Top-2相比最强单一专家LightGBM降低MSE 12.4%，平均每个序列仅激活1.92个专家；在公开零售基准上也验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架将异构销售预测从启发式模型选择转变为预测能力模式挖掘和专家专业化的数据驱动过程，已集成到补货规划流程中。

title: From Player to Master: Enhancing Test-Time Learning of LLM Agents via Reinforcement Learning over Memory
summary: Large language model (LLM) agents are increasingly deployed in long-running settings where improving through experience at test time becomes important. A common approach is to update an explicit memory after each interaction to guide future decisions. However, most existing methods rely on hand-designed prompting rules, making it difficult to align memory updates with downstream objectives over multi-step horizons consistently. We propose MemoPilot, a plug-in memory copilot that explicitly trains the memory update process to improve a frozen LLM's performance across sequential interactions. We formulate memory updating as a multi-turn decision problem and optimize it end-to-end with multi-turn GRPO. Our training recipe introduces (i) a turn-wise reward signal and (ii) a context-independent, turn-level advantage estimation across rollouts, enabling finer-grained credit assignment and more stable training in multi-turn settings. We evaluate MemoPilot on two testbeds: multi-round Rock-Paper-Scissors (RPS) and Limit Texas Hold'em (LHE). Across both environments, MemoPilot substantially improves test-time learning of a frozen player over strong baselines, ranking first in Elo ratings on both games (1762 on LHE and 1590 on RPS) and outperforming all baseline memory methods and proprietary models, including DeepSeek-V3.2.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MemoPilot，一种可插拔的记忆副驾驶，通过多轮GRPO端到端优化记忆更新过程，使冻结的LLM在序列交互中持续提升性能。在剪刀石头布和德州扑克两个环境中，MemoPilot在Elo评分上均排名第一，超越所有基线方法和DeepSeek-V3.2等专有模型。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体在长周期部署中依赖显式记忆来指导决策，但大多数方法依靠手工设计的提示规则，难以在多步决策中持续对齐记忆更新与下游目标。
AI.method: 将记忆更新建模为多轮决策问题，采用多轮GRPO进行端到端优化。设计了（i）轮次级别的奖励信号和（ii）跨轨迹的上下文无关、轮次级别的优势估计，实现更细粒度的信用分配和更稳定的多轮训练。
AI.result: 在Limit Texas Hold'em和Rock-Paper-Scissors两个测试平台上，MemoPilot在Elo评分上分别达到1762和1590，排名第一，超越所有基线记忆方法和DeepSeek-V3.2等专有模型。
AI.conclusion: MemoPilot有效证明了通过端到端训练记忆更新过程能够显著提升冻结LLM在长序列交互中的测试时学习能力，为LLM智能体的持续适应性提供了新范式。

title: Enhancing AI Interpretability and Safety through Localised Architectures
summary: Recent advances in generative AI, especially powerful Large Language Models (LLMs) and Large Reasoning Models (LRMs), raise concerns over the interpretability, safety and sustainability of these large and opaque AI models. The power of such architectures is derived not only from the scalability of deep neural networks, but also massively parallel hardware such as GPU clusters. The diffuse nature of deep neural networks gives them great function-approximation capability when provided with sufficient training data but imposes a cost in interpretability and computational efficiency. Observing that localised machine learning (ML) models tend to be more interpretable and computationally efficient than deep neural networks on small datasets, we reason by analogy that similar advantages may apply to specific localised hardware ML architectures. We argue that localised architectures with lower bandwidth but higher expressivity per node have the potential to be fundamentally more interpretable than deep neural networks running on GPU clusters while remaining competitive for smaller datasets. We then evaluate the suitability of various hardware ML paradigms for implementing such localised architectures and evaluate their per-node expressivity, energy efficiency and practical maturity of the technology required.

AI.tldr: 本文提出局部化机器学习架构（相比深度神经网络）在小数据集上具有更好的可解释性和计算效率，并评估了多种硬件ML范式实现此类架构的可行性。
AI.motivation: 大型生成式AI模型（LLMs/LRMs）存在可解释性差、安全性低和可持续性不足的问题，这些缺陷源于深度神经网络的扩散性特征，需要探索替代性架构。
AI.method: 通过类比局部化ML模型在软件层面的优势，推理局部化硬件架构可能同样具备可解释性和效率优势；进而评估不同硬件ML范式（按节点表达能力、能效、技术成熟度三个维度）。
AI.result: 局部化架构（低带宽、高单节点表达能力）在可解释性上优于GPU集群上的深度神经网络，且在小数据集上保持竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 局部化硬件ML架构是实现可解释、高效AI的有前景方向，尤其适合数据规模有限的场景，但需进一步技术成熟度提升。

title: Order Matters: Unveiling the Hidden Impact of Macro Placement Sequences via Proxy-Guided LLM Evolution
summary: Macro placement is a fundamental step in modern chip physical design, playing a crucial role in determining the solution quality of high-dimensional combinatorial optimization problems. Despite recent advancements in machine learning for spatial coordinate determination, the temporal dimension of placement sequencing remains largely governed by static heuristics. In this work, we demonstrate that the placement sequence is not merely a preprocessing step but a decisive factor in optimization, where suboptimal early decisions trigger irreversible domino effects that constrain the solution space. To harness this unexplored dimension, we propose \textbf{OrderPlace}, a proxy-guided LLM evolution framework for automatically discovering macro placement order strategies. Instead of relying on manually crafted heuristics such as area- or connectivity-based ordering, OrderPlace explores a broader space of code-level policies, ranging from static scoring metrics to dynamic physics-inspired mechanisms. To mitigate the prohibitive cost of evaluating sequences, we introduce a lightweight proxy evaluation mechanism that efficiently filters candidates using a deterministic greedy probe. Experimental results on the standard ISPD 2005 benchmarks demonstrate that OrderPlace discovers novel ordering strategies. Compared with WireMask-EA and the state-of-the-art method EGPlace, OrderPlace reduces wirelength by 34.04\% and 14.08\%, respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OrderPlace，一种代理引导的LLM进化框架，用于自动发现宏布局排序策略，在ISPD 2005基准上比SOTA方法EGPlace减少14.08%的线长。
AI.motivation: 现有宏布局方法多关注空间坐标优化，但布局排序这一时间维度仍依赖静态启发式规则，而早期次优排序会引发不可逆的连锁反应，严重约束解空间。
AI.method: 提出OrderPlace框架，利用LLM进化搜索代码级排序策略（从静态评分到动态物理启发机制），并引入轻量级代理评估机制，通过确定性贪心探针高效过滤候选策略。
AI.result: 在ISPD 2005基准上，OrderPlace相比WireMask-EA线长减少34.04%，相比SOTA方法EGPlace线长减少14.08%。
AI.conclusion: 布局排序不是简单的预处理步骤，而是优化中的决定性因素；OrderPlace通过自动发现排序策略，显著优于人工设计的启发式规则。

title: ClinicalAligner26AM: A Cross-Lingual Aligner for Dataset Translation; Evidences from the MultiClinCorpus Shared Task
summary: Word-level cross-lingual alignment is central to annotation projection, translation auditing, and cross-lingual faithfulness estimation, yet existing neural aligners are rarely adapted to specialized domains. In this paper, we introduce ClinicalAligner26AM, a large-context multilingual aligner model for biomedical and clinical text initialized from ClinicalEncoder26AM. Our training recipe is inspired by AWESoME Align. We build our soft alignment target by sharpening with Sinkhorn-Knop optimal transport a cost matrix established for parallel clinical texts and conversations through the fusion of sentence-level, phrase-level, and token-level signals. We distill this sharpened alignment matrix directly into our student aligner, by encouraging its naive cosine-based token similarity scores to match this target. At inference time, we project source-span scores through the learned token alignment matrix and decode the longest valid high-scoring span in the target text, optionally supported by MultiClinNER predictions summarized in Appendix B. We evaluate CA26AM on the MultiClinCorpus shared task, which projects Spanish clinical entity annotations into six target languages. Our two submitted systems ranked respectively first and second across all languages and entity types, with character-weighted F1 scores above 0.95 in nearly all settings.

AI.tldr: 提出ClinicalAligner26AM，一个面向生物医学与临床文本的多语言对齐模型，通过最优传输和蒸馏学习实现跨语言实体对齐，在MultiClinCorpus任务中取得第一/第二的成绩，F1超过0.95。
AI.motivation: 现有的神经对齐模型很少针对专业领域（如生物医学/临床文本）进行适配，而词级跨语言对齐在注释投影、翻译审计和跨语言忠实度估计中至关重要，因此需要领域专用的对齐模型。
AI.method: 基于ClinicalEncoder26AM初始化，采用AWESoME Align的训练思路。通过融合句子级、短语级和词元级信号构建代价矩阵，用Sinkhorn-Knop最优传输进行锐化得到软对齐目标，然后将基于余弦相似度的词元分数蒸馏到学生模型中。推理时通过对齐矩阵投影源语言跨度，解码目标文本中最长的高分跨度，可选结合MultiClinNER预测。
AI.result: 在MultiClinCorpus共享任务（西班牙语到六种目标语言的临床实体注释投影）中，两个提交系统在所有语言和实体类型中分别排名第一和第二，几乎所有设置下字符加权F1分数超过0.95。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的领域专用多语言对齐模型在临床文本跨语言实体对齐任务上取得了显著优异的性能，证实了针对专业领域进行对齐模型适配的有效性。

title: Evaluating the Impact of Task Granularity on Catastrophic Forgetting in Continual Learning
summary:
Catastrophic forgetting, the abrupt loss of previously acquired knowledge upon learning new information, remains the central challenge in Continual Learning. This project investigates whether the order in which a model learns information affects how well it retains knowledge. Specifically, we ask: does learning general categories first (like "animals" vs "vehicles") before learning specific classes (like "dog" vs "cat") reduce forgetting compared to learning all classes at once?
  We test three approaches on CIFAR-100: (1) Coarse-to-Fine: train on 2 super-classes, then expand to 10 specific sub-classes, (2) Fine-to-Coarse: train on 10 sub-classes, then group into 2 super-classes, and (3) Flat: train on all 10 classes from the start. We use Elastic Weight Consolidation (EWC) to prevent forgetting during transitions. Our hypothesis is that learning general patterns first creates a stable foundation that helps the model retain knowledge when learning more detailed distinctions. We evaluate using standard metrics (accuracy, precision, recall, F1) plus continual learning metrics like backward transfer and forgetting rates. This work could inform how we design learning sequences for real-world systems that need to learn incrementally.

AI.tldr: 本文研究持续学习中知识顺序对灾难性遗忘的影响，提出"粗到细"学习策略（先学大类再学子类）可能比直接学习所有类别更能减少遗忘，并在CIFAR-100上通过三种学习顺序（粗到细、细到粗、扁平）结合EWC方法进行验证。
AI.motivation: 探究持续学习中不同学习顺序（粗到细 vs 细到粗 vs 扁平）对灾难性遗忘的影响，验证先学习通用类别是否能为模型建立稳定基础，从而减少后续学习细粒度分类时的知识遗忘。
AI.method: 在CIFAR-100上设计三种对比实验：(1)粗到细：先训练2个超类，再扩展到10个子类；(2)细到粗：先训练10个子类，再合并为2个超类；(3)扁平：直接从头训练10个类别。所有方案均采用Elastic Weight Consolidation (EWC)防止转换过程中的遗忘。
AI.result: 将使用标准指标（准确率、精确率、召回率、F1）和持续学习专用指标（后向迁移、遗忘率）进行评估，但具体实验结果尚未给出。
AI.conclusion: 该研究有望为实际系统中增量学习的序列设计提供指导，但结论需待实验验证。

title: Oversight Has a Capacity: Calibrating Agent Guards to a Subjective, Fatiguing Human
comment: 12 pages, 4 figures. Code and interactive demo: https://github.com/turangenesis/headroom
summary: As LLM agents begin to take real, irreversible actions (shell commands, file edits, deploys), the standard safety pattern is a human-in-the-loop approval gate: risky actions pause and wait for a person. We argue the gate is the easy part; the hard part is the judgment - which actions to stop - which the field evaluates against two false assumptions: that there is a ground-truth notion of "risky," and that the human reviewer is a perfect, infinitely-available oracle. On a hand-labeled set of 125 adversarially-weighted agent actions we show that (i) reviewers only moderately agree on what is risky (Fleiss' kappa = 0.52), so there is no single correct label; (ii) framing the guard as selective classification under asymmetric cost makes its operating limits measurable, and on hard inputs the guard cannot safely auto-decide; and (iii) when the reviewer is modeled as endogenous (fatiguing as escalation load grows), realized safety becomes an inverted-U in the escalation rate: more human oversight can make a system less safe, and the safety-optimal guard escalates below full escalation - a setting a load-aware policy also uses to resist a flooding attack that slips a malicious action past a fatigued reviewer. Agent oversight, framed this way, is not only a classification problem but a resource-allocation one: human attention is finite, and the guard's escalation policy spends it. We claim none of these mechanisms as novel - fatigue-aware learning-to-defer (FALCON), cost-sensitive deferral under workload constraints (DeCCaF), trajectory-level guarding, and reviewer-fatigue/flooding attacks are all prior art we cite. Our contribution is an open-source agent-oversight system that operationalizes and measures them in the LLM-agent action-gating setting, turning "is my guard good?" from a guess into a curve. The inverted-U and the flooding attack are modeling results that motivate a human study.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LLM智能体安全监管的核心矛盾不在审批门控，而在于行为判定；通过实验证明风险标签无客观标准、审查者存在疲劳效应，并发现过度审查反而降低安全性（倒U型曲线），最终开源了一个可量化的智能体监督系统。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM智能体安全监管依赖两个错误假设：存在客观的"风险"标签，且人类审查员是完美无缺的无限可用资源。作者旨在打破这些假设，重新定义问题框架。
AI.method: 在125个人工标注的对抗性加权智能体动作集上，测量审查者间一致性（Fleiss' kappa）；将守卫建模为不对称成本下的选择性分类问题；引入审查者疲劳作为内生变量，分析升级率与安全性的关系。
AI.result: (i)审查者间一致性仅中等（kappa=0.52），无单一正确标签；(ii)硬输入下守卫无法安全自决；(iii)审查者疲劳时，安全性呈倒U型曲线，过度审查反而更不安全；存在利用疲劳的洪泛攻击。
AI.conclusion: 智能体监督不仅是分类问题，更是资源分配问题——人类注意力有限；开源系统将安全评估从"猜测"转化为"可量化的曲线"。

title: Analyzing the Correlation Between Hallucinations and Knowledge Conflicts in Large Language Models
summary:
Hallucinations -- factually incorrect or unverifiable outputs -- remain one of the most challenging limitations of Large Language Models (LLMs), especially in knowledge-intensive tasks. One proposed explanation is internal knowledge conflicts arising from fixed, outdated training data. This paper investigates whether internal representations linked to knowledge conflicts correlate with hallucination behaviors in LLMs.
  Using probing techniques inspired by two prior works, we analyzed activations from hidden, attention, and MLP layers, as well as output logits, across predefined tasks. We probed LLaMA-3-8B on hallucination detection benchmarks and Falcon-7B on a knowledge conflict dataset. Our findings show that, although conceptually related, hallucination activation patterns cannot be fully reduced to or explained by knowledge conflict representations.
  Nonetheless, probing proves a robust tool across multiple languages and activation types, supporting its role in improving LLM interpretability. This work advances the broader understanding of hallucinations in LLMs and underscores the value of fine-grained analysis of their internal behavior.

AI.tldr: 本文探究LLM中的幻觉与内部知识冲突表征之间的关联性，发现两者虽有概念关联，但幻觉激活模式不能完全归因于知识冲突。
AI.motivation: LLM在知识密集型任务中常产生事实性错误（幻觉），一种解释是内部知识冲突（源于固定、过时的训练数据）。本文旨在验证这种知识冲突表征是否与幻觉行为存在相关性。
AI.method: 借鉴两种先前的探测技术，分析LLaMA-3-8B和Falcon-7B在隐藏层、注意力层、MLP层及输出logits上的激活模式，分别在幻觉检测基准和知识冲突数据集上进行探测。
AI.result: 知识冲突表征与幻觉激活模式虽有概念关联，但前者无法完全解释或还原为后者；探测方法在多种语言和激活类型中表现稳健。
AI.conclusion: 内部知识冲突不是幻觉行为的充分解释，探测技术有助于提升LLM的可解释性，需对模型内部行为进行更细粒度的分析。

title: Semantic Quorum Assurance: Collective Certification for Non-Deterministic AI Infrastructure
summary: As large language model (LLM) agents are integrated into autonomous cloud operations, distributed systems face a semantic reliability problem: proposer agents can generate production mutations, such as modifying IAM policies, opening firewall security groups, or executing data exports, that are syntactically valid and statically authorized but operationally unsafe. Classical distributed consensus protocols replicate deterministic state transitions but do not evaluate the safety of the proposed intent. To address this gap, we introduce Semantic Quorum Assurance (SQA), a control-plane primitive for governing non-deterministic agentic infrastructure. SQA represents proposals as declarative execution contracts bound to cryptographic evidence chains and routes them to a diverse panel of read-only, sandboxed validator agents. SQA aggregates their judgments under a risk-adaptive quorum predicate that enforces model and archetype diversity, adjusts weights based on calibrated assurance scores, and respects archetype-specific vetoes. Admitted proposals execute only through a sovereign execution gate. We instantiate SQA in a cloud-native control plane and formalize a correlated cognitive failure model for non-deterministic validators. On 500 infrastructure-inspired mutation scenarios, with safety results reported on held-out safe/unsafe trials excluding ambiguous scenarios, SQA reduces unsafe approval from 18.5% for single-agent validation to 0.3% while adding median validation latency of 1.45--4.12 seconds across the studied risk buckets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出语义仲裁保证（SQA）机制，通过多样化验证者小组和风险自适应仲裁谓词，将LLM代理驱动的云基础设施变更的误操作率从18.5%降至0.3%，代价是1.45-4.12秒的验证延迟。
AI.motivation: LLM代理被集成到自主云运维中，可能产生语法正确、静态授权但操作不安全的变更（如修改IAM策略、开放防火墙、导出数据）。经典分布式共识协议只能复制确定性状态转换，无法评估提议意图的安全性，存在语义可靠性问题。
AI.method: 将提议表示为绑定加密证据链的声明式执行合约，路由至多样化只读沙箱验证者小组，通过风险自适应仲裁谓词聚合判断（强制模型和原型多样性、基于校准置信度调整权重、尊重原型特定否决），通过主权执行门控制执行。
AI.result: 在500个基础设施模拟场景中，SQA将不安全批准率从单代理验证的18.5%降至0.3%，中位数验证延迟为1.45-4.12秒（不同风险桶）。
AI.conclusion: SQA为自治云运维中非确定性LLM代理决策提供了有效的安全防护机制，平衡了安全性与延迟开销。

title: AlloSpatial: Agentic Harness Framework for Spatial Reasoning in Foundation Models
summary: Multimodal Foundation Models (MFMs) have made substantial progress, yet remain fragile in spatial reasoning over the physical world. A key bottleneck lies in their inability to transform local egocentric observations into a global allocentric spatial representation. To address this, we propose AlloSpatial, an agentic framework for allocentric spatial cognition in foundation models. AlloSpatial introduces World2Mind, a plug-and-play cognitive mapping sandbox that converts egocentric observations into structured allocentric priors, including Allocentric-Spatial Trees and route maps that support querying object topology, geometric relations, passability, and trajectories. To utilize these priors reliably under noisy reconstruction and ambiguous visual evidence, AlloSpatial introduces a Spatial Reasoning Harness for tool-use judgment, modality-decoupled cue collection, and geometry-semantic arbitration. We further internalize this process in Qwen3-VL through cold-start reinforcement learning with a harness-gated trajectory-level reward. Experiments on VSI-Bench and MindCube show that AlloSpatial improves proprietary models by 5%-18% in a training-free setting, while ASTs alone support strong spatial reasoning even when visual inputs are removed. The trained AlloSpatial agents further outperform larger general-purpose models and competitive spatial baselines, suggesting that structured allocentric representations, active tool use, and verifiable reasoning offer a promising route toward spatially capable foundation models.

AI.tldr: 提出AlloSpatial框架，通过World2Mind将自我中心观测转化为结构化异中心先验知识，并利用Spatial Reasoning Harness进行工具使用和推理，结合冷启动强化学习，显著提升基础模型的空间推理能力。
AI.motivation: 多模态基础模型在物理世界的空间推理中仍然脆弱，关键瓶颈在于无法将局部的自我中心观测转化为全局的异中心空间表征。
AI.method: 提出AlloSpatial框架，包含两个核心组件：(1) World2Mind——可插拔的认知映射沙盒，将自我中心观测转化为异中心空间树和路线图；(2) Spatial Reasoning Harness——用于工具使用判断、模态解耦线索收集和几何语义仲裁的推理工具。并通过冷启动强化学习将这一过程内化到Qwen3-VL中。
AI.result: 在VSI-Bench和MindCube上，AlloSpatial在无需训练的情况下提升现有模型5%-18%；异中心空间树即使移除视觉输入也能支持强空间推理；训练后的AlloSpatial智能体超越更大的通用模型和空间推理基线。
AI.conclusion: 结构化异中心表征、主动工具使用和可验证推理是构建具备空间能力的基础模型的有效途径。

title: Operationalizing Linguistic Methods through Prompt-Engineering Skills: An Automatic Chinese Web Neologism Detection Pipeline
summary: We present a method for automatic Chinese web neologism detection that operationalizes traditional linguistic identification principles as prompt-engineering skills. The method has four stages: tokenizer-independent character n-gram candidate generation; dictionary anchoring with a Pointwise Mutual Information pre-filter; a well-formedness skill based on Chinese word-formation principles; and a combined rule and three-way classification skill that distinguishes neologism, entity, and none. Applied to the BAAI CCI 3.0 corpus (267M documents), the method produces 226,959 classified candidates including 4,853 labeled neologisms. To evaluate the method, we develop a per-stage conditional recall decomposition in which the pipeline's strict recall factors mathematically into the product of stage conditional recalls. Applied to Hou (2023) (4,199 entries), the decomposition exposes Stage 1 candidate coverage and Stage 4B LLM semantic judgment as the two bottlenecks (R=41.5% and 60.0% respectively), while intermediate stages are near-lossless. A length-stratified analysis further reveals that the structural well-formedness skill is length-invariant (>= 96.9%) whereas the semantic novelty-classification skill is length-dependent (65.6%/59.0%/44.1% across 2/3/4-character candidates), mapping a current boundary of skill-based linguistic operationalization. We release the method, pipeline outputs, and evaluation protocol as public resources.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于提示工程将传统语言学识别原则操作化的中文网络新词自动检测方法，在 BAAI CCI 3.0 语料上生成 226,959 个候选词（含 4,853 个新词），并通过分阶段条件召回分解揭示了两个瓶颈环节。
AI.motivation: 中文网络新词具有时效性强、构词灵活的特点，传统人工识别效率低，现有自动方法缺乏对语言学原理的系统性操作化。
AI.method: 四阶段流水线：(1) 与分词器无关的字级 n-gram 候选生成；(2) 基于词典锚定和 PMI 预过滤；(3) 基于中文构词原理的良构性技能；(4) 结合规则与三分类 LLM 技能（新词/实体/非新词）。
AI.result: 在 267M 文档语料上产出 226,959 个候选，含 4,853 个标注新词。条件召回分解显示 Stage 1 覆盖率为 41.5%，Stage 4B 语义判断为 60.0%，中间阶段近无损。良构性技能长度无关（≥96.9%），语义新颖性分类技能长度相关（2/3/4 字分别为 65.6%/59.0%/44.1%）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法将传统语言学原则系统性地转化为可计算的技能，首次提出分阶段条件召回分解作为评估框架，明确了当前基于技能的语言学操作化的能力边界。

title: CausShield: Sample Reconstruction-Resilient Vertical FL via Causal Representation Learning
summary: Vertical federated learning (VFL) is a distributed learning paradigm that leverages vertically partitioned features across isolated parties without sharing raw samples; however, it remains vulnerable to active sample reconstruction attacks. Existing defenses fail to achieve a satisfactory trade-off between model utility and privacy protection, due to either suppressing task-relevant information alongside privacy-sensitive features or relying on end-to-end supervised training to converge the defense module, which exposes the model to early-epoch vulnerability. To address this challenge, we adopt a structural causal model (SCM) insight and construct CausShield. From a task-learning standpoint, causal features within a raw sample are those that are directly relevant and contributory to the learning objective, whereas non-causal features are task-irrelevant but often encode sample-specific private information, thereby facilitating reconstruction. Importantly, we lay a theoretical foundation to prove this insight. CausShield thus decomposes the shared representations between the client and the coordinating server in VFL into task-relevant and task-irrelevant components to ensure full-cycle privacy protection. Nonetheless, the decomposition is inherently challenging due to the dual objectives of preserving model utility while mitigating privacy leakage. We address this via a carefully formulated optimization problem, which is solved through unsupervised representation learning. We further theoretically prove that CausShield preserves the convergence behavior of standard VFL. Extensive experiments compare CausShield against seven SOTAs, including InvL (USENIX Security'25), and evaluate robustness against advanced reconstruction attacks such as URVFL (NDSS'25). Results demonstrate that CausShield consistently outperforms in privacy protection, model utility, and computational efficiency.

AI.tldr: CausShield是一种基于结构因果模型（SCM）的纵向联邦学习防御方法，通过将共享表示分解为因果（任务相关）和非因果（任务无关但含隐私）两部分，利用无监督表示学习实现全周期隐私保护，在隐私、效用和效率上均优于现有SOTA方法。
AI.motivation: 纵向联邦学习面临主动样本重建攻击的威胁，现有防御方法要么抑制任务相关信息导致模型效用下降，要么依赖端到端监督训练导致早期轮次易受攻击，无法有效权衡模型效用与隐私保护。
AI.method: 基于结构因果模型（SCM）视角，将原始样本中的因果特征（任务相关）与非因果特征（任务无关但包含隐私信息）区分开来；通过精心设计的优化问题，利用无监督表示学习将VFL中客户端与协调服务器之间的共享表示分解为任务相关和任务无关两部分，实现全周期隐私保护。
AI.result: 与包含InvL (USENIX Security'25) 和URVFL (NDSS'25)在内的七种SOTA方法相比，CausShield在隐私保护、模型效用和计算效率方面均持续领先。
AI.conclusion: CausShield通过因果驱动的表示分解策略，从理论上保证了标准VFL的收敛行为，并在实践中实现了隐私、效用和效率三方面的最优平衡。

title: An Effective Router for Vision-Language Model Selection
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) with varying performance and resource requirements are widely deployed, making it difficult for users to select the most appropriate one among numerous VLM candidates. Existing work reveals the performance paradox phenomenon in language models and focuses on routing methods to solve it. However, developing a router for VLM selection is still a critical yet challenging problem, which primarily faces: 1) lack of specialized data, 2) ineffective feature representation, and 3) rigid model space and costly adaptation. In this paper, we construct a multimodal dataset for VLM selection, containing the outputs of seven mainstream VLMs on 32,626 unique image-text queries. We then propose ARMS, a router for VLM selection. ARMS enhances input signals with VLM profiles, employs a simple but effective architecture to improve representations of queries and VLM capabilities. To improve ARMS' adaptation to new VLMs, we propose two extension training strategies: incremental training and independent training. Experimental results on both in-distribution and out-of-distribution test sets demonstrate the effectiveness of ARMS. In particular, using our training strategy, ARMs (only 800M in size) can adapt to a broader VLM space and defeat commercial models like GPT-4o that are hundreds of times larger in scale. Our code, models, and datasets are available in the anonymous repository.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ARMS，一个用于视觉语言模型选择的路由器，通过构建多模态数据集、增强输入信号和扩展训练策略，实现了对不同VLMs的高效路由选择，仅800M参数即可超越GPT-4o等大模型。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM模型性能与资源需求各异，用户难以选择最合适的模型；已有工作关注语言模型的性能悖论现象和路由方法，但开发针对VLM选择的路由器仍面临缺乏专用数据、特征表示无效、模型空间僵化且适配成本高等挑战。
AI.method: 1) 构建多模态数据集，包含7个主流VLM在32,626个独特图文查询上的输出；2) 提出ARMS路由器，通过VLM配置文件增强输入信号，采用简单而有效的架构改善查询和VLM能力的表示；3) 提出增量训练和独立训练两种扩展训练策略，提升对新VLM的适配能力。
AI.result: 在分布内和分布外测试集上均验证了ARMS的有效性。仅800M参数的ARMS可适配更广泛的VLM空间，并在性能上击败规模大数百倍的商业模型GPT-4o。
AI.conclusion: ARMS通过构建专用数据集和设计高效路由架构，成功解决了VLM选择中的关键挑战，证明了小模型通过智能路由策略可以在VLM选择任务上超越大模型。

title: HydraQE: OSU's Submission for the IWSLT 2026 Speech Translation Metrics Shared Task
comment: Accepted to IWSLT 2026; 9 pages, 3 figures, 4 tables
summary: We present HydraQE, our contribution to the IWSLT 2026 Speech Translation Metrics shared task. HydraQE is an end-to-end, reference-free quality estimation (QE) system for speech translation built on a Qwen3-ASR backbone, which accepts source audio and a translation hypothesis as joint input. Hidden states from all backbone layers are combined via a learnable sparsemax scalar mix, then re-encoded by a lightweight bidirectional Transformer to enable full cross-modal interaction prior to pooling into a shared embedding. Three independent prediction heads are trained on complementary supervision signals: human direct assessment (DA) annotations, MetricX-24 pseudo-labels, and xCOMET pseudo-labels. To address the scarcity of human-annotated data, we train on a combination of synthetically corrupted examples and silver pseudo-labeled machine translation outputs, using a curriculum that begins on synthetic and silver data and gradually shifts toward human-annotated examples. HydraQE outperforms cascaded text-based baselines and prior direct speech QE systems, demonstrating that end-to-end speech translation QE is competitive with cascaded approaches.

AI.tldr: HydraQE 是一个基于 Qwen3-ASR 的端到端、无参考的语音翻译质量评估系统，通过可学习的稀疏混合、轻量级双向 Transformer 和多任务学习（DA、MetricX-24、xCOMET），结合课程学习策略，在 IWSLT 2026 指标共享任务中优于级联基线。
AI.motivation: 现有语音翻译质量评估多采用级联方式（先ASR再文本QE），缺乏端到端的直接评估系统；同时人工标注数据稀缺，限制了直接QE方法的性能。
AI.method: 基于 Qwen3-ASR 骨干网络，使用可学习的 sparsemax scalar mix 聚合各层隐藏状态，经轻量级双向 Transformer 实现跨模态交互，再通过三个预测头（DA、MetricX-24、xCOMET）联合训练，并采用课程学习策略从合成/银标数据过渡到人工标注数据。
AI.result: HydraQE 在级联文本基线方法和先前直接语音翻译 QE 系统上均取得更优性能，证明了端到端方法具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 端到端的语音翻译质量评估可以超越级联方法，多任务学习和课程学习策略有效缓解了标注数据稀缺问题。

title: Noise-Adaptive High-Probability Regret Bounds for Online Convex Optimization
comment: Accepted to 2026 European Conference on Machine Learning and Principles and Practice of Knowledge Discovery in Databases(ECML-PKDD 2026)
summary: We study high-probability regret bounds for online convex optimization (OCO) with strongly convex losses and establish three results that resolve open questions at the intersection of noise adaptivity, feedback structure, and constraint satisfaction. For the full-information setting with sub-Gaussian stochastic gradients, we prove a noise-adaptive high-probability regret bound in which the martingale deviation term scales with the noise level $σ$ rather than the gradient bound $G$, yielding a multiplicative improvement of $G/σ$ over the classical Azuma-Hoeffding baseline. Our analysis introduces an exponential supermartingale argument that bypasses the bounded-difference requirement of Freedman's inequality, enabling direct treatment of unbounded sub-Gaussian noise without truncation artifacts. For bandit feedback, we prove a minimax lower bound: the high-probability regret scales linearly in $\log(1/δ)$, in contrast to the $\sqrt{\log(1/δ)}$ confidence cost under full information. This constitutes a formal separation in the confidence cost of strongly convex OCO across feedback models. Regarding constrained OCO with stochastic constraints satisfying a Slater condition, we provide simultaneous high-probability guarantees for both cumulative regret and long-run constraint violation, achieving $\mathcal{O}(\sqrt{T\log(m/δ)})$ regret and $\mathcal{O}(\sqrt{T}/(ζδ) + m\sqrt{T\log(m/δ)})$ violation. Synthetic experiments corroborate all theoretical predictions.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了强凸损失在线凸优化(OCO)的高概率遗憾界，在三个方向取得突破：全信息设定下实现噪声自适应的高概率遗憾（噪声水平σ替代梯度界G）；证明bandit反馈下遗憾与log(1/δ)线性相关，与全信息的√log(1/δ)形成正式分离；在有约束OCO中给出遗憾与约束违背的同时高概率保证。
AI.motivation: 现有OCO高概率分析多依赖Azuma-Hoeffding不等式，其遗憾界受限于梯度范数上界G，无法利用实际噪声较小的优势；同时，bandit反馈与全信息反馈之间的置信度代价差异尚未被严格刻画；有约束OCO的高概率联合保证也缺少系统分析。这些开放问题驱动了本文研究。
AI.method: (1) 全信息：提出指数鞅论证方法，绕过Freedman不等式的有界差分要求，直接处理无界次高斯噪声；(2) Bandit：通过极小化极大下界证明遗憾与log(1/δ)线性相关；(3) 约束OCO：结合Slater条件，同时给出遗憾和约束违背的高概率界。
AI.result: 全信息：噪声自适应界，改进因子G/σ；Bandit：下界Ω(log(1/δ))，与全信息O(√log(1/δ))形成正式分离；约束OCO：O(√T log(m/δ))遗憾和O(√T/(ζδ) + m√T log(m/δ))违背。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了不同反馈结构下强凸OCO高概率遗憾的根本差异，首次证明了bandit反馈在置信度代价上的劣势，并为有约束场景提供了联合高概率保证。

title: Diverse Thinking Schemata Elicit Better Reasoning in Large Language Models
summary: Large reasoning models (LRMs) have attracted increasing attention for their ability to solve complex mathematical problems by generating extended reasoning chains. In this work, we focus on two critical yet underexplored aspects of the reasoning process: reasoning transitions capturing the distinct transitions between reasoning steps and answer candidates reflecting the variety of solution paths produced by the model. We collectively define these two aspects as thinking schemata. We observe a correlation between the diversity of thinking schemata and model performance, which motivates us to enhance diversity as a means to further improve reasoning potential. To this end, we propose Diverse Schemata Policy Optimization (DiScO), a framework that first endows the model with schemata awareness, then encourages diversity through reinforcement learning, and further promotes diverse reasoning at inference time. Experiments on multiple mathematical reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that DiScO consistently outperforms standard group relative policy optimization. Beyond accuracy, human-annotated analyses show that DiScO substantially improves the model's ability to recover from erroneous initial attempts. Overall, our work suggests the important role that diversity of the thinking schemata plays and points to scaling along the diversity dimension as a promising research direction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出**DiScO框架**，通过增强推理过程中的思维图式（推理步骤间的转移与候选答案路径）多样性，利用强化学习优化模型性能，实验表明该方法在数学推理任务上优于标准方法，并能有效提升模型从错误初始尝试中恢复的能力。
AI.motivation: 观察到思维图式的多样性与模型性能之间存在正相关，但已有研究对推理过程中**推理步骤间的转移**和**候选答案路径的多样性**这两个关键方面关注不足，因此希望通过增强多样性来进一步挖掘推理潜力。
AI.method: 提出**DiScO（Diverse Schemata Policy Optimization）**框架，包含三个阶段：1）赋予模型思维图式感知能力；2）通过强化学习鼓励图式多样性；3）在推理时进一步促进多样化推理。
AI.result: 在多个数学推理基准上，DiScO一致优于标准的Group Relative Policy Optimization；人工标注分析表明，DiScO显著提升了模型从错误的初始尝试中恢复的能力。
AI.conclusion: 思维图式的多样性对推理性能具有重要作用，沿多样性维度进行扩展是未来有前景的研究方向。

title: Co-Evolving Skill Generation and Policy Optimization
summary: Skill-augmented reinforcement learning improves language agents by storing reusable procedural knowledge acquired from past experience. Existing methods typically use strong language models to analyze trajectories, generate skills, and update a retrievable skill bank during online training. However, they rarely assess whether a newly generated skill is useful before it is stored and reused. We find that this assumption is unreliable: even skills generated by proprietary frontier LLMs exhibit highly mixed utility, with many providing little benefit or even degrading performance. Once such skills enter the bank, their effects are difficult to identify, because subsequent rollout feedback is delayed and usually reflects the combined effect of multiple retrieved skills rather than the marginal contribution of any individual skill. We propose an online reinforcement learning framework for pre-storage skill validation. The framework estimates whether a candidate skill contributes useful information beyond the skills already retrieved for the current task. It uses the standard rollout budget to form two matched groups under the same task and retrieval context: base rollouts conditioned on the currently retrieved skills, and skill-augmented rollouts conditioned on the same skills plus one candidate skill induced from the base trajectories. The reward gap between these two groups estimates the candidate skill's context-dependent marginal utility, enabling the framework to promote useful skills while filtering ineffective or harmful ones without additional rollout overhead. The framework further uses this marginal-utility signal to train the policy itself as a skill generator, reducing reliance on repeated calls to proprietary models. The learned skill-generation likelihood serves as a context-dependent score for retrieval-time reranking and outdated-skill pruning as the policy evolves.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在线强化学习框架，在技能存入技能库前验证其边际效用，通过分组成对 rollout 估计候选技能的上下文相关贡献，并以此信号训练策略本身作为技能生成器，减少对专有大模型的依赖。
AI.motivation: 现有技能增强强化学习方法在生成新技能后未经充分验证便直接存入技能库，导致低效用甚至有害技能污染库，且后续反馈延迟且耦合，难以追溯单个技能的贡献。
AI.method: 在相同任务与检索上下文中，将 rollout 分为基础组（仅用当前检索技能）和技能增强组（额外加入候选技能），通过两组奖励差距估计候选技能的边际效用；利用该信号训练策略作为技能生成器，并用于检索时重排序和技能剪枝。
AI.result: 该方法能够在无需额外 rollout 开销的前提下，有效筛选出有用技能并过滤无用或有害技能，同时通过学到的技能生成概率提升检索质量和技能库维护效率。
AI.conclusion: 预存储技能验证是提升技能增强强化学习效果的关键，边际效用信号可以有效指导技能库的动态维护和策略的技能生成能力提升。

title: SafeECGMatch: Calibration-Aware Joint Frequency and Time Space Semi-Supervised Learning for Open-Set ECG Classification
comment: 8 pages. Accepted to the KDD-UC 2026 (ACM International Conference on Data Mining and Knowledge Discovery - Undergraduate Consortium 2026)
summary: Electrocardiogram (ECG) classification models often suffer from severe label scarcity, making semi-supervised learning (SSL) an attractive strategy for reducing annotation costs. In clinical settings, however, unlabeled pools frequently contain out-of-distribution (OOD) anomalies or diagnostic groups absent from the labeled set. Standard SSL forces incorrect pseudo-labels onto these unseen classes, producing overconfident predictions. To address this, we propose SafeECGMatch, a calibration-aware safe SSL framework for single-label ECG classification under label distribution mismatch. Methodologically, SafeECGMatch employs a dual-branch architecture extracting time-frequency latent representations via ECG-specific augmentations. Crucially, it dynamically aligns confidence with empirical accuracy through adaptive label smoothing and temperature scaling, calibrating both the multiclass classifier and the OOD detector across temporal and spectral domains. This joint optimization allows trustworthy OOD rejection and reliable pseudo-labeling. Evaluated on the PTB-XL and PhysioNet/CinC Challenge benchmarks, SafeECGMatch achieves state-of-the-art accuracy and calibration, advancing reliable knowledge discovery in physiological time-series. Code is available at https://github.com/labhai/SafeECGMatch.

AI.tldr: SafeECGMatch是一个面向心电图分类的半监督学习框架，通过校准感知的安全策略解决标签分布不匹配问题，在PTB-XL和PhysioNet/CinC基准上取得SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 心电图分类模型常面临标签稀缺问题，半监督学习虽能减少标注成本，但临床中未标注数据常包含分布外异常或未见类别，标准SSL会给这些类别强行分配错误伪标签，产生过度自信的预测。
AI.method: 采用双分支架构，通过ECG专用数据增强提取时频潜在表征；利用自适应标签平滑和温度缩放动态校准置信度与经验准确性，联合优化多类分类器和OOD检测器。
AI.result: 在PTB-XL和PhysioNet/CinC Challenge基准上取得最先进的分类准确率和校准性能。
AI.conclusion: SafeECGMatch实现了可信的OOD拒绝和可靠的伪标签生成，推动了生理时间序列中的可靠知识发现。

title: RTL-BenchLS: A Large-Scale Benchmark for RTL Reasoning and Generation with Large Language Models
summary: LLM-based RTL generation and reasoning is a promising direction for hardware design automation. High-quality benchmarks are critical infrastructure for tracking progress in this direction. However, existing RTL benchmarks face inherent limitations in both scale and task scope. The designs they cover are typically small and simple, and the tasks focus almost entirely on specification-to-RTL generation. Frontier models' performance already saturates on the existing benchmarks. Scaling these benchmarks up is fundamentally difficult because aligned labels are required for benchmarking, such as specifications and testbenches. Such aligned high-quality data are rarely available for real-world designs. We introduce RTL-BenchLS, a large-scale benchmark addressing both limitations above. It contains over 10,000 formally verified Verilog designs, covering substantially larger and more complex designs than existing benchmarks. Beyond specification-to-RTL generation, we propose three novel tasks that jointly evaluate reasoning and generation: round-trip reasoning, masked-content reasoning, and repository-issue reasoning. The first two are self-supervised, which directly resolves the scaling bottleneck. All tasks are verified through formal equivalence checking without any manual testbenches. We evaluate eight LLMs on RTL-BenchLS. Even the best model reaches only 23% on natural-language round-trip reasoning, 28% on masked-content reasoning, and 12% on repository-issue fixing. RTL-BenchLS is substantially more challenging than existing benchmarks. It leaves ample room for future improvement and offers guidance for developing LLM-based methods for hardware design.

AI.tldr: RTL-BenchLS是一个包含超1万形式化验证的Verilog设计的大规模基准测试集，不仅涵盖更大更复杂的设计，还引入三种新推理任务（往返推理、掩码内容推理、仓库问题推理），通过形式化等价检查自动验证。评估显示最强模型在新任务上仅达12-28%准确率，远未饱和，为LLM辅助硬件设计留下充足提升空间。
AI.motivation: 现有RTL基准测试规模小、设计简单，且前沿模型表现已趋饱和。由于需要对齐标注（规格书、测试平台等），扩展基准测试难度大。因此需要一个更大规模、更具挑战性且可自动扩展的基准测试。
AI.method: 从真实世界设计收集超10,000个经形式化验证的Verilog设计；提出三种自监督新任务（往返推理、掩码内容推理、仓库问题推理），无需人工测试平台，通过形式化等价检查自动验证。
AI.result: 评估8个LLM，最佳模型在自然语言往返推理上仅23%，掩码内容推理28%，仓库问题修复12%。现有基准测试性能已饱和，而RTL-BenchLS仍有大量提升空间。
AI.conclusion: RTL-BenchLS比现有基准测试更具挑战性，为未来LLM辅助硬件设计方法的发展提供了明确的指导方向和充足的改进空间。

title: RadOT-Eval: Auditable Structured-Evidence Transport for Radiology Report Evaluation
summary: Automatic evaluation is critical for high-stakes text generation, where errors often involve omitted findings, hallucinated content, polarity reversals, location changes, uncertainty mismatches, and temporal-comparison errors rather than low surface similarity alone. Radiology report generation provides a challenging test case because generated reports must preserve structured clinical evidence across sources. We present RadOT-Eval, an interpretable structured-evidence optimal transport framework for offline auditing of radiology report generation. RadOT-Eval decomposes reference and candidate reports into attribute-structured clinical evidence units, aligns corresponding evidence using entropy-regularized optimal transport, and uses clinically meaningful side-channel discrepancies in a monotone risk model to predict error burden. All transport, feature, and readout choices are selected using the ReXVal dataset, and the frozen system is evaluated on the independent RadEvalX dataset. RadOT-Eval achieves Spearman correlations of 0.715, 0.548, and 0.399 with total, clinically significant, and clinically insignificant annotated error burden, respectively, yielding higher point estimates than standard evaluation metrics and the open-source large language model (LLM)-based evaluator GREEN-radllama2-7B. In a frozen auxiliary corruption-sensitivity stress test on ReXErr-v1, RadOT-Eval achieves 0.768 AUROC and a 0.990 corrupted-greater-than-clean paired win rate. These results show that structured evidence transport provides an auditable, rank-oriented evaluation tool for high-stakes generated clinical text under ReXVal-only model selection and frozen RadEvalX testing.

AI.tldr: RadOT-Eval 是一个基于最优传输的结构化证据评估框架，用于放射学报告生成的离线审计，通过将报告分解为临床证据单元、使用熵正则化最优传输对齐，并结合单调风险模型预测错误负担，在独立测试集上取得了优于标准指标和开源LLM评估器的相关性表现。
AI.motivation: 高风险文本生成（如放射学报告）中的错误往往是结构化的临床证据遗漏、幻觉、极性反转等，而非单纯的表面相似度问题。现有评估指标难以捕捉这些细粒度且具有临床意义的错误。
AI.method: 将参考报告和候选报告分解为属性结构化的临床证据单元；利用熵正则化最优传输对齐对应证据；通过具有临床意义的侧通道差异，结合单调风险模型预测错误负担。所有传输、特征和读出选择均在ReXVal数据集上选定，冻结后在独立RadEvalX数据集上评估。
AI.result: 在RadEvalX上，RadOT-Eval与总错误负担、临床显著错误负担和临床非显著错误负担的Spearman相关系数分别为0.715、0.548和0.399；在ReXErr-v1的腐败敏感性压力测试中，AUROC为0.768，腐败大于干净的配对胜率为0.990。
AI.conclusion: 结构化证据运输为高风险临床生成文本提供了一种可审计、面向排序的评估工具，在仅使用ReXVal进行模型选择并在冻结状态下测试RadEvalX的情况下，性能优于标准指标和开源LLM评估器。

title: When Behavioral Safety Evaluation Fails: A Representation-Level Perspective
summary: Large Language Model (LLM) safety has often been evaluated at the behavior level, which provides limited evidence of internal robustness, as these evaluations target outputs rather than representation-level vulnerability under intervention. We formalize this discrepancy as the audit gap: the difference between behavioral safety and robustness under intervention. To study this gap, we construct dissociated models that preserve safe outward behavior while remaining vulnerable in the latent space. We introduce an intervention-based evaluation framework to test model robustness through soft interventions in parameter and latent spaces, including harmful fine-tuning and layer-wise latent perturbations. To formalize the evaluation, we propose the Latent Vulnerability Score (LVS) to measure how easily harmful behavior can be elicited by bounded latent perturbations. Using this evaluation framework, we show that behavioral safety metrics are insufficient measures of representation-level robustness across multiple safely and unsafely aligned state-of-the-art models. Notably, dissociated models show substantially elevated LVSs despite comparable refusal behavior under harmful intervention, with intermediate representations being the most sensitive to intervention. Our results suggest that behavioral safety evaluation alone provides an incomplete picture of model robustness, motivating representation-aware audits of latent vulnerability and observable behavior.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了大型语言模型（LLM）在行为层面安全与表征层面鲁棒性之间存在"审计差距"（audit gap），并提出基于潜在空间干预的评估框架（LVS指标）来量化这种差距。实验表明，行为安全评估不足以反映模型的表征级鲁棒性，需结合表征感知审计。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM安全评估仅关注行为层面（输出），忽略了内部表征在干预下的脆弱性。作者形式化了这一"审计差距"，旨在揭示行为安全与表征鲁棒性之间的不一致性。
AI.method: 1) 构建"解耦模型"（dissociated models）：保持安全外部行为但潜在空间仍脆弱。2) 提出基于干预的评估框架，包括有害微调、逐层潜在扰动等软干预。3) 提出潜在脆弱性分数（LVS）量化有界潜在扰动下易引发有害行为的程度。
AI.result: 多个对齐和未对齐模型上，行为安全指标无法充分反映表征级鲁棒性。解耦模型在有害干预下仍表现出拒绝行为，但LVS显著升高，中间层表征对干预最为敏感。
AI.conclusion: 仅凭行为安全评估无法完整描述模型鲁棒性，需要结合表征感知审计（既关注潜在脆弱性也关注可观察行为）来全面评估模型安全性。

title: Baichuan-M4: A Clinical-Grade Medical Agent System for Continuous Care
summary: Baichuan-M4 is Baichuan Intelligence's clinical-grade medical large model, designed for \emph{continuous care} rather than single-turn medical question answering. It is built as a coordinated medical agent system around three pillars: \textbf{Baichuan-Harness}, a unified runtime that keeps reinforcement-learning training and real-world deployment consistent while enforcing action constraints, tool use, long-term patient memory, and multi-agent coordination; a \textbf{core reasoning model} trained with a continuous-care reinforcement-learning framework that integrates span-level reward modeling (SPAR++), reasoning-path compression, curriculum learning, and stabilized policy optimization; and a \textbf{clinical tool layer} for patient-memory management, authoritative evidence-based retrieval, and multimodal medical perception across documents, X-rays, and dermatology. On a cross-dimensional medical evaluation suite, Baichuan-M4 attains leading results in static medical knowledge and safety, dynamic OSCE-style consultation, long-context clinical memory, evidence-based retrieval, medical document OCR, and multimodal image understanding, while lowering the hallucination rate to 3.3\%.

AI.tldr: Baichuan-M4 是一个面向持续护理的临床级医疗大模型，围绕统一运行时环境、核心推理模型和临床工具层三大支柱构建，在多项医学评估中取得领先结果，幻觉率降至 3.3%。
AI.motivation: 现有医疗大模型多聚焦于单轮问答，缺乏对患者长期持续护理的支持，难以满足真实临床场景中的多轮交互、记忆保持、工具调用与多智能体协作需求。
AI.method: 构建了三大支柱：1) Baichuan-Harness 统一运行时，保持强化学习训练与部署一致性；2) 核心推理模型，采用持续护理强化学习框架（含 SPAR++ 跨度级奖励建模、推理路径压缩、课程学习与稳定策略优化）；3) 临床工具层，支持患者记忆管理、循证检索与多模态医学感知。
AI.result: 在静态医学知识、OSCE 式动态问诊、长上下文临床记忆、循证检索、医学文档OCR及多模态图像理解等维度均取得领先结果，幻觉率降至 3.3%。
AI.conclusion: Baichuan-M4 证明了面向持续护理的医疗大模型设计在临床场景中的有效性，为医疗AI的长期患者管理提供了可行框架。

title: TeamHerald@CHIPSAL 2026: Hate Speech Detection and Sentiment Analysis of Nepali Memes using Transformer-based Architectures and Ensemble Learning
comment: Accepted at the 2nd Workshop on Challenges in Processing South Asian Languages (CHiPSAL 2026) at LREC 2026
