summary: The analysis of internet memes in the Nepali language is complicated by frequent code-mixing and a lack of established baseline resources. While memes inherently combine visual and textual elements, this study focuses on a text-centric approach by extracting embedded text using an OCR layer and modeling it with Transformer-based architectures. We evaluate six distinct models and investigate the comparative effectiveness of Hard and Soft Voting ensemble strategies across two tasks: binary hate speech detection and three-class sentiment analysis. Experimental results show that a standalone decoder-only model achieved the highest performance for binary classification, whereas the Soft Voting ensemble performed best for the multi-class sentiment task, yielding a 15.8% relative improvement in Macro F1-score over the strongest standalone baseline. These findings suggest that ensemble strategies behave differently across binary and multi-class tasks, highlighting the importance of selecting aggregation methods suited to the classification objective.

AI.tldr: 本文聚焦尼泊尔语网络迷因中的仇恨言论检测与情感分析，通过OCR提取文本并使用Transformer模型，比较了六个独立模型以及硬投票与软投票集成策略的效果。结果表明：解码器独模型在二分类任务中表现最佳，而软投票集成在多类情感任务中F1分数相对提升15.8%，说明集成策略在二分类与多分类任务中表现不同。
AI.motivation: 尼泊尔语网络迷因由于频繁的代码混合（code-mixing）且缺乏基线资源，分析难度高。现有研究对尼泊尔语迷因的文本分析方法以及对集成策略在不同分类任务中的适用性缺乏系统探讨。
AI.method: 采用OCR层提取迷因中嵌入的文本，基于Transformer架构的六种不同模型进行建模；分别采用硬投票（Hard Voting）与软投票（Soft Voting）两种集成策略，在二分类（仇恨言论检测）与三分类（情感分析）两个任务上进行实验比较。
AI.result: 二分类任务中，独立解码器模型（decoder-only）表现最佳；多类情感分析任务中，软投票集成效果最好，Macro F1-score相对最强基线模型提升了15.8%。
AI.conclusion: 集成策略在二分类与多分类任务中的效果存在显著差异，选择聚合方法需根据分类目标进行调整，从而为低资源语言迷因分析提供实践指导。

title: Beyond Homophily: Towards Generalized Graph Reconstruction Attack and Defense
summary: Graph neural networks (GNNs) are widely deployed on relational data, yet they can leak sensitive or proprietary information about the training graph adjacency, e.g., social ties, transactions, and interactions. This work studies graph reconstruction attacks (GRA), a form of model inversion that reconstructs the training adjacency from a trained GNN, given different levels of attacker-side information. We first provide a systematic characterization of when and why adjacency becomes recoverable through features, labels, embeddings, and predictions, with leakage modulated by graph homophily, heterophily, and the model's inductive bias. Motivated by these findings, we view GNN inference through a Markov chain approximation lens, treating the layered forward computation as a chain of topology-dependent representations. Building on this view, we develop complementary attack and defense methods. On the attack side, we propose MC-GRA (+), which reconstructs the adjacency by optimizing a surrogate adjacency whose GNN-induced representations align with those of the target model at each layer. On the defense side, we propose MC-GPB (+), which suppresses adjacency-dependent information throughout the representation chain while aiming to preserve classification accuracy under a privacy-utility trade-off. Experiments across homophilic/heterophilic graph benchmarks and GNNs show that our attacks improve reconstruction fidelity over prior methods, while our defenses reduce reconstruction success with only minor accuracy loss.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了图神经网络（GNN）的图重构攻击（GRA），通过马尔可夫链近似视角分析邻接矩阵在不同攻击者知识下的可恢复性，并提出了基于层的攻击方法MC-GRA(+)和防御方法MC-GPB(+)，在保持分类精度的同时有效控制隐私泄露。
AI.motivation: GNN广泛部署在关系数据上，但可能泄露训练图邻接矩阵中的敏感信息（如社交关系、交易记录等）。现有研究对邻接矩阵何时以及为何可被恢复缺乏系统性理解，亟需分析攻击条件并设计有效的攻防方法。
AI.method: 1. 系统刻画了图同质性/异质性、模型归纳偏置等因素对邻接可恢复性的影响；2. 将GNN前向计算视为马尔可夫链，建立拓扑依赖表示的链式近似视角；3. 攻击方法MC-GRA(+)：通过优化替代邻接矩阵，使其各层GNN表示与目标模型对齐；4. 防御方法MC-GPB(+)：在表示链中抑制依赖邻接的信息，同时保持分类准确率。
AI.result: 在同质/异质图基准和多种GNN上的实验表明：MC-GRA(+)相比先前方法显著提升了重构保真度；MC-GPB(+)在仅损失少量准确率的情况下有效降低了重构成功率。
AI.conclusion: 本文提供了一种统一的攻防框架，揭示了图结构隐私泄露的机制，并验证了所提方法在隐私-效用权衡下的有效性。

title: The Amplifying Mirror: Locating and Steering the Partisan Direction inside a Large Language Model
summary: Large language models are rapicly replacing search engines as the primary interface between people and information. Unlike search engines, which retrieve existing content, LLMs generate novel text shaped by internal representations learned during training. Here we show that partisan political identity is encoded in the model's activation space, and that this direction directly shapes generation. Using 190,491 tweets from sitting members of the U.S. Congress as labeled training data, we train linear probes on the hidden states of the Llama 3.1 8B Instruct model. We identify a single geometric axis at layer 18 that separates Republican from Democratic text with an AUC of 0.945 and a Cohen's d of 1.94, and use sparse autoencoders to decompose that axis into interpretable partisan features. Causally intervening along this axis, ablating or amplifying the partisan component mid-generation, produces systematic shifts in the model's output. We witness stance reversals, register shifting, and structured fabrications of authority. Our results demonstrate that partisan bias in language models is not a vague emergent property but a learned geometric feature that can be precisely located and steered. Partisan bias is not a bug to be patched, but a structural property of how these models encode information about their users. As LLMs displace search engines as the interface to knowledge, understanding that product design (and its consequences) will be essential for navigating the legal, social, and political transitions from an information ecosystem that is curated to one that is generated.

AI.tldr: 本研究证明，大语言模型（Llama 3.1 8B Instruct）的激活空间中编码了党派政治身份（共和党/民主党），通过线性探针在层18以AUC 0.945识别出单一几何轴，因果干预该轴可系统性地改变模型输出（包括立场反转、语域转换和权威虚构）。研究认为党派偏见是模型的结构性几何特征而非漏洞，对AI作为知识接口的生态系统转型具有重要法律、社会和政治影响。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM逐渐取代搜索引擎成为人与信息之间的主要接口，理解模型中存在的政治偏见变得至关重要。不同于搜索引擎仅检索已有内容，LLM基于训练数据中的内部表征生成全新文本，这意味着它们的政治偏见可能以隐蔽且系统性的方式影响信息传播。作者旨在揭示这种偏见是否可定位、可测量、可干预，以及其本质是偶然错误还是结构性特征。
AI.method: 使用190,491条美国国会议员推文作为标注训练数据，在Llama 3.1 8B Instruct模型的隐藏状态上训练线性探针。通过分析激活空间，在层18识别出分离共和党与民主党文本的单一几何轴（AUC=0.945, Cohen's d=1.94）。利用稀疏自编码器将该轴分解为可解释的党派特征。最后通过因果干预（消融或放大该轴的党派成分）观察模型输出变化。
AI.result: 线性探针在层18以极高精度（AUC 0.945）区分党派文本。因果干预产生系统性输出变化：立场反转（模型改变政治立场）、语域转换（语言风格变化）以及结构化的权威虚构（模型编造来源或权威背书）。这些效应具有方向一致性，表明该几何轴直接塑造生成过程。
AI.conclusion: 党派偏见不是LLM中的偶然漏洞（bug），而是模型编码用户信息的结构性几何特征（structural property）。随着LLM取代搜索引擎成为知识接口，理解这种产品设计的后果对于应对从"策展式"到"生成式"信息生态系统的法律、社会和政治转型至关重要。

title: DICE: Entropy-Regularized Equilibrium Selection for Stable Multi-Agent LLM Coordination
summary: Multi-agent large language model (LLM) systems often fail to reliably outperform a single strong model equipped with best-of-N sampling. We argue that a core source of this instability is ill-posed equilibrium selection: current systems specify what information agents share, but not which coordination convention should be selected. We formalize a broad class of such systems as discounted incomplete-information Markov games and show that two common pathologies, oscillation between competing conventions and drift across them, can both induce unstable learning and linear Bayesian regret. To obtain a well-posed target, we introduce the Heterogeneous Quantal Response Equilibrium (HQRE), an entropy-regularized equilibrium concept with agent- and state-dependent temperatures. Under a monotonicity condition, HQRE is unique, admits linearly convergent mirror updates, and yields bounded Bayesian regret; the same condition yields rollout-measurable stability diagnostics. We instantiate this objective in two algorithms: DICE-PC, which coordinates frozen models through prompt-control actions, and DICE-FT, which performs parameter-efficient mirror fine-tuning. Across eleven benchmarks in four domains, DICE improves accuracy-cost trade-offs over strong within-class baselines; on reasoning and planning tasks, DICE-PC improves by 4.3 percentage points on average and DICE-FT by 8.5 points.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了多智能体LLM系统性能不稳定的根源——不恰当的均衡选择问题，提出异质分位数响应均衡（HQRE）作为理论目标，并设计了DICE-PC和DICE-FT两种算法，在11个基准测试中分别平均提升4.3和8.5个百分点。
AI.motivation: 多智能体LLM系统经常无法稳定地超越单个强模型配合best-of-N采样的性能，其核心原因在于系统只规定了智能体间共享的信息，却没有指定应该选择哪种协调约定，导致不恰当的均衡选择问题。
AI.method: 将多智能体系统形式化为折扣不完全信息马尔可夫博弈，提出异质分位数响应均衡（HQRE）——一种具有智能体和状态依赖温度参数的熵正则化均衡概念。在单调性条件下，HQRE具有唯一性、镜像更新线性收敛性和有界贝叶斯遗憾。基于此目标设计两种算法：DICE-PC（通过提示控制动作协调冻结模型）和DICE-FT（参数高效的镜像微调）。
AI.result: 在四个领域的11个基准测试中，DICE在准确率-成本权衡上优于强基线方法。在推理和规划任务上，DICE-PC平均提升4.3个百分点，DICE-FT平均提升8.5个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入HQRE解决多智能体LLM系统的均衡选择问题，并验证了DICE算法在实际任务中的有效性，证明了理论框架对稳定多智能体协调学习的价值。

title: LATTEArena: An Evaluation Framework for LLM-powered Tabular Feature Engineering (Extended Version)
summary: Feature engineering remains essential for tabular data analysis, and Large Language Models (LLMs) have emerged as a promising paradigm for automating this process, giving rise to LLM-powered AuTomated Tabular feature Engineering (LATTE). However, the absence of standardized platforms prevents fair, cost-aware comparisons. Furthermore, complex methodological designs obscure the specific contributions of individual components; for example, although LFG integrates Tree-of-Thought, few-shot demonstrations, Monte Carlo Tree Search, and natural language generation, the isolated impact of each technique's competitive edge remains unquantified. To address these challenges, we introduce LATTEArena, the first competitive evaluation framework featuring: (1) a six-dimensional taxonomy decomposing 15 representative methods into reusable components; (2) a standardized modular arena for controlled comparison; (3) multi-dimensional assessments covering performance, cost, and robustness; and (4) component-level ablation quantifying each technique's competitive edge. Through extensive evaluations, we reveal 16 key findings, including: (1) Tree-of-Thought with Monte Carlo Tree Search achieves optimal cost-effectiveness; (2) RPN and Code output formats dominate classification and regression tasks, respectively. We publicly release the modular framework and over 4000 execution logs, enabling researchers to seamlessly pit new techniques against existing ones and advance LATTE.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LATTEArena，首个面向LLM驱动的表格特征工程（LATTE）的标准化评估框架，包含六维分类法、模块化竞技场、多维评估和组件消融，通过16项发现揭示了Tree-of-Thought+MCTS的最佳性价比以及不同输出格式的任务适配性。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM表格特征工程（LATTE）领域缺乏标准化评估平台，导致公平性和成本意识比较缺失；复杂方法的设计（如LFG）混合多种技术，各组件贡献难以量化。
AI.method: 构建LATTEArena框架，包含：(1) 六维分类法分解15种代表性方法为可复用组件；(2) 标准化模块化竞技场实现受控对比；(3) 涵盖性能、成本和鲁棒性的多维评估；(4) 组件级消融实验量化每种技术的竞争优势。
AI.result: 16项关键发现，包括：Tree-of-Thought + 蒙特卡洛树搜索实现最优性价比；RPN格式主导分类任务，Code格式主导回归任务；发布模块化框架和4000+执行日志。
AI.conclusion: LATTEArena为LATTE领域提供了首个标准化竞赛式评估平台，通过组件解耦和消融分析揭示了各技术贡献，推动该领域的透明化发展。

title: Continuous Language Diffusion as a Decoder-Interface Problem
summary: Gaussian-corrupted sentence embeddings have no direct linguistic interpretation, yet continuous diffusion language models can generate fluent text from them. We study this puzzle through Embedded Language Flows (ELF) and identify a decoder-basin mechanism: denoising succeeds when trajectories reach regions where the native decoder can read stable tokens. We introduce a diagnostic protocol for denoisability, semantic recoverability, order sensitivity, decoder compatibility, and trajectory reliability. It exposes failures hidden by scalar metrics: low mean-squared error can discard linguistic content, low perplexity can reflect low-entropy collapse, and clean latent reconstruction can coexist with a narrow decoder basin. A decoder-margin bound explains why token recovery depends on margin and local decoder sensitivity, not latent error alone. Auditing public ELF checkpoints reveals an interface phase diagram: early predictions are weakly readable, mid-trajectory disagreement marks a competition region, and late predictions enter a high-margin final-token basin. Once inside, token realization is surprisingly simple on generated ELF states: frozen T5 token-embedding lookup recovers $93$--$96\%$ of native decoder decisions, and a single linear readout reaches $97.9\%$ agreement at 32k samples, leaving about a 1.1 perplexity gap in a structured residual tail. A conservative margin gate exits $17$--$27\%$ earlier in denoising steps under an explicit diagnostic monitor. Boundary checks on LangFlow, BitstreamDiffusion, and the Continuous Latent Diffusion Language Model (Cola-DLM) show that the same interface questions remain meaningful when the state object and decoder change. Continuous and latent diffusion language models should therefore be evaluated as representation-decoder systems.

AI.tldr: 本文发现连续扩散语言模型中的"解码器盆地"机制：去噪成功依赖于轨迹进入本机解码器能稳定读取令牌的区域；并提出一套诊断协议暴露标量指标无法发现的失败模式，通过边界检查揭示了界面相图。
AI.motivation: 高斯噪声扰动的句嵌入缺乏语言解释性，但连续扩散模型却能从中生成流畅文本，这一矛盾现象缺乏理论解释。
AI.method: 提出ELF诊断协议，涵盖可去噪性、语义可恢复性、顺序敏感性、解码器兼容性和轨迹可靠性五个维度；理论推导了解码器边界界；在多模型上开展边界检查。
AI.result: 冻结T5令牌嵌入查找可恢复93-96%的解码决策，线性读出在32k样本上达到97.9%一致；保守边界门控可提前17-27%步退出；边界检查表明接口问题在不同连续/潜扩散模型中依然有意义。
AI.conclusion: 连续和潜扩散语言模型应被视为"表示-解码器系统"进行评估，标量指标（MSE、困惑度）不足以反映真实的语言恢复能力。

title: ConSteer-RL: Steering Reasoning Capabilities in Large Language Models via Confidence-Aware Reinforcement Learning
summary: Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has recently become a key paradigm for improving the reasoning abilities of Large Language Models (LLMs), yet it remains limited by sparse binary rewards and its ignorance of model-internal uncertainty. In this paper, we propose ConSteer-RL, a simple yet effective framework that integrates token-level confidence signals derived from model log-probabilities into RLVR training. Specifically, building upon the Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) framework, we construct a confidence-aware reward by aggregating per-token probabilities into a scalar confidence score and incorporating it into an awareness-based reward shaping mechanism that penalizes overconfident errors while reinforcing correct and confident reasoning. Experimental results demonstrate that ConSteer-RL consistently outperforms strong GRPO baselines, achieving average improvements of 2.3%-4.0% across different model scales.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ConSteer-RL框架，通过在GRPO中融入基于token级置信度的奖励塑造机制，解决了RLVR中稀疏二元奖励和忽视模型内部不确定性的问题，在多个模型规模上平均提升2.3%-4.0%。
AI.motivation: 现有RLVR方法仅使用稀疏的二元奖励信号，且完全忽略了模型内部的不确定性信息，导致对过度自信的错误缺乏惩罚机制，限制了推理能力提升。
AI.method: 基于GRPO框架，将每个token的log概率聚合为标量置信度分数，构建置信度感知奖励，通过awareness-based奖励塑造机制惩罚过度自信的错误并奖励正确且自信的推理。
AI.result: 在多个模型规模上，ConSteer-RL一致性地优于强GRPO基线，平均提升2.3%-4.0%。
AI.conclusion: 将模型内部置信度信号引入RLVR训练是简单有效的方法，能显著提升LLM的推理能力。

title: A Multi-Agent System for IPMSM Design Optimization via an FEA-AI Hybrid Approach
summary: Interior permanent magnet synchronous motor (IPMSM) design requires balancing conflicting objectives and multi-physics constraints, while modern optimization workflows face three bottlenecks: manual problem setup, high finite element analysis (FEA) cost, and unreliable surrogate-based search in sparse or out-of-distribution regions. To address these limitations, we propose an end-to-end automated IPMSM design optimization framework that integrates retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) for structured problem definition with an uncertainty-aware FEA-AI hybrid optimization pipeline. A Design agent, connected to a motor textbook through RAG, provides domain-knowledge-based options and engineering tips, and compiles an optimization card and a design-of-experiments plan for AI-model training. A Training agent automates electromagnetic FEA, records geometry-validation and solver-failure logs, analyzes failed geometries using ANOVA-based data analysis and LLM reasoning, and invokes a Design Sampling agent to redefine the design space and generate additional samples. An Optimization agent performs GA-based search with uncertainty-driven switching: low-uncertainty candidates are evaluated by AI-surrogate inference, whereas high-uncertainty and reliability-critical Pareto-front or top-K candidates are corrected by high-fidelity FEA and reused for iterative retraining. The framework converts manual, experience-dependent configuration into a reproducible workflow that balances computational cost and prediction reliability. Experimental results under a matched high-fidelity FEA budget show that the proposed hybrid approach achieves better objective performance while maintaining low and further reducible predictive uncertainty, outperforming FEA-only search, which is limited by early budget exhaustion, and AI-only search, which converges to a low-confidence optimum.

AI.tldr: 提出一个端到端的自动IPMSM设计优化框架，结合RAG进行结构化问题定义和不确定性感知的FEA-AI混合优化，在相同的FEA预算下取得更优性能。
AI.motivation: 解决IPMSM设计中三大瓶颈：手动问题设置繁琐、FEA计算成本高、基于代理的搜索在稀疏或分布外区域不可靠。
AI.method: 框架包含Design agent（通过RAG连接教科书进行领域知识引导）、Training agent（自动化FEA、记录失败日志、ANOVA+LLM分析）、Optimization agent（GA搜索+不确定性驱动切换：低不确定性用AI代理，高不确定性及关键候选用高保真FEA校正并迭代重训练）。
AI.result: 在相同高保真FEA预算下，混合方法目标性能优于仅FEA搜索（受限于预算枯竭）和仅AI搜索（收敛于低置信度最优），同时保持低且可进一步降低的预测不确定性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架将人工经验依赖的配置转换为可复现的工作流，在计算成本与预测可靠性之间取得平衡，有效提升IPMSM设计优化效率。

title: PaperMentor: A Human-Centered Multi-Agent Writing Tutor for AI Research Papers on Overleaf
comment: Accepted to the ACL 2026 Demo Track
summary: Expert writing feedback from experienced researchers is critical for early-career scholars to improve their manuscripts, yet high-quality feedback often remains scarce because reviewing research papers is labor-intensive. Emerging AI-powered writing assistants largely focus on grammar fixes or simulating peer review with final scores, yet they fall short of providing concrete, actionable suggestions that help students improve their papers during drafting. We present PaperMentor, a human-centered writing assistant system that delivers actionable suggestions as Overleaf-native inline comments while leaving the actual writing entirely to human authors. PaperMentor integrates an expert skill library carefully curated from established researchers' writing advice with 12 specialized agents covering different aspects of paper writing, such as formatting compliance, phrasing accuracy, and terminology consistency. In a user study (n=14), 90.6% of the generated comments were rated actionable and 67.5% were rated valid, significantly outperforming a GPT-5.2 baseline uswithout the skill library. We release PaperMentor as open source for public use. Our code is publicly available under the AGPL-3.0 license at https://github.com/jiarui-liu/overleaf

AI.tldr: PaperMentor 是一个基于 AI 的写作助手系统，通过专家技能库和12个专业代理，在 Overleaf 中提供内联注释建议，帮助早期研究者改进论文草稿。用户研究表明其建议有效性显著优于 GPT-5.2 基线。
AI.motivation: 高质量的论文审阅反馈对早期研究者至关重要，但人工审阅耗时耗力，现有 AI 工具仅能提供语法修正或最终评分，缺乏具体可操作的修改建议。
AI.method: 构建专家技能库（来自资深研究者的写作建议），结合12个专业代理（覆盖格式合规、措辞准确、术语一致性等方面），以 Overleaf 原生内联注释形式提供可操作建议，但保留人类作者的完全修改控制权。
AI.result: 用户研究（n=14）显示：90.6% 的评论被认为可操作，67.5% 被认为有效，显著优于无技能库的 GPT-5.2 基线。
AI.conclusion: PaperMentor 通过专家知识驱动的 AI 辅助方式，有效提升了论文写作反馈的质量和可操作性，并以开源形式发布以供社区使用。

title: Constraint-Aware Optimization for Robust Protein Stability Prediction
summary: Multimodal $ΔΔG$ predictors integrating protein language models with inverse-folding representations achieve strong in-distribution accuracy on the Megascale dataset but exhibit limited robustness on out-of-distribution (OOD) proteins, persistent forward-reverse bias on paired-mutation benchmarks, and under-representation of rare stabilizing mutations. Existing approaches address these limitations primarily through additional architectural components, leaving optimization-level intervention comparatively underexplored. We introduce a constraint-aware optimization framework combining Balanced Mean Squared Error, a Siamese anti-symmetric regularizer, and a novel OOD-margin consistency loss on the per-position feature representation, requiring no architectural changes to the SPURS backbone. Across eleven benchmarks and three random seeds, the framework improves Spearman correlation on S669 from 0.486 to 0.540 ($σ=0.002$ across seeds), matching the published SPURS baseline (0.50) without architectural modification, and on S461 from 0.653 to 0.711, with consistent smaller gains on five additional OOD datasets. A controlled diagnostic on Ssym reveals that anti-symmetric training does not eliminate systematic forward-reverse bias, indicating that gains arise through implicit regularization rather than exact thermodynamic constraint enforcement.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需修改模型架构的约束感知优化框架，通过平衡均方误差、Siamese反对称正则化和OOD边缘一致性损失，在多个基准上显著提升了蛋白质突变效应预测的性能，但诊断实验表明性能提升源于隐式正则化而非严格热力学约束。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态ΔΔG预测器在分布内数据上表现良好，但在分布外数据上鲁棒性不足，存在正向-反向偏差，且对稀有稳定突变表征不足。已有方法主要通过添加架构组件解决，优化层面干预研究不足。
AI.method: 提出约束感知优化框架，包含三个组件：(1) 平衡均方误差（Balanced MSE），(2) Siamese反对称正则化器（Siamese anti-symmetric regularizer），(3) 基于每个位置特征表示的OOD边缘一致性损失。该方法无需修改SPURS主干架构。
AI.result: 在11个基准和3个随机种子上的实验表明：S669上Spearman相关系数从0.486提升至0.540（种子间σ=0.002），S461上从0.653提升至0.711，并在5个额外OOD数据集上取得一致但较小的改进。
AI.conclusion: 反对称训练并未消除系统性正向-反向偏差，性能提升源于隐式正则化而非严格的热力学约束执行。优化层面的干预是提升模型鲁棒性的有效方向。

title: Personalization Meets Safety:Mechanisms,Risks,and Mitigations in Personalized LLMs
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have enabled increasingly personalized interactions by adapting to users' preferences, contexts, and long-term histories. However, the mechanisms that enable personalization also expand the safety landscape in ways not systematically addressed by existing literature. Existing reviews typically focus either on personalization or safety, leaving their intersection largely unexplored. We present the first comprehensive, safety-aware review of personalized LLMs. We organize personalization along three dimensions-user representation, personalization paradigm, and evaluation-and introduce a unified taxonomy of safety risks. At the representation level, we analyze risks arising from diverse user representations. Across mainstream personalization paradigms, we delineate vulnerabilities inherent to prompting, retrieval augmentation, parameter fine-tuning, reinforcement learning, Mixture-of-Experts (MoE), pruning, agent frameworks, and multimodal personalization, and synthesize mitigation strategies across the model lifecycle. Beyond these fine-grained risks, we characterize paradigm-agnostic safety risks arising from personalized adaptation. We further summarize personalized datasets and evaluation methodologies. Through a case study of OpenClaw, we analyze deployment trends in personalized agent ecosystems. Our analysis reveals three structural inadequacies in existing research: safety is evaluated as user-invariant rather than relational, personalization techniques are analyzed in isolation rather than in composition, and evaluation frameworks cannot capture emergent long-term risks. By jointly examining personalized representations, personalization paradigms, safety risks, defenses, and evaluation methods, we provide a unified framework for developing safe personalized LLMs and highlight key directions for future research.

AI.tldr: 本文首次对个性化大语言模型（LLMs）的安全性进行全面综述，从用户表征、个性化范式和评估三个维度组织内容，系统分析了各类个性化方法（如提示工程、检索增强、参数微调、强化学习、MoE、剪枝、智能体框架及多模态个性化）中的安全风险，并总结了范式无关的安全风险、防御策略、数据集和评估方法。通过OpenClaw案例研究发现现有研究存在三大结构性缺陷：安全性评估与用户无关、个性化技术孤立分析、评估框架无法捕捉长期风险。
AI.motivation: 现有文献要么聚焦个性化，要么聚焦安全性，缺乏对两者交叉领域的系统性研究。随着LLM个性化交互日益普及，个性化机制在提升用户体验的同时也扩大了安全风险空间，亟需一个统一的安全感知视角来审视个性化LLMs。
AI.method: 从用户表征、个性化范式和评估三个维度组织个性化技术，引入统一的安全风险分类体系。针对每种个性化范式分析其固有漏洞，并综合模型生命周期各阶段的防御策略。通过OpenClaw案例研究分析个性化智能体生态的部署趋势，揭示现有研究的结构性不足。
AI.result: 识别了各范式（提示工程、检索增强、参数微调、强化学习、MoE、剪枝、智能体框架、多模态个性化）中的具体安全风险；总结了范式无关的安全风险；梳理了个性化数据集和评估方法；通过OpenClaw案例分析揭示了部署趋势；指出了三个结构性缺陷。
AI.conclusion: 提出了开发安全个性化LLMs的统一框架，强调安全性必须是关系型的（与用户相关），个性化技术需在组合中分析，评估框架需能够捕捉长期风险。为未来在安全个性化LLM领域的研究指明了关键方向。

title: Building Customer Support AI Agents at 100M-User Scale: An Evaluation-Driven Framework
summary:
The rapid rise in LLM capabilities has made AI agents increasingly viable across a broad range of tasks. Among the most promising applications is building production-ready customer-facing agents, a challenge that demands coordinated excellence in evaluation methodology, context engineering, training, and online measurement. Yet these critical pillars are typically developed in isolation, creating blind spots that only surface after deployment.
  In this paper, we present a unified framework that bridges offline development with online impact for customer support AI agents at Nubank, a company with 100M+ users. Our approach integrates several key components: (1) structured context engineering tailored to customer support agents, (2) systematic human-in-the-loop prompt iteration, (3) rigorous LLM judge evaluation with measured inter-rater agreement and GEPA optimization for consistency, and (4) ideation-to-production validation.
  A central insight is that evaluation-pipeline quality directly determines iteration velocity. We present results from five production deployments spanning distinct domains: card delivery, debt management, credit-limit support, card management, and product explanation. These deployments deliver consistent customer-satisfaction gains while substantially accelerating iteration. In our card-delivery deployment, large-scale A/B testing yields a 37 percentage-point improvement in AI transactional Net Promoter Score and a 29 percentage-point gain in self-service rate over prior agent variants, alongside a strong correlation between offline simulation metrics and online outcomes, demonstrating that eval-driven development reliably predicts production impact. On most use cases, AI satisfaction reaches within a few percentage points of expert human agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个统一框架，将离线开发与在线影响相结合，用于Nubank（1亿+用户）的客户支持AI代理。该框架整合了结构化上下文工程、人工参与的提示迭代、LLM评估（含一致性测量和GEPA优化）以及从构思到生产的验证。在五个生产部署中，AI代理的客户满意度显著提升，其中卡片交付场景的A/B测试显示AI交易净推荐值提升37个百分点，自助服务率提升29个百分点，离线模拟指标与在线结果高度相关。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM驱动的AI代理开发中，评估方法、上下文工程、训练和在线测量等关键支柱通常是孤立开发的，导致部署后才发现盲点。需要一种统一框架来弥合离线开发与在线影响之间的鸿沟。
AI.method: (1) 结构化上下文工程：针对客户支持代理定制；(2) 人机协同的提示迭代；(3) LLM法官评估：含评分者间信度测量和GEPA优化；(4) 从构思到生产的验证流程。核心洞察是评估流水线质量直接决定迭代速度。
AI.result: 在五个不同领域（卡片交付、债务管理、信用额度、卡片管理、产品解释）的生产部署中均取得客户满意度提升。卡片交付场景：AI交易净推荐值提升37个百分点，自助服务率提升29个百分点。大多数用例中AI满意度接近人类专家（仅差几个百分点）。离线模拟指标与在线结果强相关。
AI.conclusion: 基于评估驱动的开发方法能够可靠预测生产环境中的实际影响。该统一框架有效弥合了离线开发与在线部署之间的鸿沟，为大规模客户支持AI代理提供了可复现的工程化实践。

title: A Unifying View of Attention Sinks: Two Algorithms, Two Solutions
summary: When attention concentrates on a single token, a sink, what is the model actually computing? Attention sinks are ubiquitous in softmax transformers, yet this shared visual signature can hide fundamentally different algorithms. We show that visually similar sink patterns can reflect two distinct mechanisms: {i} adaptive nop, where a head suppresses its update by routing to a null token, and {ii} broadcast, where a sink aggregates and redistributes global information. In that case, sinks serve an analogous role: a safe destination when there is nothing useful to compute. Proposed interventions like gating or registers work because they implicitly target one or the other, revealing a duality between method and assumed mechanism: gating implicitly assumes nop; registers implicitly assume broadcast. Each mechanism leaves distinct traces (nop sinks exhibit negligible value norms; broadcast sinks induce low-rank outputs) which we formalize on synthetic tasks and use to derive practical diagnostics. Applied to pretrained vision transformers, these diagnostics reveal that both mechanisms exist at scale: sinks transition from CLS in early layers to patches in deeper layers, and concentrate in specialized heads. Strikingly, register tokens, designed for broadcast, are repurposed to also serve nop, confirming that neither intervention alone suffices. Combining gating with registers yields complementary gains in stability and performance. Overall, we find that the same attention pattern can reflect two very different computations and effective intervention requires first asking what the model is actually computing.

AI.tldr: 注意力汇聚到单个token（注意力沉点）时，模型实际执行的计算可能不同：一种是自适应空操作（nop），头通过路由到空token抑制自身更新；另一种是广播（broadcast），沉点聚合并重新分发全局信息。论文揭示了这两种机制的可区分痕迹（nop沉点值范数极小，broadcast沉点导致低秩输出），并提出诊断方法。在预训练视觉Transformer中，两种机制并存，且设计用于广播的register token也被用于nop，单一干预不足，结合门控与寄存器可带来互补收益。
AI.motivation: 相同的注意力沉点视觉模式可能对应完全不同的算法机制，现有干预方法（如门控、寄存器）隐含地只针对其中一种机制，需要理解模型实际计算的是什么才能有效干预。
AI.method: 在合成任务上形式化两种机制（nop和broadcast）的痕迹特征（nop沉点值范数极小，broadcast沉点导致低秩输出），推导实用诊断方法，并将其应用于预训练视觉Transformer。
AI.result: 两种机制在规模化的视觉Transformer中共存：沉点从早期层的CLS token过渡到深层层的patch token，并集中在专门的注意力头中。寄存器token（原设计用于广播）也被模型重新用于nop功能。
AI.conclusion: 相同的注意力沉点模式可能反映两种截然不同的计算；有效干预需要先诊断模型实际执行的计算；门控与寄存器结合可获得互补的稳定性和性能收益。

title: Agent Economics: An Entropy-Controlled Pluralistic Alignment Framework for Preventing Artificial Hivemind in Autonomous Agents
summary: This study proposes the Behavioral Protocol Framework (BPF), an entropy-controlled pluralistic alignment framework designed to address two critical challenges in autonomous agent economies: the hivemind effect arising from excessive strategic convergence among agents and the lack of transparency in autonomous decision-making processes. The proposed BPF consists of three core modules: Mentalizing-based Social Intelligence (MbSI) grounded in Theory of Mind (ToM), Pluralistic Alignment (PA), and a Verifiable Execution Kernel (VEK). These modules are organically integrated within a closed-loop architecture that governs the entire lifecycle of agent behavior, from decision-making and execution to verification and feedback. To evaluate the proposed framework, a simulation environment implemented in Python and a Streamlit-based user interface will be developed. Through empirical experimentation, the study aims to examine whether the entropy-control mechanism of the PA module can effectively preserve strategic diversity among agents and mitigate collective convergence, while the VEK module provides a comprehensive and transparent audit trail of the decision-making process. The anticipated results are expected to demonstrate that the proposed framework can simultaneously enhance the stability, efficiency, and trustworthiness of autonomous agent economies. Consequently, this research offers a practical approach for developing robust, transparent, and accountable agent-native economic systems.

AI.tldr: 提出行为协议框架(BPF)，通过熵控多元对齐机制解决自主智能体经济中的蜂巢思维和决策不透明问题，包含心智化社会智能、多元对齐和可验证执行内核三大模块。
AI.motivation: 自主智能体经济中普遍存在两个关键挑战：(1)智能体策略过度趋同导致的"蜂巢思维效应"(hivemind effect)；(2)自主决策过程缺乏透明度。
AI.method: 提出BPF框架，包含三个核心模块：基于心智理论的心智化社会智能(MbSI)、多元对齐(PA)和可验证执行内核(VEK)，三者整合在闭环架构中形成决策-执行-验证-反馈的完整生命周期。
AI.result: 预期通过Python仿真环境和Streamlit界面实验，验证PA模块的熵控机制能有效保持策略多样性并抑制集体趋同，VEK模块能提供全面的决策过程审计追踪。
AI.conclusion: 预期该框架能同时提升自主智能体经济的稳定性、效率和可信度，为开发稳健、透明、可问责的智能体原生经济系统提供实用方法。

title: PerspectiveGap: A Benchmark for Multi-Agent Orchestration Prompting
summary: Real-world LLM applications are moving beyond single-agent workflows toward orchestrated multi-agent systems, yet current models still struggle to determine what each sub-agent needs to know. To measure this, we introduce PerspectiveGap, a benchmark for evaluating LLMs' ability to compose orchestration prompts for multi-agent systems. PerspectiveGap contains 110 scenarios, each evaluated through two distractor-mixed task formats: role-fragment assignment and free-form prompt writing. These scenarios are organized into 10 topologies, which are distilled from the authors' real-world engineering practice and framed by the Prompt Economy principle: building loop-centered orchestrations that maximize utility with minimal role and engineering overhead. In experiments with 27 commercial models from 10 companies, GPT-5.5 substantially outperforms all competitors, whereas Opus 4.7 shows a notable weakness in orchestration prompting despite its strong coding performance. Nevertheless, PerspectiveGap remains challenging: the evaluated models achieve an average combined pass rate of only 14.9\% (GPT-5.5 62.0\%) and an average overall leakage rate of 246.5\% (a per-scenario information leak-event count, not a proportion; GPT-5.5 49.1\%). These findings suggest that multi-agent orchestration prompting is a distinct and under-evaluated capability, and PerspectiveGap provides a foundation for measuring and improving it systematically.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PerspectiveGap基准，用于评估LLM在多智能体系统中编排提示的能力。研究发现该能力与通用编程能力不同，当前模型表现不佳（平均通过率仅14.9%），即使是表现最好的GPT-5.5也只有62.0%的通过率。
AI.motivation: 现实LLM应用正从单智能体向多智能体系统演进，但当前模型不明确每个子智能体需要知道什么信息，缺乏衡量这一能力的基准。
AI.method: 构建包含110个场景的PerspectiveGap基准，每个场景通过两种任务格式（角色片段分配和自由提示编写）评估，场景组织为10种拓扑结构，基于Prompt Economy原则设计。
AI.result: 测试27个商业模型，GPT-5.5大幅领先（62.0%通过率），Opus 4.7在编排提示方面表现明显弱势。模型平均组合通过率仅14.9%，平均泄漏率高达246.5%。
AI.conclusion: 多智能体编排提示是一种独特且被低估的能力，PerspectiveGap为其系统化评估和改进提供了基础。

title: REFLECT: Intervention-Supported Error Attribution for Silent Failures in LLM Agent Traces
summary: Large language model (LLM) agents now solve complex tasks through long plan-and-execution traces, yet the ability to locate errors in a completed traces still lags far behind, especially in the \emph{silent failure} regime. Existing approaches predict suspect steps via classifiers or LLM judges, or recover correct answers via retry, but none feed the intervention outcome back to \emph{refine the attribution itself}. We propose \methodname, a method that closes this gap by diagnosing a candidate error step, testing it through controlled replay with a diagnosis-specific patch, and using the verified outcome flip as contrastive evidence to refine the final attribution. Across four localization benchmarks spanning multi-hop reasoning across domains, \methodname achieves the highest localization accuracy among same-auditor methods across all four benchmarks, with the largest gains on structured tool-use traces, while providing actionable localization even when ground-truth answers are unavailable.

AI.tldr: 提出了MethodName方法，通过对比诊断和可控重放来精确定位LLM智能体执行轨迹中的静默错误，在四个基准测试上取得了最优的定位准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过分类器或LLM判断来预测可疑步骤，或通过重试恢复正确答案，但都无法将干预结果反馈回来改进错误归因本身，导致在静默失败场景下定位能力不足。
AI.method: MethodName方法包含三个步骤：1) 诊断候选错误步骤；2) 通过带诊断特定补丁的可控重放进行测试；3) 利用验证后的结果翻转作为对比证据来精炼最终的归因。
AI.result: 在跨领域多跳推理的四个定位基准测试中，MethodName在所有同一审计器方法中取得了最高的定位准确率，在结构化工具使用轨迹上增益最大，且在无真实答案时也能提供可操作的定位。
AI.conclusion: 通过将干预结果反馈回归因过程本身，MethodName有效解决了现有方法在静默错误定位上的局限，为LLM智能体长轨迹的错误定位提供了更精确的解决方案。

title: From Statute to Control Flow: Span-Grounded Deontic Trees for Defeasible Scope Parsing
summary: Rule-following agents tasked with executing policies and regulations often fail via Silent Scope Omission (SSO): a model applies a general rule but silently drops nested exceptions or counter-exceptions, producing outputs that appear compliant yet break on important edge cases. Although such failures are often framed as an agentic-systems problem, the underlying bottleneck is statutory and policy understanding, a capability typically studied in legal NLP. However, most existing legal NLP benchmarks emphasize end-task outcomes, which can overlook the structural omissions that cause SSO. To diagnose and mitigate SSO, we introduce NormBench, a benchmark of 2,290 provisions spanning Chinese (laws and local policies), English (U.S. tax law, GDPR, and corporate policies), and cross-lingual settings, designed for defeasible scope parsing: identifying precisely which clause overrides which. NormBench uses Span-Grounded Deontic Trees (SG-DT), a compiler-style intermediate representation that anchors every logical branch to source spans and requires explicit exclusion guards, enabling deterministic compilation and audit. Evaluations of frontier LLMs reveal two recurring pathologies: (1) Recursion Decay, where performance drops sharply as defeater depth increases, and (2) an Auditability Trap, where models retrieve relevant spans but fail to assemble correct control flow. Using SG-DT as a constrained intermediate output improves whole-tree fidelity and defeater recovery, and downstream experiments show that its utility is mechanism-specific: gains concentrate on exception-active, SSO-prone cases, while aggregate accuracy can be mixed when the added structure is unnecessary or parser fidelity is low.

AI.tldr: 本文提出NormBench基准，通过Span-Grounded Deontic Trees（SG-DT）来诊断和缓解大语言模型在执行规则时因遗漏嵌套例外而导致的Silent Scope Omission（SSO）问题，发现模型存在递归衰减和可审计性陷阱两类病理，SG-DT作为约束中间表示可提升异常恢复能力。
AI.motivation: 现有法律NLP基准大多关注最终任务结果，忽视了导致SSO的结构性遗漏问题。作者旨在系统性地诊断和缓解规则跟随型智能体在执行政策和法规时因遗漏嵌套例外导致的失败。
AI.method: 构建NormBench基准（含2,290条法律条款，覆盖中英文及跨语言场景），提出Span-Grounded Deontic Trees（SG-DT）作为编译器风格的中间表示，将每个逻辑分支锚定到源文本跨度并需要显式的排除守卫，支持确定性编译和审计。
AI.result: 前沿LLM评估显示两种病理：（1）递归衰减——随着例外深度增加性能急剧下降；（2）可审计性陷阱——模型能检索到相关跨度但无法组装正确的控制流。SG-DT作为约束中间输出可提升整树保真度和例外恢复能力，效用具有机制特异性：优势集中在例外活跃、易SSO的案例上。
AI.conclusion: SG-DT是一种有效的结构化中间表示方法，可缓解SSO问题，但其效用具有特异性，在结构非必要或解析器保真度低时总体准确率可能混合。

title: TRUST-SCF: Transformer-based Risk Understanding and Scoring for Transactional Supply Chain Finance
summary: Supply Chain Finance (SCF) and LendTech platforms need credit scoring systems that respond to evolving transaction behavior, repayment delays, and active exposure. We propose TRUST-SCF, a transformer-based framework for transaction-level risk prediction and dynamic credit scoring. Each user history is represented as a sequence of transaction tokens containing utilization, repayment delay and transaction position. The main contributions are: (1) a financially aligned attention bias that combines utilization similarity and recency, enabling the model to compare repayment behavior under comparable exposure conditions; (2) continuous repayment-delay prediction in a log-transformed target space, reducing the influence of extreme delays while improving sensitivity to short-delay behavior and (3) a label-efficient credit-scoring pipeline in which the final credit score is not trained using any explicit external credit-score label, but is instead derived from predicted delay, potential risk over simulated utilization, actual unpaid exposure, and nonlinear calibration. Experiments on real transaction data from more than 300,000 transactions show that TRUST-SCF improves delay prediction over sequential baselines and produces scores that are strongly associated with future repayment behavior. These results suggest that TRUST-SCF is a practical framework for adaptive credit scoring and transaction-level risk mitigation in SCF and LendTech environments.

AI.tldr: 提出TRUST-SCF，一个基于Transformer的框架，用于供应链金融中的交易级风险预测和动态信用评分。通过金融对齐的注意力偏置、对数变换的连续延迟预测和无标签的信用评分流水线，在30万+真实交易数据上优于序列基线模型。
AI.motivation: 供应链金融和LendTech平台需要能够响应交易行为变化、还款延迟和活跃风险的信用评分系统，而现有方法难以捕捉交易序列中的动态模式。
AI.method: (1) 将用户历史建模为交易Token序列；(2) 设计金融对齐的注意力偏置（融合利用率相似性和时效性）；(3) 对数变换空间中的连续还款延迟预测；(4) 无需外部信用评分标签的评分流水线，从预测延迟、模拟利用风险、未付风险等多角度推导信用评分。
AI.result: 在超过30万笔真实交易数据上，TRUST-SCF在延迟预测上优于序列基线模型，且生成的信用评分与未来还款行为高度相关。
AI.conclusion: TRUST-SCF是适用于供应链金融和LendTech环境的自适应信用评分和交易级风险缓解的实用框架。

title: DynaOD: Dynamic Origin-Destination Flow Generation with Discrete-to-Continuous Temporal Semantic Modeling
summary: Dynamic origin-destination (OD) flow generation seeks to synthesize realistic mobility dynamics from temporal context alone, without relying on historical OD observations. A key challenge is to translate semantic temporal signals into temporally coherent OD patterns while preserving the inherent spatial heterogeneity of urban regions. We propose DynaOD, a semantic-driven framework that models temporal dynamics through two complementary perspectives: discrete directional trends that characterize qualitative shifts in urban activity patterns, and continuous temporal evolution that captures how such shifts unfold over time. By jointly encoding these temporal semantics, the framework constructs time-varying region representations that condition pretrained static OD generators in a lightweight and plug-and-play fashion. This modular design further supports scalable deployment and cross-city transferability. Extensive experiments on large-scale real-world datasets show that our method consistently outperforms representative baselines in both predictive accuracy and distributional fidelity. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/csjiezhao/DynaOD.

AI.tldr: 提出DynaOD框架，通过离散方向趋势和连续时间演化两种视角建模时间语义，以轻量级即插即用方式调节预训练的静态OD生成器，实现从时序信号生成动态起讫点流量。
AI.motivation: 现有OD流量生成依赖历史观测数据，缺乏从时间上下文语义信号中合成动态OD模式的能力，且难以兼顾时间连贯性与城市区域空间异质性。
AI.method: DynaOD框架包含两个互补视角：离散方向趋势（定性刻画城市活动模式变迁）和连续时间演化（捕捉变迁的时间展开过程），通过联合编码构建时变区域表征，以轻量即插即用方式调节预训练静态OD生成器。
AI.result: 大规模真实数据集实验表明，DynaOD在预测精度和分布保真度上均持续优于代表性基线方法。
AI.conclusion: DynaOD模块化设计支持可扩展部署和跨城市迁移，代码已开源。

title: PACT: Learning Diverse Diagnostic Strategies via Privileged Synthesis and Branch Consensus
summary: Clinical diagnosis requires flexible use of multiple reasoning paradigms under incomplete patient information. Existing LLM-based medical agents show strong medical reasoning ability, but single-paradigm or naively mixed dialogue supervision makes these paradigms difficult to learn without interference. We propose \textbf{PACT} (Periodic Anchor Consensus Training), a framework that couples supervised multi-paradigm dialogue synthesis with consensus-based Branch training. At the data level, \textbf{DPS} (Doctor-Patient-Supervisor) uses complete electronic medical records (EMRs) for quality control while keeping the doctor agent restricted to patient-visible information. This produces validated dialogues under four diagnostic reasoning paradigms without leaking hidden clinical answers. At the training level, PACT trains one paradigm-specific LoRA Branch per paradigm and periodically aggregates Branches into a shared Anchor through sign consensus. We further construct a dynamic multi-turn Chinese medical diagnosis benchmark for interactive consultation. Experiments show that PACT achieves state-of-the-art performance among compared proprietary, medical-specialized, and task-adapted baselines on diagnostic outcome and consultation-process metrics.

AI.tldr: 提出PACT框架，通过多范式对话合成（DPS）和共识分支训练，让LLM在医疗诊断中同时掌握多种推理范式，在基准测试中达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 临床诊断需要灵活运用多种推理范式，但现有LLM医疗智能体使用单一范式或简单混合的对话监督难以让模型无干扰地学习多种范式。
AI.method: 1) 数据层：DPS架构利用完整EMR进行质量控制，医生智能体仅使用患者可见信息，生成四种诊断推理范式的验证对话。2) 训练层：PACT为每种范式训练独立的LoRA分支，并通过符号共识定期聚合到共享锚点中。
AI.result: 在诊断结果和咨询过程指标上，超越了商业模型、医学专用模型和任务自适应基线，达到SOTA。
AI.conclusion: PACT框架有效解决了多范式学习中的干扰问题，显著提升了医疗诊断智能体的综合表现。

title: LogNEO: A GPT-Neo Reinforcement Learning Framework for Accurate Real-Time Log Anomaly Detection
summary: Detecting anomalies in large-scale system logs is critical for the reliability and security of modern computing infrastructure. We present LogNEO, a log anomaly detector built on EleutherAI's GPT-Neo (1.3B parameters) and fine-tuned with a novel partial-credit, exponentially decaying position-aware reward scheme combined with cross-entropy regularisation via Proximal Policy Optimisation (PPO). The position-aware reward explicitly models prediction difficulty: early positions receive higher rewards for correct predictions, while later positions incur stronger penalties for errors. LogNEO attains F1-scores of 0.927, 0.913, and 0.984 on the HDFS, BGL, and Thunderbird benchmarks, improving recall by up to 6 percentage points over the prior state-of-the-art LogGPT while maintaining comparable precision. A production microservice deployment over Apache Kafka, Redis, and TensorRT-accelerated inference demonstrates 45 ms end-to-end latency at 15,000 events per second.

AI.tldr: LogNEO 是一个基于 GPT-Neo (1.3B) 的日志异常检测器，采用 PPO 和位置感知奖励方案进行微调，在三个基准上实现了 SOTA F1 分数（最高 0.984），并在生产部署中达到 45ms 延迟和 15,000 事件/秒的吞吐量。
AI.motivation: 大规模系统日志中的异常检测对基础设施的可靠性和安全性至关重要，现有方法（如 LogGPT）在召回率上仍有提升空间。
AI.method: 基于 GPT-Neo (1.3B) 进行 PPO 微调，引入部分信用、指数衰减的位置感知奖励方案，结合交叉熵正则化；早期位置正确预测获更高奖励，后期位置错误受更强惩罚。
AI.result: HDFS: 0.927 F1, BGL: 0.913 F1, Thunderbird: 0.984 F1；召回率比 LogGPT 最高提升 6 个百分点；生产部署端到端延迟 45ms，吞吐量 15,000 事件/秒。
AI.conclusion: LogNEO 通过位置感知奖励机制有效提升了日志异常检测的召回率，同时保持了高精度和低延迟的生产可用性。

title: Graph2Idea:Retrieval-Augmented Scientific Idea Generation with Graph-Structured Contexts
summary: Generating novel, feasible, and high-quality research ideas is an important yet challenging task in scientific discovery.Recent Large Language Model (LLM)-based methods often ground idea generation with retrieved literature, but the retrieved evidence is usually provided as flat text, such as titles, abstracts, or summaries. Such flat contexts may contain redundant or weakly relevant information, while making cross-paper relations among problems, methods, mechanisms, and findings difficult to identify and trace.To address this challenge, we propose Graph2Idea, a knowledge graph-guided framework for retrieval-augmented scientific idea generation.Graph2Idea first retrieves papers according to the input topic, transforms them into structured knowledge triples, and dynamically constructs a target-centered knowledge graph to make literature relations explicit.It then extracts compact graph-derived contexts that retain target-relevant relational evidence while reducing noisy textual input.Based on these contexts, a two-stage generation process first identifies promising research directions and then guides the LLM to synthesize candidate ideas from graph-grounded evidence.Experiments on a scientific idea generation benchmark show that Graph2Idea outperforms representative baselines under the automatic evaluation protocol.Compared with the strongest baseline scores, it improves Novelty from 0.45 to 0.52, Quality from 0.24 to 0.29, and Feasibility from 0.22 to 0.28.These results suggest that graph-structured evidence helps LLMs generate research ideas through more explicit, compact, and traceable recombination of prior scientific knowledge.

AI.tldr: 提出Graph2Idea框架，通过知识图谱结构化的文献关系增强检索增强型科学想法生成，在自动评估中Novelty、Quality、Feasibility均优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的科研想法生成方法通常以扁平文本形式检索文献（如标题、摘要），信息冗余、相关性弱，且难以追踪论文间问题、方法、机制和发现之间的交叉关系。
AI.method: Graph2Idea框架包含三步：1) 检索输入主题相关论文并转化为结构化知识三元组，动态构建以目标为中心的知识图谱；2) 提取紧凑的图上下文，保留与目标相关的证据同时减少噪声；3) 两阶段生成过程，先识别有前景的研究方向，再引导LLM基于图证据合成候选想法。
AI.result: 在科学想法生成基准上，Graph2Idea在Novelty（0.45→0.52）、Quality（0.24→0.29）、Feasibility（0.22→0.28）三个指标上均超越最强基线。
AI.conclusion: 图结构化的证据帮助LLM通过更显式、更紧凑、可追溯的方式重组先验科学知识，从而生成更高质量的研究想法。

title: Multilingual Sentiment Aware Text Summarization A Reinforcement Learning Approach for Consistency Maintenance
summary: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) has significantly improved the quality and fluency of large language models in text summarization. However, its impact on affective properties remains insufficiently understood. In this work, we study sentiment drift, a systematic shift toward neutral sentiment in RLHF-based summarization outputs compared to source texts. We conduct extensive experiments across multiple datasets, model architectures, and eight languages to analyze how alignment objectives influence sentiment preservation. Our results show that sentiment drift is a consistent phenomenon that becomes stronger with increased KL regularization strength, indicating a trade-off between alignment stability and affective fidelity. To explain this behavior, we introduce a Policy Attribution framework that decomposes the RLHF objective and quantifies the contribution of its components. Our analysis reveals that KL regularization is the primary driver of sentiment suppression across all settings. Based on these findings, we propose a sentiment-aware modification of the KL regularization term, which selectively reduces constraints on sentiment-bearing tokens. Empirical results demonstrate that this approach mitigates sentiment drift while maintaining summarization quality. Overall, our findings highlight a fundamental limitation of current alignment methods: while they improve factual consistency and safety, they may unintentionally suppress emotional expressiveness. This motivates the development of alignment strategies that explicitly account for affective preservation.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了RLHF在文本摘要中导致情感漂移（向中性情感偏移）的问题，发现KL正则化是主要驱动因素，并提出了一种情感感知的KL正则化改进方法，在保持摘要质量的同时减轻情感漂移。
AI.motivation: RLHF显著提升了文本摘要的质量和流畅性，但其对情感属性的影响尚不明确。作者希望探究RLHF是否会导致情感漂移，以及背后的机制。
AI.method: 1. 跨多个数据集、模型架构和八种语言进行实验，分析对齐目标对情感保持的影响。2. 提出Policy Attribution框架，分解RLHF目标并量化各组件贡献。3. 提出情感感知的KL正则化改进，选择性减少对情感承载token的约束。
AI.result: 情感漂移是一致性现象，随KL正则化强度增加而增强；KL正则化是情感抑制的主要驱动因素；提出的情感感知KL正则化能缓解情感漂移且不损害摘要质量。
AI.conclusion: 当前对齐方法在提升事实一致性和安全性的同时，可能无意中抑制了情感表达力，需要开发明确考虑情感保持的对齐策略。

title: Have I Solved This Before? Retrieving Similar Segmentation Problems for Evolutionary Learning
summary: Reliable integration and solid configuration of monitoring systems constitute a fundamental prerequisites for achieving high efficiency and productivity in contemporary manufacturing environments. Design decisions on sensor type and system architecture have to be made at an early stage and under comparably high uncertainty. This work investigates a research direction that deviates from the traditional monitoring-system development process by shifting the attention from algorithm design to a deeper analysis of the inspection problem. In contrast to traditional design cycles, this paper proposes to gradually collect knowledge and store it in an abstract system model. This enables the retrieval of similar solutions for future use cases, preventing the need for expensive model training from scratch and allowing instead for the incremental refinement of existing base configurations. Reuse of previously generated pipelines reduces the risk of late and costly revisions. As there is little knowledge on cross-domain transferability of filter pipelines, this study analyzes the potential of retrieving filter pipelines to transfer them to different but similar segmentation problems. Finally, we statistically analyze the benefits of this `transfer learning' variant which is predominantly applied to image segmentation problems. In addition, we discuss how simple models help balancing the trade-off between complexity, technical requirements, and reliability in the design process.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种偏离传统监控系统开发流程的方法，通过将注意力从算法设计转向对检测问题的深入分析，逐步收集知识并存储在抽象系统模型中，实现跨领域过滤管线的复用与增量优化，从而降低开发成本与风险。
AI.motivation: 传统监控系统的开发需要在早期高不确定性下做出传感器选型与架构设计决策，且模型训练成本高、易导致后期返工，缺乏跨领域知识复用机制。
AI.method: 提出渐进式知识积累与抽象系统建模方法，通过检索并复用已有过滤管线，将其迁移至相似但不同的图像分割问题，实现增量式基座配置优化。
AI.result: 统计分析表明该"迁移学习"变体在图像分割任务中具有可量化的优势，且简单模型有助于平衡复杂性、技术需求与可靠性之间的权衡。
AI.conclusion: 通过管线复用降低模型从头训练的必要性，可有效降低后期重大修改风险，并支持跨领域场景的迁移应用。

title: ComplexConstraints and Beyond: Expert Rubrics for RLVR
comment: Accepted to the GEM workshop at ACL 2026: https://gem-workshop.com/
summary: As LLM capabilities advance rapidly, the evaluation methods used to assess them increasingly lag behind. Traditional benchmarks relied on programmatic verification of narrow, surface-level constraints, but real-world instruction following and agentic tasks demand assessment of nuanced, context-dependent behaviors that resist simple scripted checks. We present a systematic analysis of expert-curated rubric-based evaluation as an alternative paradigm, drawing on empirical evidence from two domains: complex instruction following and enterprise agentic tasks. We first articulate five design principles for constructing high-quality rubrics, including Maximum Viable Atomicity, intent-aware criterion design, and iterative LLM-judge calibration. To validate these principles, we introduce ComplexConstraints, a new expert-curated instruction-following dataset in which each prompt is paired with 10-40 atomic rubric criteria. We demonstrate that these expert rubrics are not only better evaluation instruments but also highly effective training signals: training on approximately 1,000 ComplexConstraints examples yields +15.5% improvement for a 4B-parameter model and +12.2% for a 235B-parameter model on instruction following, while single-epoch RL training on a rubric-graded enterprise environment produces gains that transfer to out-of-distribution benchmarks the model was never trained on (+4.5% BFCL, +7.4% Tau2-Bench, +6.8% Tool-Decathlon). Our findings establish that expert-authored rubrics improve both the measurement and the development of frontier LLM capabilities, serving as effective evaluation and RL training signals.

AI.tldr: 论文提出专家撰写的评分细则（rubrics）作为替代传统基准测试的评估范式，在复杂指令遵循和企业智能体任务上验证了有效性，并发现这些细则不仅能更好评估模型，还能作为强化学习训练信号显著提升模型能力。
AI.motivation: 传统基准测试依赖程序化验证，只能检查窄范围、表面层次的约束，而实际指令遵循和智能体任务需要评估细致、上下文相关的行为，现有评估方法已落后于LLM能力的快速发展。
AI.method: 提出五条高质量评分细则设计原则（最大可行原子性、意图感知标准设计、迭代LLM评判校准等）；构建ComplexConstraints数据集（每个提示配10-40个原子评分标准）；通过专家细则进行RL训练。
AI.result: ComplexConstraints训练使4B模型提升+15.5%，235B模型提升+12.2%；单周期RL训练在指标遵循任务带来跨域迁移提升（BFCL +4.5%，Tau2-Bench +7.4%，Tool-Decathlon +6.8%）。
AI.conclusion: 专家撰写的评分细则既能改进前沿LLM能力的测量，也能作为有效的评估和RL训练信号，促进模型能力发展。

title: CARE: A Conformal Safety Layer for Medical Summarization
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for medical summarization, but their outputs can omit medically important information and introduce unsupported claims. Existing error-detection methods produce heuristic or uncalibrated scores, providing no formal control over missed errors and no principled way to trade off safety against clinician review burden. We introduce Conformal Assessment for Risk Evaluation (CARE), a post-hoc, model-agnostic safety layer that uses conformal risk control to overlay calibrated omission and hallucination flags onto summaries from any LLM without retraining. CARE provides finite-sample, distribution-free guarantees through two controllers: a hallucination controller that bounds the probability of a document containing any unflagged hallucinated sentence, and an omission controller that bounds the expected fraction of important omissions not surfaced for review. Unlike hallucination detection, omissions depend jointly on whether a source sentence is important and whether it is covered by the summary. We show that calibrating only one dimension can violate the target risk bound, while marginal decompositions remain valid but overly conservative. By jointly calibrating over the full $(τ,γ)$ threshold space, CARE preserves formal guarantees while surfacing up to 5$\times$ fewer sentences than alternative calibrated baselines. Across five medical summarization tasks, CARE satisfies the target risk bound at $α= 0.15$ with 95% confidence across 100 calibration/test resplits, using only ~100 labeled documents per domain. In a preliminary clinician study (75 document reviews), calibrated flags improved omission detection by 28.6 percentage points on average. These results show that sentence-level safety guarantees are feasible for LLM-assisted medical summarization and offer a tunable mechanism for balancing residual risk and review effort.

AI.tldr: 提出CARE框架，一种基于共形风险控制的后处理安全层，可为任何LLM生成的医学摘要提供校准的遗漏和幻觉标记，并带有有限样本、分布无关的保证，在五项医学摘要任务中满足风险控制目标。
AI.motivation: LLM在医学摘要中可能遗漏重要信息或产生幻觉（无依据的陈述），现有错误检测方法要么是启发式的，要么分数未校准，无法正式控制漏检错误，也无法在安全性与医生审核负担之间进行原则性权衡。
AI.method: 采用共形风险控制（conformal risk control），构建两个控制器：幻觉控制器（限制未标记幻觉句子的文档级概率）和遗漏控制器（限制重要遗漏未被审查的期望比例）。在完整的(τ,γ)阈值空间上进行联合校准，实现形式化保证。
AI.result: 在五项医学摘要任务中，CARE在α=0.15时满足目标风险界限，95%置信度跨越100次校准/测试重划分，仅需约100个标注文档。相比校准基线，表面标记句子减少最多5倍。在初步临床医师研究中，校准标记使遗漏检测平均提高28.6个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 句子级别的安全性保证在LLM辅助医学摘要中是可行的，CARE提供了一种可调节的机制来平衡残余风险与审核工作量，且无需重新训练模型。

title: AttentionCap: Transformer Based Capacitance Matrix Learning Toward Full-Chip Extraction
comment: Accepted at the 63rd ACM/IEEE Design Automation Conference (DAC '26)
summary: As capacitance extraction accuracy of rule-based pattern matching becomes difficult to sustain at advanced nodes, a growing trend emerges to develop deep-learning-based 2D capacitance models. However, existing MLP- and CNN-based methods constrain their input to fixed metal-layer combinations in a specific process node, limiting their usability in practice. Recognizing the inherent similarity between capacitance matrix and the prevailing attention mechanism, we propose AttentionCap, a customized Transformer for capacitance matrix learning, with a Gram representation framework, a physics-aligned symmetric-attention output layer, and a novel normalized Laplacian loss. We also introduce a process-node embedding to enable multi-node learning. Trained on synthetic data, AttentionCap attains 0.67\%/3.99\% self/coupling-capacitance error on unseen real designs under a multi-layer and multi-node setting, surpassing the CNN-Cap baseline with 4.6$\times$/5.7$\times$ lower self/coupling error and 192$\times$ faster inference speed. A pretrained AttentionCap accurately transfers to an unseen node with only 5K samples and 4K finetuning steps. With sufficient accuracy on unseen real designs and strong transferability to new process nodes, AttentionCap offers highly practical value for modern EDA workflows. Code and data are available at https://github.com/THU-numbda/AttentionCap.

AI.tldr: 提出了AttentionCap，一种基于Transformer的电容提取模型，利用注意力机制与电容矩阵的固有相似性，结合Gram表示框架、对称注意力输出层和归一化拉普拉斯损失，在多层多节点设置下实现高精度快速电容提取，并支持跨节点迁移学习。
AI.motivation: 基于规则的图案匹配在先进工艺节点下电容提取精度难以维持，而现有MLP/CNN方法受限于固定金属层组合和特定工艺节点，实用性不足。亟需一种能处理多层多节点、具备跨节点迁移能力的通用电容提取模型。
AI.method: 提出AttentionCap，包含：(1) Gram表示框架用于结构化输入；(2) 物理对齐的对称注意力输出层；(3) 归一化拉普拉斯损失函数；(4) 工艺节点嵌入支持多节点学习。模型在合成数据上训练。
AI.result: 在未见过的真实设计上，多层多节点设置下自电容/耦合电容误差仅为0.67%/3.99%；相比CNN-Cap基线，自/耦合误差降低4.6×/5.7×，推理速度提升192倍。预训练模型仅需5K样本和4K微调步数即可准确迁移到未见节点。
AI.conclusion: AttentionCap在未见真实设计上具有足够精度，且具备强跨节点迁移能力，对现代EDA工作流具有高度的实用价值。

title: A Regret Minimization Framework on Preference Learning in Large Language Models
summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has enabled progress on reasoning-intensive tasks by relying on task-specific verifiers that provide automated correctness signals. However, many realistic language tasks are difficult to equip with reliable verifiers, motivating a growing reliance on reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF). In this setting, we argue that a closer examination of how human feedback should be interpreted is essential. We introduce Regret-based Preference Optimization $(\textbf{RePO})$, which reframes RLHF through $\textit{regret minimization}$ rather than reward maximization. Human preferences are often shaped by $\textit{prospective}$ anticipation of outcomes and $\textit{counterfactual}$ comparisons to alternative behaviors, rather than by immediate, outcome-independent utility. $\textbf{RePO}$ captures this structure by modeling preferences as behavior-conditioned assessments of relative suboptimality. Experiments on mathematical reasoning benchmarks and human preference datasets demonstrate consistent performance gains, indicating that $\textbf{RePO}$ is an effective and human-aligned approach for training large language models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 RePO（Regret-based Preference Optimization），将人类反馈强化学习（RLHF）重新框架为遗憾最小化而非奖励最大化，通过将人类偏好建模为基于行为条件化评估的相对次优性，在数学推理和人类偏好数据集上取得一致性能提升。
AI.motivation: 许多现实语言任务难以配备可靠的验证器，依赖 RLHF，但现有方法对如何正确解释人类反馈关注不足。作者认为人类偏好往往由前瞻性结果预期和反事实比较塑造，而非即时的、与结果无关的效用。
AI.method: 提出 Regret-based Preference Optimization (RePO)，将 RLHF 重塑为遗憾最小化问题，将人类偏好建模为行为条件化的相对次优性评估，捕捉人类偏好中的前瞻性和反事实比较结构。
AI.result: 在数学推理基准和人类偏好数据集上取得一致性的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: RePO 是一种有效且与人类对齐的大语言模型训练方法。

title: Structure-Aware Modeling of Multiple-Choice Questions Improves Automatic Difficulty Estimation
summary: Automatic Question Difficulty Estimation (AQDE) holds growing promise for educational assessment because it has the potential to yield difficulty estimates that are competitive with expert judgment, while helping reduce the time and financial burden associated with pilot administrations and scaling to digital testing contexts. Prior AQDE studies report mixed evidence on whether adding distractors as additional text to the question stem and the correct key consistently improves difficulty prediction. We hypothesize that the effectiveness of distractor information depends on its structural representation, and that explicitly modeling distractors as separate components improves difficulty estimation over baselines that omit this information. To address this, we designed controlled architectures that model MCQ components as distinct inputs to isolate the contribution of distractor content and order. Specifically, we represented distractors by encoding each distractor as its own text input and aggregating their representations either with order-aware concatenation (with positional tags) or with an order-invariant summation. We evaluated these architectures using two Chilean datasets (Natural and Social Sciences, 2016-2020; 4,114 multiple-choice questions). Compared to a simpler model that only used the question stem and the key, our best distractor-aware architecture achieved higher predictive performance, reaching R^2 = 0.83 for Natural Sciences and R^2 = 0.71 for Social Sciences items. An order-invariant variant achieved nearly the same accuracy with approximately half as many parameters, offering a favorable accuracy-efficiency trade-off. These results show that structural information (especially distractor content) drives gains in predictive accuracy, supporting the development of efficient, structure-aware models that are computationally viable for large-scale educational applications.

AI.tldr: 本文研究自动题目难度估计（AQDE）中干扰项的结构化表示方法。通过将多选题的题干、正确答案和干扰项作为独立输入建模，发现显式建模干扰项内容能显著提升难度预测准确率（自然科学R²=0.83，社会科学R²=0.71），且顺序不变性聚合方法在几乎同等精度下参数量减半，支持开发高效、结构感知的大规模教育评估模型。
AI.motivation: 现有AQDE研究对是否加入干扰项信息能提升难度预测存在矛盾结论。作者假设干扰项的有效性取决于其结构表示方式，因此探究显式地将干扰项作为独立组件建模是否比忽略该信息的基线模型表现更好。
AI.method: 设计控制变量架构，将多选题的题干、正确答案和各个干扰项作为独立文本输入。采用两种聚合策略：带位置标签的顺序感知拼接（order-aware concatenation）和顺序不变求和（order-invariant summation）。使用智利2016-2020年自然科学和社会科学共4,114道多选题进行评测。
AI.result: 最佳干扰项感知架构在自然科学上R²=0.83，社会科学上R²=0.71，优于仅使用题干和正确答案的基线模型。顺序不变变体在几乎相同精度下参数量减少约一半，实现精度-效率的良好权衡。
AI.conclusion: 干扰项内容的结构化信息是提升难度预测精度的关键驱动因素，支持开发结构感知的高效模型，使其在大规模教育应用中具备计算可行性。

title: Explaining Data Mixing Scaling Laws
summary: Recent research has established empirical scaling laws to predict model performance on multi-domain data mixtures. However, a theoretical understanding of these model loss behaviors remains absent. In this work, we propose a unified framework to explain the underlying mechanics of data mixing. Our approach extends theoretical perspectives originally developed for standard neural scaling laws (e.g., Kaplan and Chinchilla) to the multi-domain setting. Based on the distributional assumption that domains overlap on fundamental skills while diverging on specialized skills, we identify two key factors that govern the domain losses of models trained on different data mixtures: \textit{Capacity Competition}, where the allocation of finite model capacity couples domain losses globally, and \textit{Noise Reduction}, where optimal weights shift toward harder-to-learn domains to minimize overall noise. Empirical evaluations show that our framework outperforms existing baselines by fitting the loss landscape with a lower Mean Relative Error and identifying higher-performing training mixtures. Most importantly, our model successfully extrapolates across scales, predicting highly effective mixtures for large, unseen scales using parameters fitted on smaller ones. In addition, our model achieves these results using significantly fewer parameters compared to previous empirical laws. Our code is available at https://github.com/meiqwq/Explaining-Data-Mixing-Scaling-Laws.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个统一的理论框架来解释多领域数据混合中的缩放定律，通过"容量竞争"和"噪声减少"两个关键因素来预测模型在不同数据混合下的损失行为，且该框架在跨规模预测和参数效率上优于现有经验模型。
AI.motivation: 虽然已有研究建立了多领域数据混合的实证缩放定律，但缺乏对模型损失行为的理论理解，作者旨在从理论层面解释数据混合的底层机制。
AI.method: 将标准神经缩放定律（如Kaplan和Chinchilla）的理论视角扩展到多领域场景，基于领域在基础技能上重叠、在专业技能上分化的分布假设，提出"容量竞争"（有限模型容量导致的全局耦合）和"噪声减少"（最优权重向更难学习的领域偏移以最小化整体噪声）两个关键因素。
AI.result: 该框架在拟合损失曲面时平均相对误差更低，能识别出更高性能的训练混合比例，且能通过小规模拟合的参数成功预测大规模未见场景下的高效混合方案，同时使用的参数数量远少于之前的经验定律。
AI.conclusion: 本文的理论框架不仅解释了数据混合缩放定律的内在机制，还实现了更准确、更高效的跨规模预测，为多领域数据混合提供了坚实的理论基础。

title: Late-Layer Fusion is Enough: Dual-Path Vision Token Routing for Multimodal Large Language Models under Visual Saturation
comment: 18 pages, 4 figures. Submitted to Pattern Recognition
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) commonly inherit the deep, symmetric Transformer backbone designed for unimodal text modeling, and apply the same computation uniformly to image and language tokens. This design overlooks a key modality asymmetry: image and text tokens differ substantially in information density, redundancy, and required reasoning depth. Through a layer-wise analysis of LLaVA-1.5, we observe that vision tokens tend to saturate in the middle layers. Specifically, text-to-image attention decreases from 0.68 at layer 0 to 0.07 by layer 4, and stabilizes near 0.04 after layer 18, whereas text tokens continue to benefit from deep semantic processing. These findings suggest a mismatch between architectural symmetry and depth-asynchronous modality evolution, resulting in redundant visual computation and possible drift in perceptual representations during deep task-specific adaptation. Motivated by this, we propose Dual-Path Vision Token Routing (DPVR), a modality-asymmetric routing framework for efficient MLLMs. Its core instantiation, DPVR-LF (Late-Layer Fusion), routes vision tokens at the saturation point into a one-layer trainable side branch, runs a thirteen-layer text-only forward that skips image positions in the deep stack, and re-fuses the visual and textual streams only at the final layer. With approximately 3% trainable parameters, DPVR-LF preserves competitive multimodal performance on standard benchmarks while reducing visual computation in the deep Transformer stack. The results challenge the conventional assumption that vision tokens must traverse all deep language-model layers, and indicate that a single late fusion layer can be sufficient for maintaining strong perceptual competence in LLaVA-style MLLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DPVR-LF，一种非对称模态路由框架，通过在中间层将视觉令牌路由到浅层侧分支，让文本令牌继续深入处理，仅在最后层融合，在仅需约3%可训练参数的情况下保持多模态性能，挑战了视觉令牌必须遍历所有深层语言模型层的传统假设。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLMs继承对称的Transformer架构，对图像和语言令牌采用相同计算，忽视了二者在信息密度、冗余性和推理深度上的显著不对称性。通过层分析发现视觉令牌在中层即饱和，而文本令牌仍需深层处理，表明架构对称性与模态深度异步演化之间存在不匹配。
AI.method: 提出DPVR-LF（Late-Layer Fusion）方法：在视觉令牌饱和点将其路由到一个单层可训练的侧分支，让文本令牌单独继续前向传播13层（跳过图像位置），仅在最后层重新融合视觉和文本流。
AI.result: 仅需约3%可训练参数，在标准基准上保持有竞争力的多模态性能，同时大幅减少深层Transformer栈中的视觉计算量。
AI.conclusion: 视觉令牌无需遍历所有深层语言模型层，单层后期融合层足以维持LLaVA风格MLLMs的感知能力，挑战了传统对称架构设计假设。

title: Language-Aware Token Boosting: LLM Language Confusion Reduction Without Tuning
summary: Large language models (LLMs) sometimes exhibit language confusion when generating non-English text. Existing approaches typically rely on fine-tuning to mitigate this issue. In contrast, we propose a tuning-free paradigm for reducing language confusion. Within this paradigm, we introduce two methods: Language-Aware Token Boosting (LATB), which applies targeted perturbations to tokens associated with the desired language, and Adaptive Language-Aware Token Boosting (Adaptive-LATB), which dynamically adjusts these perturbations based on the model's confidence in the intended language. Experiments demonstrate that our methods effectively improve multilingual alignment by reducing language confusion, while maintain the summarization quality without requiring any additional fine-tuning. Our code is publicly available. https://github.com/scbdatax/genai-datax-language-aware-token-boosting.

AI.tldr: 提出无需微调的Language-Aware Token Boosting (LATB)及其自适应版本(Adaptive-LATB)，通过在token级别施加扰动来减少LLM生成非英语文本时的语言混淆问题。
AI.motivation: LLM在生成非英语文本时存在语言混淆问题，现有方法依赖微调，成本高且不够灵活。
AI.method: 提出无需微调的新范式，包含两种方法：1) LATB - 对目标语言相关token施加针对性扰动；2) Adaptive-LATB - 根据模型对目标语言的置信度动态调整扰动强度。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效减少语言混淆，提升多语言对齐性能，且保持摘要质量不变，无需额外微调。
AI.conclusion: LATB和Adaptive-LATB是一种高效、低成本的语言混淆缓解方案，适用于多语言场景下的LLM文本生成。

title: Frequency-Domain Latent Attention Gating for Cross-Domain Token Aggregation
summary: Token aggregation is a common bottleneck in models that map token representations to sample-level predictions, yet most pooling methods operate only in the original token domain. We propose FLaG, a plug-in aggregation module that transforms token representations with the real FFT, summarizes spectral components with learnable latent queries, applies a channel-wise gate, and reconstructs enhanced time-domain tokens for final pooling. We evaluate FLaG on antimicrobial peptide (AMP) activity prediction with ESM2, image classification with ResNet18 on CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100, and text classification with RoBERTa on IMDB and GLUE. FLaG achieves its clearest gains on the ESM2-8M antimicrobial peptide tasks and on CIFAR-100, while remaining competitive with strong text baselines on IMDB and GLUE. Then we probe its behavior on the AMP setting with band knockouts, gate summaries, residue perturbations, latent-query readouts, and structure-proxy stratification. We find that low-frequency bands contribute the most overall, and the remaining higher-band pattern is more sample-specific. The gate acts as a broadly shared spectral reweighting stage and the cross-attention patterns are sample-specific with mild query-wise differentiation, and higher-helix peptides exhibit stronger average spectral sensitivity in both bacteria. The supplementary materials, source code and data are released at https://www.healthinformaticslab.org/supp/ and https://github.com/Kewei2023/AMPCliff/tree/FLaG.

AI.tldr: 提出FLaG，一种基于FFT频域变换和可学习潜查询的即插即用聚合模块，在AMP活性预测、图像分类和文本分类任务上验证有效性，并通过频带消融等多角度分析揭示其行为机制。
AI.motivation: token聚合（池化）是连接token级表示与样本级预测的常见瓶颈，现有池化方法大多仅在原始token域操作，缺乏频域视角。
AI.method: FLaG模块：1) 对token表示进行实FFT变换到频域；2) 用可学习潜查询（latent queries）汇总频谱成分；3) 应用通道级门控（channel-wise gate）；4) 反变换回时域得到增强的token，再进行最终池化。
AI.result: 在ESM2-8M抗菌肽活性预测和CIFAR-100上取得最显著提升，在IMDB和GLUE上保持与强基线竞争力。频带分析表明低频带贡献最大，高频带模式更具样本特异性；门控发挥广泛共享的频谱重加权作用；交叉注意力模式样本特异且查询间分化较弱；较高螺旋结构的肽段在细菌上表现出更强的平均频谱敏感性。
AI.conclusion: 频域聚合方法FLaG在生物序列、图像和文本多种模态上有效，且通过频谱分析揭示了模型的可解释行为，为token聚合提供新范式。

title: Vision Language Model Helps Private Information De-Identification in Vision Data
summary: Visual Language Models (VLMs) have gained significant popularity due to their remarkable ability. While various methods exist to enhance privacy in text-based applications, privacy risks associated with visual inputs remain largely overlooked such as Protected Health Information (PHI) in medical images. To tackle this problem, two key tasks: accurately localizing sensitive text and processing it to ensure privacy protection should be performed. To address this issue, we introduce VisShield (Vision Privacy Shield), an end-to-end framework designed to enhance the privacy awareness of VLMs. Our framework consists of two key components: a specialized instruction-tuning dataset OPTIC (Optical Privacy Text Instruction Collection) and a tailored training methodology. The dataset provides diverse privacy-oriented prompts that guide VLMs to perform targeted Optical Character Recognition (OCR) for precise localization of sensitive text, while the training strategy ensures effective adaptation of VLMs to privacy-preserving tasks. Specifically, our approach ensures that VLMs recognize privacy-sensitive text and output precise bounding boxes for detected entities, allowing for effective masking of sensitive information. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our framework significantly outperforms existing approaches in handling private information, paving the way for privacy-preserving applications in vision-language models. Our dataset and code can be found here.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VisShield框架，旨在增强视觉语言模型（VLMs）对隐私信息的感知能力。该框架包含专用指令微调数据集OPTIC和配套训练方法，能精确定位并遮蔽医学图像等视觉输入中的敏感文本（如受保护健康信息PHI），实验结果表明其显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的VLMs在文本隐私保护方面已有较多研究，但视觉输入（如医学图像中的PHI）的隐私风险被严重忽视，迫切需要一种能精准定位并处理视觉敏感文本的方法。
AI.method: 提出VisShield端到端框架，包含两个核心组件：(1) OPTIC数据集——面向隐私保护的指令微调数据集，提供多样性提示引导VLM执行针对性OCR；(2) 定制化训练方法——使VLM能识别隐私敏感文本并输出精确边界框，实现有效遮蔽。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，VisShield在处理隐私信息方面显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: VisShield为视觉语言模型中的隐私保护应用铺平了道路，在视觉隐私保护领域具有重要价值。

title: Beyond Averages: Evaluating LLMs on Human Survey Replication at the Distributional Level
summary: LLMs are increasingly used to simulate human survey responses, but prior work has mainly evaluated replication using mean-level or aggregate agreement, offering limited insight into whether LLMs reproduce the variability of human behavior. We evaluate LLM-based survey replication at the distributional level using a non-public 2010 consumer choice experiment on Korean instant noodle purchases, a setting unlikely to overlap with model training data. We evaluate three response variables of differing statistical type: binary purchase incidence, categorical brand choice, and count purchase quantity. For each, we compare human and LLM responses at mean-level, pattern, and distributional alignment, and against reference baselines from the human data alone. LLMs reproduce condition-level patterns reasonably well but fail to capture distributional structure: for purchase quantity, no model beats a condition-insensitive baseline that simply matches the pooled human distribution. Because models that match human means well can still produce distributions further from humans than this baseline, mean-based evaluation alone can be actively misleading. Replication also varies with input configuration, with structured personas and multimodal inputs improving alignment while explicit reasoning prompting degrades it monotonically.

AI.tldr: 本文评估LLM在消费者选择实验中复制人类响应的能力，发现LLM能较好再现均值层面的模式，但无法捕捉分布结构；基于均值的评估可能产生误导；结构化角色和多模态输入改善对齐，显式推理提示则降低对齐效果。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注LLM是否能在均值或聚合层面复制人类调查响应，缺乏对LLM能否再现人类行为变异性（即分布层面）的评估。本研究填补这一空白。
AI.method: 使用2010年韩国方便面消费者选择实验的非公开数据，评估三种统计类型的响应变量（二元购买决策、类别品牌选择、计数购买数量），从均值、模式、分布对齐三个层面比较人类与LLM响应。
AI.result: LLM能合理再现条件层面的模式，但无法捕捉分布结构；在购买数量上，所有模型均未超越仅匹配人类汇集分布的条件不敏感基线；均值匹配良好但分布差异更大的情况存在，说明均值评估具有误导性。
AI.conclusion: LLM在分布层面复制人类行为方面存在根本局限；结构化角色和多模态输入可改善对齐，显式推理提示反而降低对齐；仅依赖均值评估是不充分的。

title: Neural Field Tokenizations with Hierarchy and Spatial Locality Priors
summary: Neural fields parameterize data as functions from coordinates to values, providing a unified framework for representation learning across modalities. Existing approaches are dominated by per-sample meta-learning, which scales poorly due to memory-intensive inner-loop optimization. The natural alternative -- feed-forward encoding -- typically introduces modality-specific assumptions, sacrificing the generality that makes learning with neural fields attractive. We argue that locality and hierarchy are useful priors for learning field representations that can be injected without compromising modality-agnosticism. We propose LH-NeF, a framework to learn general-purpose tokenized representations of continuous signals. A locality-preserving hierarchical encoder maps raw coordinate-value field observations to structured tokens, from which the field is reconstructed during training. By replacing meta-learning's inner loop with a single forward pass, LH-NeF uses 42$\times$ less memory and supports 133$\times$ larger batches than the strongest modality-agnostic baseline. Across images, 3D shapes, and climate fields, our learned representations match or exceed performance of modality-agnostic, modality-specific, and specialized generative neural field baselines on both reconstruction and downstream tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出LH-NeF框架，通过局部保持的分层编码器将神经场表示学习从元学习的内部循环优化改为前馈编码，在保持模态无关性的同时大幅降低内存消耗（42倍）并支持更大批次（133倍），在图像、3D形状和气候场等任务上达到或超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有神经场表示学习方法中，基于元学习的方法因内存密集的内部循环优化而扩展性差；前馈编码方法则通常引入模态特定假设，牺牲了模态无关的通用性。作者希望在保持模态无关性的前提下，利用局部性和层次性先验来高效学习神经场表示。
AI.method: 提出LH-NeF框架：使用局部保持的分层编码器（locality-preserving hierarchical encoder）将原始坐标-值观测映射为结构化token，在训练过程中通过这些token重建场。用单次前向传播替代元学习的内部循环优化。
AI.result: 相比最强的模态无关基线，LH-NeF内存占用减少42倍，支持133倍更大的批次。在图像、3D形状和气候场等模态上，重建和下游任务性能达到或超越了模态无关、模态特定以及专用生成神经场基线。
AI.conclusion: 局部性和层次性是有效的先验，可以在不牺牲模态无关性的前提下提升神经场表示学习的效率和性能。

title: Reliable to Expressive: A Curriculum for Rubric-Following Safety Judges
comment: Accepted to ICML 2026 Workshop on AIWILDS
summary: Safety judges are increasingly deployed to evaluate model outputs against evolving criteria, yet recent meta-evaluation work shows they remain brittle under prompt and rubric variation, with false negative-rate swings of up to 0.24 reported for stylistic perturbations alone. We argue that safety judgment is fundamentally a rubric-following problem: a robust judge must apply the given evaluation criteria consistently across rubric formulations rather than memorize one specific template. We propose a training strategy that combines (i) instance-conditioned dynamic rubrics generated from prompt-response-label triples to expose the judge to the variability of evaluation criteria, and (ii) a reliable-to-expressive curriculum that begins with clean fixed-rubric supervision and progressively introduces noisier dynamic-rubric data. We evaluate on a single human-labeled set under three contrasting rubric prompts (HarmBench-style, ShieldGemma-style, and a domain-specific rubric). Our 12B curriculum judge achieves 94.12-94.88% accuracy across the three rubrics with a cross-rubric range of only 0.76, outperforming general-purpose LLMs, dedicated safety classifiers, and reasoning-oriented judges up to 30B in both peak accuracy and stability. An ablation shows that naively mixing dynamic rubrics into SFT increases cross rubric variance (1.44 -> 3.60); only the curriculum schedule recovers and improves on the fixed rubric baseline (variance 0.76).

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种课程训练策略，通过动态实例化rubric和从可靠到表达的课程学习，大幅提升安全评判器在不同rubric变体下的鲁棒性，将跨rubric准确率波动降至0.76以内。
AI.motivation: 现有的安全评判器对提示词和rubric的变换极其脆弱，风格扰动即可导致假阴性率变化高达0.24。作者认为安全判断本质上是遵循rubric的问题，需要让模型学会鲁棒地应用评价标准，而非死记硬背特定模板。
AI.method: 提出了结合 (i) 从提示-响应-标签三元组生成的实例条件动态rubric，让评判器暴露于评价标准的多样性；(ii) 从可靠到表达的课程训练，先用干净固定rubric监督，再逐步引入噪声更大的动态rubric数据。
AI.result: 12B课程评判器在三种不同rubric (HarmBench、ShieldGemma、领域特定) 下达到94.12-94.88%准确率，跨rubric范围仅0.76，优于通用LLM、专用安全分类器和30B规模的推理型评判器。消融实验证实直接混合动态rubric会加剧方差 (1.44→3.60)，仅课程训练能恢复并超越基线 (方差0.76)。
AI.conclusion: 课程式地引入动态rubric训练是提升安全评判器对评价标准变化鲁棒性的有效方法，在保持高准确率的同时显著降低跨rubric波动。

title: SafeRun: Enabling Determinism in LLM Planning for Running
comment: Workshop on Planning in the Era of LLMs (LM4Plan) at ICML 2026
summary: Large Language Models enable flexible natural-language planning but remain unreliable in determinism-critical domains due to their probabilistic nature. This limitation is especially problematic in running planning, where violating safety rules can lead to safety risks. We propose SafeRun, a framework for deterministic LLM-based planning via a decoupled architecture. SafeRun separates soft interpretation by an LLM from hard constraint enforcement by a deterministic solver, ensuring strict safety constraints while preserving natural-language flexibility. To validate SafeRun, we build a comprehensive benchmark for running planning under realistic physiological and safety constraints. Experiments across five LLMs show that SafeRun achieves 100\% safety score (vs.\ 79.1\% PE average and 97.6\% CodeAct average) while maintaining competitive instruction-following scores. The SafeRun benchmark is publicly available at \href{https://huggingface.co/datasets/zzp-seeker/SafeRun-RunPlanning-Benchmark}{huggingface}.

AI.tldr: SafeRun通过解耦架构（LLM软解释+确定性求解器硬约束）实现LLM规划中的100%安全合规，在跑步规划基准测试中优于现有方法（PE平均79.1%，CodeAct平均97.6%）。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在自然语言规划中灵活但不可靠，尤其在跑步规划这类涉及安全规则的关键领域，违反安全约束可能带来实际风险。现有方法难以同时保证自然语言灵活性和严格安全约束。
AI.method: 提出SafeRun解耦架构：LLM负责对自然语言指令进行软解释（理解用户意图），确定性求解器负责硬约束执行（强制满足安全规则），两者分离实现安全与灵活性的兼顾。
AI.result: 在5种LLM上的实验表明：SafeRun安全得分100%（PE平均79.1%，CodeAct平均97.6%），同时保持有竞争力的指令跟随分数。
AI.conclusion: 解耦架构能有效解决LLM规划中的安全合规问题，在不牺牲自然语言交互灵活性的前提下实现确定性安全保障，为安全关键型LLM应用提供可行方案。

title: Public Machine Learning Solver Framework for Novices in the Machine Learning Domain
summary: Solving machine learning problems is complex and typically reserved for experts. Over the past two decades, systems have emerged to support non-experts. Based on our review, we identify three categories: (1) fully automated AutoML systems, (2) expert cheat sheets for algorithm selection, and (3) decision-support systems using selection criteria (accuracy, transparency, data requirements). We propose a new platform combining categories 2 and 3 to deliver semi-automated, intelligent solution recommendations for non-experts. Unlike existing approaches that recommend a single algorithm, our platform suggests a complete pipeline tailored to the user's problem.
