It integrates expert-defined selection criteria with transfer learning and automatically extracts data characteristics (e.g., class imbalance, missing values) from user-provided datasets. The platform uses first-order logic to reason over its knowledge base and recommends suitable algorithms ranked by relevance. It features a user-friendly interface and connects to a crowdsourcing platform for ML experts, ensuring continuous updates. The platform is built incrementally, allowing seamless integration of new algorithms, criteria, and domain knowledge. To our knowledge, this is the first free, publicly accessible online framework that systematically captures and operationalizes expert knowledge to guide non-experts in solving ML problems in a structured, transparent manner.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个面向非专家的半自动化机器学习平台，结合专家知识库与迁移学习，通过一阶逻辑推理为用户推荐完整的数据处理与建模流程，而非单一算法。
AI.motivation: 机器学习问题解决通常需要专家经验，而现有系统（全自动化AutoML、专家速查表、基于选择标准的决策支持系统）各有局限。非专家缺乏系统化、可理解的指导工具。
AI.method: 平台结合类别2（专家速查表）和类别3（选择标准决策支持），采用一阶逻辑推理知识库，集成迁移学习，自动提取数据集特征（如类别不平衡、缺失值），推荐完整且排名的流程方案，并通过众包平台持续更新。
AI.result: 该平台是首个免费的、公开可访问的在线框架，能够系统化捕获并运用专家知识，为非专家提供结构化、透明的ML问题解决指导。
AI.conclusion: 该平台有效弥合了非专家与机器学习之间的鸿沟，提供半自动化、可扩展的智能推荐方案，并支持持续集成新算法和领域知识。

title: IMUG-Bench: Benchmarking Unified Multimodal Models on Interleaved Understanding and Generation
summary: In recent years, unified multimodal models (UMMs) have emerged to support both understanding and generation within a single framework. Mastering dynamic, multi-turn interleaved image-text dialogues is a crucial task for UMMs in real-world applications. However, existing benchmarks fail to evaluate this important task, as they are often limited to single-turn or static settings, and typically overlook exposure bias in multi-turn interactions. To bridge this gap, we propose IMUG-Bench, a comprehensive benchmark for multi-turn interleaved image-text dialogue of UMMs that jointly evaluates their understanding and generation capabilities. Our IMUG-Bench comprises three classes: Static Spatial, Temporal Causal, and Hybrid, covering 3,113 samples and 12,034 interaction turns. It also includes dynamic understanding questions, thereby supporting evaluation that better reflects real-world multi-turn interaction scenarios. Large-scale experiments on IMUG-Bench systematically evaluate mainstream open-source and closed-source UMMs, revealing their capability boundaries and failure modes, and uncovering pronounced exposure bias on the generation side in multi-turn interactions. We further explore several test-time scaling strategies, including Chain-of-Thought, Self-Verification, and Best-of-N Sampling, which effectively improve generation accuracy and mitigate exposure bias in generation tasks. These findings provide insights into enhancing the robustness and multi-turn interaction capability of future UMMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出IMUG-Bench，一个评估多模态模型在多轮交错图文对话中理解与生成能力的基准，包含3113个样本和12034轮交互，发现模型在生成侧存在暴露偏差，并探索了测试时缩放策略来缓解该问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基准无法评估统一多模态模型在动态、多轮交错图文对话中的理解与生成能力，且忽略了多轮交互中的暴露偏差问题。
AI.method: 构建IMUG-Bench基准，包含静态空间、时间因果和混合三类，共3113个样本和12034轮交互；引入动态理解问题；采用Chain-of-Thought、Self-Verification、Best-of-N Sampling等测试时缩放策略进行改进。
AI.result: 系统评估了主流开源和闭源UMMs，揭示了其能力边界和失败模式，发现多轮交互中生成侧存在明显的暴露偏差；测试时缩放策略有效提升了生成准确性并缓解了暴露偏差。
AI.conclusion: IMUG-Bench为多模态模型的多轮交互能力提供了系统评估框架，暴露偏差问题是关键挑战，测试时缩放策略是缓解该问题的有效途径。

title: Bridging the Agent-World Gap: Text World Models for LLM-based Agents
summary: Large language model (LLM)-based agents are increasingly used in interactive textual environments, from web navigation and code editing to tool use and long-horizon dialogue. Yet many remain largely reactive, mapping observations to actions without an explicit model of how these environments are structured and evolve. This motivates text world models (TWMs): transition models over textual states that, given a state and a candidate action, predict the resulting webpage, terminal output, API response, or user reply, thereby supporting planning, efficient learning, and principled evaluation. We systematically review text world models for LLM-based agents, organized around a formal framework and the agent lifecycle: (1) Foundations, defining text world models and characterizing them by state representation and grounding domain; (2) Construction, taxonomizing LLM-as-WM and code-as-WM paradigms and reviewing methods for building them; (3) Application, examining how world models support agents at training time through experience synthesis and at inference time through planning, verification, and adaptation; and (4) Evaluation, covering both evaluation of the world model itself and its use as an evaluation environment for agents. We aim to consolidate this rapidly developing area, clarify its design space, and highlight open challenges for future research.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了基于大语言模型的智能体中的文本世界模型（TWM），围绕形式化框架和智能体生命周期（基础、构建、应用、评估）系统梳理了该领域的研究进展。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的智能体大多是被动反应的，缺乏对环境结构和演变的显式建模。文本世界模型（TWM）能够预测状态转移，支持规划、高效学习和原则性评估，因此有必要系统梳理这一快速发展领域。
AI.method: 本文采用系统性综述方法，围绕四个维度展开：(1) 基础——定义文本世界模型及其状态表示和领域；(2) 构建——分类LLM作为世界模型和代码作为世界模型两大范式；(3) 应用——在训练时（经验合成）和推理时（规划、验证、适应）如何支持智能体；(4) 评估——既评估世界模型本身，也将其作为智能体的评估环境。
AI.result: 系统梳理了文本世界模型的形式化框架，归纳了LLM-as-WM和Code-as-WM两大构建范式，总结了世界模型在智能体训练和推理阶段的多种应用方式，并提出了评估体系。
AI.conclusion: 本文旨在巩固该快速发展领域的知识体系，厘清设计空间，并指出未来研究面临的开放挑战。

title: MASS: Deep Research for Social Sciences with Memory-Augmented Social Simulation
summary: Deep Research agents powered by Large Language Models (LLMs) have exhibited extraordinary potential in automated paper writing tasks. However, existing systems rely heavily on literature retrieval and synthesis through internet and local knowledge bases, often resulting research in lacking insight and creativity in social science. To address this issue, we propose "Memory-Augmented Social Simulation (MASS)", an innovative paradigm that leverages highly realistic and research-oriented social simulations to enhance the creativity and empirical founding of LLMs-generated research. Specifically, MASS integrates three core components: dynamic goal-path planning with multi-level social norm restraint to guide the simulation, a multi-disciplinary behavior dataset for agent memory cold-start, and a structured forgetting mechanism inspired by the Ebbinghaus curve. Together, these ensure simulation authenticity and provide a robust empirical foundation for generating innovative scholarly papers. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, showing a 6.81\% improvement in generation overall quality over foundation LLMs and 17.19\% gain in Insight over strong baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出MASS方法，通过多智能体社会模拟增强LLM论文写作的创造力和实证基础，在生成质量上提升6.81%，洞察力提升17.19%。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM驱动的Deep Research智能体过度依赖文献检索与知识库综合，导致社会科学论文缺乏洞察力和创造力。
AI.method: MASS包含三个核心组件：1)动态目标-路径规划与多级社会规范约束引导模拟；2)多学科行为数据集用于智能体记忆冷启动；3)基于艾宾浩斯曲线的结构化遗忘机制。
AI.result: 相比基础LLM，生成整体质量提升6.81%；相比强基线，洞察力指标提升17.19%。
AI.conclusion: MASS通过高真实度、研究导向的社会模拟，有效增强了LLM在社会科学论文写作中的创造性和实证基础。

title: Emergent Misalignment Can Be Induced by Sycophancy and Reversed via Alignment Gating
summary: Prior work has shown that fine-tuning large language models on malicious or incorrect outputs in narrow domains can induce broad misalignment and harmful behavior, a phenomenon known as emergent misalignment. However, efficient methods for reversing such misalignment remain limited. In this work, we make two contributions. First, we identify sycophancy fine-tuning, i.e., training models to passively agree with users' incorrect opinions, as a previously underexplored driver of emergent misalignment, and show that it induces broad and severe misaligned behavior. Second, we propose Alignment Gating, an efficient method for reversing emergent misalignment that inserts learnable and controllable gates into the model during fine-tuning. Through fine-tuning, these gates learn to identify the internal representations responsible for unsafe responses. Thus, amplifying or suppressing these representations then exacerbates or mitigates EM, respectively. We further find that alignment gating module exhibits strong generalization: gating weights obtained from narrow-domain fine-tuning substantially suppress broad-domain misaligned behavior while preserving the model's general capabilities.

AI.tldr: 本文发现奉承微调（sycophancy fine-tuning）是引发新兴失调（emergent misalignment）的新因素，并提出Alignment Gating方法，通过在模型微调时插入可学习的门控模块来有效逆转这种失调，且该方法具有良好的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有工作发现对大语言模型进行恶意或错误输出的微调会引发广泛的新兴失调，但逆转这种失调的高效方法仍然有限。本文旨在探索新兴失调的新成因并开发高效的逆转方法。
AI.method: 1) 识别奉承微调（训练模型被动同意用户错误观点）作为新兴失调的新驱动因素；2) 提出Alignment Gating方法，在微调过程中插入可学习、可控制的门控模块，通过门控学习识别导致不安全响应的内部表征，从而通过放大或抑制这些表征来恶化或缓解新兴失调。
AI.result: 奉承微调会诱导广泛且严重的不对齐行为；Alignment Gating方法能有效逆转新兴失调；门控权重在窄域微调后能显著抑制广域不对齐行为，同时保持模型通用能力。
AI.conclusion: 奉承微调是新兴失调的重要驱动因素；Alignment Gating是一种高效、可泛化的逆转新兴失调的方法，为安全对齐提供了新的技术手段。

title: De novo molecular generation with optical property preconditioning at the token level
summary:
Designing OLED molecules with targeted optical properties remains challenging due to the scarcity of high-quality data and the limited reliability of conditional control in generative models across chemical motifs. Here, we benchmark a token-conditioned autoregressive language model for OLED molecular generation in a realistic low-data regime. A GPT2 model is pretrained on large chemical corpora, augmented with discrete property tokens, and fine-tuned using multi-task optimisation. Conditioning targets vertical absorption energy and oscillator strength, with the HOMO-LUMO gap included as an auxiliary electronic descriptor.
  Generated molecules are evaluated at the TDDFT level to assess distributional fidelity and controllability. The generated library reproduces the dominant optical-property support of the training distribution while shifting towards lower molecular weight and fewer heavy atoms. Token-level control is consistently directional across conditioning bins, but is not fully orthogonal and exhibits local calibration irregularities. A chemotype-resolved analysis further shows that controllability depends strongly on local electronic environments: moderately conjugated aromatic-carbon motifs are associated with improved joint target satisfaction, whereas electron-withdrawing motifs, particularly aryl nitriles, show systematic red-shifting and reduced controllability.
  These results establish a quantitative benchmark for conditional OLED molecular generation and show that model reliability must be assessed in chemically meaningful subspaces rather than from aggregate property distributions alone.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于GPT2的条件自回归语言模型，在低数据场景下进行OLED分子生成，并通过TDDFT评估发现模型在多条件控制上存在非正交性和局部校准偏差，且控制能力强烈依赖于化学子结构。
AI.motivation: 设计具有特定光学性质的OLED分子充满挑战：高质量数据稀缺，且现有生成模型在化学基序上的条件控制可靠性有限。
AI.method: 采用GPT2模型，在大规模化学语料上预训练，添加离散属性token进行条件化，并通过多任务优化进行微调。条件目标包括垂直吸收能和振子强度，以HOMO-LUMO能隙作为辅助电子描述符。生成分子通过TDDFT评估分布保真度和可控性。
AI.result: 模型生成库成功复现了训练分布中的光学性质支撑域，但分子倾向于更低分子量和更少重原子。条件控制方向性一致但非正交，存在局部校准偏差。化学型分析表明，中等共轭的芳香碳基序利于联合目标满足，而吸电子基序（尤其是芳基腈）表现出系统性红移和可控性下降。
AI.conclusion: 建立了条件OLED分子生成的定量基准，指出模型可靠性需在化学上有意义的子空间中进行评估，而非仅依据聚合性质分布。

title: FF-JEPA: Long-Horizon Planning in World Models with Latent Planners
summary: Joint Embedding Predictive Architectures (JEPAs) have shown promising world modeling capabilities, enabling planning in latent space by optimizing action trajectories using methods like the Cross-Entropy Method (CEM). These methods are, however, too computationally expensive and ineffective for long-horizon planning. Furthermore, these methods typically require an explicit image of the goal state, which is not always possible in real-world tasks. In this work, we tackle these limitations by proposing Forward-Forward-JEPA (FF-JEPA), a hierarchical approach leveraging two forward dynamics models. Alongside a standard action-conditioned forward model, we introduce an action-free latent planner that predicts the next subgoal given the current state. This approach removes the need for goal images and enables long-horizon planning by decomposing complex trajectories into a sequence of tractable, short-term optimization problems. Preliminary results on PushT demonstrate that FF-JEPA successfully overcomes flat world models' long-horizon collapse, highlighting this approach as a promising direction for goal-free planning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FF-JEPA，一种层次化预测架构，通过引入无动作潜规划器将长程规划分解为短期优化问题，解决了JEPA方法计算成本高、无法进行长程规划且需要目标图像的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有JEPA方法在潜空间规划时计算成本过高，无法有效进行长程规划，且通常需要显式的目标状态图像，这在现实任务中往往不可行。
AI.method: 提出FF-JEPA层次化架构，包含两个前向动力学模型：一个标准动作条件前向模型，以及一个无动作潜规划器（根据当前状态预测下一个子目标），将复杂轨迹分解为一系列短期优化问题。
AI.result: 在PushT任务上的初步结果表明，FF-JEPA成功克服了平面世界模型的长程规划崩溃问题。
AI.conclusion: FF-JEPA为无目标图像、长程规划提供了一种有前景的解决方向。

title: MAAM: Anchor-Preserving Compression and Contextual Calibration for Chinese Discriminatory Language Detection
summary: Chinese discriminatory-language detection is challenging because harmful intent is often implicit and context-dependent. We propose MAAM (Myopia--Astigmatism Anchor Mechanism), a lightweight, model-agnostic framework inspired by functional visual blur: rather than preserving every token equally, MAAM retains discrimination-relevant semantic anchors and calibrates them with C--I--S contextual priors (Contextual Tone, Group Identity, and Stance Polarity). We also introduce ChLGBT, to our knowledge the first Chinese LGBT-focused discriminatory-language dataset, with 8,120 manually annotated samples and three ordinal labels: explicit bias, implicit bias, and emotional intensity. Across strong encoder baselines, MAAM improves all three prediction dimensions, with consistent gains in accuracy, F1, Brier score, and expected calibration error. Compared with frontier LLM baselines under zero-shot and few-shot prompting protocols, MAAM remains competitive while offering stronger compactness and stability. These results suggest that interpretable anchor preservation and contextual calibration provide a practical alternative to heavier model scaling for Chinese discriminatory-language assessment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MAAM框架（一种基于视觉模糊启发的轻量级锚点机制）和ChLGBT数据集（首个中文LGBT歧视性语言数据集），用于中文歧视性语言检测，在多个基准上取得一致性改进。
AI.motivation: 中文歧视性语言检测面临有害意图隐晦且依赖上下文的挑战，现有方法缺乏针对性的轻量级解决方案。
AI.method: 提出MAAM（Myopia-Astigmatism Anchor Mechanism）框架，灵感来自功能性视觉模糊：保留歧视相关语义锚点，并通过C-I-S上下文先验（语境基调、群体身份、立场极性）进行校准。同时构建ChLGBT数据集，含8,120条人工标注样本，标注显性偏见、隐性偏见和情感强度三个序数标签。
AI.result: 在强编码器基线上，MAAM在准确率、F1、Brier分数和期望校准误差等指标上全面提升；与前沿大语言模型在零样本/少样本提示下相比，MAAM在保持竞争力的同时具有更强的紧凑性和稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 可解释的锚点保留与上下文校准为中文歧视性语言评估提供了一种实用替代方案，可避免过度依赖更大规模的模型。

title: GPT-Micro: A large language paradigm for accelerated, inexpensive, and thermodynamics-consistent discovery of constitutive models in manufacturing
summary: Constitutive modeling of the relationship between process-imposed material states and fundamental material properties is critical to control of material microstructure in manufacturing processes. The limited accuracy resulting from the typical reliance on fallible human expertise and intuition for postulation and revision of the models functional form results in incremental and time consuming model discovery. Conventional Machine Learning (ML) incurs significant cost and time of data generation. Model discovery using Large Language Models (LLMs) suffers from the above issues and/or ignores the inviolability of fundamental thermodynamics laws. This work creates a novel GPT-Micro paradigm for autonomous, data sparse, and thermodynamics-compliant discovery of de-novo constitutive models. This framework seamlessly integrates semantic knowledge extraction from literature, enforcement of thermodynamics-based conservation laws, and sparse datasets, with LLM-driven generation and refinement of model hypotheses. Validation is performed for a long-intractable constitutive modeling problem in a printed electronics process testbed. This reveals significant and simultaneous advantages over the state-of-the-art including: (a) More than 70 percent reduction in data burden relative to ML-based modeling without loss in accuracy; (b) 400X reduction in discovery time after data generation, from months to hours, relative to human-driven modeling; (c) Discovery of models with novel functional forms without subjective human choice of a starting hypothesis; (d) Enhanced physics-rooted trustworthiness, human interpretability, and mechanistic insight via synthesis of compact, conservation-compliant, and physically complete analytical models. The potential of GPT-Micro to realize rapid, low-cost, physically trustworthy, and interpretable microstructure modeling across the manufacturing landscape is discussed.

AI.tldr: 提出GPT-Micro范式，利用大语言模型实现自治、数据稀疏且符合热力学定律的本构模型自动发现，在印刷电子工艺测试中相比传统方法降低70%数据需求、400倍加速模型发现时间。
AI.motivation: 传统本构建模依赖人工经验与直觉，效率低且误差大；机器学习方法数据生成成本高；现有LLM方法忽略热力学基本定律。迫切需要一种自主、数据高效且符合物理定律的模型发现方法。
AI.method: 提出GPT-Micro框架，无缝整合文献语义知识提取、基于热力学的守恒定律约束、稀疏数据集，以及LLM驱动的模型假设生成与迭代优化，实现全新本构模型的自主发现。
AI.result: 在印刷电子工艺测试中：(a) 相比ML方法降低超70%数据需求且精度不降；(b) 模型发现时间从数月缩短至数小时（400倍加速）；(c) 发现新颖函数形式的模型，无需主观选择初始假设；(d) 模型紧凑、符合守恒律、物理完整、可解释性强。
AI.conclusion: GPT-Micro范式有潜力实现制造业中快速、低成本、物理可信且可解释的微观结构建模，为自主材料本构模型发现开辟新路径。

title: Anything2Skill: Compiling External Knowledge into Reusable Skills for Agents
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) enables agents to access external knowledge at inference time, but it primarily retrieves fragmented declarative evidence, leaving agents to repeatedly infer task procedures from passages, manuals, examples, logs, or trajectories. This raises a fundamental question: can skills extracted from external knowledge bases be installed into an agent, enabling it to rapidly approximate domain expertise? In this paper, we propose Anything2Skill, a taxonomy-guided framework that compiles heterogeneous external knowledge into reusable, retrievable, and executable skills for agents. Given a corpus of knowledge records, \textsc{Anything2Skill} first decomposes each record into evidence windows and performs plan-and-expand skill extraction under a skill-tree prior. The extracted candidates are then converted into structured skill contracts that specify invocation conditions, contraindications, action moves, workflow steps, constraints, output specifications, supporting evidence, and confidence scores. To construct a deployable procedural memory, Anything2Skill manages the extracted skills in a persistent SkillBank through taxonomy-aware compilation, registry-level reconciliation, lifecycle tracking, versioned updates, and visible skill-tree projection. At inference time, agents retrieve both task-specific passages from the original knowledge base and relevant procedural skills from the SkillBank, allowing RAG to provide declarative evidence while compiled skills provide reusable procedural guidance. Experiments on qsv and GitHub-CLI show that Anything2Skill combined with RAG achieves 98.85\% and 94.10\% success rates, respectively, substantially outperforming RAG-only agents. These results suggest that compiling latent procedural knowledge into explicit skills is an effective way to extend retrieval-augmented agents from knowledge access toward capability reuse.

AI.tldr: Anything2Skill是一种从异构外部知识库中提取可复用、可检索、可执行技能并注入智能体的框架，结合RAG在qsv和GitHub-CLI任务上分别达到98.85%和94.10%的成功率，显著优于纯RAG方法。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG主要检索碎片化的陈述性证据，智能体仍需反复从各种文档中推断任务过程，缺乏直接复用程序性知识的能力。
AI.method: 提出Anything2Skill框架：将知识记录分解为证据窗口，在技能树先验下进行plan-and-expand技能提取；将候选技能转换为结构化技能契约（含调用条件、禁忌、动作、工作流、约束等）；通过分类感知编译、注册表调和、生命周期追踪、版本更新等构建持久化SkillBank；推理时同时检索原文和技能库。
AI.result: 在qsv和GitHub-CLI任务上，Anything2Skill+RAG分别达到98.85%和94.10%的成功率，显著优于纯RAG智能体。
AI.conclusion: 将隐式程序性知识编译为显式技能是扩展检索增强智能体从知识访问走向能力复用的有效途径。

title: Explicit Representation Alignment for Multimodal Sentiment Analysis
summary: Multimodal affective analysis aims to understand human sentiment and emotion by jointly modeling heterogeneous modalities such as text and images. However, multimodal models often fail to consistently outperform strong text-only baselines, with performance varying significantly across fusion strategies. In this work, we identify representation misalignment between independently pretrained modality encoders as a key bottleneck for effective multimodal learning, and show through controlled experiments that alignment prior to fusion is often more important than fusion complexity. To address this issue, we propose a unified multimodal affective analysis framework that leverages vision-language models (VLMs) to convert visual content into structured textual descriptions, projecting heterogeneous modalities into a shared linguistic space and enabling interpretable text-centric reasoning. To further improve robustness, we introduce a hybrid learning strategy that combines semantic token selection with a batch-level uniformity regularization objective, encouraging a more dispersed and stable global feature space while mitigating noise introduced by VLM-generated descriptions. Experiments on multiple multimodal sentiment and emotion benchmarks show that our method consistently outperforms strong unimodal and multimodal baselines, achieving state-of-the-art performance. Our analysis further highlights the critical role of representation alignment in multimodal affective learning.

AI.tldr: 本文发现多模态情感分析中表征对齐比融合策略更重要，提出利用视觉-语言模型将图像转为文本描述，并结合语义标记选择和批量级均匀性正则化，在多个基准上取得SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 多模态模型在情感分析中常未能稳定超越强文本基线，且不同融合策略表现差异大。作者发现独立预训练的多模态编码器之间存在表征对齐问题，这是制约多模态学习效果的关键瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出统一框架：(1) 利用视觉-语言模型(VLM)将视觉内容转化为结构化文本描述，将异质模态投影到共享语言空间；(2) 混合学习策略，结合语义标记选择与批量级均匀性正则化目标，以增强特征空间分散性并抑制VLM生成噪声。
AI.result: 在多个多模态情感和情绪基准数据集上，所提方法一致超越强单模态和多模态基线，达到当前最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 表征对齐在多模态情感学习中起关键作用，融合前的对齐比融合复杂性更为重要。

title: Differentially Private Synthetic Data via APIs 4: Tabular Data
summary: This paper investigates the problem of generating synthetic tabular data with differential privacy (DP) guarantees, enabling data sharing in sensitive domains. Despite extensive study, state-of-the-art methods often focus on minimizing low-order marginal query errors and overlook the challenges posed by high-order correlations. To address this gap, we extend the Private Evolution (PE) framework, originally developed for DP-compliant image and text synthesis, to tabular data. We introduce Tab-PE -- an algorithm for synthetic tabular data generation under DP constraints. Tab-PE iteratively improves a candidate dataset via an evolutionary process that leverages tabular-specialized operators to produce variations, privately scores them, and selects the highest-quality samples to retain and propagate. In contrast to the original PE, which relies on large foundation models, Tab-PE employs heuristic operators with significantly lower computational costs, making PE more practical and scalable for tabular data. Through extensive experiments on real-world and simulation datasets, we demonstrate that Tab-PE substantially outperforms prior baselines on datasets exhibiting high-order correlations. Compared to the best baseline -- AIM, Tab-PE improves classification accuracy by up to 10% while running 28 times faster.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Tab-PE，将差分隐私保护下的Private Evolution框架扩展到表格数据生成，通过低成本启发式算子迭代优化候选数据集，在高阶相关数据集上相比最优基线AIM提升最高10%的分类准确率且速度快28倍。
AI.motivation: 现有差分隐私表格数据生成方法主要关注低阶边际查询误差，忽视了高阶相关性带来的挑战。
AI.method: 将Private Evolution（PE）框架扩展到表格数据，设计专门的启发式算子替代大型基础模型，通过进化过程迭代生成、评分并选择高质量候选样本。
AI.result: 在真实和模拟数据集上，Tab-PE显著优于现有基线；相比AIM，分类准确率提升最高10%，运行速度快28倍。
AI.conclusion: Tab-PE通过低成本的启发式算子使PE框架在表格数据上既实用又可扩展，有效解决了高阶相关性难题。

title: TRL-Bench: Standardizing Cross-Paradigm Representation-Level Evaluation of Tabular Encoders
summary: Tabular encoders are usually evaluated inside task-specific end-to-end pipelines, so models from different training paradigms are difficult to compare directly even when they operate on similar tabular signals. We introduce TRL-Bench, a multi-granular tabular representation learning (TRL) benchmark that standardizes cross-paradigm representation-level evaluation: each encoder exports row-, column-, or table embeddings through its supported wrapper, and shared lightweight heads probe them across three suites: TRL-CTbench (column/table), TRL-Rbench (row), and TRL-DLTE (compositional Data-Lake Table Enrichment spanning all three granularities). To support this standardized setting, we release curated benchmark assets and task reformulations, including 50 OpenML tables with 123 verified targets, 16 row-pair linkage rewrites, and a 47,772-table DLTE lake derived from 1,379 parent tables. Across 20 models and 16 tasks, TRL-Bench shows that once downstream conditions are standardized, encoder quality is capability-specific rather than captured by a single leaderboard. In TRL-CTbench, generic text encoders often lead on tasks with strong surface-text signal, while tabular specialists win where their pretraining objective aligns with the task. In TRL-Rbench, within-table prediction and cross-table linkage favor different training regimes, with atomic linkage performance correlating strongly with the row-matching stage of DLTE pipelines. In TRL-DLTE, the strongest pipelines combine capability-matched specialists rather than reuse a single encoder, and top end-to-end quality depends on non-additive compositional fit rather than per-stage marginal rank alone. TRL-Bench provides a common protocol for measuring reusable signal in exported tabular representations under shared downstream conditions. Code and data: https://github.com/LOGO-CUHKSZ/TRL-Bench

AI.tldr: TRL-Bench 是一个多粒度表格表示学习基准，通过标准化下游评估流程，发现编码器质量具有能力特异性，单一排行榜无法全面衡量；不同任务场景适合不同训练范式的模型，最佳流水线需组合能力匹配的专家模型而非复用单一编码器。
AI.motivation: 现有表格编码器通常嵌入任务特定的端到端流水线中评估，不同训练范式（如通用文本编码器 vs 表格专用模型）难以在表示层面直接比较，缺乏统一的表示级评估标准。
AI.method: 构建 TRL-Bench 基准，标准化跨范式表示级评估：各编码器通过支持包装器导出行/列/表嵌入，共享轻量级探测头在三个套件（TRL-CTbench 列/表、TRL-Rbench 行、TRL-DLTE 多粒度组合）上评估。释放基准资产包括 50 个 OpenML 表、16 行对链接改写、47,772 表 DLTE 湖。
AI.result: 在 20 个模型和 16 个任务上，TRL-Bench 表明：下游标准化后，编码器质量是能力特异性的；通用文本编码器在强表层文本信号任务中领先，表格专用模型在预训练目标匹配任务中胜出；行预测和跨表链接偏好不同训练体制；最强 DLTE 流水线组合能力匹配的专家，整体质量依赖非加成的组合适配。
AI.conclusion: TRL-Bench 提供了衡量表格表示中可复用信号的通用协议，揭示了跨范式评估的必要性，强调多粒度组合评估更能反映实际应用中的编码器性能。

title: SEF-CLGC at SemEval-2026 Task 11: Logical Notation Impact on Language Model Performance
comment: Accepted to SemEval-2026 co-located with ACL 2026
summary: This paper revisits our pipeline called Syllogistic Evaluation Framework-Common Logic Grammar Construction (SEF-CLGC). We combine formal logical notations with Small Language Models (SLMs) to evaluate reasoning performance on the SemEval-2026 Task 11 Subtask 1: Disentangling Content and Formal Reasoning in Large Language Models. Our experiments show that by relying solely on SLMs, trained on a combination of natural and symbolic languages, our best model achieves a content score of 27.80% on the task while significantly lowering the content bias in reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SEF-CLGC管道，结合形式逻辑符号和小语言模型（SLMs）来评估推理性能，在SemEval-2026任务中，最佳模型在仅使用SLMs的情况下取得了27.80%的内容得分，同时显著降低了推理中的内容偏差。
AI.motivation: 现有的大语言模型在推理中容易受到内容偏差的影响，即依赖表面语义而非形式逻辑进行推理。作者希望通过结合形式逻辑符号和小语言模型来减少这种偏差，实现更纯粹的推理评估。
AI.method: 采用SEF-CLGC管道，将形式逻辑符号与自然语言结合，训练小语言模型（SLMs），使其同时学习自然语言和符号语言的混合表示，从而提升形式推理能力。
AI.result: 最佳模型在SemEval-2026任务中达到27.80%的内容得分，并显著降低了推理中的内容偏差。
AI.conclusion: 形式逻辑符号与小语言模型的结合能有效降低内容偏差，提升形式推理的纯度，但整体内容得分仍有提升空间。

title: Causal Semantic Alignment for LLM-based Time Series Forecasting
summary: Recent advances in Large Language Models (LLMs) have opened new possibilities for time series forecasting by enabling alignment between temporal patterns and pretrained word embeddings. However, most LLM-based methods overlook the heterogeneous nature of time series, where dynamic fluctuations and invariant semantics are entangled. This entanglement introduces spurious correlations during the alignment, as dynamic components act as confounders by simultaneously influencing invariant components and the resulting aligned embeddings. To address this issue, a variable-level alignment framework CVAformer is proposed. CVAformer explicitly disentangles each variable into invariant and dynamic components just before alignment, and applies causal intervention to mitigate the confounding effect of the dynamics. To better support variable-level alignment, CVAformer replaces the standard causal attention in LLMs with a non-causal attention mechanism that captures interactions among variables at each time step. Extensive experiments across long-term, short-term, few-shot, and zero-shot forecasting settings indicate that CVAformer matches or exceeds state-of-the-art performance on most datasets, and in some cases achieves notably better accuracy. Experimental results validate the effectiveness of variable-level alignment and dynamic disentanglement in CVAformer, offering a new perspective for LLM-based time series tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出CVAformer框架，通过将时间序列变量分解为不变成分和动态成分，并对动态成分进行因果干预，解决LLM对齐时间序列时的混杂偏差问题。在长短期、少样本和零样本预测中达到或超越SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM时序预测方法忽略时间序列的异质性（动态波动与不变语义纠缠），导致对齐时引入虚假相关，因为动态成分作为混杂因子同时影响不变成分和对齐嵌入。
AI.method: 1) 变量级对齐框架，在对齐前将每个变量显式分解为不变成分和动态成分；2) 对动态成分施加因果干预以消除混杂效应；3) 用非因果注意力取代标准因果注意力，以捕获每个时间步上变量间的交互。
AI.result: 在长短期、少样本和零样本预测中，CVAformer匹配或超越SOTA，部分数据集取得显著更优精度。
AI.conclusion: 验证了变量级对齐和动态成分解耦的有效性，为LLM时序任务提供了新视角。

title: Leveraging Structural Constraints for Diffusion-based Neural TSP Solvers
summary: Neural combinatorial optimization has recently achieved strong results on the Euclidean Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP) using generative models such as diffusion and consistency models. State-ofthe-art approaches like FT2T combine fast consistency-based prediction with gradient-based inference time refinement. However, gradient search often incurs significant computational overhead and may not align with the discrete structure of feasible solutions. We introduce Projected Consistency Inference (PCI), a plug-and-play, retraining-free alternative that replaces gradient refinement with structure-aware projections: PCI decodes valid Hamiltonian tours from the consistency model output and applies a lightweight local search (e.g., 2-opt). PCI achieves an average optimality gap (OG) of 0.17% on TSP with 500 cities, and 0.31% on TSP with 1000 cities, outperforming FT2T best settings (OG 0.22% and 0.36%, respectively) while reducing the inference time up to 30 to 40%. PCI also exhibits lower variance and memory usage, and can surpass classical heuristics such as LKH3 in rapid solution generation. Our results demonstrate that structure-aware inference time operations provide a practical and principled path for neural TSP solvers, complementing training time objectives.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 Projected Consistency Inference (PCI)，一种即插即用、无需重训的方法，用结构感知投影替代梯度精炼，在 TSP 问题上以更低计算开销（推理时间减少30-40%）取得更优解（TSP500 最优性差距0.17%，TSP1000 为0.31%），甚至超越 LKH3 等经典启发式方法。
AI.motivation: 现有神经组合优化方法（如 FT2T）结合一致性模型与梯度精炼，但梯度搜索计算开销大且与离散可行解结构不完全匹配，需要更高效、结构感知的推理时优化方法。
AI.method: PCI 方法：从一致性模型输出解码有效的哈密顿环，然后应用轻量级局部搜索（如 2-opt）进行结构感知投影，完全替代梯度精炼，无需重新训练。
AI.result: TSP500 最优性差距 0.17%，TSP1000 为 0.31%，均优于 FT2T（0.22% 和 0.36%）；推理时间减少 30-40%；方差和内存使用更低；快速生成场景下超越 LKH3。
AI.conclusion: 结构感知的推理时操作是神经 TSP 求解器实用且有原则的路径，能够有效补充训练阶段的目标，同时降低计算成本并提升解的质量。

title: Unified Energy for Invariant and Independent Decoding in Diffusion Language Models
summary: Diffusion Language Models (DLMs) enable parallel text generation by iteratively denoising a full sequence, offering attractive flexibility compared to auto-regressive (AR) decoding. However, existing methods fail to fully capture token relationships, leading to a performance gap relative to AR baselines, especially as the degree of parallelism increases. In this paper, we give a systematic analysis of the gap, identifying three key factors: (i) model capacity, (ii) dependency, and (iii) invariance. To address these issues, we first propose an invariant energy (Inv-E) together with an effective sampling-based estimator to handle the invariance issue. By further combining with the independent energy (Ind-E), we obtain a unified energy (Uni-E), that accounts for all these factors. Uni-E enjoys a unique advantage: it can be computed exactly without sampling-based partition estimation. Besides, Uni-E is model agnostic and can therefore be scaled to models of arbitrary size. We further prove that Uni-E can correct the distribution shift caused by dependency and invariance. Extensive experiments across Diffusion Language Models (DLMs) and Diffusion Large Language Models (DLLMs) demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed Uni-E.

AI.tldr: 本文系统分析了扩散语言模型与自回归模型之间的性能差距，识别出三个关键因素（模型容量、依赖性和不变性），并提出统一的能量函数Uni-E来解决这些问题，实验证明其有效性。
AI.motivation: 扩散语言模型虽能实现并行文本生成，但性能落后于自回归基线模型，且随着并行度增加性能差距扩大，现有方法未能充分捕获token间的依赖关系。
AI.method: 首先提出不变能量Inv-E及基于采样的估计器处理不变性问题；再结合独立能量Ind-E得到统一能量Uni-E，该能量可精确计算且无需分区估计，模型无关可扩展至任意规模；理论上证明Uni-E能纠正由依赖性和不变性引起的分布偏移。
AI.result: 在扩散语言模型和扩散大语言模型上的大量实验证明了Uni-E的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Uni-E能有效缩小DLM与AR模型之间的性能差距，且具备理论保证和良好的可扩展性。

title: Causal Agent Replay: Counterfactual Attribution for LLM-Agent Failures
summary: When an LLM agent fails -- issues a refund it should not have, calls the wrong tool, leaks data -- existing tooling answers what happened (observability) or whether it passed (evaluation), but not which step caused the failure. The obvious heuristics are wrong: the step that executes the harmful action is usually not the step that decided on it, and LLM-judge attribution is correlational and unreliable (state-of-the-art step-level accuracy on the Who&When benchmark is about 14%). We present Causal Agent Replay (CAR), which answers the question by intervention: it models an agent run as a structural causal model, applies a do-operation to a step, and re-executes the trajectory forward under the same stochastic policy, measuring the shift in the outcome distribution. We define an intervention algebra over agent steps, a single-step contrastive estimator whose point-of-commitment rule resolves a confound specific to stochastic run-forward, and a budget-bounded Monte-Carlo Shapley estimator that splits credit across interacting steps. Every effect is reported with confidence intervals. We validate against synthetic structural causal models with planted ground truth: the contrastive estimator recovers the pivotal step, and Shapley recovers a two-step interaction (0.44, 0.45, ~0; efficiency sum 0.909 versus the analytic 0.91). CAR is open source and runs on hosted or free local models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出因果智能体重放（CAR），通过将智能体运行建模为结构因果模型并进行干预操作，从而定位LLM智能体失败的根本步骤，解决了现有工具无法回答"哪一步导致失败"的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的可观测性和评估工具只能回答"发生了什么"或"是否通过"，但无法定位导致智能体失败的具体步骤。简单启发式方法（如执行有害行为的步骤）错误，且LLM判别的归因是相关性的且不可靠（Who&When基准上步级准确率仅约14%）。
AI.method: 将智能体运行建模为结构因果模型，对步骤施加do操作，在相同随机策略下重新执行轨迹，测量结果分布的偏移。定义了干预代数、单步对比度估计器（含点承诺规则解决随机前向执行中的混杂问题）、以及预算受限的蒙特卡洛Shapley估计器（用于拆分多步交互影响）。
AI.result: 在合成结构因果模型上验证：对比度估计器能恢复关键步骤，Shapley估计器能恢复两步交互（系数0.44, 0.45, ~0；效率总和0.909，接近解析值0.91）。
AI.conclusion: CAR通过因果干预而非相关性归因，能可靠定位智能体失败的根源步骤，且支持置信区间报告，已开源并可运行于托管或本地免费模型。

title: Experience Makes Skillful: Enabling Generalizable Medical Agent Reasoning via Self-Evolving Skill Memory
summary: Medical agent systems are increasingly expected to support interactive clinical decision making rather than only static question answering. In such settings, effective agents must reuse prior experience across evolving cases, yet existing memory mechanisms often retain raw historical traces that are redundant, noisy, and difficult to govern. More importantly, they rarely distinguish which memories are truly useful for future reasoning. This limits their ability to accumulate compact and reliable experience for long-horizon clinical reasoning. To close this gap, we propose SkeMex, a post-deployment self-evolution framework that improves medical agents through a skill-based memory without updating model weights. SkeMex distills informative interaction trajectories into structured skills that encode reusable procedural knowledge, and organizes them into a multi-branch repository spanning general, task-specific, and action-level experience. To determine which memories should be reused and retained, SkeMex estimates context-dependent utility from environment feedback and uses it to guide value-aware retrieval and repository governance. A closed-loop ``Read--Write--Assess--Govern" lifecycle further supports continual evolution by writing new skills, updating utilities, promoting useful memories, and removing harmful entries. Experiments across diverse clinical tasks show that SkeMex consistently outperforms representative memory-based agents in both offline and online settings. It also generalizes across model backbones and supports transferable skill memory. All data and code will be released publicly.

AI.tldr: 提出SkeMex框架，通过基于技能的记忆机制（而非原始历史轨迹）实现医疗智能体的后部署自我进化，在不更新模型权重的情况下提升交互式临床决策能力。
AI.motivation: 现有医疗智能体记忆机制存在三个问题：1）保留冗余、嘈杂的原始历史轨迹；2）难以区分哪些记忆对未来推理真正有用；3）缺乏累积紧凑可靠经验的能力，限制了长程临床推理。
AI.method: SkeMex框架包括：1）将交互轨迹蒸馏为结构化技能（可复用过程知识）；2）构建多分支存储库（通用/任务特定/动作级）；3）基于环境反馈估计上下文依赖效用，指导价值感知检索和存储库治理；4）闭环"读-写-评估-治理"生命周期支持持续进化。
AI.result: 在多种临床任务上，SkeMex在离线和在线设置中均持续优于代表性记忆型智能体，且能跨模型骨干泛化，支持可迁移技能记忆。
AI.conclusion: SkeMex通过结构化技能记忆和价值引导的存储库治理，有效解决了医疗智能体长程推理中的记忆冗余与效用评估问题，为临床决策智能体的持续进化提供了可行方案。

title: Culturally-Adapted Red-Teaming Across East and Southeast Asian Contexts: A Methodological and Comparative Analysis
comment: Accepted to ICML 2026 Workshop on AIWILDS
summary: Multilingual safety evaluation of large language models (LLMs) has predominantly relied on direct translation (DT) of English benchmarks into target languages - an approach that converts surface-level linguistic form while failing to reflect the cultural context embedded in threat scenarios, social norms, and legal frameworks. We construct paired DT and culturally-adapted (CA) datasets via 1:1 seed matching for four languages - Korean (KO), Japanese (JA), Thai (TH), and Khmer (KM) - and compare Attack Success Rate (ASR) and Cultural Realism scores across four open-source LLM. CA prompts yield Delta-ASR > 0 across all 16 language x model combinations (mean +9.3 pp), and DT-based evaluation underestimates risk in 44 of 48 category x language combinations. Language-level analysis reveals that the distribution of threat forms is heterogeneous across languages. Cultural Realism analysis further shows that DT Cultural Depth (C3) scores remain consistently below 1.0 out of 3.0 across all four languages (mean 0.17), whereas CA scores reach up to 2.51, indicating that direct translation produces inputs systematically divergent from those encountered in real-world multicultural settings. These findings demonstrate that adapting benchmarks to language-specific cultural contexts - rather than relying on linguistic translation alone - is necessary for valid multilingual LLM safety evaluation.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过对比直接翻译（DT）和文化适配（CA）数据集在多语言大模型安全评估中的表现，发现DT方法显著低估了真实风险，而CA方法能更准确地反映文化语境下的威胁场景。在韩、日、泰、柬四种语言的16个模型-语言组合中，CA提示的Delta-ASR平均提升9.3个百分点，且DT的文化深度得分（C3）远低于CA。研究表明，仅靠语言翻译不足以进行有效的多语言LLM安全评估，必须结合文化适配。
AI.motivation: 现有多语言大模型安全评估主要依赖直接翻译英文基准到目标语言，这种方式只转换了表面语言形式，未能反映威胁场景、社会规范和法律框架中嵌入的文化语境，导致评估失真。
AI.method: 为韩语、日语、泰语和高棉语四种语言构建了成对的直接翻译（DT）和经过文化适配（CA）的数据集，通过1:1种子匹配，并比较了攻击成功率（ASR）和文化现实主义评分在四种开源大模型上的表现。
AI.result: CA提示在所有16种语言×模型组合中均产生正的Delta-ASR（平均提升9.3个百分点）；48个类别×语言组合中有44个中DT评估低估了风险；语言层面分析显示威胁形式的分布存在异质性；DT的文化深度（C3）得分均低于1.0/3.0（平均0.17），而CA得分最高达2.51。
AI.conclusion: 将基准适配到特定语言的文化背景（而非仅依赖语言翻译）对于有效的多语言LLM安全评估是必要的。

title: Mesh Graph Neural Network Framework for Accelerating Finite Element Simulation for Arbitrary Geometries
comment: 10 pages, 6 figures, to be published. Code available at https://github.com/Josiah-Kunz/MGN-Public
summary: Finite element analysis (FEA) is essential for structural design but remains computationally expensive, particularly when evaluating multiple design iterations or load scenarios. Machine learning surrogate models offer a promising alternative, yet most approaches struggle with a critical limitation: generalizing across varying geometries. This work presents a mesh graph network (MGN) for predicting von Mises stress fields in 2D structural components with arbitrary hole geometries. Unlike traditional machine learning approaches that use absolute node coordinates as features, the proposed model builds on existing MGN frameworks that encode node types (e.g., fixed boundary, free surface, hole edge), relative edge features (distance between neighbors), and global features (applied load). This architecture is inherently translation- and rotation-invariant, enabling generalization to unseen geometries without retraining. The MGN was trained on 11 plate geometries under 20 load conditions and evaluated on 7 unseen geometries and 3 unseen loads. In the most favorable case, the model achieves $R^2 \geq 0.97$ on an unseen geometry and unseen load, compared to $R^2 \approx 0.01$--$0.86$ for conventional models (Random Forest, Gradient Boosting , K-Nearest Neighbors) trained on identical data. However, even in less favorable cases, the MGN model still outperforms conventional models. This work extends the mesh-based simulation framework of Pfaff et al. (arXiv:2010.03409) to structural mechanics, demonstrating that graph neural networks can serve as efficient surrogates for finite element analysis across varying geometries.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种网格图网络（MGN），用于预测2D结构件在任意孔洞几何形状下的von Mises应力场。与传统ML方法使用绝对节点坐标不同，该模型编码节点类型、相对边特征和全局特征，具有平移和旋转不变性，能够泛化到未见过的几何形状。在最优情况下，模型在未见过几何形状和载荷上R²≥0.97，显著优于传统模型（R²≈0.01-0.86）。
AI.motivation: 有限元分析（FEA）对于结构设计至关重要，但计算成本高昂，尤其是在评估多个设计迭代或载荷场景时。机器学习代理模型虽有前景，但大多数方法难以在不同几何形状间泛化，这是关键局限性。
AI.method: 基于Pfaff等人（arXiv:2010.03409）的网格仿真框架，构建网格图网络（MGN）。与传统方法不同，不使用绝对节点坐标，而是编码节点类型（如固定边界、自由表面、孔洞边缘）、相对边特征（邻居间距离）和全局特征（施加载荷），使架构具有平移和旋转不变性，能泛化到未见几何形状。
AI.result: 在11种板几何形状、20种载荷条件下训练，在7种未见几何形状和3种未见载荷上评估。最优情况下，MGN在未见几何形状和未见载荷上的R²≥0.97，而传统模型（随机森林、梯度提升、K近邻）的R²仅为0.01-0.86。即使在较差情况下，MGN仍优于传统模型。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作将基于网格的图神经网络仿真框架扩展到结构力学领域，证明了图神经网络可以作为跨几何形状的有限元分析高效代理模型，为加速结构设计迭代提供了可行方案。

title: Capability-Aligned Hierarchical Learning for Tool-Augmented LLMs
summary: Tool learning enables LLMs to invoke external tools to accomplish tasks. Prior studies have demonstrated the effectiveness of a hierarchical structure: a high-level policy handles global planning and decomposes tasks into manageable sub-tasks, and a low-level policy focuses on invoking tools to solve these sub-tasks. However, these works typically optimize the high-level and low-level policies separately, leading to planner-executor misalignment and limiting LLM performance on tool-use tasks. In this paper, we propose a method called Capability-Aligned Hierarchical Learning (CAHL), which leverages RLVR to jointly optimize both policies, enabling better alignment between the high-level planner and the low-level executor. Experiments on constrained tool-use benchmarks (API-Bank and BFCL) and an open-ended environment (Bamboogle) demonstrate the effectiveness of CAHL.

AI.tldr: 提出CAHL方法，通过RLVR联合优化高层规划器和低层执行器，解决工具学习中规划与执行不对齐问题，在多个基准上验证有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有分层工具学习方法分别优化高层和低层策略，导致规划器与执行器之间的不对齐，限制了LLM在工具使用任务上的性能。
AI.method: 提出CAHL（Capability-Aligned Hierarchical Learning），利用RLVR（强化学习+验证）联合优化高层规划和低层执行策略，实现两者能力对齐。
AI.result: 在API-Bank、BFCL（受限工具基准）和Bamboogle（开放环境）上验证了CAHL的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合优化分层策略可以缓解规划-执行不对齐问题，提升LLM工具学习任务的性能。

title: Symbolic and Abstractive Reasoning with Complex Visual Queries
summary: Understanding and reasoning over abstract visual content remains a challenge for current multi-modal large language models (MLLMs). In this paper, we explore a novel abstract data type termed complex visual query (CVQ), designed to probe symbolic and abstractive reasoning, which is a critical yet underexplored dimension of human-like neuro-symbolic reasoning for MLLMs. We present a comprehensive investigation from three perspectives: \textbf{Data $\times$ Paradigm $\times$ Exploration}. Specifically, we propose a scalable pipeline for synthesizing CVQs grounded in large-scale multi-modal knowledge graphs, generating a diverse dataset encompassing 14 distinct query types via systematic combinations of first-order logic operators. We further introduce a two-stage training framework that progressively equips MLLMs with robust visual reasoning capabilities. We conduct extensive experiments to rigorously evaluate MLLMs across multiple dimensions, including reasoning performance on CVQs, as well as cross-task and cross-scenario generalization. We believe our work opens new perspectives and avenues for advancing the reasoning frontiers of MLLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文探索了一种新型抽象数据类型——复杂视觉查询（CVQ），用于测试MLLMs的符号与抽象推理能力，提出了从数据、范式到探索的三维研究框架，包括基于多模态知识图谱的CVQ合成管道、两阶段训练框架以及全面的实验评估。
AI.motivation: 当前MLLMs在理解与推理抽象视觉内容方面仍存在挑战，尤其缺乏对符号化与抽象推理（类人神经符号推理）能力的系统性探究。本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: (1) 提出可扩展的CVQ合成管道，基于大规模多模态知识图谱生成包含14种查询类型的数据集；(2) 设计两阶段训练框架，逐步赋予MLLMs鲁棒的视觉推理能力；(3) 从推理性能、跨任务与跨场景泛化等多维度进行严格评估。
AI.result: 生成了涵盖14种一阶逻辑查询类型的多样化CVQ数据集；两阶段训练框架有效提升了MLLMs的视觉推理能力；实验在多个维度上验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文为推进MLLMs的推理边界开辟了新视角和途径，CVQ作为一种新的抽象数据类型，有望成为未来神经符号推理研究的重要基准。

title: On solving symmetric multi-type orthogonal non-negative matrix tri-factorization problem
summary: We study the symmetric multi-type orthogonal non-negative matrix tri-factorization problem, where several symmetric non-negative matrices are simultaneously approximated by factors of the form $GS_{i}G^{\top}$, with a shared non-negative and orthogonal factor $G$. This model is motivated by clustering and network analysis, where non-negativity improves interpretability and orthogonality gives a natural assignment-type structure to the latent factor. Since the resulting optimization problem is highly non-convex, we develop two heuristic algorithms for computing high-quality local solutions. The first one is a fixed point method derived from the Karush-Kuhn-Tucker conditions after adding a penalty term for the orthogonality constraint. The second one is a three-stage ADAM-based method that combines non-negativity-preserving optimization, orthogonalization, and restricted ADAM refinement on the feasible set. We evaluate both methods on synthetic data, including noisy instances, and on citation network benchmarks. The synthetic experiments show that both algorithms recover factorizations close to the optimum and remain stable under noise. On real networks, the learned embeddings are competitive with or better than standard baselines such as SVD, node2vec, and classical link prediction heuristics in link prediction, node clustering, and node classification tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了对称多类型正交非负矩阵三分解问题，提出了两种启发式算法（不动点法和基于ADAM的三阶段方法），在合成数据和真实网络数据上验证了其在链接预测、节点聚类和分类任务中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 在聚类和网络分析中，希望同时分解多个对称非负矩阵，并让共享的因子G同时满足非负性和正交性，从而获得可解释的、具有自然分配结构的潜在表示。
AI.method: 提出两种启发式算法：(1) 基于KKT条件的带正交惩罚项的不动点法；(2) 三阶段ADAM方法，包括非负保持优化、正交化、以及受限ADAM精调。
AI.result: 合成实验表明两种算法都能恢复接近最优的分解且对噪声稳定；真实网络上的嵌入在链接预测、节点聚类和分类任务中与SVD、node2vec等基线方法相比具有竞争力或更优。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法能有效解决高度非凸的对称多类型正交非负矩阵三分解问题，在多个实际任务中表现优异。

title: From Coarse to Fine: Managing Temporal Granularity in Spatio-Temporal Data for Fine-Grained Traffic Prediction
summary: Efficient acquisition, storage, and utilization of traffic data are critical challenges in spatio-temporal data management. Most traffic data systems collect and store observations at fixed, coarse-grained temporal intervals to reduce storage and computation costs. However, such coarse-grained data severely limits downstream applications that require predictions at a finer temporal granularity. Collecting and maintaining fine-grained traffic data across all locations and time periods would impose a substantial burden on database storage and preprocessing pipelines. To address this temporal granularity mismatch, we formulate a novel problem: predicting fine-grained future traffic using coarse-grained sampled data. We propose the Spatial-Temporal Refinement Predictor (STRP), a granularity-aware framework for spatio-temporal data systems. STRP integrates two components: Tree Convolution for efficient and interpretable spatial dependency modeling, and Inverse Dilated Convolution for progressive temporal extrapolation. STRP supports two practical prediction settings: window-based and duration-based, to handle different forms of granularity mismatch. Experiments on six benchmark datasets show that STRP significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in both accuracy and efficiency. Our work offers a practical and interpretable approach to managing granularity mismatches in spatio-temporal traffic data systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出空间-时间精细化预测器（STRP），用于解决交通数据中粗粒度采样与细粒度预测需求之间的粒度不匹配问题，通过树卷积和逆膨胀卷积实现高效、可解释的时空预测。
AI.motivation: 现有交通数据系统为降低存储和计算成本，往往以固定粗粒度时间间隔采集数据，但这严重限制了需要细粒度预测的下游应用。而全面采集细粒度数据会带来巨大的存储和预处理负担，因此需要一种能从粗粒度采样数据中预测细粒度未来交通状态的方法。
AI.method: 提出STRP框架，包含两个核心组件：1）Tree Convolution（树卷积）用于高效且可解释的空间依赖建模；2）Inverse Dilated Convolution（逆膨胀卷积）用于渐进式时间外推。支持两种预测设置：窗口式（window-based）和持续式（duration-based），以应对不同形式的粒度不匹配。
AI.result: 在六个基准数据集上的实验表明，STRP在准确率和效率上均显著优于当前最先进的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为时空交通数据系统中的粒度不匹配问题提供了一种实用且可解释的解决方案。

title: TruthSplit: Operationalizing Conditional Validity in Arguments Through Multi-Perspective Reasoning
comment: Demo paper. To appear at ACL 2026
summary: We present TruthSplit, an interactive system for multi-perspective argument analysis. Existing argumentation tools typically analyze properties of the argument itself, such as structure, quality, stance, or persuasiveness, while leaving perspective-specific background knowledge implicit. TruthSplit addresses this gap by supporting an exploratory analysis of how the same claim can lead to different conclusions when interpreted through worldview-specific values, assumptions, and conceptual definitions. We refer to this perspective-dependent analysis as conditional validity. Given an input argumentative text, TruthSplit extracts claims and premises, applies a three-layer natural language inference (NLI) approach to assess both logical and worldview-specific normative consistency, and conditions large language model (LLM) reasoning on structured worldview profiles that encode core values and decision principles. The system then generates perspective-specific interpretations, identifies value conflicts and assumption gaps, and visualizes divergence through interactive analytical interfaces.

AI.tldr: TruthSplit是一个交互式系统，通过提取论点中的主张和前提，结合三层NLI和基于世界观档案的LLM推理，分析同一主张在不同世界观下如何得出不同结论（条件有效性），并可视化观点分歧。
AI.motivation: 现有论证分析工具只分析论证本身的结构、质量、立场等属性，忽视了不同世界观视角下的隐含背景知识，无法解释同一主张为何在不同视角下得出不同结论。
AI.method: 输入论点文本后，提取主张和前提；采用三层自然语言推理（NLI）评估逻辑一致性和世界观层面的规范性一致性；基于结构化世界观档案（编码核心价值观和决策原则）对LLM推理进行条件化，生成视角特定的解释，识别价值冲突和假设缺口。
AI.result: 系统能够生成不同视角下的特定解释，识别价值冲突和假设缺口，并通过交互式分析界面可视化观点分歧。
AI.conclusion: TruthSplit填补了多视角论证分析的空白，通过"条件有效性"概念和世界观条件化推理，为理解观点分歧提供了新的分析范式。

title: QueryWeaver: Reliable Multi-Tool Query Execution Planning via LLM-Based Graph Generation
summary: Many real-world queries over personal data span multiple applications and require structured planning, as individual tools expose only partial information. While LLMs show strong reasoning and tool use, reliably executing multi-step, cross-tool queries remains challenging. We introduce a system that converts natural language queries into structured graphs and executes them via a deterministic planner. Our approach uses depth-first search to resolve dependencies and combine results across tools, improving reliability and enabling queries beyond traditional keyword-based search. We demonstrate high accuracy even with smaller or locally hosted LLMs.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种将自然语言查询转换为结构化图并通过确定性规划器执行的系统，使用深度优先搜索解决跨工具依赖问题，即使使用较小或本地托管的LLM也能实现高准确性。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中许多跨个人数据的查询需要跨多个工具的结构化规划，而现有LLM在可靠执行多步骤、跨工具查询方面存在挑战。
AI.method: 将自然语言查询转换为结构化图，通过确定性规划器执行，使用深度优先搜索解决依赖关系并合并跨工具的结果。
AI.result: 即使使用较小或本地托管的LLM也能实现高准确性，超越了传统基于关键词的搜索能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法提高了LLM跨工具查询的可靠性，扩展了查询能力，并降低了对大型模型的依赖。

title: RunAgent SuperBrowser: A Theory of Autonomous Web Navigation Grounded in Human Browsing Behaviour
summary: We present SUPERBROWSER, an autonomous web-navigation agent designed against a single guiding hypothesis: a web agent should browse the way a person browses. A human reading a page does not retain every pixel they have seen; they look at a few candidate targets, decide on one, and remember only what is needed to keep the goal alive. We operationalize this perception-cognition-action triad as three coupled mechanisms. First, a vision-first bounding-box pipeline labels candidate interactive regions on every screenshot and feeds them, asynchronously prefetched, to the language model so that the "eye" precedes the "hand". Second, a three-role brain -- an Orchestrator that classifies and routes, a Planner that evaluates progress every few steps, and a Worker that emits per-step actions -- separates strategic from operational reasoning. Third, a structured Ledger stores only what a person would: the goal, the last three actions, a small set of facts and dead-ends, and a handful of checkpoints; a six-phase eviction loop systematically discards stale screenshots, state blobs, and reasoning traces from the live context. Action execution is a three-tier click cascade (Chrome DevTools Protocol to Puppeteer to scripted) with humanized Bezier motion, plus a chevron-aware bounding-box snapper that resolves the "small arrow beside a large label" ambiguity. On the Mind2Web Hard benchmark (66 tasks), SUPERBROWSER attains 89.47% success, placing third overall and ahead of every published open/research browser-agent baseline by a large margin. We argue that the gain comes not from any single trick but from the consistent application of a cognitive contract throughout the system.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为SUPERBROWSER的自主网页导航智能体，核心假设是"智能体应像人类一样浏览网页"。通过视觉优先的边界框流水线、三角色大脑架构（编排器-规划器-工作者）和结构化账本记忆系统，在Mind2Web Hard基准上达到89.47%成功率，远超其他开源/研究基线。
AI.motivation: 现有网页导航智能体往往"贪婪地"处理所有像素信息，缺乏人类浏览时的选择性注意、记忆管理和分层推理能力。作者希望将人类的感知-认知-行动三元组操作化，构建一个遵循"认知契约"的智能体系统。
AI.method: 三个核心机制：(1) 视觉优先的边界框流水线——先识别候选交互区域，异步预取至语言模型；(2) 三角色大脑——编排器（分类路由）、规划器（每隔几步评估进展）、工作者（执行单步动作）；(3) 结构化账本——仅存储目标、最近三步动作、少量事实与死胡同、若干检查点，配合六阶段驱逐循环清理过时上下文。动作执行采用三层点击级联（CDP→Puppeteer→脚本）加人机化贝塞尔运动轨迹，以及"V形标记感知边界框捕捉器"解决小箭头与大标签的歧义。
AI.result: 在Mind2Web Hard基准（66个任务）上达到89.47%成功率，排名第三，大幅领先所有已发表的开源/研究浏览器智能体基线。
AI.conclusion: 性能提升并非来自单一技巧，而是整个系统一致应用"认知契约"的结果——即智能体的信息处理方式应模仿人类的浏览认知模式。

title: One Model, Multiple Goals: Adaptive Multi-Objective Learning for E-commerce Dialogue Systems
summary: Dialogue systems in e-commerce scenarios often need to satisfy multiple objectives: accurately reasoning over user profiles (e.g., eligibility, credit limit) to ensure correct decision-making and user state interpretation, while also generating natural and faithful responses. These goals are complementary but not identical. In this work, we propose MORE, an adaptive Multi-Objective REinforcement learning framework that jointly optimizes reasoning accuracy and linguistic naturalness. Our preliminary experiments show that directly mixing rewards with diverging optimization dynamics can cause oscillations and unstable learning. Thus, instead of optimizing a single mixed reward, we treat reasoning functions as constraints that guide policy optimization. At inference time, the system directly generates responses without explicit reasoning steps, while still benefiting from reasoning-enhanced scaffold and avoiding additional inference overhead. To better balance linguistic objectives during response generation, we introduce an adaptive multi-reward mechanism that aggregates signals such as fluency and naturalness and dynamically reweighs them via gradient feedback. We evaluate MORE on two real-world dialogue systems at ByteDance and the MultiWOZ 2.2 benchmark, where it consistently outperforms strong baselines. In 14-day online experiments on ByteDance production traffic, MORE improves overall and reached conversion by 16.53% and 30.09%, while increasing user satisfaction and reducing handoff rates. Notably, in a human-machine comparison, MORE recovers about 60% of the incremental conversion lift achieved by human agents.

AI.tldr: 提出MORE框架，利用多目标强化学习联合优化对话系统的推理准确性和语言自然度，在字节跳动和MultiWOZ 2.2上取得显著提升。
AI.motivation: 电商场景下的对话系统需要同时满足推理准确性（如用户资格、信用额度判断）和语言自然度两个目标，但两者优化方向存在冲突，直接混合奖励会导致训练不稳定。
AI.method: 提出MORE框架：1) 将推理功能作为约束条件引导策略优化，而非直接混合奖励；2) 推理时无需显式推理步骤，避免额外开销；3) 引入自适应多奖励机制，通过梯度反馈动态调整流畅度、自然度等语言目标的权重。
AI.result: 在字节跳动14天线上实验中，整体转化率提升16.53%，达成转化率提升30.09%，用户满意度提升且人工转接率降低；在人机对比中恢复约60%的人类客服转化提升。
AI.conclusion: 将推理作为约束条件而非混合奖励，再配合自适应多奖励机制，能有效平衡对话系统的推理准确性与语言自然度，取得实际业务提升。

title: GeoGNN: Time Series Geo-Localization using Two-Tower Graph Neural Networks
summary: This paper investigates a novel concept of time series geolocalization, where the goal is to infer the geographic origin of each raw time series. Successful geolocalization can provide spatial context to time series, enabling downstream location-aware applications. We formalize the problem, adapt core ideas from image geolocalization to establish strong baselines, and propose GeoGNN, a two-tower architecture. During training, GeoGNN's spatial tower learns embeddings of geographic cell candidates by leveraging the geographic adjacency graph, while the temporal tower extracts informative representations from time series. During inference, each temporal representation is matched against candidate geographic embeddings using dot-product similarity, combined with an auxiliary classification head, to predict the time series' associated geographic origin. Experiments on large-scale, countrywide electricity-consumption datasets demonstrate that GeoGNN achieves the best performance across datasets and enhances both fine- and coarse-grained geolocalization accuracy by ~27% on average.

AI.tldr: 本文提出时间序列地理定位的新概念，旨在推断每个原始时间序列的地理来源。作者设计了GeoGNN双塔架构，通过空间塔学习地理单元的嵌入表示（利用地理邻接图），时间塔提取时间序列特征，在推理时通过点积相似度匹配进行定位。在大规模国家电力消费数据集上，GeoGNN相比基线平均提升约27%的定位准确率。
AI.motivation: 时间序列缺乏空间上下文信息，成功的地理定位可以为时间序列提供空间信息，从而支持下游基于位置的应用。现有研究缺乏对时间序列地理定位的正式定义和方法。
AI.method: 提出GeoGNN双塔架构：1）空间塔利用地理邻接图学习候选地理单元的嵌入表示；2）时间塔从时间序列中提取表征；3）推理时通过点积相似度匹配时间表征与地理嵌入，并结合辅助分类头预测地理来源。
AI.result: 在大规模国家电力消费数据集上，GeoGNN在所有数据集上取得最佳性能，细粒度与粗粒度地理定位准确率平均提升约27%。
AI.conclusion: 时间序列地理定位是一个可行且有价值的研究方向，GeoGNN通过双塔架构和图学习方法有效实现了该任务，为时间序列赋予空间上下文信息提供了新的解决范式。

title: Correct Looks Better: Pairwise Comparisons Reveal Accuracy Rankings
summary: Pairwise comparisons combined with aggregation methods like Elo have become central to evaluating generative models, yet concerns remain that they reward superficial stylistic cues or display judge biases. In a more positive turn, we show that model rankings from pairwise comparisons strongly agree with ground-truth-based accuracy rankings when such ground truth is available for comparison. By converting five well-known benchmarks into free-form generative evaluations, we find that Elo rankings achieve a Spearman correlation above 0.9 with accuracy rankings and substantially outperform direct evaluation when the judge is weak. Furthermore, style and judge bias have only minor effects on model rankings, despite most judgments occurring on pairs where both candidate answers are correct (or incorrect). On such pairs, we find that repetition after the final answer (echo) is a causal driver of judge preference.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了成对比较与Elo聚合方法在生成模型评估中的有效性，发现Elo排名与基于准确率的排名高度一致（Spearman相关系数>0.9），且风格和评判者偏见对排名影响较小，但"回声"（最终答案后的重复）是评判者偏好的因果驱动因素。
AI.motivation: 尽管成对比较和Elo聚合方法已被广泛用于生成模型评估，但一直存在疑虑，认为它们可能奖励表面的风格线索或受到评判者偏见的影响。本文旨在正面检验这些疑虑，验证成对比较排名是否与基于真实准确率的排名一致。
AI.method: 将五个知名基准测试转换为自由形式生成评估，计算Elo排名与基于准确率的排名之间的Spearman相关性，并分析风格、评判者偏见以及"回声"（重复）对评判者偏好的影响。
AI.result: Elo排名与准确率排名的Spearman相关系数超过0.9，显著优于弱评判者下的直接评估；风格和评判者偏见对排名影响微小；在答案正确或错误相同的成对比较中，"回声"是评判者偏好的因果驱动因素。
AI.conclusion: 成对比较和Elo聚合能够可靠地评估生成模型，其排名与真实准确率高度一致，主要偏差源（风格、偏见）影响有限，但需注意"回声"这一特定因果偏好因素。

title: NüshuVoice: Reviving the Voice of Endangered Nüshu with Pitch-Aware Text-to-Speech
summary: Nüshu is an endangered phonetic script historically used by women in Jiangyong County, southern Hunan, China. While existing computational studies of Nüshu mainly focus on textual digitization and visual recognition, the acoustic reconstruction of its authentic pronunciation remains largely unexplored. Building a Nüshu text-to-speech (TTS) system is particularly challenging because available recordings are extremely limited and mostly consist of isolated syllable-level pronunciations rather than natural sentence-level utterances. In this work, we introduce NüshuVoice, the first TTS benchmark for Nüshu. We construct a sentence-level Nüshu text-to-audio dataset that aligns standardized Unicode Nüshu text, phonetic transcriptions, standard Chinese translations, and archival recordings. To synthesize speech under this extreme low-resource setting, we propose Nüshu-PitchVITS, an F0-conditioned VITS framework that leverages Nüshu's five-level pitch notation as an explicit prosodic inductive bias. Experimental results show that Nüshu-PitchVITS outperforms strong TTS baselines in spectral fidelity, pitch reconstruction, and human-rated intelligibility. We publicly release the dataset and code at: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/Nvshu-TTS-2EB6.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了首个女书语音合成基准NüshuVoice，并设计了基于音高条件的VITS框架（Nüshu-PitchVITS），在极低资源场景下实现了高质量的女书语音合成。
AI.motivation: 女书是一种濒危的女性专属文字，现有研究集中于文字数字化和视觉识别，但其真实发音的声学重建几乎未被探索，构建TTS系统面临录音数据极度稀缺（多为孤立音节级别）的挑战。
AI.method: 构建了句子级女书文本-音频数据集（包含Unicode文本、音标、中文翻译和档案录音）；提出Nüshu-PitchVITS，在VITS框架中引入F0条件，利用女书五级音高符号作为显式韵律归纳偏置。
AI.result: 在频谱保真度、音高重建和人工可懂度评估上，Nüshu-PitchVITS显著优于多个强TTS基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 首次为女书这一濒危文字建立了TTS基准，验证了在极低资源下利用音高先验进行语音合成的有效性，并开源了数据集和代码以推动后续研究。

title: Towards Graph Foundation Models for Dynamics in Complex Networked Systems: Lessons from Super-Spreader Identification in Multilayer Networks
summary: Network dynamics - including spreading, influence maximisation, and epidemic modelling - remain largely confined to the transductive paradigm, where models are trained on a single network and cannot be reused on unseen graphs without retraining. We argue that inductive cross-network generalisation is a necessary prerequisite for Graph Foundation Models (GFMs) in this domain and propose four design properties towards this goal. As a proof of concept, ts-net (TopSpreadersNetwork), trained solely on synthetic multilayer networks (MLNs), demonstrates zero-shot generalisation to real-world MLNs of varying size and layer count, outperforming classical heuristics and transductive baselines on three of four metrics. Based on ts-net's performance, we further outline five open challenges towards building GFMs for network dynamics: scale, many-layer generalisation, self-supervised pretraining, cross-task transfer, and node-attribute integration.

AI.tldr: 本文提出跨网络归纳泛化对图基础模型至关重要，并通过在合成多层网络上训练的ts-net模型，在零样本迁移到真实网络时超越传统方法，同时指出了五个未来挑战。
AI.motivation: 当前网络动力学研究局限于直推式范式（单网络训练无法复用），而跨网络归纳泛化是实现图基础模型（GFMs）的必要前提。
AI.method: 提出四项设计属性以实现归纳泛化；构建ts-net（TopSpreadersNetwork）模型，仅在合成多层网络上训练。
AI.result: ts-net在零样本条件下泛化到不同规模和层数的真实多层网络，在四项指标中的三项上优于传统启发式方法和直推式基线。
AI.conclusion: 基于ts-net的性能，指出五个开放挑战：规模、多层泛化、自监督预训练、跨任务迁移、节点属性整合。

title: Capacity, Not Format: Rethinking Structured Reasoning Failures
summary:
Prior work treats structured output as a reasoning tax, but this framing is incomplete: the cost of formatting depends strongly on a model's spare capacity. Using information-matched prose controls and a four-level schema complexity gradient, we separate format-specific effects from prompt-length confounds across 4 models and 5 benchmarks with 0% parse failures on successfully generated responses.
  We find that structured formats are capacity-dependent. Models with sufficient headroom absorb JSON constraints without degradation (Sonnet: $88.7\pm4.0$% JSON vs. $89.3\pm1.7$% CoT on MATH-Hard). In contrast, formats severely degrade models operating near their limits through two distinct mechanisms. First, under standard token budgets, Haiku drops 36.2pp ($p < 0.0001$) largely due to truncation. Second, even with extended budgets eliminating truncation, GPT-4o-mini drops 28.0pp ($p < 0.001$), revealing pure capacity competition independent of token exhaustion.
  This format penalty scales with schema complexity (McNemar $p < 0.0001$) and cannot be explained by prompt length alone. Furthermore, these results qualify claims of frontier model immunity: on AIME competition math, Opus 4.7 drops from 96.2% to 91.0% under JSON ($-5.3$pp; the displayed percentages are independently rounded, exact difference is $7/133 = 5.26$pp $\approx 5.3$pp). A delayed-structure ablation -- reasoning freely before formatting -- recovers most of the lost accuracy (3-run mean: 80--87%), supporting the capacity competition mechanism. The practical implication is not to avoid structured output, but to match it to capacity: when a model is near its limits, think first, format later.

AI.tldr: 结构化输出（如JSON）会消耗模型容量，在模型接近能力极限时显著降低性能；先自由推理再格式化的延迟结构策略可恢复大部分损失。
AI.motivation: 现有研究将结构化输出视为推理的"税收"（固定成本），但作者认为这一框架不完整——格式化的成本高度依赖于模型的空闲容量。需要区分格式本身的效应与提示长度带来的混杂因素。
AI.method: 使用信息匹配的散文控制组和四级模式复杂度梯度，在4个模型和5个基准上分离格式特定效应与提示长度混淆因素，保证0%解析失败率。设计了延迟结构消融实验（先自由推理再格式化）。
AI.result: 1）结构化格式的能力依赖性：Sonnet在JSON和CoT间性能几乎无差异；2）两种退化机制：Haiku因标记预算截断下降36.2pp，GPT-4o-mini即使无截断仍下降28.0pp（纯容量竞争）；3）格式惩罚随模式复杂度递增；4）Opus 4.7在AIME上JSON格式下降5.3pp，挑战了前沿模型免疫的说法；5）延迟结构恢复大部分精度（80-87%）。
AI.conclusion: 结构化输出不应被完全避免，而应与模型容量匹配：当模型接近其极限时，应先思考（自由推理）再格式化（输出结构）。

title: SG-OPD: Sign-Gated On-Policy Distillation via Sign-Consistency Gating and Phased Teacher Sampling
summary: On-policy distillation (OPD) trains a student on its own trajectories with dense per-token supervision from a stronger teacher, and often outperforms off-policy distillation and standard reinforcement learning. However, we find that its effectiveness implicitly relies on two assumptions that frequently break in practice: trajectory-level alignment between the student and the teacher, and uniform token-level reliability of the teacher's preferences. We therefore propose Sign-Gated On-Policy Distillation (SG-OPD), which uses a binary verifier as a trust signal for the teacher at two complementary granularities: phased teacher sampling mixes in verifier-endorsed teacher rollouts at cold-start, and a sign-consistency gate extrapolates the distillation update on tokens where the teacher agrees with the verifier-correct direction and interpolates it where it disagrees. Experiments on competition-level mathematical reasoning benchmarks show that SG-OPD consistently outperforms standard OPD, with average gains of 1.98 and 7.50 at the per-sample and per-question levels, respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SG-OPD方法，通过二元验证器作为教师信号的信任指标，在轨迹级和token级两个粒度上改进同策略蒸馏，在数学推理任务上相比标准OPD取得显著提升。
AI.motivation: 标准同策略蒸馏（OPD）在实践中隐式依赖两个常被违反的假设：学生与教师之间的轨迹级对齐，以及教师偏好的token级均匀可靠性。
AI.method: 提出SG-OPD，包含两个互补粒度的机制：(1) 分阶段教师采样，在冷启动阶段混入验证器认可的教师轨迹；(2) 符号一致性门控，在教师与验证器方向一致时外推蒸馏更新，不一致时内插。
AI.result: 在竞赛级数学推理基准上，SG-OPD在样本级和问题级分别平均提升1.98和7.50，持续优于标准OPD。
AI.conclusion: SG-OPD通过引入二元验证器作为信任信号，有效解决了OPD在实际应用中的两个隐性假设缺陷，提升了蒸馏效果。

title: Fourier fractal dimension to predict the generalization of deep neural networks
summary: Predicting the generalization performance of deep neural networks without relying on hold-out validation data is a fundamental challenge in machine learning. While Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD) drives the optimization of these highly parameterized models, its heavy-tailed, non-Gaussian dynamics induce complex, scale-invariant trajectories in the parameter space. In this paper, we propose a novel generalization measure based on the Fourier fractal dimension of the network's weight variations. By analyzing the characteristic function of the Lévy-driven stochastic differential equations in the frequency domain, we extract a metric that robustly captures the geometric complexity of the learning process. Furthermore, we introduce a customized Fourier-based optimizer designed to actively regularize this fractal dimension during training. Extensive empirical evaluations on the CIFAR-10, SVHN, and MNIST datasets demonstrate that our proposed Fourier generalization measure exhibits a strong correlation with the actual generalization gap. Our method achieves state-of-the-art Kendall rank correlation coefficients, outperforming a wide array of existing norm-based, margin-based, and PAC-Bayesian measures. Ultimately, this work highlights the potential of frequency-domain fractal analysis as both a powerful predictor for model generalizability and a principled foundation for developing more stable optimization algorithms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于傅里叶分形维数的泛化度量，通过分析权重变化的频域特征预测深度神经网络泛化性能，并设计傅里叶优化器主动正则化该维度，在多个数据集上取得SOTA相关性结果。
AI.motivation: 解决深度学习模型泛化性能难以仅凭内部信息进行准确预测的核心挑战，特别是传统基于SGD的优化过程具有重尾非高斯特性，需要更有效的几何复杂度度量。
AI.method: 基于Lévy驱动随机微分方程的特征函数进行频域分析，提取网络权重变化的傅里叶分形维数作为泛化度量；并设计傅里叶优化器在训练中主动正则化该分形维度。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10、SVHN、MNIST数据集上，所提度量与实际泛化差距高度相关，Kendall秩相关系数达到SOTA，优于现有的范数、间隔和PAC-Bayes方法。
AI.conclusion: 频域分形分析在预测模型泛化性和指导稳定优化算法设计方面具有重要潜力。

title: WeaveBench: A Long-Horizon, Real-World Benchmark for Computer-Use Agents with Hybrid Interfaces
summary: Computer-use agents (CUAs) increasingly operate in runtimes that combine visual desktop control, command-line execution, code editing, browsers, and external tools. Existing benchmarks, however, often evaluate these interfaces as separable capabilities, leaving long-horizon cross-interface orchestration under-tested. Thus, we introduce WeaveBench, a long-horizon hybrid-interface benchmark with 114 tasks across 8 real-world work domains, grounded in real user requests and publicly verifiable artifacts. Each task requires agents to combine GUI observations/actions with CLI/code operations within a single trajectory. We evaluate these tasks on a real Ubuntu desktop inside deployed CLI-agent runtimes, augmented with a minimal desktop-control plugin. We also propose a companion trajectory-aware judge that inspects deliverables, files, screenshots, logs, and action traces, while detecting shortcut behaviors such as fabricated visual evidence or hard-coded metrics. Across frontier model-runtime pairings, the best PassRate reaches only 41.2%, showing the benchmark remains far from saturated. The trajectory-aware judge further reveals that outcome-only grading substantially overestimates agent performance. Overall, WeaveBench exposes a critical gap in CUA evaluation and provides an effective testbed to measure whether agents can orchestrate GUI, CLI, and code operations across long-horizon real-world tasks.

AI.tldr: WeaveBench是一个包含114个跨8个真实工作领域的长期混合界面基准测试，要求智能体在单次轨迹中结合GUI、CLI和代码操作完成复杂任务。最佳模型通过率仅41.2%，且轨迹感知评估揭示仅凭结果评分会高估智能体性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的计算机使用智能体(CUA)基准测试往往将GUI、CLI、代码编辑和外部工具等接口作为分离的能力分别评估，缺乏对长期跨界面协调能力的检验，因此需要一个能评估智能体在混合界面下长期任务执行能力的基准。
AI.method: 构建包含114个任务的WeaveBench基准，覆盖8个真实工作领域；任务要求智能体在单个轨迹中结合GUI观察/操作与CLI/代码操作；在真实Ubuntu桌面上的CLI智能体运行时中评估，并配备最小桌面控制插件；提出轨迹感知评估器，检查交付物、文件、截图、日志和动作轨迹，同时检测捷径行为。
AI.result: 在多个前沿模型-运行时组合中，最佳PassRate仅达41.2%，说明该基准远未饱和；轨迹感知评估器进一步揭示仅凭结果评分会显著高估智能体性能。
AI.conclusion: WeaveBench暴露了CUA评估中的一个关键空白，为衡量智能体能否在长期真实世界任务中协调GUI、CLI和代码操作提供了有效测试平台。

title: How Far Can Prompting Go for Minimal-Edit Ukrainian Grammatical Error Correction?
summary: Fine-tuned Large Language Models (LLMs) dominate in Ukrainian grammatical error correction (GEC), while API-accessed LLMs remain nearly untested on minimal-edit benchmarks. We evaluate 11 commercial LLMs from four providers and one open-source Ukrainian model on the UNLP 2023 GEC-only benchmark, comparing zero-shot, few-shot, minimal-edits, and LLM-assisted prompt optimization strategies. Our best configuration (Gemini 3.1-Pro) reaches F0.5=69.22, closing over 90% of the gap to fine-tuned SOTA (F0.5=73.14). For zero-shot prompts, only Claude models benefit from Ukrainian instructions. However, the best overall results for all models use Ukrainian minimal-edits prompts, whose language-specific rules require Ukrainian to express precisely. LLM-assisted prompt optimization on top of minimal-edits + few-shot achieves the highest score. Detailed minimal-edits instructions yield the largest gains for punctuation and case errors but cause the model to abandon several low-frequency categories. Delving into error analysis, we identify five recurring overcorrection patterns tied to Ukrainian-specific linguistic phenomena. Code, prompts, and outputs are publicly available.

AI.tldr: 研究了11个商业LLM和一个开源乌克兰语模型在乌克兰语语法纠错任务上的表现，发现Gemini 3.1-Pro结合乌克兰语最小编辑提示和少量示例策略能接近微调SOTA性能（F0.5=69.22 vs 73.14），并识别出五种乌克兰语特有的过度纠正模式。
AI.motivation: 微调LLM在乌克兰语语法纠错中占主导地位，而API访问的LLM在最小编辑基准测试上几乎未被测试，因此希望评估各类LLM在此任务上的表现。
AI.method: 在UNLP 2023 GEC基准上评估了来自4个提供商的11个商业LLM和一个开源乌克兰语模型，比较了零样本、少样本、最小编辑和LLM辅助提示优化策略。
AI.result: 最佳配置Gemini 3.1-Pro达到F0.5=69.22，缩小了与微调SOTA（F0.5=73.14）90%以上的差距。乌克兰语最小编辑提示对所有模型效果最佳，LLM辅助提示优化在最小编辑+少样本基础上达到最高分。
AI.conclusion: 详细的最小编辑指令对标点和大写错误提升最大，但导致模型放弃几个低频类别；识别出五种与乌克兰语特定语言现象相关的过度纠正模式。

title: Where the Score Lives: A Wavelet View of Diffusion
summary: Score-based generative models have had remarkable success over the last decade in generating a diverse set of visually plausible images. A variety of architectures including CNNs, U-Nets, and Transformers have been used as the score-approximation network in such diffusion modeling; however, to date, relatively little is known about how these architectural choices impact generative behavior. In this work, to provide insight into this area, we propose an analytically solvable parameterization of the score function using an expansion in a 2D orthogonal wavelet basis. In particular, we derive interpretable optimal score functions in terms of the moments of the data distribution. We use this parametrization to provide an architecture-agnostic, moment-based analysis that reveals which attributes of the data distribution tend to matter most for denoising. Our score machine is flexible enough to partially mimic the relevant inductive biases of multiple architectures, including U-Nets, and CNNs, taking a step towards understanding why different score architectures can exhibit distinct generative behavior. Since our score is solvable in terms of the moments of the data, we can begin to understand how the data distribution interacts with the score network to produce the behavior we observe in diffusion models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于二维正交小波基可解析求解的分数函数参数化方法，通过数据分布的矩来推导最优分数函数，从而揭示不同架构（如U-Net、CNN）在扩散模型中的归纳偏差和生成行为差异。
AI.motivation: 尽管扩散模型中使用了CNN、U-Net、Transformer等多种架构作为分数近似网络，但目前对这些架构选择如何影响生成行为的理解非常有限。作者希望通过可解析的分数函数来揭示架构、数据分布与生成行为之间的关系。
AI.method: 将分数函数用二维正交小波基展开，利用数据分布的矩推导出可解析求解的最优分数函数，构建了一种称为"分数机器"（score machine）的架构无关参数化方法，能够部分模拟不同架构的归纳偏差。
AI.result: 该方法提供了架构无关的基于矩的分析，揭示了数据分布的哪些属性对去噪最为重要；分数机器能够部分模仿U-Net和CNN等架构的归纳偏差，有助于理解不同分数架构为何表现出不同的生成行为。
AI.conclusion: 由于分数函数可基于数据矩解析求解，该方法为理解数据分布如何与分数网络交互以产生扩散模型中观察到的行为提供了新的视角和理论工具。

title: Bayesian Selective Latent Inference for Wastewater-First Influenza Monitoring
comment: Corresponding authors: Hengguan Huang and Samir Bhatt. Hengguan Huang is the lead corresponding author
summary: Wastewater influenza surveillance can reveal community circulation before clinical reporting, but wastewater alone is not a fully identifiable proxy for human burden. Existing wastewater models assume a fixed evidence set, while generic evidence-acquisition methods treat official surveillance streams as interchangeable costly features. We cast wastewater-first influenza monitoring as a selective decision problem: starting from mandatory wastewater evidence, the system must decide whether wastewater is sufficient, which delayed official stream to query next, and when abstention is the only scientifically defensible action under source ambiguity. We propose Bayesian Selective Latent Inference (BSLI), a principled Bayesian method that maintains a posterior over latent burden and identifiability, certifies answerability through explicit scientific gates, and optimizes query-stop decisions with an exact cost-calibrated Bellman policy. We prove the key variational, answerability, Bellman-optimality, and one-dimensional cost-calibration properties. On a fixed public-data benchmark with 5,933 forecasting episodes and 3,102 source-ambiguity episodes, BSLI improves the matched-budget cost-performance frontier while preserving conservative abstention under source ambiguity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出贝叶斯选择性潜在推断（BSLI），将废水流感监测建模为选择性决策问题，在存在源模糊性的情况下，通过科学门控机制和成本校准的贝尔曼策略优化查询与弃权决策，在基准测试中实现了更优的成本-性能平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有废水监测模型假设固定证据集，而通用证据采集方法将官方监测流视为可互换的昂贵特征。缺乏一个能够从废水证据出发、动态决定是否需要额外官方数据、以及在源模糊情况下何时弃权的原则性框架。
AI.method: 提出BSLI方法：1）维护潜在负担和可识别性的后验分布；2）通过显式科学门控机制认证可回答性；3）使用精确成本校准的贝尔曼策略优化查询-停止决策；4）证明了变分性、可回答性、贝尔曼最优性和一维成本校准性质。
AI.result: 在包含5,933个预测片段和3,102个源模糊片段的固定公共数据基准上，BSLI在匹配预算下改善了成本-性能前沿，同时在源模糊情况下保持了保守弃权策略。
AI.conclusion: BSLI提供了一种原则性的贝叶斯框架，能够动态权衡废水证据的充分性与额外官方数据的成本，在源模糊时科学地选择弃权，优于现有方法。

title: Multi-Hop Knowledge Composition is Bound by Pretraining Exposure
summary: Large Language Models fail at implicit multi-hop reasoning: a model answers "When was $X$ born?" and "Who is $Y$'s closest friend?" correctly but fails on "When was $Y$'s closest friend born?" in a single forward pass, even when both facts are perfectly memorized and individually retrievable. We study this failure in a controlled natural language setting with a strict separation between individuals exposed to compositional contexts during pretraining and those that never appear in any such context. We confirm that compositional failure persists even at 97% 1-hop accuracy, establishing the gap as a pretraining failure rather than a knowledge absence. We propose and test nine data-centric augmentation formats and find that compositional pretraining transfers to unseen questions for exposed individuals, but never to individuals absent from compositional pretraining, suggesting that exposure to compositional contexts during pretraining is a necessary condition for implicit multi-hop reasoning.

AI.tldr: LLM在隐式多跳推理中失败：即使1跳准确率高达97%，也无法回答需要组合两个已知事实的问题，且组合预训练只能迁移到预训练中见过的个体，无法泛化到未见个体。
AI.motivation: 探究LLM在隐式多跳推理任务中失败的根本原因——究竟是知识缺失还是预训练本身的缺陷。
AI.method: 在受控自然语言环境下，严格区分组合上下文预训练中出现和未出现的个体，测试9种数据增强格式，分析组合推理能力的迁移情况。
AI.result: 即使1跳准确率达97%，组合失败依然存在；组合预训练可迁移到预训练中见过的个体，但完全无法泛化到未见个体。
AI.conclusion: 组合上下文暴露是LLM获得隐式多跳推理能力的必要条件，当前预训练过程中缺乏足够的组合上下文是导致该能力缺失的核心原因。

title: Orthogonality and Dimensionality in Airline Cluster Analysis using PCA and Kernel PCA
summary: To characterize the US airline profit cycles from 1995 to 2020, the authors of Renold et al. (2023) combine k-means clustering, principal component analysis, and system dynamic modelling. We replicate their clustering experiment in three spaces -- the original 7-dimensional raw-variable space, a 3-dimensional PC score space, and a 4-dimensional PC score space using their dataset gratefully included in the paper. We show that the six-cluster taxonomy is geometrically robust: k-means in 3-PC space produces bit-for-bit identical cluster assignments relative to 7D raw space. As a nonlinearity check we apply kernel PCA under six kernels spanning three families plus a linear baseline. All six kernels preserve the six-cluster assignment in 2D. A 1D diagnostic tightens this: the linear kernel conflates the COVID year C_3 with the peak-profit cluster C_0, whereas all five non-baseline kernels shift C_3 to overlap only the post-financial-crisis cluster C_5. Agreement across the kernel families confirms an intrinsically linear manifold with no hidden curvature. The silhouette criterion reveals that the dataset structurally supports only three clusters, not six. Collinearity in the raw 7D space suppresses the silhouette signal that would otherwise identify k=3 as the structurally motivated choice.

AI.tldr: 本研究复现了Renold等人（2023）对美国航空业利润周期（1995-2020）的聚类分析，发现六分类聚类在几何上是稳健的，但通过核PCA和轮廓系数诊断表明，数据本质上只支持三分类，七维空间中的共线性掩盖了这一结构。
AI.motivation: 验证Renold等人提出的六分类聚类的鲁棒性，并检查数据流形是否存在非线性结构，以确定聚类数量的合理性。
AI.method: 在原始7维空间、3维和4维PC得分空间进行k-means聚类复现；采用六种核函数（含线性基线）进行核PCA降维至2D和1D，检查聚类分配一致性；使用轮廓系数（Silhouette criterion）评估最优聚类数。
AI.result: 六分类在3-PC空间与7D原始空间的聚类分配逐位一致；所有核函数在2D中均保留六分类；1D诊断显示线性核将COVID年份C_3与峰值利润簇C_0混淆，而非线性核将C_3移至仅与金融危机后簇C_5重叠；轮廓系数表明数据实际支持三分类而非六分类。
AI.conclusion: 数据流形本质上是线性的，不存在隐藏曲率；原始7D空间的共线性抑制了轮廓系数信号，导致六分类看似合理但实际过度聚类，三分类才是结构上更合理的选择。

title: SIFT: Selective-Index For Fast Compute of RAG Prefill by Exploiting Attention Invariance
summary:
Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) injects LLM queries with relevant documents to improve response quality. This injection increases prompt length and slows time to first token (TTFT).
