Experiments on standard benchmarks demonstrate that COLD consistently outperforms a broad range of state-of-the-art CL methods while providing competitive and controllable forgetting behavior through explicit regulation of stability and plasticity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出COLD框架，基于控制论视角和漂移加惩罚(DPP)原则，通过虚拟队列机制显式调控遗忘演化，在保持稳定性的同时实现持续学习，理论证明其稳定性与收敛性，实验超越多种SOTA方法。
AI.motivation: 现有持续学习方法缺乏对遗忘过程的显式调控机制，难以在稳定性和可塑性之间实现可控的权衡。
AI.method: 提出COLD（基于DPP原则）和COLD-ORACLE（参考基准），通过虚拟队列跟踪长期稳定性偏差，将稳定性-可塑性权衡建模为受控动态过程，并引入可调控制参数。
AI.result: 在标准基准上，COLD持续超越多种SOTA持续学习方法，并通过显式稳定性-可塑性调控实现有竞争力的、可控的遗忘行为。
AI.conclusion: 控制论视角下的DPP框架能有效解决持续学习中的灾难性遗忘问题，提供理论保证的同时在实践中表现优异。

title: From 0-to-1 to 1-to-N: Reproducible Engineering Evidence for MetaAI Recursive Self-Design
summary: Recursive self-design refers to AI-assisted modification of the mechanisms by which an AI system is built, evaluated, and improved. This paper treats MetaAI not as a mature paradigm, but as a working term for a human-seeded, AI-expanded development pattern in which the design space itself becomes a target of modification. We propose an operational evidence framework with four criteria: inspectable target system, meta-level modifier, feedback-directed selection, and recursive continuation. We then map public systems, including Darwin Goedel Machine (DGM), STOP, Goedel Agent, and ShinkaEvolve, against these criteria. DGM provides the most direct currently reported evidence: its published results show improvement from 20% to 50% on SWE-bench Verified and from 14.2% to 30.7% on full Polyglot after 80 iterations, with ablations suggesting that both open-ended exploration and self-improvement contribute. Finally, we provide MetaAI-Mini, a reproducible HumanEval-based protocol and codebase. Because no completed model run is included in this build, MetaAI-Mini is reported as a protocol rather than as an experimental result.

AI.tldr: 本文提出元AI并非成熟范式，而是人类播种、AI扩展的开发模式，并构建了四标准操作证据框架（可检查目标系统、元层修改器、反馈导向选择、递归延续）。通过映射DGM、STOP、Goedel Agent、ShinkaEvolve等系统，发现DGM在SWE-bench上从20%提升至50%最直接支持该框架。最后提供MetaAI-Mini可重复协议。
AI.motivation: 现有AI系统缺乏对自身设计空间进行修改的能力，作者试图将"递归自设计"从概念转化为可操作、可验证的实证框架，解决元AI缺乏统一评估标准的问题。
AI.method: 提出四标准操作证据框架（可检查目标系统、元层修改器、反馈导向选择、递归延续），对DGM、STOP、Goedel Agent、ShinkaEvolve四个公开系统进行映射分析，并设计了MetaAI-Mini可重复实验协议。
AI.result: DGM在80次迭代后，SWE-bench Verified从20%提升至50%，Polyglot从14.2%提升至30.7%。消融实验表明开放探索和自我改进均贡献显著。其他系统（STOP、Goedel Agent、ShinkaEvolve）映射结果未在摘要中详述。
AI.conclusion: DGM是目前最直接的元AI递归自设计证据；MetaAI-Mini作为可重复协议发布（不含已完成模型运行），为后续研究提供标准化基准。

title: DECSELFMASK: Leveraging Unlabeled Text via Self-Relevance-Guided Masking for Decoder-Only Classification
summary: Classification tasks require annotated data, which can often be expensive, time-consuming, or even unfeasible to collect. This is the case of the medical domain, where large datasets often have few annotated examples. To address this, we propose DecSelfMask (Decoder Self-learning by Masking), an approach to enhance decoder-only performance on classification tasks. We build on common self-learning approaches by leveraging a model to create training examples from unlabeled data to propose a novel relevance-guided masking strategy. We use relevance attribution methods to determine what portions of unannotated texts are relevant for a task. We then create self-supervised training examples by masking out those portions, training the model to reconstruct them via next-token-prediction. We hypothesize that those examples convey knowledge about the structure and semantics of unannotated data that can be useful for downstream performance. We test our approach on 136 tasks from a collection of 1.9M clinical notes from an Italian hospital. We quantify DecSelfMask's impact on downstream tasks on 5 models of different scales and families, including a probing analysis. Experiments show consistent gains, outperforming standard supervised fine-tuning approaches (+19.9 points in Macro F1), synthetic label generation (+12.5), and continual pretraining (+6.3), as well as common baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出DecSelfMask方法，通过相关性引导的掩码策略从无标注临床文本中生成自监督训练样本，在1.9M意大利临床笔记、136个任务上显著提升解码器分类性能。
AI.motivation: 医疗领域标注数据获取昂贵耗时，大量无标注数据未被充分利用，需要一种方法从无标注数据中有效提取知识来提升分类任务性能。
AI.method: 利用相关性归因方法识别无标注文本中对目标任务重要的部分，将其掩码后训练模型通过next-token-prediction进行重构，从而生成自监督训练样本。
AI.result: 在136个任务、5种不同规模和家族的模型上验证，Macro F1比标准监督微调高19.9分，比合成标签生成高12.5分，比持续预训练高6.3分。
AI.conclusion: DecSelfMask通过掩码任务相关区域构建自监督样本，能有效利用无标注数据提升解码器分类性能，在医疗领域显著优于现有方法。

title: Beyond Linear Activation Steering: Invertible Latent Transformations for Controlling LLM Behavior
summary: Activation steering provides a lightweight inference-time mechanism for controlling large language models (LLMs) by modifying their internal activation vectors toward desired behaviors. Most existing methods compute a fixed steering direction in the original activation space, typically from pairs of contrastive examples using mean differences, linear probes, or arbitrary separability criteria. While effective to a certain extent, these methods treat behavioral control as a global, linear, additive offset: the same direction is applied across inputs, and behaviors are linearly separable. This can be restrictive when behavioral features vary nonlinearly across the activation space or lie on curved and anisotropic manifolds, where the optimal intervention may be input-dependent. To address this limitation, we propose INNSteer, a nonlinear activation steering framework based on invertible latent transformations. Rather than searching for a better steering vector in the original representation space, INNSteer learns a lightweight invertible neural network $φ$ that maps an LLM's activations into a latent space where behavioral classes are more amenable to linear control. At inference time, activations are mapped through $φ$, steered in the latent space, and mapped back through the exact inverse transformation $φ^{-1}$. This makes a simple latent-space translation become a nonlinear, input-dependent intervention in the original activation space. Across experiment settings on multiple LLM families, scales, behavioral traits, and safety benchmarks, INNSteer consistently improves model control over linear, transport-based, and nonlinear steering baselines while largely preserving generation fluency.

AI.tldr: 提出INNSteer，一种基于可逆神经网络的非线性激活操控框架，通过将LLM激活映射到更易线性控制的潜空间进行操控，比传统线性方法更有效且保持生成流畅性。
AI.motivation: 现有激活操控方法将行为控制视为全局线性加性偏移，忽略了激活空间中行为特征的非线性分布和各向异性流形结构，导致最优干预依赖于输入但无法自适应。
AI.method: 学习一个轻量级可逆神经网络φ，将LLM激活映射到潜空间；在潜空间进行线性平移（线性操控）；通过逆变换φ⁻¹将操控后的激活映射回原始激活空间，实现非线性、输入依赖的干预。
AI.result: 在多种LLM家族、规模、行为特质和安全基准上，INNSteer一致优于线性、传输-based和非线性操控基线，同时很大程度上保持生成流畅性。
AI.conclusion: 非线性可逆潜变换方法能有效突破线性操控的限制，实现更灵活、输入自适应的激活干预，是更好的模型行为控制方案。

title: Frequency-based Constrained Sampling for Interval Patterns
summary: Output space pattern sampling is a powerful alternative to exhaustive pattern mining for exploring large pattern spaces, as it enables users to focus on representative patterns drawn according to a chosen interestingness measure. In this paper, we address the problem of sampling interval patterns under user-defined syntactic constraints. We introduce CFips, a sampling approach that incorporates constraints directly into the sampling procedure. The approach relies on a multi-step sampling framework and supports several syntactic constraints by decomposing them into elementary predicates on interval bounds while preserving exact sampling guarantees. We formally prove that CFips samples interval patterns proportionally to their frequency within the constrained pattern space. The experimental results show that integrating constraints into the sampling procedure enables to complete mining tasks that would otherwise fail within a given time out.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CFips方法，通过将用户定义的语法约束直接融入采样过程，实现按频率比例采样区间模式，解决了传统穷举模式挖掘在大型模式空间中的效率问题。
AI.motivation: 传统穷举模式挖掘在处理大型模式空间时效率低下，而现有采样方法难以支持用户定义的结构化约束，导致无法在合理时间内完成挖掘任务。
AI.method: 提出CFips采样框架，将语法约束分解为区间边界的基本谓词，采用多步采样策略，在保持精确采样保证的同时将约束直接整合到采样过程中。
AI.result: 实验证明，将约束融入采样过程后，能够完成在给定超时条件下原本会失败的挖掘任务。
AI.conclusion: CFips通过约束驱动的采样方法，在保证按频率比例采样的前提下，显著提升了大型区间模式空间中的挖掘可行性。

title: A Finetuned SpeechLLM for Joint Multi-Granular L2 Assessment and Natural-Language Rationales
comment: Accepted to Interspeech 2026. This publication is part of the project Responsible AI for Voice Diagnostics (RAIVD) with file number NGF.1607.22.013 of the research programme NGF AiNed Fellowship Grants, which is financed by the Dutch Research Council (NWO)
summary: Automated L2 speech assessment can assign proficiency labels, but often lacks interpretability. We propose a rubric-guided SpeechLLM for multi-aspect, multi-granular assessment, trained with a hybrid objective combining supervised fine-tuning and Bounded Direct Preference Optimization. The model jointly predicts ordinal labels at the sentence-level (accuracy, fluency, prosody), word/phoneme-level accuracy, and generates a natural-language rationale in the same response. On SpeechOcean762, our approach matches or outperforms single-granularity models while remaining competitive with prior approaches. We analyze rationale reliability along two axes: self-consistency with model predictions and alignment with ground-truth labels, using sentiment consistency (plausibility) and mention-based agreement (faithfulness). Rationales are plausible at the sentence level, but faithfulness degrades at the word/phoneme level: references are sparse and weakly aligned with token-level labels.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于 rubric 引导的 SpeechLLM，用于多维度、多粒度的自动化 L2 语音评估。模型通过监督微调和有界直接偏好优化的混合目标训练，能同时输出句子级（准确度、流利度、韵律）、词/音素级标签，并生成自然语言理由。在 SpeechOcean762 上表现优异，但理由在词/音素层面的忠实度较低。
AI.motivation: 现有自动化 L2 语音评估方法只能给出熟练度标签，缺乏可解释性。
AI.method: 提出 rubric-guided SpeechLLM，采用监督微调 + Bounded Direct Preference Optimization 的混合目标训练，联合预测多粒度标签并生成自然语言理由。
AI.result: 在 SpeechOcean762 上匹配或优于单粒度模型；理由在句子层面合理，但在词/音素层面忠实度下降，与 token 级标签对齐弱。
AI.conclusion: 模型在多维度评估上表现良好，但细粒度理由生成的可信度仍需提升。

title: The Confidence Trap: Calibration Attacks for Graph Neural Networks
summary: While confidence calibration is essential for trustworthy decision-making in safety-critical applications, the robustness of calibrated GNNs to adversarial structural perturbations remains largely unexplored. However, studying calibration attacks on graphs presents unique technical challenges: (1) the discrete nature of graph structures complicates gradient-based optimization, (2) existing underconfidence objectives fail to drive predictions toward uniform distributions, and (3) GNNs are highly sensitive to edge perturbations, often causing unintended label changes that violate attack constraints. To address these challenges, we propose a \textbf{Unified Graph Calibration Attack (UGCA)} framework designed for \textbf{worst-case (white-box) analysis} of GNN calibration robustness. UGCA introduces a KL-divergence loss to encourage uniform predictive distributions, a reranking mechanism to reduce label flipping, a hybrid loss to recover labels when violations occur, and beam search to explore a broader adversarial search space. We further provide theoretical insights linking model generalization, dataset complexity, and calibration vulnerability, showing that models with higher accuracy or trained on datasets with more classes are more susceptible under this threat model. Extensive experiments demonstrate that UGCA substantially increases Expected Calibration Error while preserving classification accuracy. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/CaptainCuong/Graph-Calibration-Attack.git.

AI.tldr: 本文提出统一图校准攻击框架(UGCA)，用于评估图神经网络在对抗性结构扰动下的校准鲁棒性，通过KL散度损失、重排序机制、混合损失和波束搜索等方法，有效提升期望校准误差同时保持分类精度。
AI.motivation: 尽管置信度校准对安全关键应用中的可信决策至关重要，但校准后的GNN对对抗性结构扰动的鲁棒性尚未被探索。此外，图上的校准攻击面临离散图结构、欠自信目标失效及边缘扰动敏感等独特技术挑战。
AI.method: 提出UGCA框架，包含：(1)KL散度损失鼓励均匀预测分布；(2)重排序机制减少标签翻转；(3)混合损失在违规时恢复标签；(4)波束搜索扩展对抗搜索空间。提供理论分析关联模型泛化、数据集复杂度与校准脆弱性。
AI.result: 实验表明UGCA显著增加期望校准误差(ECE)，同时保持分类精度。高精度模型或更多类别的数据集更容易受到此类攻击。
AI.conclusion: UGCA有效评估了GNN校准鲁棒性，揭示了校准脆弱性与模型精度、数据集类别的关联，为安全关键应用中的可信图学习提供了重要启示。

title: SpatialWorld: Benchmarking Interactive Spatial Reasoning of Multimodal Agents in Real-World Tasks
summary: Spatial reasoning is a foundational capability for multimodal large language models (MLLMs) to perceive and operate within the physical world. However, existing benchmarks predominantly rely on passive evaluation (e.g., static VQA) or simulator-specific pipelines, failing to assess general interactive spatial understanding. We introduce SpatialWorld, a unified benchmark designed specifically for evaluating the interactive spatial understanding of multimodal agents in complex real-world tasks. Integrating eight heterogeneous simulation backends under a shared, simulator-agnostic protocol, SpatialWorld features 760 human-annotated tasks across diverse domains (e.g., household routines, travel, social collaboration). Agents must solve tasks under vision-only partial observability, actively gathering egocentric visual evidence and expressing decisions via a unified, text-based action interface native to MLLMs. For reliable evaluation, each task includes a human-validated initial state, a reference trajectory, and a terminal-state verifier. Evaluating 15 advanced agents reveals that robust spatial task solving remains challenging: the strongest model, GPT-5, achieves an average task success rate (TSR) of only 17.4%, while the leading open-source model, Qwen-3.5, reaches 14.1%. Further analysis exposes a clear mismatch between task success and execution efficiency, alongside substantial domain-specific performance variations. These bottlenecks in active exploration and long-horizon planning position SpatialWorld as a rigorous testbed for future spatial agents.

AI.tldr: SpatialWorld是一个专门评估多模态大语言模型在复杂真实世界中交互式空间理解能力的统一基准。它整合了8种异构仿真后端，包含760个人工标注任务，涵盖家庭日常、旅行、社交协作等领域。评估显示最强模型GPT-5任务成功率仅17.4%，表明主动探索和长期规划仍是主要瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 现有基准多依赖被动评估或特定仿真器，无法评估智能体在通用交互式空间理解中的能力，因此需要构建一个统一的、面向真实复杂任务的评估基准。
AI.method: 整合8种异构仿真后端，采用统一协议；设计760个人工标注任务；智能体在视觉部分可观测条件下主动收集证据，通过统一文本动作接口表达决策；每个任务包含人工验证的初始状态、参考轨迹和终端状态验证器。
AI.result: 评估15个先进智能体，GPT-5平均任务成功率仅17.4%，开源模型Qwen-3.5达14.1%；任务成功与执行效率之间存在明显不匹配，且在不同领域表现差异显著。
AI.conclusion: 主动探索和长期规划是当前空间智能体的主要瓶颈，SpatialWorld为未来空间智能体研究提供了严格的测试平台。

title: Memory Beyond Recall: A Dual-Process Cognitive Memory System for Self-Evolving LLM Agents
summary: Long-term memory for an LLM agent is more than retrieving the right passage at the right time. Current memory systems collapse belief revision, causal coupling, and cross-domain abstraction into a single retrieval surface tuned for surface recall, and consequently struggle on implicit personalisation that requires reasoning over how a user has evolved. We propose DCPM, which reorganises agent memory along a cognitive capability hierarchy ascending from raw inputs and atomic facts, through diachronic belief trajectories and identity, to domain schemas, latent intentions and cross-domain patterns. The hierarchy is driven by two processes inheriting the architectural split of dual-process theory: a synchronous daytime writer (System1) that records belief revisions as doubly linked supersedes chains, and an asynchronous nighttime engine (System2) that induces schemas and intentions and sweeps for cross-domain collisions abstracted into higher-level core schemas. On LongMemEval, PersonaMem and PersonaMem-v2, enabling System2 contributes most where the benchmark rewards implicit cross-session inference (up to +5.20 on PersonaMem-v2) and least on span recall, matching the architectural prediction.

AI.tldr: DCPM是一个基于双过程理论的分层认知记忆系统，通过日间写入（System1）和夜间归纳（System2）两个过程，将智能体记忆从原始输入到跨域模式按认知能力层级组织，有效提升跨会话隐式推理能力。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM智能体的记忆系统将所有类型的信息（信念修正、因果耦合、跨域抽象）压缩到一个单一的检索平面上，仅优化表面回忆，难以处理需要推理用户演变的隐式个性化任务。
AI.method: 提出DCPM框架，按认知能力层级组织记忆：从原始输入和原子事实，经过历时信念轨迹和身份，到领域模式、潜在意图和跨域模式。采用双过程理论架构：同步的日间写入器（System1）记录信念修订为双向链接的替代链；异步的夜间引擎（System2）归纳模式和意图，扫描跨域冲突并抽象为更高层次的核心模式。
AI.result: 在LongMemEval、PersonaMem和PersonaMem-v2基准上，System2对需要隐式跨会话推理的任务贡献最大（PersonaMem-v2上提升高达+5.20），对跨度回忆任务贡献最小，与架构预测一致。
AI.conclusion: 将认知层级分离与双过程理论结合的记忆系统，能有效增强智能体在隐式个性化推理上的表现，验证了"将不同类型记忆按认知深度分层处理"这一设计原则的有效性。

title: Physically Consistent Null Space Alignment for Detection of Low-Magnitude False Data Injection Attacks
summary: False data injection attacks (FDIAs) introducing small measurement perturbations can still cause large deviations in power system state estimation when the injected signals align with the pseudo-null space of the system model. Existing model- and data-driven detectors may fail to identify such low-magnitude but high-impact attacks because residual tests ignore changes hidden in the pseudo-null space, while subspace learning methods capture correlation patterns without enforcing physical consistency. This paper proposes Physically Consistent Null Space Alignment (PCNSA), a framework that detects stealthy FDIAs by preserving, through preprocessing, the geometric correspondence between the physical null space and the measurement-derived pseudo-null space. The key point is a Pseudo-null Space Conserved data Preprocessing (PSCP) step that re-expresses measurements in the physical coordinate frame before subspace extraction. We prove that PSCP preserves the separation between row space and its orthogonal complement, a property that conventional per-feature standardization violates. This keeps the singular value decomposition (SVD)-derived pseudo-null subspace aligned with the physical residual space without explicit knowledge of H. Experiments on IEEE 14-, 30-, 57-, and 118-bus systems confirm this principle in practice: stealthy attacks that evade XTM, LSTM, AE and Isolation Forest baselines appear as clear deviations in the aligned subspace, yielding higher F1-score and detection accuracy while remaining robust under partial observability and realistic PMU noise.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PCNSA框架，通过保留物理零空间与测量伪零空间的几何对齐，检测传统方法难以识别的低幅高影响隐形虚假数据注入攻击，在多个IEEE系统上取得优于XGBoost、LSTM、AE和Isolation Forest的检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有模型驱动与数据驱动检测器无法有效识别与系统伪零空间对齐的低幅值隐蔽FDIA，因为残差检验忽略该空间变化，而子空间学习方法虽能捕获相关模式却缺乏物理一致性约束。
AI.method: 提出物理一致性零空间对齐（PCNSA）框架，核心是伪零空间守恒数据预处理（PSCP），将测量值重新表达至物理坐标框架再进行子空间提取，证明PSCP能保持行空间与其正交补的分离性，使SVD导出的伪零子空间与物理残差空间对齐。
AI.result: 在IEEE 14、30、57、118节点系统上实验表明，可检测XGBoost、LSTM、AE和Isolation Forest无法识别的隐蔽攻击，获得更高的F1分数和检测准确率，且在部分可观性和PMU噪声下保持鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过几何对齐物理零空间与测量伪零空间，可在无需显式系统模型H的情况下有效检测隐形FDIA，验证了物理一致性数据预处理对提升检测性能的关键作用。

title: Correlation Is Not Enough: Embedding Human Metadata for Individual Causal Discovery
summary:
Ask a pretrained biomedical language model whether "cortisol 28 ug/dL" and "stock-market volatility" are related, and it returns a cosine similarity of 0.83 on a scale where 1.0 means identical. The two share no mechanism. This is not a corner case: every off-the-shelf biomedical encoder we tested (BioBERT, PubMedBERT, BioM-ELECTRA) scores unrelated cross-domain pairs between 0.76 and 0.92 when the answer should be near zero. Accuracy on cross-domain discrimination is 0%.
  Retrieval systems survive this, because a language model downstream filters the noise. A Large Behavioural Model (LBM), a foundation model whose subject is a person rather than a sentence, does not: it reasons over a graph of a user's life and treats embedding proximity as evidence that two events are causally linked. False proximity writes a false causal edge, and everything downstream inherits the error. Here, embedding geometry is not a tuning knob; it is correctness.
  We report the fix. A contrastive pass over 72,034 pairs raises PubMedBERT BIOSSES correlation from 0.633 to 0.828 and within-vs-across-domain separation from 1.05x to 1.63x. A second pass, BODHI, mines hard negatives from edges absent in a biomedical knowledge graph and lifts separation to 2.30x and the discrimination gap to +0.392, at a 4.5% BIOSSES cost. On an Intel Xeon 6737P with AMX, OpenVINO cuts single-query latency from 1367 ms to 10 ms (133x) and reaches 555 sentences/sec. One finding contradicts standard advice: FP16 beats INT8 on this silicon at every serving batch size, and we explain why. The same model on a no-AMX Ice Lake instance runs 13-27x slower. We release the benchmark suite, training corpora, the BODHI generator, and the OpenVINO scripts.

AI.tldr: 论文发现预训练生物医学语言模型（如BioBERT、PubMedBERT）对跨领域无关样本（如"皮质醇28 ug/dL"与"股市波动性"）给出虚假高余弦相似度（0.76-0.92），跨领域判别准确率为0%。这一问题对大型行为模型（LBM）危害尤为严重，因其将嵌入邻近性视为因果证据。作者提出对比学习修正方案：第一次对比训练（72,034对）将PubMedBERT的BIOSSES相关性从0.633提升至0.828，跨领域分离度从1.05x提升至1.63x；第二次BODHI训练通过生物医学知识图谱挖掘困难负样本，将分离度提升至2.30x，判别差距达+0.392，仅以4.5%的BIOSSES性能为代价。在Intel Xeon 6737P上配合OpenVINO推理优化，单查询延迟从1367ms降至10ms（133倍加速），吞吐量达555句/秒。发现FP16优于INT8，并解释了原因。
AI.motivation: 预训练生物医学语言模型对语义无关的跨领域样本产生虚假高相似度，大型行为模型（LBM）依赖嵌入相似度推断因果关系，这种虚假邻近性会引入错误因果边，导致下游推理彻底出错。现有检索系统可通过下游模型过滤噪声，但LBM没有这种保护机制。
AI.method: (1) 第一轮对比学习：用72,034对样本对PubMedBERT进行对比训练；(2) BODHI方法：从生物医学知识图谱中挖掘缺失边的样本作为困难负样本，进行第二轮对比训练；(3) OpenVINO+AMX推理优化，对比FP16与INT8精度选择。
AI.result: PubMedBERT BIOSSES相关性从0.633提升至0.828，跨领域分离度从1.05x提升至1.63x（第一轮）；BODHI进一步将分离度提升至2.30x，判别差距达+0.392，BIOSSES仅下降4.5%。OpenVINO+AMX实现133倍加速，FP16在所有批量大小下优于INT8。
AI.conclusion: 对比学习能有效修复生物医学语言模型的虚假跨领域相似度问题；针对LBM场景，知识图谱引导的困难负样本挖掘（BODHI）效果更优；AMX硬件加速结合OpenVINO可实现实用部署；FP16在AMX上优于INT8，推翻了常规建议。

title: Detecting Differences Is Not Understanding Structure: Large Language Models Fail at Graph Isomorphism
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have shown impressive performance on diverse reasoning tasks, yet their capacity for structural reasoning in graphs remains unclear. We investigate whether LLMs can genuinely understand graph isomorphism -a fundamental problem in graph theory. While LLMs achieve near-perfect accuracy on isomorphism detection, we show this performance is illusory. When identical graphs are presented with permuted node labels, LLMs fail to identify their isomorphism. This finding suggests that LLMs exploit patterns rather than reasoning about abstract graph structure. Since permutation invariance is a fundamental requirement for valid structural reasoning, these results indicate that success on graph reasoning benchmarks should not be interpreted as evidence of genuine topological understanding.

AI.tldr: LLM在图同构检测中表现优异，但无法识别节点标签置换后的同构图，表明其依赖模式匹配而非真正的结构推理。
AI.motivation: 探究LLM是否真正具备图结构推理能力，而非仅依赖于表面模式。
AI.method: 设计实验：将相同图结构的节点标签进行置换，测试LLM能否识别同构关系。
AI.result: LLM在标准同构检测中接近完美，但在标签置换后无法识别同构，暴露了其推理的虚假性。
AI.conclusion: LLM在图推理基准上的成功不能视为其具备真正的拓扑理解能力，因为置换不变性是结构推理的基础要求。

title: Inferring hidden forcing in a biological oscillator using Kolmogorov-Arnold networks
summary: Inferring the forces that drive a dynamical system from partial observations is a fundamental challenge across physics, particularly when distinct underlying mechanisms produce similar observable dynamics. Here we show that the effective muscular forcing underlying avian respiratory dynamics can be reconstructed from measurements of air-sac pressure alone. Using an interpretable learning framework based on Kolmogorov-Arnold networks, we infer the governing equations of the system directly from data and uncover a nontrivial structure in the underlying forcing that is not apparent from the pressure signal, which instead suggests a relaxation-like oscillation. The reconstructed dynamics predict a two-phase activation pattern within each respiratory cycle, which we independently validate through electromyographic recordings of expiratory muscles. These results demonstrate that data-driven reconstruction of dynamical laws can reveal hidden physical structure and provide access to unobserved driving variables, establishing a general route to infer latent forces in partially observed dynamical systems.

AI.tldr: 利用Kolmogorov-Arnold网络从部分观测数据（气压）中重建鸟类呼吸系统的有效肌肉驱动力，揭示了隐藏的两阶段激活模式，并通过肌电记录验证。
AI.motivation: 从部分观测中推断驱动动力系统的力是物理学中的基本挑战，尤其是当不同机制产生相似的观测动力学时。本文旨在解决这一问题。
AI.method: 采用基于Kolmogorov-Arnold网络的可解释学习框架，直接从数据中推断系统的控制方程。
AI.result: 成功从气囊压力信号中重建出有效肌肉驱动力，发现了一种并非压力信号直接显示的非平凡强迫结构，并预测了每个呼吸周期内的两阶段激活模式，该模式通过呼气肌的肌电记录得到独立验证。
AI.conclusion: 数据驱动的动力学定律重建能够揭示隐藏的物理结构，并提供对未观测驱动变量的访问，为部分观测动力系统中推断潜在力建立了一条通用路径。

title: (Auto)formalization is supposed to be easy: Trellis process semantics for spelling out rigorous proofs
summary: We present Trellis: an autoformalization system that leverages LLM agents in a deterministically constrained workflow to enforce incremental progress in Lean autoformalization tasks through iterative refinement of natural language proofs. Our approach is motivated by the common mathematician's notion of what it means to have a rigorous proof in the first place: namely, that it would be routine to elaborate any part of the proof in further detail. The result is a system which aims to achieve reliable autoformalization on a modest budget and with generalist agents, with specialization to autoformalization coming not from any task-specific agent training but instead from a meaning-of-rigor inspired workflow enforced by process semantics. We link to an end-to-end Lean formalization of a recent Ramsey theory breakthrough produced by the process.

AI.tldr: Trellis是一个利用LLM代理在确定性约束工作流中通过迭代精炼自然语言证明来实现Lean自动形式化的系统，其设计灵感来源于数学家对"严谨证明"的理解——即证明的任何部分都可以被例行展开为更详细的内容。
AI.motivation: 受数学家对"严谨证明"的直观理解启发——即证明的任何部分都可以被例行地进一步详细阐述。目标是实现可靠且预算适中的自动形式化，使用通用型代理而非专门训练的代理。
AI.method: 利用LLM代理在确定性约束工作流中运行，通过迭代精炼自然语言证明来逐步推进Lean自动形式化任务。系统的专业性不是来自任务特定的代理训练，而是来自受"严谨性含义"启发的工作流，通过过程语义强制执行。
AI.result: 生成了一个端到端的Lean形式化证明，该证明涉及一项最新的Ramsey理论突破性成果。
AI.conclusion: Trellis能够在适度预算下使用通用代理实现可靠的自动形式化，其核心创新在于工作流设计而非代理本身的专业化训练。

title: Self-Harness: Harnesses That Improve Themselves
summary: The performance of LLM-based agents is jointly shaped by their base models and the harnesses that mediate their interaction with the environment. Because different models exhibit distinct behaviors, effective harness design is inherently model-specific. Yet agent harnesses are still largely engineered by human experts, a paradigm that scales poorly as modern LLMs become increasingly diverse and rapidly evolving. In this paper, we introduce Self-Harness, a new paradigm in which an LLM-based agent improves its own operating harness, without relying on human engineers or stronger external agents. We operationalize Self-Harness as an iterative loop with three stages: Weakness Mining, which identifies model-specific failure patterns from execution traces; Harness Proposal, which generates diverse yet minimal harness modifications tied to these failures; and Proposal Validation, which accepts candidate edits only after regression testing. We instantiate Self-Harness on Terminal-Bench-2.0 using a minimal initial harness and three base models from diverse families: MiniMax M2.5, Qwen3.5-35B-A3B, and GLM-5. Across all three models, Self-Harness consistently improves performance, with held-out pass rates increasing from 40.5% to 61.9%, 23.8% to 38.1%, and 42.9% to 57.1%, respectively. Qualitative analyses further show that Self-Harness does not simply add generic instructions, but effectively turns model-specific weaknesses into concrete, executable harness changes. These results suggest a path toward LLM-based agents that are not merely shaped by their harnesses, but can also participate in reshaping them.

AI.tldr: 提出Self-Harness范式，让LLM智能体自主迭代改进自身操作框架（harness），无需人类专家或外部更强模型，在三个不同基座模型上持续提升性能（如MiniMax M2.5从40.5%提升至61.9%）。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体的harness（操作框架）设计依赖人类专家，但不同基座模型行为各异，需要模型特定的harness设计。随着模型多样化和快速迭代，人工设计范式扩展性差。
AI.method: Self-Harness三阶段迭代循环：1) Weakness Mining - 从执行轨迹中识别模型特定的失败模式；2) Harness Proposal - 针对失败模式生成多样化且最小化的harness修改；3) Proposal Validation - 通过回归测试验证候选修改。
AI.result: 在Terminal-Bench-2.0上使用三种不同基座模型（MiniMax M2.5、Qwen3.5-35B-A3B、GLM-5），held-out通过率分别从40.5%→61.9%、23.8%→38.1%、42.9%→57.1%。定性分析表明方法能将模型特定弱点转化为具体可执行的harness变更。
AI.conclusion: Self-Harness展示了LLM智能体不仅能被harness塑造，还能参与重塑自身操作框架的新路径，为自动化、模型自适应的智能体系统设计提供了可行方向。

title: Adaptive Loss Balancing for Noise-Robust GRPO in Generative Recommendation
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) presents a promising avenue for enhancing generative recommendation beyond supervised imitation, leveraging reward signals to guide policy improvement. However, its efficacy is critically contingent on the trustworthiness of the reward model for the samples it evaluates. In practice, production rankers, the widely adopted reward models, are trained on exposure-biased logs, leading to sample-dependent inaccuracies that violate this assumption. Our stratified analysis uncovers a consistent pattern: reward guidance is most beneficial when the policy exhibits uncertainty and the ranker can effectively discriminate the ground-truth item from rollout negatives. On other samples, the reward signal is either negligible or detrimental, highlighting the risk of uniform RL application. To address such an issue, we introduce AdaGRPO, a novel framework that treats reward-guided optimization as selective admission rather than uniform pressure. Training is anchored in supervised negative log-likelihood, while the GRPO objective is gated by a binary, per-sample clip determined by two rollout diagnostics: policy-side difficulty and reward discriminability. Instances failing either diagnostic default to pure supervision, ensuring stability and mitigating the amplification of noisy gradients. We validate AdaGRPO on a large-scale e-commerce dataset. At the best intermediate checkpoint, it elevates HR@10 from 11.01% to 12.18% while constraining hallucination below 0.22%, and maintains robustness at the final checkpoint (HR@10 11.63%, hallucination 0.27%), outperforming fixed NLL--GRPO mixtures across the retrieval--validity frontier. In production A/B tests, AdaGRPO achieves statistically significant gains in click-through rate and dwell time, confirming its practical utility.

AI.tldr: 提出AdaGRPO框架，通过选择性应用GRPO目标（仅对策略不确定且奖励模型能有效区分的样本使用强化学习，其他样本保持监督学习），解决了生成式推荐中强化学习因奖励模型在曝光偏差数据上不准确而导致性能下降的问题。在电商数据集上HR@10提升1.17个百分点，幻觉率控制在0.22%以下，A/B测试中点击率和停留时间均有显著提升。
AI.motivation: 强化学习在生成式推荐中潜力巨大，但其效果严重依赖于奖励模型的可靠性。然而实际生产中的排序器（作为奖励模型）在曝光偏差日志上训练，导致对不同样本的评估准确性不一致。分层分析发现：奖励引导仅在策略不确定且排序器能有效区分真实物品时才有益，其他情况下要么无效要么有害，说明统一应用RL存在风险。
AI.method: 提出AdaGRPO框架：将奖励引导优化视为选择性准入而非统一施压。训练以监督负对数似然为基础，GRPO目标由二值逐样本裁剪门控决定，门控基于两个滚动诊断指标——策略侧难度（policy-side difficulty）和奖励可区分性（reward discriminability）。任一诊断失败的样本默认使用纯监督学习，确保稳定性并抑制噪声梯度放大。
AI.result: 在大型电商数据集上，最佳中间检查点将HR@10从11.01%提升至12.18%，幻觉率控制在0.22%以下；最终检查点保持鲁棒性（HR@10 11.63%，幻觉率0.27%），在检索-有效性边界上优于固定NLL-GRPO混合方案。生产A/B测试中，点击率和停留时间均取得统计显著提升。
AI.conclusion: AdaGRPO通过选择性应用强化学习有效解决了奖励模型不可靠的问题，在生成式推荐中实现了更优的性能与鲁棒性平衡，并在实际生产中验证了其实用价值。

title: Proxy Reward Internalization and Mechanistic Exploitation: A Learned Precursor to Reward Hacking and Its Generalization
summary: Reward hacking is usually studied after it becomes visible, once a model earns high proxy reward while failing the intended task. We instead study what proxy RL teaches before that failure appears. We introduce Proxy Reward Internalization and Mechanistic Exploitation (PRIME), a learned capability to assess task correctness, predict proxy acceptance, and reason about exploitable proxy--gold gaps. In coding RL environments with exploitable pytest rewards, we measure PRIME through chain-of-thought monitoring, direct probes, and activation-level concept vectors. We find that PRIME emerges in a staged sequence before sustained reward hacking, and that its current direct-probe score forecasts later hack onset and severity even when the visible hack rate is still low. PRIME also adapts when the evaluator changes, retargeting to whichever proxy--gold gap remains rewarded and persisting when gold reward suppresses overt hacking, and ablating its activation directions reduces hacking. Across checkpoints, in-domain PRIME tracks out-of-domain misalignment. Together these results suggest that exploitable proxy RL amplifies a proxy-internalization capability upstream of visible hacking, making PRIME a candidate early-warning signal for broader alignment risk.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PRIME概念，指模型在学习过程中内化代理奖励、预测代理接受度并利用代理-真实奖励差距的能力。研究发现PRIME在可见奖励黑客行为出现前会分阶段涌现，可直接探测评分预测后续黑客攻击的 onset 和 severity，且与分布外错误对齐存在关联，可作为早期预警信号。
AI.motivation: 现有研究通常在奖励黑客行为变得可见（即模型获得高代理奖励但未完成预期任务）后才分析它。本文希望在此之前（即黑客行为尚未显现时）研究代理强化学习教会了模型什么，探索是否存在更早的可测量信号。
AI.method: 在带有可被利用的pytest奖励的编程RL环境中，通过思维链监控、直接探测和激活层概念向量三种方式测量PRIME；分析其出现阶段、对后续黑客行为的预测能力、对评估器变化的适应性以及对激活方向进行消融实验。
AI.result: PRIME在持续奖励黑客行为出现前以阶段性顺序涌现；其直接探测评分可预测后续黑客 onset 和 severity（即使可见黑客率仍低）；PRIME能适应评估器变化并重新定位到仍被奖励的代理-真实差距；消融其激活方向可减少黑客行为；域内PRIME与域外错误对齐相关。
AI.conclusion: 可被利用的代理奖励会放大一种"代理内化"能力，该能力先于可见黑客行为出现，使PRIME成为更广泛对齐风险的潜在早期预警信号。

title: Emergence of Context Characteristics Sensitivity in Large Language Models
summary: During instruction fine-tuning (IFT), large language models (LLMs) learn to follow instructions by using the provided context to answer a query. While prior work has studied how context characteristics correlate with context usage by the LLM, this analysis has been limited to inference time, leaving open how these relationships are acquired in the first place. Here, we measure how models' sensitivity to such characteristics shifts across successive IFT stages: supervised fine-tuning (SFT), direct preference optimization (DPO), and reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR). Experiments across four models and three datasets show that SFT makes models more likely to use contexts that are easy to understand, such as containing high length, context-query similarity, and fluency. Post-SFT dynamics may either reinforce or resolve these preferences depending on the training dataset. Our findings reveal that context usage is actively reshaped at each IFT stage, and designing a balanced IFT dataset is important in ensuring robust context utilization of instruction-tuned models.

AI.tldr: 本文通过实验探究了指令微调（IFT）的各个阶段（SFT、DPO、RLVR）如何改变大语言模型对上下文特征的敏感性，发现SFT使模型倾向于使用易理解的上下文，而后续阶段可能加强或缓解这种偏好，强调了设计平衡IFT数据集的重要性。
AI.motivation: 以往研究仅在推理时分析了上下文特征与模型使用上下文的关系，但未探索这些关系是在训练过程中如何获得的。本文旨在填补这一空白，系统研究IFT各阶段如何塑造模型对上下文特征的敏感性。
AI.method: 在4种模型和3个数据集上，分别测量模型在SFT、DPO、RLVR三个阶段对上下文长度、上下文-查询相似度、流畅度等特征的敏感性变化，通过对比各阶段前后模型使用上下文的倾向性来量化这种转变。
AI.result: SFT使模型更倾向于使用高长度、高上下文-查询相似度、高流畅度的上下文；后续DPO和RLVR阶段可能加强或缓解这些偏好，具体取决于训练数据集。
AI.conclusion: 上下文使用模式在每个IFT阶段都会被主动重塑，设计平衡的IFT数据集对于确保微调后的模型能够稳健地利用上下文至关重要。

title: PIPE-Cypher: Automatic Enterprise Benchmark Generation for Text-to-Cypher Systems
summary: Enterprise property graphs vary widely in schema structure, internal terminology, domain assumptions, governance constraints, and user interaction patterns. A deployment-relevant Text2Cypher benchmark therefore reflects the questions users and agents actually ask of that graph. Creating such a benchmark is difficult because schemas and values are unique, and graph structure changes over time. Each NL-query pair must also be executable, use real graph entities, preserve diversity, and remain balanced across query types and difficulty levels. We present PIPE-Cypher, a local benchmark-generation pipeline that turns a live property graph and optional seed queries from customer questions, analyst logs, or agent tool calls into balanced NL-to-Cypher benchmarks. PIPE-Cypher combines schema profiling, reverse-query grounding, constrained generation, deterministic Cypher governance, execution validation, redaction, diversity controls, and a calibrated local LLM judge. Using local Qwen3.5-9B generation and judging, PIPE-Cypher exports 3,000 accepted FinBench/SNB examples, completes three audited ablation suites, calibrates judge behavior with human labels, and evaluates 11 local downstream models. The resulting benchmark is deliberately discriminative: zero-shot transfer is weak, while a few-shot control shows that schema-specific example banks can help compatible model families. Together, PIPE-Cypher makes Text2Cypher benchmarking a repeatable process that evolves with the graph, its users, and its target workloads.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PIPE-Cypher，一个本地化、可重复的基准测试生成流水线，能够根据实时属性图和种子查询自动生成高质量、多样性、可执行的NL-to-Cypher基准测试，并通过局部LLM完成生成与评判，使得Text2Cypher基准测试能够随图、用户和工作负载持续演化。
AI.motivation: 企业属性图在模式、术语、约束和交互模式上高度异质，现有通用Text2Cypher基准无法反映实际部署场景中的用户查询模式；手动构建部署相关的基准测试成本极高且难以维护。
AI.method: PIPE-Cypher：结合模式分析（schema profiling）、反向查询接地（reverse-query grounding）、受控生成（constrained generation）、确定性Cypher治理、执行验证、脱敏处理、多样性控制以及经过校准的本地LLM裁判（使用Qwen3.5-9B）。
AI.result: 生成了3,000个经过验证的FinBench/SNB示例，完成三项消融实验，用人工标注校准了LLM裁判行为，评估了11个本地下游模型；零样本迁移表现弱，而少样本控制表明特定模式的示例库对兼容模型族有帮助。
AI.conclusion: PIPE-Cypher使得Text2Cypher基准测试成为一个可重复、可演化的过程，能够适应图结构、用户需求和工作负载的变化，为部署相关的企业级NL2Cypher评估提供了实用方案。

title: Beyond Probabilistic Similarity: Structural, Temporal, and Causal Limitations of Retrieval-Augmented Generation in the Legal Domain
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has become a standard architectural response to unreliability in legal AI, yet high-profile failures, including fabricated citations submitted to courts and anachronistic legal content presented as current, continue to appear across jurisdictions. We argue that these failures are not residual confabulations to be eliminated by scaling language models, but symptoms of an architectural mismatch between probabilistic retrieval and the hierarchical, temporal, and institutional structure of legal knowledge. We develop the argument in three moves. First, we articulate the ontological commitment of legal knowledge as a triad of properties derivable from classical legal theory: hierarchical and mereological structure, diachronic dynamism under operational closure, and causal traceability of institutional provenance grounded in the duty of justification. Second, we identify three corresponding pathologies of retrieval (mereological blindness, diachronic blindness, and causal opacity), each developed with an operational definition, a failure mechanism, a canonical example, and detection criteria for diagnostic use. Third, we review the state of the art through this lens, showing that existing approaches address these requirements unevenly and do not yet compose into a paradigm that treats them as co-constitutive. From this analysis we derive four architectural commitments that characterize the deterministic-by-design direction for legal retrieval: ontological primacy, event reification, bitemporal correctness, and deterministic interaction protocols. The framework concerns quaestio juris (which norms apply and in what state) rather than the downstream tasks that act on identified norms, and addresses legislative and constitutional retrieval primarily, with interpretive time as an explicit extension.

AI.tldr: 本文指出法律AI中RAG系统的失败并非偶然的幻觉，而是概率检索与法律知识层级性、时间性和制度性结构之间的架构不匹配所致。作者提出法律知识的三元本体承诺（层级结构、历时动态性、制度溯源可解释性），识别三种检索病理（部分盲、时间盲、因果黑箱），并推导出四项确定性架构承诺（本体优先、事件物化、双时态正确性、确定性交互协议），为法律检索系统指明"确定性设计"方向。
AI.motivation: 法律AI中RAG系统频繁出现虚假引用、法律内容过时等严重失败，但现有研究将其视为可通过扩大模型规模消除的残余问题。作者认为这些失败源于更深层的架构性不匹配——概率检索机制与法律知识结构化本质之间的根本矛盾，因此需要从根本上重新审视法律检索的设计范式。
AI.method: 本文采用理论分析+架构推导的方法。首先从经典法学理论中提炼法律知识的三元本体承诺；然后针对每个承诺识别对应的检索病理，给出操作定义、失败机制、典型案例和检测标准；接着以此视角审视现有SOTA方案；最后推导出四项架构承诺，构建"确定性设计"框架。
AI.result: 识别出三种检索病理：部分盲（忽视法律规范间的层级-整体-部分关系）、时间盲（无法处理法律知识的历时演化与封闭运作）、因果黑箱（无法追溯规范的制度来源和论证义务）。基于此，推导出四项确定性设计承诺：本体优先（检索应服从法律知识结构而非统计模式）、事件物化（将法律事件作为第一类对象）、双时态正确性（区分法律的生效时点和适用时点）、确定性交互协议（检索行为可预期、可审计）。
AI.conclusion: 法律RAG不能通过扩大语言模型规模来解决，而需要转向"确定性设计"范式。该框架聚焦于"何种规范应被适用及其当前状态"（法律问题），而非下游任务。主要面向立法和宪法的检索场景，并明确将解释性时间作为扩展方向。

title: Overcoming Decoder Inconsistencies in Whisper for Dravidian and Low-Resource Languages
comment: Accepted at INTERSPEECH 2026, 5 pages, 1 figure, 5 tables
summary: Multilingual ASR models such as Whisper perform well on high-resource languages but exhibit substantially higher Word Error Rates (WER) for Dravidian languages compared to Indo-Aryan ones. Through linguistic and dataset analysis, we show that Dravidian languages have longer words, higher vocabulary diversity, and lower repetition, resulting in sparse token distributions and frequent character-level substitution errors. Baseline fine-tuning further reveals decoder imbalance between self-attention (linguistic context) and cross-attention (acoustic cues). Although synthetic token-repetition experiments indicate potential gains, they are impractical. Motivated by these observations, we introduce two decoder-level enhancements: Weighted-Attention, which adaptively balances attention sources, and Self-Conditioning, which reinjects intermediate predictions to improve token consistency. Experiments demonstrate consistent WER reductions for low-resource and agglutinative languages.

AI.tldr: 针对多语言ASR模型（如Whisper）在达罗毗荼语系表现差的问题，本文分析发现该语系词汇更长、多样性高、重复少导致稀疏token分布和字符级替代错误。提出Weighted-Attention和Self-Conditioning两种解码器增强方法，有效降低低资源语言和黏着语的WER。
AI.motivation: Whisper等多语言ASR模型在高资源语言上表现良好，但对达罗毗荼语系（相比印度-雅利安语系）的词错误率（WER）显著更高。现有方法未针对这一语言学差异进行优化。
AI.method: 1. 语言学与数据集分析揭示达罗毗荼语系词汇特性（长词、高多样性、低重复）导致稀疏token分布与字符级替代错误。2. 基线微调发现解码器自注意力（语言上下文）与交叉注意力（声学线索）不平衡。3. 提出两种解码器增强：Weighted-Attention（自适应平衡注意力来源）和Self-Conditioning（重新注入中间预测提升token一致性）。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提方法在低资源语言和黏着语上实现了一致的WER降低。
AI.conclusion: 通过语言学分析诊断问题根源，并设计针对性的解码器结构改进，有效缓解了多语言ASR在达罗毗荼语系等低资源黏着语上的性能差距。

title: STELLAR: Spatio-Temporal Environmental Learning with Latent Alignment and Refinement for Long-Tailed Species Distribution Modeling
summary: Joint Species Distribution Modeling (JSDM) is a key enabler for biodiversity monitoring and conservation planning. However, accurate JSDM faces two coupled challenges: environmental drivers and species distributions are inherently spatio-temporal, while species co-occurrence patterns exhibit complex non-linear community structure and severe long-tail imbalance driven by rare species. Existing approaches often address these factors in isolation, learning from static covariates or neglecting the historical trajectories of dynamic community structure. To overcome these limitations, we propose STELLAR (Spatio-Temporal Environmental Learning with Latent Alignment and Refinement), a novel framework that learns a shared latent space where dynamic habitat context and community structure are optimized jointly. Our approach integrates three complementary components: (1) a Graph-Temporal Encoder that employs graph attention and recurrent units to aggregate spatial neighborhood effects and capture the co-evolving historical dynamics of environmental context and community structure; (2) a Context-Anchored Latent Alignment mechanism that structures the latent space using a label-activated mixture prior and supervised contrastive learning, actively clustering species based on shared environmental preferences; and (3) an Imbalance-Aware Decoupled Decoding module that utilizes Asymmetric Loss to focus learning on hard, rare species samples, preventing mode collapse in the long tail. Experiments on the large-scale eBird dataset, curated with domain experts, demonstrate that our framework significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, particularly in predicting rare species and revealing interpretable species interactions.

AI.tldr: STELLAR提出了一种联合物种分布建模（JSDM）框架，通过图-时间编码器、上下文锚定潜在对齐和失衡感知解码模块，同时建模时空环境驱动因素与复杂群落结构，在eBird数据集上显著优于现有方法，尤其在稀有物种预测方面。
AI.motivation: 现有JSDM方法面临两大耦合挑战：环境驱动因子和物种分布具有内在的时空特性，而物种共现模式呈现复杂的非线性群落结构和由稀有物种导致的严重长尾不平衡。现有方法常孤立处理这些问题，或从静态协变量学习，或忽略动态群落结构的历史轨迹。
AI.method: 提出STELLAR框架，包含三个互补模块：(1) 图-时间编码器（Graph-Temporal Encoder），利用图注意力和循环单元聚合空间邻域效应并捕捉环境和群落的共演化历史动态；(2) 上下文锚定潜在对齐（Context-Anchored Latent Alignment），通过标签激活的混合先验和监督对比学习构建潜在空间，基于共享环境偏好主动聚类物种；(3) 失衡感知解耦解码（Imbalance-Aware Decoupled Decoding），利用非对称损失聚焦于困难稀有物种样本，防止长尾中的模式崩塌。
AI.result: 在大规模eBird数据集（经领域专家整理）上的实验表明，STELLAR显著优于最先进的基线方法，尤其在预测稀有物种和揭示可解释的物种相互作用方面表现突出。
AI.conclusion: STELLAR通过联合优化动态栖息地上下文和群落结构的共享潜在空间，有效解决了JSDM中时空环境与稀有物种长尾分布的耦合挑战，为生物多样性监测和保护规划提供了更准确的建模工具。

title: SearchSwarm: Towards Delegation Intelligence in Agentic LLMs for Long-Horizon Deep Research
summary: Large language models are increasingly expected to handle complex, long-horizon real-world tasks whose context demands can grow without bound, yet model context windows remain inherently finite. Recent work explores a paradigm where a main agent decomposes tasks and dispatches subtasks to subagents, which execute and return only summarized results, conserving the main agent's context budget. However, performing this well requires delegation intelligence: the ability to decompose complex tasks, determine when and what to delegate, and integrate returned results into the ongoing workflow. Training data for this capability is scarce in naturally occurring text, and to our knowledge, how to synthesize such data and train models to acquire this capability remains largely unexplored in the open-source community. To bridge this gap, we present a preliminary exploration targeting deep research, a representative long-horizon agent task. Specifically, we design a harness that guides the model toward high-quality task decomposition and delegation, while constraining subagents to return results properly to support the main agent's workflow. The harness-guided trajectories naturally encode correct delegation decisions, which we use as supervised fine-tuning data to internalize delegation intelligence into model weights. Our resulting model, SearchSwarm-30B-A3B, achieves 68.1 on BrowseComp and 73.3 on BrowseComp-ZH, the best results among all models of comparable scale. We will release our harness, model weights, and training data to facilitate future research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SearchSwarm框架，通过主智能体分解任务并委托子智能体执行的方式，解决大模型上下文窗口有限的问题。设计了引导式流程生成高质量委托决策数据，微调模型（SearchSwarm-30B-A3B）在BrowseComp和BrowseComp-ZH上取得同规模最佳结果（68.1和73.3）。
AI.motivation: 大模型上下文窗口有限，而真实世界任务上下文需求可能无限增长。现有委托范式虽能缓解此问题，但缺乏训练数据，且开源社区尚未探索如何合成数据并训练模型获得委托智能。
AI.method: 设计一个引导框架（harness），引导模型进行高质量的任务分解与委托，同时约束子智能体返回结构化的结果。利用该框架生成的轨迹作为监督微调数据，将委托智能内化到模型参数中。
AI.result: SearchSwarm-30B-A3B在BrowseComp上达到68.1，在BrowseComp-ZH上达到73.3，均为同规模模型最佳结果。
AI.conclusion: 通过引导式数据合成与微调，可以有效赋予模型委托智能能力，提升长周期代理任务的性能。开源所有资源以促进后续研究。

title: From Genes to Tokens: a GWAS-inspired Approach for Interpretable Stylometric Analysis
summary: This short paper introduces a stylometric interpretation method inspired by genome-wide association studies (GWAS). Each "gene" token's association with "phenotype" authorship is tested using logistic regression with multiple-comparison correction. Applied to English, German, and Russian corpora, the method detects statistically significant lexical markers distinctive of individual authors.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种受全基因组关联研究（GWAS）启发的风格测量解释方法，通过逻辑回归和多重比较校正来检测显著区分作者的词汇标记，并在英、德、俄语料库中验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统风格测量方法难以系统性地识别哪些具体词汇特征是特定作者的显著标志，且缺乏统计显著性检验。受GWAS在基因-表型关联分析中的启发，作者希望将类似框架引入作者身份识别领域。
AI.method: 将每个词（"基因"）与作者身份（"表型"）进行逻辑回归分析，并对多重比较进行校正（如Bonferroni或FDR校正），从而筛选出与特定作者统计显著关联的词汇标记。
AI.result: 在英语、德语和俄语三种语言的语料库上，该方法成功检测出具有统计显著性的、能够区分不同作者的词汇标记。
AI.conclusion: GWAS启发的框架为作者风格分析提供了一种有统计保障的特征归因方法，有望提升作者身份识别和风格解释的可信度。

title: A Joint Finite-Sample Certificate for Adaptive Selective Conformal Risk Control
summary: Selective predictors answer on confident inputs and abstain elsewhere; deploying one safely needs a single finite-sample certificate that simultaneously upper-bounds the selected risk, lower-bounds the acceptance probability $\pacc$ above a floor $\pmin$, and lower-bounds the deployment utility. This certificate must be valid under adaptive threshold selection from a finite grid of $m$ pairs on $\ncert$ samples. We give such a certificate for bounded, possibly non-monotone losses by treating the selected risk directly as a ratio rather than through a Hoeffding-style range bound. The construction couples three confidence bounds: a variance-adaptive empirical-Bernstein bound on the ratio risk, a Clopper--Pearson bound on acceptance, and a two-sided closeness bound on utility. Together they lower-bound the certified policy's utility absolutely and to within $2\gammau$ of the best over the \emph{certified set}, both non-vacuous whenever feasible; a regime-scoped third leg matches an external oracle, informative only where the risk margin $\gammar < α$ and vacuous at the headline operating points. Relative to the range-only Hoeffding-ratio construction this sharpens the acceptance-floor dependence from $1/\pmin$ to $1/\sqrt{\pmin}$, and a closed-form corollary identifies a per-pair regime in which our risk bound dominates a Hoeffding conformal risk control (Hoeffding--CRC) selective bound. Empirically, on ImageNet (three ResNets) and COCO val 2017 panoptic, the certificate opens a $+22$ pp certified-acceptance frontier over Hoeffding--CRC and is ${\approx}10{\times}$ tighter than a non-vacuous matched-valid baseline; these gains are regime-scoped, not universal, and absent on ADE20K. The certifier runs in $O(\ncert m)$ time.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对选择性预测器（选择性分类器）的有限样本联合证书，同时上界选择风险、下界接受概率和部署效用，支持自适应阈值选择，并在ImageNet和COCO上比现有方法（Hoeffding-CRC）提升约22个百分点，效率为O(n m)。
AI.motivation: 安全部署选择性预测器需要一个同时控制选择风险（selected risk）、保证接受概率不低于预设下限、并确保部署效用的有限样本联合证书，且该证书需能适应自适应阈值选择，现有方法（如Hoeffding-CRC）在这些方面存在不足。
AI.method: 将选择风险直接建模为比率（而非通过Hoeffding范围界），并耦合三个置信界：方差自适应的经验Bernstein界（用于比率风险）、Clopper-Pearson界（用于接受概率）、以及双边接近界（用于效用）。三者联合保证证书在自适应阈值选择下的有效性。
AI.result: 在ImageNet（三个ResNet）和COCO val 2017全景分割上，证书在认证接受前沿上比Hoeffding-CRC提高22个百分点，且比非空洞匹配有效基线紧约10倍；但在ADE20K上无增益。运行复杂度为O(n m)。
AI.conclusion: 提出的联合证书框架在选择性预测器的安全部署中显著优于现有方法，特别是在接受概率和风险界的紧致性方面，但增益具有场景范围性，并非普遍适用。

title: Multi-Turn Evaluation of Deep Research Agents Under Process-Level Feedback
comment: Published as a workshop paper at SCALE - ICML 2026 (Oral)
summary: Existing benchmarks for deep research agents (DRAs) assess only single-shot outputs, ignoring a key question: can DRAs improve their reports when guided by feedback? To investigate this, we conduct a multi-turn evaluation of DRAs under two feedback settings: self-reflection, in which the agent revises its report without any external diagnostic signal, and process-level feedback, in which the agent receives guidance targeting gaps in its research strategy. To enable process-level feedback, we design Research Gap Inference (RGI), a method that analyzes patterns of satisfied and unsatisfied rubric criteria to infer research-process gaps. Our analysis reveals three key findings: (i) under self-reflection, agents incorporate and regress on rubric criteria at nearly equal rates, yielding negligible net improvement; (ii) a single round of process-level feedback yields substantial gains, raising the normalized score by approximately $8$-$15$ points and yielding a roughly $35$-$40\%$ incorporation rate; (iii) these gains do not compound over subsequent turns, as agents regress on up to $24\%$ of previously satisfied criteria when rewriting the full report to address remaining gaps. Even with targeted guidance, reliable multi-turn improvement remains out of reach for the DRA architectures we evaluate. Our code and results are publicly available at https://github.com/sabharwalrishabh/Multi-Turn-Evaluation-of-DRAs.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了深度研究智能体（DRA）的多轮评估框架，引入Research Gap Inference（RGI）方法提供过程级反馈。实验发现：自主反思几乎无提升，而一轮过程级反馈可显著提升8-15分，但多轮改进效果无法持续累积，模型在修正时仍会丢失已达标标准。
AI.motivation: 现有DRA基准只评估单次输出，忽略了一个关键问题：智能体在反馈指导下能否持续改进其研究报告？作者旨在填补这一评估空白。
AI.method: 设计多轮评估框架，包含两种反馈设置：(1) 自我反思（无外部信号）；(2) 过程级反馈。为实现后者，提出Research Gap Inference (RGI)方法，通过分析已满足/未满足的评分标准模式来推断研究过程中的缺口，从而提供针对性指导。
AI.result: (i) 自我反思下，智能体引入和退步评分标准的比例几乎相等，净改进可忽略；(ii) 单轮过程级反馈可提升标准化分数约8-15分，引入率约35-40%；(iii) 多轮增益不累积，后续轮次中智能体在重写完整报告时，最多会丢失24%已达标标准。
AI.conclusion: 即使有针对性指导，可靠的（无退化）多轮改进对于当前DRA架构仍难以实现。

title: OpenBibleTTS: Large-Scale Speech Resources and TTS Models for Low-Resource Languages
summary: Recent advances in neural text-to-speech (TTS) and multilingual speech generation have substantially improved synthetic speech quality, yet these gains remain unevenly distributed across the world's languages. Existing models are still dominated by a small set of high-resource languages, while many studies of low-resource TTS are simulated on artificially downsampled high-resource corpora that do not reflect the orthographic variation and limited phonetic coverage encountered in genuinely underrepresented settings. As such, we introduce OpenBibleTTS, which is a large-scale benchmark for low-resource speech synthesis spanning 37 underrepresented languages. Moreover, a systematic comparison of various TTS architectures and large-scale speech generation models is conducted across in-domain Biblical text and out-of-domain material. Results show that no single system dominates across languages and metrics: Gemini-TTS achieves the highest listener ratings on most evaluated languages, but monolingual EveryVoice models trained on OpenBibleTTS remain strongest for intelligibility and are preferred in several African languages, while open from-scratch systems degrade sharply on out-of-domain text, revealing a persistent gap between broad multilingual coverage and reliable synthesis quality in underserved linguistic communities. We complement automatic evaluation with subjective human judgments, and open-source all processed datasets, alignments, and trained models to support future low-resource TTS research.

AI.tldr: OpenBibleTTS是一个面向37种低资源语言的大规模语音合成基准，系统比较发现没有单一模型在所有语言和指标上占优，Gemini-TTS在听感上表现最好，EveryVoice在可懂度和若干非洲语言中更强，开源系统在域外文本上性能严重下降。
AI.motivation: 现有TTS研究集中在高资源语言，低资源TTS研究常使用人为降采样的高资源语料库，不能反映真实低资源场景下的正字法差异和有限音系覆盖，缺乏面向真正低资源语言的系统基准。
AI.method: 构建了包含37种低资源语言的OpenBibleTTS基准，系统比较多种TTS架构（如EveryVoice、Gemini-TTS等）和大规模语音生成模型，在域内圣经文本和域外材料上进行评估，结合自动评估和主观听感判断。
AI.result: Gemini-TTS在大多数语言的听感评分中最高；EveryVoice模型在可懂度上最强，并在若干非洲语言中被偏好；开源从头训练模型在域外文本上性能急剧下降，多语言覆盖与可靠合成质量之间仍存在差距。
AI.conclusion: 低资源TTS不存在通用最优模型，多语言广度与合成质量之间存在持久矛盾，需进一步研究；开源了全部处理后的数据集、对齐和训练模型以推动未来研究。

title: Autonomous Aerial Manipulation via Contextual Contrastive Meta Reinforcement Learning
summary: Unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) are increasingly being deployed in logistics, service robotics, and other real-world applications, creating a growing demand for autonomous payload acquisition and delivery. Existing approaches typically assume pre-attached payloads or rely on specialized grippers, leaving versatile end-to-end aerial delivery largely unresolved, where different payloads induce highly variable flight dynamics, requiring a single policy to adapt online without manual calibration or explicit system identification. To this end, we study \textbf{A}utonomous \textbf{A}erial Manipulation via \textbf{Co}ntextual \textbf{Co}ntrastive Meta Reinforcement Learning (\textbf{\textit{Aco2}}), a fully autonomous aerial delivery setting in which a quadrotor equipped with a lightweight hook continuously picks up, transports, and delivers diverse handle-equipped objects between randomized locations, all without human intervention. First, we design a contextual observation encoder that infers a compact latent context from recent interaction history, enabling the policy to adapt online to payload-dependent dynamics. To further improve the quality of this context, we introduce a contrastive objective that structures the context embedding around task-relevant variations, improving generalization across diverse payloads without requiring explicit system identification. Trained entirely in simulation with extensive domain randomization, \textit{Aco2} can be directly deployed on a physical quadrotor without real-world fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: 提出Aco2方法，通过对比元强化学习让四旋翼无人机自主抓取和运送不同载荷的物体，无需人工干预或系统辨识。
AI.motivation: 现有无人机载荷操作依赖预装载荷或专用夹持器，缺乏能在线适应不同载荷动力学特性的端到端自主运送方案。
AI.method: 设计上下文观测编码器从交互历史推断潜变量，结合对比学习目标优化上下文嵌入，在仿真中通过域随机化训练后直接部署到真实四旋翼。
AI.result: 在仿真中训练的策略可直接部署到物理四旋翼，无需真实世界微调，实现对多种载荷的自主抓取与运送。
AI.conclusion: 对比元强化学习结合上下文编码器能有效实现无人机对多样化载荷的在线自适应，跨仿真到真实环境的零样本迁移可行。

title: Collaborative Human-Agent Protocol (CHAP)
summary: Foundation models are moving from response generation into operational roles. They plan across steps, call tools, request human input, coordinate with other agents, and increasingly carry responsibility for work that affects customers, claims, code, contracts, and clinical decisions. Production deployments are no longer one human supervising one model. They are multi-human, multi-agent collaborations that cross teams, time zones, and trust boundaries. The technical surface for this collaboration remains weakly specified. When an agent drafts a response and a human edits it before it ships, the moment of human judgement is the most valuable signal in the system. In current practice it is recorded, if at all, in application code, chat threads, ticket comments, and tribal memory. Two protocol standards address adjacent concerns: MCP standardises agent access to tools and data, and A2A standardises agent-to-agent interoperability. Neither defines the shared workspace in which humans and agents perform accountable work together. This paper presents CHAP, the Collaborative Human-Agent Protocol. Under CHAP, the override that used to vanish into a chat thread becomes a structured event carrying a diff, a rationale, and a content hash. The handoff between shifts becomes a portable envelope rather than a pinned message. The human approval of an agent's draft becomes a non-repudiable signed decision that can be replayed years later. The protocol achieves this through a small Core (workspaces, participants, tasks, artefacts, and an append-only evidence log) together with composable profiles that add review, modes, routing, deliberation, handoff, identity, signatures, and transparency-backed audit as deployments require them. Specification, reference implementation, conformance suite, and worked examples are available at: https://github.com/BrightbeamAI/chap

AI.tldr: 本文提出CHAP协议，为多人类、多智能体协作提供结构化、可审计、不可抵赖的共享工作空间，弥补现有MCP和A2A协议在人类与AI代理协作问责方面的空白。
AI.motivation: 当前AI代理已从响应生成走向运营角色，涉及多人类、多智能体跨团队跨时区协作，但技术规范严重缺失。人类对代理输出的审核、编辑、审批等关键判断信号要么丢失在聊天记录中，要么仅存于应用代码和口口相传中，缺乏可审计、可追溯的标准化协议。
AI.method: CHAP协议包含一个核心（Core）：工作空间、参与者、任务、工件和仅追加的证据日志；以及可组合的配置文件（profiles）：审核、模式、路由、商议、交接、身份、签名和透明审计。通过结构化事件（包含diff、理由、内容哈希）记录人类操作，通过便携信封实现交接，通过签名实现不可抵赖。
AI.result: 提供了完整规范、参考实现、一致性测试套件和工作示例。
AI.conclusion: CHAP填补了MCP（工具/数据接入）和A2A（代理间互操作）之间的空白，为人类与AI代理的问责协作提供了标准化的协议基础。

title: UXBench: Benchmarking User Experience in AI Assistants
summary: As AI assistants serve millions of users daily, evaluating user experience (UX) beyond general model capability has become increasingly important. We present UXBench, the first user-centric benchmark grounded in real user feedback signals for evaluating preference alignment and dialogue generation. The benchmark consists of three interconnected tasks, UX Judge, UX Eval, and UX Recovery, with 7,400 test instances extracted from over 70K interaction logs of a mainstream Chinese AI assistant. The dataset closely reflects real user distributions, covering 8 scenarios, 83 domains, and diverse failure patterns that pose severe challenges. Extensive experiments on 26 frontier language models provide novel insights into how well models perceive user experience and how improvements in model capability contribute to better dialogue engagement. Through comprehensive analysis of model behavior and performance gaps, we show that user feedback prediction is a learnable capability, where a reward model trained from in-the-wild feedback signals can achieve well-calibrated accuracy. We further document the systematic biases of LLM-as-a-judge evaluation protocols and compare typical response strategies that directly affect user experience. UXBench establishes a new evaluation landscape and calls for greater attention to tailored UX optimization, contributing to a user-centric scaling law that shapes the success of AI assistants.

AI.tldr: UXBench是首个基于真实用户反馈信号的AI助手用户体验基准，包含三个任务（UX Judge、UX Eval、UX Recovery），覆盖7.4万测试实例、8个场景和83个领域。实验表明用户反馈预测是可学习的能力，LLM-as-a-judge存在系统偏差，该基准呼吁关注用户中心的优化和缩放定律。
AI.motivation: 现有评估过于关注通用模型能力，缺乏从真实用户反馈出发、系统衡量AI助手用户体验（UX）的基准。
AI.method: 从主流中文AI助手的7万+交互日志中提取7,400个测试实例，构建三项关联任务：UX Judge（判断）、UX Eval（评估）、UX Recovery（恢复），覆盖8个场景、83个领域及多种失败模式。
AI.result: 在26个前沿语言模型上的实验表明：用户反馈预测是可学习的能力，奖励模型可达到良好校准的准确率；LLM-as-a-judge评估协议存在系统性偏差；不同响应策略直接影响用户体验。
AI.conclusion: UXBench建立了以用户为中心的评估新范式，呼吁关注针对性的UX优化，推动用户中心缩放定律的形成，以塑造更成功的AI助手。

title: Routine laboratory trajectories encode the onset of organ-level complications in cancer
summary: Routine laboratory panels drawn during cancer treatment constitute longitudinal physiological recordings of organ function, yet their temporal structure is discarded by single-timepoint prognostic tools. A transformer trained on 2,777,595 laboratory measurements from 3,905 patients with multiple myeloma or ovarian cancer predicted the two-year onset of 162 treatment-associated complications, including therapy-related myelodysplastic syndromes, spanning eight clinical categories, achieving 1.5- to 6.1-fold enrichment above prevalence at the group level. It matched or outperformed non-sequential baselines across grouped endpoints (AUROC gains up to +0.11), demonstrating that longitudinal laboratory trajectories capture evolving complication-specific physiology inaccessible from isolated measurements. Predictions generalised across both cancers, divergence concentrating in disease-specific complications, and biomarker masking recovered signatures consistent with established pathophysiology. External validation on MIMIC-IV and MMRF CoMMpass confirmed transferability across independent healthcare systems (AUROC up to 0.85). Routine oncological laboratory data encode organ deterioration weeks to months before clinical onset, enabling complication-specific surveillance without additional testing infrastructure.

AI.tldr: 利用Transformer模型分析癌症治疗中的常规实验室检测时序数据，可提前预测162种治疗相关并发症，性能优于单次检测方法，并跨癌症类型和医疗系统验证。
AI.motivation: 常规实验室数据在治疗过程中持续采集，包含纵向生理信息，但现有预后工具仅使用单次测量，丢弃了时间结构，错过了捕捉并发症演变的潜在机会。
AI.method: 在3,905名多发性骨髓瘤或卵巢癌患者的2,777,595条实验室测量数据上训练Transformer模型，预测两年内162种治疗相关并发症（涵盖8个临床类别），并通过外部数据集（MIMIC-IV, MMRF CoMMpass）验证。
AI.result: 模型在群体层面实现1.5-6.1倍的富集倍数（高于患病率），AUROC提升最高达+0.11，外部验证AUROC最高达0.85；预测能在临床发病前数周至数月识别器官功能恶化。
AI.conclusion: 纵向实验室轨迹编码了并发症特异的生理变化，可实现无需额外检测设备的并发症定向监测，具有良好的跨癌种和跨医疗系统泛化能力。

title: SIGA: Self-Evolving Coding-Agent Adapters for Scientific Simulation
summary: Advanced scientific simulators expose specialized input languages that turn simulation goals into executable configurations, but learning them can cost domain scientists hours to days. We study simulator setup as a problem of agent-tool interface grounding: what minimal simulator-specific adaptations are needed for an off-the-shelf coding agent to operate real scientific software? Our intuition is that coding agents already know how to navigate files, edit code, run commands, and repair outputs, but they lack the simulator's executable contract: its vocabulary, structural constraints, validation rules, and termination conditions. We introduce SIGA, a Simulator-Interface Grounding Adapter that supplies this contract through retrieval, procedural memory, in-trajectory validation, and validation-enforced termination. We primarily evaluate SIGA on GEOS, an open-source multiphysics simulator used in subsurface science. SIGA produces a complete GEOS deck in about five minutes with TreeSim above 0.90, matching an extended-budget human expert who took about three hours, a roughly 36x wall-clock speedup. On a harder held-out set, grounding raises TreeSim from 0.720 to 0.789, a roughly 10% relative gain over the bare agent, and can reduce the across-seed standard deviation by 16x. Self-evolution further improves SIGA by rewriting adapter contents from prior trajectories, yielding the highest held-out GEOS mean and matching or outperforming the strongest hand-designed configuration. Transfers to OpenFOAM and LAMMPS show that the dominant mechanism shifts by interface: validation matters most when structural completeness is the bottleneck, while memory and retrieval matter most when domain correctness is the bottleneck. These results suggest that lightweight, self-improvable grounding layers can turn general coding agents into practical operators of scientific software.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SIGA框架，通过轻量级接口接地层将通用编码智能体适配为科学模拟器操作员，在GEOS上实现约36倍加速（5分钟 vs 专家3小时），并通过自我进化进一步提升性能。
AI.motivation: 领域科学家学习专业模拟器输入语言耗时数小时到数天，现有编码智能体虽具备通用编程能力但缺乏模拟器的可执行契约（词汇、结构约束、验证规则、终止条件）。研究目标是找到将通用智能体接地到科学软件所需的最小适配量。
AI.method: 提出SIGA (Simulator-Interface Grounding Adapter)，通过四个组件供给模拟器契约：检索（词汇）、程序记忆（结构）、轨迹内验证（规则）、验证强制终止（条件）。支持自我进化——从先前轨迹重写适配器内容。
AI.result: 在GEOS上5分钟生成完整deck，TreeSim>0.90，匹配专家3小时产出（36倍加速）。困难集接地提升TreeSim从0.720到0.789（+10%），标准差降低16倍。自我进化达到最高均值。迁移到OpenFOAM和LAMMPS显示主导机制因接口而异。
AI.conclusion: 轻量级、可自我改进的接地层可以将通用编码智能体转化为科学软件的实际操作员，不同模拟器接口瓶颈不同，验证和检索各有侧重。

title: Code Is More Than Text: Uncertainty Estimation for Code Generation
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed as code generators, where silently wrong programs pose real safety and reliability risks. Reliable uncertainty estimation (UE) is essential for selective prediction, human-in-the-loop review, and downstream agentic decisions. Yet most existing code UE methods are inherited from natural language (NL) generation and ignore properties that make code distinct. We argue that code differs from NL in three ways: a single wrong token can break an entire program (token fragility); algorithmic intent and concrete implementation can disagree independently (intent-code gap); and programs can be executed (executability). We instantiate these properties as three orthogonal uncertainty axes: lexical (Top-K token entropy), algorithmic (pseudo-code consistency), and functional (behavioral consistency). Across five code LLMs, our three-axis ensemble improves average AUROC from 0.696 for the strongest NL-derived baseline to 0.776 (+8.1 points). Notably, on Qwen3-14B, our single-pass Top-K token entropy matches the strongest multi-pass baseline while being over 3x cheaper; across models, it remains a competitive low-cost signal. These results suggest that code UE deserves code-specific design rather than direct NL ports.

AI.tldr: 本文提出代码生成任务中不确定性估计的三个正交维度（词法、算法、功能），通过集成方法将AUROC提升8.1个百分点，证明代码不确定性估计需要专门设计而非直接移植自然语言方法。
AI.motivation: 现有代码不确定性估计方法直接继承自自然语言生成，忽略了代码独有的三个特性：单个错误token可导致整个程序崩溃（词法脆弱性）、算法意图与具体实现可能不一致（意图-代码鸿沟）、以及程序可被执行验证（可执行性）。
AI.method: 提出三个正交的不确定性估计轴：词法轴（Top-K token熵）、算法轴（伪代码一致性）、功能轴（行为一致性）。通过集成这三个信号进行不确定性评估。
AI.result: 在五个代码LLM上，三轴集成方法将平均AUROC从最强NL基线的0.696提升至0.776（+8.1点）。其中Qwen3-14B上单次Top-K token熵匹配最强多遍基线，且成本低3倍以上。
AI.conclusion: 代码不确定性估计需要代码专属设计，而非直接移植自然语言方法；词法轴作为低成本信号具有竞争力。

title: A Theoretical Analysis of Memory and Overfitting Phenomena in Stochastic Interpolation Models
summary: This paper provides a theoretical account of memorization in stochastic interpolation models. By leveraging closed-form expressions for the optimal velocity field and the associated score function, we show that, in the continuous-time oracle setting, both deterministic and stochastic generation processes recover training samples. Under Euler discretization, generated samples remain centered around training samples, with deviations controlled by the step size. We further analyze generation in the presence of estimation errors and show that accumulated estimation errors control the endpoint deviation from the training set. These results imply that the generated sample admits a representation as a training sample perturbed by three controlled terms: a discretization-induced bound, an estimation-error-induced bound, and stochastic Gaussian noise. Based on this characterization, we provide theoretical definitions of overfitting and underfitting in generative models. Synthetic simulations support our theoretical findings.

AI.tldr: 本文从理论上分析了随机插值模型中的记忆化现象。通过利用最优速度场和对应分数函数的闭式表达式，我们证明了在连续时间oracle设置下，确定性和随机生成过程都能恢复训练样本。在欧拉离散化下，生成样本仍围绕训练样本集中，偏差由步长控制。我们还分析了存在估计误差时的生成过程，表明累积估计误差控制了终点与训练集的偏差。这些结果表明生成样本可表示为训练样本加上三个受控扰动项：离散化导致的误差、估计误差导致的扰动和随机高斯噪声。基于此特征，我们提供了生成模型中过拟合和欠拟合的理论定义。合成仿真支持了我们的理论发现。
AI.motivation: 旨在从理论上理解随机插值模型中的记忆化行为，即模型为什么会记忆训练样本，以及这种记忆化在连续和离散情况下的表现。
AI.method: 利用最优速度场和分数函数的闭式表达式进行理论分析；分别考虑连续时间oracle设置、欧拉离散化设置以及存在估计误差的设置；将生成样本分解为训练样本加三个受控扰动项。
AI.result: 连续时间oracle设置下，确定性和随机生成过程都能完全恢复训练样本；欧拉离散化下生成样本围绕训练样本，偏差受步长控制；存在估计误差时，累积误差控制终点偏差；生成样本可表示为训练样本加离散化误差、估计误差和随机噪声三个可控项。
AI.conclusion: 提供了生成模型中过拟合和欠拟合的理论定义，为理解生成模型的记忆化行为提供了理论基础。

title: Evaluation Cards: An Interpretive Layer for AI Evaluation Reporting
summary: AI evaluation results are produced at scale but reported inconsistently across leaderboards, model cards, benchmark papers, and company blogs. The cost is interpretive: readers cannot reliably compare results across sources, identify what a report omits, or trace an aggregate claim to its underlying evidence. Recent efforts address isolated components but leave three gaps: they cover only narrow slices of the evaluation lifecycle and do not compose into a single interpretable record; they specify static representations that do not differentiate the questions different stakeholders bring to the same evidence; and they remain proposals on paper, lacking the extraction infrastructure required for adoption at scale. We present \EvalCards{}, an operational reporting layer that composes benchmark metadata, evaluation run data, and model metadata into a unified record. We (1) derive a reporting schema from a structured review of 52 papers and 10 stakeholder interviews, (2) implement four interpretive signals (reproducibility, documentation completeness, provenance and risk, and score comparability), rendered through reader modes calibrated to research and non-research audiences, and (3) deploy a monitoring tool that applies \EvalCards{} across 5,816 models, 635 benchmarks, and 101,843 results, surfacing systematic gaps in current reporting practice.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EvalCards，一个统一的评估报告层，通过整合基准元数据、评估运行数据和模型元数据，解决了AI评估结果报告不一致、无法跨源比较和缺乏追溯性的问题。系统覆盖5,816个模型、635个基准和101,843个结果，揭示了当前报告实践中的系统性缺陷。
AI.motivation: 当前AI评估结果在排行榜、模型卡片、基准论文和公司博客中报告不一致，导致读者无法可靠地跨源比较结果、识别报告遗漏的内容，或将聚合声明追溯到其基础证据。现有方案仅覆盖评估生命周期中的孤立片段，缺乏可组合的统一记录；静态表示无法区分不同利益相关者对同一证据的不同关注点；且缺乏可大规模部署的提取基础设施。
AI.method: (1) 通过对52篇论文的结构化审查和10位利益相关者的访谈，推导出报告模式；(2) 实现四种解释性信号（可复现性、文档完整性、来源与风险、分数可比性），并通过针对研究与非研究受众的阅读模式呈现；(3) 部署监控工具，在5,816个模型、635个基准和101,843个结果上应用EvalCards，揭示当前报告实践中的系统性缺陷。
AI.result: 成功在5,816个模型、635个基准和101,843个结果上部署EvalCards监控工具，能够系统性揭示当前AI评估报告实践中的空白和缺陷。
AI.conclusion: EvalCards通过提供一个可操作、可组合且可解释的统一报告层，填补了现有评估报告方案的三项关键空白（生命周期覆盖不足、利益相关者需求差异、缺乏部署基础设施），为大规模AI评估报告的标准化和可追溯性奠定了基础。

title: Clinically Grounded Privacy Evaluation of Medical LMs
summary: Medical language models (LMs) can memorize and reproduce protected health information, but privacy evaluations often focus on recovery of training text rather than disclosure under realistic threat models. We introduce a clinically grounded framework that evaluates leakage along a graded axis of adversarial access, ranging from publicly inferable demographics to leaked note fragments. At each tier, we measure verbatim memorization of patient-specific text and semantic leakage of sensitive diagnoses. Applying the framework to an LM pretrained on 378k clinical notes, we find that routine encounter metadata (i.e. name, date of birth, provider, practice, visit date) elicits high rates of verbatim memorization across a patient's timeline and sensitive-diagnosis recovery (AUROC 0.91 for abortion, 0.81 for HIV). At the same time, exact-match memorization can overstate disclosure: 36% of memorized tokens reflect templated documentation. Our work highlights the risks of training on longitudinal clinical data, providing a practical framework for contextual privacy evaluation of medical LMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个临床导向的隐私评估框架，按对抗访问等级（从公开可推断的人口统计信息到泄露的笔记片段）评估医学语言模型的隐私泄露。在37.8万份临床笔记预训练的模型上，发现常规就诊元数据（姓名、出生日期等）即可引发高比例的逐字记忆和敏感诊断恢复（流产AUROC 0.91，HIV 0.81），但36%的记忆token来自模板化文档，表明逐字匹配可能高估实际披露风险。
AI.motivation: 现有医学语言模型隐私评估多关注训练文本恢复，而非现实威胁模型下的信息泄露，缺乏临床情境化的分级评估框架。
AI.method: 设计一个分级的对抗访问框架（从公开信息到笔记片段），在每个层级测量逐字记忆和语义泄露；对预训练于37.8万份临床笔记的LM进行实证评估。
AI.result: 常规元数据即可导致高比例逐字记忆和敏感诊断恢复；36%的记忆token来自模板化文档，表明逐字匹配可能高估实际泄露风险。
AI.conclusion: 纵向临床数据训练存在隐私风险，但需结合临床情境进行评估；提出的框架可为医学LM提供上下文相关的隐私评估方法。

title: Physics-Guided Dual Decoding and Spectral Supervision for Global 3D Hydrometeor Prediction
summary: While global data-driven models excel at predicting continuous atmospheric variables, three-dimensional hydrometeor forecasting remains challenging due to the zero-inflated, long-tailed distributions of these variables. Standard deep learning optimization often yields overly smooth forecasts, attenuating extreme events and spatial textures. We propose PredHydro-Net, a physics-guided dual-decoding framework that mitigates this smoothing. To resolve multi-variable optimization conflicts, it employs a decoupled architecture where macroscopic thermodynamic and dynamic fields unidirectionally modulate hydrometeor generation. By integrating wavelet-based frequency decoupling, spectral amplitude matching, and adversarial training, the model achieves a favorable trade-off between quantitative accuracy and spatial fidelity. In a 72-h global evaluation, PredHydro-Net outperforms both spatiotemporal deep learning baselines (Earthformer and PredRNNv2) and the operational Global Forecast System (GFS) in extreme-event detection and spectral representation. Furthermore, it demonstrates strong climatological consistency with Global Precipitation Measurement (GPM) satellite retrievals. The model reasonably reproduces the three-dimensional cloud structures in extreme weather events, such as Hurricane Ian. Feature attribution confirms its dependence on physical precursors such as relative humidity and wind convergence, offering a robust, physics-informed approach to long-tailed atmospheric prediction.

AI.tldr: PredHydro-Net是面向三维水凝物预报的物理引导双解码框架，通过解耦架构、小波频域解耦和对抗训练，在72小时全球评估中优于深度学习和传统数值预报模型，能更好地捕捉极端事件和空间纹理。
AI.motivation: 全球数据驱动模型在连续大气变量预测上表现优异，但三维水凝物预测因零膨胀、长尾分布特性面临挑战。标准深度学习优化易产生过度平滑的预测，弱化极端事件和空间纹理，亟需专门的方法解决这一问题。
AI.method: 提出了PredHydro-Net物理引导双解码框架：(1) 解耦架构，宏观热力学/动力学场单向调制水凝物生成；(2) 小波频域解耦与频谱幅度匹配；(3) 对抗训练；(4) 在72小时全球评估中对比Earthformer、PredRNNv2和GFS。
AI.result: PredHydro-Net在极端事件检测和频谱表征上优于时空深度学习基线（Earthformer、PredRNNv2）和全球预报系统GFS；与GPM卫星反演具有良好气候一致性；能合理再现飓风Ian等极端天气的三维云结构。
AI.conclusion: 特征归因确认模型依赖相对湿度和风辐合等物理前兆因子，提供了一种稳健的、物理知情的方法来解决长尾大气预测问题。

title: Automated IEP Generation from Traditional Chinese Parent-Teacher Interviews via Corpus-Grounded Feature Diffusion
summary: Writing Individualized Education Programs (IEPs) is a high-labor, knowledge-intensive document burden; English-language research has demonstrated that generative AI can significantly reduce drafting time, yet automated IEP generation in Traditional Chinese remains virtually unexplored due to domain data scarcity, strict privacy regulations, and the absence of local evaluation benchmarks. We propose a low-resource fine-tuning pipeline centered on Corpus-Grounded Feature Diffusion (CGFD): (1) 25 dual-expert high-score seed transcripts are selected via a tau threshold with flag-aware score caps; (2) a FeatureProfile (sentence length, structure, quantification templates) is extracted from seeds and injected into LLM prompts alongside Verbalized-Sampling-style diversity control to drive diffusion; (3) 15 expert gold seeds are used as diffusion anchors, targeting 585 samples; 567 valid diffusion samples are obtained, yielding a 582-sample training set used to fine-tune Breeze-7B with QLoRA; (4) schema-constrained inference via Grammar-Constrained Decoding (GCD) enforces a hierarchical SMART Goal Ladder schema at inference time. Ablation results on a 55-sample schema stress set reveal an unexpected finding: GCD is counterproductive under Traditional Chinese token budgets -- the no-GCD path achieves 100% schema pass rate at 34% lower median latency, outperforming GCD on both reliability and speed. On the n=10 formal hold-out, the no-GCD inference path achieves BERTScore F1 = 0.779, exceeding GPT-5.4 (0.726), DeepSeek-V3.2 (0.703), Gemini-3-Flash-Preview (0.703), and Llama-4-Maverick (0.700) zero-shot baselines while maintaining fully local, air-gapped inference. This system addresses a gap in Traditional Chinese special-education NLP and offers a scalable, privacy-preserving local inference solution under an industrial engineering paradigm.

AI.tldr: 提出CGFD低资源微调流水线，基于15个种子样本扩散至582个训练集微调Breeze-7B，在中文特教IEP生成任务上以无GCD推理路径实现BERTScore F1=0.779，超越GPT-5等闭源模型，且支持完全本地化部署。
AI.motivation: 中文IEP撰写是劳动密集、知识密集型任务，生成式AI可大幅减少草拟时间，但由于领域数据稀缺、隐私法规严格、缺乏本地评估基准，繁体中文IEP自动生成几乎空白。
AI.method: (1) 基于tau阈值和flag-aware评分筛选25个双专家高分种子；(2) 提取FeatureProfile注入LLM提示，结合Verbalized-Sampling多样性控制驱动扩散；(3) 15个专家金种子作为锚点，扩散至585样本，最终获582训练集微调Breeze-7B+QLoRA；(4) 推理时使用Grammar-Constrained Decoding强制分层SMART目标框架，但实验发现无GCD路径更优。
AI.result: 在n=55的模式压力集上，无GCD路径实现100%模式通过率，中位延迟降低34%。在n=10正式留出集上，无GCD推理路径BERTScore F1=0.779，超越GPT-5.4(0.726)、DeepSeek-V3.2(0.703)、Gemini-3-Flash-Preview(0.703)、Llama-4-Maverick(0.700)等零样本基线。
AI.conclusion: 填补了繁体中文特殊教育NLP的空白，提供了一种可扩展、隐私保护的本地推理解决方案。关键发现：在繁体中文token预算下，GCD反而适得其反，无GCD路径在可靠性和速度上均更优。

title: EinSort: Sorting is All We Need for Tensorizing LLM
summary: Tensor networks provide efficient representations for compressing large neural networks. By carefully designing shapes and topologies, they can significantly reduce memory and computational costs. However, identifying implicit low-rank structures in large foundation models remains challenging due to their enormous scale and un-structured weight distributions. We propose an adaptive tensorization method that discovers inherent low-rank structure in a target tensor by index ordering. Experiments on weight and KV-cache compression demonstrate improved reconstruction quality compared to baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种自适应张量化方法，通过索引排序发现目标张量中的固有低秩结构，在权重和KV缓存压缩上优于基线。
AI.motivation: 大型基础模型规模巨大且权重分布非结构化，难以识别其中的隐式低秩结构，现有张量网络方法虽能压缩但无法有效处理这一问题。
AI.method: 提出自适应张量化方法，通过索引排序来发现目标张量中的固有低秩结构，实现高效压缩。
AI.result: 在权重压缩和KV缓存压缩实验中，与基线方法相比，重建质量有所提升。
AI.conclusion: 自适应张量化方法能够有效发现大型模型中的低秩结构，提升压缩效果和重建质量。

title: AGENTSERVESIM: A Hardware-aware Simulator for Multi-Turn LLM Agent Serving
summary: Multi-turn LLM agents interleave model calls with external tool invocations, shifting serving from stateless request processing to stateful program execution. Serving these workloads requires scheduling, KV-cache management, and routing policies that use program-level context, including turn dependencies, tool-induced gaps, and reusable KV state. Evaluating such policies directly on real systems is costly, since each design point may require dedicated accelerator time across arrival rates, model scales, serving-instance counts, and memory hierarchies. Simulation offers a scalable alternative, but existing LLM serving simulators target stateless request-level workloads and therefore omit the core dynamics of agent serving: multi-turn program execution, cross-turn cache locality, and KV-cache residency during tool gaps. We present AGENTSERVESIM, a hardware-aware simulator for multi-turn LLM agent serving. AGENTSERVESIM evaluates serving policies at program granularity through composable modules: a Program Orchestrator preserves program identity and turn order, a Tool Simulator materializes tool-induced gaps, a Session-Aware Router maintains program-to-instance affinity for cache-aware dispatch, and a KV Residency Model tracks policy-defined KV placement across HBM, host DRAM/CXL, and eviction. Across real serving deployments and hardware configurations, AGENTSERVESIM reproduces real-system behavior within 6% error across key performance metrics while running entirely on commodity CPUs. These results show that AGENTSERVESIM enables controlled, repeatable exploration of agent-serving policies without requiring exhaustive deployment on costly accelerators.

AI.tldr: 提出AGENTSERVESIM，一个面向多轮LLM智能体服务的硬件感知模拟器，能够在CPU上以6%误差内复现真实系统行为，用于评估服务策略而不需昂贵加速器部署。
AI.motivation: 多轮LLM智能体服务涉及有状态程序执行，现有模拟器只针对无状态请求级负载，忽略了程序级上下文（如跨轮缓存局部性、工具间隙中的KV缓存驻留）等核心动态，直接评估成本高昂。
AI.method: 通过可组合模块构建：程序编排器维护程序身份和轮次顺序；工具模拟器模拟工具引起的间隙；会话感知路由器维持程序到实例的亲和性实现缓存感知调度；KV驻留模型跟踪策略定义的KV放置（HBM、主机DRAM/CXL、逐出）。
AI.result: 在真实服务部署和硬件配置下，AGENTSERVESIM在关键性能指标上与真实系统误差在6%以内，且完全在商用CPU上运行。
AI.conclusion: AGENTSERVESIM支持对智能体服务策略进行可控、可重复的探索，无需在昂贵加速器上进行大规模部署。

title: Titans-as-a-Layer: Test-Time Memory for Conversational Speech Emotion Recognition
comment: ICML 2026 Workshop on Machine Learning for Audio
summary: Speech emotion recognition (SER) is commonly formulated as utterance-level classification, although conversational emotion depends on a speaker's usual vocal range and the emotional context established by previous utterances.
